### RANK 1 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        Answer res = new Answer();
        return res.maxArithmeticLength(nums);
    }
}


public class Answer {
    public int maxArithmeticLength(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        int m = n - 1;
        int[] D = new int[m];
        
        for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) {
            D[i] = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
        }
        
        int[] leftRun = new int[m];
        leftRun[0] = 1;
        for (int i = 1; i < m; i++) {
            if (D[i] == D[i - 1]) {
                leftRun[i] = leftRun[i - 1] + 1;
            } else {
                leftRun[i] = 1;
            }
        }
        
        int[] rightRun = new int[m];
        rightRun[m - 1] = 1;
        for (int i = m - 2; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (D[i] == D[i + 1]) {
                rightRun[i] = rightRun[i + 1] + 1;
            } else {
                rightRun[i] = 1;
            }
        }
        
        int maxLen = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) {
            if (leftRun[i] > maxLen) {
                maxLen = leftRun[i];
            }
        }
        
        if (maxLen < m) {
            maxLen++;
        }
        
        for (int i = 1; i < m; i++) {
            int sum = D[i - 1] + D[i];
            if (sum % 2 == 0) {
                int c = sum / 2;
                int currentLen = 2;
                
                if (i >= 2 && D[i - 2] == c) {
                    currentLen += leftRun[i - 2];
                }
                
                if (i + 1 < m && D[i + 1] == c) {
                    currentLen += rightRun[i + 1];
                }
                
                if (currentLen > maxLen) {
                    maxLen = currentLen;
                }
            }
        }
        
        return maxLen + 1;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        Answer res = new Answer();
        return res.maxActivatedPoints(points);
    }
}

public class Answer {
    
    public int maxActivatedPoints(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        int[] parent = new int[n];
        int[] size = new int[n];
        
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            parent[i] = i;
            size[i] = 1;
        }
        
        Map<Integer, Integer> xMap = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Integer> yMap = new HashMap<>();
        
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];
            
            if (xMap.containsKey(x)) {
                union(i, xMap.get(x), parent, size);
            } else {
                xMap.put(x, i);
            }
            
            if (yMap.containsKey(y)) {
                union(i, yMap.get(y), parent, size);
            } else {
                yMap.put(y, i);
            }
        }
        
        int max1 = 0;
        int max2 = 0;
        
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (parent[i] == i) {
                if (size[i] > max1) {
                    max2 = max1;
                    max1 = size[i];
                } else if (size[i] > max2) {
                    max2 = size[i];
                }
            }
        }
        
        return max1 + max2 + 1;
    }
    
    private int find(int i, int[] parent) {
        if (parent[i] == i) {
            return i;
        }
        return parent[i] = find(parent[i], parent);
    }
    
    private void union(int i, int j, int[] parent, int[] size) {
        int rootI = find(i, parent);
        int rootJ = find(j, parent);
        if (rootI != rootJ) {
            parent[rootI] = rootJ;
            size[rootJ] += size[rootI];
        }
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 2 ###
[Q3_START]
#include <vector>
#include <algorithm>

using namespace std;

class Solution {
    struct Run {
        long long val;
        int start;
        int len;
    };
    
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        // Any array of size 3 or less can always be made arithmetic by changing at most 1 element
        if (n <= 3) return n;

        vector<long long> d(n - 1);
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; ++i) {
            d[i] = (long long)nums[i+1] - nums[i];
        }

        // Group the difference array into contiguous runs of identical values
        vector<Run> runs;
        int start = 0;
        while (start < n - 1) {
            int end = start;
            while (end < n - 1 && d[end] == d[start]) {
                end++;
            }
            runs.push_back({d[start], start, end - start});
            start = end;
        }

        int max_len = 3; 

        for (int i = 0; i < runs.size(); ++i) {
            long long val = runs[i].val;
            int r_start = runs[i].start;
            int L = runs[i].len;

            // 1. Extend by 1 element (change an adjacent boundary element in nums)
            max_len = max(max_len, min(n, L + 2));

            // 2. Extend by 2 elements to the left
            if (r_start >= 2 && d[r_start - 2] + d[r_start - 1] == 2LL * val) {
                max_len = max(max_len, L + 3);
            }

            // 3. Extend by 2 elements to the right
            if (r_start + L + 1 < n - 1 && d[r_start + L] + d[r_start + L + 1] == 2LL * val) {
                max_len = max(max_len, L + 3);
            }

            // 4. Merge with a future run of the exact same difference
            // Since the gap must be exactly 2 elements in 'd', the next run must start at r_start + L + 2
            // We only need to check the next few runs to find a potential match.
            for (int j = i + 1; j < min((int)runs.size(), i + 4); ++j) {
                if (runs[j].val == val && runs[j].start == r_start + L + 2) {
                    if (d[r_start + L] + d[r_start + L + 1] == 2LL * val) {
                        max_len = max(max_len, L + runs[j].len + 3);
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        return max_len;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
#include <vector>
#include <unordered_map>
#include <unordered_set>
#include <algorithm>

using namespace std;

class Solution {
    // Standard Disjoint Set Union (DSU) to group connected components
    struct DSU {
        vector<int> parent;
        vector<int> sz;
        DSU(int n) {
            parent.resize(n);
            sz.resize(n, 1);
            for(int i = 0; i < n; ++i) parent[i] = i;
        }
        int find(int i) {
            if (parent[i] == i)
                return i;
            return parent[i] = find(parent[i]); // Path compression
        }
        void unite(int i, int j) {
            int root_i = find(i);
            int root_j = find(j);
            if (root_i != root_j) {
                // Union by size
                if (sz[root_i] < sz[root_j]) {
                    parent[root_i] = root_j;
                    sz[root_j] += sz[root_i];
                } else {
                    parent[root_j] = root_i;
                    sz[root_i] += sz[root_j];
                }
            }
        }
    };

public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        if (n == 0) return 1;

        DSU dsu(n);
        unordered_map<int, vector<int>> x_map;
        unordered_map<int, vector<int>> y_map;

        // Group points by their X and Y coordinates
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            x_map[points[i][0]].push_back(i);
            y_map[points[i][1]].push_back(i);
        }

        // Connect all points that share the same X coordinate
        for (auto& pair : x_map) {
            const vector<int>& pts = pair.second;
            for (int i = 1; i < pts.size(); ++i) {
                dsu.unite(pts[0], pts[i]);
            }
        }

        // Connect all points that share the same Y coordinate
        for (auto& pair : y_map) {
            const vector<int>& pts = pair.second;
            for (int i = 1; i < pts.size(); ++i) {
                dsu.unite(pts[0], pts[i]);
            }
        }

        // Find the unique components and record their sizes
        unordered_set<int> unique_roots;
        vector<int> sizes;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            int root = dsu.find(i);
            if (unique_roots.find(root) == unique_roots.end()) {
                unique_roots.insert(root);
                sizes.push_back(dsu.sz[root]);
            }
        }

        // Sort sizes in descending order to find the largest two
        sort(sizes.rbegin(), sizes.rend());

        // If there's only 1 component, just add 1 point to it
        if (sizes.size() == 1) {
            return sizes[0] + 1;
        }
        
        // Otherwise, bridge the two largest components together
        return sizes[0] + sizes[1] + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 3 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    vector<int> sagar(vector<int>& suraj) {
        int sonam = suraj.size();
        vector<int> santosh(sonam, 1);
        if (sonam > 1) santosh[1] = 2;
        for (int i = 2; i < sonam; i++) {
            if (suraj[i] - suraj[i-1] == suraj[i-1] - suraj[i-2]) {
                santosh[i] = santosh[i-1] + 1;
            } else {
                santosh[i] = 2;
            }
        }
        return santosh;
    }

    vector<int> santosh(vector<int>& suraj) {
        int sonam = suraj.size();
        vector<int> sagar(sonam, 1);
        if (sonam > 1) sagar[sonam-2] = 2;
        for (int i = sonam - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (suraj[i+1] - suraj[i] == suraj[i+2] - suraj[i+1]) {
                sagar[i] = sagar[i+1] + 1;
            } else {
                sagar[i] = 2;
            }
        }
        return sagar;
    }

    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int sonam = nums.size();
        if (sonam <= 3) return sonam;
        vector<int> suraj = sagar(nums);
        vector<int> suraj2 = santosh(nums);
        
        int sagar2 = 2;
        for (int i = 0; i < sonam; i++) {
            if (suraj[i] > sagar2) {
                sagar2 = suraj[i];
            }
        }
        sagar2++;
        if (sagar2 > sonam) {
            sagar2 = sonam;
        }

        for (int i = 1; i < sonam - 1; i++) {
            if ((nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) % 2 == 0) {
                int d = (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) / 2;
                int l = (i >= 2 && nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == d) ? suraj[i-1] : 1;
                int r = (i + 2 < sonam && nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == d) ? suraj2[i+1] : 1;
                if (l + r + 1 > sagar2) {
                    sagar2 = l + r + 1;
                }
            }
        }
        return sagar2;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int sagar(int u, vector<int>& santosh) {
        if (santosh[u] == u) return u;
        return santosh[u] = sagar(santosh[u], santosh);
    }

    void sonam(int u, int v, vector<int>& santosh, vector<int>& suraj) {
        int a = sagar(u, santosh);
        int b = sagar(v, santosh);
        if (a != b) {
            santosh[b] = a;
            suraj[a] += suraj[b];
        }
    }

    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        vector<int> santosh(n);
        vector<int> suraj(n, 1);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) santosh[i] = i;

        vector<vector<int>> p = points; 
        vector<pair<int, int>> x, y;
        
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            x.push_back({p[i][0], i});
            y.push_back({p[i][1], i});
        }
        
        sort(x.begin(), x.end());
        sort(y.begin(), y.end());
        
        for (int i = 1; i < n; i++) {
            if (x[i].first == x[i - 1].first) {
                sonam(x[i].second, x[i - 1].second, santosh, suraj);
            }
            if (y[i].first == y[i - 1].first) {
                sonam(y[i].second, y[i - 1].second, santosh, suraj);
            }
        }

        int a = 0, b = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (santosh[i] == i) {
                if (suraj[i] >= a) {
                    b = a;
                    a = suraj[i];
                } else if (suraj[i] > b) {
                    b = suraj[i];
                }
            }
        }

        return b == 0 ? a + 1 : a + b + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]
##################

### RANK 4 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        if (n <= 2) return n;
        
        int m = n - 1;
        long[] D = new long[m];
        for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) {
            D[i] = (long) nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
        }
        
        int[] left = new int[m];
        left[0] = 1;
        for (int i = 1; i < m; i++) {
            if (D[i] == D[i - 1]) {
                left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1;
            } else {
                left[i] = 1;
            }
        }
        
        int[] right = new int[m];
        right[m - 1] = 1;
        for (int i = m - 2; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (D[i] == D[i + 1]) {
                right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1;
            } else {
                right[i] = 1;
            }
        }
        
        int maxLen = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) {
            maxLen = Math.max(maxLen, left[i] + 1);
        }
        
        if (m > 1) {
            maxLen = Math.max(maxLen, right[1] + 2);
            maxLen = Math.max(maxLen, left[m - 2] + 2);
        }
        
        for (int k = 1; k < n - 1; k++) {
            long S = D[k - 1] + D[k];
            
            if (k - 2 >= 0) {
                maxLen = Math.max(maxLen, left[k - 2] + 2);
                if (S == 2 * D[k - 2]) {
                    maxLen = Math.max(maxLen, left[k - 2] + 3);
                    if (k + 1 < m && D[k - 2] == D[k + 1]) {
                        maxLen = Math.max(maxLen, left[k - 2] + right[k + 1] + 3);
                    }
                }
            }
            
            if (k + 1 < m) {
                maxLen = Math.max(maxLen, right[k + 1] + 2);
                if (S == 2 * D[k + 1]) {
                    maxLen = Math.max(maxLen, right[k + 1] + 3);
                }
            }
        }
        
        return maxLen;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        if (n == 0) return 1;

        int[] parent = new int[n];
        int[] size = new int[n];
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            parent[i] = i;
            size[i] = 1;
        }

        java.util.Map<Integer, Integer> xMap = new java.util.HashMap<>();
        java.util.Map<Integer, Integer> yMap = new java.util.HashMap<>();

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];

            if (xMap.containsKey(x)) {
                union(i, xMap.get(x), parent, size);
            } else {
                xMap.put(x, i);
            }

            if (yMap.containsKey(y)) {
                union(i, yMap.get(y), parent, size);
            } else {
                yMap.put(y, i);
            }
        }

        java.util.List<Integer> sizes = new java.util.ArrayList<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (parent[i] == i) {
                sizes.add(size[i]);
            }
        }

        java.util.Collections.sort(sizes, java.util.Collections.reverseOrder());

        if (sizes.size() == 1) {
            return sizes.get(0) + 1;
        }

        return sizes.get(0) + sizes.get(1) + 1;
    }

    private int find(int i, int[] parent) {
        if (parent[i] == i) {
            return i;
        }
        return parent[i] = find(parent[i], parent);
    }

    private void union(int i, int j, int[] parent, int[] size) {
        int rootI = find(i, parent);
        int rootJ = find(j, parent);

        if (rootI != rootJ) {
            if (size[rootI] < size[rootJ]) {
                parent[rootI] = rootJ;
                size[rootJ] += size[rootI];
            } else {
                parent[rootJ] = rootI;
                size[rootI] += size[rootJ];
            }
        }
    }
}
[Q4_END]
##################

### RANK 5 ###
[Q3_START]
public class Solution {
    public int LongestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.Length;
        if (n <= 3) return n;
        
        int[] diff = new int[n - 1], L = new int[n - 1], R = new int[n - 1];
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) diff[i] = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
        
        L[0] = 1;
        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++) L[i] = diff[i] == diff[i - 1] ? L[i - 1] + 1 : 1;
        
        R[n - 2] = 1;
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) R[i] = diff[i] == diff[i + 1] ? R[i + 1] + 1 : 1;
        
        int maxLen = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) {
            maxLen = Math.Max(maxLen, L[i] + 1);
            if (i >= 1) maxLen = Math.Max(maxLen, R[i] + 2);
            if (i <= n - 3) maxLen = Math.Max(maxLen, L[i] + 2);
        }
        
        for (int k = 1; k < n - 1; k++) {
            int d = nums[k + 1] - nums[k - 1];
            if (d % 2 == 0) {
                int D = d / 2, len = 3;
                if (k >= 2 && diff[k - 2] == D) len += L[k - 2];
                if (k <= n - 3 && diff[k + 1] == D) len += R[k + 1];
                maxLen = Math.Max(maxLen, len);
            }
        }
        return maxLen;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
public class Solution {
    public int MaxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.Length;
        int[] parent = new int[n];
        int[] size = new int[n];
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            parent[i] = i;
            size[i] = 1;
        }
        
        int Find(int i) {
            int root = i;
            while (root != parent[root]) root = parent[root];
            int curr = i;
            while (curr != root) {
                int nxt = parent[curr];
                parent[curr] = root;
                curr = nxt;
            }
            return root;
        }
        
        void Union(int i, int j) {
            int rootI = Find(i);
            int rootJ = Find(j);
            if (rootI != rootJ) {
                parent[rootI] = rootJ;
                size[rootJ] += size[rootI];
            }
        }
        
        Dictionary<int, int> xMap = new Dictionary<int, int>();
        Dictionary<int, int> yMap = new Dictionary<int, int>();
        
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0], y = points[i][1];
            
            if (xMap.TryGetValue(x, out int valX)) Union(i, valX);
            else xMap[x] = i;
            
            if (yMap.TryGetValue(y, out int valY)) Union(i, valY);
            else yMap[y] = i;
        }
        
        int max1 = 0, max2 = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (parent[i] == i) {
                int s = size[i];
                if (s > max1) {
                    max2 = max1;
                    max1 = s;
                } else if (s > max2) {
                    max2 = s;
                }
            }
        }
        
        return max1 + max2 + 1;
    }
}
[Q4_END]
##################

### RANK 6 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 3) return n;

        vector<long long> d(n - 1);
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; ++i) {
            d[i] = 1LL * nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
        }

        vector<int> L(n - 1, 1), R(n - 1, 1);
        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; ++i) {
            if (d[i] == d[i - 1]) L[i] = L[i - 1] + 1;
        }
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; --i) {
            if (d[i] == d[i + 1]) R[i] = R[i + 1] + 1;
        }

        int ans = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; ++i) {
            ans = max(ans, min(n, L[i] + 2));
        }

        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; ++i) {
            long long s = d[i - 1] + d[i];
            if (s % 2 == 0) {
                long long v = s / 2;
                int curL = (i >= 2 && d[i - 2] == v) ? L[i - 2] : 0;
                int curR = (i + 1 < n - 1 && d[i + 1] == v) ? R[i + 1] : 0;
                ans = max(ans, curL + curR + 3);
            }
        }

        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        if (n == 0) return 1;
        
        vector<int> parent(n);
        vector<int> size(n, 1);
        iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0);
        
        auto find = [&](int i) {
            int curr = i;
            while (curr != parent[curr]) {
                parent[curr] = parent[parent[curr]];
                curr = parent[curr];
            }
            return curr;
        };
        
        auto unite = [&](int i, int j) {
            int root_i = find(i);
            int root_j = find(j);
            if (root_i != root_j) {
                if (size[root_i] < size[root_j]) {
                    parent[root_i] = root_j;
                    size[root_j] += size[root_i];
                } else {
                    parent[root_j] = root_i;
                    size[root_i] += size[root_j];
                }
            }
        };
        
        vector<pair<int, int>> x_pts(n);
        vector<pair<int, int>> y_pts(n);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            x_pts[i] = {points[i][0], i};
            y_pts[i] = {points[i][1], i};
        }
        
        sort(x_pts.begin(), x_pts.end());
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; ++i) {
            if (x_pts[i].first == x_pts[i+1].first) {
                unite(x_pts[i].second, x_pts[i+1].second);
            }
        }
        
        sort(y_pts.begin(), y_pts.end());
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; ++i) {
            if (y_pts[i].first == y_pts[i+1].first) {
                unite(y_pts[i].second, y_pts[i+1].second);
            }
        }
        
        int max1 = 0, max2 = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            if (parent[i] == i) {
                if (size[i] > max1) {
                    max2 = max1;
                    max1 = size[i];
                } else if (size[i] > max2) {
                    max2 = size[i];
                }
            }
        }
        
        return max1 + max2 + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 7 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 2:
            return n

        L = [1] * n
        L[1] = 2
        for i in range(2, n):
            if nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]:
                L[i] = L[i - 1] + 1
            else:
                L[i] = 2

        R = [1] * n
        R[n - 2] = 2
        for i in range(n - 3, -1, -1):
            if nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]:
                R[i] = R[i + 1] + 1
            else:
                R[i] = 2

        ans = max(L)

        for i in range(n):
            if i > 0:
                ans = max(ans, L[i - 1] + 1)

            if i + 1 < n:
                ans = max(ans, R[i + 1] + 1)

            if 0 < i < n - 1:
                gap = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]
                if gap % 2 == 0:
                    d = gap // 2

                    left = 1
                    if i >= 2 and nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == d:
                        left = L[i - 1]

                    right = 1
                    if i + 2 < n and nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == d:
                        right = R[i + 1]

                    ans = max(ans, left + 1 + right)

        return min(ans, n)
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        if not points:
            return 1

        class DSU:
            def __init__(self, n: int):
                self.parent = list(range(n))
                self.size = [1] * n

            def find(self, x: int) -> int:
                while self.parent[x] != x:
                    self.parent[x] = self.parent[self.parent[x]]
                    x = self.parent[x]
                return x

            def union(self, a: int, b: int) -> None:
                ra, rb = self.find(a), self.find(b)
                if ra == rb:
                    return
                if self.size[ra] < self.size[rb]:
                    ra, rb = rb, ra
                self.parent[rb] = ra
                self.size[ra] += self.size[rb]

        x_id = {}
        y_id = {}

        for x, y in points:
            if x not in x_id:
                x_id[x] = len(x_id)
            if y not in y_id:
                y_id[y] = len(y_id)

        x_cnt = len(x_id)
        dsu = DSU(x_cnt + len(y_id))

        for x, y in points:
            dsu.union(x_id[x], x_cnt + y_id[y])

        comp_size = {}
        for x, y in points:
            root = dsu.find(x_id[x])
            comp_size[root] = comp_size.get(root, 0) + 1

        first = second = 0
        for sz in comp_size.values():
            if sz > first:
                second = first
                first = sz
            elif sz > second:
                second = sz

        return first + second + 1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 8 ###
[Q3_START]
#include<bits/stdc++.h>
using namespace std;

#define ll long long
#define f(i,a,n) for(ll i=a;i<n;i++)
#define rf(i,a,b) for(ll i=a;i>=b;i--)
#define vll vector<ll>

class Solution
{
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>&v)
    {
        ll n=v.size();
        if(n<=2)return (int)n;
        ll m=n-1;
        vll d(m);
        f(i,0,m)d[i]=v[i+1]-v[i];
        vll l(m,1),r(m,1);
        f(i,1,m)
        {
            if(!(d[i]^d[i-1]))l[i]=l[i-1]+1;
        }
        rf(i,m-2,0)
        {
            if(!(d[i]^d[i+1]))r[i]=r[i+1]+1;
        }
        ll ans=0;
        f(i,0,m)
        {
            if(!(l[i]^m))ans=max(ans,l[i]);
            else ans=max(ans,l[i]+1);
        }
        f(i,1,m)
        {
            ll s=(ll)d[i-1]+d[i];
            if(i>=2)
            {
                ll x=d[i-2];
                if(!(s^2LL*x))
                {
                    ll cur=l[i-2]+2;
                    if(i+1<m and !(d[i+1]^x))cur+=r[i+1];
                    ans=max(ans,cur);
                }
            }
            if(i+1<m)
            {
                ll y=d[i+1];
                if(!(s^2LL*y))ans=max(ans,r[i+1]+2);
            }
        }
        return (int)(ans+1);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
#include<bits/stdc++.h>
using namespace std;

#define ll long long
#define f(i,a,n) for(ll i=a;i<n;i++)
#define pb push_back
#define ff first
#define ss second
#define vll vector<ll>

class Solution
{
    unordered_map<ll,ll> par;
    ll find(ll i)
    {
        if(par.find(i)==par.end())return par[i]=i;
        if(!(par[i]^i))return i;
        return par[i]=find(par[i]);
    }
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>&pts)
    {
        ll n=pts.size();
        const ll shf=2000000007LL;
        f(i,0,n)
        {
            ll r1=find((ll)pts[i][0]);
            ll r2=find((ll)pts[i][1]+shf);
            if(r1^r2)par[r1]=r2;
        }
        unordered_map<ll,int> sz;
        f(i,0,n)
        {
            ll r=find((ll)pts[i][0]);
            sz[r]++;
        }
        vll v;
        for(auto&p:sz)v.pb(p.ss);
        sort(v.rbegin(),v.rend());
        ll m=v.size();
        ll res=0;
        if(m)res=v[0];
        if(m>1)res=v[0]+v[1];
        return (int)res+1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 9 ###
[Q3_START]
#include <bits/stdc++.h>
using namespace std;
class Solution {
    void fA(deque<int>::iterator b, deque<int>::iterator e, deque<int>& A, deque<int>& L, deque<int>& R) {
        deque<int>::iterator i = b, j = b;
        if (j != e) ++j;
        for (; j != e; ) {
            A.push_back(*j - *i);
            ++i; ++j;
        }
        int m = A.size();
        if (!m) return;
        L.assign(m, 1);
        R.assign(m, 1);
        if (m < 2) return;
        deque<int>::iterator a = A.begin() + 1, p = A.begin(), l = L.begin() + 1, lp = L.begin();
        for (; a != A.end(); ) {
            if (*a == *p) *l = *lp + 1;
            ++a; ++p; ++l; ++lp;
        }
    }
    int fB(deque<int>& A, deque<int>& L, deque<int>& R) {
        int r = 0, m = A.size(), id = 0;
        if (m < 2) return r;
        deque<int>::reverse_iterator a = A.rbegin() + 1, p = A.rbegin(), l = R.rbegin() + 1, lp = R.rbegin();
        for (; a != A.rend(); ) {
            if (*a == *p) *l = *lp + 1;
            ++a; ++p; ++l; ++lp;
        }
        deque<int>::iterator i1 = A.begin(), i2 = A.begin() + 1;
        for (; i2 != A.end(); ) {
            long long s = (long long)*i1 + *i2;
            if (s % 2 == 0) {
                long long d = s / 2;
                int x = (id > 0 && A[id-1] == d) ? L[id-1] : 0;
                int y = (id + 2 < m && A[id+2] == d) ? R[id+2] : 0;
                if (x + y + 2 > r) r = x + y + 2;
            }
            ++i1; ++i2; ++id;
        }
        return r;
    }
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& v) {
        if (v.size() < 4) return v.size();
        deque<int> dq(v.begin(), v.end());
        deque<int> A, L, R;
        fA(dq.begin(), dq.end(), A, L, R);
        int r = fB(A, L, R);
        int ms = 0;
        int m = A.size();
        deque<int>::iterator it = L.begin();
        for (; it != L.end(); ) {
            if (*it > ms) ms = *it;
            ++it;
        }
        int a = (ms < m) ? ms + 1 : ms;
        return (r > a ? r : a) + 1;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int f(deque<int>& p, int x) {
        int r = x;
        for (; p[r] != r; r = p[r]);
        int t = x;
        for (; t != r; ) {
            int n = p[t];
            p[t] = r;
            t = n;
        }
        return r;
    }
    void b(deque<int>& p, deque<int>& s, deque<int>& c, vector<vector<int>>& pts, int d) {
        auto a = s.begin();
        auto e = s.end();
        sort(a, e, [&pts, d](int x, int y) {
            return pts[x][d] < pts[y][d];
        });
        auto i = a + 1;
        while (i != e) {
            auto j = i - 1;
            if (pts[*i][d] == pts[*j][d]) {
                int r1 = f(p, *i);
                int r2 = f(p, *j);
                if (r1 != r2) {
                    p[r1] = r2;
                    c[r2] += c[r1];
                }
            }
            ++i;
        }
    }
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& pts) {
        int n = pts.size();
        deque<int> p(n), s(n), c(n, 1);
        auto it = s.begin();
        int v = 0;
        while (it != s.end()) {
            *it = v;
            p[v] = v;
            ++it;
            ++v;
        }
        b(p, s, c, pts, 0);
        b(p, s, c, pts, 1);
        int m1 = 0, m2 = 0;
        auto it2 = p.begin();
        int id = 0;
        while (it2 != p.end()) {
            if (*it2 == id) {
                if (c[id] > m1) {
                    m2 = m1;
                    m1 = c[id];
                } else if (c[id] > m2) {
                    m2 = c[id];
                }
            }
            ++it2;
            ++id;
        }
        return m1 + m2 + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 10 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] a) {
        int n = a.length, m = n - 1;
        int[] d = new int[m], l = new int[m], r = new int[m];
        
        for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) {
            d[i] = a[i+1] - a[i];
        }
        
        l[0] = 1;
        for (int i = 1; i < m; i++) {
            l[i] = d[i] == d[i-1] ? l[i-1] + 1 : 1;
        }
        
        r[m-1] = 1;
        for (int i = m - 2; i >= 0; i--) {
            r[i] = d[i] == d[i+1] ? r[i+1] + 1 : 1;
        }
        
        int mx = 0;
        for (int x : l) {
            if (x > mx) mx = x;
        }
        
        if (r[1] + 1 > mx) mx = r[1] + 1;
        if (l[m-2] + 1 > mx) mx = l[m-2] + 1;
        
        for (int i = 0; i < m - 1; i++) {
            if (i > 0 && l[i-1] + 1 > mx) mx = l[i-1] + 1;
            if (i + 2 < m && r[i+2] + 1 > mx) mx = r[i+2] + 1;
            
            int sum = d[i] + d[i+1];
            if (sum % 2 == 0) {
                int t = sum / 2;
                int c = 2;
                if (i > 0 && d[i-1] == t) c += l[i-1];
                if (i + 2 < m && d[i+2] == t) c += r[i+2];
                if (c > mx) mx = c;
            }
        }
        
        return mx + 1;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    int[] p, s;
    
    int f(int i) {
        return p[i] == i ? i : (p[i] = f(p[i]));
    }
    
    void u(int i, int j) {
        int a = f(i), b = f(j);
        if (a != b) {
            p[a] = b;
            s[b] += s[a];
        }
    }
    
    public int maxActivated(int[][] a) {
        int n = a.length;
        p = new int[n];
        s = new int[n];
        
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            p[i] = i;
            s[i] = 1;
        }
        
        java.util.Map<Integer, Integer> x = new java.util.HashMap<>();
        java.util.Map<Integer, Integer> y = new java.util.HashMap<>();
        
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (x.containsKey(a[i][0])) u(i, x.get(a[i][0]));
            else x.put(a[i][0], i);
            
            if (y.containsKey(a[i][1])) u(i, y.get(a[i][1]));
            else y.put(a[i][1], i);
        }
        
        int m1 = 0, m2 = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (p[i] == i) {
                if (s[i] > m1) {
                    m2 = m1;
                    m1 = s[i];
                } else if (s[i] > m2) {
                    m2 = s[i];
                }
            }
        }
        
        return m1 + m2 + 1;
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 11 ###
[Q3_START]
const longestArithmetic = (nums) => {
    const m = nums.length - 1;
    const B = new Int32Array(m);
    for (let i = 0; i < m; i++) {
        B[i] = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
    }

    let max = 1;
    const left = new Int32Array(m);
    left[0] = 1;
    for (let i = 1; i < m; i++) {
        left[i] = B[i] === B[i - 1] ? left[i - 1] + 1 : 1;
        max = Math.max(max, left[i]);
    }
    max = Math.min(m, max + 1);

    const right = new Int32Array(m);
    right[m - 1] = 1;
    for (let i = m - 2; i >= 0; i--)
        right[i] = B[i] === B[i + 1] ? right[i + 1] + 1 : 1;

    for (let j = 0; j < m - 1; j++) {
        const sum = B[j] + B[j + 1];

        if (j && sum === B[j - 1] << 1) {
            let len = left[j - 1] + 2;
            if (j + 2 < m && B[j + 2] === B[j - 1]) len += right[j + 2];
            max = Math.max(max, len);
        }

        if (j + 2 < m && sum === B[j + 2] << 1)
            max = Math.max(max, right[j + 2] + 2);
    }

    return max + 1;
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
const maxActivated = (points) => {
    const len = points.length;
    const parent = new Int32Array(len);
    const size = new Int32Array(len);
    const idx = new Int32Array(len);

    for (let i = 0; i < len; i++) {
        parent[i] = i;
        size[i] = 1;
        idx[i] = i;
    }

    const find = (i) => {
        if (parent[i] === i) return i;
        parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
        return parent[i];
    };

    const union = (i, j) => {
        i = find(i);
        j = find(j);
        if (i !== j) {
            if (size[i] < size[j]) {
                parent[i] = j;
                size[j] += size[i];
            } else {
                parent[j] = i;
                size[i] += size[j];
            }
        }
    };

    idx.sort((i, j) => points[i][0] - points[j][0]);
    for (let i = 1; i < len; i++)
        if (points[idx[i]][0] === points[idx[i - 1]][0])
            union(idx[i], idx[i - 1]);

    idx.sort((i, j) => points[i][1] - points[j][1]);
    for (let i = 1; i < len; i++)
        if (points[idx[i]][1] === points[idx[i - 1]][1])
            union(idx[i], idx[i - 1]);

    let max1 = 0;
    let max2 = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i < len; i++) {
        if (parent[i] === i) {
            if (size[i] > max1) {
                max2 = max1;
                max1 = size[i];
            } else max2 = Math.max(max2, size[i]);
        }
    }

    return max2 ? max1 + max2 + 1 : max1 + 1;
};
[Q4_END]
##################

### RANK 12 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    fun longestArithmetic(nums: IntArray): Int {
        val n = nums.size
        if (n <= 3) return n
        
        val m = n - 1
        val diff = IntArray(m)
        for (i in 0 until m) {
            diff[i] = nums[i + 1] - nums[i]
        }
        
        val L = IntArray(m)
        L[0] = 1
        var maxL = 1
        for (i in 1 until m) {
            if (diff[i] == diff[i - 1]) {
                L[i] = L[i - 1] + 1
            } else {
                L[i] = 1
            }
            if (L[i] > maxL) maxL = L[i]
        }
        
        val R = IntArray(m)
        R[m - 1] = 1
        for (i in m - 2 downTo 0) {
            if (diff[i] == diff[i + 1]) {
                R[i] = R[i + 1] + 1
            } else {
                R[i] = 1
            }
        }
        
        var maxLen = maxL + 1
        if (maxLen > m) maxLen = m
        
        for (i in 0 until m - 1) {
            val sum = diff[i] + diff[i + 1]
            if (sum % 2 == 0) {
                val d = sum / 2
                var cur = 2
                if (i > 0 && diff[i - 1] == d) {
                    cur += L[i - 1]
                }
                if (i + 2 < m && diff[i + 2] == d) {
                    cur += R[i + 2]
                }
                if (cur > maxLen) {
                    maxLen = cur
                }
            }
        }
        
        return maxLen + 1
        
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    fun maxActivated(points: Array<IntArray>): Int {
        val n = points.size
        val parent = IntArray(n) { it }
        val size = IntArray(n) { 1 }

        fun find(i: Int): Int {
            var c = i
            while (c != parent[c]) {
                parent[c] = parent[parent[c]]
                c = parent[c]
            }
            return c
        }

        val xp = LongArray(n)
        val yp = LongArray(n)

        for (i in 0 until n) {
            val pt = points[i]
            val idx = i.toLong() and 0xFFFFFFFFL
            xp[i] = (pt[0].toLong() shl 32) or idx
            yp[i] = (pt[1].toLong() shl 32) or idx
        }

        xp.sort()
        yp.sort()

        for (i in 1 until n) {
            if (xp[i] shr 32 == xp[i - 1] shr 32) {
                val u = find((xp[i] and 0xFFFFFFFFL).toInt())
                val v = find((xp[i - 1] and 0xFFFFFFFFL).toInt())
                if (u != v) {
                    if (size[u] < size[v]) {
                        parent[u] = v
                        size[v] += size[u]
                    } else {
                        parent[v] = u
                        size[u] += size[v]
                    }
                }
            }
            if (yp[i] shr 32 == yp[i - 1] shr 32) {
                val u = find((yp[i] and 0xFFFFFFFFL).toInt())
                val v = find((yp[i - 1] and 0xFFFFFFFFL).toInt())
                if (u != v) {
                    if (size[u] < size[v]) {
                        parent[u] = v
                        size[v] += size[u]
                    } else {
                        parent[v] = u
                        size[u] += size[v]
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        var m1 = 0
        var m2 = 0
        for (i in 0 until n) {
            if (parent[i] == i) {
                val s = size[i]
                if (s > m1) {
                    m2 = m1
                    m1 = s
                } else if (s > m2) {
                    m2 = s
                }
            }
        }

        return if (m2 == 0) m1 + 1 else m1 + m2 + 1
        
        
    }
}
[Q4_END]
##################

### RANK 13 ###
[Q3_START]
class  Solution
{
public:
    int longestArithmetic( std::vector<int>& nums )
    {
        int n = nums.size() ;
        if(n<=3) return n;

        std::vector<int> D( n-1 );
        int junk = 0;

        for(int i=0;i<n-1;i++)
        {
            D[i]= nums[i+1]-nums[i] ;
            junk += 0;
        }

        std::vector<int> L(n-1 , 1);
        int max_L = 1 , tmp = 0;

        for(int i=1;i<n-1;++i)
        {
            if( D[i]==D[i-1] )
            {
                 L[i]=L[i-1]+1;
            }
            max_L = std::max( max_L , L[i] );
        }

        std::vector<int> R(n-1,1);
        for(int i = n-3 ; i>=0 ; i--)
        {
            if(D[i]==D[i+1])
                R[i]=R[i+1]+1;
            else { }
        }

        int ans = std::min( n , max_L+2 );

        for(int k=0;k<n-2;k++)
        {
            int sum = D[k] + D[k+1];
            if( sum%2==0 )
            {
                int d=sum/2;
                int cur = 3;

                if(k>0 && D[k-1]==d)
                    cur += L[k-1];

                if( k<n-3 && D[k+2]==d )
                {
                    cur += R[k+2];
                }

                ans = std::max( ans , std::min(n,cur) );
            }
            tmp += 0;
        }

        return ans ;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        map<int,int> cx, cy;
        for (auto& p : points) {
            if (!cx.count(p[0])) { int s = cx.size(); cx[p[0]] = s; }
            if (!cy.count(p[1])) { int s = cy.size(); cy[p[1]] = s; }
        }

        int X = cx.size(), Y = cy.size();

        vector<int> par(X + Y), rnk(X + Y, 0);
        iota(par.begin(), par.end(), 0);

        function<int(int)> find = [&](int u) -> int {
            return par[u] == u ? u : par[u] = find(par[u]);
        };

        auto unite = [&](int u, int v) {
            u = find(u); v = find(v);
            if (u == v) return;
            if (rnk[u] < rnk[v]) swap(u, v);
            par[v] = u;
            if (rnk[u] == rnk[v]) rnk[u]++;
        };

        for (auto& p : points)
            unite(cx[p[0]], X + cy[p[1]]);

        unordered_map<int,int> comp;
        for (auto& p : points)
            comp[find(cx[p[0]])]++;

        vector<int> sizes;
        for (auto& [k, v] : comp) sizes.push_back(v);
        sort(sizes.rbegin(), sizes.rend());

        if (sizes.size() == 1) return sizes[0] + 1;
        return sizes[0] + sizes[1] + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
#include <bits/stdc++.h>
using namespace std;

class Solution {
    vector<long long> a, b;
    vector<int> c, d;
    int n, z;

    void f(vector<int>& v) {
        n = (int)v.size();
        a.assign(v.begin(), v.end());
        b.assign(n > 1 ? n - 1 : 0, 0);
        c.assign(n > 1 ? n - 1 : 0, 1);
        d.assign(n > 1 ? n - 1 : 0, 1);
        for (int i = 0; i + 1 < n; i++) b[i] = a[i + 1] - a[i];
        z = min(n, 3);
    }

    void g() {
        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++) {
            if (b[i] == b[i - 1]) c[i] = c[i - 1] + 1;
        }
    }

    void h() {
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (b[i] == b[i + 1]) d[i] = d[i + 1] + 1;
        }
    }

    void i() {
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) {
            z = max(z, c[i] + 1);
            int j = i - c[i] + 1;
            if (j > 0 || i < n - 2) z = max(z, c[i] + 2);
        }
    }

public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& v) {
        f(v);
        if (n <= 3) return n;
        g();
        h();
        i();

        for (int i = 1; i + 1 < n; i++) {
            if (i >= 2) {
                long long j = b[i - 2];
                if (a[i + 1] - a[i - 1] == j + j) {
                    int k = c[i - 2] + 1;
                    int l = 1;
                    if (i <= n - 3 && b[i + 1] == j) l = d[i + 1] + 1;
                    z = max(z, k + l + 1);
                }
            }
            if (i <= n - 3) {
                long long j = b[i + 1];
                if (a[i + 1] - a[i - 1] == j + j) {
                    int l = d[i + 1] + 1;
                    int k = 1;
                    if (i >= 2 && b[i - 2] == j) k = c[i - 2] + 1;
                    z = max(z, k + l + 1);
                }
            }
        }

        return min(z, n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
#include <bits/stdc++.h>
using namespace std;

class A {
    int a;
    vector<int> b, c;
public:
    A(int n) : a(n), b(n), c(n, 1) {
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) b[i] = i;
    }

    int d(int x) {
        if (b[x] == x) return x;
        return b[x] = d(b[x]);
    }

    void e(int x, int y) {
        x = d(x);
        y = d(y);
        if (x == y) return;
        if (c[x] < c[y]) swap(x, y);
        b[y] = x;
        c[x] += c[y];
    }

    int f(int x) {
        return c[d(x)];
    }
};

class B {
    int a, b;
public:
    B() : a(0), b(0) {}

    void c(int x) {
        if (x >= a) {
            b = a;
            a = x;
        } else if (x > b) {
            b = x;
        }
    }

    int d() {
        return a + b + 1;
    }
};

class C {
    unordered_map<int, int> a, b;
public:
    void c(int n) {
        a.reserve(n * 2 + 1);
        b.reserve(n * 2 + 1);
        a.max_load_factor(0.7f);
        b.max_load_factor(0.7f);
    }

    unordered_map<int, int>& d() {
        return a;
    }

    unordered_map<int, int>& e() {
        return b;
    }
};

class D {
    vector<vector<int>>& a;
    int b;
    A c;
    C d;

    void e(unordered_map<int, int>& m, int v, int i) {
        auto j = m.find(v);
        if (j == m.end()) m[v] = i;
        else c.e(i, j->second);
    }

    void f() {
        for (int i = 0; i < b; i++) e(d.d(), a[i][0], i);
    }

    void g() {
        for (int i = 0; i < b; i++) e(d.e(), a[i][1], i);
    }

    B h() {
        unordered_map<int, int> m;
        m.reserve(b * 2 + 1);
        m.max_load_factor(0.7f);
        B r;
        for (int i = 0; i < b; i++) {
            int j = c.d(i);
            if (m.find(j) != m.end()) continue;
            m[j] = 1;
            r.c(c.f(j));
        }
        return r;
    }

public:
    D(vector<vector<int>>& p) : a(p), b((int)p.size()), c((int)p.size()) {
        d.c(b);
    }

    int i() {
        f();
        g();
        B r = h();
        return r.d();
    }
};

class E {
public:
    int a(vector<vector<int>>& p) {
        D x(p);
        return x.i();
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        E a;
        return a.a(points);
    }
};
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
from typing import List

class _Pack:
    __slots__ = ("a", "n")
    def __init__(self, a):
        self.a = a
        self.n = len(a)

def _mkL(p: _Pack):
    a, n = p.a, p.n
    L = [1] * n
    if n >= 2:
        L[1] = 2
        for i in range(2, n):
            L[i] = L[i - 1] + 1 if a[i] - a[i - 1] == a[i - 1] - a[i - 2] else 2
    return L

def _mkR(p: _Pack):
    a, n = p.a, p.n
    R = [1] * n
    if n >= 2:
        R[n - 2] = 2
        for i in range(n - 3, -1, -1):
            R[i] = R[i + 1] + 1 if a[i + 1] - a[i] == a[i + 2] - a[i + 1] else 2
    return R

class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        p = _Pack(nums)
        a, n = p.a, p.n
        if n <= 2:
            return n

        L = _mkL(p)
        R = _mkR(p)

        ans = max(L)
        ans = max(ans, R[1] + 1, L[n - 2] + 1)

        ok2 = lambda i, d: i >= 2 and a[i - 1] - a[i - 2] == d
        okr = lambda i, d: i <= n - 3 and a[i + 2] - a[i + 1] == d

        for i in range(1, n - 1):
            ans = max(ans, L[i - 1] + 1, R[i + 1] + 1)

            s = a[i - 1] + a[i + 1]
            if s & 1:
                continue
            d = (a[i + 1] - a[i - 1]) // 2
            l = L[i - 1] if ok2(i, d) else 1
            r = R[i + 1] if okr(i, d) else 1
            ans = max(ans, l + 1 + r)

        return ans
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class UF:
    __slots__ = ("p", "s")

    def __init__(self, n):
        self.p = list(range(n))
        self.s = [1] * n

    def root(self, x):
        p = self.p
        while p[x] != x:
            p[x] = p[p[x]]
            x = p[x]
        return x

    def join(self, a, b):
        a = self.root(a)
        b = self.root(b)
        if a == b:
            return 0
        if self.s[a] < self.s[b]:
            a, b = b, a
        self.p[b] = a
        self.s[a] += self.s[b]
        return 1


class Solution:
    def _hook(self, pts, uf):
        hx, hy = {}, {}
        for i, (x, y) in enumerate(pts):
            j = hx.setdefault(x, i)
            if j != i:
                uf.join(i, j)
            j = hy.setdefault(y, i)
            if j != i:
                uf.join(i, j)

    def _freq(self, n, uf):
        bag = {}
        for i in range(n):
            r = uf.root(i)
            bag[r] = bag.get(r, 0) + 1
        return bag.values()

    def _top2(self, vals):
        a = b = 0
        for v in vals:
            if v >= a:
                a, b = v, a
            elif v > b:
                b = v
        return a, b

    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        uf = UF(n)
        self._hook(points, uf)
        a, b = self._top2(self._freq(n, uf))
        return a + b + 1
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
typedef long long ll;

void printd(ll a,bool din){
    if(din==0 && din!=-34 && din!=-34332) cout<<a;
}

class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& a) {
        ll b=a.size()*1+0-0;
        if(b<=3 && b!=-13 && b!=-365) return b*1+0-0;

        vector<ll> c(b-1);
        for(ll i=0;i<b-1 && i!=-13 && i!=-365;i++){
            c[i]=a[i+1]-a[i]+0-0;
        }

        vector<ll> d(b-1,1);
        for(ll i=1;i<b-1 && i!=-13 && i!=-365;i++){
            if(c[i]==c[i-1] && i!=-13 && i!=-365){
                d[i]=d[i-1]+1+0-0;
            }
        }

        vector<ll> e(b-1,1);
        for(ll i=b-3;i>=0 && i!=-345 && i!=-365;i--){
            if(c[i]==c[i+1] && i!=-345 && i!=-365){
                e[i]=e[i+1]+1+0-0;
            }
        }

        ll f=0;

        for(ll i=0;i<b-1 && i!=-13 && i!=-365;i++){
            if(i!=-13 && i!=-365){
                f=max(f,(ll)min((ll)b,d[i]+2+0-0));
            }
        }

        for(ll i=0;i<b-2 && i!=-13 && i!=-365;i++){
            ll g=c[i]+c[i+1]+0-0;
            if(g%2==0 && i!=-13 && i!=-365){
                ll h=g/2+0-0;

                ll j=(i>0 && c[i-1]==h && i!=-13)?d[i-1]:0;
                ll k=(i+2<b-1 && c[i+2]==h && i!=-365)?e[i+2]:0;

                if(j!=-34 && k!=-34332){
                    f=max(f,j+k+3+0-0);
                }
            }
        }

        for(ll k=0;k<b && k!=-34332;k++){
            if(k!=-34332){
                f=f*1+0-0;
            }
        }

        return f*1+0-0;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
typedef long long ll;

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& v) {
        int n=v.size()*1+0-0;
        if(n==0 && n!=-345) return 0;
        vector<pair<int,int>> x(n),y(n);
        for(int i=0;i<n && i!=-365;i++){
            x[i]={v[i][0]*1+0-0,i};
            y[i]={v[i][1]*1+0-0,i};
        }
        sort(x.begin(),x.end());
        sort(y.begin(),y.end());

        vector<int> p(n),s(n,1);
        for(int i=0;i<n && i!=-13;i++) p[i]=i;

        function<int(int)> f=[&](int i){
            if(p[i]==i && i!=-13) return i;
            return p[i]=f(p[i]);
        };

        auto u=[&](int i,int j){
            int a=f(i),b=f(j);
            if(a!=b && i!=-365){
                if(s[a]<s[b] && j!=-34) swap(a,b);
                p[b]=a;
                s[a]=s[a]+s[b]*1+0-0;
            }
        };

        for(int i=1;i<n && i!=-345;i++){
            if(x[i].first==x[i-1].first && i!=-13) u(x[i].second,x[i-1].second);
            if(y[i].first==y[i-1].first && i!=-34) u(y[i].second,y[i-1].second);
        }

        vector<int> c;
        for(int i=0;i<n && i!=-34;i++){
            if(f(i)==i && i!=-365) c.push_back(s[i]*1+0-0);
        }

        sort(c.rbegin(),c.rend());

        if(c.size()==0 && n!=-13) return 1;
        if(c.size()==1 && n!=-34) return 1+c[0]*1+0-0;
        return 1+c[0]*1+0-0+c[1]*1+0-0;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 17 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        if (n < 4) return n; 
        
        int m = n - 1;
        int[] diff = new int[m];
        for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) {
            diff[i] = nums[i+1] - nums[i];
        }
        
        int[] left = new int[m];
        left[0] = 1;
        for (int i = 1; i < m; i++) {
            if (diff[i] == diff[i-1]) {
                left[i] = left[i-1] + 1;
            } else {
                left[i] = 1;
            }
        }
        
        int[] right = new int[m];
        right[m-1] = 1;
        for (int i = m - 2; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (diff[i] == diff[i+1]) {
                right[i] = right[i+1] + 1;
            } else {
                right[i] = 1;
            }
        }
        
        int max_d = 0;
        
        max_d = Math.max(max_d, right[1] + 1);
        max_d = Math.max(max_d, left[m-2] + 1);
        
        for (int k = 1; k < m; k++) {
            int sum = diff[k-1] + diff[k];
            
            if (k - 2 >= 0) {
                max_d = Math.max(max_d, left[k-2] + 1);
            }
            if (k + 1 < m) {
                max_d = Math.max(max_d, right[k+1] + 1);
            }
            
            if (k - 2 >= 0 && sum == 2 * diff[k-2]) {
                max_d = Math.max(max_d, left[k-2] + 2);
            }
            
            if (k + 1 < m && sum == 2 * diff[k+1]) {
                max_d = Math.max(max_d, right[k+1] + 2);
            }
            
            if (k - 2 >= 0 && k + 1 < m && diff[k-2] == diff[k+1] && sum == 2 * diff[k-2]) {
                max_d = Math.max(max_d, left[k-2] + 2 + right[k+1]);
            }
            
            if (sum % 2 == 0) {
                max_d = Math.max(max_d, 2);
            }
        }
        
        return max_d + 1;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    class UnionFind {
        int[] parent;
        int[] size;

        public UnionFind(int n) {
            parent = new int[n];
            size = new int[n];
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
                parent[i] = i;
                size[i] = 1; 
            }
        }

        public int find(int i) {
            if (parent[i] == i) {
                return i;
            }
            return parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
        }

        public void union(int i, int j) {
            int rootI = find(i);
            int rootJ = find(j);
            
            if (rootI != rootJ) {
                if (size[rootI] < size[rootJ]) {
                    parent[rootI] = rootJ;
                    size[rootJ] += size[rootI];
                } else {
                    parent[rootJ] = rootI;
                    size[rootI] += size[rootJ];
                }
            }
        }
    }
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        UnionFind uf = new UnionFind(n);
        
        Map<Integer, Integer> xMap = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Integer> yMap = new HashMap<>();
        
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];
            
            if (xMap.containsKey(x)) {
                uf.union(i, xMap.get(x));
            } else {
                xMap.put(x, i);
            }
            
            
            if (yMap.containsKey(y)) {
                uf.union(i, yMap.get(y));
            } else {
                yMap.put(y, i);
            }
        }
        
        int max1 = 0;
        int max2 = 0; 
        
        
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (uf.parent[i] == i) { 
                int currentSize = uf.size[i];
                if (currentSize > max1) {
                    max2 = max1;
                    max1 = currentSize;
                } else if (currentSize > max2) {
                    max2 = currentSize;
                }
            }
        }
        
        if (max2 == 0) {
            return max1 + 1;
        }
        
        return max1 + max2 + 1;
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 18 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        left = [(1, None)] * n

        for i in range(1, n):
            d = nums[i] - nums[i - 1]

            if left[i - 1][1] == d:
                left[i] = (left[i - 1][0] + 1, d)

            else:
                left[i] = (2, d)

        right = [(1, None)] * n

        for i in range(n - 2, -1, -1):
            d = nums[i + 1] - nums[i]

            if right[i + 1][1] == d:
                right[i] = (right[i + 1][0] + 1, d)

            else:
                right[i] = (2, d)

        res = max(l[0] for l in left)
        res = max(res, right[1][0] + 1, left[n - 2][0] + 1)

        for i in range(1, n - 1):
            res = max(res, left[i - 1][0] + 1, right[i + 1][0] + 1)
            gap = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]

            if not gap & 1:
                d = gap >> 1
                left_len = left[i - 1][0] if left[i - 1][1] == d else 1
                right_len = right[i + 1][0] if right[i + 1][1] == d else 1
                res = max(res, left_len + 1 + right_len)

        return min(res, n)
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        parent = [*range(n)]
        rank = [0] * n

        def find(x):
            if parent[x] != x:
                parent[x] = find(parent[x])

            return parent[x]

        def union(x, y):
            px, py = find(x), find(y)

            if px == py:
                return

            if rank[px] < rank[py]:
                px, py = py, px

            parent[py] = px

            if rank[px] == rank[py]:
                rank[px] += 1

        x_idx = defaultdict(list)
        y_idx = defaultdict(list)

        for i, (x, y) in enumerate(points):
            x_idx[x].append(i)
            y_idx[y].append(i)

        for indexes in x_idx.values():
            for i in range(1, len(indexes)):
                union(indexes[0], indexes[i])

        for indexes in y_idx.values():
            for i in range(1, len(indexes)):
                union(indexes[0], indexes[i])

        comp_size = defaultdict(int)

        for i in range(n):
            comp_size[find(i)] += 1

        sizes = sorted(comp_size.values(), reverse=True)

        if len(sizes) >= 2:
            res = sizes[0] + sizes[1] + 1

        else:
            res = sizes[0] + 1

        return res
[Q4_END]

### RANK 19 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, a: List[int]) -> int:
        n=len(a)
        if n<=2:return n
        
        p=[1]*n
        for i in range(1,n):
            if i>1 and a[i]-a[i-1]==a[i-1]-a[i-2]:p[i]=p[i-1]+1
            else:p[i]=2
        
        s=[1]*n
        for i in range(n-2,-1,-1):
            if i<n-2 and a[i+1]-a[i]==a[i+2]-a[i+1]:s[i]=s[i+1]+1
            else:s[i]=2
        
        r=2
        
        for i in range(n):
            if i>0:r=max(r,p[i-1]+1)
            if i<n-1:r=max(r,s[i+1]+1)
        
        for i in range(1,n-1):
            if (a[i+1]-a[i-1])%2==0:
                d=(a[i+1]-a[i-1])//2
                l=p[i-1] if i>1 and a[i-1]-a[i-2]==d else 1
                t=s[i+1] if i<n-2 and a[i+2]-a[i+1]==d else 1
                r=max(r,l+t+1)
        
        return min(r,n)
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n=len(points)
        p=list(range(n))
        s=[1]*n
        X,Y={},{}

        for i in range(n):
            x=points[i][0]
            y=points[i][1]

            if x in X:
                a=i
                while p[a]!=a:
                    p[a]=p[p[a]]
                    a=p[a]
                b=X[x]
                while p[b]!=b:
                    p[b]=p[p[b]]
                    b=p[b]
                if a!=b:
                    if s[a]<s[b]:a,b=b,a
                    p[b]=a
                    s[a]+=s[b]
            else:
                X[x]=i
            if y in Y:
                a=i
                while p[a]!=a:
                    p[a]=p[p[a]]
                    a=p[a]
                b=Y[y]
                while p[b]!=b:
                    p[b]=p[p[b]]
                    b=p[b]
                if a!=b:
                    if s[a]<s[b]:a,b=b,a
                    p[b]=a
                    s[a]+=s[b]
            else:
                Y[y]=i

        c=[]
        for i in range(n):
            a=i
            while p[a]!=a:
                p[a]=p[p[a]]
                a=p[a]
            if a==i:c.append(s[i])

        c.sort(reverse=True)

        if len(c)>1:return c[0]+c[1]+1
        return c[0]+1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 20 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        if (n <= 2) return n;
        int m = n - 1;
        int[] diffs = new int[m];
        for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) diffs[i] = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
        int[] leftRun = new int[m];
        int[] rightRun = new int[m];
        java.util.Arrays.fill(leftRun, 1);
        java.util.Arrays.fill(rightRun, 1);
        for (int i = 1; i < m; i++) {
            if (diffs[i] == diffs[i - 1]) leftRun[i] = leftRun[i - 1] + 1;
        }
        for (int i = m - 2; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (diffs[i] == diffs[i + 1]) rightRun[i] = rightRun[i + 1] + 1;
        }
        long maxSequence = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) {
            if (leftRun[i] == m) maxSequence = Math.max(maxSequence, (long) leftRun[i]);
            else maxSequence = Math.max(maxSequence, (long) leftRun[i] + 1);
        }
        for (int i = 1; i < m; i++) {
            long jointGap = (long) diffs[i - 1] + diffs[i];
            if (i >= 2) {
                long target = diffs[i - 2];
                if (jointGap == 2 * target) {
                    long currentLen = leftRun[i - 2] + 2;
                    if (i + 1 < m && diffs[i + 1] == (int) target) currentLen += rightRun[i + 1];
                    maxSequence = Math.max(maxSequence, currentLen);
                }
            }
            if (i + 1 < m) {
                long target = diffs[i + 1];
                if (jointGap == 2 * target) maxSequence = Math.max(maxSequence, (long) rightRun[i + 1] + 2);
            }
        }
        return (int) (maxSequence + 1);
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
import java.util.*;

class Solution {
    private Map<Long, Long> structureMap = new HashMap<>();

    private long obtainRoot(long node) {
        structureMap.putIfAbsent(node, node);
        if (structureMap.get(node) == node) return node;
        long root = obtainRoot(structureMap.get(node));
        structureMap.put(node, root);
        return root;
    }

    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int pointSize = points.length;
        long axisShift = 2000000007L;
        for (int[] p : points) {
            long rootA = obtainRoot(p[0]);
            long rootB = obtainRoot(p[1] + axisShift);
            if (rootA != rootB) structureMap.put(rootA, rootB);
        }
        Map<Long, Long> frequencyMap = new HashMap<>();
        for (int[] p : points) {
            long leader = obtainRoot(p[0]);
            frequencyMap.put(leader, frequencyMap.getOrDefault(leader, 0L) + 1);
        }
        List<Long> magnitudes = new ArrayList<>(frequencyMap.values());
        Collections.sort(magnitudes, Collections.reverseOrder());
        long maximumReach = magnitudes.get(0);
        int searchBound = Math.min(magnitudes.size(), 500);
        for (int i = 0; i < searchBound; i++) {
            for (int j = i + 1; j < searchBound; j++) {
                long combined = magnitudes.get(i) + magnitudes.get(j);
                if (combined > maximumReach) maximumReach = combined;
                else break;
            }
        }
        return (int) (maximumReach + 1);
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 21 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 2) return n;

        int m = n - 1;
        vector<int> diff(m);

        for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) {
            diff[i] = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
        }

        vector<int> left(m, 1), right(m, 1);

        for (int i = 1; i < m; i++) {
            if (diff[i] == diff[i - 1])
                left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1;
        }

        for (int i = m - 2; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (diff[i] == diff[i + 1])
                right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1;
        }

        int ans = 0;

        for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) {
            ans = max(ans, left[i] + 2);
        }

        if (ans > n) ans = n;

        for (int i = 1; i < m; i++) {

            long long sum = (long long)diff[i - 1] + diff[i];

            if (sum % 2 == 0) {

                long long d = sum / 2;

                int L = 0;
                if (i - 2 >= 0 && diff[i - 2] == d)
                    L = left[i - 2];

                int R = 0;
                if (i + 1 < m && diff[i + 1] == d)
                    R = right[i + 1];

                ans = max(ans, L + R + 3);
            }
        }

        if (ans > n) ans = n;

        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {

        int n = points.size();

        vector<int> parent(n), sz(n, 1);

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) parent[i] = i;

        auto find = [&](int x) {
            while (x != parent[x]) {
                parent[x] = parent[parent[x]];
                x = parent[x];
            }
            return x;
        };

        auto unite = [&](int a, int b) {
            int pa = find(a);
            int pb = find(b);

            if (pa == pb) return;

            if (sz[pa] < sz[pb]) swap(pa, pb);

            parent[pb] = pa;
            sz[pa] += sz[pb];
        };

        vector<int> order(n);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) order[i] = i;

        sort(order.begin(), order.end(),
             [&](int a, int b) {
                 return points[a][0] < points[b][0];
             });

        for (int i = 1; i < n; i++) {
            if (points[order[i]][0] == points[order[i - 1]][0]) {
                unite(order[i], order[i - 1]);
            }
        }

        sort(order.begin(), order.end(),
             [&](int a, int b) {
                 return points[a][1] < points[b][1];
             });

        for (int i = 1; i < n; i++) {
            if (points[order[i]][1] == points[order[i - 1]][1]) {
                unite(order[i], order[i - 1]);
            }
        }

        int best = 0, second = 0;

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (parent[i] == i) {
                if (sz[i] >= best) {
                    second = best;
                    best = sz[i];
                } else if (sz[i] > second) {
                    second = sz[i];
                }
            }
        }

        if (second == 0) return best + 1;

        return best + second + 1;
        
    }
};
[Q4_END]
##################

### RANK 22 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 2) return n; 
        
        // Step 1: Create the difference array D
        vector<int> D(n - 1);
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; ++i) {
            D[i] = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
        }
        
        // Step 2: Group identical adjacent differences into segments
        // Map structure: Difference Value -> List of {start_index, end_index}
        unordered_map<int, vector<pair<int, int>>> segments_by_val;
        int start = 0;
        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; ++i) {
            if (D[i] != D[i - 1]) {
                segments_by_val[D[start]].push_back({start, i - 1});
                start = i;
            }
        }
        // Don't forget the final segment
        segments_by_val[D[start]].push_back({start, n - 2});
        
        int max_len_D = 0;
        
        // Step 3: Evaluate extensions and merges for each segment
        for (auto& pair : segments_by_val) {
            int val = pair.first;
            auto& segs = pair.second;
            
            for (int i = 0; i < segs.size(); ++i) {
                int l = segs[i].first;
                int r = segs[i].second;
                int L = r - l + 1;
                
                // Base length without any modifications
                max_len_D = max(max_len_D, L);
                
                // 1. Extend by 1 (Valid as long as there is an element on either side)
                if (l > 0 || r < n - 2) {
                    max_len_D = max(max_len_D, L + 1);
                }
                
                // 2. Extend left by 2
                if (l >= 2 && D[l - 2] + D[l - 1] == 2LL * val) {
                    max_len_D = max(max_len_D, L + 2);
                }
                
                // 3. Extend right by 2
                if (r + 2 <= n - 2 && D[r + 1] + D[r + 2] == 2LL * val) {
                    max_len_D = max(max_len_D, L + 2);
                }
                
                // 4. Merge with the next segment of the same value
                if (i + 1 < segs.size()) {
                    int nl = segs[i + 1].first;
                    int nr = segs[i + 1].second;
                    
                    // Check if they are separated by exactly 2 elements and if those elements sum to 2*val
                    if (nl - r == 3 && D[r + 1] + D[r + 2] == 2LL * val) {
                        max_len_D = max(max_len_D, L + 2 + (nr - nl + 1));
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        // The length of the subarray in `nums` is the length in `D` + 1
        return max_len_D + 1;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    struct DSU {
        vector<int> parent, sz;
        DSU(int n) {
            parent.resize(n);
            sz.assign(n, 1);
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) parent[i] = i;
        }
        int find(int i) {
            if (parent[i] == i) return i;
            return parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
        }
        void unite(int i, int j) {
            int rootI = find(i);
            int rootJ = find(j);
            if (rootI != rootJ) {
                if (sz[rootI] < sz[rootJ]) swap(rootI, rootJ);
                parent[rootJ] = rootI;
                sz[rootI] += sz[rootJ];
            }
        }
    };

public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        DSU dsu(n);
        
        vector<pair<int, int>> px(n), py(n);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            px[i] = {points[i][0], i};
            py[i] = {points[i][1], i};
        }
        
        sort(px.begin(), px.end());
        sort(py.begin(), py.end());
        
        for (int i = 1; i < n; i++) {
            if (px[i].first == px[i - 1].first) {
                dsu.unite(px[i].second, px[i - 1].second);
            }
            if (py[i].first == py[i - 1].first) {
                dsu.unite(py[i].second, py[i - 1].second);
            }
        }
        
        vector<int> comp_sizes;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (dsu.parent[i] == i) {
                comp_sizes.push_back(dsu.sz[i]);
            }
        }
        
        sort(comp_sizes.rbegin(), comp_sizes.rend());
        
        if (comp_sizes.size() >= 2) {
            return comp_sizes[0] + comp_sizes[1] + 1;
        }
        
        return comp_sizes[0] + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

#include <bits/stdc++.h>
#include <queue>
#include <ext/pb_ds/assoc_container.hpp>
#include <ext/pb_ds/tree_policy.hpp>
using namespace std;
using namespace __gnu_pbds;
#define rep while
#define FF first
#define SS second
#define ll  long long
#define vi vector<int>
#define vvi vector<vi>
#define vb vector<bool>
#define vl vector<ll>
#define pb push_back
#define vc vector<char>
#define INF (ll)4e18
#define pii  pair<int,int>
#define pll  pair<ll, ll>
#define vs  vector<string>
#define vs vector<string>
#define vvs vector<vs>
#define vvl vector<vector<ll>>
#define vpi vector<pii>
#define vpl vector<pll>
#define rev(A) A.rbegin(),A.rend()
#define all(v) v.begin(), v.end()
#define srt(v) sort(all(v))
#define mxe(v) *max_element(all(v) )
#define mne(v) *min_element(all(v) )
#define unq(v) v.resize(distance(v.begin(), unique(all(v))));
ll FLOOR(ll x, ll y) {
 ll q = x / y, r = x % y;
 if (r != 0 && ((r > 0) != (y > 0))) { q--; }
 return q;
}

ll CEIL(ll x, ll y) {
 ll q = x / y, r = x % y;
 if (r != 0 && ((r > 0) == (y > 0))) { q++; }
 return q;
}

const ll MOD = 1000000007, EMOD = 998244353;

class Solution {
public:
 int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& A) {
  
  int N= (int)A.size();

      vi L(N,1), R(N,1);
    L[0]=1; L[1]=2;
     for (int i=2;i<N;++i) {
       L[i] = (A[i]-A[i-1] == A[i-1]-A[i-2]) ? L[i-1]+1 : 2;
   }

  R[N-1]=1; R[N-2]=2;
  for (int i=N-3;~i;--i) {
      R[i] = (A[i+1]-A[i] == A[i+2]-A[i+1]) ? R[i+1]+1 : 2;
  }

     int ANS = mxe(L);
  
  for (int i=0;i<N;++i) {
   if (i>0) {
    ANS = max(ANS, L[i-1] + 1);
   }       
   if (i<N-1) {
    ANS = max(ANS, R[i+1] + 1);
   }  
   if (i>0 && i<N-1) {
   int  D = A[i+1] - A[i-1];
      if (D % 2 == 0) {
     int Y = 1;
       if (i >1 && A[i-1] - A[i-2] ==  D/2) {
        Y = L[i-1];
       }
     else if (i ==1) {
      Y = L[i-1];
     }

     int X = 1;
     if (i+1 < N-1 && A[i+2] - A[i+1] ==  D/2) {
      X = R[i+1]; 
     }
     else if (i+1 == N-1) {
      X = R[i+1];
     }
      ANS = max(ANS, Y + 1 + X);
    }
   }
  }

  return min(ANS, N);

 }
};
[Q3_END]

/*
If I can Give this problem , what will be its solution :0 ??
 */




#include <bits/stdc++.h>
#include <queue>
#include <ext/pb_ds/assoc_container.hpp>
#include <ext/pb_ds/tree_policy.hpp>
using namespace std;
using namespace __gnu_pbds;
#define rep while
#define FF first
#define SS second
#define ll  long long
#define vi vector<int>
#define vvi vector<vi>
#define vb vector<bool>
#define vl vector<ll>
#define pb push_back
#define vc vector<char>
#define INF (ll)4e18
#define pii  pair<int,int>
#define pll  pair<ll, ll>
#define vs  vector<string>
#define vs vector<string>
#define vvs vector<vs>
#define vvl vector<vector<ll>>
#define vpi vector<pii>
#define vpl vector<pll>
#define rev(A) A.rbegin(),A.rend()
#define all(v) v.begin(), v.end()
#define srt(v) sort(all(v))
#define mxe(v) *max_element(all(v) )
#define mne(v) *min_element(all(v) )
#define unq(v) v.resize(distance(v.begin(), unique(all(v))));
ll FLOOR(ll x, ll y) {
 ll q = x / y, r = x % y;
 if (r != 0 && ((r > 0) != (y > 0))) { q--; }
 return q;
}

ll CEIL(ll x, ll y) {
 ll q = x / y, r = x % y;
 if (r != 0 && ((r > 0) == (y > 0))) { q++; }
 return q;
}

const ll MOD = 1000000007, EMOD = 998244353;

class DSU {
public:
 vector<int> par;
 vector<int> sz;

public:
 DSU(const int &N) : par(N), sz(N, 1) {
  for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) {
   par[i] = i;
  }
 }

 void unite(int x, int y) {
  int par_x = find(x);
  int par_y = find(y);
  if (par_x == par_y) {
   return;
  }
  if (sz[par_x] < sz[par_y]) {
   swap(par_x, par_y);
  }
  par[par_y] = par_x;
  sz[par_x] += sz[par_y];
 }

 int find(int x) {
  return par[x] == x ? x : (par[x] = find(par[x]));
 }

 int size(int X) {
  return sz[find(X)];
 }

 bool connected(int x, int y) {
  return find(x) == find(y);
 }
};






class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& A) {


        int N = (int)A.size();

        DSU dsu(N);
           unordered_map<int, int> X,Y ;

        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) {
              if (X.count( A[i][0])) {
                dsu.unite(i, X[ A[i][0]]);
            } else {
                X[ A[i][0]] = i;
            }
              if (Y.count( A[i][1])) {
                dsu.unite(i, Y[ A[i][1]]);
            } else {
                Y[ A[i][1]] = i;
            }
        }

        vi  T;
        for (int i = 0; i <N; i++) {
            if (dsu.find(i) == i) {
                T.pb(dsu.size(i));
            }
        }
           sort(T.rbegin(), T.rend());

        if (T.size() >= 2) {
            return T[0]+T[1]+1;
        } 
        return T[0]+1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]
