### RANK 24 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n=nums.size();
        if(n<=3) return n;
        vector<long long> D(n-1);
        for(int i=0; i<n-1; ++i) D[i]=(long long)nums[i+1]-nums[i];
        vector<int> L(n-1, 1), R(n-1, 1);
        int max_K=1;
        for(int i=1; i<n-1; ++i){
            if(D[i]==D[i-1]) L[i]=L[i-1]+1;
            max_K=max(max_K, L[i]);
        }
        for(int i=n-3; i>=0; --i) if(D[i]==D[i+1]) R[i]=R[i+1]+1;
        int ans=min(n, max_K+2);
        for(int i=1; i<n-1; ++i){
            long long S=D[i-1]+D[i];
            bool lm=(i>=2 && S==2*D[i-2]);
            bool rm=(i<=n-3 && S==2*D[i+1]);
            if(lm && rm && D[i-2]==D[i+1]) ans=max(ans, L[i-2]+R[i+1]+3);
            else if(lm) ans=max(ans, L[i-2]+3);
            else if(rm) ans=max(ans, R[i+1]+3);
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n=points.size();
        vector<int> p(n), sz(n, 1);
        for(int i=0; i<n; ++i) p[i]=i;
        auto find=[&](int i){
            while(i!=p[i]){ p[i]=p[p[i]]; i=p[i]; }
            return i;
        };
        auto unite=[&](int i, int j){
            int r1=find(i), r2=find(j);
            if(r1!=r2){ p[r1]=r2; sz[r2]+=sz[r1]; }
        };
        unordered_map<int, int> mx, my;
        for(int i=0; i<n; ++i){
            if(mx.count(points[i][0])) unite(i, mx[points[i][0]]);
            else mx[points[i][0]]=i;
            if(my.count(points[i][1])) unite(i, my[points[i][1]]);
            else my[points[i][1]]=i;
        }
        int m1=0, m2=0;
        for(int i=0; i<n; ++i){
            if(p[i]==i){
                if(sz[i]>m1){ m2=m1; m1=sz[i]; }
                else if(sz[i]>m2) m2=sz[i];
            }
        }
        return m1+m2+1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 25 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        if (n <= 3) return n;

        int[] diffs = new int[n - 1];
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) {
            diffs[i] = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
        }

        int maxDiffsLen = 2; 

        java.util.Map<Integer, java.util.List<int[]>> blocksMap = new java.util.HashMap<>();
        int start = 0;
        for (int i = 1; i <= diffs.length; i++) {
            if (i == diffs.length || diffs[i] != diffs[i - 1]) {
                int D = diffs[start];
                blocksMap.computeIfAbsent(D, k -> new java.util.ArrayList<>())
                         .add(new int[]{start, i - 1});
                start = i;
            }
        }

        for (java.util.Map.Entry<Integer, java.util.List<int[]>> entry : blocksMap.entrySet()) {
            int D = entry.getKey();
            java.util.List<int[]> blocks = entry.getValue();
            int m = blocks.size();

            for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) {
                int s = blocks.get(i)[0];
                int e = blocks.get(i)[1];
                int len = e - s + 1;

                maxDiffsLen = Math.max(maxDiffsLen, Math.min(diffs.length, len + 1));

                if (e + 2 < diffs.length && diffs[e + 1] + diffs[e + 2] == 2 * D) {
                    int mergedLen = len + 2;
                    if (i + 1 < m && blocks.get(i + 1)[0] == e + 3) {
                        mergedLen += blocks.get(i + 1)[1] - blocks.get(i + 1)[0] + 1;
                    }
                    maxDiffsLen = Math.max(maxDiffsLen, mergedLen);
                }

                if (s - 2 >= 0 && diffs[s - 2] + diffs[s - 1] == 2 * D) {
                    int mergedLen = len + 2;
                    maxDiffsLen = Math.max(maxDiffsLen, mergedLen);
                }
            }
        }

        return maxDiffsLen + 1;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    int[] parent;
    int[] size;

    int find(int i) {
        if (parent[i] == i) return i;
        return parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
    }

    void union(int i, int j) {
        int rootI = find(i);
        int rootJ = find(j);
        if (rootI != rootJ) {
            parent[rootI] = rootJ;
            size[rootJ] += size[rootI];
        }
    }

    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        parent = new int[n];
        size = new int[n];
        
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            parent[i] = i;
            size[i] = 1;
        }

        java.util.Map<Integer, Integer> xMap = new java.util.HashMap<>();
        java.util.Map<Integer, Integer> yMap = new java.util.HashMap<>();

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];

            if (xMap.containsKey(x)) {
                union(i, xMap.get(x));
            } else {
                xMap.put(x, i);
            }

            if (yMap.containsKey(y)) {
                union(i, yMap.get(y));
            } else {
                yMap.put(y, i);
            }
        }

        int max1 = 0;
        int max2 = 0;

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (parent[i] == i) {
                int s = size[i];
                if (s > max1) {
                    max2 = max1;
                    max1 = s;
                } else if (s > max2) {
                    max2 = s;
                }
            }
        }

        return max1 + max2 + 1;
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 26 ###
[Q3_START]
#define ll long long
#define ull unsigned long long
#define ld long double
#define mp make_pair
#define pb push_back
#define f first
#define s second
#define lb lower_bound
#define ub upper_bound
#define all(x) x.begin(), x.end()
#define rall(x) x.rbegin(), x.rend()
#define ins insert
#define sz(x) static_cast<int>((x).size())
#define sc static_cast

class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        auto n = sz(nums);
        auto A = vector<ll>(all(nums));
        auto D = vector<ll>(n - 1);
        for (auto i = 0; i + 1 < n; ++i) {
            D[i] = A[i + 1] - A[i];
        }

        auto L = vector<int>(n, 1);
        auto R = vector<int>(n, 1);

        L[1] = R[n - 2] = 2;
        for (auto i = 2; i < n; ++i) {
            L[i] = D[i - 1] == D[i - 2] ? L[i - 1] + 1 : 2;
        }

        for (auto i = n - 3; i >= 0; --i) {
            R[i] = D[i] == D[i + 1] ? R[i + 1] + 1 : 2;
        }

        auto res = *ranges::max_element(L);

        for (auto i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            if (i > 0) {
                res = max(res, L[i - 1] + 1);
            }
            if (i + 1 < n) {
                res = max(res, R[i + 1] + 1);
            }
        }

        for (auto i = 1; i + 1 < n; ++i) {
            auto s = A[i + 1] - A[i - 1];
            if (s % 2 != 0) {
                continue;
            }
            auto d = s / 2;
            auto l = 1, r = 1;
            if (i >= 2 && D[i - 2] == d) {
                l = L[i - 1];
            }
            if (i + 2 < n && D[i + 1] == d) {
                r = R[i + 1];
            }
            res = max(res, l + r + 1);
        }

        return res;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
#define ll long long
#define ull unsigned long long
#define ld long double
#define mp make_pair
#define pb push_back
#define f first
#define s second
#define lb lower_bound
#define ub upper_bound
#define all(x) x.begin(), x.end()
#define rall(x) x.rbegin(), x.rend()
#define ins insert
#define sz(x) static_cast<int>((x).size())
#define sc static_cast

namespace atcoder {

struct dsu {
    int _n;
    vector<int> parent_or_size;

    dsu() : _n(0) {}
    explicit dsu(int n) : _n(n), parent_or_size(n, -1) {}

    int merge(int a, int b) {
        auto x = leader(a);
        auto y = leader(b);
        if (x == y) {
            return x;
        }
        if (-parent_or_size[x] < -parent_or_size[y]) {
            swap(x, y);
        }
        parent_or_size[x] += parent_or_size[y];
        parent_or_size[y] = x;
        return x;
    }

    bool same(int a, int b) {
        return leader(a) == leader(b);
    }

    int leader(int a) {
        if (parent_or_size[a] < 0) {
            return a;
        }
        return parent_or_size[a] = leader(parent_or_size[a]);
    }

    int size(int a) {
        return -parent_or_size[leader(a)];
    }
};

}

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        auto X = map<int, int>{};
        auto Y = map<int, int>{};
        auto n = sz(points);
        
        for (const auto& p : points) {
            if (!X.count(p[0])) {
                X[p[0]] = sz(X);
            }
            if (!Y.count(p[1])) {
                Y[p[1]] = sz(Y);
            }
        }

        auto nx = sz(X);
        auto ny = sz(Y);
        auto D = atcoder::dsu(nx + ny);

        for (const auto& p : points) {
            D.merge(X[p[0]], nx + Y[p[1]]);
        }

        auto C = vector<int>(nx + ny);
        for (const auto& p : points) {
            ++C[D.leader(X[p[0]])];
        }

        auto a = 0, b = 0;
        for (auto x : C) {
            if (x >= a) {
                b = a, a = x;
            } else if (x > b) {
                b = x;
            }
        }

        return a + b + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 2:
            return n
        diff = [nums[i+1] - nums[i] for i in range(n - 1)]
        m = len(diff)
        L = [1] * m
        for i in range(1, m):
            if diff[i] == diff[i-1]:
                L[i] = L[i-1] + 1
        R = [1] * m
        for i in range(m - 2, -1, -1):
            if diff[i] == diff[i+1]:
                R[i] = R[i+1] + 1
        max_diff_len = 0
        for i in range(m):
            run_len = L[i]
            if run_len < m:
                max_diff_len = max(max_diff_len, run_len + 1)
            else:
                max_diff_len = max(max_diff_len, run_len)
        for k in range(1, m):
            total_sum = diff[k-1] + diff[k]
            if total_sum % 2 == 0:
                d = total_sum // 2
                current_len = 2 
                if k >= 2 and diff[k-2] == d:
                    current_len += L[k-2]
                if k <= m - 2 and diff[k+1] == d:
                    current_len += R[k+1]                    
                max_diff_len = max(max_diff_len, current_len)
        return max_diff_len + 1
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
from collections import defaultdict
class UnionFind:
    def __init__(self, n):
        self.parent = list(range(n))
        self.size = [1] * n
    def find(self, i):
        if self.parent[i] != i:
            self.parent[i] = self.find(self.parent[i])
        return self.parent[i]
    def union(self, i, j):
        root_i = self.find(i)
        root_j = self.find(j)
        if root_i != root_j:
            if self.size[root_i] < self.size[root_j]:
                root_i, root_j = root_j, root_i
            self.parent[root_j] = root_i
            self.size[root_i] += self.size[root_j]
            return True
        return False
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        if n == 0: return 1
        uf = UnionFind(n)
        x_to_indices = defaultdict(list)
        y_to_indices = defaultdict(list)
        for i, (x, y) in enumerate(points):
            x_to_indices[x].append(i)
            y_to_indices[y].append(i)
        for indices in x_to_indices.values():
            first = indices[0]
            for j in range(1, len(indices)):
                uf.union(first, indices[j])
        for indices in y_to_indices.values():
            first = indices[0]
            for j in range(1, len(indices)):
                uf.union(first, indices[j])
        component_sizes = []
        for i in range(n):
            if uf.parent[i] == i:
                component_sizes.append(uf.size[i])
        component_sizes.sort(reverse=True)
        if len(component_sizes) >= 2:
            return component_sizes[0] + component_sizes[1] + 1
        else:
            return component_sizes[0] + 1
[Q4_END]

import java.util.*;

class Solution {

    public int longestArithmetic(int[] numbers) {
        int size = numbers.length;

        if (chhotaArray(size)) return size;

        long[] diffArray = diffArrayBanao(numbers, size);

        Map<Long, List<int[]>> blockMap = blockGroupBanao(diffArray);

        int maxDiffLen = 2;

        for (Map.Entry<Long, List<int[]>> entry : blockMap.entrySet()) {
            long commonDiff = entry.getKey();
            List<int[]> blocks = entry.getValue();

            maxDiffLen = blocksProcess(diffArray, blocks, commonDiff, maxDiffLen);
        }

        return maxDiffLen + 1;
    }

    boolean chhotaArray(int size) {
        return size <= 3;
    }

    long[] diffArrayBanao(int[] numbers, int size) {
        long[] diff = new long[size - 1];

        for (int index = 0; index < size - 1; index++) {
            diff[index] = (long) numbers[index + 1] - numbers[index];
        }

        return diff;
    }

    Map<Long, List<int[]>> blockGroupBanao(long[] diffArray) {
        Map<Long, List<int[]>> map = new HashMap<>();

        int m = diffArray.length;

        for (int index = 0; index < m; index++) {
            int start = index;

            while (index < m - 1 && diffArray[index + 1] == diffArray[start]) {
                index++;
            }

            int end = index;
            int length = end - start + 1;

            blockAdd(map, diffArray[start], start, end, length);
        }

        return map;
    }

    void blockAdd(Map<Long, List<int[]>> map, long diff, int start, int end, int length) {
        map.computeIfAbsent(diff, k -> new ArrayList<>())
           .add(new int[]{start, end, length});
    }

    int blocksProcess(long[] diffArray, List<int[]> blocks, long commonDiff, int maxDiffLen) {

        int m = diffArray.length;

        for (int blockIndex = 0; blockIndex < blocks.size(); blockIndex++) {
            int[] block = blocks.get(blockIndex);

            int start = block[0];
            int end = block[1];
            int length = block[2];

            int currentBest = bestExtend(diffArray, start, end, length, commonDiff, m);

            maxDiffLen = Math.max(maxDiffLen, currentBest);

            if (blockIndex + 1 < blocks.size()) {
                int[] nextBlock = blocks.get(blockIndex + 1);

                if (mergePossible(diffArray, end, nextBlock[0], commonDiff)) {
                    maxDiffLen = Math.max(maxDiffLen, length + 2 + nextBlock[2]);
                }
            }
        }

        return maxDiffLen;
    }

    int bestExtend(long[] diffArray, int start, int end, int length, long commonDiff, int m) {
        int best = length;

        if (length < m) {
            best = length + 1;
        }

        if (leftExtend(diffArray, start, commonDiff)) {
            best = Math.max(best, length + 2);
        }

        if (rightExtend(diffArray, end, commonDiff, m)) {
            best = Math.max(best, length + 2);
        }

        return best;
    }

    boolean leftExtend(long[] diffArray, int start, long diff) {
        if (start >= 2) {
            return diffArray[start - 2] + diffArray[start - 1] == 2 * diff;
        }
        return false;
    }

    boolean rightExtend(long[] diffArray, int end, long diff, int m) {
        if (end <= m - 3) {
            return diffArray[end + 1] + diffArray[end + 2] == 2 * diff;
        }
        return false;
    }

    boolean mergePossible(long[] diffArray, int end, int nextStart, long diff) {
        return nextStart == end + 3 && diffArray[end + 1] + diffArray[end + 2] == 2 * diff;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {

    int[] parentNode;
    int[] groupSize;

    int parentKhojo(int node) {
        if (parentNode[node] == node) {
            return node;
        }
        return parentNode[node] = parentKhojo(parentNode[node]);
    }

    void groupJodo(int nodeA, int nodeB) {
        int rootA = parentKhojo(nodeA);
        int rootB = parentKhojo(nodeB);

        if (rootA != rootB) {
            parentNode[rootA] = rootB;
            groupSize[rootB] += groupSize[rootA];
        }
    }

    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {

        int totalPoints = points.length;

        parentNode = new int[totalPoints];
        groupSize = new int[totalPoints];

        dsuInit(totalPoints);

        Map<Integer, Integer> xCoordinateMap = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Integer> yCoordinateMap = new HashMap<>();

        componentsBanao(points, xCoordinateMap, yCoordinateMap);

        return doBadeGroupNikal(totalPoints);
    }

    void dsuInit(int totalPoints) {
        for (int index = 0; index < totalPoints; index++) {
            parentNode[index] = index;
            groupSize[index] = 1;
        }
    }

    void componentsBanao(int[][] points, Map<Integer, Integer> xMap, Map<Integer, Integer> yMap) {

        int totalPoints = points.length;

        for (int index = 0; index < totalPoints; index++) {

            int x = points[index][0];
            int y = points[index][1];

            xCoordinateHandle(index, x, xMap);
            yCoordinateHandle(index, y, yMap);
        }
    }

    void xCoordinateHandle(int index, int x, Map<Integer, Integer> xMap) {
        if (xMap.containsKey(x)) {
            groupJodo(index, xMap.get(x));
        } else {
            xMap.put(x, index);
        }
    }

    void yCoordinateHandle(int index, int y, Map<Integer, Integer> yMap) {
        if (yMap.containsKey(y)) {
            groupJodo(index, yMap.get(y));
        } else {
            yMap.put(y, index);
        }
    }

    int doBadeGroupNikal(int totalPoints) {

        int sabseBada = 0;
        int dusraBada = 0;

        for (int index = 0; index < totalPoints; index++) {

            if (parentNode[index] == index) {

                int currentSize = groupSize[index];

                if (currentSize > sabseBada) {
                    dusraBada = sabseBada;
                    sabseBada = currentSize;
                } else if (currentSize > dusraBada) {
                    dusraBada = currentSize;
                }
            }
        }

        return finalAnswer(sabseBada, dusraBada);
    }

    int finalAnswer(int sabseBada, int dusraBada) {
        if (dusraBada == 0) {
            return sabseBada + 1;
        }
        return sabseBada + dusraBada + 1;
    }
}
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n<= 3:
            return n

        D = [nums[i+1] - nums[i] for i in range(n-1)]
        m = len(D)
        L, R = [1] * m, [1] *m

        for i in range(1, m):
            if D[i] == D[i-1]:
                L[i] = L[i-1] + 1

        for i in range(m-2, -1, -1):
            if D[i] == D[i+1]:
                R[i] = R[i+1] + 1

        ans = max(L) + 2

        for i in range(m-1):
            s = D[i] + D[i+1]
            dl = D[i-1] if i > 0 else None
            dr = D[i+2] if i + 2 < m else None

            if dl is not None and s == 2*dl:
                ans = max(ans,L[i-1] + 3)
            if dr is not None and s == 2*dr:
                ans = max(ans, R[i+2]+3)
            if dl is not None and dl == dr and s == 2*dl:
                ans = max(ans, L[i-1]+R[i+2]+3)

        return min(n, ans)
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        X, Y = defaultdict(list), defaultdict(list)
        for i, (x,y) in enumerate(points):
            X[x].append(i)
            Y[y].append(i)

        visited = [False] * len(points)
        sizes = []

        for i in range(len(points)):
            if not visited[i]:
                visited[i] = True
                q = [i]
                for curr in q:
                    x, y = points[curr]
                    for nxt in X[x]:
                        if not visited[nxt]:
                            visited[nxt] = True
                            q.append(nxt)
                    for nxt in Y[y]:
                        if not visited[nxt]:
                            visited[nxt] = True
                            q.append(nxt)
                    X[x].clear()
                    Y[y].clear()
                sizes.append(len(q))

        sizes.sort(reverse=True)
        return sizes[0] + sizes[1] + 1 if len(sizes) > 1 else sizes[0] + 1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 30 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 2:
            return n

        d = [nums[i + 1] - nums[i] for i in range(n - 1)]
        m = n - 1

        l = [0] * m
        r = [0] * m

        for i in range(m):
            l[i] = l[i - 1] + 1 if i and d[i] == d[i - 1] else 1

        for i in range(m - 1, -1, -1):
            r[i] = r[i + 1] + 1 if i + 1 < m and d[i] == d[i + 1] else 1

        ans = min(n, max(l) + 2)

        for i in range(1, n - 1):
            s = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]
            if s & 1:
                continue

            x = s // 2
            a = l[i - 2] if i >= 2 and d[i - 2] == x else 0
            b = r[i + 1] if i + 1 < m and d[i + 1] == x else 0
            ans = max(ans, a + b + 3)

        return ans
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        xm = {}
        ym = {}
    
        for x, y in points:
            if x not in xm:
                xm[x] = len(xm)
            if y not in ym:
                ym[y] = len(ym)
    
        nx = len(xm)
        ny = len(ym)
        p = list(range(nx + ny))
        sz = [1] * (nx + ny)
    
        def find(a: int) -> int:
            while p[a] != a:
                p[a] = p[p[a]]
                a = p[a]
            return a
    
        def union(a: int, b: int) -> None:
            ra = find(a)
            rb = find(b)
            if ra == rb:
                return
            if sz[ra] < sz[rb]:
                ra, rb = rb, ra
            p[rb] = ra
            sz[ra] += sz[rb]
    
        for x, y in points:
            union(xm[x], nx + ym[y])
    
        cnt = {}
        for x, y in points:
            r = find(xm[x])
            cnt[r] = cnt.get(r, 0) + 1
        
        a = 0
        b = 0
        for v in cnt.values():
            if v > a:
                a, b = v, a
            elif v > b:
                b = v
        
        return a + b + 1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 31 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution(object):
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums):
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 2:
            return n

        # length of longest arithmetic subarray ending at i (no change)
        left = [1] * n
        left[1] = 2
        for i in range(2, n):
            if nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]:
                left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1
            else:
                left[i] = 2

        # length of longest arithmetic subarray starting at i (no change)
        right = [1] * n
        right[n - 2] = 2
        for i in range(n - 3, -1, -1):
            if nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]:
                right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1
            else:
                right[i] = 2

        ans = 2

        # change first or last element
        ans = max(ans, min(n, right[1] + 1))
        ans = max(ans, min(n, left[n - 2] + 1))

        # try changing each middle element
        for i in range(1, n - 1):
            # extend only from one side
            ans = max(ans, min(n, left[i - 1] + 1))
            ans = max(ans, min(n, right[i + 1] + 1))

            # connect left and right through nums[i]
            gap = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]
            if gap % 2 == 0:
                d = gap // 2

                l = 1
                if i >= 2 and nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == d:
                    l = left[i - 1]

                r = 1
                if i + 2 < n and nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == d:
                    r = right[i + 1]

                ans = max(ans, l + 1 + r)

        return ans
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU:
    def __init__(self, n):
        self.parent = list(range(n))
        self.size = [1] * n

    def find(self, x):
        while self.parent[x] != x:
            self.parent[x] = self.parent[self.parent[x]]
            x = self.parent[x]
        return x

    def union(self, a, b):
        ra = self.find(a)
        rb = self.find(b)
        if ra == rb:
            return
        if self.size[ra] < self.size[rb]:
            ra, rb = rb, ra
        self.parent[rb] = ra
        self.size[ra] += self.size[rb]


class Solution(object):
    def maxActivated(self, points):
        x_id = {}
        y_id = {}

        for x, y in points:
            if x not in x_id:
                x_id[x] = len(x_id)
            if y not in y_id:
                y_id[y] = len(y_id)

        nx = len(x_id)
        ny = len(y_id)
        dsu = DSU(nx + ny)

        for x, y in points:
            dsu.union(x_id[x], nx + y_id[y])

        comp_edges = {}

        for x, y in points:
            root = dsu.find(x_id[x])
            comp_edges[root] = comp_edges.get(root, 0) + 1

        sizes = sorted(comp_edges.values(), reverse=True)

        if not sizes:
            return 1
        if len(sizes) == 1:
            return sizes[0] + 1
        return sizes[0] + sizes[1] + 1
[Q4_END]

class Solution {
public:
    int azure(vector<int>& a){return cobalt(a);}
    int cobalt(vector<int>& a){
        int n=a.size();
        if(n<=3) return n;
        vector<int> d(n-1);
        for(int i=0;i<n-1;i++) d[i]=a[i+1]-a[i];
        return navy(a,d);
    }
    int navy(vector<int>& a,vector<int>& d){
        int n=a.size();
        vector<int> l(n-1,1);
        for(int i=1;i<n-1;i++) if(d[i]==d[i-1]) l[i]=l[i-1]+1;
        return sky(a,d,l);
    }
    int sky(vector<int>& a,vector<int>& d,vector<int>& l){
        int n=a.size();
        vector<int> r(n-1,1);
        for(int i=n-3;i>=0;i--) if(d[i]==d[i+1]) r[i]=r[i+1]+1;
        return ocean(a,d,l,r);
    }
    int ocean(vector<int>& a,vector<int>& d,vector<int>& l,vector<int>& r){
        int n=a.size(),ans=0;
        for(int i=0;i<n-1;i++) ans=max(ans,min(n,l[i]+2));
        return teal(a,d,l,r,ans);
    }
    int teal(vector<int>& a,vector<int>& d,vector<int>& l,vector<int>& r,int ans){
        int n=a.size();
        for(int i=0;i<n-2;i++){
            int s=d[i]+d[i+1];
            if(s%2==0){
                int k=s/2;
                int x=(i>0&&d[i-1]==k)?l[i-1]:0;
                int y=(i+2<n-1&&d[i+2]==k)?r[i+2]:0;
                ans=max(ans,x+y+3);
            }
        }
        return indigo(ans);
    }
    int indigo(int a){return royal(a);}
    int royal(int a){return sapphire(a);}
    int sapphire(int a){return cerulean(a);}
    int cerulean(int a){return denim(a);}
    int denim(int a){return a;}

    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        return azure(nums);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int ivory(int i,vector<int>& p){
        if(p[i]==i) return i;
        return p[i]=ivory(p[i],p);
    }
    void beige(int i,int j,vector<int>& p,vector<int>& s){
        int a=ivory(i,p),b=ivory(j,p);
        if(a!=b){
            if(s[a]<s[b]) swap(a,b);
            p[b]=a;
            s[a]+=s[b];
        }
    }
    void almond(vector<vector<int>>& a,vector<pair<int,int>>& b,vector<pair<int,int>>& c){
        int n=a.size();
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            b[i]={a[i][0],i};
            c[i]={a[i][1],i};
        }
        sort(b.begin(),b.end());
        sort(c.begin(),c.end());
    }
    void sand(vector<pair<int,int>>& b,vector<pair<int,int>>& c,vector<int>& p,vector<int>& s){
        int n=b.size();
        for(int i=1;i<n;i++){
            if(b[i].first==b[i-1].first) beige(b[i].second,b[i-1].second,p,s);
            if(c[i].first==c[i-1].first) beige(c[i].second,c[i-1].second,p,s);
        }
    }
    int nude(vector<int>& p,vector<int>& s){
        int n=p.size();
        vector<int> e;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) if(p[i]==i) e.push_back(s[i]);
        sort(e.rbegin(),e.rend());
        if(e.size()==1) return 1+e[0];
        return 1+e[0]+e[1];
    }
    int heaven(vector<vector<int>>& a){
        int n=a.size();
        if(n==0) return 0;
        vector<pair<int,int>> b(n),c(n);
        almond(a,b,c);
        vector<int> p(n),s(n,1);
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) p[i]=i;
        sand(b,c,p,s);
        return nude(p,s);
    }
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        return heaven(points);
    }
};

[Q3_START]
fmin = lambda x, y: x if x < y else y
fmax = lambda x, y: x if x > y else y


class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, A: List[int]) -> int:
        N = len(A)

        gaps = [A[i + 1] - A[i] for i in range(N - 1)]
        L = [1] * (N - 1)
        R = [1] * (N - 1)
        for i in range(1, N - 1):
            if gaps[i] == gaps[i - 1]:
                L[i] = L[i - 1] + 1
        for i in range(1, N - 1)[::-1]:
            if gaps[i] == gaps[i - 1]:
                R[i - 1] = R[i] + 1

        ans = fmax(max(L), max(R)) + 2
        for i in range(N - 2):
            q, r = divmod(gaps[i] + gaps[i+1], 2)
            if r == 0:
                ll=rr = 0
                if i > 0 and gaps[i-1] == q: ll = L[i-1]
                if i+2 < N-1 and gaps[i+2] == q: rr=  R[i+2]
                ans = fmax(ans, ll+rr+3)

        return fmin(ans, N)
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]

class DSU:
    def __init__(self, N):
        self.par = list(range(N))
        self.sz = [1] * N

    def find(self, x):
        if self.par[x] != x:
            self.par[x] = self.find(self.par[x])
        return self.par[x]

    def union(self, x, y):
        xr, yr = self.find(x), self.find(y)
        if xr == yr:
            return False
        if self.sz[xr] < self.sz[yr]:
            xr, yr = yr, xr
        self.par[yr] = xr
        self.sz[xr] += self.sz[yr]
        return True

    def size(self, x):
        return self.sz[self.find(x)]

class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        N = len(points)
        dsu =DSU(N)

        xr = {}
        yr = {}
        for i, (x, y) in enumerate(points):
            if x in xr:
                dsu.union(i, xr[x])
            else:
                xr[x] = i

            if y in yr:
                dsu.union(i, yr[y])
            else:
                yr[y] = i

        roots = {dsu.find(u) for u in range(N)}
        sizes = [dsu.sz[r] for r in roots]
        sizes.sort(reverse=True)
        if len(sizes) >= 2:
            a,b = sizes[:2]
            return a+b+1
        return sizes[0] + 1

            
[Q4_END]

class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& q) {
        int n = q.size();
        if (n < 3) return n;
        vector<int> v(n - 1);
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) v[i] = q[i + 1] - q[i];
        int m = n - 1;
        vector<int> a(m), b(m);
        for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) {
            if (i > 0 && v[i] == v[i - 1]) a[i] = a[i - 1] + 1;
            else a[i] = 1;}
        for (int i = m - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (i < m - 1 && v[i] == v[i + 1]) b[i] = b[i + 1] + 1;
            else b[i] = 1;}
        int mx = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) mx = max(mx, b[i] + 1);
        if (mx < n) mx++;
        for(int i=0;i<m-1;i++){
            if (i > 0) {
                int d = v[i - 1];
                if(v[i]+v[i+1]==2*d){
                    int c = a[i - 1] + 2;
                    if (i + 2 < m && v[i + 2] == d) c += b[i + 2];
                    mx = max(mx, c + 1);
                }}
            if (i + 2 < m) {
                int d = v[i + 2];
                if(v[i]+v[i+1]==2*d){
                    int c = b[i + 2] + 2;
                    if (i > 0 && v[i - 1] == d) c += a[i - 1]; mx = max(mx, c + 1);
                }
            }
        }
        return mx;}
};

class Solution {
public:
    int h(int i, vector<int>& v) {
        if(v[i]==i)return i;
        return v[i]=h(v[i],v);
    }
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& q) {
        map<int,int> m1,m2;
        int x=0,y=0;
        for(auto& i:q){
            if(m1.find(i[0])==m1.end())m1[i[0]]=x++;
        }
        for(auto& i:q){
            if(m2.find(i[1])==m2.end())m2[i[1]]=x+y++;
        }
        vector<int> v(x+y);
        for(int i=0;i<x+y;i++)v[i]=i;
        for(auto& i:q){
            int a=h(m1[i[0]],v);
            int b=h(m2[i[1]],v);
            if(a!=b)v[a]=b;
        }
        map<int,int> sz;
        for(auto& i:q)sz[h(m1[i[0]],v)]++;
        int r1=0,r2=0;
        for(auto const& it:sz){
            int at=it.second;
            if(at>r1){
                r2=r1;
                r1=at;
            }else if(at>r2){
                r2=at;
            }
        }
        return r1+r2+1;
    }
};

### RANK 36 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)

        L = [1] * n
        L[1] = 2
        for i in range(2, n):
            if nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]:
                L[i] = L[i - 1] + 1
            else:
                L[i] = 2

        R = [1] * n
        R[n - 2] = 2
        for i in range(n - 3, -1, -1):
            if nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]:
                R[i] = R[i + 1] + 1
            else:
                R[i] = 2

        ans = min(n, max(L) + 1)

        for i in range(1, n - 1):
            gap = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]
            if gap % 2 != 0:
                continue

            d = gap // 2

            left = 1
            if i - 1 >= 1 and nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == d:
                left = L[i - 1]

            right = 1
            if i + 1 <= n - 2 and nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == d:
                right = R[i + 1]

            ans = max(ans, left + 1 + right)

        return ans
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU:
    def __init__(self, n: int):
        self.p = list(range(n))
        self.sz = [1] * n

    def find(self, x: int) -> int:
        while self.p[x] != x:
            self.p[x] = self.p[self.p[x]]
            x = self.p[x]
        return x

    def union(self, a: int, b: int) -> None:
        ra, rb = self.find(a), self.find(b)
        if ra == rb:
            return
        if self.sz[ra] < self.sz[rb]:
            ra, rb = rb, ra
        self.p[rb] = ra
        self.sz[ra] += self.sz[rb]


class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        xs = {}
        ys = {}

        for x, y in points:
            if x not in xs:
                xs[x] = len(xs)
            if y not in ys:
                ys[y] = len(ys)

        nx = len(xs)
        ny = len(ys)

        dsu = DSU(nx + ny)

        for x, y in points:
            xi = xs[x]
            yi = nx + ys[y]
            dsu.union(xi, yi)

        comp_edges = {}

        for x, y in points:
            root = dsu.find(xs[x])
            comp_edges[root] = comp_edges.get(root, 0) + 1

        best1 = best2 = 0
        for cnt in comp_edges.values():
            if cnt > best1:
                best2 = best1
                best1 = cnt
            elif cnt > best2:
                best2 = cnt

        return best1 + best2 + 1
[Q4_END]

/**
 * @param {number[]} nums
 * @return {number}
 */
var longestArithmetic = function(hongcaonima) {
    var len = hongcaonima.length
  if (len <= 3) return len

  var left = new Array(len).fill(2)
  for (var i = 2; i < len; i++) {
    if (hongcaonima[i] - hongcaonima[i - 1] === hongcaonima[i - 1] - hongcaonima[i - 2]) {
      left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1
    }
  }

  var right = new Array(len).fill(2)
  for (var i = len - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
    if (hongcaonima[i + 1] - hongcaonima[i] === hongcaonima[i + 2] - hongcaonima[i + 1]) {
      right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1
    }
  }

  var zuidachangdu = 0
  
  for (var i = 0; i < len; i++) {
    if (i > 0) zuidachangdu = Math.max(zuidachangdu, left[i - 1] + 1)
    if (i < len - 1) zuidachangdu = Math.max(zuidachangdu, right[i + 1] + 1)
  }

  for (var i = 1; i < len - 1; i++) {

    var diff2 = hongcaonima[i + 1] - hongcaonima[i - 1]
    
    if (diff2 % 2 === 0) {
      var d = diff2 / 2
      var currentTotal = 1 
      

      if (hongcaonima[i - 1] - (hongcaonima[i - 2] ?? -Infinity) === d) {
        currentTotal += left[i - 1]
      } else {
        currentTotal += 1 
      }
      
      if ((hongcaonima[i + 2] ?? -Infinity) - hongcaonima[i + 1] === d) {
        currentTotal += right[i + 1]
      } else {
        currentTotal += 1 
      }
      
      zuidachangdu = Math.max(zuidachangdu, currentTotal)
    }
  }

  return Math.min(zuidachangdu, len)
};
[Q3_END]

/**
 * @param {number[][]} points
 * @return {number}
 */
var maxActivated = function(wucaonima) {
    var len = wucaonima.length
    if (len === 0) {
        return 1
    }

    var hppat = Array.from({ length: len }, (_, i) => i)
    var find = (i) => {
        if (hppat[i] === i) return i
        return hppat[i] = find(hppat[i])
    }
    var union = (i, j) => {
        var rootI = find(i)
        var rootJ = find(j)
        if (rootI !== rootJ) hppat[rootI] = rootJ
    }

    var mp1 = new Map()
    var mp2 = new Map()

    for (var i = 0; i < len; i++) {
        var [x, y] = wucaonima[i]
        if (mp1.has(x)) union(i, mp1.get(x))
        mp1.set(x, i)
        if (mp2.has(y)) union(i, mp2.get(y))
        mp2.set(y, i)
    }

    var mp3 = new Map()
    for (var i = 0; i < len; i++) {
        var root = find(i)
        mp3.set(root, (mp3.get(root) || 0) + 1)
    }

    var hongcao = Array.from(mp3.values()).sort((a, b) => b - a)

    if (hongcao.length >= 2) {
        return hongcao[0] + hongcao[1] + 1
    }

    return hongcao[0] + 1
};
[Q4_END]

class Solution {
    public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 2) return n;
        vector<int> L(n), R(n);
        vector<long long> dl(n), dr(n);
        L[0] = 1;
        dl[0] = 0;
        for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
            long long d = (long long)nums[i] - nums[i-1];
            dl[i] = d;
            if (i == 1 || d != dl[i-1]) L[i] = 2;
            else L[i] = L[i-1] + 1;
        }
        R[n-1] = 1;
        dr[n-1] = 0;
        for (int i = n-2; i >= 0; --i) {
            long long d = (long long)nums[i+1] - nums[i];
            dr[i] = d;
            if (i == n-2 || d != dr[i+1]) R[i] = 2;
            else R[i] = R[i+1] + 1;
        }
        int ans = 0;
        for (int v : L) ans = max(ans, v);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            if (i > 0) ans = max(ans, L[i-1] + 1);
            if (i+1 < n) ans = max(ans, R[i+1] + 1);
            if (i > 0 && i+1 < n) {
                if (L[i-1] >= 2) {
                    long long d = dl[i-1];
                    if ((long long)nums[i+1] - nums[i-1] == 2*d) {
                        int le = L[i-1];
                        int ri = (R[i+1] >= 2 && dr[i+1] == d ? R[i+1] : 1);
                        ans = max(ans, le + 1 + ri);
                    }
                }
                if (R[i+1] >= 2) {
                    long long d = dr[i+1];
                    if ((long long)nums[i+1] - nums[i-1] == 2*d) {
                        int le = (L[i-1] >= 2 && dl[i-1] == d ? L[i-1] : 1);
                        int ri = R[i+1];
                        ans = max(ans, le + 1 + ri);
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        return ans > n ? n : ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]




class Solution {
    public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        if (n == 0) return 1;
        map<int,int> mx, my;
        int nx = 0, ny = 0;
        for (auto& pt : points) {
            int x = pt[0], y = pt[1];
            if (mx.find(x) == mx.end()) mx[x] = nx++;
            if (my.find(y) == my.end()) my[y] = ny++;
        }
        int N = nx + ny;
        vector<int> parent(N);
        for (int i = 0; i < N; ++i) parent[i] = i;
        auto find = [&](int u) {
            int v = u;
            while (parent[v] != v) {
                parent[v] = parent[parent[v]];
                v = parent[v];
            }
            return v;
        };
        auto unite = [&](int u, int v) {
            int fu = find(u), fv = find(v);
            if (fu != fv) parent[fv] = fu;
        };
        for (auto& pt : points) {
            int u = mx[pt[0]];
            int v = nx + my[pt[1]];
            unite(u, v);
        }
        unordered_map<int,long long> cnt;
        cnt.reserve(n * 2);
        for (auto& pt : points) {
            int u = mx[pt[0]];
            int fu = find(u);
            cnt[fu]++;
        }
        vector<long long> comps;
        comps.reserve(cnt.size());
        for (auto& kv : cnt) comps.push_back(kv.second);
        sort(comps.begin(), comps.end(), greater<long long>());
        long long a = comps[0];
        long long b = comps.size() > 1 ? comps[1] : 0;
        long long ans = a + b + 1;
        return (int)ans;
    }
};

from typing import List

class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        M = len(nums) - 1
        
        diff = [nums[i+1] - nums[i] for i in range(M)]
        
        starts = [1] * M
        for i in range(M - 2, -1, -1):
            if diff[i] == diff[i+1]:
                starts[i] = starts[i+1] + 1
                
        ends = [1] * M
        for i in range(1, M):
            if diff[i] == diff[i-1]:
                ends[i] = ends[i-1] + 1
                
        max_diff_len = 0
        
        for i in range(M):
            if i == 0 or diff[i] != diff[i-1]:
                max_diff_len = max(max_diff_len, min(starts[i] + 1, M))
                
        for i in range(M - 1):
            total_sum = diff[i] + diff[i+1]
            
            if total_sum % 2 == 0:
                D = total_sum // 2
                
                left_len = 0
                if i - 1 >= 0 and diff[i-1] == D:
                    left_len = ends[i-1]
                right_len = 0
                if i + 2 < M and diff[i+2] == D:
                    right_len = starts[i+2]
                max_diff_len = max(max_diff_len, left_len + 2 + right_len)
                
        return max_diff_len + 1
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
from typing import List

class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: List[List[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        parent = list(range(n))
        size = [1] * n
        
        def find(i):
            if parent[i] == i:
                return i
            parent[i] = find(parent[i])
            return parent[i]
            
        def union(i, j):
            root_i = find(i)
            root_j = find(j)
            if root_i != root_j:
                parent[root_i] = root_j
                size[root_j] += size[root_i]
                
        x_map = {}
        y_map = {}
        
        for i, (x, y) in enumerate(points):
            if x in x_map:
                union(i, x_map[x])
            if y in y_map:
                union(i, y_map[y])
                
            x_map[x] = i
            y_map[y] = i
            
        component_sizes = []
        for i in range(n):
            if parent[i] == i:
                component_sizes.append(size[i])
                
        component_sizes.sort(reverse=True)
        
        if len(component_sizes) >= 2:
            return component_sizes[0] + component_sizes[1] + 1
            
        return component_sizes[0] + 1
[Q4_END]

class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        out = 2
        zz = nums
        for nums in [zz, zz[::-1]]:
            diffs = []
            n = len(nums) - 1
            for i in range(n):
                diffs.append(nums[i + 1] - nums[i])
    
            runs = []
            while diffs:
                curr = diffs[-1]
                ct = 0
                while diffs and diffs[-1] == curr:
                    diffs.pop()
                    ct += 1
                runs.append((curr, ct))
                out = max(out, ct)
    
            z = len(runs)
            for i in range(z):
                if i:
                    out = max(out, runs[i][1] + 1)
                if i + 1 < z:
                    out = max(out, runs[i][1] + 1)
                if i + 2 < z and runs[i][0] * 2 == runs[i + 1][0] + runs[i + 2][0] and runs[i + 1][1] == 1:
                    out = max(out, runs[i][1] + 2)

                    if i + 3 < z and runs[i + 2][1] == 1 and runs[i + 3][0] == runs[i][0]:
                        out = max(out, runs[i][1] + 2 + runs[i + 3][1])
    
            # print(runs)

        return out + 1
            
        

        
        
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)


        sX = defaultdict(list)
        sY = defaultdict(list)

        for i in range(n):
            x, y = points[i]
            sX[x].append(i)
            sY[y].append(i)

        seen = [0] * n
        out = [0, 0]

        for i in range(n):
            if seen[i]:
                continue
                
            st = [i]
            seen[i] = 1
            for u in st:
                x, y = points[u]
                while sX[x]:
                    v = sX[x].pop()
                    if not seen[v]:
                        st.append(v)
                        seen[v] = 1
                        
                while sY[y]:
                    v = sY[y].pop()
                    if not seen[v]:
                        st.append(v)
                        seen[v] = 1

            out.append(len(st))
            # print(st)

        out.sort()
        return out[-1] + out[-2] + 1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 44 ###
[Q3_START]
impl Solution {
    pub fn longest_arithmetic(v: Vec<i32>) -> i32 {
        let n = v.len();
        let d: Vec<i32> = v.windows(2).map(|w| w[1] - w[0]).collect();
        let mut l = vec![1; n - 1];
        let mut r = vec![1; n - 1];
        for i in 1..n - 1 {
            if d[i] == d[i - 1] {
                l[i] = l[i - 1] + 1;
            } 
        }
        for i in (0..n - 2).rev() {
            if d[i] == d[i + 1] {
                r[i] = r[i + 1] + 1;
            }
        }
        let mut a = 0;
        for &x in &l {
            a = a.max(x + 1);
        }

        for i in 0..n {
            if i > 0 && i < n - 1 {
                let s = v[i + 1] - v[i - 1];
                if s % 2 == 0 {
                    let k = s / 2;
                    let mut c = 3;
                    if i >= 2 && d[i - 2] == k {
                        c += l[i - 2];
                    }
                    if i + 1 < n - 1 && d[i + 1] == k {
                        c += r[i + 1];
                    }
                    a = a.max(c);
                }
            }
            if i >= 2 {
                a = a.max(l[i - 2] + 2);
            }
            if i < n - 2 {
                a = a.max(r[i + 1] + 2);
            }
        }
        a.min(n as i32)
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
use std::collections::HashMap;

impl Solution {
    pub fn max_activated(p: Vec<Vec<i32>>) -> i32 {
        let n = p.len();
        let mut d: Vec<_> = (0..n).collect();
        let mut s = vec![1; n];
        let mut x = HashMap::new();
        let mut y = HashMap::new();

        for (i, r) in p.iter().enumerate() {
            let (a, b) = (r[0], r[1]);
            let mut j = i;
            
            for &k in [x.get(&a), y.get(&b)].into_iter().flatten() {
                let mut u = j;
                while u != d[u] { 
                    d[u] = d[d[u]]; 
                    u = d[u]; 
                }
                let mut w = k;
                while w != d[w] { 
                    d[w] = d[d[w]]; 
                    w = d[w]; 
                }
                if u != w {
                    d[u] = w;
                    s[w] += s[u];
                    j = w;
                }
            }
            x.insert(a, i);
            y.insert(b, i);
        }

        let mut c: Vec<_> = (0..n)
            .filter(|&i| d[i] == i)
            .map(|i| s[i])
            .collect();
            
        c.sort_unstable_by(|a, b| b.cmp(a));
        (c.into_iter().take(2).sum::<usize>() + 1) as _
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 45 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    // Helper class to track contiguous blocks of identical differences
    class Segment {
        int val, l, r, len;
        Segment(int v, int left, int right) {
            val = v; 
            l = left; 
            r = right; 
            len = right - left + 1;
        }
    }

    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        if (n <= 2) return n;

        // Step 1: Create the difference array
        int[] A = new int[n - 1];
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) {
            A[i] = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
        }

        // Step 2: Group the difference array into contiguous segments
        List<Segment> segments = new ArrayList<>();
        int start = 0;
        for (int i = 1; i < A.length; i++) {
            if (A[i] != A[i - 1]) {
                segments.add(new Segment(A[start], start, i - 1));
                start = i;
            }
        }
        segments.add(new Segment(A[start], start, A.length - 1));

        // The minimum arithmetic subarray length we can ALWAYS form (for n >= 3) is 3 in nums, 
        // which corresponds to a length of 2 in our difference array.
        int maxA = 2; 
        
        // Step 3: Map to track the last seen segment of a particular difference value
        Map<Integer, Segment> lastSeen = new HashMap<>();

        for (Segment s : segments) {
            maxA = Math.max(maxA, s.len);

            // Rule 1: Extend left or right by 1
            if (s.l > 0 || s.r < A.length - 1) {
                maxA = Math.max(maxA, s.len + 1);
            }

            // Rule 2: Extend right by 2
            if (s.r + 2 < A.length && A[s.r + 1] + A[s.r + 2] == 2 * s.val) {
                maxA = Math.max(maxA, s.len + 2);
            }

            // Rule 3: Extend left by 2
            if (s.l - 2 >= 0 && A[s.l - 1] + A[s.l - 2] == 2 * s.val) {
                maxA = Math.max(maxA, s.len + 2);
            }

            // Rule 4: Merge with a previous segment of the same value
            if (lastSeen.containsKey(s.val)) {
                Segment prev = lastSeen.get(s.val);
                // Check if they are separated by exactly 2 elements and the gap bridges properly
                if (s.l == prev.r + 3 && A[prev.r + 1] + A[prev.r + 2] == 2 * s.val) {
                    maxA = Math.max(maxA, prev.len + s.len + 2);
                }
            }
            lastSeen.put(s.val, s); // Update the most recent segment for this value
        }

        // The length in `nums` is the length in the difference array + 1. 
        return Math.min(n, maxA + 1);
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    int[] parent;
    int[] size;

    // Find with path compression
    private int find(int i) {
        if (parent[i] == i) return i;
        return parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
    }

    // Union by size
    private void union(int i, int j) {
        int rootI = find(i);
        int rootJ = find(j);
        if (rootI != rootJ) {
            parent[rootI] = rootJ;
            size[rootJ] += size[rootI];
        }
    }

    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        parent = new int[n];
        size = new int[n];
        
        // Initialize Union-Find sets
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            parent[i] = i;
            size[i] = 1;
        }

        // HashMaps to map each coordinate to its representative point index
        Map<Integer, Integer> xMap = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Integer> yMap = new HashMap<>();

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];
            
            // If we've seen this x-coordinate before, unite the current point with the previous one
            if (xMap.containsKey(x)) {
                union(i, xMap.get(x));
            } else {
                xMap.put(x, i);
            }
            
            // If we've seen this y-coordinate before, unite the current point with the previous one
            if (yMap.containsKey(y)) {
                union(i, yMap.get(y));
            } else {
                yMap.put(y, i);
            }
        }

        // Collect the sizes of all unique components
        List<Integer> compSizes = new ArrayList<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            // A node is a root if its parent is itself
            if (parent[i] == i) {
                compSizes.add(size[i]);
            }
        }

        // Sort component sizes in descending order to easily access the largest ones
        compSizes.sort(Collections.reverseOrder());

        // We can connect at most 2 distinct components with a single new (x, y) point
        if (compSizes.size() >= 2) {
            return 1 + compSizes.get(0) + compSizes.get(1);
        } else {
            // If there's only 1 component, the new point just adds itself to it
            return 1 + compSizes.get(0);
        }
    }
}

### RANK 48 ###
[Q3_START]
const int maxn = 100005;

class Solution {
public:
    int res, n, f[maxn];
    vector<int> a;

    void calc(){
        int i, j, d, L;
        f[n - 1] = 1; f[n - 2] = 2;
        for (i = n - 3; i >= 0; --i){
            if (a[i + 1] - a[i] == a[i + 2] - a[i + 1]) f[i] = f[i + 1] + 1;
            else f[i] = 2;
        }

        for (i = 0; i < n - 2; ++i){
            d = a[i + 1] - a[i];
            j = i + f[i];
            L = f[i];
            if (j < n){
                if (j + 1 < n && a[j + 1] == a[j - 1] + d + d){
                    if (j + 2 < n && a[j + 2] == a[j + 1] + d) L += f[j + 1] + 1;
                    else L += 2;
                }
                else ++L;
            }
            
            res = max(res, L);
        }
    }
    
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& aa) {
        a = aa;
        n = a.size();
        res = 3;
        calc();
        reverse(a.begin(), a.end());
        calc();
        return res;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
const int maxn = 100005;

class Solution {
public:
    unordered_map<int, vector<int> > row, col;
    int fa[maxn], sz[maxn], n;

    int find_fa(int p){
        int j, k;
        j = p;
        while (fa[j] != -1) j = fa[j];
        while (p != j){
            k = fa[p];
            fa[p] = j;
            p = k;
        }
        
        return j;
    }

    void connect(int x, int y){
        x = find_fa(x); y = find_fa(y);
        if (x != y){
            fa[y] = x;
            sz[x] += sz[y];
        }
    }
    
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& a) {
        int i, j, x, y, zd = 0, zd2 = 0;
        n = a.size();
        for (i = 0; i < n; ++i){
            row[a[i][0]].push_back(i);
            col[a[i][1]].push_back(i);
            fa[i] = -1; sz[i] = 1;
        }

        for (auto p : row)
            for (i = 0; i + 1 < p.second.size(); ++i)
                connect(p.second[i], p.second[i + 1]);
        
        for (auto p : col)
            for (i = 0; i + 1 < p.second.size(); ++i)
                connect(p.second[i], p.second[i + 1]);

        for (i = 0; i < n; ++i)
            if (fa[i] == -1){
                if (sz[i] > zd){
                    zd2 = zd; zd = sz[i];
                }
                else zd2 = max(zd2, sz[i]);
            }

        return zd + zd2 + 1;
    }
};

### RANK 50 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 3: return n
        A = [nums[i+1] - nums[i] for i in range(n - 1)]
        m = n - 1
        L = [0] * m
        L[0] = 1
        for i in range(1, m):
            L[i] = L[i - 1] + 1 if A[i] == A[i - 1] else 1

        R = [0] * m
        R[m - 1] = 1
        for i in range(m - 2, -1, -1):
            R[i] = R[i + 1] + 1 if A[i] == A[i + 1] else 1

        ans = 3
        for i in range(m):
            v = L[i] + 2
            if v > n: v = n
            if v > ans: ans = v

        for i in range(m - 1):
            s = A[i] + A[i + 1]
            if s % 2 == 0:
                d = s // 2
                lc = L[i - 1] if i > 0 and A[i - 1] == d  else 0
                rc = R[i + 2] if i + 2 < m and A[i + 2] == d else 0
                v = lc + rc + 3
                if v > ans: ans = v
        return ans
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        parent = {}
        edge_count = {}
        OFFSET = 3_000_000_000
        def find(i):
            if i not in parent:
                parent[i] = i
                edge_count[i] = 0
                return i
            root = i
            while parent[root] != root:
                root = parent[root]
            curr = i
            while curr != root:
                nxt = parent[curr]
                parent[curr] = root
                curr = nxt
            return root

        for x, y in points:
            u = find(x)
            v = find(y + OFFSET)
            if u != v:
                parent[u] = v
                edge_count[v] += edge_count[u] + 1
            else:
                edge_count[u] += 1

        sizes = [edge_count[i] for i in parent if parent[i] == i]
        sizes.sort(reverse = True)

        if len(sizes) > 1:
            return sizes[0] + sizes[1] + 1

        return sizes[0] + 1
            
                
[Q4_END]

### RANK 51 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution(object):
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums):
        n = len(nums)
        # Constraints say n >= 4, but good to handle small cases
        if n <= 2:
            return n
            
        # 1. Calculate adjacent differences
        diffs = []
        for i in range(n - 1):
            diffs.append(nums[i+1] - nums[i])
            
        m = len(diffs)
        
        # 2. Precompute the length of identical difference runs ending at i
        left = [1] * m
        for i in range(1, m):
            if diffs[i] == diffs[i-1]:
                left[i] = left[i-1] + 1
        
        # 3. Precompute the length of identical difference runs starting at i
        right = [1] * m
        for i in range(m - 2, -1, -1):
            if diffs[i] == diffs[i+1]:
                right[i] = right[i+1] + 1
        
        # Base case: Any run of length k (k+1 elements) can be extended 
        # to k+2 elements by changing a neighbor (e.g., [1,2,3,10] -> [1,2,3,4])
        ans = max(left) + 2
            
        # 4. Bridge case: Try changing nums[i] to connect segments
        for i in range(1, n - 1):
            # We change nums[i] so [nums[i-1], new_val, nums[i+1]] is arithmetic.
            # This is possible if the total jump is even.
            total_jump = nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]
            if total_jump % 2 == 0:
                d = total_jump // 2
                # Start with the 3 elements: nums[i-1], new_val, nums[i+1]
                current_len = 3
                
                # If the difference to the left of nums[i-1] was also 'd', add that run
                if i - 2 >= 0 and diffs[i-2] == d:
                    current_len += left[i-2]
                
                # If the difference to the right of nums[i+1] is also 'd', add that run
                if i + 1 < m and diffs[i+1] == d:
                    current_len += right[i+1]
                    
                ans = max(ans, current_len)
                
        # Ensure we never return a length greater than the array size
        return min(ans, n)
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution(object):
    def maxActivated(self, points):
        n = len(points)
        parent = list(range(n))
        size = [1] * n

        def find(i):
            if parent[i] == i:
                return i
            parent[i] = find(parent[i])
            return parent[i]

        def union(i, j):
            root_i = find(i)
            root_j = find(j)
            if root_i != root_j:
                if size[root_i] < size[root_j]:
                    root_i, root_j = root_j, root_i
                parent[root_j] = root_i
                size[root_i] += size[root_j]

        # 1. Group points by X and Y to find connections
        xs = {}
        ys = {}
        for i, (x, y) in enumerate(points):
            if x in xs:
                union(i, xs[x])
            xs[x] = i
            if y in ys:
                union(i, ys[y])
            ys[y] = i

        # 2. Get all distinct components and their sizes
        comp_info = {} # root_id -> size
        for i in range(n):
            root = find(i)
            comp_info[root] = size[root]
            
        # 3. For every unique X and unique Y, see which component they belong to
        # x_to_comps[val] = {root_id1, root_id2...}
        x_to_comps = {}
        for x, idx in xs.items():
            x_to_comps[x] = find(idx)
            
        y_to_comps = {}
        for y, idx in ys.items():
            y_to_comps[y] = find(idx)

        # 4. We want to pick an (x, y) to bridge components.
        # The total points will be: Size(Comp of x) + Size(Comp of y) + 1
        # If Comp of x == Comp of y, it's just Size(Comp of x) + 1
        
        max_total = 0
        
        # Case A: The new point connects to two different components
        # We pick the two largest distinct components.
        all_sizes = sorted(comp_info.values(), reverse=True)
        if len(all_sizes) >= 2:
            max_total = all_sizes[0] + all_sizes[1] + 1
        else:
            max_total = all_sizes[0] + 1
            
        # Case B: The new point connects to an existing component by X 
        # and a different existing component by Y. (Handled by Case A)
        
        return max_total

# Example Trace (Example 1): points = [[1,1], [1,2], [2,2]]
# (1,1) and (1,2) connect (same x). (1,2) and (2,2) connect (same y).
# All 3 points are 1 component. Size = 3.
# Result = 3 + 1 = 4.
[Q4_END]

### RANK 52 ###
[Q3_START]
public class Solution {
    public int LongestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.Length;
        int[] left = new int[n];
        int[] right = new int[n];

         left[0] = 1;
        left[1] = 2;
        int best = 2;

        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            int now = nums[i] - nums[i - 1];
            int prev = nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2];
            left[i] = now == prev ? left[i - 1] + 1 : 2;
            if (left[i] > best) best = left[i];
            
        }

        right[n - 1] = 1;
        right[n - 2] = 2;

        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            int now = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
            int prev = nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1];
            right[i] = now == prev ? right[i + 1] + 1 : 2;
            if (right[i] > best) best = right[i];
            
        }

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (i > 0) {
                int len = left[i - 1] + 1;
                if (len > best) best = len;
                
            }

            if (i + 1 < n) {
                int len = right[i + 1] + 1;
                if (len > best) best = len;
                
            }

            if (i > 0 && i + 1 < n) {
                int gap = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1];
                if ((gap & 1) == 0) {
                    int step = gap / 2;

                    int takeLeft = 1;
                    if (i - 1 > 0 && nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == step) {
                        takeLeft = left[i - 1];
                        
                    }

                    int takeRight = 1;
                    if (i + 1 < n - 1 && nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == step) {
                        takeRight = right[i + 1];
                        
                    }

                    int len = takeLeft + 1 + takeRight;
                    if (len > best) best = len;
                    
                }
                
            }
            
        }

        return best > n ? n : best;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
public class Solution {
    public int MaxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int[] group = new int[points.Length];
        int[] count = new int[points.Length];

        for (int i = 0; i < points.Length; i++) {
            group[i] = i;
            count[i] = 1;
            
        }

        int Find(int spot) {
            while (group[spot] != spot) {
                group[spot] = group[group[spot]];
                spot = group[spot];
                
            }

            return spot;
            
        }

        void Join(int left, int right) {
            left = Find(left);
            right = Find(right);

            if (left == right) {
                return;
                
            }

            if (count[left] < count[right]) {
                int swap = left;
                left = right;
                right = swap;
                
            }

            group[right] = left;
            count[left] += count[right];
            
        }

        Dictionary<int, int> seenX = new Dictionary<int, int>(points.Length);
        Dictionary<int, int> seenY = new Dictionary<int, int>(points.Length);

        for (int i = 0; i < points.Length; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];

            if (seenX.TryGetValue(x, out int sameX)) {
                Join(i, sameX);
                } else {
                seenX[x] = i;
                
                }

            if (seenY.TryGetValue(y, out int sameY)) {
                Join(i, sameY);
                } else {
                seenY[y] = i;
                
                }
            
            }

        int best = 0;
        int next = 0;

        for (int i = 0; i < points.Length; i++) {
            if (Find(i) != i) {
                continue;
                
            }

            if (count[i] >= best) {
                next = best;
                best = count[i];
                } else if (count[i] > next) {
                next = count[i];
                
                }
            
            }

        return best + next + 1;
        }
            }
 
    
[Q4_END]

### RANK 53 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        
        if (n <= 3) return n;

        int m = n - 1;
        vector<long long> diff(m);
        for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) {
            diff[i] = (long long)nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
        }

        vector<int> left_len(m, 1);
        for (int i = 1; i < m; ++i) {
            if (diff[i] == diff[i - 1]) {
                left_len[i] = left_len[i - 1] + 1;
            }
        }

        vector<int> right_len(m, 1);
        for (int i = m - 2; i >= 0; --i) {
            if (diff[i] == diff[i + 1]) {
                right_len[i] = right_len[i + 1] + 1;
            }
        }

        int max_subarray_len = 3;

        for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) {
            int current_len = left_len[i];
            if (current_len < m) {
                max_subarray_len = max(max_subarray_len, current_len + 2);
            } else {
                max_subarray_len = max(max_subarray_len, current_len + 1);
            }
        }

        for (int i = 0; i < m - 1; ++i) {
            long long diff_sum = diff[i] + diff[i + 1];
            
            if (diff_sum % 2 == 0) {
                long long target_diff = diff_sum / 2;
                int combined_len = 2; 
                
                if (i > 0 && diff[i - 1] == target_diff) {
                    combined_len += left_len[i - 1];
                }
                
                if (i + 2 < m && diff[i + 2] == target_diff) {
                    combined_len += right_len[i + 2];
                }
                
                max_subarray_len = max(max_subarray_len, combined_len + 1);
            }
        }

        return max_subarray_len;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
private:
    vector<int> parent;
    vector<int> componentSize;

    int findParent(int node) {
        if (parent[node] == node) {
            return node;
        }
        return parent[node] = findParent(parent[node]);
    }

    void unionNodes(int u, int v) {
        int rootU = findParent(u);
        int rootV = findParent(v);
        
        if (rootU != rootV) {
            if (componentSize[rootU] < componentSize[rootV]) {
                swap(rootU, rootV);
            }
            parent[rootV] = rootU;
            componentSize[rootU] += componentSize[rootV];
        }
    }
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        
        parent.resize(n);
        componentSize.resize(n, 1);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            parent[i] = i;
        }

        unordered_map<int, int> xToNode;
        unordered_map<int, int> yToNode;

        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];

            if (xToNode.count(x)) {
                unionNodes(i, xToNode[x]);
            }
            if (yToNode.count(y)) {
                unionNodes(i, yToNode[y]);
            }

            xToNode[x] = i;
            yToNode[y] = i;
        }

        vector<int> allSizes;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            if (parent[i] == i) {
                allSizes.push_back(componentSize[i]);
            }
        }

        sort(allSizes.rbegin(), allSizes.rend());

        if (allSizes.size() == 1) {
            return allSizes[0] + 1;
        } 
        
        return allSizes[0] + allSizes[1] + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 54 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        if (n <= 2) {
            return n;
        }
        int[] left = new int[n];
        int[] right = new int[n];
        left[0] = 1;
        left[1] = 2;
        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            if (nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]) {
                left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1;
            } else {
                left[i] = 2;
            }
        }
        right[n - 1] = 1;
        right[n - 2] = 2;
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]) {
                right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1;
            } else {
                right[i] = 2;
            }
        }
        int res = 2;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            res = Math.max(res, 1 + (i > 0 ? left[i - 1] : 0));
            res = Math.max(res, 1 + (i + 1 < n ? right[i + 1] : 0));
            if (i > 0 && i + 1 < n) {
                int gap = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1];
                if (gap % 2 == 0) {
                    int d = gap / 2;
                    int leftLen = getLeftLen(nums, left, i - 1, d);
                    int rightLen = getRightLen(nums, right, i + 1, d);
                    res = Math.max(res, leftLen + 1 + rightLen);
                }
            }
        }
        return Math.min(res, n);
    }

    private int getLeftLen(int[] nums, int[] left, int end, int diff) {
        if (end == 0) {
            return 1;
        }
        return nums[end] - nums[end - 1] == diff ? left[end] : 1;
    }

    private int getRightLen(int[] nums, int[] right, int start, int diff) {
        if (start == nums.length - 1) {
            return 1;
        }
        return nums[start + 1] - nums[start] == diff ? right[start] : 1;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        HashMap<Integer, Integer> xMap = new HashMap<>(), yMap = new HashMap<>();
        DSU uf = new DSU(points.length);
        for (int i = 0; i < points.length; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0], y = points[i][1];
            if (!xMap.containsKey(x)) {
                xMap.put(x, i);
            } else {
                uf.union(xMap.get(x), i);
            }
            if (!yMap.containsKey(y)) {
                yMap.put(y, i);
            } else {
                uf.union(yMap.get(y), i);
            }
        }
        HashMap<Integer, Integer> count = new HashMap<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < points.length; i++) {
            int root = uf.find(i);
            count.put(root, count.getOrDefault(root, 0) + 1);
        }
        int[] maxTwo = new int[2];
        for (Map.Entry<Integer, Integer> entry : count.entrySet()) {
            if (entry.getValue() > maxTwo[0]) {
                maxTwo[1] = maxTwo[0];
                maxTwo[0] = entry.getValue();
            } else if (entry.getValue() > maxTwo[1]) {
                maxTwo[1] = entry.getValue();
            }
        }
        return maxTwo[0] + maxTwo[1] + 1;
    }
}

class DSU {
    private int[] parent;

    public DSU(int n) {
        parent = new int[n];
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            parent[i] = i;
        }
    }
    
    public int find(int x) {
        if (parent[x] != x) {
            parent[x] = find(parent[x]);
        }
        return parent[x];
    }
    
    public void union(int x, int y) {
        parent[find(x)] = find(y);
    }
}
[Q4_END]
