### RANK 55 ###
[Q3_START]
struct Block {
    long long val;
    int L;
    int R;
    int len;
};
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
      int n = nums.size();
        
        
        vector<int> siv = nums; 

        
        if (n <= 3) return n;

       
        vector<long long> D(n - 1);
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) {
            D[i] = (long long)nums[i+1] - nums[i];
        }

        
        vector<Block> blo;
        int i = 0;
        while (i < n - 1) {
            int j = i;
            while (j < n - 1 && D[j] == D[i]) {
                j++;
            }
            blo.push_back({D[i], i, j - 1, j - i});
            i = j;
        }

       
        unordered_map<long long, vector<Block>> blocks_by_v;
        for (const auto& b : blo) {
            blocks_by_v[b.val].push_back(b);
        }

       
        int max_len_D = 2; 

      
        for (const auto& pair : blocks_by_v) {
            long long val = pair.first;
            const auto& list = pair.second;

            for (size_t k = 0; k < list.size(); k++) {
                Block b = list[k];
                max_len_D = max(max_len_D, b.len);

                
                if (b.L > 0 || b.R < n - 2) {
                    max_len_D = max(max_len_D, b.len + 1);
                }

               
                if (b.L >= 2 && D[b.L - 2] + D[b.L - 1] == 2LL * val) {
                    max_len_D = max(max_len_D, b.len + 2);
                }

               
                if (b.R <= n - 4 && D[b.R + 1] + D[b.R + 2] == 2LL * val) {
                    max_len_D = max(max_len_D, b.len + 2);
                }

                
                if (k + 1 < list.size()) {
                    Block next_b = list[k+1];
                   
                    if (next_b.L - b.R == 3) {
                        
                        if (D[b.R + 1] + D[b.R + 2] == 2LL * val) {
                            max_len_D = max(max_len_D, b.len + next_b.len + 2);
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

       
        return max_len_D + 1;  
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]

class DSU {
public:
    vector<int> parent;
    vector<int> size;
    
    DSU(int n) {
        parent.resize(n);
        size.resize(n, 1);
        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            parent[i] = i;
        }
    }
    
    int find(int i) {
        if (parent[i] == i)
            return i;
        
        return parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
    }
    
    void unite(int i, int j) {
        int root_i = find(i);
        int root_j = find(j);
        
        if (root_i != root_j) {
           
            if (size[root_i] < size[root_j]) {
                swap(root_i, root_j);
            }
            parent[root_j] = root_i;
            size[root_i] += size[root_j];
        }
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        
        
        vector<vector<int>> re = points;
        
        DSU dsu(n);
        
        
        unordered_map<int, int> x_fi;
        unordered_map<int, int> y_fi;
        
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            int x = re[i][0];
            int y = re[i][1];
            
          
            if (x_fi.count(x)) {
                dsu.unite(i, x_fi[x]);
            } else {
                x_fi[x] = i;
            }
            
            
            if (y_fi.count(y)) {
                dsu.unite(i, y_fi[y]);
            } else {
                y_fi[y] = i;
            }
        }
        
      
        vector<int> component_s;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            if (dsu.parent[i] == i) { 
                component_s.push_back(dsu.size[i]);
            }
        }
        
       
        sort(component_s.rbegin(), component_s.rend());
        
       
        if (component_s.size() >= 2) {
            return component_s[0] + component_s[1] + 1;
        } 
       
        else {
            return component_s[0] + 1;
        }
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 56 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:


        @lru_cache(None)
        def recur_fn(i,diff,used):
            if i == len(nums):
                if not used:
                    return 1
                return 0
            else:
                res = 0
                if nums[i]-nums[i-1] == diff:
                    res = max(res,1+recur_fn(i+1,diff,used))
                elif not used:
                    res = max(res,1)
                    if i+1 < len(nums) and (2*diff+nums[i-1]) == nums[i+1]:
                        res = max(res,2 + recur_fn(i+2,diff,True))
                return res 

        ans = 2
        for i in range(1,len(nums)):
            ans = max(ans,2 + recur_fn(i+1,nums[i]-nums[i-1],False))
        ans = min(ans,len(nums))


        recur_fn.cache_clear()
        nums = nums[::-1]
        for i in range(1,len(nums)):
            ans = max(ans,2 + recur_fn(i+1,nums[i]-nums[i-1],False))
        ans = min(ans,len(nums))
        recur_fn.cache_clear()
        return ans
                    
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        N = len(points)
        parents = [i for i in range(N)]
        rank = [1]*(N)
        def find(x):
            if x != parents[x]:
                parents[x] = find(parents[x])
            return parents[x]
        
        
        def union(x,y):
            px,py = find(x),find(y)
            if px != py:
                if rank[px] > rank[py]:
                    px,py = py,px
                rank[py] += rank[px]
                rank[px] = 0
                parents[px] = py

        x_graph = collections.defaultdict(list)
        y_graph = collections.defaultdict(list)

        for i,(x,y) in enumerate(points):
            x_graph[x].append(i)
            y_graph[y].append(i)

        for zeb in x_graph.values():
            for i in range(1,len(zeb)):
                union(zeb[0],zeb[i])
        for zeb in y_graph.values():
            for i in range(1,len(zeb)):
                union(zeb[0],zeb[i])

        parent_store = collections.defaultdict(int)
        for i in range(len(parents)):
            find(i)

            
        for i in range(len(parents)):
            parent_store[parents[i]] += 1

        zeb = list(parent_store.values())
        zeb.sort()
        if len(zeb) == 1:
            return zeb[0] + 1
        else:
            return zeb[-1] + zeb[-2] + 1
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& a) {
        int n = a.size();
        vector L(n, 2), R(n, 2);
        L[0] = 1;
        R[n - 1] = 1;
        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            if (a[i] - a[i - 1] == a[i - 1] - a[i - 2]) L[i] = L[i - 1] + 1;
        }
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (a[i] - a[i + 1] == a[i + 1] - a[i + 2]) R[i] = R[i + 1] + 1;
        }
        int ans = max(*ranges::max_element(L), *ranges::max_element(R));
        for (int i = 1; i < n; i++) ans = max(ans, R[i] + 1);
        for (int i = 0; i + 1 < n; i++) ans = max(ans, L[i] + 1);
        for (int i = 1; i + 1 < n; i++) {
            if ((a[i + 1] - a[i - 1]) % 2 != 0) continue;
            int l = 1;
            if (i != 1 && a[i - 1] - a[i - 2] == (a[i + 1] - a[i - 1]) / 2) l = L[i - 1];
            int r = 1;
            if (i + 2 < n && a[i + 1] - a[i + 2] == (a[i - 1] - a[i + 1]) / 2) r = R[i + 1];
            ans = max(ans, l + r + 1);
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& p) {
        int n = p.size();
        vector<int> par(n), sz(n, 1);
        iota(par.begin(), par.end(), 0);
        function<int(int)> find = [&](int u) {
            return u == par[u] ? u : par[u] = find(par[u]);  
        };
        auto join = [&](int u, int v) {
            u = find(u);
            v = find(v);
            if (u != v) par[u] = v, sz[v] += sz[u];
        };
        map<int, int> mpx, mpy;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = p[i][0], y = p[i][1];
            if (mpx.count(x)) {
                join(i, mpx[x]);
            }
            else {
                mpx[x] = i;
            }
            if (mpy.count(y)) {
                join(i, mpy[y]);
            }
            else {
                mpy[y] = i;
            }
        }
        vector<int> v;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (i == par[i]) v.push_back(sz[i]);
        }
        sort(v.rbegin(), v.rend());
        if (v.size() == 1) return n + 1;
        return v[0] + v[1] + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 59 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        left = [1] * n
        right = [1] * n
        curr = 2
        left[1] = 2
        right[-2] = 2
        for i in range(2, n):
            diff = nums[i] - nums[i - 1]
            if diff == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]:
                curr += 1
            else:
                curr = 2
            left[i] = curr
        curr = 2
        for i in range(n - 3, -1, -1):
            diff = nums[i + 1] - nums[i]
            if diff == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]:
                curr += 1
            else:
                curr = 2
            right[i] = curr
        res = max(left + right)
        if nums[2] - nums[1] != nums[1] - nums[0]:
            res = max(res, 1 + right[1])
        if nums[n - 1] - nums[n - 2] != nums[n - 2] - nums[n - 3]:
            res = max(res, 1 + left[n - 2])
        for i in range(1, n - 1):
            if i > 1 and nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] != nums[i] - nums[i - 1]:
                res = max(res, 1 + left[i - 1])
            if i + 2 < n and nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] != nums[i + 1] - nums[i]:
                res = max(res, 1 + right[i + 1])
            if (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) % 2 == 0:
                dif = (nums[i + 1] + nums[i - 1]) // 2
                diff = dif - nums[i - 1]
                curr = 1
                if i > 1 and diff == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]:
                    curr += left[i - 1]
                else:
                    curr += 1
                if i + 2 < n and nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == diff:
                    curr += right[i + 1]
                else:
                    curr += 1
                res = max(res, curr)
        return res
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
#define ll long long
struct DSU{
    vector<int> par, rank, sz;
    int cc;
    DSU(int n){
        cc = n;
        par.resize(n, -1);
        rank.resize(n);
        sz.resize(n, 1);
    }
    int find(int u){
        return par[u]==-1?u:par[u] = find(par[u]);
    }
    bool merge(int u, int v){
        int uPar = find(u), vPar = find(v);
        if (uPar==vPar) return false;
        if (rank[uPar]==rank[vPar]) rank[uPar]++;
        cc--;
        if (rank[uPar] > rank[vPar]){
            sz[uPar] += sz[vPar];
            par[vPar] = uPar;
        }
        else{
            sz[vPar] += sz[uPar];
            par[uPar] = vPar;
        }
        return true;
    }
};
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        DSU dsu(n);
        map<ll,ll> x, y;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++){
            if (x.count(points[i][0])){
                dsu.merge(i, x[points[i][0]]);
            }
            if (y.count(points[i][1])){
                dsu.merge(i, y[points[i][1]]);
            }
            x[points[i][0]] = i;
            y[points[i][1]] = i;
        }
        if (dsu.cc == 1) return 1 + n;
        int mx1 = -1, mx2 = -1;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++){
            if (dsu.find(i) == i){
                if (dsu.sz[i] > mx1){
                    mx2 = mx1;
                    mx1 = dsu.sz[i];
                }
                else if (dsu.sz[i] > mx2){
                    mx2 = dsu.sz[i];
                }
            }
        }
        return mx1 + mx2 + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n=len(nums)
        if n<3: return n
        L=[1]*n
        L[0]=1
        L[1]=2

        for i in range(2,n):
            if nums[i]-nums[i-1]==nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]:
                L[i]=L[i-1]+1
            else:
                L[i]=2
        R=[1]*n
        R[n-1]=1
        R[n-2]=2
        for i in range(n-3,-1,-1):
            if nums[i+1]-nums[i]==nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]:
                R[i]=R[i+1]+1
            else:
                R[i]=2
        sol=max(L)
        sol=max(sol,1+R[1],L[n-2]+1)

        for i in range(1,n-1):
            sol=max(sol,L[i-1]+1,R[i+1]+1)
            s=nums[i+1]-nums[i-1]
            if s%2==0:
                d=s//2
                if i-1>=1 and nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]==d:
                    lft=L[i-1]
                else:
                    lft=1
                if i+1<=n-2 and nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]==d:
                    ryt=R[i+1]
                else:
                    ryt=1
                sol=max(sol,lft+1+ryt)
        return sol
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n=len(points)
        if n==0: return 0
        xmp=defaultdict(list)
        ymp=defaultdict(list)
        for i,(x,y) in enumerate(points):
            xmp[x].append(i)
            ymp[y].append(i)
        vis=[False]*n
        sze=[]
        for i in range(n):
            if vis[i]: continue
            stack=[i]
            vis[i]=True
            sz=0
            while stack:
                idx=stack.pop()
                sz+=1
                x,y=points[idx]
                for nb in xmp[x]:
                    if not vis[nb]:
                        vis[nb]=True
                        stack.append(nb)
                xmp[x]=[]
                for nb in ymp[y]:
                    if not vis[nb]:
                        vis[nb]=True
                        stack.append(nb)
                ymp[y]=[]
            sze.append(sz)
        sze.sort(reverse=True)
        s1=sze[0] if sze else 0
        s2=sze[1] if len(sze)>1 else 0
        return s1+s2+1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 61 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        long diff[] = new long[n - 1];
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) diff[i] = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
        int left[] = new int[n - 1];
        left[0] = 1;
        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++) {
            if (diff[i] == diff[i - 1]) left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1;
            else left[i] = 1;
        }

        int right[] = new int[n - 1];
        right[n - 2] = 1;
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (diff[i] == diff[i + 1]) right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1;
            else right[i] = 1;
        }

        int ans = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) {
            if (left[i] == n - 1) ans = Math.max(ans, left[i]);
            else ans = Math.max(ans, left[i] + 1);
        }
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 2; i++) {
            long sum = diff[i] + diff[i + 1];
            if ((sum & 1) == 0) {
                sum /= 2;
                int l = 0, r = 0;
                if (i > 0 && diff[i - 1] == sum) l = left[i - 1];
                if (i + 2 < n - 1 && diff[i + 2] == sum) r = right[i + 2];
                ans = Math.max(ans, l + r + 2);
            }
        }

        return ans + 1;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    class DSU {
        int parent[];
        int size[];

        DSU(int n) {
            parent = new int[n];
            size = new int[n];
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
                parent[i] = i;
                size[i] = 1;
            }
        }

        int find(int i) {
            if (parent[i] == i) return i;
            parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
            return parent[i];
        }

        void union (int i, int j) {
            int pi = find(i);
            int pj = find(j);
            if (pi != pj) {
                parent[pi] = pj;
                size[pj] += size[pi];
                size[pi] = 0;
            }
        }
    }
    
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        DSU dsu = new DSU(n);
        Map<Integer, Integer> x = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Integer> y = new HashMap<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int a = points[i][0];
            int b = points[i][1];
            if (x.containsKey(a)) dsu.union(i, x.get(a));
            else x.put(a, i);
            if (y.containsKey(b)) dsu.union(i, y.get(b));
            else y.put(b, i);
        }

        List<Integer> size = new ArrayList<>();
        for (int num : dsu.size) {
            if (num > 0) size.add(num);
        }

        size.sort(Collections.reverseOrder());

        return (size.size() == 1 ? size.get(0) + 1 : size.get(0) + size.get(1) + 1);
    }
}
[Q4_END]

vc<T> cumsum(const vc<U> &A, int off = 1) {
    int N = A.size();
    vc<T> B(N+1);
    rep(i, N) { B[i+1] = B[i] + A[i]; }
    if (off == 0) B.erase(B.begin());
    return B;
}
template <typename T>
vc<T> rearrange(const vc<T> &A, const vc<int> &I) {
    vc<T> B(len(I));
    rep(i, len(I)) B[i] = A[I[i]];
    return B;
}

    (res.insert(res.end(), others.begin(), others.end()), ...);
}
#pragma endregion TEMPLATE

class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = len(nums);
        int ans = min(n, 2);

        auto solve = [&](vc<int> &v) {
            vc<int> l(n, 1), r(n, 1);
            rep(i, 1, n) {
                if (i == 1 || v[i] - v[i-1] == v[i-1]-v[i-2]) {
                    l[i] = l[i-1]+1;
                }
                else l[i] = 2;
            }
            per(i, n-1) {
                if (i == n-2 || v[i+1]-v[i] == v[i+2]-v[i+1]) {
                    r[i] = r[i+1]+1;
                }
                else r[i] = 2;
            }

            rep(i, n) {
                if (i > 0) chmax(ans, l[i-1]+1);
                if (i < n-1) chmax(ans, r[i+1]+1);
                if (i > 0 && i < n-1) 
                    if ((v[i+1]-v[i-1])%2 == 0) {
                        int d = (v[i+1]-v[i-1])/2;
                        int lo = (i > 1 && v[i-1]-v[i-2] == d) ? l[i-1] : 1;
                        int hi = (i < n-2 && v[i+2]-v[i+1] == d) ? r[i+1] : 1;
                    chmax(ans, lo+hi+1);
                } 
                if (i > 1 && i < n-2 && v[i-1]-v[i-2] == v[i+2]-v[i+1]){
                    if (v[i+1]-v[i-1] == 2*(v[i-1]-v[i-2])) {
                        chmax(ans, l[i-1]+r[i+1]+1);
                    }
                }
            }
        };
        solve(nums);
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]

// https://github.com/atcoder/ac-library/blob/master/atcoder/dsu.hpp
namespace atcoder {
    struct dsu {    
        public:
            dsu(): _n(0) {}
            explicit dsu(int n) : _n(n), parent_or_size(n, -1) {}

            int merge(int a, int b) {
                assert(0 <= a && a < _n);
                assert(0 <= b && b < _n);
                int x = leader(a), y = leader(b);
                if (x == y) return x;
                if (-parent_or_size[x] < -parent_or_size[y]) swap(x, y);
                parent_or_size[x] += parent_or_size[y];
                parent_or_size[y] = x;
                return x;
            }

            bool same(int a, int b) {
                assert(0 <= a && a < _n);
                assert(0 <= b && b < _n);
                return leader(a) == leader(b);
            }

            int leader(int a) {
                assert(0 <= a && a < _n);
                if (parent_or_size[a] < 0) return a;
                return parent_or_size[a] = leader(parent_or_size[a]);
            }

            int size(int a) {
                assert(0 <= a && a < _n);
                return -parent_or_size[leader(a)];
            }
            /*
            It divides the graph into connected components and returns the list of them.
            More precisely, it returns the list of the "list of the vertices in a connected component". Both of the orders of the connected components and the vertices are undefined.
            */
            vector<vector<int>> groups() {
                vector<int> leader_buf(_n), group_size(_n);
                for(int i = 0; i < _n; i++){
                    leader_buf[i] = leader(i);
                    group_size[leader_buf[i]]++;
                }
                vector<vector<int>> result(_n);
                for(int i = 0; i < _n; i++){
                    result[i].reserve(group_size[i]);
                }
                for(int i = 0; i < _n; i++){
                    result[leader_buf[i]].push_back(i);
                }
                result.erase(
                    remove_if(result.begin(), result.end(), [&](const vector<int> &v){
                        return v.empty();
                    }), 
                    result.end());
                return result;
            }

        private:
            int _n;
            // root node: -1 * component size
            // otherwise parent
            vector<int> parent_or_size;
    };
} // namespace atcoder]
using namespace atcoder;
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& a) {
        int n = len(a);

        dsu uf(n);
        unordered_map<int, int> mx, my;
        rep(i, n) {
            int x = a[i][0], y = a[i][1];
            if (mx.count(x)) uf.merge(i, mx[x]);
            else mx[x] = i;

            if (my.count(y)) uf.merge(i, my[y]);
            else my[y] = i;
        }

        vc<int> b;
        rep(i, n){
            if (uf.leader(i) == i) {
                b.pb(uf.size(i));
            }
        }
        sort(b.rbegin(), b.rend());

        if (len(b) >= 2) return b[0]+b[1]+1;
        return b[0]+1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 63 ###
[Q3_START]
from typing import List

class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 3:
            return n

        left = [1] * n
        right = [1] * n

        left[1] = 2
        for i in range(2, n):
            if nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]:
                left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1
            else:
                left[i] = 2

        right[n - 2] = 2
        for i in range(n - 3, -1, -1):
            if nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]:
                right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1
            else:
                right[i] = 2

        ans = max(left)
        ans = max(ans, right[1] + 1, left[n - 2] + 1)

        for i in range(1, n - 1):
            ans = max(ans, left[i - 1] + 1, right[i + 1] + 1)

            gap = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]
            if gap % 2 == 0:
                d = gap // 2

                left_len = 1
                if i >= 2 and nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == d:
                    left_len = left[i - 1]

                right_len = 1
                if i + 2 < n and nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == d:
                    right_len = right[i + 1]

                ans = max(ans, left_len + 1 + right_len)

        return min(ans, n)
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
from typing import List
from collections import defaultdict

class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: List[List[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        parent = list(range(n))
        size = [1] * n

        def find(x: int) -> int:
            while parent[x] != x:
                parent[x] = parent[parent[x]]
                x = parent[x]
            return x

        def union(a: int, b: int) -> None:
            ra, rb = find(a), find(b)
            if ra == rb:
                return
            if size[ra] < size[rb]:
                ra, rb = rb, ra
            parent[rb] = ra
            size[ra] += size[rb]

        x_seen = {}
        y_seen = {}

        for i, (x, y) in enumerate(points):
            if x in x_seen:
                union(i, x_seen[x])
            else:
                x_seen[x] = i

            if y in y_seen:
                union(i, y_seen[y])
            else:
                y_seen[y] = i

        comp_size = defaultdict(int)
        for i in range(n):
            comp_size[find(i)] += 1

        largest = 0
        second_largest = 0

        for s in comp_size.values():
            if s > largest:
                second_largest = largest
                largest = s
            elif s > second_largest:
                second_largest = s

        return largest + second_largest + 1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 64 ###
[Q3_START]
from collections import defaultdict

class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: list[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 3:
            return n
        
        # L[i][d] is the length of arithmetic subarray ending at i with diff d
        # R[i][d] is the length of arithmetic subarray starting at i with diff d
        L = [defaultdict(int) for _ in range(n)]
        R = [defaultdict(int) for _ in range(n)]
        
        # Fill L (Left to Right)
        for i in range(1, n):
            d = nums[i] - nums[i-1]
            L[i][d] = L[i-1].get(d, 1) + 1
            
        # Fill R (Right to Left)
        for i in range(n - 2, -1, -1):
            d = nums[i+1] - nums[i]
            R[i][d] = R[i+1].get(d, 1) + 1
            
        ans = 0
        
        # Basic max length without any bridges, but adding 1 for the 
        # possibility of changing a neighbor.
        for i in range(n):
            for d, length in L[i].items():
                ans = max(ans, length + (1 if i < n - 1 else 0))
            for d, length in R[i].items():
                ans = max(ans, length + (1 if i > 0 else 0))

        # Check the "Bridge" case: changing nums[i] to connect neighbors
        for i in range(1, n - 1):
            total_diff = nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]
            if total_diff % 2 == 0:
                d = total_diff // 2
                left_len = L[i-1].get(d, 1)
                right_len = R[i+1].get(d, 1)
                ans = max(ans, left_len + right_len + 1)
            
            # Also check if we can connect two existing segments with the SAME d
            # even if they aren't separated by a bridge-able gap.
            # (e.g., [2, 4, 10, 8, 10] where changing 10 connects [2,4] and [8,10])
            # This is covered by the bridge logic above!

        return min(n, ans)
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
#include <vector>
#include <unordered_map>
#include <numeric>
#include <algorithm>

using namespace std;

class DSU {
public:
    vector<int> parent;
    vector<int> pointsCount; // Number of points in this component
    
    DSU(int n) {
        parent.resize(n);
        iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0);
        pointsCount.assign(n, 0);
    }
    
    int find(int i) {
        if (parent[i] == i) return i;
        return parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
    }
    
    void unite(int i, int j) {
        int root_i = find(i);
        int root_j = find(j);
        if (root_i != root_j) {
            parent[root_i] = root_j;
            pointsCount[root_j] += pointsCount[root_i];
        }
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        unordered_map<int, int> x_map, y_map;
        int id = 0;
        
        // 1. Map coordinates to unique IDs
        for (auto& p : points) {
            if (x_map.find(p[0]) == x_map.end()) x_map[p[0]] = id++;
            if (y_map.find(p[1]) == y_map.end()) y_map[p[1]] = id++;
        }
        
        DSU dsu(id);
        
        // 2. Unite components based on existing points
        // Each point connects an x-node to a y-node
        for (auto& p : points) {
            int u = x_map[p[0]];
            int v = y_map[p[1]];
            // We increment point count for the component later 
            // to avoid double counting edges.
            dsu.unite(u, v);
        }
        
        // 3. Count how many points belong to each component
        for (auto& p : points) {
            int root = dsu.find(x_map[p[0]]);
            dsu.pointsCount[root]++;
        }
        
        // 4. Collect the sizes of all unique components
        vector<int> componentSizes;
        for (int i = 0; i < id; ++i) {
            if (dsu.parent[i] == i && dsu.pointsCount[i] > 0) {
                componentSizes.push_back(dsu.pointsCount[i]);
            }
        }
        
        sort(componentSizes.rbegin(), componentSizes.rend());
        
        // 5. Result is (Largest + Second Largest + 1 new point)
        // If there's only one component, it's just Largest + 1.
        int result = 0;
        if (componentSizes.size() >= 2) {
            result = componentSizes[0] + componentSizes[1] + 1;
        } else if (componentSizes.size() == 1) {
            result = componentSizes[0] + 1;
        } else {
            return 1; // No points existed, just the new one
        }
        
        return result;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 66 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        int ans = 2;
        vector<int> left(n, 1), right(n, 1);
        left[1] = 2;
        for (int i = 2; i < n; ++i) {
            int d1 = nums[i] - nums[i - 1];
            int d2 = nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2];
            if (d1 == d2) {
                left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1;
            } else {
                left[i] = 2;
            }
        }
        right[n - 2] = 2;
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; --i) {
            int d1 = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
            int d2 = nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1];
            if (d1 == d2) {
                right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1;
            } else {
                right[i] = 2;
            }
        }
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            ans = max(ans, left[i]);
        }
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            if (i) {
                ans = max(ans, left[i - 1] + 1);
            }
            if (i + 1 < n) {
                ans = max(ans, right[i + 1] + 1);
            }
            if (i > 0 && i + 1 < n) {
                int d = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1];
                if (~d & 1) {
                    d /= 2;
                    int llen = 1, rlen = 1;
                    if (i >= 2 && nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == d) {
                        llen = left[i - 1];
                    }
                    if (i + 2 <  n && nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == d) {
                        rlen = right[i + 1];
                    }
                    ans = max(ans, llen + rlen + 1);
                }
            }
        }
        return min(ans, n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU {
    vector<int> p, sz;

public:
    DSU(int n) {
        p.resize(n);
        sz.assign(n, 1);
        iota(p.begin(), p.end(), 0);
    }

    int find(int x) {
        if (p[x] != x) {
            p[x] = find(p[x]);
        }
        return p[x];
    }

    void unite(int a, int b) {
        a = find(a);
        b = find(b);
        if (a == b) return;
        if (sz[a] < sz[b]) {
            swap(a, b);
        }
        p[b] = a;
        sz[a] += sz[b];
    }
};
class Solution {
    using ii = pair<int, int>;
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();

        unordered_map<int, int> X, Y;
        vector<ii> edges;
        int id = 0;

        for (auto &p : points) {
            int x = p[0], y = p[1];
            if (!X.count(x)) {
                X[x] = id++;
            }
            if (!Y.count(y)) {
                Y[y] = id++;
            }
            edges.push_back({X[x], Y[y]});
        }

        DSU dsu(id);

        for (auto &[u, v] : edges) {
            dsu.unite(u, v);
        }
        unordered_map<int, int> sz;
        for (auto &[u, v] : edges) {
            int rt = dsu.find(u);
            ++sz[rt];
        }

        int x1 = 0, x2 = 0;
        for (auto &[rt, cnt] : sz) {
            if (cnt >= x1) {
                x2 = x1;
                x1 = cnt;
            } else if (cnt >= x2) {
                x2 = cnt;
            }
        }
        return x1 + x2 + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 70 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 2:
            return n

        left = [2] * n
        for i in range(2, n):
            if nums[i] - nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]:
                left[i] = left[i-1] + 1
            else:
                left[i] = 2

        right = [2] * n
        right[n-2] = 2
        for i in range(n-3, -1, -1):
            if nums[i+1] - nums[i] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]:
                right[i] = right[i+1]+1
            else:
                right[i] = 2

        ans = min(n, max(left) + 1)

        for i in range(1, n-1):
            total = nums[i-1] + nums[i+1]
            if total % 2 != 0:
                continue

            d = (nums[i+1] - nums[i - 1])//2
            l = left[i - 1] if i >= 2 and nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == d else 1
            r = right[i + 1] if i + 2 < n and nums[i+2] - nums[i + 1] == d else 1
            ans = max(ans, l + r + 1)
        return ans
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)

        parent = list(range(n))
        sz = [1] * n

        def find(x):
            while parent[x] != x:
                parent[x] = parent[parent[x]]
                x = parent[x]
            return x

        def union(a, b):
            ra, rb = find(a), find(b)
            if ra == rb:
                return 
            if sz[ra] < sz[rb]:
                ra, rb = rb, ra
            parent[rb] = ra
            sz[ra] += sz[rb]

        first_x = {}
        first_y = {}

        for i, (x, y) in enumerate(points):
            if x in first_x:
                union(i, first_x[x])
            else:
                first_x[x] = i

            if y in first_y:
                union(i, first_y[y])
            else:
                first_y[y] = i

        comp_sizes = defaultdict(int)
        for i in range(n):
            comp_sizes[find(i)] += 1
        largest = 0
        second = 0

        for s in comp_sizes.values():
            if s > largest:
                second = largest
                largest = s
            elif s > second:
                second = s

        return largest + second + 1
            
        
[Q4_END]

### RANK 71 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 3) return n;
        int maxLen = 2;
        auto solveForDiff = [&](int d) {
            int currentMax = 0;
            int count = 0;
            int skipIdx = -1;
        };
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            if (n - i <= maxLen) break; // Pruning          
            for (int j = i + 1; j < min(i + 3, n); ++j) {
                int d = (nums[j] - nums[i]) / (j - i);
                if ((nums[j] - nums[i]) % (j - i) != 0) continue;
                int changes = 0;
                int len = 0;
                for (int k = i; k < n; ++k) {
                    if (nums[k] != nums[i] + (k - i) * d) {
                        changes++;
                    }
                    if (changes > 1) break;
                    len++;
                }
                maxLen = max(maxLen, len);
            }
        }
        reverse(nums.begin(), nums.end());
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            if (n - i <= maxLen) break;
            for (int j = i + 1; j < min(i + 3, n); ++j) {
                if ((nums[j] - nums[i]) % (j - i) != 0) continue;
                int d = (nums[j] - nums[i]) / (j - i);
                int changes = 0;
                int len = 0;
                for (int k = i; k < n; ++k) {
                    if (nums[k] != nums[i] + (k - i) * d) changes++;
                    if (changes > 1) break;
                    len++;
                }
                maxLen = max(maxLen, len);
            }
        }
        return maxLen;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    unordered_map<int, int> parent;
    unordered_map<int, int> cluster_size;

    int find(int i) {
        if (parent.find(i) == parent.end()) {
            parent[i] = i;
            cluster_size[i] = 0; // Initialize size as 0 (we count points, not coordinates)
            return i;
        }
        if (parent[i] == i) return i;
        return parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
    }

    void unite(int i, int j) {
        int root_i = find(i);
        int root_j = find(j);
        if (root_i != root_j) {
            parent[root_i] = root_j;
        }
    }
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int offset = 1e9 + 7; 
        for (auto& p : points) {
            unite(p[0], p[1] + offset);
        }
        unordered_map<int, int> component_point_count;
        for (auto& p : points) {
            component_point_count[find(p[0])]++;
        }
        vector<int> sizes;
        for (auto const& [root, count] : component_point_count) {
            sizes.push_back(count);
        }
        
        sort(sizes.rbegin(), sizes.rend());
        if (sizes.empty()) return 1;
        if (sizes.size() == 1) return sizes[0] + 1;
        
        return sizes[0] + sizes[1] + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 73 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 2) return n;
        
        int m = n - 1;
        vector<long long> d(m);
        for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) d[i] = (long long)nums[i+1] - nums[i];
        
        // lr[i] = length of run of equal diffs ending at i
        // rr[i] = length of run of equal diffs starting at i
        vector<int> lr(m, 1), rr(m, 1);
        for (int i = 1; i < m; i++)
            if (d[i] == d[i-1]) lr[i] = lr[i-1] + 1;
        for (int i = m-2; i >= 0; i--)
            if (d[i] == d[i+1]) rr[i] = rr[i+1] + 1;
        
        // Base: no change
        int ans = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) ans = max(ans, lr[i] + 1);
        
        // With one change, always at least 3
        ans = max(ans, min(n, 3));
        
        // Change boundary elements
        if (m >= 2) {
            ans = max(ans, rr[1] + 2);
            ans = max(ans, lr[m-2] + 2);
        }
        
        // Change interior element at position p
        for (int p = 1; p < n-1; p++) {
            // Extend left run by 1
            if (p >= 2) ans = max(ans, lr[p-2] + 2);
            // Extend right run by 1
            if (p+1 < m) ans = max(ans, rr[p+1] + 2);
            
            // Bridge: set nums[p] so d[p-1] = d[p] = (nums[p+1]-nums[p-1])/2
            long long s = (long long)nums[p+1] - nums[p-1];
            if (s % 2 == 0) {
                long long dv = s / 2;
                int L = (p >= 2 && d[p-2] == dv) ? lr[p-2] : 0;
                int R = (p+1 < m && d[p+1] == dv) ? rr[p+1] : 0;
                ans = max(ans, L + 2 + R + 1);
            }
        }
        
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        vector<int> par(n), rnk(n, 0);
        iota(par.begin(), par.end(), 0);
        
        function<int(int)> find = [&](int x) {
            while (par[x] != x) x = par[x] = par[par[x]];
            return x;
        };
        auto unite = [&](int a, int b) {
            a = find(a); b = find(b);
            if (a == b) return;
            if (rnk[a] < rnk[b]) swap(a, b);
            par[b] = a;
            if (rnk[a] == rnk[b]) rnk[a]++;
        };
        
        unordered_map<int,int> xm, ym;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0], y = points[i][1];
            if (xm.count(x)) unite(i, xm[x]); else xm[x] = i;
            if (ym.count(y)) unite(i, ym[y]); else ym[y] = i;
        }
        
        unordered_map<int,int> sz;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) sz[find(i)]++;
        
        int m1 = 0, m2 = 0;
        for (auto& [_, s] : sz) {
            if (s > m1) { m2 = m1; m1 = s; }
            else if (s > m2) m2 = s;
        }
        return m1 + m2 + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 74 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 2:
            return n

        diff = [nums[i+1] - nums[i] for i in range(n-1)]

        left = [1]*(n-1)
        for i in range(1,n-1):
            if diff[i] == diff[i-1]:
                left[i] = left[i-1] + 1

        right = [1]*(n-1)
        for i in range(n-3,-1,-1):
            if diff[i] == diff[i+1]:
                right[i] = right[i+1] + 1

        ans = max(left) + 1

        for i in range(1,n-1):

            if (nums[i+1]-nums[i-1]) % 2 == 0:
                d = (nums[i+1]-nums[i-1])//2

                l = 1
                if i-2 >= 0 and nums[i-1]-nums[i-2] == d:
                    l = left[i-2] + 1

                r = 1
                if i+1 < n-1 and nums[i+2]-nums[i+1] == d:
                    r = right[i+1] + 1

                ans = max(ans, l + r + 1)
            ans = max(ans, left[i-1] + 2)

            ans = max(ans, right[i] + 2)

        return min(ans, n)
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        parent = list(range(n))
        size = [1] * n
        
        def find(i):
            if parent[i] == i:
                return i
            parent[i] = find(parent[i])
            return parent[i]
            
        def union(i, j):
            root_i = find(i)
            root_j = find(j)
            if root_i != root_j:
                if size[root_i] < size[root_j]:
                    root_i, root_j = root_j, root_i
                parent[root_j] = root_i
                size[root_i] += size[root_j]
                
        x_to_idx = {}
        y_to_idx = {}
        
        for i in range(n):
            x, y = points[i]
            
            if x in x_to_idx:
                union(i, x_to_idx[x])
            else:
                x_to_idx[x] = i
                
            if y in y_to_idx:
                union(i, y_to_idx[y])
            else:
                y_to_idx[y] = i
                
        comp_sizes = []
        for i in range(n):
            if parent[i] == i:
                comp_sizes.append(size[i])
                
        comp_sizes.sort(reverse=True)
        
        if len(comp_sizes) == 1:
            return 1 + comp_sizes[0]
        else:
            return 1 + comp_sizes[0] + comp_sizes[1]
[Q4_END]
##################

### RANK 75 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        int[] leftLen = new int[n];
        int[] rightLen = new int[n];
        
        leftLen[0] = 1;
        for (int i = 1; i < n; i++) {
            if (i == 1) {
                leftLen[i] = 2;
            } else {
                if (nums[i] - nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]) {
                    leftLen[i] = leftLen[i-1] + 1;
                } else {
                    leftLen[i] = 2;
                }
            }
        }
        
        rightLen[n-1] = 1;
        for (int i = n-2; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (i == n-2) {
                rightLen[i] = 2;
            } else {
                if (nums[i+1] - nums[i] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]) {
                    rightLen[i] = rightLen[i+1] + 1;
                } else {
                    rightLen[i] = 2;
                }
            }
        }
        
        int ans = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            ans = Math.max(ans, leftLen[i]);
        }
        
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (i + 1 < n) {
                ans = Math.max(ans, 1 + rightLen[i+1]);
            }
            if (i - 1 >= 0) {
                ans = Math.max(ans, leftLen[i-1] + 1);
            }
            if (i >= 1 && i <= n-2) {
                int a = nums[i-1];
                int b = nums[i+1];
                int leftL = leftLen[i-1];
                int rightL = rightLen[i+1];
                
                if (leftL >= 2 && rightL >= 2) {
                    int dL = nums[i-1] - nums[i-2];
                    int dR = nums[i+2] - nums[i+1];
                    if (dL == dR && (b - a) == 2 * dL) {
                        ans = Math.max(ans, leftL + 1 + rightL);
                    }
                }
                if (leftL >= 2) {
                    int dL = nums[i-1] - nums[i-2];
                    if ((b - a) == 2 * dL) {
                        ans = Math.max(ans, leftL + 2);
                    }
                }
                if (rightL >= 2) {
                    int dR = nums[i+2] - nums[i+1];
                    if ((b - a) == 2 * dR) {
                        ans = Math.max(ans, rightL + 2);
                    }
                }
                if ((b - a) % 2 == 0) {
                    ans = Math.max(ans, 3);
                }
            }
        }
        return ans;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
import java.util.*;

class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        Map<Integer, Integer> xMap = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Integer> yMap = new HashMap<>();
        int id = 0;
        // assign unique ids to distinct x and y coordinates
        for (int[] p : points) {
            int x = p[0], y = p[1];
            if (!xMap.containsKey(x)) {
                xMap.put(x, id++);
            }
            if (!yMap.containsKey(y)) {
                yMap.put(y, id++);
            }
        }
        int totalNodes = id;
        DSU dsu = new DSU(totalNodes);
        // union x and y for each point
        for (int[] p : points) {
            int xId = xMap.get(p[0]);
            int yId = yMap.get(p[1]);
            dsu.union(xId, yId);
        }
        // count points in each component (roots)
        int[] compSize = new int[totalNodes];
        for (int[] p : points) {
            int root = dsu.find(xMap.get(p[0]));
            compSize[root]++;
        }
        // find the two largest component sizes
        int first = 0, second = 0;
        for (int size : compSize) {
            if (size > first) {
                second = first;
                first = size;
            } else if (size > second) {
                second = size;
            }
        }
        return first + second + 1;
    }

    class DSU {
        int[] parent, rank;
        DSU(int n) {
            parent = new int[n];
            rank = new int[n];
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) parent[i] = i;
        }
        int find(int x) {
            if (parent[x] != x) parent[x] = find(parent[x]);
            return parent[x];
        }
        void union(int a, int b) {
            int ra = find(a);
            int rb = find(b);
            if (ra == rb) return;
            if (rank[ra] < rank[rb]) {
                parent[ra] = rb;
            } else if (rank[ra] > rank[rb]) {
                parent[rb] = ra;
            } else {
                parent[rb] = ra;
                rank[ra]++;
            }
        }
    }
}

class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& a) {
        int n=a.size();
        if(n<=3) return n;
        int mm=n-1;
        vector<int> d(mm);
        for(int i=0; i<mm; i++) d[i]=a[i+1]-a[i];
        vector<int> l(mm,1), r(mm,1);
        for(int i=1; i<mm; i++){
            if(d[i]==d[i-1]) l[i]=l[i-1]+1;
        }
        for(int i=mm-2; i>=0; i--){
            if(d[i]==d[i+1]) r[i]=r[i+1]+1;
        }
        int ans=0;
        for(int i=0; i<mm; i++){
            ans=max(ans, min(n,l[i]+2));
            if(i+2<mm && d[i+1]+d[i+2]==2LL*d[i]){
                if(i+3<mm && d[i+3]==d[i]) ans=max(ans, min(n,l[i]+r[i+3]+3));
                else ans=max(ans, min(n,l[i]+3));
            }
            if(i-2>=0 && d[i-1]+d[i-2]==2LL*d[i]) ans=max(ans,min(n, r[i]+3));
        }
        return ans;
    }
};

[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    vector<int> p;
    int f(int x){
        return p[x]==x?x:p[x]=f(p[x]);
    }
    void u(int x, int y){
        p[f(x)]=f(y);
    }
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& pnt) {
        int n=pnt.size();
        p.assign(n,0);
        for(int i=0; i<n; i++) p[i]=i;
        unordered_map<int,int> mx,my;
        for(int i=0; i<n; i++){
            if(mx.count(pnt[i][0])) u(i,mx[pnt[i][0]]);
            else mx[pnt[i][0]]=i;

            if(my.count(pnt[i][1])) u(i,my[pnt[i][1]]);
            else my[pnt[i][1]]=i;
        }
        vector<int> s(n,0);
        for(int i=0; i<n; i++) s[f(i)]++;
        vector<int> c;
        for(int i=0 ;i<n; i++){
            if(s[i]>0) c.push_back(s[i]);
        }
        sort(c.rbegin(),c.rend());
        if(c.size()==1) return c[0]+1;
        return c[0]+c[1]+1;
    }
};

### RANK 78 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n=nums.length;
        if(n<=3) return n;

        int[] d=new int[n-1];
        for(int i=0;i<n-1;i++) d[i]=nums[i+1]-nums[i];
        int[] left=new int[n-1];
        left[0]=1;
        for(int i=1;i<n-1;i++){
            if(d[i]==d[i-1]) left[i]=left[i-1] +1;
            else left[i]=1;
        }
        int[] right=new int[n-1];
        right[n-2]=1;
        for(int i=n-3;i>=0;i--){
            if(d[i]==d[i+1]) right[i]=right[i+1]+1;
            else right[i]=1;
        }
        int maxLen=2;
        for(int i=0;i<n-1;i++){
            maxLen=Math.max(maxLen, left[i]+2);
            maxLen=Math.max(maxLen, right[i]+2);
        }
        for(int i=0;i<n-2;i++){
            int originalSum=d[i]+d[i+1];
            if(originalSum%2==0){
                int D=originalSum/2;
                int currentLen=3;
                if(i>0 && d[i-1]==D) currentLen+=left[i-1];
                if(i+2 < n-1 && d[i+2]==D) currentLen+=right[i+2];
                maxLen=Math.max(maxLen, currentLen);
            }
        }
        return Math.min(n, maxLen);
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    int[] parent;
    int[] count;
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n=points.length;
        if(n==0) return 1;
        Map<Integer, Integer> xMap=new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Integer> yMap=new HashMap<>();

        int nextId=0;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            if(!xMap.containsKey(points[i][0])) xMap.put(points[i][0], nextId++);
        }
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            if(!yMap.containsKey(points[i][1])) yMap.put(points[i][1], nextId++);
        }
        parent = new int[nextId];
        count = new int[nextId];
        for(int i=0;i<nextId;i++) parent[i]=i;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            int u=xMap.get(points[i][0]);
            int v=yMap.get(points[i][1]);
            int rootU=find(u);
            int rootV=find(v);
            if(rootU!=rootV){
                parent[rootU]=rootV;
                count[rootV]+=count[rootU];
            }
            count[rootV]++;
        }
        List<Integer> componentSizes = new ArrayList<>();
        for(int i=0;i<nextId;i++){
            if(parent[i]==i && count[i]>0) componentSizes.add(count[i]);
        }
        Collections.sort(componentSizes, Collections.reverseOrder());
        if(componentSizes.size()==0) return 1;
        if(componentSizes.size()==1) return componentSizes.get(0)+1;
        return componentSizes.get(0)+componentSizes.get(1)+1;
    }
    int find(int i){
        if(parent[i]==i) return i;
        return parent[i]=find(parent[i]);
    }
}

[Q3_START]
from typing import List

class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 2:
            return n      
        d = []
        for i in range(n - 1):
            d.append(nums[i+1] - nums[i])   
        m = len(d)
        pre = [1] * m
        for i in range(1, m):
            if d[i] == d[i-1]:
                pre[i] = pre[i-1] + 1       
        sf = [1] * m
        for i in range(m - 2, -1, -1):
            if d[i] == d[i+1]:
                sf[i] = sf[i+1] + 1
        ans = min(n, 3) 
        for i in range(m):
            ans = max(ans, min(n, pre[i] + 2))
        for j in range(1, m):
            total_gap = d[j-1] + d[j]
            if total_gap % 2 == 0:
                dt = total_gap // 2
                current_len = 3
                if j >= 2 and d[j-2] == dt:
                    current_len += pre[j-2]            
                if j + 1 < m and d[j+1] == dt:
                    current_len += sf[j+1]             
                ans = max(ans, current_len)              
        return ans
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        pr = list(range(n))
        sz = [1] * n
        def find(i):
            while pr[i] != i:
                pr[i] = pr[pr[i]]
                i = pr[i]
            return i    
        def union(i, j):
            ri = find(i)
            rj = find(j)
            if ri != rj:
                # Union by size
                if sz[ri] < sz[rj]:
                    ri, rj = rj, ri
                pr[rj] = ri
                sz[ri] += sz[rj]
        xp = {}
        yp = {}
        for i, (x, y) in enumerate(points):
            if x in xp:
                union(i, xp[x])
            if y in yp:
                union(i, yp[y])
            xp[x] = i
            yp[y] = i
        csz = []
        for i in range(n):
            if pr[i] == i:
                csz.append(sz[i])
        
        csz.sort(reverse=True)
        if len(csz) >= 2:
            return csz[0] + csz[1] + 1
        return csz[0] + 1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 80 ###
[Q3_START]
typedef long long LL;

class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        vector<int> left(n, 1), right(n, 1);
        for(int i = 1; i < n; i++) {
            if(i >= 2 && nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]) {
                left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1;
            }else {
                left[i] = 2;
            }
        }
        for(int i = n - 2; i >= 0; i--) {
            if(i <= n - 3 && nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]) {
                right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1;
            }else {
                right[i] = 2;
            }
        }
        int ans = 1;
        for(int v: left) ans = max(ans, v);
        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if(i == 0) {
                ans = max(ans, 1 + right[1]);
            }else if(i == n - 1) {
                ans = max(ans, left[n - 2] + 1);
            }else {
                int L = left[i - 1];
                int R = right[i + 1];
                ans = max(ans, L + 1);
                ans = max(ans, R + 1);
                LL diffL = L >= 2? nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]: 0;
                LL diffR = R >= 2? nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] : 0;
                LL gap = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1];
                if(L >= 2 && R >= 2) {
                    if(diffL == diffR && 2 * diffL == gap) ans = max(ans, L + 1 + R);
                }else if(L >= 2 && R == 1) {
                    if(2 * diffL == gap) ans = max(ans, L + 2);
                }else if(L == 1 && R >= 2) {
                    if(2 * diffR == gap) ans = max(ans, R + 2);
                }else if(L == 1 && R == 1) {
                    if(gap % 2 == 0) ans = max(ans, 3);
                }
                if(L >= 2) {
                    if(2 * diffL == gap) ans = max(ans, L + 2);
                }else if(L == 1) {
                    if(gap % 2 == 0) ans = max(ans, 3);
                }
                if(R >= 2) {
                    if(2 * diffR == gap) ans = max(ans, R + 2);
                }else if(R == 1) {
                    if(gap % 2 == 0) ans = max(ans, 3);
                }
            }
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
struct DSU {
    vector<int> f, sz;
    DSU(int n): f(n), sz(n, 1) {
        iota(f.begin(), f.end(), 0);
    }
    int find(int x) {
        if(f[x] == x) return x;
        return f[x] = find(f[x]);
    }
    void merge(int x, int y) {
        x = find(x);
        y = find(y);
        if(x == y) return;
        if(sz[x] < sz[y]) swap(x, y);
        f[y] = x;
        sz[x] += sz[y];
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        unordered_map<int, int> mx, my;
        int cx = 0, cy = 0;
        for(auto&p: points) {
            if(!mx.count(p[0])) mx[p[0]] = cx++;
            if(!my.count(p[1])) my[p[1]] = cy++;
        }
        DSU dsu(cx + cy);
        for(auto&p: points) {
            int xi = mx[p[0]];
            int yi = my[p[1]] + cx;
            dsu.merge(xi, yi);
        }
        unordered_map<int, int> cnt;
        for(auto&p: points) {
            int r = dsu.find(mx[p[0]]);
            cnt[r]++;
        }
        int a = 0, b = 0;
        for(auto&[_, v]: cnt) {
            if(v >= a) {
                b = a;
                a = v;
            }else if(v > b) {
                b = v;
            }
        }
        return a + b + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 2) return n;
        vector<int> a(n), b(n);
        a[0] = 1;
        a[1] = 2;
        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            if (1LL * nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == 1LL * nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]) a[i] = a[i - 1] + 1;
            else a[i] = 2;
        }
        b[n - 1] = 1;
        b[n - 2] = 2;
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (1LL * nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == 1LL * nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]) b[i] = b[i + 1] + 1;
            else b[i] = 2;
        }
        int c = 2;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) c = max(c, a[i]);
        c = max(c, b[1] + 1);
        c = max(c, a[n - 2] + 1);
        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++) {
            c = max(c, a[i - 1] + 1);
            c = max(c, b[i + 1] + 1);
            long long x = 1LL * nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1];
            if (x % 2 == 0) {
                long long d = x / 2;
                int l = 1, r = 1;
                if (i >= 2 && 1LL * nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == d) l = a[i - 1];
                if (i + 2 < n && 1LL * nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == d) r = b[i + 1];
                c = max(c, l + r + 1);
            }
        }
        if (c > n) c = n;
        return c;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size(), a = 0, b = 0;
        vector<int> r(n), s(n, 1);
        iota(r.begin(), r.end(), 0);
        
        function<int(int)> f = [&](int i) {
            return r[i] == i ? i : r[i] = f(r[i]);
        };
        
        auto u = [&](int i, int j) {
            int v = f(i), w = f(j);
            if (v != w) {
                r[w] = v;
                s[v] += s[w];
            }
        };
        
        vector<pair<int, int>> x(n), y(n);
        for(int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            x[i] = {points[i][0], i};
            y[i] = {points[i][1], i};
        }
        
        sort(x.begin(), x.end());
        sort(y.begin(), y.end());
        
        for(int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
            if(x[i].first == x[i-1].first) u(x[i].second, x[i-1].second);
            if(y[i].first == y[i-1].first) u(y[i].second, y[i-1].second);
        }
        
        for(int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            if(r[i] == i) {
                if(s[i] > a) { 
                    b = a; 
                    a = s[i]; 
                }
                else if(s[i] > b) { 
                    b = s[i]; 
                }
            }
        }
        
        return a + b + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 82 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 3:
            return n
            
        diffs = [nums[i+1] - nums[i] for i in range(n-1)]
        groups = []
        curr_val = diffs[0]
        curr_count = 0
        for d in diffs:
            if d == curr_val:
                curr_count += 1
            else:
                groups.append([curr_val, curr_count])
                curr_val = d
                curr_count = 1
        groups.append([curr_val, curr_count])
        
        ans = 0
        for v, c in groups:
            ans = max(ans, min(n, c + 2))
            
        num_groups = len(groups)
        for i in range(num_groups):
            if i + 2 < num_groups:
                v1, c1 = groups[i+1]
                v2, c2 = groups[i+2]
                if c1 == 1 and c2 == 1:
                    if (v1 + v2) % 2 == 0:
                        target_d = (v1 + v2) // 2
                        L1 = groups[i][1] if groups[i][0] == target_d else 0
                        L2 = groups[i+3][1] if i + 3 < num_groups and groups[i+3][0] == target_d else 0
                        ans = max(ans, L1 + L2 + 3)
            
            if i == 0 and num_groups >= 2:
                v1, c1 = groups[0]
                v2, c2 = groups[1]
                if c1 == 1 and c2 == 1:
                    if (v1 + v2) % 2 == 0:
                        target_d = (v1 + v2) // 2
                        L2 = groups[2][1] if num_groups > 2 and groups[2][0] == target_d else 0
                        ans = max(ans, L2 + 3)
                        
        return ans
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        x_map = defaultdict(list)
        y_map = defaultdict(list)
        for i, (x, y) in enumerate(points):
            x_map[x].append(i)
            y_map[y].append(i)
            
        visited = [False] * len(points)
        sizes = []
        
        for i in range(len(points)):
            if not visited[i]:
                size = 0
                stack = [i]
                visited[i] = True
                while stack:
                    curr = stack.pop()
                    size += 1
                    px, py = points[curr]
                    
                    if px in x_map:
                        for neighbor in x_map.pop(px):
                            if not visited[neighbor]:
                                visited[neighbor] = True
                                stack.append(neighbor)
                    
                    if py in y_map:
                        for neighbor in y_map.pop(py):
                            if not visited[neighbor]:
                                visited[neighbor] = True
                                stack.append(neighbor)
                sizes.append(size)
                
        sizes.sort(reverse=True)
        if not sizes: return 1
        return sizes[0] + (sizes[1] if len(sizes) > 1 else 0) + 1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 83 ###
[Q3_START]

vector<int> get_max_len(const vector<int>& nums) {
    int n = nums.size();
    vector<int> dp(n);
    for(int i=n-1;i>=0;i--) {
        if (i==n-1) {
            dp[i]=1;
        } else {
            dp[i] = 2;
            if (i+2<n && nums[i+1]-nums[i]==nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]) {
                dp[i] = 1 + dp[i+1];
            }
        }
    }
    return dp;
}
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        vector<int> dp_fwd = get_max_len(nums);
        reverse(nums.begin(),nums.end());
        vector<int> dp_bck = get_max_len(nums);
        reverse(dp_bck.begin(),dp_bck.end());
        reverse(nums.begin(),nums.end());

        int ans = 2;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) {
            if (i < n-1) ans = max(ans, 1 + dp_fwd[i+1]);
            if (i > 0) ans = max(ans, 1+dp_bck[i-1]);
            if (i==0 || i==n-1) continue;
            if ((nums[i-1]+nums[i+1])%2) continue;
            int x = (nums[i-1]+nums[i+1])/2;
            int L,R;
            L = R = 1;
            if (i >= 2 && x - nums[i-1]==nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]) {
                L = dp_bck[i-1];
            }
            if (i+2<n && nums[i+1]-x == nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]) {
                R = dp_fwd[i+1];
            }
            ans = max(ans, 1+L+R);
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
#define MAXN 100000
vector<int> E[MAXN+2];

void add_edges(const vector<int>& ids) {
    int m = ids.size();
    for(int i=0;i+1<m;i++) {
        int id1 = ids[i];
        int id2 = ids[i+1];
        E[id1].push_back(id2);
        E[id2].push_back(id1);
    }
}

int dfs(int u, vector<bool>& done) {
    if (done[u]) return 0;
    done[u]=true;
    int ret = 1;
    for(int v : E[u]) {
        ret += dfs(v, done);
    }
    return ret;
}

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        // obviously 
        // the x has to be one of the x
        // 
        // for each x, we can 

        // consider only the given points
        // we can connect adjacent x and y
        // connected component
        // two different connectedf components have disjoint x and y
        // sum of the largest two connected components

        map<int,vector<int>> ids_x, ids_y;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];
            ids_x[x].push_back(i);
            ids_y[y].push_back(i);
        }
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) E[i].clear();
        for(auto& tmp : ids_x) {
            add_edges(tmp.second);
        }
        for(auto& tmp : ids_y) {
            add_edges(tmp.second);
        }

        vector<bool> done(n,false);
        vector<int> sizes;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) {
            if (done[i]) continue;
            sizes.push_back(dfs(i, done));
            if (sizes.size() > 2) {
                sort(sizes.begin(),sizes.end(),greater<int>());
                sizes.pop_back();
            }
        }
        sort(sizes.begin(),sizes.end(),greater<int>());

        if (sizes.size()==1) {
            return 1 + sizes[0];
        } else {
            return 1 + sizes[0]+sizes[1];
        }
        
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 84 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums):
        n = len(nums)
        # Any array of length <= 3 can perfectly become arithmetic
        if n <= 3:
            return n
            
        # 1. Build the differences array
        diffs = [nums[i+1] - nums[i] for i in range(n - 1)]
        m = len(diffs)
        
        run_ending_at = [0] * m
        run_starting_at = [0] * m
        
        # 2. Precompute the length of identical runs ending at index i
        current_len = 1
        run_ending_at[0] = 1
        for i in range(1, m):
            if diffs[i] == diffs[i-1]:
                current_len += 1
            else:
                current_len = 1
            run_ending_at[i] = current_len
            
        # 3. Precompute the length of identical runs starting at index i
        current_len = 1
        run_starting_at[m-1] = 1
        for i in range(m-2, -1, -1):
            if diffs[i] == diffs[i+1]:
                current_len += 1
            else:
                current_len = 1
            run_starting_at[i] = current_len
            
        max_len_in_diffs = 0
        
        # Scenario A: Extend an existing run by 1 (by changing a boundary element)
        for i in range(m):
            max_len_in_diffs = max(max_len_in_diffs, min(m, run_ending_at[i] + 1))
            
        # Scenario B: Bridge two runs together
        for i in range(m - 1):
            sum_val = diffs[i] + diffs[i+1]
            
            # We can only split the sum into two equal integers if it's even
            if sum_val % 2 == 0:
                target_d = sum_val // 2
                
                # Check left run
                left_len = 0
                if i - 1 >= 0 and diffs[i-1] == target_d:
                    left_len = run_ending_at[i-1]
                    
                # Check right run
                right_len = 0
                if i + 2 < m and diffs[i+2] == target_d:
                    right_len = run_starting_at[i+2]
                    
                bridge_len = left_len + 2 + right_len
                max_len_in_diffs = max(max_len_in_diffs, bridge_len)
                
        # The length in the original array is the difference run length + 1
        return max_len_in_diffs + 1
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
from collections import defaultdict

class DSU:
    def __init__(self):
        self.parent = {}
        self.size = {} # Tracks number of points in each component

    def find(self, i):
        if i not in self.parent:
            self.parent[i] = i
            self.size[i] = 0
            return i
        if self.parent[i] == i:
            return i
        self.parent[i] = self.find(self.parent[i])
        return self.parent[i]

    def union(self, i, j, is_point=False):
        root_i = self.find(i)
        root_j = self.find(j)
        if root_i != root_j:
            self.parent[root_i] = root_j
            self.size[root_j] += self.size[root_i]
        if is_point:
            self.size[root_j] += 1

class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        dsu = DSU()
        OFFSET = 10**9 + 7 # Distinguish x from y coordinates
        
        # 1. Build components
        for x, y in points:
            dsu.union(x, y + OFFSET, is_point=True)
            
        # 2. Extract component info
        # We need the point count and which x/y nodes belong to which root
        comp_points = {}
        comp_xs = defaultdict(set)
        comp_ys = defaultdict(set)
        
        unique_roots = set()
        for x, y in points:
            root = dsu.find(x)
            unique_roots.add(root)
            comp_points[root] = dsu.size[root]
            comp_xs[root].add(x)
            comp_ys[root].add(y)

        # 3. Find the best "Bridge"
        # The best move is connecting the two largest components that 
        # share NO x or y coordinates.
        roots = list(unique_roots)
        n = len(roots)
        
        if n == 0: return 1
        if n == 1: return comp_points[roots[0]] + 1
        
        # Sort by size to find max combinations faster
        roots.sort(key=lambda r: comp_points[r], reverse=True)
        
        max_total = comp_points[roots[0]] + 1
        
        # Check pairs of components
        # We want to find a row from Comp A and a col from Comp B (or vice-versa)
        # to place our new point (x_A, y_B).
        for i in range(n):
            for j in range(i + 1, n):
                r1, r2 = roots[i], roots[j]
                current_sum = comp_points[r1] + comp_points[r2] + 1
                
                # If these components are already better than our current max,
                # check if they can be bridged. They can ALWAYS be bridged
                # because we can pick any x from comp1 and any y from comp2
                # to create a new point (x, y).
                if current_sum > max_total:
                    max_total = current_sum
                else:
                    # Since roots are sorted, if this sum isn't better,
                    # no subsequent r2 will be better for this r1.
                    break
                    
        return max_total
[Q4_END]

class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n<=3) return n;
            int m = n-1
;
    vector <int> a(m);
    for (int i=0;i<m;i++)
        a[i]=nums[i+1]-nums[i];
    
    vector <int> s = nums,lr(m,1);
    for (int i=1;i<m;i++)
        {
            if (a[i]==a[i-1])
                lr[i]=lr[i-1]+1;
            
        }
    
    vector <int> rr(m,1);
    for (int i=m-2;i>=0;i--)
        {
        if (a[i]==a[i+1])
            rr[i]=rr[i+1]+1;
        }

        int maxa=0;
        for (int i=0;i<m;i++)
            maxa = max(maxa,min(m,lr[i]+1));

        for (int i=0;i<m-1;i++)
            {
                if ((a[i]+a[i+1])%2==0)
                {
                    int d = (a[i]+a[i+1])/2;
                    int cl=2;
                    if (i>0 && a[i-1]==d)
                        cl+=lr[i-1];
                    if (i+2<m && a[i+2]==d)
                        cl+=rr[i+2];
                    maxa = max(maxa, cl);
                }
            }

        return maxa+1;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    struct DSU{
        vector <int> p;
        DSU(int n)
        {
            p.resize(n);
            iota(p.begin(),p.end(),0);
        }

        int find(int i)
        {
            if (p[i]==i) return i;
            return p[i]=find(p[i]);
        }

        void unite(int i,int j)
        {
            int ri = find(i), rj = find(j);
            if (ri!=rj)
                p[rj]=ri;
        }
    };
    
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        vector <vector <int>> r = points;
        DSU dsu(n);
        vector <int> ids(n);
        iota(ids.begin(),ids.end(),0);

        sort(ids.begin(),ids.end(),[&](int a, int b)
             {
                 return points[a][0]<points[b][0];
             });
        for (int i=1;i<n;i++)
            {
                if (points[ids[i]][0]==points[ids[i-1]][0])
                    dsu.unite(ids[i],ids[i-1]);
            }

        sort(ids.begin(),ids.end(),[&](int a, int b)
             {
                 return points[a][1]<points[b][1];
             });

        // sort(ids.begin(),ids.end(), [&](int a, int b)
        //      {
        //          return points[a][1]<points[b][1];
        //      });

        for (int i=1;i<n;i++)
            {
                if (points[ids[i]][1] == points[ids[i-1]][1])
                    dsu.unite(ids[i],ids[i-1]);
            }

        vector <int> cs(n,0),sizes;
        for (int i=0;i<n;i++)
        cs[dsu.find(i)]++;

        for (int i=0;i<n;i++)
            {
                if (cs[i]>0)
                    sizes.push_back(cs[i]);
            }

        sort(sizes.begin(),sizes.end());
        int m =sizes.size();
        if(m>=2) return sizes[m-1]+sizes[m-2]+1;
        else return sizes[0]+1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]
