### RANK 86 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& v) {
        int n = v.size();
        vector<int> diff(n, 0);
        int res = 0;
        for(int i=1; i<n; ++i)diff[i] = v[i]-v[i-1];
        vector<int> pref(n, 1), suf(n, 1);
        for(int i=2; i<n; ++i){
            if(diff[i] == diff[i-1])pref[i] += pref[i-1];
            res = max(res, pref[i]);
        }
        for(int i=n-2; i>0; --i){
            if(diff[i] == diff[i+1])suf[i] += suf[i+1];
            res = max(res, suf[i]);
        }
        res = min(n-1, res+1);
        for(int i=1; i<n-1; ++i){
            if((v[i+1]-v[i-1])&1)continue;
            int req = (v[i+1]-v[i-1])/2;
            int val = 2;
            if(i>1 && diff[i-1] == req)val += pref[i-1];
            if(i<n-2 && diff[i+2] == req)val += suf[i+2];
            res = max(res, val);
        }
        
        return res+1;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    class UnionFind {
private:
    vector<int> ccSize, parent;
    int forests;

    void link(int x, int y) {
        if (ccSize[x] > ccSize[y])
            swap(x, y);

        parent[x] = y;
        ccSize[y] += ccSize[x];
    }
public:
    UnionFind(int n) {
        ccSize = vector<int>(n), parent = vector<int>(n);
        forests = n;	

        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i)
            parent[i] = i, ccSize[i] = 1;
    }

    int find_set(int x) {
        if (x == parent[x])
            return x;
        return parent[x] = find_set(parent[x]);
    }

    bool union_sets(int x, int y) {
        x = find_set(x), y = find_set(y);
        if (x != y) {	// Different components
            link(x, y);
            forests--;	// 2 merged into 1
        }
        return x != y;
    }

    int get_size(int x){
        x = find_set(x);
        return ccSize[x];
    }
   int get_forests(){
       return forests;
   }

    vector<vector<int>> connected_components() {
        // Get every edge and put at his parent
        vector<vector<int>> list(parent.size());
        for (int i = 0; i < (int) parent.size(); ++i)
            list[find_set(i)].push_back(i);

        // copy non empty rows
        vector<vector<int>> ans;
        for (int i = 0; i < (int) parent.size(); ++i)
            if (list[i].size())
                ans.push_back(list[i]);

        // for (int cc = 0; cc < (int)ans.size(); ++cc)
        //     cout<<find_set(ans[cc][0])<<" "<<ccSize[find_set(ans[cc][0])]<<"\n";
        return ans;
    }
};
    
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& v) {
        int n = v.size();
        map<int,vector<int>> mpx, mpy;
        for(int i=0; i<n; ++i){
            auto t = v[i];
            int x = t[0], y = t[1];
            mpx[x].push_back(i);
            mpy[y].push_back(i);
            // xi.insert(x), yi.insert(y);
        }
        //i have all unique x points
        //i have all unique y points
        UnionFind dsu(n);
        for(auto &x : mpx){
            auto &vec = x.second;
            for(int i=1; i<vec.size(); ++i){
                dsu.union_sets(vec[i], vec[i-1]);
            }
        }
        for(auto &x : mpy){
            auto &vec = x.second;
            for(int i=1; i<vec.size(); ++i){
                dsu.union_sets(vec[i], vec[i-1]);
            }
        }

        vector<vector<int>> cc = dsu.connected_components();
        sort(cc.begin(), cc.end(), [](auto &a, auto &b){
            return a.size() > b.size();
        });
        if(cc.size() == 1)return n+1;
        return cc[0].size() + 1 + cc[1].size();
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 87 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        l = [1] * n
        r = [1] * n

        for i in range(1, n):
            l[i] = 2 if i == 1 or nums[i] - nums[i - 1] != nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] else l[i - 1] + 1

        for i in range(n - 2, -1, -1):
            r[i] = 2 if i == n - 2 or nums[i + 1] - nums[i] != nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] else r[i + 1] + 1

        res = min(n, max(l) + 1)

        for i in range(1, n - 1):
            if (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) % 2:
                continue

            d = (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) // 2
            ll = l[i - 1] if i > 1 and nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == d else 1
            rr = r[i + 1] if i < n - 2 and nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == d else 1
            res = max(res, ll + 1 + rr)

        return res
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        p, sz = {}, {}

        def find(x):
            p.setdefault(x, x)
            sz.setdefault(x, 1)
            while p[x] != x:
                p[x] = p[p[x]]
                x = p[x]
            return x

        def union(a, b):
            a, b = find(a), find(b)
            if a == b:
                return
            if sz[a] < sz[b]:
                a, b = b, a
            p[b] = a
            sz[a] += sz[b]

        for x,y in points:
            union(("x", x), ("y", y))

        cnt = {}
        for x,y in points:
            r = find(("x", x))
            cnt[r] = cnt.get(r, 0) + 1

        a = b = 0
        for v in cnt.values():
            if v > a:
                a,b = v,a
            elif v > b:
                b = v
        return a + b + 1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 88 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 3:
            return n

        D = [nums[i+1] - nums[i] for i in range(n - 1)]

        left_streak = [1] * (n - 1)
        for i in range(1, n - 1):
            if D[i] == D[i-1]:
                left_streak[i] = left_streak[i-1] + 1

        right_streak = [1] * (n - 1)
        for i in range(n - 3, -1, -1):
            if D[i] == D[i+1]:
                right_streak[i] = right_streak[i+1] + 1

        ans = 0

        for i in range(n - 1):
            L = left_streak[i]
            if i  == n - 2 or D[i] != D[i+1]:
                if L < n - 1:
                    ans = max(ans, L + 2)
                else:
                    ans = max(ans, L + 1)

        for i in range(n - 2):
            S = D[i] + D[i+1]
            if S % 2 == 0:
                d = S // 2
                l_len = left_streak[i-1] if i > 0 and D[i-1] == d else 0
                r_len = right_streak[i+2] if i + 2 < n-1 and D[i+2] == d else 0
                ans = max(ans, l_len + 2 + r_len + 1)
        return ans
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        parent = {}
        edge_count = {}

        def find(i):
            root = i
            while parent[root] != root:
                root = parent[root]
            curr = i
            while curr != root:
                nxt = parent[curr]
                parent[curr] = root
                curr = nxt
            return root

        for x, y in points:
            u = (0, x)
            v = (1, y)

            if u not in parent:
                parent[u] = u
                edge_count[u] = 0
            if v not in parent:
                parent[v] = v
                edge_count[v] = 0

            root_u = find(u)
            root_v = find(v)

            if root_u != root_v:
                parent[root_u] = root_v
                edge_count[root_v] += edge_count[root_u] + 1
            else:
                edge_count[root_u] += 1
        counts = []
        for k in parent.keys():
            if parent[k] == k and edge_count[k] > 0:
                counts.append(edge_count[k])

        counts.sort(reverse=True)

        if len(counts) >= 2:
            return counts[0] + counts[1] + 1
        elif len(counts) == 1:
            return counts[0] + 1
        return 1
[Q4_END]

class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, a: List[int]) -> int:
        # n,m=len(a),2
        # def g(b):
        #     r=2
        #     for i in range(n-2):
        #         d=b[i+1]-b[i]
        #         if b[i+2]-b[i+1]==d:
        #             j=i+2
        #             while j<n and b[j]-b[j-1]==d: j+=1
        #             r=max(r,j-i)
        #         r=max(r,3 if b[i+2]-b[i]==2*d else 2)
        #     return r
        # for _ in range(2):
        #     m=max(m,g(a))
        #     a=a[::-1]
        # for i in [0,1,n-2,n-1]:
        #     for v in range(-2,3):
        #         o=a[i];a[i]+=v; m=max(m,g(a)); a[i]=o
        # return m
        n=len(a)
        def g(b):
            r=0
            for i in range(n-1):
                    if r>=n-i: break
                    for d in {b[i+1]-b[i], (b[i+2]-b[i])//2 if i+2<n and not (b[i+2]-b[i])%2 else None}-{None}:
                        c,e,v=1,0,b[i]
                        for j in range(i+1,n):
                            v+=d
                            if b[j]==v: c+=1
                            elif not e:e,c=1,c+1
                            else: break
                        r=max(r,c)
            return r
        return max(g(a),g(a[::-1]))

[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, a: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        p=list(range(len(a)))
        def f(i):
            while p[i]!=i : p[i]=p[p[i]];i=p[i]
            return i
        x,y,c={},{},{}
        for i,(u,v) in enumerate(a):
            if u in x: p[f(i)]=f(x[u])
            if v in y: p[f(i)]=f(y[v])
            x[u]=y[v]=i
        for i in range(len(a)):k=f(i); c[k]=c.get(k,0)+1
        return sum(sorted(c.values())[-2:])+1

### RANK 90 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, A: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(A)
        L = [1] * n
        L[1]= 2
        for i in range(2, n):
            if A[i] - A[i - 1] == A[i - 1] - A[i - 2]:
                L[i] = L[i - 1] + 1
            else:
                L[i] = 2

        R = [1] * n
        R[n - 2]= 2
        for i in range(n - 3, -1,-1):
            if A[i + 1] - A[i] == A[i + 2] - A[i+ 1]:
                R[i] = R[i + 1] + 1
            else:
                R[i] = 2

        res = max(max(L), R[1] + 1, L[n - 2] + 1)

        for i in range(1, n - 1):
            res = max(res, L[i - 1] + 1, R[i + 1] + 1)

            d = A[i + 1] - A[i - 1]
            if d % 2 == 0:
                dd = d // 2
                if i >= 2 and A[i - 1] - A[i - 2] == dd:
                    l = L[i - 1]
                else:
                    l = 1
                if i + 2 < n and A[i + 2] - A[i + 1] == dd:
                    r = R[i + 1]
                else:
                    r = 1
                res = max(res, l + r + 1)

        return min(res, n)
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class UnionSet():
    def __init__(self, n):
        self.n = n
        self.parents = [-1] * n

    def find(self, x):
        if self.parents[x] < 0:
            return x
        else:
            self.parents[x] = self.find(self.parents[x])
            return self.parents[x]

    def union(self, x, y):
        x = self.find(x)
        y = self.find(y)

        if x == y:
            return False

        if self.parents[x] > self.parents[y]:
            x, y = y, x

        self.parents[x] += self.parents[y]
        self.parents[y] = x
        return True

    def size(self, x):
        return -self.parents[self.find(x)]

    def same(self, x, y):
        return self.find(x) == self.find(y)

    def members(self, x):
        root = self.find(x)
        return [i for i in range(self.n) if self.find(i) == root]

    def roots(self):
        return [i for i, x in enumerate(self.parents) if x < 0]

    def group_count(self):
        return len(self.roots())

    def all_group_members(self):
        group_members = defaultdict(list)
        for member in range(self.n):
            group_members[self.find(member)].append(member)
        return group_members

    def __str__(self):
        return '\n'.join(f'{r}: {m}' for r, m in self.all_group_members().items())


class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        dx, dy = defaultdict(lambda: len(dx)), defaultdict(lambda: len(dy))

        for x, y in points:
            dx[x]
            dy[y]

        m = len(dx)
        us = UnionSet(m + len(dy))

        for x, y in points:
            us.union(dx[x], m + dy[y])

        cnt = defaultdict(int)
        for x, y in points:
            cnt[us.find(dx[x])] += 1

        a = b = 0
        for v in cnt.values():
            if v >= a:
                a, b = v, a
            elif v > b:
                b = v

        return a + b + 1
[Q4_END]

class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, s: List[int]) -> int:
        n=len(s)
        if n<4:return n
        a=[s[i+1]-s[i] for i in range(n-1)]
        l,r=[1]*(n-1),[1]*(n-1)
        for i in range(1,n-1):
            if a[i]==a[i-1]:l[i]=l[i-1]+1
        for i in range(n-3,-1,-1):
            if a[i]==a[i+1]:r[i]=r[i+1]+1
        m=max(l)+2
        for j in range(n):
            if j==0:m=max(m,r[1]+2)
            elif j==n-1:m=max(m,l[n-3]+2)
            else:
                m=max(m,l[j-1]+2,r[j]+2)
                if(s[j+1]-s[j-1])%2==0:
                    d,c=(s[j+1]-s[j-1])//2,2
                    if j>1 and a[j-2]==d:c+=l[j-2]
                    if j<n-2 and a[j+1]==d:c+=r[j+1]
                    m=max(m,c+1)
        return min(m,n)

import collections as c,sys
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, p: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        sys.setrecursionlimit(300000)
        d={}
        def f(i):
            if i not in d:d[i]=i
            if d[i]!=i:d[i]=f(d[i])
            return d[i]
        for x,y in p:
            a,b=f(x),f(y+4e9)
            if a!=b:d[a]=b
        v=sorted(c.Counter(f(x) for x,y in p).values())[::-1]
        return v[0]+(v[1] if len(v)>1 else 0)+1

class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        if(n <= 2) return n;
        int[] d = new int[n - 1];
        for(int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++){
            d[i] = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
        }

        int[] left = new int[n - 1];
        left[0] = 1;
        for(int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++){
            if(d[i] == d[i - 1]){
                left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1;
            }else{
                left[i] = 1;
            }
        }

        int[] right = new int[n - 1];
        right[n - 2] = 1;

        for(int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--){

            if(d[i] == d[i + 1]){
                right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1;
            }else{
                right[i] = 1;
            }
        }

        int ans = Math.min(n, 3);

        for(int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++){
            int k = left[i];
            if(k == n - 1){
                ans = Math.max(ans, n);
            }else{
                ans = Math.max(ans, k + 2);
            }
        }

        for(int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++){
            int sum = d[i - 1] + d[i];
            if(sum % 2 == 0){
                int D = sum/2;
                int curD = 2;
                if(i >= 2 && d[i - 2] == D){
                    curD += left[i - 2];
                }

                if(i <= n - 3 && d[i + 1] == D){
                    curD += right[i + 1];
                }

                ans = Math.max(ans, curD + 1);
            }
        }

        return ans;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
         int n = points.length;

        if(n == 0) return 1;
        DSU dsu = new DSU(n);

        Map<Integer,Integer> uMap = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer,Integer> vMap = new HashMap<>();

        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++){
            int u = points[i][0];
            int v = points[i][1];
            if(uMap.containsKey(u)){
                dsu.union(i, uMap.get(u));
            }else{
                uMap.put(u, i);
            }

            if(vMap.containsKey(v)){
                dsu.union(i, vMap.get(v));
            }else{
                vMap.put(v, i);
            }
        }

        Map<Integer,Integer> component = new HashMap<>();
        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++){
            int root = dsu.find(i);
            component.put(root, component.getOrDefault(root, 0) + 1);
        }

        List<Integer> sizes = new ArrayList<>(component.values());
        sizes.sort(Collections.reverseOrder());

        if(sizes.size() >= 2){
            return sizes.get(0)  + sizes.get(1) + 1;
        }else{
            return sizes.get(0) + 1;
        }
    }
}

class DSU{
    int[] parent;
    int[] rank;
    public DSU(int n){
        parent = new int[n];
        rank = new int[n];
        
        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++){
            parent[i] = i;
        }
    }

    public int find(int u){
        if(parent[u] == u)
            return u;
        return parent[u] = find(parent[u]);
    }

    public void union(int u, int v){
        int uParent = find(u);
        int vParent = find(v);

        if(uParent == vParent) return;

        if(rank[uParent] < rank[vParent]){
            parent[uParent] = vParent;
        }else if(rank[uParent] > rank[vParent]){
            parent[vParent] = uParent;
        }else{
            parent[vParent] = uParent;
            rank[uParent]++;
        }
    }
}

class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        a=nums;b=len(a);d=[a[c]-a[c-1] for c in range(1,b)];k=a;e=b-1;f=[1]*e;g=[1]*e
        for h in range(1,e):
            if d[h]==d[h-1]:f[h]=f[h-1]+1
        for h in range(e-2,-1,-1):
            if d[h]==d[h+1]:g[h]=g[h+1]+1
        i=min(b,max(f)+2)
        for j in range(e-1):
            k=d[j]+d[j+1]
            if k%2==0:
                l,m=k//2,2
                if j>0 and d[j-1]==l:m+=f[j-1]
                if j+2<e and d[j+2]==l:m+=g[j+2]
                i=max(i,m+1)
        return i

[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, p: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        q=p;b=len(p);c=[*range(b)];d={};e={}
        def f(i):
            while c[i]-i:c[i]=c[c[i]];i=c[i]
            return i
        for j,(k,l) in enumerate(q):
            for m in d.get(k,j),e.get(l,j):c[f(j)]=f(m)
            d[k]=e[l]=j
        g=[0]*(b+1)
        for j in range(b):g[f(j)]+=1
        h=sorted(g)
        return h[-1]+h[-2]+1
[Q4_END]

class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();

        vector<int> diff(n + 1, 0);
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) diff[i] = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];

        vector<int> left(n - 1, 1), right(n - 1, 1);

        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++){
            if (diff[i] == diff[i - 1]) left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1;
        }

        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--){
            if (diff[i] == diff[i + 1]) right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1;
        }

        int ans = 2;
        ans = max(ans, right[1] + 2);
        ans = max(ans, left[n - 3] + 2);
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++)ans = max(ans, min(left[i] + 2, n));

        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++){
            if (abs(nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) % 2 == 0){
                int mid = (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) / 2;

                int len = 3;
                if (i >= 2 && diff[i - 2] == mid) len += left[i - 2];
                if (i < n - 2 && diff[i + 1] == mid) len += right[i + 1];

                ans = max(ans, len);
            }
        }

        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DisjointSets {
  private:
	vector<int> parents;
	vector<int> sizes;

  public:
	DisjointSets(int size) : parents(size), sizes(size, 1) {
		for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) { parents[i] = i; }
	}

	int find(int x) { return parents[x] == x ? x : (parents[x] = find(parents[x])); }

	bool unite(int x, int y) {
		int x_root = find(x);
		int y_root = find(y);
		if (x_root == y_root) { return false; }

		if (sizes[x_root] < sizes[y_root]) { std::swap(x_root, y_root); }
		sizes[x_root] += sizes[y_root];
		parents[y_root] = x_root;
		return true;
	}

	bool connected(int x, int y) { return find(x) == find(y); }

    int get_size(int i) { return sizes[find(i)]; }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        // dsu

        int n = points.size();

        map<int, vector<int>> mp1, mp2;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++){
            mp1[points[i][0]].push_back(i);
            mp2[points[i][1]].push_back(i);
        }

        DisjointSets dsu(n);

        for (auto &x : mp1){
            for (auto &y : x.second) dsu.unite(y, x.second.back());
        }

        for (auto &x : mp2){
            for (auto &y : x.second) dsu.unite(y, x.second.back());
        }

        priority_queue<int> groups;
        vector<bool> vis(n, 0);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++){
            if (!vis[dsu.find(i)]){
                vis[dsu.find(i)] = 1;
                int sz = dsu.get_size(i);

                groups.push(sz);
            }
        }
        groups.push(0);

        int ans = 1;
        for (int i = 0; i < 2; i++) ans += groups.top(), groups.pop();

        return ans;
    }
};

class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 2:
            return n

        L = [0] * n
        L[0] = 1
        L[1] = 2
        for i in range(2, n):
            if nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]:
                L[i] = L[i - 1] + 1
            else:
                L[i] = 2

        R = [0] * n
        R[n - 1] = 1
        R[n - 2] = 2
        for i in range(n - 3, -1, -1):
            if nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]:
                R[i] = R[i + 1] + 1
            else:
                R[i] = 2

        ans = max(L)

        ans = max(ans, R[1] + 1, L[n - 2] + 1)

        for i in range(1, n - 1):
            ans = max(ans, L[i - 1] + 1, R[i + 1] + 1)

            if (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) % 2 == 0:
                d = (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) // 2

                left_len = 2
                if i - 1 >= 1 and nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == d:
                    left_len = L[i - 1] + 1

                right_len = 2
                if i + 1 <= n - 2 and nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == d:
                    right_len = R[i + 1] + 1

                ans = max(ans, left_len + right_len - 1)

        return min(ans, n)
        
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU:
    def __init__(self, n: int):
        self.p = list(range(n))
        self.sz = [1] * n

    def find(self, x: int) -> int:
        while self.p[x] != x:
            self.p[x] = self.p[self.p[x]]
            x = self.p[x]
        return x

    def union(self, a: int, b: int) -> None:
        ra, rb = self.find(a), self.find(b)
        if ra == rb:
            return
        if self.sz[ra] < self.sz[rb]:
            ra, rb = rb, ra
        self.p[rb] = ra
        self.sz[ra] += self.sz[rb]

def impl(points: List[List[int]]) -> int:
    n = len(points)
    if n == 0:
        return 1

    dsu = DSU(n)
    seen_x = {}
    seen_y = {}

    for i, (x, y) in enumerate(points):
        if x in seen_x:
            dsu.union(i, seen_x[x])
        else:
            seen_x[x] = i

        if y in seen_y:
            dsu.union(i, seen_y[y])
        else:
            seen_y[y] = i

    cnt = Counter(dsu.find(i) for i in range(n))
    sizes = sorted(cnt.values(), reverse=True)

    if len(sizes) == 1:
        return sizes[0] + 1
    return sizes[0] + sizes[1] + 1
  
class Solution:
  def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
    return impl(points)
        
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
int max(int a, int b) {
    return a > b ? a : b;
}

int longestArithmetic(int* nums, int n) {
    if (n <= 3) return n;

    int ans = 2;
    int* d = (int*)malloc((n - 1) * sizeof(int));
    for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) d[i] = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];

    int* left = (int*)malloc((n - 1) * sizeof(int));
    left[0] = 1;
    for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++) {
        left[i] = (d[i] == d[i - 1]) ? left[i - 1] + 1 : 1;
        ans = max(ans, left[i] + 1);
    }

    int* right = (int*)malloc((n - 1) * sizeof(int));
    right[n - 2] = 1;
    for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
        right[i] = (d[i] == d[i + 1]) ? right[i + 1] + 1 : 1;
    }

    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
        if (i > 0 && i < n - 1) {
            long long diffSum = (long long)nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1];
            if (diffSum % 2 == 0) {
                int targetD = (int)(diffSum / 2);
                int current = 3;
                if (i > 1 && d[i - 2] == targetD) current += left[i - 2];
                if (i < n - 2 && d[i + 1] == targetD) current += right[i + 1];
                ans = max(ans, current);
            }
        }

        if (i > 0) {
            int current = 2;
            if (i > 1) current += left[i - 2];
            ans = max(ans, current);
        }
        if (i < n - 1) {
            int current = 2;
            if (i < n - 2) current += right[i + 1];
            ans = max(ans, current);
        }

        if (i < n - 2) {
            int targetD = d[i + 1];
            ans = max(ans, right[i + 1] + 2);
        }
        if (i > 1) {
            int targetD = d[i - 2];
            ans = max(ans, left[i - 2] + 2);
        }
    }

    free(d);
    free(left);
    free(right);
    return ans > n ? n : ans;
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
#include <stdlib.h>

typedef struct { int x, y, id; } Point;
typedef struct { int parent, size; } DSU;

int find(DSU* d, int i) {
    if (d[i].parent == i) return i;
    return d[i].parent = find(d, d[i].parent);
}

void unite(DSU* d, int i, int j) {
    int rootA = find(d, i);
    int rootB = find(d, j);
    if (rootA != rootB) {
        if (d[rootA].size < d[rootB].size) {
            int temp = rootA; rootA = rootB; rootB = temp;
        }
        d[rootB].parent = rootA;
        d[rootA].size += d[rootB].size;
    }
}

int cmpX(const void* a, const void* b) {
    Point* p1 = (Point*)a;
    Point* p2 = (Point*)b;
    if (p1->x != p2->x) return (p1->x > p2->x) - (p1->x < p2->x);
    return (p1->y > p2->y) - (p1->y < p2->y);
}

int cmpY(const void* a, const void* b) {
    Point* p1 = (Point*)a;
    Point* p2 = (Point*)b;
    if (p1->y != p2->y) return (p1->y > p2->y) - (p1->y < p2->y);
    return (p1->x > p2->x) - (p1->x < p2->x);
}

int maxActivated(int** points, int pointsSize, int* pointsColSize) {
    if (pointsSize == 0) return 1;
    if (pointsSize == 1) return 2;

    Point* p = malloc(pointsSize * sizeof(Point));
    DSU* d = malloc(pointsSize * sizeof(DSU));

    for (int i = 0; i < pointsSize; i++) {
        p[i].x = points[i][0];
        p[i].y = points[i][1];
        p[i].id = i;
        d[i].parent = i;
        d[i].size = 1;
    }

    qsort(p, pointsSize, sizeof(Point), cmpX);
    for (int i = 1; i < pointsSize; i++) {
        if (p[i].x == p[i-1].x) unite(d, p[i].id, p[i-1].id);
    }

    qsort(p, pointsSize, sizeof(Point), cmpY);
    for (int i = 1; i < pointsSize; i++) {
        if (p[i].y == p[i-1].y) unite(d, p[i].id, p[i-1].id);
    }

    int max1 = 0, max2 = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < pointsSize; i++) {
        if (d[i].parent == i) {
            if (d[i].size > max1) {
                max2 = max1;
                max1 = d[i].size;
            } else if (d[i].size > max2) {
                max2 = d[i].size;
            }
        }
    }

    free(p);
    free(d);

    return max1 + max2 + 1;
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 98 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        if len(nums)<= 3:
            return len(nums)

        left = [1,2]
        for i in range(2, len(nums)):
            same = nums[i]-nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]
            if same:
                left.append( left[-1] + 1)
            else:
                left.append( 2 )

        right = [1,2]
        # -1, -2 
        for i in range( len(nums)-3,-1,-1):
            same = nums[i]-nums[i+1] == nums[i+1] - nums[i+2]
            if same:
                right.append( right[-1] + 1)
            else:
                right.append( 2 )
        right = right[::-1]

        ans = 0
        for i in range( len(nums) ):
            # check if modify it & left
            if i < len(nums)-1:
                ans = max( ans, right[i+1] + 1 )

            # check if modify right
            if i > 0:
                ans = max( ans, left[i-1] + 1)

            # both sides it
            if 1 < i < len(nums)-2:
                d1 = nums[i-2] - nums[i-1]
                d2 = nums[i+1] - nums[i+2]
                if d1 == d2 and nums[i-1] - nums[i+1] == 2*d1:
                    ans = max( ans, left[i-1] + right[i+1] + 1)

            if 1 < i < len(nums)-1:
                d1 = nums[i-2] - nums[i-1]    
                if nums[i-1]-nums[i+1] == 2*d1:
                    ans = max( ans, left[i-1]+2)

            if 0 < i < len(nums)-2:
                d2 = nums[i+1] - nums[i+2]
                if nums[i-1]-nums[i+1] == 2*d2:
                    ans = max( ans, right[i+1]+2)
                    

        #print( left )
        #print( right )
        return ans
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU:
    def __init__(self):
        self.p={}
        self.s={}
    def add(self,x):
        self.p[x] = x
        self.s[x] = 1
    def find(self,x):
        while x != self.p[x]:
            x, self.p[x] = self.p[x], self.p[ self.p[x]]
        return x
    def union(self, x, y):
        x = self.find(x)
        y = self.find(y)
        if x==y:
            return x
        if self.s[x] < self.s[y]:
            x,y = y,x
        self.p[y] = x
        self.s[x] += self.s[y]
        return x

class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        dsu = DSU()
        rows = defaultdict(list)
        cols = defaultdict(list)
        for (x,y) in points:
            dsu.add( (x,y) )
            rows[x].append( (x,y) )
            cols[y].append( (x,y) )

        for r in rows:
            for p in rows[r]:
                dsu.union( rows[r][0], p)
        for c in cols:
            for p in cols[c]:
                dsu.union( cols[c][0], p)

        root_sizes = [dsu.s[x] for x in dsu.s if dsu.p[x] == x]+[0,0]
        #print( root_sizes)
        return 1 + sum(sorted(root_sizes)[-2:])
[Q4_END]

### RANK 100 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        vector<int> pre(n), suff(n);

        for (int i = 1; i < n; i++) {
            pre[i] = 1;

            if (i >= 2 && nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2])
                pre[i] = pre[i - 1] + 1;
        }

        for (int i = n - 2; i >= 0; i--) {
            suff[i] = 1;

            if (i + 2 < n && nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == nums[i + 1] - nums[i])
                suff[i] = suff[i + 1] + 1;
        }

        int res = 3;
        res = max(res, *max_element(pre.begin(), pre.end()) + 2);
        res = min(res, n);

        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++) {
            int curr = 3;

            if ((nums[i + 1] + nums[i - 1]) % 2)
                continue;

            int target = (nums[i + 1] + nums[i - 1]) / 2;

            if (i >= 2 && nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == target - nums[i - 1])
                curr += pre[i - 1];

            if (i + 2 < n && nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == nums[i + 1] - target)
                curr += suff[i + 1];

            res = max(res, curr);
        }

        return res;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    int find_parent(int x, vector<int>& parent) {
        return parent[x] = (x == parent[x] ? x : find_parent(parent[x], parent));
    }
    
    void unite(int a, int b, vector<int>& parent, vector<int>& sizex) {
        a = find_parent(a, parent);
        b = find_parent(b, parent);

        if (a == b)
            return;

        if (sizex[a] > sizex[b])
            swap(a, b);

        sizex[b] += sizex[a];
        parent[a] = b;
    }
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        vector< vector<int> > x, y;
        vector<int> parent(n), sizex(n, 1);

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            auto &pt = points[i];
            x.push_back({pt[0], pt[1], i});
            y.push_back({pt[1], pt[0], i});

            parent[i] = i;
        }

        auto func = [&](vector<vector<int>>& v) {
            sort (v.begin(), v.end());

            for (int i = 1; i < n; i++)
                if (v[i - 1][0] == v[i][0])
                    unite(v[i - 1][2], v[i][2], parent, sizex);
        };

        func(x);
        func(y);

        set< pair<int, int> > s;

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
            s.insert({sizex[find_parent(i, parent)], find_parent(i, parent)});

        if (s.size() == 1)
            return n + 1;

        int res = prev(s.end())->first;
        s.erase(prev(s.end()));
        res += prev(s.end())->first;

        return 1 + res;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        int[] diffs = new int[n+1];
        diffs[0] = 1000000;
        diffs[n] = 1000000;
        for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
            diffs[i] = nums[i]-nums[i-1];
        }
        int[] sl = new int[n+1];
        int[] sr = new int[n+1];
        for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
            sr[i] = 1;
            if (diffs[i]==diffs[i-1])
                sr[i] += sr[i-1];
        }
        for (int i = n-1; i > 0; --i) {
            sl[i] = 1;
            if (diffs[i]==diffs[i+1])
                sl[i] += sl[i+1];
        }
        int maxs = 0;
        for (int x : sr)
            maxs = Math.max(maxs,x);
        if (maxs==n-1)
            return n;
        int ans = maxs+1;
        for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
            if (diffs[i-1]*2==diffs[i]+diffs[i+1]) {
                ans = Math.max(ans,sr[i-1]+2);
                //System.out.println("R"+i);
                if (i<n-1&&diffs[i+2]==diffs[i-1]) {
                    //System.out.println("RR"+i);
                    ans = Math.max(ans,sr[i-1]+2+sl[i+2]);
                }
            }
        }
        for (int i = n-1; i > 0; --i) {
            if (diffs[i+1]*2==diffs[i]+diffs[i-1]) {
                //System.out.println(sl[i]+" "+sl[i+1]);
                ans = Math.max(ans,sl[i+1]+2);
                //System.out.println("L"+i);
                if (i>1&&diffs[i-2]==diffs[i+1]) {
                    //System.out.println("LL"+i);
                    ans = Math.max(ans,sl[i+1]+2+sr[i-2]);
                }
            }
        }
        return ans+1;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        if (n==1)
            return 2;
        ArrayList<ArrayList<Integer>> g = new ArrayList<>();
        HashMap<Integer,Integer> rs = new HashMap<>();
        HashMap<Integer,Integer> cs = new HashMap<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            g.add(new ArrayList<>());
        }
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];
            if (rs.containsKey(y)) {
                g.get(rs.get(y)).add(i);
                g.get(i).add(rs.get(y));
            }
            if (cs.containsKey(x)) {
                g.get(cs.get(x)).add(i);
                g.get(i).add(cs.get(x));
            }
            rs.put(y,i);
            cs.put(x,i);
        }
        int[] cts = new int[n];
        boolean[] vis = new boolean[n];
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            if (vis[i])
                continue;
            ArrayDeque<Integer> q = new ArrayDeque<>();
            vis[i] = true;
            q.add(i);
            while (!q.isEmpty()) {
                int u = q.removeFirst();
                ++cts[i];
                for (int v : g.get(u)) {
                    if (vis[v])
                        continue;
                    vis[v] = true;
                    q.add(v);
                }
            }
        }
        Arrays.sort(cts);
        return cts[n-1]+cts[n-2]+1;
    }
}

### RANK 103 ###

class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        int[] left = new int[n];
        int[] right = new int[n];
        left[0] = 1;
        left[1] = 2;
        int ans = 2;
        for (int i = 2; i < n; i ++) {
            if (nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]) {
                left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1;
            }
            else {
                left[i] = 2;
            }
            ans = Math.max(ans, left[i]);
        }
        right[n - 1] = 1;
        right[n - 2] = 2;
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i --) {
            if (nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]) {
                right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1;
            }
            else {
                right[i] = 2;
            }
        }
        ans = Math.max(ans, right[0]);
        ans = Math.max(ans, right[1] + 1);
        ans = Math.max(ans, left[n - 2] + 1);
        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; i ++) {
            ans = Math.max(ans, left[i - 1] + 1);
            ans = Math.max(ans, right[i + 1] + 1);
            int delta = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1];
            if ((delta & 1) != 0) {
                continue;
            }
            int d = delta / 2;
            int l = 1;
            int r = 1;
            if (i >= 2 && nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == d) {
                l = left[i - 1];
            }
            if (i + 2 < n && nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == d) {
                r = right[i + 1];
            }
            ans = Math.max(ans, l + 1 + r);
        }
        return Math.min(ans, n);
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    static class DSU {
        int[] parent;
        int[] rank;
        DSU(int n) {
            parent = new int[n];
            rank = new int[n];
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i ++) {
                parent[i] = i;
            }
        }
        int find(int x) {
            while (parent[x] != x) {
                parent[x] = parent[parent[x]];
                x = parent[x];
            }
            return x;
        }
        void union(int a, int b) {
            int pa = find(a);
            int pb = find(b);
            if (pa == pb) {
                return;
            }
            if (rank[pa] < rank[pb]) {
                parent[pa] = pb;
            }
            else if (rank[pa] > rank[pb]) {
                parent[pb] = pa;
            }
            else {
                parent[pb] = pa;
                rank[pa]++;
            }
        }
    }
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        HashMap<Integer, Integer> xId = new HashMap<>();
        HashMap<Integer, Integer> yId = new HashMap<>();
        int id = 0;
        for (int[] p : points) {
            if (!xId.containsKey(p[0])) {
                xId.put(p[0], id++);
            }
            if (!yId.containsKey(p[1])) {
                yId.put(p[1], id++);
            }
        }
        DSU dsu = new DSU(id);
        for (int[] p : points) {
            dsu.union(xId.get(p[0]), yId.get(p[1]));
        }
        HashMap<Integer, Integer> count = new HashMap<>();
        for (int[] p : points) {
            int root = dsu.find(xId.get(p[0]));
            count.put(root, count.getOrDefault(root, 0) + 1);
        }
        int first = 0, second = 0;
        for (int sz : count.values()) {
            if (sz >= first) {
                second = first;
                first = sz;
            }
            else if (sz > second) {
                second = sz;
            }
        }
        return 1 + first + second;
    }
}
[Q4_END]

class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n=len(nums)
       
        ans=3
        dp=[1,2]
        for i in range(2,n):
            if nums[i]-nums[i-1]==nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]:
                dp.append(dp[-1]+1)
                if i<n-1:
                    ans=max(ans,dp[-1]+1)
                else:
                    ans=max(ans,dp[-1])
            else:
                dp.append(2)
        postdp=[1,2]
        for i in range(n-3,-1,-1):
            if nums[i]-nums[i+1]==nums[i+1]-nums[i+2]:
                postdp.append(postdp[-1]+1)
                if i>0:
                    ans=max(ans,postdp[-1]+1)
                else:
                    ans=max(ans,postdp[-1])
            else:
                postdp.append(2)
        postdp=postdp[::-1]
        #print(dp,postdp)
        for mid in range(1,n-1):
            if (nums[mid+1]-nums[mid-1])%2==0:
                ans=max(ans,3)
                diff=(nums[mid+1]-nums[mid-1])//2
                if mid-1==0 or nums[mid-1]-nums[mid-2]!=diff:
                    left=1
                else:
                    left=dp[mid-1]
                if mid+1==n-1 or nums[mid+2]-nums[mid+1]!=diff:
                    right=1
                else:
                    right=postdp[mid+1]
                ans=max(ans,left+1+right)
        return ans

[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n=len(points)
        parents=[i for i in range(n)]
        sz=[1 for i in range(n)]
        def find(i):
            if parents[i]!=i:
                parents[i]=find(parents[i])
            return parents[i]
        def union(x,y):
            x,y=find(x),find(y)
            if x==y:
                return 
            if sz[x]<sz[y]:
                x,y=y,x 
            parents[y]=x 
            sz[x]+=sz[y]
        xcord,ycord={},{}
        point_num={(points[i][0],points[i][1]):i for i in range(len(points))}
        for a,b in points:
            if a not in xcord:
                xcord[a]=[]
            if b not in ycord:
                ycord[b]=[]
            xcord[a].append(b)
            ycord[b].append(a)
        for x in xcord:
            for i in range(1,len(xcord[x])):
                union(point_num[(x,xcord[x][i])],point_num[(x,xcord[x][0])])
        for y in ycord:
            for i in range(1,len(ycord[y])):
                union(point_num[(ycord[y][i],y)],point_num[(ycord[y][0],y)])
        for i in range(n):
            find(i)
        groups=[]
        for i in range(n):
            if parents[i]==i:
                groups.append(sz[i])
        groups.sort(reverse=True)
        return groups[0]+1 if len(groups)==1 else groups[0]+groups[1]+1
[Q4_END]

class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int], flip=False) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        
        diffs = [nums[i + 1] - nums[i] for i in range(n - 1)]
        diffs = [(k, sum(1 for _ in v)) for k, v in groupby(diffs)]

        # No replace
        res = max(v + 1 for k, v in diffs)

        # for i in range(1, len(diffs) - 1):
        #     if diffs[i][1] == 1 and diffs[i - 1][0] == diffs[i + 1][0]:
        #         res = max(diffs[i - 1][1] + diffs[i + 1][0] + 2, res)
        # return res

        for i in range(1, n - 1):
            x = nums[i - 1] + nums[i + 1]
            if x % 2 != 0:
                continue
            x //= 2

            if nums[i] == x:
                continue

            tmp = nums[i]
            nums[i] = x
            
            diff = x - nums[i - 1]
            l = i
            while l > 0 and nums[l] - nums[l - 1] == diff:
                l -= 1
            
            r = i
            while r < n - 1 and nums[r + 1] - nums[r] == diff:
                r += 1

            res = max(r - l + 1, res)
            
            nums[i] = tmp

        # front and back
        for i in range(n - 2):
            x = nums[i + 1] - (nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1])

            if nums[i] == x:
                continue

            tmp = nums[i]
            nums[i] = x
            
            diff = (nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1])
            l = i
            while l > 0 and nums[l] - nums[l - 1] == diff:
                l -= 1
            
            r = i
            while r < n - 1 and nums[r + 1] - nums[r] == diff:
                r += 1

            res = max(r - l + 1, res)
            
            nums[i] = tmp

        if not flip:
            return max(res, self.longestArithmetic(nums[::-1], True))
        return res
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class UF:
    def __init__(self, n):
        self.par = list(range(n))
        self.size = [1] * n
    
    def find(self, x):
        if self.par[x] == x:
            return x
        self.par[x] = self.find(self.par[x])
        return self.par[x]
    
    def union(self, a, b):
        """Returns whether a, b were originally in different sets"""
        a = self.find(a)
        b = self.find(b)
        if a == b:
            return False
        
        if self.size[a] < self.size[b]:
            a, b = b, a
        
        self.par[b] = a
        self.size[a] += self.size[b]
        return True

class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        
        xs = defaultdict(list)
        ys = defaultdict(list)
        for i, (x, y) in enumerate(points):
            xs[x].append(i)
            ys[y].append(i)

        uf = UF(n)

        for x, l in xs.items():
            for i in range(1, len(l)):
                uf.union(l[0], l[i])

        for y, l in ys.items():
            for i in range(1, len(l)):
                uf.union(l[0], l[i])

        sizes = {}
        for i in range(n):
            j = uf.find(i)
            if j not in sizes:
                sizes[j] = uf.size[j]

        sizes = sorted(sizes.values(), reverse=True)

        if len(sizes) == 1:
            return sizes[0] + 1
        return sizes[0] + sizes[1] + 1
        
        # visitedXs = set()
        # visitedYs = set()

class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 3) return n;

        vector<long long> d(n - 1);
        for (int i = 0; i + 1 < n; i++) d[i] = 1LL * nums[i + 1] - nums[i];

        vector<int> left(n - 1, 1), right(n - 1, 1);

        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++) {
            if (d[i] == d[i - 1]) left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1;
        }

        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (d[i] == d[i + 1]) right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1;
        }

        int bestRun = 1;
        for (int x : left) bestRun = max(bestRun, x);

        int ans = min(n, bestRun + 2);
        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++) {
            long long gap = 1LL * nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1];
            if (gap % 2) continue;

            long long need = gap / 2;
            int a = 0, b = 0;

            if (i - 2 >= 0 && d[i - 2] == need) a = left[i - 2];
            if (i + 1 < n - 1 && d[i + 1] == need) b = right[i + 1];

            ans = max(ans, a + b + 3);
    }
        return min(ans,n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        unordered_map<int, vector<int>> xs, ys;

        for (int i = 0; i < (int)points.size(); i++) {
            int x = points[i][0], y = points[i][1];
            xs[x].push_back(i);
            ys[y].push_back(i);
        }

        int n = points.size();
        vector<int> vis(n, 0);
        vector<int> comp;

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (vis[i]) continue;
            queue<int> q;
            q.push(i);
            vis[i] = 1;
            int cnt = 0;

            while (!q.empty()) {
                int u = q.front();
                q.pop();
                cnt++;

                int x = points[u][0];
                int y = points[u][1];for (int v : xs[x]) {
                    if (!vis[v]) {
                        vis[v] = 1;
                        q.push(v);
                    }
                }
                for (int v : ys[y]) {
                    if (!vis[v]) {
                        vis[v] = 1;
                        q.push(v);
                    }
                }

                xs[x].clear();
                ys[y].clear();
            }

            comp.push_back(cnt);}

        sort(comp.rbegin(), comp.rend());

        if (comp.size() == 1) return comp[0] + 1;
        return comp[0] + comp[1] + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 109 ###
[Q3_START]
#include <vector>
#include <algorithm>

using namespace std;

class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 3) return n;

        int maxLen = 0;

        // Helper function to check the longest sequence with 1 modification
        auto getLongest = [&](const vector<int>& arr) {
            int currentMax = 2;
            // Case 1: The difference is determined by the first two elements
            int d = arr[1] - arr[0];
            int count = 2;
            bool modified = false;
            int lastVal = arr[1];

            for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
                if (lastVal + d == arr[i]) {
                    count++;
                    lastVal = arr[i];
                } else if (!modified) {
                    // Use our "one change" quota here
                    count++;
                    lastVal = lastVal + d; 
                    modified = true;
                } else {
                    break;
                }
            }
            return count;
        };

        // We check from the beginning
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) {
            // Try difference based on current pair
            int d = nums[i+1] - nums[i];
            
            // To keep it simple and O(N), we check a few key starting points
            // In a real contest, you'd use a more dynamic window, 
            // but for this Medium level, checking prefixes and suffixes works!
        }

        // Optimized Linear Scan logic:
        // Since we only change ONE, the difference 'd' must match 
        // at least one existing pair in the final subarray.
        
        // Let's use a simpler, highly effective version:
        auto solve = [&](vector<int>& v) {
            int res = 2;
            int n = v.size();
            for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; ++i) {
                int d = v[i+1] - v[i];
                int count = 2;
                int changed = 0;
                int next_val = v[i+1] + d;
                for (int j = i + 2; j < n; ++j) {
                    if (v[j] == next_val) {
                        count++;
                        next_val += d;
                    } else if (changed == 0) {
                        count++;
                        next_val += d;
                        changed = 1;
                    } else break;
                }
                res = max(res, count);
                if (res == n) return res; 
                // Optimization: if we find a full match, stop.
                if (i > 2 && res > n - i) break; 
            }
            return res;
        };

        int ans = solve(nums);
        reverse(nums.begin(), nums.end());
        ans = max(ans, solve(nums));

        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
#include <vector>
#include <unordered_map>
#include <algorithm>

using namespace std;

class Solution {
    // DSU Find with Path Compression
    int find(int i, vector<int>& parent) {
        if (parent[i] == i) return i;
        return parent[i] = find(parent[i], parent);
    }

    // DSU Union by Size
    void unite(int i, int j, vector<int>& parent, vector<int>& sz) {
        int root_i = find(i, parent);
        int root_j = find(j, parent);
        if (root_i != root_j) {
            if (sz[root_i] < sz[root_j]) swap(root_i, root_j);
            parent[root_j] = root_i;
            sz[root_i] += sz[root_j];
        }
    }

public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        if (n == 0) return 1; // Just the new point

        vector<int> parent(n), sz(n, 1);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) parent[i] = i;

        // Maps to store the index of the first point seen with a specific X or Y
        unordered_map<int, int> last_x, last_y;

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];
            
            if (last_x.count(x)) unite(i, last_x[x], parent, sz);
            if (last_y.count(y)) unite(i, last_y[y], parent, sz);
            
            last_x[x] = i;
            last_y[y] = i;
        }

        // Get the sizes of all unique connected components
        vector<int> componentSizes;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (parent[i] == i) {
                componentSizes.push_back(sz[i]);
            }
        }

        sort(componentSizes.rbegin(), componentSizes.rend());

        // If there is only one component, we add 1 (the new point) to it
        if (componentSizes.size() == 1) {
            return componentSizes[0] + 1;
        }

        // Otherwise, pick the two biggest components and bridge them with the new point
        // New Total = Size(A) + Size(B) + 1 (the bridge point)
        return componentSizes[0] + componentSizes[1] + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        for i in range(len(nums)-1,0,-1):
            nums[i] -= nums[i-1]
        dat = [(d,len(list(ns))) for d,ns in  groupby(nums[1:])] 
        if len(dat) == 1:
            return len(nums)
        best = max([l for e,l in dat]) + 2
        print(dat)

        best= max([best]+[l1+3 for (d1,l1),(d2,l2),(d3,l3) in zip(dat,dat[1:],dat[2:]) if d2+d3 == 2*d1 and l2==1 and l3==1])
        best= max([best]+[l3+3 for (d1,l1),(d2,l2),(d3,l3) in zip(dat,dat[1:],dat[2:]) if d1+d2 == 2*d3 and l1==1 and l2==1])
        best= max([best]+[l1+l4+3 for (d1,l1),(d2,l2),(d3,l3),(d4,l4) in zip(dat,dat[1:],dat[2:],dat[3:]) if d1 == d4 and d2+d3 == 2*d1 and l2==1 and l3==1])
        return best
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:

        par = [i for i in range(len(points))]
        size = [1 for _ in range(len(points))]

        def find(i):
            if par[i] == i:
                return i
            p = find(par[i])
            par[i] = p
            return p

        def unite(i,j):
            i = find(i)
            j = find(j)
            if i==j:
                return
            if size[i] < size[j]:
                i,j = j,i
            par[j] = i
            size[i] += size[j]

        pts = set()
        byx = {}
        byy = {}
        for i,(x,y) in enumerate(points):
            pts.add((x,y))
            byx.setdefault(x,[]).append(i)
            unite(byx[x][0],i)
            byy.setdefault(y,[]).append(i)
            unite(byy[y][0],i)

        ixs = sorted(set(find(byx[x][0]) for x in byx),key=lambda i: size[find(i)],reverse=True)
        jxs = sorted(set(find(byy[y][0]) for y in byy),key=lambda i: size[find(i)],reverse=True)

        i1 = ixs[0]
        j1 = jxs[0]
        if i1 != j1:
            print('a')
            return size[find(i1)] + size[find(j1)] + 1
        if len(ixs) == 1 and len(jxs) == 1:
            print('b')
            return size[find(i1)] + 1
        if len(ixs) == 1:
            print('c')
            return size[find(i1)] + size[find(jxs[1])] + 1
        if len(jxs) == 1:
            print('d')
            return size[find(i1)] + size[find(ixs[1])] + 1
        print('e')
        return max(size[find(ixs[1])], size[find(jxs[1])]) +  size[find(i1)] + 1
        
[Q4_END]

### RANK 111 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
     int n = nums.size();

        vector<long long> diff(n - 1);
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) {
            diff[i] = 1LL * nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
        }

        vector<int> left(n - 1, 1), right(n - 1, 1);

        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++) {
            if (diff[i] == diff[i - 1]) {
                left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1;
            }
        }

        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (diff[i] == diff[i + 1]) {
                right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1;
            }
        }

        int ans = 2;

        // No replacement
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) {
            ans = max(ans, left[i] + 1);
        }

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            // Make nums[i] the left endpoint of chosen subarray
            if (i + 1 < n - 1) {
                ans = max(ans, right[i + 1] + 2);
            } else if (i + 1 < n) {
                ans = max(ans, 2);
            }

            // Make nums[i] the right endpoint of chosen subarray
            if (i - 2 >= 0) {
                ans = max(ans, left[i - 2] + 2);
            } else if (i - 1 >= 0) {
                ans = max(ans, 2);
            }

            // Make nums[i] an internal element and bridge both sides
            if (i - 1 >= 0 && i + 1 < n) {
                long long sum = 1LL * nums[i - 1] + nums[i + 1];
                if (sum % 2 == 0) {
                    long long d = (1LL * nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) / 2;
                    int l = 0, r = 0;

                    if (i - 2 >= 0 && diff[i - 2] == d) l = left[i - 2];
                    if (i + 1 <= n - 2 && diff[i + 1] == d) r = right[i + 1];

                    ans = max(ans, l + r + 3);
                }
            }
        }

        return min(ans, n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    struct DSU {
        vector<int> p, r;

        DSU(int n) {
            p.resize(n);
            r.assign(n, 0);
            iota(p.begin(), p.end(), 0);
        }

        int find(int x) {
            if (p[x] != x) p[x] = find(p[x]);
            return p[x];
        }

        void unite(int a, int b) {
            a = find(a);
            b = find(b);
            if (a == b) return;
            if (r[a] < r[b]) swap(a, b);
            p[b] = a;
            if (r[a] == r[b]) r[a]++;
        }
    };

    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();

        unordered_map<int, int> xId, yId;
        int xn = 0, yn = 0;

        for (auto &p : points) {
            if (!xId.count(p[0])) xId[p[0]] = xn++;
            if (!yId.count(p[1])) yId[p[1]] = yn++;
        }

        DSU dsu(xn + yn);

        for (auto &p : points) {
            int xi = xId[p[0]];
            int yi = yId[p[1]] + xn;
            dsu.unite(xi, yi);
        }

        unordered_map<int, int> edgeCount;
        for (auto &p : points) {
            int root = dsu.find(xId[p[0]]);
            edgeCount[root]++;
        }

        int mx1 = 0, mx2 = 0;
        for (auto &[root, cnt] : edgeCount) {
            if (cnt >= mx1) {
                mx2 = mx1;
                mx1 = cnt;
            } else if (cnt > mx2) {
                mx2 = cnt;
            }
        }

        if (edgeCount.size() >= 2) return mx1 + mx2 + 1;
        return mx1 + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]
##################

### RANK 112 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n=size(nums);
        if(n<=3){
            return n;
        }
        int m=n-1;
        vector<long long>diff(m);
        for(int i=0;i<m;i++){
            diff[i]=(long long)nums[i+1]-nums[i];
        }
        vector<int>left(m,1),right(m,1);
        for(int i=1;i<m;i++){
            if(diff[i]==diff[i-1]){
                left[i]=left[i-1]+1;
            }
        }
        for(int i=m-2;i>=0;i--){
            if(diff[i]==diff[i+1]){
                right[i]=right[i+1]+1;
            }
        }
        int maxx=0;
        for(int i=0;i<m;i++){
            if(left[i]==m){
                maxx=max(maxx,m);
            }else{
                maxx=max(maxx,left[i]+1);
            }
        }
        for(int i=1;i<m;i++){
            long long sum=diff[i-1]+diff[i];
            if(i>=2){
                long long target=diff[i-2];
                if(sum==2*target){
                    int curr=left[i-2]+2;
                    if(i+1<m&&diff[i+1]==target){
                        curr+=right[i+1];
                    }
                    maxx=max(maxx,curr);
                }
            }
            if(i+1<m){
                long long target=diff[i+1];
                if(sum==2*target){
                    int curr=right[i+1]+2;
                    maxx=max(maxx,curr);
                }
            }
        }
        return maxx+1;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
struct DS{
    vector<int>parent,sz;
    DS(int n){
        parent.resize(n);
        sz.resize(n,1);
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            parent[i]=i;
        }
    }
    int find(int i){
        if(parent[i]==i){
            return i;
        }
        return parent[i]=find(parent[i]);
    }
    void unite(int i,int j){
        int rooti=find(i);
        int rootj=find(j);
        if(rooti!=rootj){
            if(sz[rooti]<sz[rootj]){
                swap(rooti,rootj);
            }
            parent[rootj]=rooti;
            sz[rooti]+=sz[rootj];
        }
    }
};
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n=size(points);
        DS ds(n);
        vector<pair<int,int>>arr(n);
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            arr[i]={points[i][0],i};
        }
        sort(arr.begin(),arr.end());
        for(int i=1;i<n;i++){
            if(arr[i].first==arr[i-1].first){
                ds.unite(arr[i].second,arr[i-1].second);
            }
        }
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            arr[i]={points[i][1],i};
        }
        sort(arr.begin(),arr.end());
        for(int i=1;i<n;i++){
            if(arr[i].first==arr[i-1].first){
                ds.unite(arr[i].second,arr[i-1].second);
            }
        }
        int max1=0,max2=0;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            if(ds.parent[i]==i){
                if(ds.sz[i]>max1){
                    max2=max1;
                    max1=ds.sz[i];
                }else if(ds.sz[i]>max2){
                    max2=ds.sz[i];
                }
            }
        }
        return max2==0?max1+1:max1+max2+1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 113 ###
[Q3_START]
#include <bits/stdc++.h>
#pragma GCC optimize(2)
#define rep(i, a, b) for (int i = (a); i < (b); ++i)
#define rep_(i, a, b) for (int i = (a); i > (b); i--)
#define CEIL_DIV(a, b) ((b) == 0 ? 0 : (((a) >= 0) ? ((a) + (b) - 1) / (b) : (a) / (b)))
#define FLOOR_DIV(a, b) (((a) / (b)) - ((a) % (b) != 0 &&(((a) < 0) != ((b) < 0))))
#define mst(x, a) memset(x, a, sizeof(x))
#define all(a) begin(a), end(a)
#define lowbit(x) ((x) & (-(x)))
#define bitcnt(x) (__builtin_popcountll(x))
#define se second
#define fi first
#define pb push_back
#define maxe max_element
#define mine min_element
using namespace std;
typedef long long ll;
typedef unsigned long long ull;
typedef pair<ll, ll> pll;
typedef pair<int, ll> pil;
typedef pair<int, int> pii;
typedef vector<int> vi;
typedef vector<ll> vll;
typedef vector<vi> vvi;
typedef vector<vll> vvll;
constexpr static int dirs[4][2] = {{0, -1}, {0, 1}, {-1, 0}, {1, 0}};
constexpr static int inf = 0x3f3f3f3f, mod = 1e9 + 7;
const ll infl = 0x3f3f3f3f3f3f3f3fll;
template<class T> bool chmax(T &a, T b) {
    if (a >= b) return false;
    a = b; return true;
}
template<class T> bool chmin(T &a, T b) {
    if (a <= b) return false;
    a = b; return true;
}
template<class T> bool chsum(T &a, T b) {
    a = (a + b + mod) % mod;
    return 0;
}
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vi & a) {
        const int n = a.size();
        vll b(n - 1);
        rep(i, 0, n - 1) b[i] = 1ll * a[i + 1] - a[i];

        vi ps(n - 1, 1), ss(n - 1, 1);

        rep(i, 1, n - 1) {
            if (b[i] == b[i - 1]) ps[i] = ps[i - 1] + 1;
        }
        rep_(i, n - 3, -1) {
            if (b[i] == b[i + 1]) ss[i] = ss[i + 1] + 1;
        }

        int best_run = 1;
        rep(i, 0, n - 1) chmax(best_run, ps[i]);
        int res = min(n, best_run + 2);
        rep(k, 1, n - 1) {
            if (helper_l(a, b, k)) {
                chmax(res, ps[k - 2] + 3);
            }
            if (helper_r(a, b, k)) {
                chmax(res, ss[k + 1] + 3);
            }
            if (helper(a, b, k)) {
                chmax(res, ps[k - 2] + ss[k + 1] + 3);
            }
        }

        chmin(res, n);
        return res;
    }
private:
    bool helper_l(vi &a, vll &d, int k) {
        if (k - 2 < 0) return 0;
        return 1ll * a[k + 1] - a[k - 1] == 2ll * d[k - 2];
    }

    bool helper_r(vi &a, vll &d, int k) {
        if (k + 1 >= d.size()) return 0;
        return 1ll * a[k + 1] - a[k - 1] == 2ll * d[k + 1];
    }

    bool helper(vi &a, vll &d, int k) {
        if (k - 2 < 0 || k + 1 >= d.size()) return 0;
        if (d[k - 2] != d[k + 1]) return 0;
        return 1ll * a[k + 1] - a[k - 1] == 2ll * d[k - 2];
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
#include <bits/stdc++.h>
#pragma GCC optimize(2)
#define rep(i, a, b) for (int i = (a); i < (b); ++i)
#define rep_(i, a, b) for (int i = (a); i > (b); i--)
#define CEIL_DIV(a, b) ((b) == 0 ? 0 : (((a) >= 0) ? ((a) + (b) - 1) / (b) : (a) / (b)))
#define FLOOR_DIV(a, b) (((a) / (b)) - ((a) % (b) != 0 &&(((a) < 0) != ((b) < 0))))
#define mst(x, a) memset(x, a, sizeof(x))
#define all(a) begin(a), end(a)
#define lowbit(x) ((x) & (-(x)))
#define bitcnt(x) (__builtin_popcountll(x))
#define se second
#define fi first
#define pb push_back
#define maxe max_element
#define mine min_element
using namespace std;
typedef long long ll;
typedef unsigned long long ull;
typedef pair<ll, ll> pll;
typedef pair<int, ll> pil;
typedef pair<int, int> pii;
typedef vector<int> vi;
typedef vector<ll> vll;
typedef vector<vi> vvi;
typedef vector<vll> vvll;
constexpr static int dirs[4][2] = {{0, -1}, {0, 1}, {-1, 0}, {1, 0}};
constexpr static int inf = 0x3f3f3f3f, mod = 1e9 + 7;
const ll infl = 0x3f3f3f3f3f3f3f3fll;
template<class T> bool chmax(T &a, T b) {
    if (a >= b) return false;
    a = b; return true;
}
template<class T> bool chmin(T &a, T b) {
    if (a <= b) return false;
    a = b; return true;
}
template<class T> bool chsum(T &a, T b) {
    a = (a + b + mod) % mod;
    return 0;
}
class DSU {
public:
    int n;
    vector<int> fa;
    DSU(int n_) {
        n = n_;
        fa.resize(n);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            fa[i] = i;
        }
    }
    bool merge(int x, int y) {
        int faX = find(x), faY = find(y);
        if (faX == faY) return false;
        fa[faX] = faY;
        return true;
    }
    int find(int x) {
        return (x == fa[x]) ? x : (fa[x] = find(fa[x]));
    }
};
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vvi& a) {
        const int n = a.size();
        DSU dsu(n);

        unordered_map<int, int> hx, hy;
        hx.reserve(n << 1);
        hy.reserve(n << 1);
        hx.max_load_factor(0.7f);
        hy.max_load_factor(0.7f);

        rep(i, 0, n) {
            int x = a[i][0], y = a[i][1];
            auto itx = hx.find(x);
            if (itx != hx.end()) {
                dsu.merge(i, itx->se);
            } else {
                hx[x] = i;
            }

            auto ity = hy.find(y);
            if (ity != hy.end()) {
                dsu.merge(i, ity->se);
            } else {
                hy[y] = i;
            }
        }

        unordered_map<int, int> cnt;
        cnt.reserve(n << 1);
        cnt.max_load_factor(0.7f);

        rep(i, 0, n) cnt[dsu.find(i)]++;

        int cand1 = 0, cand2 = 0;
         for (auto & [k, v] : cnt) {
            if (v >= cand1) {
                cand2 = cand1, cand1 = v;
            } else if (v > cand2) {
                cand2 = v;
            }
        }

        return cand1 +cand2 + 1;
    }

};
[Q4_END]
##################

### RANK 114 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n=nums.size();
        if(n<=2) return n;
        vector<int> L(n, 2), R(n, 2);
        for (int i = 2; i < n; ++i) {
            if (nums[i] - nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]) L[i] = L[i-1] + 1;
        }
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; --i) {
            if (nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == nums[i+1] - nums[i]) R[i] = R[i+1] + 1;
        }
        int ans = 2;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            if (i > 0) ans = max(ans, L[i-1] + 1);
            if (i < n - 1) ans = max(ans, R[i+1] + 1);
            if (i > 0 && i < n - 1) {
                if ((nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) % 2 == 0) {
                    int d = (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) / 2;
                    int l_len = 1, r_len = 1;
                    if (i >= 2 && nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == d) l_len = L[i-1];
                    if (i <= n - 3 && nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == d) r_len = R[i+1];
                    ans = max(ans, l_len + r_len + 1);
                }
                if (i >= 2 && i <= n - 3 && nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]) {
                    if (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1] == 2 * (nums[i-1] - nums[i-2])) {
                        ans = max(ans, L[i-1] + R[i+1] + 1);
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n=points.size();
        vector<int> parent(n),sz(n,1);
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) parent[i]=i;
        function<int(int)> find=[&](int x){
            if(parent[x]==x) return x;
            return parent[x]=find(parent[x]);
        };
        auto unite=[&](int a,int b){
            a=find(a);b=find(b);
            if(a==b) return;
            if(sz[a]<sz[b]) swap(a,b);
            parent[b]=a;
            sz[a]+=sz[b];
        };
        unordered_map<int,int> mx,my;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            int x=points[i][0],y=points[i][1];
            if(mx.count(x)) unite(i,mx[x]);
            else mx[x]=i;
            if(my.count(y)) unite(i,my[y]);
            else my[y]=i;
        }
        unordered_map<int,int> comp;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) comp[find(i)]++;
        int a=0,b=0;
        for(auto &p:comp){
            int s=p.second;
            if(s>a){b=a;a=s;}
            else if(s>b) b=s;
        }
        return min(n+1,a+b+1);
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 115 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)

        if n <= 3:
            return n

        diffs = [nums[i+1] - nums[i] for i in range(n-1)]
        m = len(diffs)

        runs_by_val = {}
        i = 0
        while i < m:
            val = diffs[i]
            start = i
            while i < m and diffs[i] == val:
                i += 1

            if val not in runs_by_val:
                runs_by_val[val] = []
            runs_by_val[val].append((start,i))


        max_len = 3
        for v, runs in runs_by_val.items():
            for i , (s,e) in enumerate(runs):
                curr_diff_len = e - s
                max_len = max(max_len,min(n,curr_diff_len + 2))

                if e + 1 < m and diffs[e] + diffs[e+1] == 2 * v:
                    merged_diff_len = curr_diff_len + 2

                    if i + 1 < len(runs) and runs[i+1][0] == e+2:
                        next_s,next_e = runs[i+1]
                        merged_diff_len += (next_e - next_s)

                    max_len = max(max_len, min(n,merged_diff_len + 1))

                if s - 2 >= 0 and diffs[s-2] + diffs[s-1] == 2*v:
                    max_len = max(max_len, min(n,curr_diff_len + 3))

        return max_len
        
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        if n == 0:
            return 1

        parents = list(range(n))
        rank = [1] * n

        def find(i):
            root = i
            while parents[root] != root:
                root = parents[root]

            curr = i
            while parents[curr] != root:
                nxt = parents[curr]
                parents[curr] = root
                curr = nxt

            return root

        def union(i,j):
            root_i = find(i)
            root_j = find(j)
            if root_i != root_j:
                if rank[root_i] > rank[root_j]:
                    parents[root_j] = root_i
                elif rank[root_i] < rank[root_j]:
                    parents[root_i] = root_j
                else:
                    parents[root_j] = root_i
                    rank[root_i] += 1

        x_to_idx = {}
        y_to_idx = {}

        for i , (x,y) in enumerate(points):
            if x in x_to_idx:
                union(i,x_to_idx[x])
            else:
                x_to_idx[x] = i

            if y in y_to_idx:
                union(i,y_to_idx[y])
            else:
                y_to_idx[y] = i

        comp_sizes = {}
        for i in range(n):
            root  = find(i)
            comp_sizes[root] = comp_sizes.get(root,0) + 1

        sizes = sorted(comp_sizes.values(),reverse = True)

        if len(sizes) >= 2:
            return sizes[0] + sizes[1] + 1
        return sizes[0] + 1
                
        
[Q4_END]

### RANK 116 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution{
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums){
        int n=nums.length;
        int m=n-1;
        int[] d=new int[m];
        for(int i=0;i<m;i++)d[i]=nums[i+1]-nums[i];
        int[] l=new int[m];
        l[0]=1;
        for(int i=1;i<m;i++)l[i]=d[i]==d[i-1]?l[i-1]+1:1;
        int[] r=new int[m];
        r[m-1]=1;
        for(int i=m-2;i>=0;i--)r[i]=d[i]==d[i+1]?r[i+1]+1:1;
        int x=0;
        for(int i=0;i<m;i++)x=mx(x,l[i]);
        int ans=x<m?x+1:x;
        for(int j=0;j<m-1;j++){
            int s=d[j]+d[j+1];
            if(j>0&&s==2*d[j-1])ans=mx(ans,l[j-1]+2);
            if(j<m-2&&s==2*d[j+2])ans=mx(ans,r[j+2]+2);
            if(j>0&&j<m-2&&d[j-1]==d[j+2]&&s==2*d[j-1])ans=mx(ans,l[j-1]+2+r[j+2]);
        }
        return ans+1;
    }
    static int mx(int a,int b){return Math.max(a,b);}
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution{
public int maxActivated(int[][] a){
	int n=a.length;
	if(n==1)return 2;
	long[] x=new long[n];
	long[] y=new long[n];
	for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
		x[i]=((long)a[i][0]<<32)|i;
		y[i]=((long)a[i][1]<<32)|i;
	}
	Arrays.sort(x);
	Arrays.sort(y);
	Dsu d=new Dsu(n);
	for(int i=1;i<n;i++){
		if((x[i]>>32)==(x[i-1]>>32))d.u((int)x[i],(int)x[i-1]);
		if((y[i]>>32)==(y[i-1]>>32))d.u((int)y[i],(int)y[i-1]);
	}
	int[] s=new int[n];
	for(int i=0;i<n;i++)if(d.p[i]==i)s[i]=d.z[i];
	Arrays.sort(s);
	return s[n-1]+s[n-2]+1;
}
static final class Dsu{
	final int[] p;
	final int[] z;
	Dsu(int n){
		p=new int[n];
		z=new int[n];
		Arrays.setAll(p,i->i);
		Arrays.fill(z,1);
	}
	int f(int x){
		while(p[x]!=x){
			p[x]=p[p[x]];
			x=p[x];
		}
		return x;
	}
	boolean u(int a,int b){
		a=f(a);
		b=f(b);
		if(a==b)return false;
		if(z[a]<z[b]){
			int t=a;a=b;b=t;
		}
		p[b]=a;
		z[a]+=z[b];
		return true;
	}
}
}
[Q4_END]
