// COPY ALL MACROS BELOW

typedef long long LL;
#define MP make_pair
#define PB push_back
#define F first
#define S second
#define LB lower_bound
#define UB upper_bound
#define SZ(x) ((int)x.size())
#define LEN(x) ((int)x.length())
#define ALL(x) begin(x), end(x)
#define RSZ resize
#define ASS assign
#define REV(x) reverse(x.begin(), x.end());
#define trav(a, x) for (auto& a : x)
typedef pair<LL, LL> PL;
typedef vector<LL> VL;
typedef vector<PL> VPL;
typedef vector<VL> VVL;
typedef vector<VVL> VVVL;
typedef vector<VVVL> VVVVL;
typedef vector<string> VS;
typedef pair<int, int> PI;
typedef vector<int> VI;
typedef vector<PI> VPI;
typedef vector<vector<int>> VVI;
typedef vector<vector<PI>> VVPI;
#define MAX(x) *max_element(ALL(x))
#define MIN(x) *min_element(ALL(x))
#define FOR(i, n) for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) 
#define FOR1(i, n) for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) 
#define SORT(x) sort(x.begin(), x.end())
#define RSORT(x) sort(x.rbegin(), x.rend())
#define SUM(x) accumulate(x.begin(), x.end(), 0LL)
#define MMAX(n, x)  n = max(n, x)
#define MMIN(n, x)  n = min(n, x)

#define MOD7 1000000007
#define MOD9 1000000009
#define MOD3 998244353


class Solution {
public:
	int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
		LL n = nums.size(), i, j, k, ans = 2, d;

		VPL v;
		FOR(i, n - 1) {
			d = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
			if (!v.empty() && (v.back().first == d)) v.back().second++;
			else v.push_back({ d, 1 });
		}


		LL m = v.size();
		FOR(i, m) {
			MMAX(ans, v[i].second + 2);
			if ((i + 3 < m) && (v[i].first == v[i + 3].first) && (v[i + 1].first + v[i + 2].first == 2 * v[i].first) 
				&& (v[i + 1].second == 1) && (v[i + 2].second == 1)) {
				MMAX(ans, v[i].second + 3 + v[i + 3].second);
			}
			if ((i + 2 < m) && (v[i + 1].first + v[i + 2].first == 2 * v[i].first)
				&& (v[i + 1].second == 1) && (v[i + 2].second == 1)) {
				MMAX(ans, v[i].second + 3);
			}
			if ((i + 2 < m) && (v[i].first + v[i + 1].first == 2 * v[i + 2].first)
				&& (v[i + 1].second == 1) && (v[i].second == 1)) {
				MMAX(ans, v[i + 2].second + 3);
			}
		}


		MMIN(ans, n);

		return ans;
	}
}; 
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]


// COPY ALL MACROS BELOW

typedef long long LL;
#define MP make_pair
#define PB push_back
#define F first
#define S second
#define LB lower_bound
#define UB upper_bound
#define SZ(x) ((int)x.size())
#define LEN(x) ((int)x.length())
#define ALL(x) begin(x), end(x)
#define RSZ resize
#define ASS assign
#define REV(x) reverse(x.begin(), x.end());
#define trav(a, x) for (auto& a : x)
typedef pair<LL, LL> PL;
typedef vector<LL> VL;
typedef vector<PL> VPL;
typedef vector<VL> VVL;
typedef vector<VVL> VVVL;
typedef vector<VVVL> VVVVL;
typedef vector<string> VS;
typedef pair<int, int> PI;
typedef vector<int> VI;
typedef vector<PI> VPI;
typedef vector<vector<int>> VVI;
typedef vector<vector<PI>> VVPI;
#define MAX(x) *max_element(ALL(x))
#define MIN(x) *min_element(ALL(x))
#define FOR(i, n) for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) 
#define FOR1(i, n) for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) 
#define SORT(x) sort(x.begin(), x.end())
#define RSORT(x) sort(x.rbegin(), x.rend())
#define SUM(x) accumulate(x.begin(), x.end(), 0LL)
#define MMAX(n, x)  n = max(n, x)
#define MMIN(n, x)  n = min(n, x)

#define MOD7 1000000007
#define MOD9 1000000009
#define MOD3 998244353


// Union-Find Disjoint Sets Library written in OOP manner, using both path compression and union by rank heuristics
// initialize: UnionFind UF(N)

class UnionFind {                                              // OOP style
private:
public:
    vector<int> p, rank, setSize, minn, maxx;
    // p = path toward the root of disjoint set; p[i] = i means it is root
    // rank = upper bound of the actual height of the tree; not reliable as accurate measure
    // setSize = size of each disjoint set

    int numSets;
    LL total;

    UnionFind(int N) {
        total = 0;
        setSize.assign(N, 1);
        numSets = N;
        rank.assign(N, 0);
        minn.resize(N);
        maxx.resize(N);
        p.assign(N, 0);
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) {
            p[i] = i;	// each belongs to its own set
            minn[i] = i;
            maxx[i] = i;
        }

    }

    int findSet(int i) {
        return (p[i] == i) ? i : (p[i] = findSet(p[i]));		// path compression: cut short of the path if possible
    }

    bool isSameSet(int i, int j) {
        return findSet(i) == findSet(j);
    }

    void unionSet(int i, int j) {
        if (!isSameSet(i, j)) {
            numSets--;
            int x = findSet(i), y = findSet(j);
            // rank is used to keep the tree short

            LL sx = setSize[x], sy = setSize[y], sxy = sx + sy;
            total = total - sx * (sx - 1) / 2 - sy * (sy - 1) / 2 + sxy * (sxy - 1) / 2;

            if (rank[x] > rank[y]) {
                p[y] = x; setSize[x] += setSize[y];
                minn[x] = min(minn[x], minn[y]);
                maxx[x] = max(maxx[x], maxx[y]);
            }
            else {
                p[x] = y; setSize[y] += setSize[x];
                if (rank[x] == rank[y]) rank[y]++;

                minn[y] = min(minn[x], minn[y]);
                maxx[y] = max(maxx[x], maxx[y]);
            }
        }
    }

    int numDisjointSets() {		// # of disjoint sets
        return numSets;
    }

    int sizeOfSet(int i) {		// size of set
        return setSize[findSet(i)];
    }
};


class Solution {
public:
	int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
		int n = points.size(), i, j, k, ans, m;

        map<int, int> xid, yid;
        FOR(i, n) {
            xid[points[i][0]] = 0;
            yid[points[i][1]] = 0;
        }

        m = 0;
        for (auto p : xid) xid[p.first] = m++;
        for (auto p : yid) yid[p.first] = m++;

        UnionFind uf(m);
        FOR(i, n) {
            uf.unionSet(xid[points[i][0]], yid[points[i][1]]);
        }

        VL ct(m, 0);
        FOR(i, n) ct[uf.findSet(xid[points[i][0]])]++;

        VL maxx;
        FOR(i, m) {
            if (uf.findSet(i) == i) maxx.push_back(ct[i]);
        }
        RSORT(maxx);

        if (maxx.size() == 1) ans = maxx[0] + 1;
        else ans = maxx[0] + maxx[1] + 1;


		return ans;
	}
}; 
[Q4_END]

### RANK 118 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        vector<int> d(n - 1), L(n - 1, 1), R(n - 1, 1);

        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; ++i)
            d[i] = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];

        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; ++i)
            if (d[i] == d[i - 1])
                L[i] = L[i - 1] + 1;

        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; --i)
            if (d[i] == d[i + 1])
                R[i] = R[i + 1] + 1;

        int ans = 2, run = 1;
        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; ++i) {
            run = (d[i] == d[i - 1]) ? run + 1 : 1;
            ans = max(ans, run + 1);
        }

        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            if (i > 0)
                ans = max(ans, (i >= 2 ? L[i - 2] : 0) + 2);
            if (i < n - 1)
                ans = max(ans, (i <= n - 3 ? R[i + 1] : 0) + 2);

            if(i > 0 && i < n - 1) {
                long long gap = 1LL * nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1];
                if (gap % 2 == 0) {
                    int D = gap / 2;
                    int left = (i >= 2 && d[i - 2] == D) ? L[i - 2] : 0;
                    int right = (i <= n - 3 && d[i + 1] == D) ? R[i + 1] : 0;
                    ans = max(ans, left + right + 3);
                }
            }
        }

        return min(ans, n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU {
public:
    vector<int> p, r;
    DSU(int n) : p(n), r(n, 0) {
        iota(p.begin(), p.end(), 0);
    }
    int find(int x) {
        if (p[x] == x) return x;
        return p[x] = find(p[x]);
    }
    void unite(int a, int b) {
        a = find(a), b = find(b);
        if (a == b) return;
        if (r[a] < r[b]) swap(a, b);
        p[b] = a;
        if (r[a] == r[b]) r[a]++;
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
         int n = points.size();
        unordered_map<int, int> xid, yid;

        for (auto &pt : points) {
            if (!xid.count(pt[0])) xid[pt[0]] = xid.size();
            if (!yid.count(pt[1])) yid[pt[1]] = yid.size();
        }

        int x = xid.size(), y = yid.size();
        DSU dsu(x + y);

        for (auto &pt : points) {
            int xi = xid[pt[0]];
            int yi = x + yid[pt[1]];
            dsu.unite(xi, yi);
        }

        unordered_map<int, int> cnt;
        for (auto &pt : points) {
            int root = dsu.find(xid[pt[0]]);
            cnt[root]++;
        }

        int a = 0, b = 0;
        for (auto &it : cnt) {
            int v = it.second;
            if (v > a) {
                b = a;
                a = v;
            } else if (v > b) {
                b = v;
            }
        }

        return 1 + a + b;
    }
};
[Q4_END]
##################

### RANK 119 ###
[Q3_START]
using ll = long long;
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        vector<int> d(n - 1);
        for(int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) d[i] = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
        vector<int> l(n-1, 1), r(n-1, 1);
        for(int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++){
            if(d[i] == d[i - 1]) l[i] = l[i - 1] + 1;
        }
        for(int i = n - 3; i > -1; i--){
            if(d[i] == d[i + 1]) r[i] = r[i + 1] + 1;
        }
        int res = 0;
        for(int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) res = max(res, l[i]);
        res = max(res, 1 + l[n - 3]);
        res = max(res, 1 + r[1]);
        for(int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++){
            if(i >= 2) res = max(res, l[i - 2] + 1);
            if(i + 1 < n - 1) res = max(res, r[i + 1] + 1);
            ll s = (ll)d[i - 1] + d[i];
            if(s % 2 == 0){
                ll dd = s >> 1;
                int c = 2;
                if(i >= 2 && d[i - 2] == dd) c += l[i - 2];
                if(i + 1 < n - 1 && d[i + 1] == dd) c += r[i + 1];
                res = max(res, c);
            }
        }
        return res + 1;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
struct pd {
    int id;
    int x;
    int y;
};
struct dsu {
    vector<int> p, s;
    dsu(int n){
        p.resize(n);
        s.assign(n, 1);
        iota(begin(p), end(p), 0);
    }
    int f(int u){
        if(u == p[u]) return u;
        return p[u] = f(p[u]);
    }
    void merge(int u, int v){
        int ulpu = f(u);
        int ulpv = f(v);
        if(ulpu != ulpv){
            if(s[ulpu] < s[ulpv]) swap(ulpu, ulpv);
            p[ulpv] = ulpu;
            s[ulpu] += s[ulpv];
        }
    }
};
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        vector<pd> arr(n);
        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++) arr[i] = {i, points[i][0], points[i][1]};
        dsu hrj(n);
        sort(begin(arr), end(arr), [&](pd &a, pd &b){
            return a.x < b.x;
        });
        for(int i = 1; i < n; i++){
            if(arr[i].x == arr[i - 1].x){
                hrj.merge(arr[i].id, arr[i - 1].id);
            }
        }
        sort(begin(arr), end(arr), [&](pd &a, pd &b){
            return a.y < b.y;
        });
        for(int i = 1; i < n; i++){
            if(arr[i].y == arr[i - 1].y){
                hrj.merge(arr[i].id, arr[i - 1].id);
            }
        }
        vector<int> comp;
        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++){
            if(hrj.p[i] == i){
                comp.push_back(hrj.s[i]);
            }
        }
        sort(rbegin(comp), rend(comp));
        if(comp.size() >= 2) return comp[0] + comp[1] + 1;
        if(comp.size() == 0) return 1;
        return comp[0] + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]
##################

### RANK 120 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 3:
            return n
        diff = [y - x for x, y in pairwise(nums)]
        
        left = [1] * (n - 1)
        for i in range(1, n - 1):
            if diff[i] == diff[i - 1]:
                left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1

        right = [1] * (n - 1)
        for i in range(n - 3, -1, -1):
            if diff[i] == diff[i + 1]:
                right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1

        ans = max(max(left), max(right)) + 1
        if ans > n - 1:
            ans = n - 1
        for i in range(1, n - 1):
            res = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]
            if res % 2 == 0:
                res //= 2
                cnt = 2
                if i + 1 < n - 1 and diff[i + 1] == res:
                    cnt += right[i + 1]
                if i - 2 >= 0 and diff[i - 2] == res:
                    cnt += left[i - 2]
                if cnt > ans:
                    ans = cnt
        return ans + 1

[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]

[Q4_END]

### RANK 121 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        pfx = [0]*n
        sfx = [0]*n
        for i in range(n):
            if i == 0:
                pfx[i] = 1
            elif i == 1:
                pfx[i] = 2
            else:
                if nums[i] - nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]:
                    pfx[i] = pfx[i-1] + 1
                else:
                    pfx[i] = 2
        for i in reversed(range(n)):
            if i == n-1:
                sfx[i] = 1
            elif i == n-2:
                sfx[i] = 2
            else:
                if nums[i] - nums[i+1] == nums[i+1] - nums[i+2]:
                    sfx[i] = sfx[i+1] + 1
                else:
                    sfx[i] = 2
        print(pfx)
        print(sfx)
        ans = 0
        for i in range(n):
            ans = max(ans, pfx[i])
            ans = max(ans, sfx[i])
            if i > 0:
                ans = max(ans, pfx[i-1] + 1)
            if i < n-1:
                ans = max(ans, sfx[i+1] + 1)
            if 0 < i < n-1 and (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) % 2 == 0:
                ans = max(ans, 3)
            if 1 < i < n-1 and 2*(nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]) == (nums[i+1]-nums[i-1]) :
                ans = max(ans, pfx[i-1] + 2)
            if 0 < i < n-2 and 2*(nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]) == (nums[i+1]-nums[i-1]) :
                ans = max(ans, sfx[i+1] + 2)
            if 1 < i < n-2 and nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] and 2*(nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]) == (nums[i+1]-nums[i-1]):
                ans = max(ans, pfx[i-1] + sfx[i+1] + 1)
        return ans
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
from collections import defaultdict
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)

        mapx = defaultdict(list)
        mapy = defaultdict(list)
        for i, (x,y) in enumerate(points):
            mapx[x].append(i)
            mapy[y].append(i)
        
        graph = [ [] for _ in range(n)]
        for x in mapx:
            vect = mapx[x]
            for i in range(1, len(vect)):
                graph[vect[i-1]].append(vect[i])
                graph[vect[i]].append(vect[i-1])
        for y in mapy:
            vect = mapy[y]
            for i in range(1, len(vect)):
                graph[vect[i-1]].append(vect[i])
                graph[vect[i]].append(vect[i-1])
        
        # print(graph)

        compsizes = []
        seen = [False]*n
        def dfs(node):
            if seen[node]: return 0
            seen[node] = True
            sz = 1
            for child in graph[node]:
                sz += dfs(child)
            return sz
        for i in range(n):
            if seen[i]: continue
            compsizes.append(dfs(i))

        if len(compsizes) == 1:
            return 1 + compsizes[0]
        m1 = max(compsizes)
        i1 = compsizes.index(m1)
        compsizes[i1] = -1
        m2 = max(compsizes)
        return m1 + m2 + 1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 123 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        int ans = 2;
        vector<int> fwd(n, 1), bwd(n, 1);

        for (int i = 1; i < n; i++) {
            if (i >= 2 && nums[i]-nums[i-1] == nums[i-1]-nums[i-2])
                fwd[i] = fwd[i-1] + 1;
            else
                fwd[i] = 2;
        }
        for (int i = n-2; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (i+2 < n && nums[i+1]-nums[i] == nums[i+2]-nums[i+1])
                bwd[i] = bwd[i+1] + 1;
            else
                bwd[i] = 2;
        }

        for (auto x : fwd) ans = max(ans, x);

        for (int i = 1; i < n-1; i++) {
            int dl = (i >= 2)    ? nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] : INT_MIN;
            int dr = (i+2 < n)   ? nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] : INT_MIN;

            auto left_len = [&](int d) -> int {
                if (i < 2) return 1;
                return (nums[i-1]-nums[i-2] == d) ? fwd[i-1] : 1;
            };

            auto right_len = [&](int d) -> int {
                if (i+2 >= n) return 1;
                return (nums[i+2]-nums[i+1] == d) ? bwd[i+1] : 1;
            };

            if (dl != INT_MIN) {
                if (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1] == 2*dl) {
                    ans = max(ans, min(left_len(dl) + right_len(dl) + 1, n));
                }
                ans = max(ans, min(fwd[i-1] + 1, n));
            }

            if (dr != INT_MIN) {
                if (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1] == 2*dr) {
                    ans = max(ans, min(left_len(dr) + right_len(dr) + 1, n));
                }
                ans = max(ans, min(bwd[i+1] + 1, n)); // extend right run alone
            }

            if (dl == INT_MIN) ans = max(ans, min(bwd[i+1] + 1, n));
            if (dr == INT_MIN) ans = max(ans, min(fwd[i-1] + 1, n));
        }

        ans = max(ans, min(bwd[1]   + 1, n));
        ans = max(ans, min(fwd[n-2] + 1, n));

        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        unordered_map<long long, long long> parent;
        unordered_map<long long, int> sz;

        function<long long(long long)> find = [&](long long x) -> long long {
            if (!parent.count(x)) { parent[x] = x; sz[x] = 1; }
            if (parent[x] != x) parent[x] = find(parent[x]);
            return parent[x];
        };
        
        auto unite = [&](long long a, long long b) {
            a = find(a); b = find(b);
            if (a == b) return;
            if (sz[a] < sz[b]) swap(a, b);
            parent[b] = a;
            sz[a] += sz[b];
        };

        for (auto& p : points) {
            long long xnode = (long long)p[0] * 2;
            long long ynode = (long long)p[1] * 2 + 1;
            find(xnode); find(ynode);
            unite(xnode, ynode);
        }

        unordered_map<long long, int> pointsInComp;
        for (auto& p : points)
            pointsInComp[find((long long)p[0] * 2)]++;

        int ans = 1;
        for (auto& [root, cnt] : pointsInComp)
            ans = max(ans, cnt + 1);

        vector<int> comp_sizes;
        for (auto& [root, cnt] : pointsInComp)
            comp_sizes.push_back(cnt);
        sort(comp_sizes.rbegin(), comp_sizes.rend());

        if (comp_sizes.size() >= 2)
            ans = max(ans, comp_sizes[0] + comp_sizes[1] + 1);

        return ans;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 124 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 2) return n;

        vector<int> left(n, 1), right(n, 1);

        left[1] = 2;
        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            if ((long long)nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == (long long)nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2])
                left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1;
            else
                left[i] = 2;
        }

        right[n - 2] = 2;
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if ((long long)nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == (long long)nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1])
                right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1;
            else
                right[i] = 2;
        }

        int ans = 2;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) ans = max(ans, left[i]); // no replacement

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            // Use the replacement only to extend one side by 1
            if (i > 0) ans = max(ans, left[i - 1] + 1);
            if (i + 1 < n) ans = max(ans, right[i + 1] + 1);

            // Try to bridge both sides by changing nums[i]
            if (i > 0 && i + 1 < n) {
                long long gap = (long long)nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1];
                if (gap % 2 == 0) {
                    long long d = gap / 2;

                    int L = 1; // only nums[i-1]
                    int R = 1; // only nums[i+1]

                    if (i >= 2 && (long long)nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == d)
                        L = left[i - 1];

                    if (i + 2 < n && (long long)nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == d)
                        R = right[i + 1];

                    ans = max(ans, L + R + 1);
                }
            }
        }

        return min(ans, n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        if (n == 0) return 1;

        // Compress x and y coordinates
        unordered_map<int, int> xId, yId;
        int xCnt = 0, yCnt = 0;

        for (auto &p : points) {
            if (!xId.count(p[0])) xId[p[0]] = xCnt++;
            if (!yId.count(p[1])) yId[p[1]] = yCnt++;
        }

        int totalNodes = xCnt + yCnt;
        vector<vector<int>> g(totalNodes);

        // Build bipartite graph:
        // x node = [0 .. xCnt-1]
        // y node = [xCnt .. xCnt+yCnt-1]
        for (auto &p : points) {
            int x = xId[p[0]];
            int y = xCnt + yId[p[1]];
            g[x].push_back(y);
            g[y].push_back(x);
        }

        vector<int> vis(totalNodes, 0);
        vector<int> compEdgeSizes;     // number of original points in each component
        vector<bool> compHasMissing;   // whether component is not complete bipartite

        for (int start = 0; start < totalNodes; start++) {
            if (vis[start] || g[start].empty()) continue;

            queue<int> q;
            q.push(start);
            vis[start] = 1;

            long long xNodes = 0, yNodes = 0, degSum = 0;

            while (!q.empty()) {
                int u = q.front();
                q.pop();

                degSum += g[u].size();
                if (u < xCnt) xNodes++;
                else yNodes++;

                for (int v : g[u]) {
                    if (!vis[v]) {
                        vis[v] = 1;
                        q.push(v);
                    }
                }
            }

            long long edges = degSum / 2; // each point counted twice
            compEdgeSizes.push_back((int)edges);
            compHasMissing.push_back(edges < xNodes * yNodes);
        }

        // Sort component sizes descending
        vector<int> sizes = compEdgeSizes;
        sort(sizes.begin(), sizes.end(), greater<int>());

        int ans = sizes[0] + 1; // connect largest component to a new coordinate

        // Connect two largest components
        if (sizes.size() >= 2) {
            ans = max(ans, sizes[0] + sizes[1] + 1);
        }

        // Add inside a component if it is not complete bipartite
        for (int i = 0; i < (int)compEdgeSizes.size(); i++) {
            if (compHasMissing[i]) {
                ans = max(ans, compEdgeSizes[i] + 1);
            }
        }

        return ans;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 125 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)

        diff = [nums[i+1] - nums[i] for i in range(n-1)]
        m = n - 1

        L = [1] * m
        for i in range(1, m):
            if diff[i] == diff[i-1]:
                L[i] = L[i-1] + 1

        R = [1] * m
        for i in range(m-2, -1, -1):
            if diff[i] == diff[i+1]:
                R[i] = R[i+1] + 1

        ans = max(L) + 1
        
        for i in range(m):
            run = L[i]
            start = i - run + 1
            end = i
            if start > 0 or end < m - 1:
                ans = max(ans, run + 2)

        for k in range(1, n-1):
            gap = nums[k+1] - nums[k-1]
            if gap % 2 != 0:
                continue

            x = gap // 2
            left = L[k-2] if k >= 2 and diff[k-2] == x else 0
            right = R[k+1] if k + 1 < m and diff[k+1] == x else 0

            ans = max(ans, left + right + 3)
        return min(ans, n)
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU:
    def __init__(self, n):
        self.p = list(range(n))
        self.sz = [1] * n

    def find(self, x):
        while self.p[x] != x:
            self.p[x] = self.p[self.p[x]]
            x = self.p[x]
        return x

    def union(self, a, b):
        ra, rb = self.find(a), self.find(b)
        if ra == rb:
            return 
        if self.sz[ra] < self.sz[rb]:
            ra, rb = rb, ra
        self.p[rb] = ra
        self.sz[ra] += self.sz[rb]
        
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)

        xs = {}
        ys = {}

        for x, y in points:
            if x not in xs:
                xs[x] = len(xs)
            if y not in ys:
                ys[y] = len(ys)

        xcnt = len(xs)
        ycnt = len(ys)

        dsu = DSU(xcnt+ycnt)

        for x, y in points:
            xi = xs[x]
            yi = xcnt + ys[y]
            dsu.union(xi, yi)
            
        comp_edges = defaultdict(int)
        for x, y in points:
            root = dsu.find(xs[x])
            comp_edges[root] += 1

        s = sorted(comp_edges.values(), reverse=True)

        if len(s) == 1:
            return s[0] + 1
        return s[0] + s[1] + 1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 126 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 2)return n;
        vector<int> pre(n,0);
        for (int i = 0 ; i < n - 1; i++)pre[i] = nums[i+1] - nums[i];
        vector<int> mx_l(n,1),mx_r(n,1);
        for (int i = 1;i < n - 1;i++)if (pre[i] == pre[i-1])mx_l[i] = mx_l[i-1]+1;
        for (int i = n-3; i>=0 ;i--)if (pre[i] == pre[i+1])mx_r[i] = mx_r[i+1]+1;
    int res1 = 0;
    for (auto i:mx_l)res1 = max(res1,i);
    for (auto i:mx_r)res1 = max(res1,i);
    int ans = min(n,res1 + 2);
    for (int i = 1;i < n - 1;i++)
        {
            int s = pre[i-1]+pre[i];
            if (s%2 == 0)
            {
                int d = s/2;
                int l_len = (i >= 2 && pre[i - 2] == d)?mx_l[i-2]:0;
                int r_len = (i + 1 < n - 1 && pre[i+1] == d)?mx_r[i+1]:0;
                ans = max(ans,l_len + r_len +3);
            }
        }
    return ans;
    }
};
    
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    struct DSU
    {
        int n;
        vector<int> par,sz;
        DSU(int _n)
        {
            n = _n;
            par.assign(n+5,0);
            sz.assign(n+5,1);
            for (int i=0;i<=n;i++)par[i] = i;
        }
        int find_set(int x)
        {
            if (x == par[x])return x;
            return par[x] = find_set(par[x]);
        }
        bool union_set(int x,int y)
        {
            x = find_set(x);
            y = find_set(y);
            if (x == y)return false;
            if (sz[x] < sz[y])swap(x,y);
            par[y] = x;
            sz[x] += sz[y];
            return true;
        }
    };
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        if (n == 0)return 1;
        DSU dsu(n);
        map<int,int> mp1,mp2;
        for (int i = 0; i < n;i++)
            {
                int x = points[i][0];
                int y = points[i][1];
                if (mp1.count(x))dsu.union_set(i,mp1[x]);
                else mp1[x] = i;
                if (mp2.count(y))dsu.union_set(i,mp2[y]);
                else mp2[y] = i;
                
            }
        vector<int> scc_sz;
        for (int i = 0;i < n;i++)
            {
                if (dsu.find_set(i) == i)scc_sz.push_back(dsu.sz[i]);
            }
        sort(scc_sz.begin(),scc_sz.end(),greater<int>());
        if (scc_sz.size() >= 2)return scc_sz[0] + scc_sz[1] +1;
        else return scc_sz[0] + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 127 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n=nums.size();
        vector<int> L(n,1), dL(n,0), R(n,1), dR(n,0);

        for (int i = 1; i < n; i++) {
            dL[i] = nums[i] - nums[i-1];
            L[i]  = (i >= 2 && dL[i] == dL[i-1]) ? L[i-1]+1 : 2;
        }
        for (int i = n-2; i >= 0; i--) {
            dR[i] = nums[i+1] - nums[i];
            R[i]  = (i <= n-3 && dR[i] == dR[i+1]) ? R[i+1]+1 : 2;
        }

        // no replacement
        int ans = *max_element(L.begin(), L.end());

        // replace first / last element
        ans = max({ans, R[1]+1, L[n-2]+1});

        for (int i = 1; i < n-1; i++) {
            // replace i, extend left or right alone
            ans = max({ans, L[i-1]+1, R[i+1]+1});

            int gap = nums[i+1] - nums[i-1];

            // full left run + replacement + full right run
            if (L[i-1] >= 2 && R[i+1] >= 2
                && dL[i-1] == dR[i+1] && gap == 2*dL[i-1])
                ans = max(ans, L[i-1] + R[i+1] + 1);

            // full left run + replacement + nums[i+1] only
            if (L[i-1] >= 2 && gap == 2*dL[i-1])
                ans = max(ans, L[i-1] + 2);

            // nums[i-1] only + replacement + full right run  ← the fix
            if (R[i+1] >= 2 && gap == 2*dR[i+1])
                ans = max(ans, R[i+1] + 2);

            // both neighbours are lone anchors, any even gap works → length 3
            if (gap % 2 == 0)
                ans = max(ans, 3);
        }

        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    vector<int> par;
    int find(int x){
        return par[x]==x?x:par[x]=find(par[x]);
    }
    void unite(int a,int b){
        a=find(a);b=find(b);
        if(a!=b) par[a]=b;
    }
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        unordered_map<int,int> xid,yid;
        int xi=0,yi=0;
        for (auto& p : points) {
            if (!xid.count(p[0])) xid[p[0]] = xi++;
            if (!yid.count(p[1])) yid[p[1]] = yi++;
        }
        int X = xi;

        par.resize(X + yi);
        iota(par.begin(), par.end(), 0);

        // Each point = edge between its x-node and y-node
        for (auto& p : points)
            unite(xid[p[0]], X + yid[p[1]]);

        // Count points (edges) per component
        unordered_map<int,int> cnt;
        for (auto& p : points)
            cnt[find(xid[p[0]])]++;

        // Find top-2 component sizes
        int c1 = 0, c2 = 0;
        for (auto& [_, v] : cnt) {
            if (v >= c1) { c2 = c1; c1 = v; }
            else if (v > c2) c2 = v;
        }

        return 1 + c1 + c2;
        
    }
};
[Q4_END]
##################

### RANK 128 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {

    private void build(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        dp1 = new int[n];
        dp2 = new int[n];
        for (int i = 0;i < n;i ++) {
            dp1[i] = 1;
            if (i > 0) {
                dp1[i] = 2;
            }
            if (i - 2 >= 0 && (nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2])) {
                dp1[i] = dp1[i - 1] + 1;
            }
        }
        for (int i = n - 1;i >= 0;i --) {
            dp2[i] = 1;
            if (i < n - 1) {
                dp2[i] = 2;
            }
            if (i + 2 < n && (nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == nums[i + 1] - nums[i])) {
                dp2[i] = dp2[i + 1] + 1;
            }
        }
    }

    private int[] dp1, dp2;

    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length, ans = 0;
        build(nums);
        // do not change
        for (int i = 0;i < n;i ++) {
            ans = Math.max(ans, dp1[i]);
        }
        // change one
        // left
        for (int i = 1;i < n;i ++) {
            int result = dp1[i - 1] + 1;
            ans = Math.max(ans, result);
        }
        // right
        for (int i = n - 2;i >= 0;i --) {
            int result = dp2[i + 1] + 1;
            ans = Math.max(ans, result);
        }
        // both
        for (int i = 1;i < n - 1;i ++) {
            int leftVal = nums[i - 1], rightVal = nums[i + 1];
            int diff = rightVal - leftVal;
            if (Math.abs(diff) % 2 == 0) {
                int expectDiff = diff / 2;
                int result = 1;
                // left
                if (i - 2 >= 0 && (nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == expectDiff)) {
                    result += dp1[i - 1];
                } else {
                    result ++;
                }
                // right
                if (i + 2 < n && (nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == expectDiff)) {
                    result += dp2[i + 1];
                } else {
                    result ++;
                }
                ans = Math.max(ans, result);
            }
        }
        return ans;
    }

}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {

    private int findSet(int x) {
        if (x == set[x]) {
            return x;
        }
        return set[x] = findSet(set[x]);
    }

    private int[] set;
    private int[] size;

    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        set = new int[n];
        size = new int[n];
        for (int i = 0;i < n;i ++) {
            set[i] = i;
            size[i] = 1;
        }
        // uf
        Map<Integer, List<Integer>> xMap = new HashMap<>(), yMap = new HashMap<>();
        for (int i = 0;i < points.length;i ++) {
            int x = points[i][0], y = points[i][1];
            xMap.putIfAbsent(x, new ArrayList<>());
            xMap.get(x).add(i);
            yMap.putIfAbsent(y, new ArrayList<>());
            yMap.get(y).add(i);
        }
        for (List<Integer> list : xMap.values()) {
            int base = list.get(0);
            for (int index : list) {
                int f1 = findSet(base), f2 = findSet(index);
                if (f1 != f2) {
                    set[f1] = f2;
                    size[f2] += size[f1];
                }
            }
        }
        for (List<Integer> list : yMap.values()) {
            int base = list.get(0);
            for (int index : list) {
                int f1 = findSet(base), f2 = findSet(index);
                if (f1 != f2) {
                    set[f1] = f2;
                    size[f2] += size[f1];
                }
            }
        }
        Map<Integer, Integer> sizeMap = new HashMap<>();
        for (int i = 0;i < points.length;i ++) {
            int f = findSet(i);
            sizeMap.put(f, size[f]);
        }
        List<Integer> sizeList = new ArrayList<>(sizeMap.values());
        Collections.sort(sizeList, Collections.reverseOrder());
        if (sizeList.size() == 1) {
            return sizeList.get(0) + 1;
        } else {
            return sizeList.get(0) + sizeList.get(1) + 1;
        }
    }

}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 129 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if(n < 2) return n;
        vector<int> lel(n) , led(n);
        vector<int> rel(n) , red(n);
        lel[0] = 1;
        led[0] = 0;
        int cur =1 , curd= 0;
        for(int i = 1 ; i< n ; ++i){
            int diff = nums[i] - nums[i-1];
            if(diff == curd){
                ++cur;
            }else{
                cur=2;
                curd = diff;
            }
            lel[i] = cur;
            led[i] = curd;
        }
        rel[n-1] = 1;
        red[n-1] = 0;
        cur=1 , curd = 0;
        for(int i=n-2 ; i>=0 ; --i){
            int diff = nums[i+1] - nums[i];
            if(diff == curd){
                ++cur;
            }else{
                cur = 2;
                curd = diff;
            }
            rel[i] = cur;
            red[i] = curd;
            
        }
        int ans = 1;
        for(int i=0;i<n ; ++i){
            ans = max(ans , lel[i]);
        }
        for(int i=0;i<n ; ++i){
            if(i>0){
                ans = max(ans , lel[i-1] +1);
            }
            if(i < n-1){
                ans = max(ans , rel[i+1]+1);
            }
            if(i>0 && i<n-1){
                int lefL = lel[i-1];
                int riL = rel[i+1];
                int lefD = led[i-1];
                int rigD = red[i+1];
                int outer = nums[i+1] - nums[i-1];
            
            if(outer % 2 == 0){
                ans = max(ans , 3);
            }
            if(lefL > 1 && outer == 2 *lefD ){
                ans = max(ans , lefL+2);
            }
            if(riL > 1 && outer == 2 * rigD){
                ans = max( ans , riL+2);
            }
            if(lefL > 1 && riL > 1 && lefD == rigD && outer == 2 * lefD){
                ans = max(ans , lefL +1 + riL);
            }
        }
        }

        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        vector<int> par(n);
        iota(par.begin() , par.end(), 0);
        vector<int> rank(n , 0);
        function<int(int)> find = [&](int x){
            if(par[x] != x) par[x] = find(par[x]);
            return par[x];
        };
        auto unite = [&](int a , int b){
            a = find(a); b = find(b);
            if(a==b) return;
            if(rank[a] < rank[b]) par[a]=b;
            else if(rank[a] > rank[b]) par[b] = a;
            else {par[b]=a ; rank[a]++;}
        };
        unordered_map<int , int> mapX , mapY;
        for(int i=0;i<n ; ++i){
            int x = points[i][0] , y = points[i][1];
            if(mapX.count(x)) unite(i , mapX[x]);
            else mapX[x] = i;
            if(mapY.count(y)) unite(i , mapY[y]);
            else mapY[y] = i;
        }
        vector<int>comSize(n , 0);
        for(int i=0;i<n;++i){
            comSize[find(i)]++;
        }
        sort(comSize.rbegin() , comSize.rend());
        int ans = 1+comSize[0];
        if(n > 1 && comSize[1] > 0){
            ans = max(ans , 1 + comSize[0] + comSize[1]);
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        si=nums
        n=len(nums)
        d=[nums[i+1]-nums[i] for i in range(n-1)]
        m=len(d)
        
        l=[1]*m
        for i in range (1,m):
            if d[i]==d[i-1]:
                l[i]=l[i-1]+1

        r=[1]*m
        for i in range(m-2,-1,-1):
            if d[i]==d[i+1]:
                r[i]=r[i+1]+1

        ans=0
        for i in range(m):
            ans=max(ans,min(n,l[i]+2))
        for i in range(m-1):
            s=d[i]+d[i+1]
            if s % 2==0:
                v=s//2
                c=2
                if i-1>=0 and d[i-1]==v:
                    c+=l[i-1]
                if i+2<m and d[i+2] ==v:
                    c+=r[i+2]
                ans=max(ans,c+1)
        return ans
            
        
        
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        re=points
        n=len(points)
        p=list(range(n))
        sz=[1]*n

        hx={}
        hy={}

        for i in range(n):
            x,y=points[i]
            for k,h in [(x,hx),(y,hy)]:
                if k in h:
                    u=i
                    v=h[k]
                    while p[u]!=u:
                        p[u]=p[p[u]]
                        u=p[u]
                    while p[v]!=v:
                        p[v]=p[p[v]]
                        v=p[v]
                    if u!=v:
                        p[u]=v
                        sz[v]+=sz[u]
                else:
                    h[k]=i
        r= set()
        for i in range(n):
            u=i
            while p[u]!=u:
                p[u]=p[p[u]]
                u=p[u]
            r.add(u)
        s=sorted([sz[i] for i in r],reverse=True)
        if len(s)>1:
            return s[0]+s[1]+1
        return s[0]+1


        
        
[Q4_END]

### RANK 133 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 2:
            return n

        L = [2]*n
        for i in range(2, n):
            if nums[i] - nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]:
                L[i] = L[i-1] + 1

        R = [2]*n
        for i in range(n-3, -1, -1):
            if nums[i+1] - nums[i] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]:
                R[i] = R[i+1] + 1

        ans = max(L)

        for i in range(1, n-1):
            if (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) % 2 == 0:
                d = (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) // 2

                left = 1
                if i >= 2 and nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == d:
                    left = L[i-1]

                right = 1
                if i+2 < n and nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == d:
                    right = R[i+1]

                ans = max(ans, left + 1 + right)

        for i in range(n):
            ans = max(ans, L[i] + 1)
            ans = max(ans, R[i] + 1)

        return min(ans, n)
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
from typing import List
from collections import defaultdict

class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: List[List[int]]) -> int:
        parent = {}
        
        def find(x):
            parent.setdefault(x, x)
            if parent[x] != x:
                parent[x] = find(parent[x])
            return parent[x]
        
        def union(a, b):
            ra, rb = find(a), find(b)
            if ra != rb:
                parent[rb] = ra
        
        for x, y in points:
            union(('x', x), ('y', y))
        
        comp = defaultdict(int)
        for x, y in points:
            comp[find(('x', x))] += 1
        xcomp = {}
        ycomp = {}
        for x, y in points:
            xcomp[x] = find(('x', x))
            ycomp[y] = find(('y', y))
        
        x_roots = set(xcomp.values())
        y_roots = set(ycomp.values())
        x_sorted = sorted(x_roots, key=lambda r: comp[r], reverse=True)
        y_sorted = sorted(y_roots, key=lambda r: comp[r], reverse=True)
        ans = max(comp[r] + 1 for r in comp)
        for a in x_sorted[:2]:
            for b in y_sorted[:2]:
                if a != b:
                    ans = max(ans, comp[a] + comp[b] + 1)
                    break
        
        return ans
[Q4_END]

### RANK 134 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        const int n = nums.size();
        int ans = 2;
        
        vector<int> ending(n, 1);
        ending[1] = 2;
        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            if (nums[i] - nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]) {
                ending[i] = 1 + ending[i - 1];
            } else {
                ending[i] = 2;
            }
            ans=max(ans, ending[i]);
        }

        vector<int> starting(n, 1);
        starting[n - 2] = 2;
        for (int i = n -3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]) {
                starting[i] = 1 + starting[i + 1];
            } else {
                starting[i] = 2;
            }
            
            ans=max(ans, starting[i]);
        }

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (i) ans = max(ans, ending[i-1] + 1);
            if (i + 1 < n) ans = max(ans, starting[i+1] + 1);
        }

        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++) {

            ans = max(ans, ending[i-1] + 1);
            ans = max(ans, starting[i+1] + 1);
            
            int diff = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1];

            if (diff % 2 == 0) {
                diff /= 2;
                int left = 1, right = 1;

                if (i>=2 and nums[i-1]-nums[i-2] == diff) {
                    left = ending[i-1];
                }

                if (i < n-2 and nums[i+2]-nums[i+1] == diff) {
                    right = starting[i+1];
                }

                ans=max(ans, left + 1 + right);

                
            }
            
        }

        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU {
public:
    vector<int> parent, rank;

    DSU(int n) {
        parent.resize(n);
        rank.resize(n,0);
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) parent[i]=i;
    }

    int find(int x){
        if(parent[x]==x) return x;
        return parent[x]=find(parent[x]);
    }

    void unite(int a,int b){
        a=find(a);
        b=find(b);
        if(a==b) return;

        if(rank[a]<rank[b]) swap(a,b);
        parent[b]=a;
        if(rank[a]==rank[b]) rank[a]++;
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        const int n = points.size();

        map<int, int> x, y;
        int id = 0;
        for(auto &p: points) {
            if (x.find(p[0]) == x.end()) {
                x[p[0]]= id++;
            }
            if (y.find(p[1]) == y.end()) {
                y[p[1]]= id++;
            }
        }

        DSU dsu(id);

        for(auto &p: points) {
            dsu.unite(x[p[0]], y[p[1]]);
        }

        map<int, int> size;
        for(auto &p: points) {
            size[dsu.find(x[p[0]])]++;
        }

        vector<int> sz;
        for (auto &s: size) {
            sz.push_back(s.second);
        }

        sort(sz.rbegin(), sz.rend());

        int ans = 1 + sz[0];
        if (sz.size() > 1) {
            ans += sz[1];
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 135 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& a) {
        int n = a.size();
        vector<int> l(n), r(n);
        int ans = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (i == 0) l[i] = 1;
            else if (i == 1) l[i] = 2;
            else {
                if (a[i] - a[i-1] == a[i-1] - a[i-2]) l[i] = l[i-1] + 1;
                else l[i] = 2;
            }
            ans = max(ans, l[i]);
        }
        for (int i = n-1; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (i == n-1) r[i] = 1;
            else if (i == n-2) r[i] = 2;
            else {
                if (a[i] - a[i+1] == a[i+1] - a[i+2]) r[i] = r[i+1] + 1;
                else r[i] = 2;
            }
            ans = max(ans, r[i]);
        }
        if (ans < n) ans++;
        
        for (int i = 1; i < n-1; i++) {
            int diff = a[i+1] - a[i-1];
            if (diff % 2) continue;
            diff /= 2;
            int tmp = 3;
            if (i-1 > 0 && a[i-1] - a[i-2] == diff) tmp += l[i-1] - 1;
            if (i+1 < n-1 && a[i+2] - a[i+1] == diff) tmp += r[i+1] - 1;
            ans = max(ans, tmp);
        }

        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]

#define each(a, x)    for(auto& a : x)
#define  rep(i, a, b) for(int i   = a; i   < (b); ++i  )
#define   rp(b)       for(int _rp = 0; _rp < (b); ++_rp)
#define  all(x)       begin(x),  end(x)
#define rall(x)       rbegin(x), rend(x)
#define  exist(x, v)  ((x).find(v) != (x).end())
#define cexist(x, v)  (find(all(x), v) != (x).end())
#define sz(x)         (int)(x).size()
#define bg(x)         begin(x)
#define rsz resize
#define ins insert
#define pb  push_back
#define pf  push_front
#define ft  front()
#define bk  back()
#define fi  first
#define se  second
#define lb  lower_bound
#define ub  upper_bound
#define uniq(x) (x).erase(unique(all(x)), (x).end())
#define dedupe(x) do {sort(all(x)); (x).erase(unique(all(x)), (x).end());} while(0)
#define CT template<class T>
CT bool ckmin(T &a, const T &b) { return b < a ? (a = b, true) : false; }
CT bool ckmax(T &a, const T &b) { return b > a ? (a = b, true) : false; }
CT using V = vector<T>;  CT using   vv = V<V<T>>;  CT using  vvv = V<vv<T>>;
using   ll = long long;     using  ull = uint64_t;    using   ld = long double;
using  pii = pair<int,int>; using  pll = pair<ll,ll>; using  pdd = pair<ld,ld>;
using   vi = V<int>;        using   vl = V<ll>;       using   vd = V<ld>;
using   vb = V<bool>;       using   vc = V<char>;     using   vs = V<string>;
using  vpi = V<pii>;        using  vpl = V<pll>;      using  vpd = V<pdd>;
using  vvi = V<vi>;         using  vvl = V<vl>;       using  vvd = V<vd>;
using vvpi = V<vpi>;        using vvpl = V<vpl>;      using vvpd = V<vpd>;
using  pli = pair<ll,int>;  using vpli = V<pli>;     using vvpli = V<vpli>;
using  pil = pair<int,ll>;  using vpil = V<pil>;     using vvpil = V<vpil>;
using  t3i = tuple<int,int,int>;  using vti = V<t3i>;
using  t3l = tuple<ll ,ll ,ll >;  using vtl = V<t3l>;
CT using maxpq = priority_queue<T>;
CT using minpq = priority_queue<T, V<T>, greater<T>>; using i128 = __int128;
ll cdiv(ll a, ll b) {return a/b + ((a%b) != 0 && ((a>0) == (b>0)));}
const int  INF = 1e9;   const ll LLINF = 4e18; const ll NTT = 998244353;

vi par, siz;
int find(int x) {
    return x == par[x] ? x : par[x] = find(par[x]);
}
bool unite(int a, int b) {
    a = find(a), b = find(b);
    if (a == b) return false;
    if (siz[a] < siz[b]) swap(a,b);
    siz[a] += siz[b];
    par[b] = a;
    return true;
}

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& p) {
        int n = sz(p);
        par.assign(n,0), siz.assign(n,1);
        iota(all(par), 0);

        vb f(n);

        unordered_map<int,vi> X, Y;

        rep(i,0,n) {
            int x = p[i][0], y = p[i][1];
            X[x].pb(i), Y[y].pb(i);
        }

        for (auto& [u,v] : X) {
            each(e, v) {
                unite(v.ft, e);
            }
        }
        for (auto& [u,v] : Y) {
            each(e, v) {
                unite(v.ft, e);
            }
        }

        vi g;
        rep(i,0,n) {
            if (par[i] == i) g.pb(i);
        }
        sort(all(g), [&](int a, int b) {
            return siz[a] > siz[b];
        });
        if (sz(g) == 1) return n + 1;
        return siz[g[0]] + siz[g[1]] + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 136 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {

        int n = nums.length;
        if(n<=2) return n;

        int[] x1 = new int[n];
        int[] x2 = new int[n];

        x1[0]=1; 
        x1[1]=2;

        int i=2;
        while(i<n){

            long d1 = (long)nums[i]-nums[i-1];
            long d2 = (long)nums[i-1]-nums[i-2];

            if(d1==d2) x1[i]=x1[i-1]+1;
            else x1[i]=2;

            i++;
        }

        x2[n-1]=1;
        x2[n-2]=2;

        for(int j=n-3;j>=0;j--){

            long a=(long)nums[j+1]-nums[j];
            long b=(long)nums[j+2]-nums[j+1];

            if(a==b) x2[j]=x2[j+1]+1;
            else x2[j]=2;
        }

        int ans=2;
        int useless=0;

        for(int k=0;k+1<n;k++){

            long diff=(long)nums[k+1]-nums[k];

            int L = (k>=1 && (long)nums[k]-nums[k-1]==diff) ? x1[k] : 1;
            int R = (k+2<n && (long)nums[k+2]-nums[k+1]==diff) ? x2[k+1] : 1;

            int temp=L+R+1;
            ans=Math.max(ans,Math.min(n,temp));
        }

        for(int k=0;k+2<n;k++){

            long g=(long)nums[k+2]-nums[k];

            if(g%2!=0) continue;

            long d=g/2;

            int L=(k>=1 && (long)nums[k]-nums[k-1]==d)?x1[k]:1;
            int R=(k+3<n && (long)nums[k+3]-nums[k+2]==d)?x2[k+2]:1;

            ans=Math.max(ans,Math.min(n,L+1+R));
        }

        useless++;

        return ans;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
import java.util.*;

class Solution {

    int findP(int x, int[] par){
        if(par[x]==x) return x;
        return par[x] = findP(par[x],par);
    }

    void join(int a,int b,int[] par,int[] size){
        int p1 = findP(a,par);
        int p2 = findP(b,par);

        if(p1==p2) return;

        if(size[p1] < size[p2]){
            int tmp=p1;
            p1=p2;
            p2=tmp;
        }

        par[p2]=p1;
        size[p1]+=size[p2];
    }

    public int maxActivated(int[][] pts) {

        int n = pts.length;

        int[] parent = new int[n];
        int[] comp = new int[n];

        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            parent[i]=i;
            comp[i]=1;
        }

        Map<Integer,List<Integer>> mapX = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer,List<Integer>> mapY = new HashMap<>();

        int useless=0;

        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){

            int x = pts[i][0];
            int y = pts[i][1];

            mapX.computeIfAbsent(x,k->new ArrayList<>()).add(i);
            mapY.computeIfAbsent(y,k->new ArrayList<>()).add(i);
        }

        for(List<Integer> v : mapX.values()){
            for(int i=1;i<v.size();i++){
                join(v.get(0),v.get(i),parent,comp);
            }
        }

        for(List<Integer> v : mapY.values()){
            int j=1;
            while(j<v.size()){
                join(v.get(0),v.get(j),parent,comp);
                j++;
            }
        }

        Map<Integer,Integer> xRoot = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer,Integer> yRoot = new HashMap<>();

        for(int k : mapX.keySet()){
            xRoot.put(k , findP(mapX.get(k).get(0),parent));
        }

        for(int k : mapY.keySet()){
            yRoot.put(k , findP(mapY.get(k).get(0),parent));
        }

        Map<Integer,Integer> compSize = new HashMap<>();

        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            int r = findP(i,parent);
            compSize.put(r , comp[r]);
        }

        int ans = 1;

        for(int r : xRoot.values()){
            ans = Math.max(ans , compSize.get(r)+1);
        }

        for(int r : yRoot.values()){
            ans = Math.max(ans , compSize.get(r)+1);
        }

        List<int[]> listX = new ArrayList<>();
        List<int[]> listY = new ArrayList<>();

        for(int r : xRoot.values()){
            listX.add(new int[]{r,compSize.get(r)});
        }

        for(int r : yRoot.values()){
            listY.add(new int[]{r,compSize.get(r)});
        }

        listX.sort((a,b)->b[1]-a[1]);
        listY.sort((a,b)->b[1]-a[1]);

        List<int[]> topX = new ArrayList<>();
        List<int[]> topY = new ArrayList<>();

        Set<Integer> seen = new HashSet<>();

        for(int[] p : listX){
            if(!seen.contains(p[0])){
                seen.add(p[0]);
                topX.add(p);
            }
            if(topX.size()==2) break;
        }

        seen.clear();

        for(int[] p : listY){
            if(!seen.contains(p[0])){
                seen.add(p[0]);
                topY.add(p);
            }
            if(topY.size()==2) break;
        }

        for(int[] a : topX){
            for(int[] b : topY){

                if(a[0]!=b[0])
                    ans = Math.max(ans , a[1]+b[1]+1);
                else
                    ans = Math.max(ans , a[1]+1);
            }
        }

        useless++;

        return ans;
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 137 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        pre, suf = [1] * n, [1] * n
        pre[1] = suf[-2] = 2

        for i in range(2, n):
            pre[i] = pre[i - 1] + 1 if nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] else 2
        for i in range(n - 3, -1, -1):
            suf[i] = suf[i + 1] + 1 if nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] else 2

        res = max(pre)

        for i in range(n):
            if i > 0:
                res = max(res, pre[i - 1] + 1)
            if i + 1 < n:
                res = max(res, suf[i + 1] + 1)

        for i in range(1, n - 1):
            d = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]
            if d & 1: continue
            m = d // 2
            l = pre[i - 1] if i >= 2 and nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == m else 1
            r = suf[i + 1] if i + 2 < n and nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == m else 1
            res = max(res, l + r + 1)

        return res
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class UnionFind:
    def __init__(self, n: int) -> None:
        self.rank = [1] * n
        self.root = [i for i in range(n)]

    def find(self, x: int) -> int:
        if x == self.root[x]:
            return x
        self.root[x] = self.find(self.root[x])
        return self.root[x]

    def union(self, x: int, y: int) -> bool:
        root_x = self.find(x)
        root_y = self.find(y)
        if root_x == root_y:
            return False
        if self.rank[root_x] > self.rank[root_y]:
            self.root[root_y] = root_x
        elif self.rank[root_x] < self.rank[root_y]:
            self.root[root_x] = root_y
        else:
            self.root[root_x] = root_y
            self.rank[root_y] += 1
        return True

    def is_connected(self, x: int, y: int) -> bool:
        return self.find(x) == self.find(y)

class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        x_id, y_id = {}, {}
        m = 0
        for x, y in points:
            if x not in x_id:
                x_id[x] = m
                m += 1
            if y not in y_id:
                y_id[y] = m
                m += 1

        uf = UnionFind(m)
        for x, y in points:
            uf.union(x_id[x], y_id[y])

        a = b = 0
        count = Counter(uf.find(x_id[x]) for x, _ in points)
        for s in count.values():
            if s > a:
                a, b = s, a
            elif s > b:
                b = s
        return a + b + 1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 138 ###
[Q3_START]
impl Solution {
    pub fn longest_arithmetic(nums: Vec<i32>) -> i32 {
        let a = nums;
        let n = a.len();
        if n <= 2 {
            return n as i32;
        }
        let m = n - 1;
        let mut b = Vec::<i64>::with_capacity(m);
        for i in 0..m {
            b.push(a[i + 1] as i64 - a[i] as i64);
        }
        let mut l = vec![1usize; m];
        for i in 1..m {
            if b[i] == b[i - 1] {
                l[i] = l[i - 1] + 1;
            }
        }
        let mut r = vec![1usize; m];
        let mut i = m - 1;
        while i > 0 {
            i -= 1;
            if b[i] == b[i + 1] {
                r[i] = r[i + 1] + 1;
            }
        }
        let mut o = 2usize;
        for i in 0..m {
            o = o.max((l[i] + 2).min(n));
        }
        for k in 1..n - 1 {
            let s = a[k + 1] as i64 - a[k - 1] as i64;
            if s % 2 != 0 {
                continue;
            }
            let d = s / 2;
            let mut v = 3usize;
            if k >= 2 && b[k - 2] == d {
                v += l[k - 2];
            }
            if k + 1 < m && b[k + 1] == d {
                v += r[k + 1];
            }
            o = o.max(v);
        }
        o as i32
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
//! A Disjoint set union (DSU) with union by size and path compression.

/// A Disjoint set union (DSU) with union by size and path compression.
///
/// See: [Zvi Galil and Giuseppe F. Italiano, Data structures and algorithms for disjoint set union problems](https://core.ac.uk/download/pdf/161439519.pdf)
///
/// In the following documentation, let $n$ be the size of the DSU.
///
/// # Example
///
/// ```
/// use ac_library::Dsu;
/// use proconio::{input, source::once::OnceSource};
///
/// input! {
///     from OnceSource::from(
///         "5\n\
///          3\n\
///          0 1\n\
///          2 3\n\
///          3 4\n",
///     ),
///     n: usize,
///     abs: [(usize, usize)],
/// }
///
/// let mut dsu = Dsu::new(n);
/// for (a, b) in abs {
///     dsu.merge(a, b);
/// }
///
/// assert!(dsu.same(0, 1));
/// assert!(!dsu.same(1, 2));
/// assert!(dsu.same(2, 4));
///
/// assert_eq!(
///     dsu.groups()
///         .into_iter()
///         .map(|mut group| {
///             group.sort_unstable();
///             group
///         })
///         .collect::<Vec<_>>(),
///     [&[0, 1][..], &[2, 3, 4][..]],
/// );
/// ```
#[derive(Clone, Debug)]
pub struct Dsu {
    n: usize,
    // root node: -1 * component size
    // otherwise: parent
    parent_or_size: Vec<i32>,
}

impl Dsu {
    /// Creates a new `Dsu`.
    ///
    /// # Constraints
    ///
    /// - $0 \leq n \leq 10^8$
    ///
    /// # Complexity
    ///
    /// - $O(n)$
    pub fn new(size: usize) -> Self {
        Self {
            n: size,
            parent_or_size: vec![-1; size],
        }
    }

    // `\textsc` does not work in KaTeX
    /// Performs the Uɴɪᴏɴ operation.
    ///
    /// # Constraints
    ///
    /// - $0 \leq a < n$
    /// - $0 \leq b < n$
    ///
    /// # Panics
    ///
    /// Panics if the above constraints are not satisfied.
    ///
    /// # Complexity
    ///
    /// - $O(\alpha(n))$ amortized
    pub fn merge(&mut self, a: usize, b: usize) -> usize {
        assert!(a < self.n);
        assert!(b < self.n);
        let (mut x, mut y) = (self.leader(a), self.leader(b));
        if x == y {
            return x;
        }
        if -self.parent_or_size[x] < -self.parent_or_size[y] {
            std::mem::swap(&mut x, &mut y);
        }
        self.parent_or_size[x] += self.parent_or_size[y];
        self.parent_or_size[y] = x as i32;
        x
    }

    /// Returns whether the vertices $a$ and $b$ are in the same connected component.
    ///
    /// # Constraints
    ///
    /// - $0 \leq a < n$
    /// - $0 \leq b < n$
    ///
    /// # Panics
    ///
    /// Panics if the above constraint is not satisfied.
    ///
    /// # Complexity
    ///
    /// - $O(\alpha(n))$ amortized
    pub fn same(&mut self, a: usize, b: usize) -> bool {
        assert!(a < self.n);
        assert!(b < self.n);
        self.leader(a) == self.leader(b)
    }

    /// Performs the Fɪɴᴅ operation.
    ///
    /// # Constraints
    ///
    /// - $0 \leq a < n$
    ///
    /// # Panics
    ///
    /// Panics if the above constraint is not satisfied.
    ///
    /// # Complexity
    ///
    /// - $O(\alpha(n))$ amortized
    pub fn leader(&mut self, a: usize) -> usize {
        assert!(a < self.n);
        self._leader(a)
    }

    /// Returns the size of the connected component that contains the vertex $a$.
    ///
    /// # Constraints
    ///
    /// - $0 \leq a < n$
    ///
    /// # Panics
    ///
    /// Panics if the above constraint is not satisfied.
    ///
    /// # Complexity
    ///
    /// - $O(\alpha(n))$ amortized
    pub fn size(&mut self, a: usize) -> usize {
        assert!(a < self.n);
        let x = self.leader(a);
        -self.parent_or_size[x] as usize
    }

    /// Divides the graph into connected components.
    ///
    /// The result may not be ordered.
    ///
    /// # Complexity
    ///
    /// - $O(n)$
    pub fn groups(&mut self) -> Vec<Vec<usize>> {
        let mut leader_buf = vec![0; self.n];
        let mut group_size = vec![0; self.n];
        for i in 0..self.n {
            leader_buf[i] = self.leader(i);
            group_size[leader_buf[i]] += 1;
        }
        let mut result = vec![Vec::new(); self.n];
        for i in 0..self.n {
            result[i].reserve(group_size[i]);
        }
        for i in 0..self.n {
            result[leader_buf[i]].push(i);
        }
        result
            .into_iter()
            .filter(|x| !x.is_empty())
            .collect::<Vec<Vec<usize>>>()
    }

    fn _leader(&mut self, a: usize) -> usize {
        if self.parent_or_size[a] < 0 {
            return a;
        }
        self.parent_or_size[a] = self._leader(self.parent_or_size[a] as usize) as i32;
        self.parent_or_size[a] as usize
    }
}

#[cfg(test)]
mod tests {
    use super::*;

    #[test]
    fn dsu_works() {
        let mut d = Dsu::new(4);
        d.merge(0, 1);
        assert!(d.same(0, 1));
        d.merge(1, 2);
        assert!(d.same(0, 2));
        assert_eq!(d.size(0), 3);
        assert!(!d.same(0, 3));
        assert_eq!(d.groups(), vec![vec![0, 1, 2], vec![3]]);
    }
}

impl Solution {
    pub fn max_activated(points: Vec<Vec<i32>>) -> i32 {
        let n = points.len();
        let mut a = Vec::<(i32, i32, usize)>::with_capacity(n);
        for i in 0..n {
            a.push((points[i][0], points[i][1], i));
        }
        let mut b = a.clone();
        a.sort_by(|x, y| {
            return (x.0, x.1, x.2).cmp(&(y.0, y.1, y.2));
        });
        b.sort_by(|x, y| {
            return (x.1, x.0, x.2).cmp(&(y.1, y.0, y.2));
        });
        let mut d = Dsu::new(n);
        let mut i = 0usize;
        while i < n {
            let mut j = i + 1;
            while j < n && a[j].0 == a[i].0 {
                d.merge(a[i].2, a[j].2);
                j += 1;
            }
            i = j;
        }
        i = 0;
        while i < n {
            let mut j = i + 1;
            while j < n && b[j].1 == b[i].1 {
                d.merge(b[i].2, b[j].2);
                j += 1;
            }
            i = j;
        }
        let mut c = vec![0i32; n];
        for i in 0..n {
            let r = d.leader(i);
            c[r] += 1;
        }
        let mut m1 = 0i32;
        let mut m2 = 0i32;
        for &v in c.iter() {
            if v >= m1 {
                m2 = m1;
                m1 = v;
            } else if v > m2 {
                m2 = v;
            }
        }
        m1 + m2 + 1
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 139 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size(); int sl[n], sr[n]; int best = 0;

        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++){
            if(i == 0) sl[i] = 1;
            else if(i == 1) sl[i] = 2;
            else{
                int prevDiff = nums[i-1] - nums[i-2];
                int currDiff = nums[i] - nums[i-1];
                if(prevDiff == currDiff){
                    sl[i] = sl[i-1] + 1;
                }
                else{
                    sl[i] = 2;
                }
            }    
        }

        for(int i = n-1; i >= 0; i--){
            if(i == n-1) sr[i] = 1;
            else if(i == n-2) sr[i] = 2;
            else{
                int prevDiff = nums[i+2] - nums[i+1];
                int currDiff = nums[i+1] - nums[i];
                if(prevDiff == currDiff){
                    sr[i] = sr[i+1] + 1;
                }
                else{
                    sr[i] = 2;
                }
            }    
        }
    
        best = max(best, (*max_element(sl, sl + n)) + 1);
        best = max(best, (*max_element(sr, sr + n)) + 1);
        if(best > n) best = n;

        for(int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++){
            // xxoxx
            int prev = nums[i-1];
            int next = nums[i+1];
            if(abs(next - prev) % 2 == 0){
                int diff = (next-prev)/2;
                int curr = prev + diff;
                int ps = (i == 1 || (nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] != diff)) ? 1 : sl[i-1]; 
                int ns = (i == n-2 || (nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] != diff)) ? 1 : sr[i+1]; 
                best = max(best, ps + ns + 1);
            }
        }

        return best;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
typedef long long int ll;

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        set<pair<int, int>> vis;
        map<int, vector<int>> ptsR, ptsC;
        for(auto it : points){
            int r = it[0]; int c = it[1];
            ptsR[r].push_back(c);
            ptsC[c].push_back(r);
        }

        vector<int> sizes;

        for(auto it : points){
            pair<int, int> pp = make_pair(it[0], it[1]);
            //cout << pp.first << " " << pp.second << "\n";
            if(!vis.count(pp)) {
                queue<pair<int, int>> q; int proc = 0;
                q.push(pp);
                while(q.size()){
                    pair<int, int> p = q.front(); q.pop();
                    //cout << " --- " << p.first << " " << p.second << '\n';
                    vis.insert(p); proc++;
                    int r = p.first; int c = p.second;
                    for(auto chk_c : ptsR[r]){
                        pair<int, int> np = make_pair(r, chk_c);
                        if(p != np) q.push(np);
                    }
                    for(auto chk_r : ptsC[c]){
                        pair<int, int> np = make_pair(chk_r, c);
                        if(p != np) q.push(np);
                    }
                    ptsR.erase(r); ptsC.erase(c);
                }
                sizes.push_back(proc);
            }
        }


        if(sizes.size() == 1){
            return sizes[0] + 1;
        }
        else{
            sort(sizes.begin(), sizes.end());
            return sizes[sizes.size() - 2] + sizes.back() + 1;
        }

    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 140 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        
        if (n <= 3) return n;

        vector<int> D(n - 1);
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; ++i) {
            D[i] = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
        }

        vector<int> L(n - 1, 1);
        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; ++i) {
            if (D[i] == D[i - 1]) {
                L[i] = L[i - 1] + 1;
            }
        }

        vector<int> R(n - 1, 1);
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; --i) {
            if (D[i] == D[i + 1]) {
                R[i] = R[i + 1] + 1;
            }
        }

        int ans = 0;

        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; ++i) {
            if (L[i] == n - 1) {
                ans = max(ans, n); 
            } else {
                ans = max(ans, L[i] + 2);
            }
        }

        for (int i = 0; i < n - 2; ++i) {
            int sum = D[i] + D[i + 1];

            bool left_match = (i >= 1 && sum == 2 * D[i - 1]);
            bool right_match = (i + 2 < n - 1 && sum == 2 * D[i + 2]);

            if (left_match && right_match && D[i - 1] == D[i + 2]) {
                ans = max(ans, L[i - 1] + R[i + 2] + 3);
            } else {
                if (left_match) {
                    ans = max(ans, L[i - 1] + 3);
                }
                if (right_match) {
                    ans = max(ans, R[i + 2] + 3);
                }
            }
        }

        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    vector<int> parent;
    vector<int> comp_size;

    int find(int i) {
        if (parent[i] == i)
            return i;
        return parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
    }

    void unite(int i, int j) {
        int rootI = find(i);
        int rootJ = find(j);
        
        if (rootI != rootJ) {
            if (comp_size[rootI] < comp_size[rootJ]) {
                swap(rootI, rootJ);
            }
            parent[rootJ] = rootI;
            comp_size[rootI] += comp_size[rootJ];
        }
    }

public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        
        parent.resize(n);
        comp_size.resize(n, 1);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            parent[i] = i;
        }

        unordered_map<int, int> x_to_index;
        unordered_map<int, int> y_to_index;

        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];

            if (x_to_index.count(x)) {
                unite(i, x_to_index[x]);
            } else {
                x_to_index[x] = i;
            }

            if (y_to_index.count(y)) {
                unite(i, y_to_index[y]);
            } else {
                y_to_index[y] = i;
            }
        }

        vector<int> sizes;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            if (parent[i] == i) {
                sizes.push_back(comp_size[i]);
            }
        }

        sort(sizes.rbegin(), sizes.rend());

        if (sizes.size() >= 2) {
            return sizes[0] + sizes[1] + 1;
        } else if (sizes.size() == 1) {
            return sizes[0] + 1;
        }
        
        return 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]
##################

### RANK 141 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        if (n <= 3) return n;

        long[] d = new long[n - 1];
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) {
            d[i] = (long) nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
        }

        int[] left = new int[n - 1];
        int[] right = new int[n - 1];

        left[0] = 1;
        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++) {
            left[i] = (d[i] == d[i - 1]) ? left[i - 1] + 1 : 1;
        }

        right[n - 2] = 1;
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            right[i] = (d[i] == d[i + 1]) ? right[i + 1] + 1 : 1;
        }

        int ans = 2;

        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) {
            ans = Math.max(ans, left[i] + 1);
        }

        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) {
            ans = Math.max(ans, left[i] + 2);
        }

        for (int k = 1; k < n - 1; k++) {
            int L = (k >= 2) ? left[k - 2] : 0;
            int R = (k + 1 < n - 1) ? right[k + 1] : 0;

            long gap = (long) nums[k + 1] - nums[k - 1];
            if (gap % 2 != 0) continue;

            long need = gap / 2;

            boolean okLeft = (L == 0 || d[k - 2] == need);
            boolean okRight = (R == 0 || d[k + 1] == need);

            if (okLeft && okRight) {
                ans = Math.max(ans, L + R + 3);
            } else if (okLeft) {
                ans = Math.max(ans, L + 3);
            } else if (okRight) {
                ans = Math.max(ans, R + 3);
            } else {
                ans = Math.max(ans, 3);
            }
        }

        return Math.min(ans, n);
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        Map<Integer, Integer> xId = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Integer> yId = new HashMap<>();
        int id = 0;
        for (int[] p : points) {
            if (!xId.containsKey(p[0])) xId.put(p[0], id++);
            if (!yId.containsKey(p[1])) yId.put(p[1], id++);
        }

        UnionFind uf = new UnionFind(id);
        for (int[] p : points) {
            uf.union(xId.get(p[0]), yId.get(p[1]));
        }

        Map<Integer, Integer> map = new HashMap<>();
        for (int[] p : points) {
            int root = uf.findRoot(xId.get(p[0]));
            map.put(root, map.getOrDefault(root, 0) + 1);
        }

        int largest = 0, second = 0;

        for (int size : map.values()) {
            if (size > largest) {
                second = largest;
                largest = size;
            } else if (size > second) {
                second = size;
            }
        }

        return largest + second + 1;
    }

    class UnionFind {
        int[] arr;
        UnionFind(int n) {
            arr = new int[n];
            for (int i = 0; i < arr.length; i++) {
                arr[i] = i;
            }
        }

        int findRoot(int a) {
            int root = a;
            while (arr[root] != root) {
                root = arr[root];
            }

            while (a != root) {
                int tmp = arr[a];
                arr[a] = root;
                a = tmp;
            }

            return root;
        }

        void union (int a, int b) {
            int root1 = findRoot(a);
            int root2 = findRoot(b);
            arr[root1] = root2;
        }

        boolean find(int a, int b) {
            int root1 = findRoot(a);
            int root2 = findRoot(b);

            return root1 == root2;
        }
    }
}
[Q4_END]

class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        int det[n];
        for (int i = 1; i < n; i++) det[i] = nums[i] - nums[i - 1];

        int f[n], g[n];
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            f[i] = min(i + 1, 2);
            if (i > 0 && det[i] == det[i - 1]) f[i] = f[i - 1] + 1;
        }
        for (int i = n - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
            g[i] = min(n - i, 2);
            if (i < n - 2 && det[i + 1] == det[i + 2]) g[i] = g[i + 1] + 1;
        }

        int ans = 3;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            ans = max({ans, f[i], g[i]});
            if (i > 0) ans = max(ans, f[i - 1] + 1);
            if (i + 1 < n) ans = max(ans, g[i + 1] + 1);
            if (i > 0 && i + 1 < n) {
                int d = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1];
                if (d % 2 == 0) {
                    d /= 2;
                    int len = 3;
                    if (i == 1 || d == det[i - 1]) len += f[i - 1] - 1;
                    if (i == n - 2 || d == det[i + 2]) len += g[i + 1] - 1;
                    ans = max(ans, len);
                }
            }
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
