class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if(n<=3) return n;
        int m = n - 1;
        vector<int> D(m);
        for(int i=0; i<m; i++){
            D[i] = nums[i+1] - nums[i];
        }
        struct R{
            int val;
            int start;
            int end;
            int len;
        };

        vector<R> r;
        for(int i=0; i<m;){
            int j = i;
            while(j<m && D[j] == D[i]) j++;
            r.push_back({D[i], i, j-1, j-i});
            i=j;
        }
        vector<int> temp(m, -1);
        for(int i=0; i<r.size(); i++) temp[r[i].start] = i;
        int ans = 0;
        for(auto& x: r){
            int len = x.len;
            if(len < m){
                ans = max(ans, len + 1);
            }
            else{
                ans = max(ans, len);
            }
            if(x.end + 2<m){
                long long s = (long long) D[x.end + 1] + D[x.end + 2];
                if(s == 2LL * x.val){
                    int cur = len + 2;
                    int nex = x.end + 3;
                    if(nex < m && temp[nex] != -1){
                        if(r[temp[nex]].val == x.val){
                            cur += r[temp[nex]].len;
                        }
                    }
                    ans = max(ans, cur);
                }
            }

            if(x.start - 2 >=0){
                long long sum = (long long)D[x.start - 2] + D[x.start - 1];
                if(sum == 2LL * x.val){
                    int cur = len + 2;
                    ans = max(ans, cur);
                }
            }
        }
        return ans + 1;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:

    int f2(int i, vector<int>& r){
        return r[i] == i? i: r[i] = f2(r[i], r);
    }
    
    void f(int i, int j, vector<int>& r, vector<int>& s){
        int a = f2(i, r), b= f2(j, r);
        if(a != b){
            r[a] = b;
            s[b] += s[a];
        }
    }
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        vector<int> r(n), s(n, 1), c;
        for(int i=0; i<n; i++) r[i] = i;

        unordered_map<int, int> x, y;
        for(int i=0; i<n; i++){
            if(x.count(points[i][0])) f(i, x[points[i][0]], r, s);
            else x[points[i][0]] = i;
            if(y.count(points[i][1])) f(i, y[points[i][1]], r, s);
            else y[points[i][1]] = i;
        }
        for(int i=0;i  <n; i++){
            if(r[i] == i) c.push_back(s[i]);
        }
        sort(c.rbegin(), c.rend());
        if(c.size() > 1) return c[0] + c[1] + 1;
        return c[0] + 1;
    }
};

class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, a: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(a)

        # NOTE:
        # n >= 2
        # thus, the answer is always >= 2

        # since any adjacent (x,y) pair is always arithmetic

        # UPD:
        # answer is ALWAYS >= 3
        # because,
        # for (x,y,z)
        # you can make z compatible w/ (x,y)

        # it is NOT possible to force generic 4-pair to be arithmetic
        # because the line goes through 3 fixed points

        # what are the cases here?

        

        # only bother to pair two sides IFF
        # they actually would extend the chain
        # or something

        # NOTE: you probably don't even need a pre-pass to check unmodified streaks
        # because you can modify 

        # DP?
        # what if you do DP?

        # "padding a gap"

        # maybe... you are deferring
        # so you look for the first sign of trouble
        # and then you patch things up?

        # is there any issue w/ this approach?

        # I think,
        # if you try both FORWARD && BACK
        # this should actually cover ALL of the cases?

        arev = list(reversed(a))

        # NOTE: returns (j-1, dist, DONE)
        # where DONE indicates that you actually reached the end of the array;
        # you cannot beat that..
        def streak(a, i):
            assert i + 1 < n

            # first stop location: j-1; for the failure j)
            stop1 = None

            j = i+1
            
            delta = a[j] - a[i]
            
            while True:
                # reached the end!
                if j == n:
                    return (None, n-i, True)
                
                need = a[i] + (j-i)*delta

                if a[j] != need:
                    if stop1 is None:
                        stop1 = j-1
                    else:
                        return (stop1, j-i, False)

                j += 1

            # something like this..
        
        def solve(a):
            
            ret = 3

            i = 0

            while i + 1 < n:
                stop1, dist, done = streak(a, i)

                ret = max(ret, dist)

                if done:
                    return ret
                else:
                    assert stop1 is not None
                    assert stop1 > i
                    i = stop1
                

            # how far do you move forward?
            # after you fail?
            
            # presumably, you don't even try

            # so..
            # lets say you start at [i]

            # you compare
            # a[i] vs. a[i+1]
            # to get the TARGET delta = d
            # now, everything is expected to be
            # a[j] = a[i] + d*(j-i)
            # you keep scanning to look for that failure?
            # yeah?
            # and you short circuit at j)
            # to get the answer a[i .. j)
            # when you fail the SECOND time

            # but, how far to skip forward now?
            # I think you skip forward to j-1, where j) is the first failure
            # since this marks a new delta?

            

        ret = solve(a)
        RET = solve(arev)

        return max(ret, RET)
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]

# supports arbitrary labels
# ~60% speed of unlabelled version
class DSU_labelled:

    # dsu = DSU_labelled(a, node_op = None, node_vals = [])
    def __init__(self, a = [], node_op = None, node_vals = []):
        self.sz = defaultdict(lambda: 1)
        self.par = {u:u for u in a}

        if node_op:
            self.node_op = node_op
            self.node_agg = {u:val for u,val in zip(a, node_vals)}
            self.add = self.add_node_agg
            self.merge = self.merge_node_agg
            self.get_agg = self.get_node_agg


    def get_node_agg(self, u):
        return self.node_agg[self.find(u)]


    def add(self, u):
        self.par[u] = u

    def add_node_agg(self, u, val):
        self.par[u] = u
        self.node_agg[u] = val


    # fast path halving
    def find(self, u):
        if u not in self.par:
            self.par[u] = u
            return u

        while (par := self.par[u]) != u and (grandpar := self.par[par]) != par:
            self.par[u] = grandpar
            u = grandpar
        return par


    def merge(self, u, v):
        root = self.find(u)
        ROOT = self.find(v)

        if root != ROOT:
            if (size := self.sz[root]) >= (SIZE := self.sz[ROOT]):
                self.par[ROOT] = root
                self.sz[root] += SIZE
            else:
                self.par[root] = ROOT
                self.sz[ROOT] += size

    def merge_node_agg(self, u, v):
        root = self.find(u)
        ROOT = self.find(v)

        if root != ROOT:
            if (size := self.sz[root]) >= (SIZE := self.sz[ROOT]):
                self.par[ROOT] = root
                self.sz[root] += SIZE
                self.node_agg[root] = self.node_op(self.node_agg[root], self.node_agg[ROOT])
            else:
                self.par[root] = ROOT
                self.sz[ROOT] += size
                self.node_agg[ROOT] = self.node_op(self.node_agg[ROOT], self.node_agg[root])


    def connected(self, u, v):
        return self.find(u) == self.find(v)


    def groups(self):
        ret = defaultdict(list)
        for u in self.par:
            ret[self.find(u)].append(u)
        return list(ret.values())




class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        
        # p = [x,y]

        # ALL POINTS ARE DISTINCT

        # graph problem?
        # connectivity problem?

        # NOTE:
        # in effect, the LOOSEST benefit of the added point (X,Y) is that
        # every point along |X| and |Y] gets activated as well

        # DSU is important here
        # you identify connected groups in this way
        # over the initial state,

        # (BIDIRECTIONAL ACTIVATIONS)
        # p <-activates-> q

        # now what?

        # is this about persistent DSU?
        # it might be

        # but..

        # NOTE:
        # CONNECTED GROUPS can be defined in terms of:
        # their set{x} + set(y)
        # which they collectively enable

        # by definition,
        # amongst these different connected groups,
        # they are ALL MUTUALLY EXCLUSIVE

        # {x_i, y_j}

        # so..
        # w/ a single point
        # it should be possible to enable 2 different groups
        # EXACTLY 2 different groups
        # and nothing more, it sound be like so..

        # so, you just find the 2 largest groups

        points = list(map(tuple, points))

        # id: i
        dsu = DSU_labelled(list(range(n)))

        # TODO: is the correct? it might not be..
        x_pool = defaultdict(list)
        y_pool = defaultdict(list)

        for i,(x,y) in enumerate(points):
            x_pool[x].append(i)
            y_pool[y].append(i)

        for row in x_pool.values():
            for p,P in pairwise(row):
                dsu.merge(p, P)
        
        for row in y_pool.values():
            for p,P in pairwise(row):
                dsu.merge(p, P)

        groups = dsu.groups()

        sizes = list(map(len, groups))
        sizes.sort(reverse = True)
        m = len(sizes)

        if m == 1:
            return sizes[0] + 1
        else:
            return sizes[0] + sizes[1] + 1
    
[Q4_END]

class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        p = nums
        r = len(p)
        if r <= 2:
            return r
        L = [0] * r
        R = [0] * r
        L[0] = 1
        for i in range(1, r):
            if i > 1 and p[i] - p[i - 1] == p[i - 1] - p[i - 2]:
                L[i] = L[i - 1] + 1
            else:
                L[i] = 2
        R[r - 1] = 1
        for i in range(r - 2, -1, -1):
            if i + 2 < r and p[i + 1] - p[i] == p[i + 2] - p[i + 1]:
                R[i] = R[i + 1] + 1
            else:
                R[i] = 2
        ans = max(L)
        for i in range(r):
            if i > 0:
                ans = max(ans, L[i - 1] + 1)
            if i < r - 1:
                ans = max(ans, R[i + 1] + 1)
            if 0 < i < r - 1:
                d = p[i + 1] - p[i - 1]
                if d % 2 == 0:
                    d //= 2
                    l = 1
                    if i >= 2 and p[i - 1] - p[i - 2] == d:
                        l = L[i - 1]
                    right = 1
                    if i + 2 < r and p[i + 2] - p[i + 1] == d:
                        right = R[i + 1]
                    ans = max(ans, l + 1 + right)
        return min(ans, r)
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        p = points
        r = len(p)
        xs = defaultdict(list)
        ys = defaultdict(list)
        for i, (x, y) in enumerate(p):
            xs[x].append(i)
            ys[y].append(i)
        vis = [0] * r
        c = []
        for i in range(r):
            if vis[i]:
                continue
            q = deque([i])
            vis[i] = 1
            s = 0
            while q:
                u = q.popleft()
                s += 1
                x, y = p[u]
                for v in xs[x]:
                    if not vis[v]:
                        vis[v] = 1
                        q.append(v)
                for v in ys[y]:
                    if not vis[v]:
                        vis[v] = 1
                        q.append(v)
                xs[x] = []
                ys[y] = []
            c.append(s)
        c.sort(reverse=True)
        if len(c) == 1:
            return min(c[0] + 1, r + 1)
        return min(max(c[0] + 1, c[0] + c[1] + 1), r + 1)
[Q4_END]

class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        int[] L = new int[n];int[] R =new int[n];
        L[0] =1;
        L[1] = 2;
        int ans = 2;
        for (int i =2; i<n;i++) {
            L[i] =(nums[i]-nums[i-1] == nums[i-1]-nums[i- 2])? L[i - 1]+ 1 :2;
            ans = Math.max(ans, L[i]);
        }
        R[n-1] =1;
        R[n-2]= 2;
        for (int i =n-3; i >= 0;i--) {
            R[i] = (nums[i+1] -nums[i] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]) ? R[i+1] +1 : 2;
        }
        for (int i = 0; i <n;i++) {
            if (i > 0){
                ans =Math.max(ans, L[i-1] + 1);
            }
            if (i + 1 < n){
                ans = Math.max(ans, R[i+1] + 1); 
            }
            if (i > 0 && i + 1 < n) {
                long gap = (long) nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1];
                if ((gap & 1) == 0) {
                    long d =gap /2;
                    int left =(i >= 2&&(long) nums[i-1] -nums[i-2] == d) ? L[i-1] : 1;
                    int right =(i+2 < n && (long)nums[i+2] -nums[i+1] ==d) ?R[i+1] :1;
                    ans = Math.max(ans, left + 1 + right);
                }
            }
        }
        return Math.min(ans, n);
    }
}

[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length; oof rand = new oof(n);
        HashMap<Integer, Integer> unga = new HashMap<>();
        HashMap<Integer, Integer> bunga = new HashMap<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];
            if (unga.containsKey(x)) {
                rand.together(i, unga.get(x));
            } else {
                unga.put(x, i);
            }
            if (bunga.containsKey(y)) {
                rand.together(i, bunga.get(y));
            } else {
                bunga.put(y, i);
            }
        }
        int largest = 0, secondLargest = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (rand.find(i) == i) {
                int sz = rand.size[i];
                if (sz >= largest) {
                    secondLargest = largest;
                    largest = sz;
                } else if (sz > secondLargest) {
                    secondLargest = sz;
                }
            }
        }
        return largest + secondLargest + 1;
    }
    static class oof {
        int[] padre;
        int[] size;
        oof(int n) {
            padre = new int[n];
            size = new int[n];
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
                padre[i] = i;
                size[i] = 1;
            }
        }
        int find(int x) {
            if (padre[x] != x) {
                padre[x] = find(padre[x]);
            }
            return padre[x];
        }
        void together(int a, int b) {
            int ra = find(a);
            int rb = find(b);
            if (ra == rb){
                return;
            } 
            if (size[ra] < size[rb]) {
                int temp = ra;
                ra = rb;
                rb = temp;
            }
            padre[rb] = ra;
            size[ra] += size[rb];
        }
    }
    }
[Q4_END]

class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        diff = [nums[i+1]-nums[i] for i in range(n-1)]
        left = [1]*(n-1)
        right = [1]*(n-1)
        for i in range(1,n-1):
            if diff[i]==diff[i-1]:
                left[i]=left[i-1]+1
        for i in range(n-3,-1,-1):
            if diff[i]==diff[i+1]:
                right[i]=right[i+1]+1
        ans = max(left)
        for i in range(n):
            if i==0:
                ans = max(ans,right[1]+1)
            elif i==n-1:
                ans=max(ans,left[n-3]+1)
            else:
                if i-2>=0:
                    ans = max(ans,left[i-2]+1)
                if i+1<n-1:
                    ans = max(ans,right[i+1]+1)
                s = diff[i]+diff[i-1]
                if s%2==0:
                    v = s//2
                    curr=2
                    le = (i-2>=0 and diff[i-2]==v)
                    rig = (i+1<n-1 and diff[i+1]==v)
                    if le and rig:
                        curr = left[i-2]+2+right[i+1]
                    elif le:
                        curr = left[i-2]+2
                    elif rig:
                        curr= right[i+1]+2
                    ans = max(ans,curr)
        return ans+1
                        
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        par = list(range(n))
        size = [1]*n
        def find(i):
            if par[i]==i:
                return i
            par[i]=find(par[i])
            return par[i]
        def union(a,b):
            para,parb = find(a),find(b)
            if para!=parb:
                if size[para]<size[parb]:
                    para,parb,parb,para
                par[parb]=para
                size[para]+=size[parb]
        xm,ym = {},{}
        for i,(x,y) in enumerate(points):
            if x in xm:
                union(i,xm[x])
            else:
                xm[x]=i
            if y in ym:
                union(i,ym[y])
            else:ym[y]=i
        cs = []
        for i in range(n):
            if par[i]==i:
                cs.append(size[i])
        cs.sort(reverse=True)
        if len(cs)==1:return cs[0]+1
        return cs[0]+cs[1]+1
[Q4_END]

from typing import List

class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        ab = len(nums)
        if ab <= 3:
            return ab
            
        bc = [nums[i+1] - nums[i] for i in range(ab - 1)]
        cd = [1] * len(bc)
        de = [1] * len(bc)
        
        for i in range(1, len(bc)):
            if bc[i] == bc[i-1]:
                cd[i] = cd[i-1] + 1
                
        for i in range(len(bc) - 2, -1, -1):
            if bc[i] == bc[i+1]:
                de[i] = de[i+1] + 1
                
        ef = 0
        for i in range(len(bc)):
            if cd[i] == len(bc):
                ef = max(ef, cd[i])
            else:
                ef = max(ef, cd[i] + 1)
                
        for i in range(len(bc) - 1):
            kl = bc[i] + bc[i+1]
            if kl % 2 == 0:
                mn = kl // 2
                op = cd[i-1] if (i > 0 and bc[i-1] == mn) else 0
                qr = de[i+2] if (i + 2 < len(bc) and bc[i+2] == mn) else 0
                ef = max(ef, op + 2 + qr)
                
        return ef + 1
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        ab = list(range(len(points)))
        bc = [1] * len(points)

        def cd(de):
            if ab[de] != de:
                ab[de] = cd(ab[de])
            return ab[de]

        def ef(fg, gh):
            ij = cd(fg)
            kl = cd(gh)
            if ij != kl:
                if bc[ij] < bc[kl]:
                    ij, kl = kl, ij
                ab[kl] = ij
                bc[ij] += bc[kl]

        mn = {}
        op = {}

        for qr, (st, uv) in enumerate(points):
            if st in mn:
                ef(qr, mn[st])
            else:
                mn[st] = qr
            
            if uv in op:
                ef(qr, op[uv])
            else:
                op[uv] = qr

        wx = {}
        for yz in range(len(points)):
            za = cd(yz)
            wx[za] = wx.get(za, 0) + 1

        ab_lst = sorted(wx.values(), reverse=True)
        
        if len(ab_lst) >= 2:
            return ab_lst[0] + ab_lst[1] + 1
        return ab_lst[0] + 1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 154 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& a) {
        int n = a.size();
        if (n <= 2) return n;
        vector<int> l(n), r(n);
        vector<long long> ld(n), rd(n);
        l[0] = 1;
        for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
            ld[i] = (long long)a[i] - a[i-1];
            if (i >= 2 && ld[i] == ld[i-1]) 
                l[i] = l[i-1] + 1;
            else l[i] = 2;
        }
        r[n-1] = 1;
        for (int i = n-2; i >= 0; --i) {
            rd[i] = (long long)a[i+1] - a[i];
            if (i <= n-3 && rd[i] == rd[i+1]) 
                r[i] = r[i+1] + 1;
            else r[i] = 2;
        }
        int ans = 2;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) ans = max(ans, l[i]);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            if (i == 0) 
                ans = max(ans, 1 + r[1]);
            else if (i == n-1) ans = max(ans, l[n-2] + 1);
            else {
                ans = max(ans, l[i-1] + 1);
                ans = max(ans, r[i+1] + 1);
                long long sum = (long long)a[i+1] - a[i-1];
                if (sum % 2 == 0) {
                    long long d = sum / 2;
                    int left_take = 1;
                    if (i-1 >= 1 && ld[i-1] == d) 
                        left_take = l[i-1];
                    int right_take = 1;
                    if (i+1 <= n-2 && rd[i+1] == d) 
                        right_take = r[i+1];
                    ans = max(ans, left_take + 1 + right_take);
                }
            }
        }
        return min(ans, n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& pts) {
        int n = pts.size();
        if(n==0) return 0;
        unordered_map<long long, vector<int>> tp1,tp2;
        tp1.reserve(n*2); tp2.reserve(n*2);
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            long long x=pts[i][0], y=pts[i][1];
            tp1[x].push_back(i);
            tp2[y].push_back(i);
        }
        vector<int> p(n);
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) p[i]=i;
        function<int(int)> f=[&](int a){ return p[a]==a?a:p[a]=f(p[a]);};
        auto uni=[&](int a,int b){ a=f(a); b=f(b); if(a!=b) p[b]=a; };
        for(auto &kv:tp1){
            auto &v=kv.second;
            for(int i=1;i<(int)v.size();i++) uni(v[0],v[i]);
        }
        for(auto &kv:tp2){
            auto &v=kv.second;
            for(int i=1;i<(int)v.size();i++) uni(v[0],v[i]);
        }
        unordered_map<int,int> compIdx;
        compIdx.reserve(n*2);
        int cid=0;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            int r=f(i);
            if(!compIdx.count(r)) compIdx[r]=cid++;
        }
        vector<int> csize(cid,0);
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) csize[compIdx[f(i)]]++;
        vector<unordered_set<long long>> compYs(cid), compXs(cid);
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            int c=compIdx[f(i)];
            compXs[c].insert(pts[i][0]);
            compYs[c].insert(pts[i][1]);
        }
        unordered_map<long long, vector<int>> compsOfX, compsOfY;
        compsOfX.reserve(tp1.size()*2); compsOfY.reserve(tp2.size()*2);
        for(auto &kv:tp1){
            long long x=kv.first;
            unordered_set<int> tmp;
            for(int id:kv.second) tmp.insert(compIdx[f(id)]);
            for(int c:tmp) compsOfX[x].push_back(c);
        }
        for(auto &kv:tp2){
            long long y=kv.first;
            unordered_set<int> tmp;
            for(int id:kv.second) tmp.insert(compIdx[f(id)]);
            for(int c:tmp) compsOfY[y].push_back(c);
        }
        unordered_map<long long, long long> sutp1, sutp2;
        sutp1.reserve(compsOfX.size()*2); sutp2.reserve(compsOfY.size()*2);
        for(auto &kv:compsOfX){
            long long x=kv.first; long long s=0;
            for(int c:kv.second) s+=csize[c];
            sutp1[x]=s;
        }
        for(auto &kv:compsOfY){
            long long y=kv.first; long long s=0;
            for(int c:kv.second) s+=csize[c];
            sutp2[y]=s;
        }
        vector<pair<long long,long long>> vy;
        vy.reserve(sutp2.size());
        for(auto &kv:sutp2) vy.push_back({kv.second, kv.first});
        sort(vy.begin(), vy.end(), greater<pair<long long,long long>>());
        long long bestSingle=1;
        for(auto &kv:sutp1) bestSingle=max(bestSingle, kv.second+1);
        for(auto &kv:sutp2) bestSingle=max(bestSingle, kv.second+1);
        unordered_set<long long> occ;
        occ.reserve(n*2);
        auto pack=[&](long long x,long long y)->long long{ return (x<<32) ^ (y&0xffffffffULL); };
        for(auto &pt:pts) occ.insert(pack(pt[0],pt[1]));
        long long tpans = bestSingle;
        long long maxYsum = vy.empty()?0:vy[0].first;
        for(auto &kx:compsOfX){
            long long x = kx.first;
            long long sx = sutp1[x];
            if(sx + maxYsum + 1 <= tpans) continue;
            for(auto &py:vy){
                long long sy = py.first;
                long long y = py.second;
                if(sx + sy + 1 <= tpans) break;
                if(occ.count(pack(x,y))) continue;
                long long overlap=0;
                for(int c: kx.second){
                    if(compYs[c].count(y)) overlap += csize[c];
                }
                long long cand = sx + sy - overlap + 1;
                if(cand>tpans) tpans=cand;
                break;
            }
        }
        return (int)min<long long>(tpans, n+1);
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 155 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        vector<int> a(n, 1), b(n, 1);
        a[1] = 2;
        for (int i = 2, d = nums[1] - nums[0]; i < n; ++i) {
            if (nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == d)
                a[i] = a[i - 1] + 1;
            else
                a[i] = 2, d = nums[i] - nums[i - 1];
        }
        b[n - 2] = 2;
        for (int i = n - 2, d = nums[n - 2] - nums[n - 1]; i-- > 0;) {
            if (nums[i] - nums[i + 1] == d)
                b[i] = b[i + 1] + 1;
            else
                b[i] = 2, d = nums[i] - nums[i + 1];
        }
        int ret = 3;
        for (int i = 2; i < n; ++i)
            ret = max(ret, a[i - 1] + 1);
        for (int i = n - 2; i-- > 0;)
            ret = max(ret, b[i + 1] + 1);
        for (int i = 3; i < n; ++i) {
            if (nums[i] - nums[i - 2] == (nums[i - 2] - nums[i - 3]) * 2)
                ret = max(ret, a[i - 2] + 2);
        }
        for (int i = n - 3; i-- > 0;) {
            if (nums[i] - nums[i + 2] == (nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 3]) * 2)
                ret = max(ret, b[i + 2] + 2);
        }
        for (int i = 2; i + 2 < n; ++i) {
            if ((nums[i - 1] + nums[i + 1]) % 2)
                continue;
            int d = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1];
            if (d == (nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]) * 2 &&
                d == (nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]) * 2)
                ret = max(ret, a[i - 1] + b[i + 1] + 1);
        }
        return ret;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        map<int, vector<int>> by_x, by_y;
        int n = points.size();
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            int x = points[i][0], y = points[i][1];
            by_x[x].push_back(i);
            by_y[y].push_back(i);
        }
        vector<int> rt(n);
        iota(rt.begin(), rt.end(), 0);
        vector<int> sz(n, 1);
        vector<int> ht(n);
        function<int(int)> rof = [&](int x) {
            return x == rt[x] ? x : (rt[x] = rof(rt[x]));
        };
        auto mrg = [&](int x, int y) {
            x = rof(x);
            y = rof(y);
            if (x == y)
                return false;
            if (ht[x] < ht[y])
                swap(x, y);
            rt[y] = x;
            sz[x] += sz[y];
            ht[x] = max(ht[x], ht[y] + 1);
            return true;
        };
        for (const auto& [k, v] : by_x)
            for (int i = 1; i < v.size(); ++i)
                mrg(v[0], v[i]);
        for (const auto& [k, v] : by_y)
            for (int i = 1; i < v.size(); ++i)
                mrg(v[0], v[i]);
        int sz1 = 0, sz2 = 0;
        for (int x = 0; x < n; ++x) {
            if (x == rof(x)) {
                if (sz[x] > sz1)
                    sz2 = sz1, sz1 = sz[x];
                else if (sz[x] > sz2)
                    sz2 = sz[x];
            }
        }
        return 1 + sz1 + sz2;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 156 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        if (n <= 2) return n;
        
        int m = n - 1;
        int[] diff = new int[m];
        for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) {
            diff[i] = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
        }
        
        int ans = Math.min(n, 3);
        int i = 0;
        
        while (i < m) {
            int start = i;
            int v = diff[i];
            while (i < m && diff[i] == v) i++;
            int end = i - 1;
            int L = end - start + 1;
            
            int maxLen = L;
            
            if (start > 0 || end < m - 1) {
                maxLen = Math.max(maxLen, L + 1);
            }
            
            if (end + 2 < m && diff[end + 1] + diff[end + 2] == 2 * v) {
                int merge = L + 2;
                if (end + 3 < m && diff[end + 3] == v) {
                    int k = end + 3;
                    while (k < m && diff[k] == v) k++;
                    merge += k - (end + 3);
                }
                maxLen = Math.max(maxLen, merge);
            }
            
            if (start - 2 >= 0 && diff[start - 1] + diff[start - 2] == 2 * v) {
                int merge = L + 2;
                if (start - 3 >= 0 && diff[start - 3] == v) {
                    int k = start - 3;
                    while (k >= 0 && diff[k] == v) k--;
                    merge += (start - 3) - k;
                }
                maxLen = Math.max(maxLen, merge);
            }
            
            ans = Math.max(ans, maxLen + 1);
        }
        
        return ans;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
               int n = points.length;
        if (n == 0) return 1;

        int[] parent = new int[2 * n];
        int[] edges = new int[2 * n];

        for (int i = 0; i < 2 * n; i++) {
            parent[i] = i;
            edges[i] = 0; 
        }
        
        Map<Integer, Integer> xMap = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Integer> yMap = new HashMap<>();
        int idCounter = 0;

        for (int[] p : points) {
            int x = p[0];
            int y = p[1];
            if (!xMap.containsKey(x)) {
                xMap.put(x, idCounter++);
            }
            if (!yMap.containsKey(y)) {
                yMap.put(y, idCounter++);
            }
            
            int u = xMap.get(x);
            int v = yMap.get(y);
            
            int rootU = find(parent, u);
            int rootV = find(parent, v);
            if (rootU != rootV) {
                parent[rootU] = rootV;     
                  
                edges[rootV] += edges[rootU] + 1; 
            } else {
                edges[rootU] += 1;
            }
        }
        
        Set<Integer> uniqueRoots = new HashSet<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < idCounter; i++) {
            uniqueRoots.add(find(parent, i));
        }
        List<Integer> sizes = new ArrayList<>();
        for (int root : uniqueRoots) {
            sizes.add(edges[root]);
        }
        sizes.sort(Collections.reverseOrder());
        if (sizes.size() == 0) {
            return 1;
        } else if (sizes.size() == 1) {
            return sizes.get(0) + 1;
        } else {
            return sizes.get(0) + sizes.get(1) + 1;
        }
    }

    private int find(int[] parent, int i) {
        if (parent[i] == i) {
            return i;
        }
        return parent[i] = find(parent, parent[i]);
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 158 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 2:
            return n

        d = [nums[i + 1] - nums[i] for i in range(n - 1)]
        m = n - 1

        L = [1] * m
        R = [1] * m
        for i in range(1, m):
            if d[i] == d[i - 1]:
                L[i] = L[i - 1] + 1

        for i in range(m - 2, -1, -1):
            if d[i] == d[i + 1]:
                R[i] = R[i + 1] + 1

        res = max(L) + 1
        if n >= 3:
            res = max(res, R[1] + 2)
        if n > 3:
            res = max(res, L[m - 2] + 2)

        for i in range(1, n - 1):
            left = 2
            if i - 2>= 0:
                left = L[i - 2] + 2
            res = max(res, left)

            right = 2
            if i + 1 <= m - 1:
                right = R[i + 1] + 2
            res = max(res, right)

            gap = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]
            if gap % 2 == 0:
                x = gap // 2
                left_part = 1
                if i - 2 >= 0 and d[i - 2] == x:
                    left_part += L[i - 2]
                right_part = 1
                if i + 1 <= m - 1 and d[i + 1] == x:
                    right_part += R[i + 1]
                res = max(res, left_part + right_part + 1)
        return res
        return res
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        parent = {}
        size = {}

        def find(x):
            if parent[x] != x:
                parent[x] = find(parent[x])
            return parent[x]
        def union(a, b):
            ra, rb = find(a), find(b)
            if ra == rb:
                return 
            if size[ra] < size[rb]:
                ra, rb, = rb, ra
            parent[rb] = ra
            size[ra] += size[rb]

        def add(x):
            if x not in parent:
                parent[x] = x
                size[x] = 1

        for x, y in points:
            nx = ("x", x)
            ny = ("y", y)
            add(nx)
            add(ny)
            union(nx, ny)

        comp_edges = {}
        for x, y in points:
            root = find(("x", x))
            comp_edges[root] = comp_edges.get(root, 0) + 1
        vals = sorted(comp_edges.values(), reverse=True)
        if not vals:
            return 1
        if len(vals) == 1:
            return vals[0] + 1
        return vals[0] + vals[1] + 1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 159 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 2:
            return n

        left = [0] * n
        left[0] = 1
        left[1] = 2
        for i in range(2, n):
            if nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]:
                left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1
            else:
                left[i] = 2

        right = [0] * n
        right[-1] = 1
        right[-2] = 2
        for i in range(n - 3, -1, -1):
            if nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == nums[i + 1] - nums[i]:
                right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1
            else:
                right[i] = 2

        ans = max(left)
        for i in range(n):
            if i < n - 1:
                ans = max(ans, 1 + right[i + 1])
            if i > 0:
                ans = max(ans, 1 + left[i - 1])

            # mid
            if 0 < i < n - 1:
                gap = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]
                if gap % 2 == 0:
                    d = gap // 2
                    
                    if i > 1 and nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == d:
                        L = left[i - 1]
                    else:
                        L = 1

                    if i < n - 2 and nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == d:
                        R = right[i + 1]
                    else:
                        R = 1

                    ans = max(ans, L + 1 + R)

        return ans
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        parents = list(range(n))
        ranks = [1] * n

        def find(u):
            if parents[u] != u:
                parents[u] = find(parents[u])
            return parents[u]

        def union(u, v):
            a, b = find(u), find(v)
            if a == b:
                return False
            if ranks[a] <  ranks[b]:
                a, b = b, a
            ranks[a] += ranks[b]
            parents[b] = a
            return True

        x_2_i = defaultdict(list)
        y_2_i = defaultdict(list)

        for i in range(n):
            x, y = points[i]
            x_2_i[x].append(i)
            y_2_i[y].append(i)

        def union_existing(mapp):
            for cord in mapp.keys():
                indices = mapp[cord]
                i0 = indices[0]
                for j in range(1, len(indices)):
                    ij = indices[j]
                    union(i0, ij)

        union_existing(x_2_i)
        union_existing(y_2_i)
        sizes = sorted(Counter([find(i) for i in range(n)]).values(), reverse=True)

        if len(sizes) == 1:
            return sizes[0] + 1
        return sizes[0] + sizes[1] + 1
        
            
[Q4_END]

### RANK 161 ###
[Q3_START]
impl Solution {
    pub fn longest_arithmetic(nums: Vec<i32>) -> i32 {
        let n = nums.len();
        let mut res = 3;

        let mut pfx = vec![0;n + 1];
        let mut sfx = vec![0;n + 1];
        pfx[0] = 1;
        for i in 1..n {
            pfx[i] = 2;
            if i >= 2 && nums[i-1] * 2 == nums[i-2] + nums[i] {
                pfx[i] = pfx[i-1] + 1;
            }
        }
        sfx[n-1] = 1;
        for i in (0..n-1).rev() {
            sfx[i] = 2;
            if i + 3 <= n && nums[i+1] * 2 == nums[i+2] + nums[i] {
                sfx[i] = sfx[i+1] + 1;
            }
        }

        for i in 0..n-1 {
            res = res.max(pfx[i] + 1);
        }
        for i in (1..n).rev() {
            res = res.max(sfx[i] + 1);
        }

        for i in 0..n {
            if i >= 2 && i + 1 < n && (nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]) * 2 + nums[i-1] == nums[i+1] {
                res = res.max(pfx[i-1] + 2);
            }
            if i + 3 <= n && i > 0 && nums[i+1] - nums[i-1] == (nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]) * 2 {
                res = res.max(sfx[i+1] + 2);
            }
            if i >= 2 && i + 3 <= n {
                if nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] &&
                    nums[i+1] - nums[i-1] == (nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]) * 2 {
                    //println!("{i} {} {}", pfx[i-1], sfx[i+1]);
                    res = res.max(pfx[i-1] + sfx[i+1] + 1);
                    }
            }
        }

        res
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
impl Solution {
    pub fn max_activated(points: Vec<Vec<i32>>) -> i32 {
        let mut xs = Vec::new();
        let mut ys = Vec::new();

        for p in points.iter() {
            let &[x, y] = p.as_slice() else { panic!() };
            xs.push(x);
            ys.push(y);
        }

        xs.sort();
        xs.dedup();
        ys.sort();
        ys.dedup();

        let xn = xs.len();
        let yn = ys.len();

        let mut ds = DisjointSet::new(xn + yn);

        let spoints = points.iter().map(|v| {
            let x = v[0];
            let y = v[1];

            (xs.partition_point(|&t| t < x),
             ys.partition_point(|&t| t < y),)
        })
        .collect::<Vec<_>>();

        let mut x_cnts = vec![0;xn];
        let mut y_cnts = vec![0;yn];
        spoints.iter().for_each(|&v| {
            let x = v.0;
            let y = v.1;
            x_cnts[x] += 1;
            y_cnts[y] += 1;
            ds.unite(x, xn + y);
        });

        let mut cnts = vec![0;xn + yn];
        for pt in spoints.iter() {
            let &(x, y) = pt;
            let p = ds.find(x);
            cnts[p] += 1;
        }

        let mut res = *cnts.iter().max().unwrap() + 1;
        cnts.sort();
        cnts.reverse();
        let ans = cnts[0] + cnts[1] + 1;
        res = res.max(ans);
        res
    }
}

#[derive(Debug)]
pub struct DisjointSet {
    pars: Vec<i32>,
    sz: usize,
}

impl DisjointSet {
    pub fn new(n: usize) -> DisjointSet {
        let pars = vec![-1; n];
        let sz = n;
        DisjointSet { pars, sz }
    }

    pub fn reset(&mut self) {
        self.pars.fill(-1);
        self.sz = self.pars.len();
    }

    pub fn find(&mut self, x: usize) -> usize {
        match self.pars[x] {
            c if c < 0 => x,
            _ => {
                self.pars[x] = self.find(self.pars[x] as usize) as i32;
                self.pars[x] as usize
            }
        }
    }

    pub fn count(&self) -> usize {
        self.sz
    }

    pub fn size(&mut self, u: usize) -> usize {
        let rt = self.find(u);
        self.pars[rt] as usize
    }

    pub fn unite(&mut self, u: usize, v: usize) -> bool {
        let mut u = self.find(u);
        let mut v = self.find(v);
        if u == v {
            return false;
        }
        if self.find(u) > self.find(v) {
            std::mem::swap(&mut u, &mut v);
        }
        self.pars[u] += self.pars[v];
        self.pars[v] = u as i32;
        self.sz -= 1;

        true
    }

    pub fn is_same(&mut self, u: usize, v: usize) -> bool {
        self.find(u) == self.find(v)
    }
}
[Q4_END]

class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n=nums.length;
        if(n<=2) return n;
        Map<Integer,Integer>[] left = new HashMap[n];
        Map<Integer, Integer>[] right= new HashMap[n];
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            left[i]=new HashMap<>();
            right[i]=new HashMap<>();
        }
        for(int i=1;i<n;i++){
            int d=nums[i]-nums[i-1];
            int len=left[i-1].getOrDefault(d,1)+1;
            left[i].put(d,len);
        }
        for(int i=n-2;i>=0;i--){
            int d=nums[i+1]-nums[i];
            int len=right[i+1].getOrDefault(d,1)+1;
            right[i].put(d,len);
        }
        int maxlen=0;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            for(int len: left[i].values()) maxlen=Math.max(maxlen,len);
            if(i>0){
                for(int len: left[i-1].values()) maxlen=Math.max(maxlen,len+1);
            }
            if(i<n-1){
                for(int len: right[i+1].values()) maxlen=Math.max(maxlen, len+1);
            }
            if(i>0 && i<n-1){
                if((nums[i+1]-nums[i-1])%2==0){
                    int targetd=(nums[i+1]-nums[i-1])/2;
                    int combined=left[i-1].getOrDefault(targetd,1)+right[i+1].getOrDefault(targetd,1)+1;
                    maxlen=Math.max(maxlen, combined);
                }
            }
        }
        return Math.min(maxlen,n);
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class dsu{
    Map<Integer, Integer> parent=new HashMap<>();
    int find(int i){
        if(!parent.containsKey(i)) parent.put(i,i);
        if(parent.get(i)==i) return i;
        parent.put(i,find(parent.get(i)));
        return parent.get(i);
    }
    void union(int i, int j){
        int root1=find(i);
        int root2=find(j);
        if(root1!=root2) parent.put(root1, root2);
    }
}
class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n=points.length;
        if(n==0) return 1;
        dsu ds=new dsu();
        for(int[] p: points){
            ds.union(p[0], p[1]+1000000001);
        }
        Map<Integer, Integer> roottocount=new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Set<Integer>> roottox=new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Set<Integer>> roottoy=new HashMap<>();
        for(int[] p: points){
            int root=ds.find(p[0]);
            roottocount.put(root, roottocount.getOrDefault(root, 0)+1);
            roottox.computeIfAbsent(root, k-> new HashSet<>()).add(p[0]);
            roottoy.computeIfAbsent(root, k-> new HashSet<>()).add(p[1]);
        }
        List<Integer> counts=new ArrayList<>(roottocount.values());
        Collections.sort(counts, Collections.reverseOrder());
        if(counts.size()>=2){
            return counts.get(0)+counts.get(1)+1;
        }
        else{
            return counts.get(0)+1;
        }
    }
}

class Solution {
public:
    vector<long long> a, d;
    vector<int> pre, suf;
    int n, m;

    bool okLeft(int l, int r) {
        long long x = d[l];
        int run = min(suf[l], r - l + 1);
        if (run >= r - l + 1) return true;
        int p = l + run;
        if (p == r) return true;
        if (d[p] + d[p + 1] != 2 * x) return false;
        if (p + 2 > r) return true;
        return d[p + 2] == x && suf[p + 2] >= r - p - 1;
    }

    bool okRight(int l, int r) {
        long long x = d[r];
        int run = min(pre[r], r - l + 1);
        if (run >= r - l + 1) return true;
        int s = r - run + 1;
        if (s == l + 1) return true;
        if (d[s - 2] + d[s - 1] != 2 * x) return false;
        if (s - 3 < l) return true;
        return d[s - 3] == x && pre[s - 3] >= s - l - 2;
    }

    bool pos(int len) {
        if (len <= 3) return true;
        int k = len - 1;
        for (int l = 0; l + k - 1 < m; l++) {
            int r = l + k - 1;
            if (okLeft(l, r) || okRight(l, r)) return true;
        }
        return false;
    }

    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        n = (int)nums.size();
        a.assign(nums.begin(), nums.end());

        d.resize(n - 1);
        for (int i = 0; i + 1 < n; i++) d[i] = a[i + 1] - a[i];
        m = n - 1;

        pre.assign(m, 1);
        for (int i = 1; i < m; i++) {
            if (d[i] == d[i - 1]) pre[i] = pre[i - 1] + 1;
        }

        suf.assign(m, 1);
        for (int i = m - 2; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (d[i] == d[i + 1]) suf[i] = suf[i + 1] + 1;
        }

        int low = 3, high = n, ans = 3;
        while (low <= high) {
            int mid = low + (high - low) / 2;
            if (pos(mid)) {
                ans = mid;
                low = mid + 1;
            } else {
                high = mid - 1;
            }
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU {
public:
    vector<int> p, s;
    
    DSU(int n) {
        p.resize(n);
        s.assign(n, 1);
        iota(p.begin(), p.end(), 0);
    }
    
    int f(int x) {
        if (p[x] == x) return x;
        return p[x] = f(p[x]);
    }
    
    void u(int a, int b) {
        a = f(a);
        b = f(b);
        if (a == b) return;
        if (s[a] < s[b]) swap(a, b);
        p[b] = a;
        s[a] += s[b];
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = (int)points.size();
        DSU d(n);
        
        unordered_map<long long, int> mx, my;
        
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            long long x = points[i][0];
            long long y = points[i][1];
            
            if (mx.count(x)) d.u(i, mx[x]);
            else mx[x] = i;
            
            if (my.count(y)) d.u(i, my[y]);
            else my[y] = i;
        }
        
        vector<int> cnt(n, 0);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            cnt[d.f(i)]++;
        }
        
        int a = 0, b = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (cnt[i] > a) {
                b = a;
                a = cnt[i];
            } else if (cnt[i] > b) {
                b = cnt[i];
            }
        }
        
        return a + b + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
import java.util.*;

public class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        if (n <= 2) return n;

        return Math.max(solve(nums), solve(reverse(nums)));
    }

    private int solve(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        int maxLen = 0;
        
        int[] left = new int[n];
        
        int i = 0;
        while (i < n) {
            int j = i + 1;
            while (j < n) {
                int d = nums[j] - nums[j-1];
                int start = j - 1;
                while (j < n && nums[j] - nums[j-1] == d) {
                    j++;
                }
                int len = j - start;
                maxLen = Math.max(maxLen, Math.min(n, len + 1));
                
                if (j < n) maxLen = Math.max(maxLen, len + 1);
                
                if (j + 1 < n && nums[j+1] - nums[j-1] == 2 * d) {
                    int k = j + 1;
                    while (k + 1 < n && nums[k+1] - nums[k] == d) {
                        k++;
                    }
                    maxLen = Math.max(maxLen, len + (k - j) + 1);
                }
            }
            i = j - 1;
            if (i == n - 1) break;
        }
        return maxLen;
    }

    private int[] reverse(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        int[] rev = new int[n];
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) rev[i] = nums[n - 1 - i];
        return rev;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        if (n == 0) return 1;

        DSU dsu = new DSU(n);
        Map<Integer, Integer> xToLastIdx = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Integer> yToLastIdx = new HashMap<>();

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0], y = points[i][1];
            if (xToLastIdx.containsKey(x)) dsu.union(i, xToLastIdx.get(x));
            xToLastIdx.put(x, i);
            if (yToLastIdx.containsKey(y)) dsu.union(i, yToLastIdx.get(y));
            yToLastIdx.put(y, i);
        }

        int[] componentSize = new int[n];
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) componentSize[dsu.find(i)]++;

        Map<Integer, Set<Integer>> xComponents = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Set<Integer>> yComponents = new HashMap<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int root = dsu.find(i);
            xComponents.computeIfAbsent(points[i][0], k -> new HashSet<>()).add(root);
            yComponents.computeIfAbsent(points[i][1], k -> new HashSet<>()).add(root);
        }

        Map<Integer, Integer> xScore = new HashMap<>();
        for (var entry : xComponents.entrySet()) {
            int score = 0;
            for (int root : entry.getValue()) score += componentSize[root];
            xScore.put(entry.getKey(), score);
        }

        Map<Integer, Integer> yScore = new HashMap<>();
        for (var entry : yComponents.entrySet()) {
            int score = 0;
            for (int root : entry.getValue()) score += componentSize[root];
            yScore.put(entry.getKey(), score);
        }

        List<Integer> topX = new ArrayList<>(xScore.keySet());
        topX.sort((a, b) -> xScore.get(b) - xScore.get(a));
        List<Integer> topY = new ArrayList<>(yScore.keySet());
        topY.sort((a, b) -> yScore.get(b) - yScore.get(a));

        int maxActivated = 0;
        int searchLimit = Math.min(topX.size(), 400);

        for (int i = 0; i < searchLimit; i++) {
            int x = topX.get(i);
            for (int j = 0; j < topY.size(); j++) {
                int y = topY.get(j);
                
                if (xScore.get(x) + yScore.get(y) + 1 <= maxActivated) break;

                int current = 1;
                Set<Integer> combined = new HashSet<>(xComponents.get(x));
                for (int rootY : yComponents.get(y)) {
                    combined.add(rootY);
                }
                for (int root : combined) current += componentSize[root];
                
                maxActivated = Math.max(maxActivated, current);
                if (maxActivated == n + 1) return n + 1;
            }
        }

        return maxActivated;
    }

    static class DSU {
        int[] parent;
        DSU(int n) {
            parent = new int[n];
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) parent[i] = i;
        }
        int find(int i) {
            if (parent[i] == i) return i;
            return parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
        }
        void union(int i, int j) {
            int rootI = find(i), rootJ = find(j);
            if (rootI != rootJ) parent[rootI] = rootJ;
        }
    }
}

[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if(n<=2) return n;
        vector<int> diff;
        for(int i=0;i<n-1;i++){
            diff.push_back(nums[i+1] - nums[i]);
        }

        int m = diff.size();
        vector<int> left(m),right(m);
        for(int i=0;i<m;i++){
            if(i>0 && diff[i]==diff[i-1]){
                left[i] = left[i-1]+1;
            }
            else left[i] = 1;
        }
        for(int i=m-1;i>=0;i--){
            if(i<m-1 && diff[i]==diff[i+1]){
                right[i] = right[i+1]+1;
            }
            else right[i] = 1;
        }
        int maxdiff = 1;
        for(int i=0;i<m;i++) maxdiff = max(maxdiff,left[i]+1);

        for(int i=0;i<m-1;i++){
            long long sum = (long long) diff[i] +diff[i+1];
            if(sum%2==0){
                int d = sum/2;
                int curr = 2;
                if(i>0 && diff[i-1]==d) curr += left[i-1];
                if(i+2<m && diff[i+2]==d) curr += right[i+2];
                maxdiff = max(maxdiff,curr);
            }
        }
        return min(n,maxdiff+1);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU {
public:

    std::vector<int> parent;
    std::vector<int> size;

    // Constructor initializes each element in its own set of size 1
    DSU(int n) {
        parent.resize(n + 1); // Resize to accommodate 1-based indexing if needed
        size.resize(n + 1, 1);
        for (int i = 0; i <= n; i++) {
            parent[i] = i;
        }
    }

    // Find the representative (root) of the set with path compression
    int find(int node) {
        if (parent[node] == node)
            return node;
        // Path compression: set the node's parent to the ultimate root
        return parent[node] = find(parent[node]);
    }

    // Unite the sets containing u and v by size heuristic
    void unite(int u, int v) {
        int root_u = find(u);
        int root_v = find(v);

        if (root_u == root_v) return; // Already in the same set

        // Union by size: attach the smaller tree to the root of the larger tree
        if (size[root_u] < size[root_v]) {
            parent[root_u] = root_v;
            size[root_v] += size[root_u];
        } else {
            // Includes the case where sizes are equal, the current root_u is chosen
            parent[root_v] = root_u;
            size[root_u] += size[root_v];
        }
    }
};
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        if(n==0) return 1;
        DSU dsu(n);

        unordered_map<int,int> lastx,lasty;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];

            if(lastx.count(x)) dsu.unite(i,lastx[x]);
            if(lasty.count(y)) dsu.unite(i,lasty[y]);
            lastx[x]=i;
            lasty[y]=i;
        }

        int max1 = 0,max2 = 0;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            if(dsu.parent[i]==i){
                int currsize = dsu.size[i];
                if(currsize>max1){
                    max2 = max1;
                    max1 = currsize;
                }
                else if (currsize>max2){
                    max2 = currsize;
                }
            }
        }
        return max1+max2+1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 169 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {

    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {

        int n = nums.length;
        if (n <= 2) return n;

        // L[i] - i-indeksida tugaydigan arifmetik ketma-ketlik uzunligi
        int[] L = new int[n];
        L[0] = 1;
        L[1] = 2;
        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            if ((long)nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == (long)nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]) {
                L[i] = L[i - 1] + 1;
            } else {
                L[i] = 2;
            }
        }

        // R[i] - i-indeksidan boshlanadigan arifmetik ketma-ketlik uzunligi
        int[] R = new int[n];
        R[n - 1] = 1;
        R[n - 2] = 2;
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if ((long)nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == (long)nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]) {
                R[i] = R[i + 1] + 1;
            } else {
                R[i] = 2;
            }
        }

        int maxLen = 0;
        // Dastlabki maksimal uzunlikni hisobga olamiz
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            maxLen = Math.max(maxLen, L[i]);
        }

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            // 1. i-elementni o'zgartirib chap tomondagi blokni kengaytirish
            if (i > 0) {
                maxLen = Math.max(maxLen, L[i - 1] + 1);
            }
            // 2. i-elementni o'zgartirib o'ng tomondagi blokni kengaytirish
            if (i < n - 1) {
                maxLen = Math.max(maxLen, R[i + 1] + 1);
            }
            // 3. i-elementni "ko'prik" sifatida ishlatib ikki tomonni ulash
            if (i > 0 && i < n - 1) {
                long diffSum = (long)nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1];
                // Agar o'rtadagi masofa juft bo'lsa, butun sonli ayirma (d) mavjud
                if (diffSum % 2 == 0) {
                    long d = diffSum / 2;
                    int currentBridge = 1; // o'zgartirilgan i-element

                    int leftPart = 1; // nums[i-1] ning o'zi
                    if (i > 1 && (long)nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == d) {
                        leftPart = L[i - 1];
                    }

                    int rightPart = 1; // nums[i+1] ning o'zi
                    if (i < n - 2 && (long)nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == d) {
                        rightPart = R[i + 1];
                    }
                    
                    maxLen = Math.max(maxLen, leftPart + 1 + rightPart);
                }
            }
        }

        return Math.min(maxLen, n);
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {

    // DSU strukturasi komponentlarni birlashtirish uchun
    class DSU {
        Map<Integer, Integer> parent = new HashMap<>();
        
        int find(int i) {
            if (!parent.containsKey(i)) parent.put(i, i);
            if (parent.get(i) == i) return i;
            int root = find(parent.get(i));
            parent.put(i, root);
            return root;
        }
        
        void union(int i, int j) {
            int rootI = find(i);
            int rootJ = find(j);
            if (rootI != rootJ) parent.put(rootI, rootJ);
        }
    }
    
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        DSU dsu = new DSU();
        
        // x va y koordinatalarni farqlash uchun OFFSET ishlatamiz
        // Koordinatalar 10^9 gacha bo'lgani uchun katta OFFSET kerak
        int OFFSET = 2000000001; 

        for (int[] p : points) {
            // Har bir nuqta o'zining x va y koordinatalarini bog'laydi
            dsu.union(p[0], p[1] + OFFSET);
        }

        // Har bir nuqtaning qaysi komponentga tegishli ekanini aniqlaymiz
        Map<Integer, Integer> componentSize = new HashMap<>();
        for (int[] p : points) {
            int root = dsu.find(p[0]); // p[0] va p[1]+OFFSET bitta rootga ega
            componentSize.put(root, componentSize.getOrDefault(root, 0) + 1);
        }

        List<Integer> sizes = new ArrayList<>(componentSize.values());
        Collections.sort(sizes, Collections.reverseOrder());

        if (sizes.size() >= 2) {
            // Eng katta ikkita komponentni birlashtiramiz + 1 yangi nuqta
            return sizes.get(0) + sizes.get(1) + 1;
        } else {
            // Faqat bitta komponent bo'lsa yoki nuqtalar bo'lsa
            return sizes.get(0) + 1;
        }
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 170 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 3) return n; 

        // Step 1: Build the difference array
        vector<int> D(n - 1);
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) {
            D[i] = nums[i+1] - nums[i];
        }

        // dp1[i] = length of identical differences ending at i
        // dp2[i] = length of identical differences starting at i
        vector<int> dp1(n - 1, 1), dp2(n - 1, 1);
        int max_len = 1;

        // Populate dp1 (Prefix sequences)
        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++) {
            if (D[i] == D[i-1]) {
                dp1[i] = dp1[i-1] + 1;
            }
            max_len = max(max_len, dp1[i]);
        }

        // Populate dp2 (Suffix sequences)
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (D[i] == D[i+1]) {
                dp2[i] = dp2[i+1] + 1;
            }
        }

        // Strategy 1: Extend the best existing sequence by 1 difference
        // We cap it at (n - 1) because we can't have more differences than exist in the array
        int ans_diff = min(n - 1, max_len + 1);

        // Strategy 2: Merge sequences by altering nums[i]
        // Altering nums[i] modifies D[i-1] and D[i]
        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++) {
            int sum = D[i-1] + D[i];
            
            // We can only split the sum evenly if it's an even number
            if (sum % 2 == 0) {
                int d = sum / 2;
                
                // Grab the lengths of sequences with difference 'd' on the left and right
                int left = (i >= 2 && D[i-2] == d) ? dp1[i-2] : 0;
                int right = (i <= n - 3 && D[i+1] == d) ? dp2[i+1] : 0;
                
                // Merge them: left sequence + 2 new differences + right sequence
                ans_diff = max(ans_diff, left + 2 + right);
            }
        }

        // The number of elements is always the number of differences + 1
        return ans_diff + 1;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    int find(int i, vector<int>& parent) {
        if (parent[i] == i) return i;
        return parent[i] = find(parent[i], parent);
    }

    // Standard DSU 'union' by size
    void unite(int i, int j, vector<int>& parent, vector<int>& size) {
        int rootI = find(i, parent);
        int rootJ = find(j, parent);
        if (rootI != rootJ) {
            // Attach smaller component to larger component
            if (size[rootI] < size[rootJ]) swap(rootI, rootJ);
            parent[rootJ] = rootI;
            size[rootI] += size[rootJ];
        }
    }
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        
        // DSU setup: each point is its own parent initially, size is 1
        vector<int> parent(n);
        vector<int> size(n, 1);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            parent[i] = i;
        }

        // Maps to remember which point index holds a specific x or y
        unordered_map<int, int> x_map, y_map;

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];

            // If we've seen this x before, union the current point with the previous one
            if (x_map.count(x)) {
                unite(i, x_map[x], parent, size);
            }
            // If we've seen this y before, union the current point with the previous one
            if (y_map.count(y)) {
                unite(i, y_map[y], parent, size);
            }
            
            // Record this point's index for future connections
            x_map[x] = i;
            y_map[y] = i;
        }

        // Extract the sizes of all unique roots (completed groups)
        vector<int> component_sizes;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (parent[i] == i) { // If I am a root, my size represents the whole group
                component_sizes.push_back(size[i]);
            }
        }

        // Sort groups by size descending to easily grab the top 2
        sort(component_sizes.rbegin(), component_sizes.rend());

        // If there is only 1 group, we just add a point attached to it
        if (component_sizes.size() == 1) {
            return component_sizes[0] + 1;
        }
        
        // Connect the top 2 largest groups
        return component_sizes[0] + component_sizes[1] + 1;
        
    }
};
[Q4_END]

class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& a) {
        int n = a.size();
        vector<int> L(n), R(n);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i)
        {
            L[i] = i;
            if (i - 1 >= 0)
            {
                L[i] = i - 1;
                int d = a[i] - a[i - 1];
                if (i - 2 >= 0 && d == a[i - 1] - a[i - 2])
                    L[i] = L[i - 1];
            }
        }
        for (int i = n - 1; i >= 0; --i)
        {
            R[i] = i;
            if (i + 1 < n)
            {
                R[i] = i + 1;
                int d = a[i + 1] - a[i];
                if (i + 2 < n && d == a[i + 2] - a[i + 1])
                    R[i] = R[i + 1];
            }
        }
        int res = min(n, 2);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i)
        {
            int x = L[i], y = i;
            res = max(res, min(y - x + 1 + 1, n));
            if (y - x + 1 >= 2)
            {
                int d = a[y] - a[y - 1];
                if (y + 2 < n && a[y + 2] == a[y] + d + d)
                {
                    res = max(res, min(y - x + 1 + 2, n));
                    if (y + 3 < n && a[y + 3] == a[y] + d + d + d)
                        res = max(res, R[y + 2] - x + 1);
                }
            }
        }
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i)
        {
            int x = i, y = R[i];
            res = max(res, min(y - x + 1 + 1, n));
            if (y - x + 1 >= 2)
            {
                int d = a[x + 1] - a[x];
                if (x - 2 >= 0 && a[x - 2] == a[x] - d - d)
                {
                    res = max(res, min(y - x + 1 + 2, n));
                    if (x - 3 >= 0 && a[x - 3] == a[x] - d - d - d)
                        res = max(res, y - L[x - 2] + 1);
                }
            }
        }
        return res;
    }
};

class Solution(object):
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums):
        """
        :type nums: List[int]
        :rtype: int
        """
        n = len(nums)

        

        ans = 1

        left = [0]*(n+1)
        for i in range(1,n):
            diff = nums[i] - nums[i-1]
            if i == 1 or diff == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]:
                left[i] = left[i-1] + 1
            else:
                left[i] = 1

            ans = max(ans, left[i] + 1)

            if i < n - 1:
                ans = max(ans, left[i] + 2)
                

        

        right = [0]*(n+1)

        for i in range(n-2,-1,-1):
            diff = nums[i+1] - nums[i]
            if i == n - 2 or diff == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]:
                right[i] = right[i+1] + 1
            else:
                right[i] = 1

            ans = max(ans, right[i] + 1)

            if i > 0:
                ans = max(ans, right[i] + 2)

       # print(left)
       # print(right)

        for i in range(1,n-1):
            diff = nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]
            l = left[i-1]
            if i > 1 and diff != 2 * (nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]):
                l = 0

            r = right[i+1]
            if i + 2 < n and diff != 2 * (nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]):
                r = 0

            ans = max(ans, l + r + 3)

        return ans
        

        
            
            
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
def unionfind(group,root):
    son = root
    while root != group[root]:
        root = group[root]
    while son != root:
        temp = group[son]
        group[son] = root
        son = group[temp]
    return root
        
        

class Solution(object):
    def maxActivated(self, points):
        """
        :type points: List[List[int]]
        :rtype: int
        """
        n = len(points)
        ex = {}
        ey = {}

        group = [i for i in range(n)]

        for i in range(n):
            [x,y] = points[i]
            if x not in ex:
                ex[x] = i
            else:
                root1 = unionfind(group, ex[x])
                root2 = unionfind(group, i)
                group[max(root1,root2)] = min(root1,root2)

            if y not in ey:
                ey[y] = i
            else:
                root1 = unionfind(group, ey[y])
                root2 = unionfind(group, i)
                group[max(root1,root2)] = min(root1,root2)

        groupnum = {}

        for i in range(n):
            group[i] = unionfind(group,i)
            if group[i] not in groupnum:
                groupnum[group[i]] = 0
            groupnum[group[i]] += 1

        if len(groupnum) == 1:
            return n + 1

        nums = [groupnum[key] for key in groupnum]
        nums.sort(reverse=True)

        #print(nums)

        return nums[0] + nums[1] + 1

class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        def get_run(arr):
            output = [(arr[0], 10**6, 1)]

            for x, y in zip(arr, arr[1:]):
                d = y - x
                if d != output[-1][1]:
                    output.append((y, d, 2))
                else:
                    output.append((y, d, output[-1][2] + 1))

            return output

        left = get_run(nums)
        right = get_run(nums[::-1])[::-1]
        right = [(x, -d, r) for x, d, r in right]

        answer = max([3, right[1][2] + 1, left[-2][2] + 1])

        for i, (x, y, z) in enumerate(zip(nums, nums[1:], nums[2:])):
            answer = max([answer, left[i][2] + 1, right[i + 2][2] + 1])

            if z == left[i][0] + 2 * left[i][1]:
                answer = max(answer, 1 + left[i][2] + (right[i + 2][2] if right[i + 2][1] == left[i][1] else 1))

            if x == right[i + 2][0] - 2 * right[i + 2][1]:
                answer = max(answer, 1 + right[i + 2][2] + (left[i][2] if right[i + 2][1] == left[i][1] else 1))

        # print(left, right)
        return answer
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        class DSU:
            def __init__(self, n):
                self.uf = list(range(n))
                self.size = [1] * n
                self.group = n
        
            def parent(self, idx):
                if idx == self.uf[idx]:
                    return idx
                self.uf[idx] = self.parent(self.uf[idx])
                return self.uf[idx]
        
            def merge(self, idx1, idx2):
                idx1 = self.parent(idx1)
                idx2 = self.parent(idx2)
        
                if idx1 != idx2:
                    self.group -= 1
        
                    r = (self.size[idx1] < self.size[idx2])
                    if r:
                        self.uf[idx1] = self.uf[idx2]
                        self.size[idx2] += self.size[idx1]
                    else:
                        self.uf[idx2] = self.uf[idx1]
                        self.size[idx1] += self.size[idx2]
        
                    return True
                return False

        x_dict = {}
        y_dict = {}

        for i, (x, y) in enumerate(points):
            if x not in x_dict:
                x_dict[x] = [i]
            else:
                x_dict[x].append(i)
                
            if y not in y_dict:
                y_dict[y] = [i]
            else:
                y_dict[y].append(i)

        dsu = DSU(len(points))

        for v in x_dict.values():
            if len(v) > 1:
                i = v[0]
                for j in v[1:]:
                    dsu.merge(i, j)
                    
        for v in y_dict.values():
            if len(v) > 1:
                i = v[0]
                for j in v[1:]:
                    dsu.merge(i, j)

        clusters = set()
        for i in range(len(points)):
            p = dsu.parent(i)
            s = dsu.size[p]
            clusters.add((p, s))

        result = sorted([(s, p) for p, s in clusters])
        if len(result) == 1:
            return len(points) + 1
        else:
            return result[-1][0] + result[-2][0] + 1

                    

                
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: list[int]) -> int:
        sz = len(nums)
        if sz <= 2:
            return sz
            
        dfs = []
        for i in range(1, sz):
            dfs.append(nums[i] - nums[i-1])
            
        m = len(dfs)
        
        l_arr = [1] * m
        for i in range(1, m):
            if dfs[i] == dfs[i-1]:
                l_arr[i] = l_arr[i-1] + 1
                
        r_arr = [1] * m
        for i in range(m-2, -1, -1):
            if dfs[i] == dfs[i+1]:
                r_arr[i] = r_arr[i+1] + 1
                
        mx_val = 0
        for v in l_arr:
            if v > mx_val:
                mx_val = v
                
        ans = mx_val + 2
        if ans > sz:
            ans = sz
            
        for i in range(m - 1):
            tot = dfs[i] + dfs[i+1]
            if tot % 2 == 0:
                target = tot // 2
                c = 2
                if i - 1 >= 0 and dfs[i-1] == target:
                    c = c + l_arr[i-1]
                if i + 2 < m and dfs[i+2] == target:
                    c = c + r_arr[i+2]
                if c + 1 > ans:
                    ans = c + 1
                    
        return ans
        
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        p = []
        for i in range(len(points)):
            p.append(i)
            
        def get_boss(x):
            while p[x] != x:
                p[x] = p[p[x]]
                x = p[x]
            return x
            
        x_map = {}
        y_map = {}
        
        for i in range(len(points)):
            px = points[i][0]
            py = points[i][1]
            
            if px in x_map:
                b1 = get_boss(i)
                b2 = get_boss(x_map[px])
                p[b1] = b2
            else:
                x_map[px] = i
                
            if py in y_map:
                b1 = get_boss(i)
                b2 = get_boss(y_map[py])
                p[b1] = b2
            else:
                y_map[py] = i
                
        freq = {}
        for i in range(len(points)):
            b = get_boss(i)
            if b in freq:
                freq[b] = freq[b] + 1
            else:
                freq[b] = 1
                
        arr = []
        for k in freq:
            arr.append(freq[k])
            
        arr.sort()
        arr.reverse()
        
        if len(arr) == 1:
            return arr[0] + 1
        else:
            return arr[0] + arr[1] + 1
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
int longestArithmetic(int* nums, int numsSize) {
    if (numsSize <= 2) {
        return numsSize;
    }
    int a = 3;
    int c = numsSize - 1;
    int* d = (int*)malloc(c * sizeof(int));
    int b;
    for (b = 0; b < c; b++) {
        d[b] = nums[b + 1] - nums[b];
    }
    b = 0;
    while (b < c) {
        int e = b;
        while (e < c && d[e] == d[b]) {
            e++;
        }
        int f = e - 1;
        int g = f - b + 1;
        if (b > 0 || f < c - 1) {
            if (g + 2 > a) {
                a = g + 2;
            }
        } else {
            if (g + 1 > a) {
                a = g + 1;
            }
        }
        if (b >= 2 && d[b - 2] + d[b - 1] == 2 * d[b]) {
            if (g + 3 > a) {
                a = g + 3;
            }
        }
        if (f <= c - 3 && d[f + 1] + d[f + 2] == 2 * d[b]) {
            if (g + 3 > a) {
                a = g + 3;
            }
            if (f + 3 < c && d[f + 3] == d[b]) {
                int h = f + 3;
                while (h < c && d[h] == d[b]) {
                    h++;
                }
                int i = h - (f + 3);
                if (g + i + 3 > a) {
                    a = g + i + 3;
                }
            }
        }
        b = e;
    }
    free(d);
    return a;
}
