    // Z[i] = longest length of common prefix of str[0 ... n - 1] and str[i ... n - 1]
    // Tested by LC2223, LC459
    public static int[] zFunction(String str) {
        int n = str.length();
        int[] Z = new int[n];
        // [L,R] makes a window which matches with prefix of s
        int L = 0, R = 0;
        Z[0] = n;
        for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
            if (i > R) {
                L = R = i;
                while (R < n && str.charAt(R - L) == str.charAt(R)) R++;
                Z[i] = R - L;
                R--;
            } else {
                int k = i - L;
                if (Z[k] < R - i + 1) {
                    Z[i] = Z[k];
                } else {
                    L = i;
                    while (R < n && str.charAt(R - L) == str.charAt(R)) R++;
                    Z[i] = R - L;
                    R--;
                }
            }
        }
        return Z;
    }

    public static String reverse(String s) {
        return new StringBuilder(s).reverse().toString();
    }
}

class SingleStringHash {
    final long[] h;
    final long[] pow;
    final long SEED;
    final long MOD;

    public SingleStringHash(String s) {
        this(s, 131L, 1_000_000_007L); // Other seeds 1319L
    }

    public SingleStringHash(String s, long SEED, long MOD) { // example: SEED = 131L;
        this.SEED = SEED;
        this.MOD = MOD;
        int n = s.length();
        h = new long[n + 1];
        pow = new long[n + 1];
        pow[0] = 1;
        for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) pow[i] = (pow[i - 1] * SEED) % MOD;
        //h[i] = hash[s[0...i - 1]]
        h[0] = 0;
        for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
            h[i] = (h[i - 1] * SEED + s.charAt(i - 1)) % MOD;
        }
    }

    // hash[s[l....r]]
    public long hash(int l, int r) {
        long ret = (h[r + 1] - h[l] * pow[r - l + 1]) % MOD;
        return ret >= 0 ? ret : ret + MOD;
    }
}

// Better to use this when length of string >= 2^11
class StringHash {
    static final long SEED1 = 31L, SEED2 = 131L; // Other seeds 1319L
    static final long MOD = 1_000_000_007L;
    SingleStringHash hash1, hash2;

    public StringHash(String s) {
        hash1 = new SingleStringHash(s, SEED1, MOD);
        hash2 = new SingleStringHash(s, SEED2, MOD);
    }

    public long hash(int l, int r) {
        return (hash1.hash(l, r) << 32) | (hash2.hash(l, r) << 32 >>> 32);
    }

    public static long hashCode(String s) {
        long h1 = 0, h2 = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < s.length(); i++) {
            h1 = (h1 * SEED1 + s.charAt(i)) % MOD;
            h2 = (h2 * SEED2 + s.charAt(i)) % MOD;
        }
        return (h1 << 32) | (h2 << 32 >>> 32);
    }

    public static long hashCode(char[] s) {
        long h1 = 0, h2 = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < s.length; i++) {
            h1 = (h1 * SEED1 + s[i]) % MOD;
            h2 = (h2 * SEED2 + s[i]) % MOD;
        }
        return (h1 << 32) | (h2 << 32 >>> 32);
    }
}

class IntegerArrayHash { // Tested by LC1923
    static class SingleIntegerArrayHash {
        long[] h;
        long[] pow;
        final long SEED;
        final long MOD;

        public SingleIntegerArrayHash(int[] s, long SEED, long MOD) { // example: SEED = 131L;
            this.SEED = SEED;
            this.MOD = MOD;
            int n = s.length;
            h = new long[n + 1];
            pow = new long[n + 1];
            pow[0] = 1;
            for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) pow[i] = (pow[i - 1] * SEED) % MOD;
            //h[i] = hash[s[0...i - 1]]
            h[0] = 0;
            for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
                h[i] = (h[i - 1] * SEED + s[i - 1]) % MOD;
                if (h[i] < 0) h[i] += MOD;
            }
        }

        // hash[s[l....r]]
        public long hash(int l, int r) {
            long ret = (h[r + 1] - h[l] * pow[r - l + 1]) % MOD;
            return ret >= 0 ? ret : ret + MOD;
        }
    }

    private SingleIntegerArrayHash hash1, hash2;
    //static final long SEED1 = 31L, SEED2 = 131L; // these SEEDs are too small, not fit for int or long values
    static final long SEED1 = 911_382_323L;
    static final long SEED2 = 972_663_749L;
    static final long MOD = 1_000_000_007L; // or 1_000_000_123L

    public IntegerArrayHash(int[] s) {
        hash1 = new SingleIntegerArrayHash(s, SEED1, MOD);
        hash2 = new SingleIntegerArrayHash(s, SEED2, MOD);
    }

    public long hash(int l, int r) {
        return (hash1.hash(l, r) << 32) | (hash2.hash(l, r) << 32 >>> 32);
    }

    public static long hashCode(int... s) {
        long h1 = 0, h2 = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < s.length; i++) {
            h1 = (h1 * SEED1 + s[i]) % MOD;
            if (h1 < 0) h1 += MOD;
            h2 = (h2 * SEED2 + s[i]) % MOD;
            if (h2 < 0) h2 += MOD;
        }
        return (h1 << 32) | (h2 << 32 >>> 32);
    }

    public static long hashCode(List<Integer> s) {
        long h1 = 0, h2 = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < s.size(); i++) {
            h1 = (h1 * SEED1 + s.get(i)) % MOD;
            if (h1 < 0) h1 += MOD;
            h2 = (h2 * SEED2 + s.get(i)) % MOD;
            if (h2 < 0) h2 += MOD;
        }
        return (h1 << 32) | (h2 << 32 >>> 32);
    }
}

class IntArray {
    public final int[] a;

    public IntArray(int numOfElement) {
        a = new int[numOfElement];
    }

    public IntArray(int... v) {
        a = v;
    }

    @Override
    public boolean equals(Object o) {
        if (o instanceof IntArray) {
            return o == this || (Arrays.equals(a, ((IntArray) o).a));
        }
        return false;
    }

    @Override
    public int hashCode() {
        return Arrays.hashCode(a); // Can cache hash value to improve performance
    }


    @Override
    public String toString() {
        return Arrays.toString(a);
    }
}

class LongArray {
    public final long[] a;

    public LongArray(int numOfElement) {
        a = new long[numOfElement];
    }

    public LongArray(long... v) {
        a = v;
    }

    @Override
    public boolean equals(Object o) {
        if (o instanceof LongArray) {
            return o == this || (Arrays.equals(a, ((LongArray) o).a));
        }
        return false;
    }

    @Override
    public int hashCode() {
        return Arrays.hashCode(a); // Can cache hash value to improve performance
    }

    @Override
    public String toString() {
        return Arrays.toString(a);
    }
}

class HashUtils {
    static final long SEED1 = 31L, SEED2 = 131L;
    static final long MOD = 1_000_000_007L; // or 1_000_000_123L

    public static long hash(String s) {
        long h1 = 0, h2 = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < s.length(); i++) {
            h1 = (h1 * SEED1 + s.charAt(i)) % MOD;
            h2 = (h2 * SEED2 + s.charAt(i)) % MOD;
        }
        return (h1 << 32) | (h2 << 32 >>> 32);
    }

    // Tested by LC3714
    public static long hash(int... a) {
        long z = (long) a.length * 0x9E3779B97F4A7C15L;
        for (int x : a) {
            z += (x & 0xFFFF_FFFFL) + 0x9E3779B97F4A7C15L;
            z = (z ^ (z >>> 30)) * 0xBF58476D1CE4E5B9L;
            z = (z ^ (z >>> 27)) * 0x94D049BB133111EBL;
            z ^= (z >>> 31);
        }
        return z;
    }

    public static long hash(long... a) {
        long z = (long) a.length * 0x9E3779B97F4A7C15L;
        for (long x : a) {
            z += x + 0x9E3779B97F4A7C15L;
            z = (z ^ (z >>> 30)) * 0xBF58476D1CE4E5B9L;
            z = (z ^ (z >>> 27)) * 0x94D049BB133111EBL;
            z ^= (z >>> 31);
        }
        return z;
    }
}

class Printer {
    static boolean ENABLE_LOCAL_PRINT = false;

    static void println(String x) {
        if (!ENABLE_LOCAL_PRINT) return; // do nothing
        System.out.println(x);
    }

    static void printf(String format, Object... args) {
        if (!ENABLE_LOCAL_PRINT) return; // do nothing
        System.out.printf(format, args);
    }
}


public class Solution {
    private static final int INF = 1_000_000_001;
    private static final long MOD = 1_000_000_007L;

    private static final int UNSET = -131;
    // 4 neighbors
    private static final int[] DX = {-1, 0, 1, 0}; // up, right, down, left
    private static final int[] DY = {0, 1, 0, -1};

    // 8 neighbors
    //    private static final int[] DX = {-1, -1, 0, 1, 1,  1, 0,  -1};
    //    private static final int[] DY = {0,   1, 1, 1, 0, -1, -1, -1};

    // knight
    //    private static final int[] DX = {-2, -2, -1, 1, 2, 2, 1, -1};
    //    private static final int[] DY = {-1, 1, 2, 2, 1, -1, -2, -2};

    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        UnionFind uf = new UnionFind(n);

        Map<Integer, List<Integer>> mapX = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, List<Integer>> mapY = new HashMap<>();
        
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x =  points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];
            mapX.computeIfAbsent(x, k -> new ArrayList<>()).add(i);
            mapY.computeIfAbsent(y, k -> new ArrayList<>()).add(i);
        }
        
        for (List<Integer> list : mapX.values()) {
            for (int i = 1; i < list.size(); i++) {
                int a = list.get(i - 1);
                int b = list.get(i);
                uf.union(a, b);
            }
        }
        
        for (List<Integer> list : mapY.values()) {
            for (int i = 1; i < list.size(); i++) {
                int a = list.get(i - 1);
                int b = list.get(i);
                uf.union(a, b);
            }
        }
        List<Integer> sizeList = new ArrayList<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (uf.find(i) == i) {
                sizeList.add(uf.size(i));
            }
        }
        sizeList.sort((x, y) -> Integer.compare(x, y));
        if (sizeList.size() == 1) {
            return n + 1;
        } else {
            int ans = sizeList.get(sizeList.size() - 1) + sizeList.get(sizeList.size() - 2) + 1;
            return ans;
        }
    }

    public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
        long startTime = System.currentTimeMillis();
        Printer.ENABLE_LOCAL_PRINT = true;
        /* ------------------------------------------------------- */
        /* ------------------------------------------------------- */
        /* ------------------------------------------------------- */


        //System.out.println(new Solution().longestArithmetic(new int[] {1,1,1,1}));



        /* ------------------------------------------------------- */
        /* ------------------------------------------------------- */
        /* ------------------------------------------------------- */
        System.out.println((System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime) + "ms");
    }
}

class Solution {
     public int longestArithmetic(int[] a) {
        int n = a.length;
        int[] diff = new int[n - 1];
        for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
            diff[i - 1] = a[i] - a[i - 1];
        }
        int dn = diff.length;
        int[] inclen = new int[dn];
        inclen[0] = 1;
        for (int i = 1; i < dn; ++i) {
            inclen[i] = diff[i] == diff[i - 1] ? inclen[i - 1] + 1 : 1;
        }
        int[] declen = new int[dn];
        declen[dn - 1] = 1;
        for (int i = dn - 2; i >= 0; --i) {
            declen[i] = diff[i] == diff[i + 1] ? declen[i + 1] + 1 : 1;
        }
        int res = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; ++i) {
            res = Math.max(inclen[i], res);
            res = Math.max(declen[i], res);
            if (i - 1 >= 0 && diff[i] != diff[i - 1]) {
                res = Math.max(res, inclen[i - 1] + 1);
            }
            if (i + 1 < dn && diff[i] != diff[i + 1]) {
                res = Math.max(res, declen[i + 1] + 1);
            }
            if (i - 1 >= 0 && i + 1 < dn && diff[i] + diff[i + 1] == 2 * diff[i - 1]) {
                res = Math.max(res, inclen[i - 1] + 2);
                if (i + 2 < dn && diff[i + 2] == diff[i - 1]) {
                    res = Math.max(res, inclen[i - 1] + 2 + declen[i + 2]);
                }
            }
            if (i - 1 >= 0 && i + 1 < dn && diff[i] + diff[i - 1] == 2 * diff[i + 1]) {
                res = Math.max(res, declen[i + 1] + 2);
                if (i -2>=0 && diff[i - 2] == diff[i + 1]) {
                    res = Math.max(res, declen[i + 1] + 2 + inclen[i -2]);
                }
            }

        }
        return res + 1;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    private static class UF {
        public int[] pa;
        public int[] psize;

        public UF(int size) {
            pa = new int[size];
            psize = new int[size];
            Arrays.fill(pa, -1);
            Arrays.fill(psize, 1);
        }

        public int find(int i) {
            if (pa[i] == -1) {
                return i;
            }
            int rt = find(pa[i]);
            pa[i] = rt;
            return rt;
        }

        public boolean union(int i, int j) {
            int ai = find(i);
            int aj = find(j);
            if (ai == aj) {
                return false;
            }
            if (psize[ai] < psize[aj]) {
                pa[ai] = aj;
                psize[aj] += psize[ai];
            } else {
                pa[aj] = ai;
                psize[ai] += psize[aj];
            }
            return true;
        }

    }

    public int maxActivated(int[][] ps) {
        int n = ps.length;
        UF uf = new UF(n);
        Map<Integer, List<Integer>> rm = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, List<Integer>> cm = new HashMap<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            int[] p = ps[i];
            int r = p[0];
            int c = p[1];
            rm.computeIfAbsent(r, k -> new ArrayList<>()).add(i);
            cm.computeIfAbsent(c, k -> new ArrayList<>()).add(i);
        }
        for (int rk : rm.keySet()) {
            List<Integer> list = rm.get(rk);
            for (int j = 0; j + 1 < list.size(); ++j) {
                int cv = list.get(j);
                int cv2 = list.get(j + 1);
                uf.union(cv, cv2);
            }
        }
        for (int ck : cm.keySet()) {
            List<Integer> list = cm.get(ck);
            for (int j = 0; j + 1 < list.size(); ++j) {
                int cv = list.get(j);
                int cv2 = list.get(j + 1);
                uf.union(cv, cv2);
            }
        }
        List<Integer> sizes = new ArrayList<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            if (uf.find(i) == i) {
                sizes.add(uf.psize[i]);
            }
        }
        Collections.sort(sizes, Collections.reverseOrder());
        if (sizes.size() == 1) {
            return sizes.get(0) + 1;
        } else {
            return sizes.get(0) + sizes.get(1) + 1;
        }
    }
}

[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        int[] d = new int[n - 1];
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) {
            d[i] = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
        }

        int[] l = new int[n - 1];
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) {
            if (i > 0 && d[i] == d[i - 1]) {
                l[i] = l[i - 1] + 1;
            } else {
                l[i] = 1;
            }
        }

        int[] r = new int[n - 1];
        for (int i = n - 2; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (i < n - 2 && d[i] == d[i + 1]) {
                r[i] = r[i + 1] + 1;
            } else {
                r[i] = 1;
            }
        }

        int ans = 0;
        for (int val : l) {
            ans = Math.max(ans, val + 1);
        }
        if (ans < n) ans++;
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 2; i++) {
            int s = d[i] + d[i + 1];
            if (s % 2 == 0) {
                int h = s / 2;
                int cur = 2;
                if (i > 0 && d[i - 1] == h) {
                    cur += l[i - 1];
                }
                if (i + 2 < n - 1 && d[i + 2] == h) {
                    cur += r[i + 2];
                }
                ans = Math.max(ans, cur + 1);
            }
        }
        return ans;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        UnionFind uf = new UnionFind(n);
        Map<Integer, Integer> mx = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Integer> my = new HashMap<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0], y = points[i][1];
            if (mx.containsKey(x)) {
                uf.union(i, mx.get(x));
            } else {
                mx.put(x, i);
            }
            if (my.containsKey(y)) {
                uf.union(i, my.get(y));
            } else {
                my.put(y, i);
            }
        }

        Map<Integer, Integer> sz = new HashMap<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int root = uf.find(i);
            sz.merge(root, 1, Integer::sum);
        }

        int max1 = 0, max2 = 0;
        for (int size : sz.values()) {
            if (size > max1) {
                max2 = max1;
                max1 = size;
            } else if (size > max2) {
                max2 = size;
            }
        }
        return max1 + max2 + 1;
    }

    class UnionFind {
        public int[] root;
        public int[] rank;
        private int group;
    
        public UnionFind(int size) {
            root = new int[size];
            rank = new int[size];
            group = size;
            for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) {
                root[i] = i;
                rank[i] = 1;
            }
        }
    
        public int find(int x) {
            return x == root[x] ? x : (root[x] = find(root[x]));
        }
    
        public boolean equiv(int x, int y) {
            return find(x) == find(y);
        }
    
        public void union(int x, int y) {
            x = find(x);
            y = find(y);
            if (x != y) {
                if (rank[x] < rank[y]) {
                    int d = x;
                    x = y;
                    y = d;
                }
                root[y] = x;
                if (rank[x] == rank[y]) rank[x]++;
                group--;
            }
        }
    
        public int count() {
            return group;
        }
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 187 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        if (n <= 2) return n;

        int[] left = new int[n];
        int[] right = new int[n];

        left[0] = 1;
        left[1] = 2;

        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            if (nums[i] - nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2])
                left[i] = left[i-1] + 1;
            else
                left[i] = 2;
        }

        right[n-1] = 1;
        right[n-2] = 2;

        for (int i = n-3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (nums[i+1] - nums[i] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1])
                right[i] = right[i+1] + 1;
            else
                right[i] = 2;
        }

        int ans = 2;

        for (int i = 1; i < n-1; i++) {

            ans = Math.max(ans, left[i] + 1);
            ans = Math.max(ans, right[i] + 1);

            if ((nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) % 2 == 0) {
                int d = (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) / 2;

                int l = 1;
                if (i >= 2 && nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == d)
                    l = left[i-1];

                int r = 1;
                if (i + 2 < n && nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == d)
                    r = right[i+1];

                ans = Math.max(ans, l + r + 1);
            }
        }

        return ans;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
import java.util.*;

class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        // Use maps to handle large coordinate values (-10^9 to 10^9)
        Map<Integer, List<Integer>> adj = new HashMap<>();
        
        // Build an adjacency list where each point connects its x and y
        // We use a unique prefix or offset to distinguish X and Y coordinates
        // Since coords can be negative, let's use a more robust mapping
        for (int[] p : points) {
            int x = p[0];
            int y = p[1];
            // Use a long or a wrapper to keep X and Y distinct
            // For simplicity, let's use two maps or offset Y by a large prime
            // But since we only care about connections, let's map them to IDs
        }

        // Optimized DSU approach
        DSU dsu = new DSU();
        Map<Integer, Integer> xToId = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Integer> yToId = new HashMap<>();
        
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];
            
            if (!xToId.containsKey(x)) xToId.put(x, xToId.size());
            if (!yToId.containsKey(y)) yToId.put(y, yToId.size() + 200005); 
            
            dsu.union(xToId.get(x), yToId.get(y), true);
        }

        // Map components to the number of original points they contain
        Map<Integer, Integer> componentSize = new HashMap<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int root = dsu.find(xToId.get(points[i][0]));
            componentSize.put(root, componentSize.getOrDefault(root, 0) + 1);
        }

        List<Integer> sizes = new ArrayList<>(componentSize.values());
        Collections.sort(sizes, Collections.reverseOrder());

        if (sizes.size() == 1) {
            return sizes.get(0) + 1;
        }

        // Max points = Largest Component + Second Largest Component + 1 (the new point)
        return sizes.get(0) + sizes.get(1) + 1;
    }

    class DSU {
        Map<Integer, Integer> parent = new HashMap<>();
        
        int find(int i) {
            if (!parent.containsKey(i)) parent.put(i, i);
            if (parent.get(i) == i) return i;
            parent.put(i, find(parent.get(i)));
            return parent.get(i);
        }

        void union(int i, int j, boolean isPoint) {
            int rootI = find(i);
            int rootJ = find(j);
            if (rootI != rootJ) {
                parent.put(rootI, rootJ);
            }
        }
    }
}

class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 3) return n;

        vector<int> diff(n - 1);
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; ++i) {
            diff[i] = nums[i+1] - nums[i];
        }

        vector<int> left(n - 1, 1);
        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; ++i) {
            if (diff[i] == diff[i-1]) {
                left[i] = left[i-1] + 1;
            }
        }

        vector<int> right(n - 1, 1);
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; --i) {
            if (diff[i] == diff[i+1]) {
                right[i] = right[i+1] + 1;
            }
        }

        int maxi = 0;

        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; ++i) {
            maxi = max(maxi, min(n, left[i] + 2));
        }

        for (int i = 0; i < n - 2; ++i) {
            long long sum = (long long)diff[i] + diff[i+1];
            if (sum % 2 == 0) {
                long long d = sum / 2;
                int L = 0, R = 0;
                if (i > 0 && diff[i-1] == d) {
                    L = left[i-1];
                }
                if (i + 2 < n - 1 && diff[i+2] == d) {
                    R = right[i+2];
                }
                maxi = max(maxi, min(n, L + R + 3));
            }
        }

        return maxi;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& p) {
        int n = p.size();
        unordered_map<int, vector<int>> r, c;
        
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            r[p[i][0]].push_back(i);
            c[p[i][1]].push_back(i);
        }
        
        vector<bool> v(n, false);
        unordered_set<int> a, b;
        vector<int> s;
        
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (v[i]) continue;
            
            int z = 0;
            queue<int> q;
            q.push(i);
            v[i] = true;
            
            while (!q.empty()) {
                int u = q.front();
                q.pop();
                z++;
                
                int x = p[u][0];
                int y = p[u][1];
                
                if (!a.count(x)) {
                    a.insert(x);
                    for (int k : r[x]) {
                        if (!v[k]) {
                            v[k] = true;
                            q.push(k);
                        }
                    }
                }
                
                if (!b.count(y)) {
                    b.insert(y);
                    for (int k : c[y]) {
                        if (!v[k]) {
                            v[k] = true;
                            q.push(k);
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            s.push_back(z);
        }
        
        sort(s.rbegin(), s.rend());
        
        if (s.size() > 1) {
            return s[0] + s[1] + 1;
        }
        return s.empty() ? 0 : s[0] + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 189 ###
[Q3_START]
#define ll long long
#define vi vector<int>
#define vll vector<ll>
#define pb push_back
#define sz(x) (int)(x).size()
#define all(x) (x).begin(), (x).end()
#define loop(i, n) for(int i = 0; i < n; i++)
#define rloop(i, n) for(int i = n - 1; i >= 0; i--)

class Solution {
public:
int solve(vi& nums) {
    int n = sz(nums);
    if (n <= 3) return n;
    
    vi diffs;
    loop(i, n - 1) {
        diffs.pb(nums[i + 1] - nums[i]);
    }
    int m = sz(diffs);
    
    vi L(m, 1);
    loop(i, m ) {
        if (i > 0 && diffs[i] == diffs[i - 1]) {
            L[i] = L[i - 1] + 1;
        }
    }
    
    vi R(m, 1);
    rloop(i, m - 1) {
        if (diffs[i] == diffs[i + 1]) {
            R[i] = R[i + 1] + 1;
        }
    }
    
    int ans = 0;
    
    loop(i, m) {
        ans = max(ans, min(n, L[i] + 2));
    }
    
    loop(i, m - 1) {
        int total_diff = diffs[i] + diffs[i + 1];
        if (total_diff % 2 == 0) {
            int d = total_diff / 2;
            int current_run = 2;
            
            if (i > 0 && diffs[i - 1] == d) {
                current_run += L[i - 1];
            }
            if (i + 2 < m && diffs[i + 2] == d) {
                current_run += R[i + 2];
            }
            
            ans = max(ans, current_run + 1);
        }
    }
    
    return ans;
}
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
          return solve(nums);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
#define ll long long
#define vi vector<int>
#define vvi vector<vector<int>>
#define vb vector<bool>
#define um unordered_map
#define pb push_back
#define sz(x) (int)(x).size()
#define all(x) (x).begin(), (x).end()
#define rall(x) (x).rbegin(), (x).rend()
#define loop(i, n) for(int i = 0; i < n; i++)
#define rloop(i, n) for(int i = n - 1; i >= 0; i--)
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = sz(points);
        if (n == 0) return 1;
        
        um<int, vi> x_map, y_map;
        loop(i, n) {
            x_map[points[i][0]].pb(i);
            y_map[points[i][1]].pb(i);
        }
        
        vb visited(n, false);
        vi component_sizes;
        
        loop(i, n) {
            if (!visited[i]) {
                int size = 0;
                vi q = {i};
                visited[i] = true;
                
                int head = 0;
                while(head < sz(q)) {
                    int curr = q[head++];
                    size++;
                    
                    int curX = points[curr][0];
                    for (int neighbor : x_map[curX]) {
                        if (!visited[neighbor]) {
                            visited[neighbor] = true;
                            q.pb(neighbor);
                        }
                    }
                    x_map.erase(curX);
                    
                    int curY = points[curr][1];
                    for (int neighbor : y_map[curY]) {
                        if (!visited[neighbor]) {
                            visited[neighbor] = true;
                            q.pb(neighbor);
                        }
                    }
                    y_map.erase(curY);
                }
                component_sizes.pb(size);
            }
        }
        
        sort(all(component_sizes), greater<int>());
        
        int result = 0;
        if (sz(component_sizes) >= 2) {
            result = component_sizes[0] + component_sizes[1] + 1;
        } else {
            result = component_sizes[0] + 1;
        }
        
        return result;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 190 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        int m = n - 1;
        long[] diff = new long[m];
        for (int i = 0; i < m; i ++) {
            diff[i] = (long) nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
        }
        int[] left = new int[m];
        int[] right = new int[m];
        left[0] = 1;
        int best = 1;
        for (int i = 1; i < m; i ++) {
            if (diff[i] == diff[i - 1]) {
                left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1;
            }
            else {
                left[i] = 1;
            }
            best = Math.max(best, left[i]);
        }
        right[m - 1] = 1;
        for (int i = m - 2; i >= 0; i --) {
            if (diff[i] == diff[i + 1]) {
                right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1;
            }
            else {
                right[i] = 1;
            }
        }
        int ans = Math.max(best + 1, Math.min(n, best + 2));
        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++) {
            long delta = (long) nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1];
            if ((delta & 1L) != 0) {
                continue;
            }
            long d = delta / 2;
            int leftRun = 0;
            int rightRun = 0;
            if (i >= 2 && diff[i - 2] == d) {
                leftRun = left[i - 2];
            }
            if (i + 1 < m && diff[i + 1] == d) {
                rightRun = right[i + 1];
            }
            ans = Math.max(ans, leftRun + rightRun + 3);
        }

        return Math.min(ans, n);
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    static class DSU {
        int[] parent;
        int[] size;
        DSU(int n) {
            parent = new int[n];
            size = new int[n];
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
                parent[i] = i;
                size[i] = 1;
            }
        }
        int find(int x) {
            while (parent[x] != x) {
                parent[x] = parent[parent[x]];
                x = parent[x];
            }
            return x;
        }
        void union(int a, int b) {
            int pa = find(a);
            int pb = find(b);
            if (pa == pb) return;
            if (size[pa] < size[pb]) {
                int t = pa;
                pa = pb;
                pb = t;
            }
            parent[pb] = pa;
            size[pa] += size[pb];
        }
    }
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        DSU dsu = new DSU(n);
        HashMap<Integer, Integer> firstX = new HashMap<>();
        HashMap<Integer, Integer> firstY = new HashMap<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];
            if (firstX.containsKey(x)) {
                dsu.union(i, firstX.get(x));
            }
            else {
                firstX.put(x, i);
            }
            if (firstY.containsKey(y)) {
                dsu.union(i, firstY.get(y));
            }
            else {
                firstY.put(y, i);
            }
        }
        HashMap<Integer, Integer> comp = new HashMap<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int root = dsu.find(i);
            comp.put(root, comp.getOrDefault(root, 0) + 1);
        }
        int first = 0;
        int second = 0;
        for (int sz : comp.values()) {
            if (sz >= first) {
                second = first;
                first = sz;
            }
            else if (sz > second) {
                second = sz;
            }
        }
        return 1 + first + second;
    }
}

[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
       int[] arr = nums;
        int n = arr.length;
        if (n <= 3) return n;

        int[] l = new int[n];
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (i >= 2 && (long)arr[i] - arr[i-1] == (long)arr[i-1] - arr[i-2]) {
                l[i] = l[i-1] + 1;
            } else {
                l[i] = Math.min(i + 1, 2);
            }
        }

        int[] r = new int[n];
        for (int i = n - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (i <= n - 3 && (long)arr[i+1] - arr[i] == (long)arr[i+2] - arr[i+1]) {
                r[i] = r[i+1] + 1;
            } else {
                r[i] = Math.min(n - i, 2);
            }
        }

        int mlen = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            mlen = Math.max(mlen, l[i]);
            if (i + 1 < n) mlen = Math.max(mlen, l[i] + 1);
            if (i - 1 >= 0) mlen = Math.max(mlen, r[i] + 1);

            if (i > 0 && i < n - 1) {
                long diff = (long)arr[i+1] - arr[i-1];
                if (diff % 2 == 0) {
                    long d = diff / 2;
                    int curr = 3;
                    if (i >= 2 && (long)arr[i-1] - arr[i-2] == d) {
                        curr += l[i-1] - 2;
                    }
                    if (i <= n - 3 && (long)arr[i+2] - arr[i+1] == d) {
                        curr += r[i+1] - 2;
                    }
                    mlen = Math.max(mlen, curr);
                }
            }
            
            if (i >= 2 && i < n - 1) {
                long d = (long)arr[i-1] - arr[i-2];
                if ((long)arr[i+1] - arr[i-1] == 2 * d) {
                    mlen = Math.max(mlen, l[i-1] + 1 + (i + 1 < n ? 1 : 0));
                    if (i + 2 < n && (long)arr[i+2] - arr[i+1] == d) {
                        mlen = Math.max(mlen, l[i-1] + 1 + r[i+1]);
                    }
                }
            }
            
            if (i <= n - 3 && i > 0) {
                long d = (long)arr[i+2] - arr[i+1];
                if ((long)arr[i+1] - arr[i-1] == 2 * d) {
                    mlen = Math.max(mlen, r[i+1] + 1 + (i - 1 >= 0 ? 1 : 0));
                    if (i - 2 >= 0 && (long)arr[i-1] - arr[i-2] == d) {
                        mlen = Math.max(mlen, r[i+1] + 1 + l[i-1]);
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        return Math.min(mlen, n);
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
          int[][] arr = points;
        if (arr == null || arr.length == 0) return 1;

        int n = arr.length;
        Union findSet = new Union(n);
        Map<Integer, Integer> xMap = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Integer> yMap = new HashMap<>();

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (xMap.containsKey(arr[i][0])) findSet.union(i, xMap.get(arr[i][0]));
            else xMap.put(arr[i][0], i);
            if (yMap.containsKey(arr[i][1])) findSet.union(i, yMap.get(arr[i][1]));
            else yMap.put(arr[i][1], i);
        }

        int[] comp = new int[n];
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) comp[findSet.find(i)]++;

        List<Integer> sizes = new ArrayList<>();
        for (int s : comp) if (s > 0) sizes.add(s);
        Collections.sort(sizes, Collections.reverseOrder());

        if (sizes.size() == 1) return sizes.get(0) + 1;
        // Bridge the two largest components
        return sizes.get(0) + sizes.get(1) + 1;
    }

    class Union {
        int[] parent;
        public Union(int n) {
            parent = new int[n];
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) parent[i] = i;
        }
        public int find(int i) {
            if (parent[i] == i) return i;
            return parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
        }
        public void union(int i, int j) {
            int rootI = find(i);
            int rootJ = find(j);
            if (rootI != rootJ) parent[rootI] = rootJ;
        }
    }
}

//I A T B
#include <bits/stdc++.h>
using namespace std;

typedef long long ll;
typedef long double ld;
typedef unsigned long long ull;
typedef long long int lli;
#define pdi pair<double, int>
#define pii pair<int, int>
#define pll pair<ll, ll>
#define nl "\n"

const int MOD = 1000000007;



class Solution {
public:

/*

*/

    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& a) {
        int n = a.size();

        if(n <= 2){
            return n;
        }

        vector<ll> lenEnd(n,1);
        lenEnd[1] = 2;
        ll ans = 2;
        for(int i=2;i<n;i++){
            if((ll)a[i] - a[i-1] == (ll)a[i-1] - a[i-2]){
                lenEnd[i] = lenEnd[i-1] + 1;
            }else{
                lenEnd[i] = 2;
            }
            ans = max(ans,lenEnd[i]);
        }

        vector<ll> lenStart(n,1);
        for(int i=n-2;i>=0;i--){
            lenStart[i] = 2;
            if(i+1<n-1 && (ll)a[i+1] - a[i] == (ll)a[i+2] - a[i+1]){
                lenStart[i] = lenStart[i+1] + 1;
            }
            ans = max(ans,lenStart[i]);
        }

        for(int i=0;i<n-1;i++){
            ans = max(ans,lenEnd[i]+1);
        }
        for(int i=1;i<n;i++){
            ans = max(ans,lenStart[i]+1);
        }

        for(int k=1;k<n-1;k++){
            ll l = lenEnd[k-1];
            ll r = lenStart[k+1];
            ll x = 0;

            if(l >= 2){
                ll d = (ll)a[k-1] - a[k-2];
                if((ll)a[k+1] - a[k-1] == 2LL * d){
                    ll this_len = l + 1 + 1;
                    if(r >= 2 && (ll)a[k+2] - a[k+1] == d){
                        this_len += r - 1;
                    }
                    x = max(x, this_len);
                }
            }

            if(r >= 2){
                ll d = (ll)a[k+2] - a[k+1];
                if((ll)a[k+1] - a[k-1] == 2LL * d){
                    ll this_len = 1 + 1 + r;
                    if(l >= 2 && (ll)a[k-1] - a[k-2] == d){
                        this_len += l - 1;
                    }
                    x = max(x, this_len);
                }
            }

            if(((ll)a[k-1] + a[k+1]) % 2 == 0){
                x = max(x, 3LL);
            }

            ans = max(ans, x);
        }

        return ans;
    }


};


#ifdef LOCAL
int main() {
    //freopen("inputSuvam.in", "r", stdin);
    //freopen("outputSuvam.out", "w", stdout);
    cout << "Compiled!" << nl;
    return 0;
}
#endif

//I A T B
#include <bits/stdc++.h>
using namespace std;

typedef long long ll;
typedef long double ld;
typedef unsigned long long ull;
typedef long long int lli;
#define pdi pair<double, int>
#define pii pair<int, int>
#define pll pair<ll, ll>
#define nl "\n"

const int MOD = 1000000007;



class Solution {
public:

/*

*/


    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& a) {
        int n = a.size();
        int m = a[0].size();

        if(n == 0){
            return 1; 
        }
        
        vector<int> vec(n),sz(n,1);
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            vec[i] = i;
        }
        
        auto find = [&](auto&& self,int x) -> int {
            if(vec[x] != x){
                vec[x] = self(self,vec[x]);
            }
            return vec[x];
        };
        
        auto unite = [&](int a,int b){
            a = find(find,a);
            b = find(find,b);
            if(a == b){
                return;
            }
            if(sz[a] < sz[b]){
                swap(a,b);
            }
            vec[b] = a;
            sz[a] += sz[b];
        };
        
        map<int,vector<int>> xIdx,yIdx;
        for (int i=0;i<n;i++){
            xIdx[a[i][0]].push_back(i);
            yIdx[a[i][1]].push_back(i);
        }

        for(auto& it : xIdx){
            auto& vec = it.second;
            if(vec.size() >= 2){
                for(size_t j=1;j<(int)vec.size();j++){
                    unite(vec[0], vec[j]);
                }
            }
        }

        for(auto& it : yIdx){
            auto& vec = it.second;
            if((int)vec.size() >= 2){
                for(size_t j=1;j<(int)vec.size();j++){
                    unite(vec[0],vec[j]);
                }
            }
        }

        int maxi1 = 0;
        int maxi2 = 0;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            if(vec[i] == i){ 
                int s = sz[i];
                if(s > maxi1){
                    maxi2 = maxi1;
                    maxi1 = s;
                }else if(s > maxi2){
                    maxi2 = s;
                }
            }
        }

        if(maxi2 > 0){
            return maxi1+maxi2+1;
        }

        return maxi1+1;
    }


};


#ifdef LOCAL
int main() {
    //freopen("inputSuvam.in", "r", stdin);
    //freopen("outputSuvam.out", "w", stdout);
    cout << "Compiled!" << nl;
    return 0;
}
#endif

[Q3_START]
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;

public class Solution
{
    public int LongestArithmetic(int[] Nums)
    {
        int ArrayLength = Nums.Length;
        int[] Diff = new int[ArrayLength - 1];

        for (int Index = 0; Index < ArrayLength - 1; Index++)
            Diff[Index] = Nums[Index + 1] - Nums[Index];

        var SegmentsByVal = new Dictionary<int, List<(int Start, int End, int Len)>>();
        int CurrentStart = 0;

        for (int Index = 1; Index <= Diff.Length; Index++)
        {
            if (Index == Diff.Length || Diff[Index] != Diff[CurrentStart])
            {
                int Val = Diff[CurrentStart];
                
                if (!SegmentsByVal.ContainsKey(Val))
                    SegmentsByVal[Val] = new List<(int Start, int End, int Len)>();

                SegmentsByVal[Val].Add((CurrentStart, Index - 1, Index - CurrentStart));
                CurrentStart = Index;
            }
        }

        int MaxDiffLen = 0;

        foreach (var Kvp in SegmentsByVal)
        {
            int Val = Kvp.Key;
            var Segments = Kvp.Value;

            for (int Index = 0; Index < Segments.Count; Index++)
            {
                var Seg = Segments[Index];
                int CurrentMax = Seg.Len;

                if (Seg.Len < Diff.Length)
                    CurrentMax = Math.Max(CurrentMax, Seg.Len + 1);

                if (Seg.Start >= 2 && Diff[Seg.Start - 2] + Diff[Seg.Start - 1] == 2 * Val)
                {
                    int ExtendedLen = Seg.Len + 2;
                    
                    if (Index > 0 && Segments[Index - 1].End == Seg.Start - 3)
                        ExtendedLen += Segments[Index - 1].Len;

                    CurrentMax = Math.Max(CurrentMax, ExtendedLen);
                }

                if (Seg.End <= Diff.Length - 3 && Diff[Seg.End + 1] + Diff[Seg.End + 2] == 2 * Val)
                    CurrentMax = Math.Max(CurrentMax, Seg.Len + 2);

                MaxDiffLen = Math.Max(MaxDiffLen, CurrentMax);
            }
        }

        return MaxDiffLen + 1;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
using System.Collections.Generic;

public class Solution
{
    private int[] ParentNodes;
    private int[] ComponentSizes;

    private int FindRoot(int NodeIndex)
    {
        if (ParentNodes[NodeIndex] != NodeIndex)
            ParentNodes[NodeIndex] = FindRoot(ParentNodes[NodeIndex]);
            
        return ParentNodes[NodeIndex];
    }

    private void UnionNodes(int FirstNode, int SecondNode)
    {
        int RootFirst = FindRoot(FirstNode);
        int RootSecond = FindRoot(SecondNode);

        if (RootFirst != RootSecond)
        {
            ParentNodes[RootSecond] = RootFirst;
            ComponentSizes[RootFirst] += ComponentSizes[RootSecond];
        }
    }

    public int MaxActivated(int[][] Points)
    {
        int TotalPoints = Points.Length;
        ParentNodes = new int[TotalPoints];
        ComponentSizes = new int[TotalPoints];

        for (int Index = 0; Index < TotalPoints; Index++)
        {
            ParentNodes[Index] = Index;
            ComponentSizes[Index] = 1;
        }

        var LastSeenX = new Dictionary<int, int>();
        var LastSeenY = new Dictionary<int, int>();

        for (int Index = 0; Index < TotalPoints; Index++)
        {
            int CurrentX = Points[Index][0];
            int CurrentY = Points[Index][1];

            if (LastSeenX.TryGetValue(CurrentX, out int PrevXIndex))
                UnionNodes(Index, PrevXIndex);
            else
                LastSeenX[CurrentX] = Index;

            if (LastSeenY.TryGetValue(CurrentY, out int PrevYIndex))
                UnionNodes(Index, PrevYIndex);
            else
                LastSeenY[CurrentY] = Index;
        }

        var UniqueSizes = new List<int>();

        for (int Index = 0; Index < TotalPoints; Index++)
            if (ParentNodes[Index] == Index)
                UniqueSizes.Add(ComponentSizes[Index]);

        UniqueSizes.Sort((First, Second) => Second.CompareTo(First));

        if (UniqueSizes.Count >= 2)
            return UniqueSizes[0] + UniqueSizes[1] + 1;
            
        return UniqueSizes[0] + 1;
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 196 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:

    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:

        n = len(nums)

        pre_l = [1] * n
        pre_d = [0] * n
        for i in range(1, n):
            pre_d[i] = nums[i] - nums[i-1]
            if i >= 2 and pre_d[i] == pre_d[i - 1]:
                pre_l[i] = pre_l[i - 1] + 1
            else:
                pre_l[i] = 2

        suf_l = [1] * n
        suf_d = [0] * n
        for i in range(n - 2, -1, -1):
            suf_d[i] = nums[i + 1] - nums[i]
            if i <= n - 3 and suf_d[i] == suf_d[i + 1]:
                suf_l[i] = suf_l[i + 1] + 1
            else:
                suf_l[i] = 2

        ans = max(pre_l)
        for i in range(n):

            if i > 0:
                ans = max(ans, pre_l[i - 1] + 1)
            if i < n - 1:
                ans = max(ans, suf_l[i + 1] + 1)
            if 0 < i < n - 1:
                left_l = pre_l[i - 1]
                right_l = suf_l[i + 1]
                left_d = pre_d[i - 1] if left_l >= 2 else inf
                right_d = suf_d[i + 1] if right_l >= 2 else -inf
                cur_d = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]

                if left_l >= 2 and right_l >= 2:
                    if left_d == right_d and cur_d == 2 * left_d:
                        ans = max(ans, left_l + right_l + 1)
                if left_l >= 2:
                    if cur_d == 2 * left_d:
                        ans = max(ans, left_l + 2)
                if right_l >= 2:
                    if cur_d == 2 * right_d:
                        ans = max(ans, right_l + 2)
                if cur_d % 2 == 0:
                    ans = max(ans, 3)

        return ans
[Q3_END]

### RANK 197 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:

        left = [(float('inf'), 0)]
        n = len(nums)
        for i,v in enumerate(nums):
            if i == 0:
                continue
            diff = v-nums[i-1]
            cnt = left[-1][-1] + 1 if diff == left[-1][0] else 1
            left += [(diff, cnt)]

        right = [(float('inf'), 0)]
        for i in range(n-2, -1, -1):
            v = nums[i]
            diff = v - nums[i+1]
            cnt = right[-1][-1] + 1 if diff == right[-1][0] else 1
            right += [(diff, cnt)]
        right = right[::-1]

        # print(left)
        # print(right)

        res = 3

        for i,v in enumerate(nums):
            if left[i][0] == -1 * right[i][0]:
                res = max(res, left[i][1] + right[i][1] + 1)

            # change this number
            if i < n-1: # align right
                res = max(res, right[i+1][1] + 2)
            if i > 0: # align left
                res = max(res, left[i-1][1] + 2)

            if i > 0 and i < n-1:
                diff = nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]
                # print(i , diff)
                if diff %2 == 0:
                    dd = diff >> 1
                    # print(i, diff, dd, left[i-1], right[i+1])
                    # print((dd == -1 * left[i-1][0]), (dd == right[i+1][0]))
                    ll = left[i-1][1] + 1 if (dd == left[i-1][0]) else 1
                    rr = right[i+1][1] + 1 if (dd == -1 * right[i+1][0]) else 1
                    # print(ll, rr)
                    res = max(res, ll + rr + 1)
        return res
                    
            
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        root = [i for i in range(n)]
        def find(x):
            if root[x] != x:
                root[x] = find(root[x])
            return root[x]

        def union(a, b):
            ra, rb = find(a), find(b)
            if ra != rb:
                root[ra] = rb

        xs = collections.defaultdict(list)
        ys = collections.defaultdict(list)
        for i, [x,y] in enumerate(points):
            xs[x] += [i]
            ys[y] += [i]

        for row in xs.values():
            for i in range(1, len(row)):
                union(row[i-1], row[i])

        for row in ys.values():
            for i in range(1, len(row)):
                union(row[i-1], row[i])

        cnt = Counter()

        for i in range(n):
            cnt[find(i)] += 1

        if len(cnt) == 1:
            return n+1

        vs = sorted(list(cnt.values()))

        return vs[-1] + vs[-2] + 1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 198 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& a) {
        int n = a.size();
        vector<int> L(n, 2);
        L[0] = 1;
        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            if (a[i] - a[i - 1] == a[i - 1] - a[i - 2]) L[i] = L[i - 1] + 1;
        }

        vector<int> R(n, 2);
        R[n - 1] = 1;
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (a[i] - a[i + 1] == a[i + 1] - a[i + 2]) R[i] = R[i + 1] + 1;
        }

        // for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) cout << L[i] << " \n"[i == n - 1];
        // for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) cout << R[i] << " \n"[i == n - 1];

        int ans = min(n, *max_element(L.begin(), L.end()) + 1);
        for (int i = 1; i <= n - 2; i++) {
            int d = a[i - 1] - a[i + 1], x = 1, y = 1;
            if (d & 1) continue;
            d /= 2;
            if (L[i - 1] > 1 && a[i - 2] - a[i - 1] == d) x = L[i - 1];
            if (R[i + 1] > 1 && a[i + 1] - a[i + 2] == d) y = R[i + 1];
            ans = max(ans, x + y + 1);
        }
            
        return ans;
    }
};

### RANK 199 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        vector<int> l(n, 1), r(n, 1);
        l[1] = r[n - 2] = 2;
        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++){
            if (nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]){
                l[i] = l[i - 1] + 1;
            }
            else l[i] = 2;
        }

        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--){
            if (nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]){
                r[i] = r[i + 1] + 1;
            }
            else r[i] = 2;
        }

        int res = *max_element(l.begin(), l.end());
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++){
            if (i > 0) res = max(res, l[i - 1] + 1);
            if (i + 1 < n) res = max(res, r[i + 1] + 1);

            if (i > 0 and i + 1 < n){
                int diff = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1];
                if (diff % 2 == 0){
                    diff /= 2;
                    int left = 1, right = 1;
                    if (i >= 2 and nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == diff) left = l[i - 1];
                    if (i < n - 2 and nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == diff) right = r[i + 1];
                    res = max(res, left + right + 1);
                    
                }
            }
        }
        return res;
        
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
struct DSU {
    std::vector<int> f, siz;
    DSU(int n) : f(n), siz(n, 1) { std::iota(f.begin(), f.end(), 0); }
    int leader(int x) {
        while (x != f[x]) x = f[x] = f[f[x]];
        return x;
    }
    bool same(int x, int y) { return leader(x) == leader(y); }
    bool merge(int x, int y) {
        x = leader(x);
        y = leader(y);
        if (x == y) return false;
        if (siz[x] < siz[y]) std::swap(x, y);
        siz[x] += siz[y];
        f[y] = x;
        return true;
    }
    int size(int x) { return siz[leader(x)]; }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        DSU compo(n);
        map<int, int> mpX, mpY; 
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++){
            int x = points[i][0], y = points[i][1];
            if (mpX.count(x)){
                compo.merge(i, mpX[x]);
            } else mpX[x] = i;
        
            if (mpY.count(y)){
                compo.merge(i, mpY[y]);
            } else mpY[y] = i;
        }
        vector<int> sz;
        
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++){
            if (compo.leader(i) == i) {
                //cout << i <<" "<< compo.size(i) << "\n";
                sz.push_back(compo.size(i));
            }
        }
        sort(sz.rbegin(), sz.rend());
        if ((int) sz.size() == 1) return n + 1;
        else {
            return 1 + sz[0] + sz[1];
        }
        return -1;
        
    }
};
[Q4_END]

class Solution {
public:

    
template <typename T> vector<pair<T,int>> ococo_runlength(vector<T> const& a){
    vector<pair<T,int>> ans;
    if(a.empty())return ans;
    const int n = (int)a.size();
    int cnt = 0;
    for(int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++){
        cnt++;
        if(a[i] != a[i + 1]){
            ans.push_back(pair(a[i],cnt));
            cnt = 0;
        }
    }
    ans.push_back(pair(a.back(),cnt + 1));
    return ans;
}
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        vector<int> dif(n - 1);
        for(int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++){
            dif[i] = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
        }
        auto rl = ococo_runlength(dif);
        int m = (int)rl.size();
        if(m == 1)return n;
        int ans = 0;
        for(int i = 0; i < m; i++){
            ans = max(ans,rl[i].second + 2);
            if(i + 2 < m && rl[i + 1].second == 1 && rl[i + 2].second == 1 && rl[i].first * 2 == rl[i + 1].first + rl[i + 2].first){
                ans = max(ans,rl[i].second + 3);
                if(i + 3 < m && rl[i].first == rl[i + 3].first)ans = max(ans,rl[i].second + rl[i + 3].second + 3);
            }

            if(i - 2 >= 0 && rl[i - 1].second == 1 && rl[i - 2].second == 1 && rl[i].first * 2 == rl[i - 1].first + rl[i - 2].first){
                ans = max(ans,rl[i].second + 3);
            }
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {

    //座標圧縮
template <typename T> vector<int> ococo_cordinate_compression(vector<T> a){
    int n = a.size();
    vector<T> temp = a;
    sort(temp.begin(),temp.end());
    temp.erase(unique(temp.begin(),temp.end()),temp.end());
    vector<int> ans(n);
    for(int i = 0; i < n; i++){
        typename vector<T>::iterator it = lower_bound(temp.begin(),temp.end(),a[i]);
        int idx = distance(temp.begin(),it);
        ans[i] = idx;
    }
    return ans;
}

    //UnionFind T には何か乗せたいものを乗せられる（連結成分の大きさなど）
//マージテクを UF に乗せる時、 get_val で map とかをそのままディープコピーで要求すると重くなるため注意
template <typename T> class ococo_unionfind {
private:
    vector<pair<int,int>> g;
    vector<T> vec;
    int com_cnt;
    void func(T& a,T b){
        a += b;
        return;
    }
public:
    ococo_unionfind(int n = 0){
        g.resize(n);
        vec.resize(n);
        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++)g[i] = pair(i,1);
        com_cnt = n;
    }
    ococo_unionfind(vector<T> v){
        int n = (int)v.size();
        g.resize(n);
        vec = v;
        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++)g[i] = pair(i,1);
        com_cnt = n;
    }
    int ne(int idx){
        if(g[idx].first == idx)return idx;
        else return g[idx].first = ne(g[idx].first);
    }
    //(a,b) 間をマージする。既に連結されていたら true,そうでなければ false を返す
    bool einsert(int a,int b){
        a = ne(a); b = ne(b);
        if(a == b)return true;
        com_cnt--;
        
        if(g[a].second < g[b].second){
            func(vec[b],vec[a]);
            g[a].first = b;
            g[b].second = max(g[a].second + 1,g[b].second);
        }
        else{
            func(vec[a],vec[b]);
            g[b].first = a;
            g[a].second = max(g[b].second + 1,g[a].second);
        }
        return false;
    }
    bool einsert(pair<int,int> p){
        return einsert(p.first,p.second);
    }
    bool is_connect(int a,int b){
        return (ne(a) == ne(b));
    }
    bool is_connect(pair<int,int> p){
        return is_connect(p.first,p.second);
    }
    //いくつの連結成分に分かれているか出力する
    int component_count(void){
        return com_cnt;
    }
    //連結成分に乗せたものを返す
    T get_val(int a){
        return vec[ne(a)];
    }
};

public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = (int)points.size();
        vector<int> x(n),y(n);
        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++){
            x[i] = points[i][0];
            y[i] = points[i][1];
        }
        x = ococo_cordinate_compression(x);
        y = ococo_cordinate_compression(y);
        vector<int> tempvec(3 * n);
        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++)tempvec[i]++;
        ococo_unionfind<int> uf(tempvec);
        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++){
            uf.einsert(i,x[i] + n);
            uf.einsert(i,y[i] + 2 * n);
        }
        vector<bool> vb(3 * n,false);
        vector<int> v;
        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++){
            if(vb[uf.ne(i)])continue;
            vb[uf.ne(i)] = true;
            v.push_back(uf.get_val(i));
        }
        sort(v.rbegin(),v.rend());
        int ans = 1;
        if(v.size() >= 1)ans += v[0];
        if(v.size() >= 2)ans += v[1];
        return ans;
        
    }
};
[Q4_END]

from typing import List
from collections import defaultdict
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n<=3:
            return n
        d = [nums[i+1] - nums[i] for i in range(n-1)]
        m = len(d)
        s = []
        i = 0
        while i<m:
            j = i
            while j<m and d[j] == d[i]:
                j+=1
            s.append((d[i],i,j-1))
            i = j
        g = defaultdict(list)
        for v,l,r in s:
            g[v].append((l,r))
        x = 1
        for D,z in g.items():
            for k in range(len(z)):
                l,r = z[k]
                L = r-l+1
                if L<m:
                    x = max(x,L+1)
                else:
                    x  =max(x,L)
                if r+2<m and d[r+1]+d[r+2] == 2*D:
                    x = max(x,L+2)
                if l-2>=0 and d[l-2]+d[l-1] == 2*D:
                    x = max(x,L+2)
                if k+1 < len(z):
                    nl,nr = z[k+1]
                    if nl == r+3 and d[r+1]+d[r+2] == 2*D:
                        x = max(x,L+2+(nr-nl+1))
        return max(min(n,3),x+1)
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
from typing import List
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        if n == 0:
            return 1
        p = list(range(n))
        s = [1]*n
        def f(i: int) -> int:
            if p[i] == i:
                return i
            p[i] = f(p[i])
            return p[i]
        def u(i: int,j: int):
            x = f(i)
            y = f(j)
            if x!=y:
                if s[x] < s[y]:
                    x,y = y,x
                p[y] = x
                s[x]+=s[y]
        xm = {}
        ym = {}
        for i,(x,y) in enumerate(points):
            if x in xm:
                xm[x].append(i)
            else:
                xm[x] = [i]
            if y in ym:
                ym[y].append(i)
            else:
                ym[y] = [i]
        for v in xm.values():
            for i in range(1,len(v)):
                u(v[0],v[i])
        for v in ym.values():
            for i in range(1,len(v)):
                u(v[0],v[i])
        c = []
        for i in range(n):
            if p[i] == i:
                c.append(s[i])
        c.sort(reverse = True)
        if len(c)>=2:
            return c[0]+c[1]+1
        return c[0]+1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 203 ###
[Q3_START]
using ll = long long;
#define sz(x) (int)(x).size()
#define rep(i, a, b) for (int i = (a); i < (b); i++)
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = sz(nums);
        int res = 2;
        vector<ll> df(n - 1);
        vector<int> L(n - 1), R(n - 1);
        rep(i, 0, n - 1) df[i] = 1LL * nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
        rep(i, 0, n - 1) {
            if (i == 0 || df[i] != df[i - 1])
                L[i] = 1;
            else
                L[i] = L[i - 1] + 1;
        }
        for (int i = n - 2; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (i == n - 2 || df[i] != df[i + 1])
                R[i] = 1;
            else
                R[i] = R[i + 1] + 1;
        }
        rep(i, 0, n - 1) res = max(res, min(n, L[i] + 2));
        rep(i, 1, n - 1) {
            ll gp = 1LL * nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1];
            if (gp & 1)
                continue;
            ll d = gp / 2;
            int l = 0, r = 0;
            if (i - 2 >= 0 && df[i - 2] == d)
                l = L[i - 2];
            if (i + 1 < n - 1 && df[i + 1] == d)
                r = R[i + 1];
            res = max(res, l + r + 3);
        }
        return min(res, n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
using ll = long long;
#define sz(x) (int)(x).size()
class AVBDSU  {
public:
    vector<int> p, s;
    AVBDSU(int n) {
        p.resize(n);
        s.assign(n, 1);
        iota(p.begin(), p.end(), 0);
    }
    int srch(int x) {
        if (p[x] == x)
            return x;
        return p[x] = srch(p[x]);
    }
    void ute(int a, int b) {
        a = srch(a), b = srch(b);
        if (a == b)
            return;
        if (s[a] < s[b])
            swap(a, b);
        p[b] = a;
        s[a] += s[b];
    }
};
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        unordered_map<int, int> mapx, mapy;
        unordered_map<int, int> ed;
        int b1 =0, b2 = 0;
        int xdit = 0, ydit = 0;
        for (auto &p : points) {
            if (!mapx.count(p[0]))
                mapx[p[0]] = xdit++;
            if (!mapy.count(p[1]))
                mapy[p[1]] = ydit++;
        }
        AVBDSU avdsu(xdit + ydit);
        for (auto &p : points) {
            int u = mapx[p[0]];
            int v = xdit + mapy[p[1]];
            avdsu.ute(u, v);
        }
        for (auto &p : points) {
            int r = avdsu.srch(mapx[p[0]]);
            ed[r]++;
        }
        for (auto &e : ed) {
            int cur = e.second;
            if (cur >= b1) {
                b2 = b1;
                b1 = cur;
            } else if (cur > b2) {
                b2 = cur;
            }
        }
        return b1 + b2 + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 204 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:

        # longest chain starting 
        # pos diff means go up while going backwards
        @cache
        def pref(i, diff):
            if i == -1:
                return 0
            if i == 0:
                return 1
            if nums[i-1] - nums[i] == diff:
                return 1 + pref(i-1,diff)
            return 1

        # pos diff means go up while going forwards
        @cache
        def suff(i, diff):
            if i == len(nums):
                return 0
            if i == len(nums) - 1:
                return 1
            if nums[i+1] - nums[i] == diff:
                return 1 + suff(i+1,diff)
            return 1

        res = 2

        for i in range(1, len(nums) - 1):
            prev = nums[i-1]
            post = nums[i+1]
            gap = post - prev
            if gap % 2:
                continue
            between = (prev+post) // 2
            # change nums[i] to between
            previous = pref(i - 1, prev - between)
            after = suff(i + 1, post - between)
            lengthHere = 1 + previous + after
            res = max(res, lengthHere)


        # change 0th
        nxtDiff = nums[2] - nums[1]
        second = suff(1, nxtDiff)
        # print(f'{second=}')
        lengthWith0 = 1 + second
        res = max(res, lengthWith0)

        # change last
        upLeft = nums[-3] - nums[-2]
        first = pref(len(nums) - 2, upLeft)
        # print(f'{first=} upleft={upLeft}')
        lengthLast = 1 + first
        res = max(res, lengthLast)


        for i in range(len(nums)):
            if i >= 2:
                pp = nums[i-2]
                p = nums[i-1]
                pdiff = pp - p
                leftRes = pref(i-1,pdiff) + 1
                res = max(res, leftRes)

            if i <= len(nums) - 3:
                ff = nums[i+2]
                f = nums[i+1]
                fdiff = ff - f
                rightRes = suff(i+1,fdiff) + 1
                res = max(res, rightRes)
            

        pref.cache_clear()
        suff.cache_clear()

        return res
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU:
    def __init__(self, nodes):
        self.parents = {}
        self.depths = {}
        self.sizes = {}
        for node in nodes:
            self.parents[node] = node
            self.depths[node] = 1
            self.sizes[node] = 1

    def _find(self, node):
        if self.parents[node] != node:
            self.parents[node] = self._find(self.parents[node])
        return self.parents[node]

    def union(self, a, b):
        aRepParent = self._find(a)
        bRepParent = self._find(b)
        if aRepParent == bRepParent:
            return False
        aDepth = self.depths[aRepParent]
        bDepth = self.depths[bRepParent]
        if aDepth < bDepth:
            self.parents[aRepParent] = bRepParent
            self.sizes[bRepParent] += self.sizes[aRepParent]
            del self.depths[aRepParent]
            del self.sizes[aRepParent]
        elif bDepth < aDepth:
            self.parents[bRepParent] = aRepParent
            self.sizes[aRepParent] += self.sizes[bRepParent]
            del self.depths[bRepParent]
            del self.sizes[bRepParent]
        else:
            self.parents[aRepParent] = bRepParent
            self.sizes[bRepParent] += self.sizes[aRepParent]
            del self.depths[aRepParent]
            del self.sizes[aRepParent]
            self.depths[bRepParent] += 1
        return True

    def areUnioned(self, a, b):
        return self._find(a) == self._find(b)

    def uniqueComponents(self):
        return len(self.depths)

    def getSize(self, node):
        return self.sizes[self._find(node)]

    def allSizes(self):
        return list(self.sizes.values())


class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        xs = defaultdict(list)
        ys = defaultdict(list)
        for x, y in points:
            xs[x].append((x,y))
            ys[y].append((x,y))
        points2 = []
        for point in points:
            points2.append(tuple(point))
        uf = DSU(points2)
        for xKey in xs:
            vs = xs[xKey]
            for i in range(len(vs) - 1):
                uf.union(vs[i],vs[i+1])
        for yKey in ys:
            vs = ys[yKey]
            for i in range(len(vs) - 1):
                uf.union(vs[i],vs[i+1])

        print(uf.uniqueComponents())

        # adding at an X gives us a single group that has that X, and we pick a Y
        # so pick top two groups?

        sz = sorted(uf.allSizes(),reverse=True)

        res = 1 + sz[0]
        if len(sz) > 1:
            res += sz[1]

        return res

### RANK 205 ###
[Q3_START]
using ll = long long;
class Solution {
public:
  int longestArithmetic(vector<int> &nums) {
    // calculate longest thing of length x?
    // has to be a subarray
    // so we can bsearch this
    // wait maybe we do
    // just look at the difs
    // and we can replace one of them
    // 2 -4 6 8
    //  -6 10 2
    // calculate longest series starting here
    // or longest ending here
    // do starting here first
    vector<int> starts(nums.size()), ends(nums.size());
    starts[nums.size() - 1] = 1;
    starts[nums.size() - 2] = 2;
    ends[0] = 1;
    ends[1] = 2;
    for (int i = nums.size() - 3; i >= 0; --i) {
      if (nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]) {
        starts[i] = starts[i + 1] + 1;
      } else {
        starts[i] = 2;
      }
    }
    for (int i = 2; i < nums.size(); ++i) {
      if (nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == nums[i] - nums[i - 1]) {
        ends[i] = ends[i - 1] + 1;
      } else {
        ends[i] = 2;
      }
    }
    // then go through and try to combine
    int best = 3;
    function<int(int, int)> longestAt = [&](int i, int dif) {
      if (i + 1 < nums.size()) {
        int myDif = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
        if (myDif == dif) {
          return starts[i];
        }
      }
      return 1;
    };
    function<int(int, int)> longestEnd = [&](int i, int dif) {
      if (i - 1 >= 0) {
        int myDif = nums[i] - nums[i - 1];
        if (myDif == dif) {
          return ends[i];
        }
      }
      return 1;
    };
    for (int i = 0; i < nums.size(); ++i) {
      if (i - 1 >= 0) {
        best = max(best, ends[i - 1] + 1);
      }
      if (i > 1) {
        // use prev dif
        int prevDif = nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2];
        if (i + 1 < nums.size() && nums[i - 1] + prevDif * 2 == nums[i + 1]) {
          best = max(best, ends[i - 1] + 1 + longestAt(i + 1, prevDif));
        }
      }
      // use next dif
      if (i + 1 < nums.size()) {
        best = max(best, starts[i + 1] + 1);
      }
      if (i + 2 < nums.size()) {
        int nextDif = nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1];
        if (i - 1 >= 0 && nums[i - 1] + nextDif * 2 == nums[i + 1]) {
          best = max(best, starts[i + 1] + 1 + longestEnd(i - 1, nextDif));
        }
      }
    }

    return best;
  }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        // if you activate something, things on same x or y
        // get activated
        // and it spreads like that
        // maybe we can use dsu to figure out what things will get turned on
        // then you should just be able to pair the max two
        // by using the x of one and the y of the other
        // or vice versa
        vector<int> reps(points.size()), sizes(points.size(), 1);
        map<int, vector<int>> onX, onY;
        for (int i = 0; i < points.size(); ++i){
            auto p = points[i];
            onX[p[0]].push_back(i);
            onY[p[1]].push_back(i);
            reps[i] = i;
        }
        // then union
        function<int(int)> findRep = [&](int i){
            if (reps[i] != i){
                reps[i] = findRep(reps[i]);
            }
            return reps[i];
        };
        function<void(int, int)> dounion = [&](int i, int j){
            int ri = findRep(i), rj = findRep(j);
            if (ri != rj){
                if (sizes[ri] > sizes[rj]){
                    sizes[ri] += sizes[rj];
                    reps[rj] = ri;
                } else {
                    sizes[rj] += sizes[ri];
                    reps[ri] = rj;
                }
            }
        };
        for (auto& [_, group] : onX){
            int comp = group[0];
            for (int i = 1; i < group.size(); ++i){
                dounion(comp, group[i]);
            }
        }
        for (auto& [_, group] : onY){
            int comp = group[0];
            for (int i = 1; i < group.size(); ++i){
                dounion(comp, group[i]);
            }
        }
        // then figure out the distinct sizes
        vector<int> distincts;
        for (int i= 0; i < points.size(); ++i){
            if (findRep(i) == i){
                distincts.push_back(sizes[i]);
            }
        }
        sort(distincts.begin(), distincts.end());
        reverse(distincts.begin(), distincts.end());
        if (distincts.size() == 1){
            return distincts[0] + 1;
        } else {
            return distincts[0] + distincts[1] + 1;
        }
        
    }
};
[Q4_END]

#include "bits/stdc++.h"

using namespace std;

using i64 = long long;

#ifdef BROKEN_CODE

#else
#define debug(...) 10082002
#define info(...) 10082002
#endif

class Solution {
public:
  int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& a) {
    int n = a.size();
    vector<int> pre(n, 1);
    pre[1] = 2;
    for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
      int dif = a[i] - a[i - 1];
      int pdif = a[i - 1] - a[i - 2];
      pre[i] = 2;
      if (dif == pdif) {
        pre[i] += pre[i - 1] - 1;
      }
    }
    vector<int> suf(n, 1);
    suf[n - 2] = 2;
    for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
      int dif = a[i + 1] - a[i];
      int pdif = a[i + 2] - a[i + 1];
      suf[i] = 2;
      if (dif == pdif) {
        suf[i] += suf[i + 1] - 1;
      }
    }
    debug(pre);
    debug(suf);
    int ans = max(ranges::max(pre), ranges::max(suf));
    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
      int x = a[i];
      if (i == 0) {
        ans = max(ans, suf[i + 1] + 1);
      } else if (i == n - 1) {
        ans = max(ans, pre[i - 1] + 1);
      } else {
        int l = pre[i - 1];
        int r = suf[i + 1];
        ans = max(ans, l + 1);
        ans = max(ans, r + 1);
        int lx = a[i - 1];
        int rx = a[i + 1];
        if ((lx + rx) & 1) continue;
        int mid = (lx + rx) / 2;
        int dif = mid - lx;
        int sz = 1;
        if ((i - 1 > 0 && a[i - 1] - a[i - 2] == dif) || i - 1 == 0) {
          sz += l;
        } else {
          sz++;
        }
        if ((i + 1 < n - 1 && a[i + 2] - a[i + 1] == dif) || i + 1 == n - 1) {
          sz += r;
        } else {
          sz++;
        }
        debug(i, dif, sz);
        ans = max(ans, sz);
      }
    }
    return ans;
  }
};

  cin.tie(nullptr);
  run(&Solution::longestArithmetic); // CHANGE FOR PROBLEM
}

[Q4_START]
#include "bits/stdc++.h"

using namespace std;

using i64 = long long;

struct DSU {
  int components;
  vector<int> par, siz;

  DSU() {}
  DSU(int n): components(n), par(n) {
    init(n);
  }

  void init(int n) {
    iota(par.begin(), par.end(), 0);
    siz.assign(n, 1);
  }

  bool same(int x, int y) {
    return find(x) == find(y);
  }
  bool merge(int x, int y) {
    x = find(x);
    y = find(y);
    if (x == y) {
      return false;
    }
    if (siz[x] > siz[y]) {
      swap(x, y);
    }
    siz[x] += siz[y];
    par[y] = x;
    components--;
    return true;
  }

  int size(int x) {
    return siz[find(x)];
  }

  int count() {
    return components;
  }

  int find(int x) {
    if (x != par[x]) {
      par[x] = find(par[x]);
    }
    return par[x];
  }
};

#ifdef BROKEN_CODE
#include <bits/debug.h>
#else
#define debug(...) 10082002
#define info(...) 10082002
#endif

class Solution {
public:
  int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& p) {
    int n = p.size();
    DSU d(n);
    map<int, int> xs, ys;
    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
      int x = p[i][0];
      int y = p[i][1];
      if (xs.contains(x)) {
        d.merge(i, xs[x]);
      }
      if (ys.contains(y)) {
        d.merge(i, ys[y]);
      }
      xs[x] = i;
      ys[y] = i;
    }
    map<int, int> g;
    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
      g[d.find(i)]++;
    }
    vector<int> gs;
    for (const auto& [_, v] : g) {
      gs.push_back(v);
    }
    ranges::sort(gs, greater());
    debug(gs);
    if (gs.size() == 1) {
      return n + 1;
    }
    return gs[0] + gs[1] + 1;
  }
};

#ifdef BROKEN_CODE
int main() {
  ios::sync_with_stdio(false);
  cin.tie(nullptr);
  run(&Solution::maxActivated); // CHANGE FOR PROBLEM
}
#endif
