class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        fort = [1] * n
        back = [1] * n
        for i in range(2, n):
            if nums[i] - nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]:
                fort[i] = fort[i-1] + 1
        for i in range(n-3, -1, -1):
            if nums[i+1] - nums[i] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]:
                back[i] = back[i+1] + 1
        # print(fort, back)
        ans = max(max(fort[:-1]) + 2, max(back[1:]) + 2 )
        for i in range(1, n-3):
            if nums[i+2] - nums[i] == 2*(nums[i] - nums[i-1]) == 2 * (nums[i+3] - nums[i+2]):
                ans = max(ans, fort[i] + back[i+2] + 3)
        for i in range(1, n-2):
            if nums[i+2] - nums[i] == 2*(nums[i] - nums[i-1]):
                ans = max(ans, fort[i] + 3)
        for i in range(0, n-3):
            if nums[i+2] - nums[i] == 2 * (nums[i+3] - nums[i+2]):
                ans = max(ans, back[i+2] + 3)
        return ans
                
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class UnionFind:
    def __init__(self, n, size=None):
        self.parent_or_size = [-1] * n if size is None else [-x for x in size]
        self.group = n
    def find(self, a):
        a = self.parent_or_size[a] if self.parent_or_size[a] >= 0 else a
        acopy = a
        while self.parent_or_size[a] >= 0:
            a = self.parent_or_size[a]
        while acopy != a:
            self.parent_or_size[acopy], acopy = a, self.parent_or_size[acopy]

        return a

    def merge(self, a, b):
        pa, pb = self.find(a), self.find(b)
        if pa == pb:
            return False
        if self.parent_or_size[pa] > self.parent_or_size[pb]:
            pa, pb = pb, pa
        self.parent_or_size[pa] += self.parent_or_size[pb]
        self.parent_or_size[pb] = pa
        self.group -= 1
        return True

    def getSize(self, a):
        return -self.parent_or_size[self.find(a)]

    def getgroup(self):
        return self.group

class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        u = UnionFind(n)
        x = defaultdict(list)
        y = defaultdict(list)
        for i, (a, b) in enumerate(points):
            x[a].append(i)
            y[b].append(i)
        for item in x.values():
            for i in item[1:]:
                u.merge(item[0], i)
        for item in y.values():
            for i in item[1:]:
                u.merge(item[0], i)
        c = defaultdict(int)

        for i in range(n):
            c[u.find(i)] += 1
        print(c)
        t = sorted(c.values())
        # print(t)
        if len(t) > 1:
            return 1 + t[-2] + t[-1]
        return t[-1] +1

[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        l = [1] * n
        r = [1] * n

        l[1]=2
        for i in range(2, n):
            l[i]=l[i-1]+1 if nums[i]-nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] else 2

        r[-2] = 2

        for i in range(n - 3, -1, -1):
            r[i] = r[i+1]+1 if nums[i+1] - nums[i] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] else 2

        ans = max(max(l), r[1]+1, l[-2]+1)

        for i in range(1, n-1):
            ans = max(ans, l[i-1]+1, r[i+1]+1)
            x = nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]
            if x % 2 == 0:
                d = x//2
                a = l[i-1] if i > 1 and nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == d else 1
                b = r[i+1] if i < n-2 and nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == d else 1
                ans = max(ans, a+b+1)
                
        return min(ans, n)
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        p = []
        s = []
        mp = {}

        def add(v):
            if v not in mp:
                mp[v] = len(p)
                p.append(len(p))
                s.append(1)
            return mp[v]

        def find(x):
            while p[x] != x:
                p[x]=p[p[x]]
                x=p[x]
            return x

        def union(a,b):
            a = find(a)
            b = find(b)
            if a == b:
                return 
            if s[a] < s[b]:
                a,b=b,a
            p[b] = a
            s[a] += s[b]

        for x, y in points:
            a = add(("x", x))
            b = add(("y", y))
            union(a, b)

        cnt = {}

        for x, y in points:
            a = mp[("x", x)]
            r = find(a)
            cnt[r] = cnt.get(r,0)+1
        a=b=0
        for v in cnt.values():
            if v>a:
                b=a
                a=v
            elif v>b:
                b=v
        return a+b+1
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        @cache
        def gof(i):
            if i==len(nums):
                return 0
            if i==len(nums)-1:
                return 1
            if i + 2 < n and nums[i + 1]-nums[i]==nums[i + 2]-nums[i + 1]:
                return 1 + gof(i + 1)
            return 2
        @cache
        def gob(i):
            if i==-1:
                return 0
            if i==0:
                return 1
            if i - 2 < n and nums[i]-nums[i-1]==nums[i - 1]-nums[i - 2]:
                return 1 + gob(i - 1)
            return 2
        ans = 0
        for i in range(n):
            ans = max(ans,gof(i),gob(i))
            if i + 1 < n and i - 1>=0:
                l = gob(i-1)
                r = gof(i + 1)
                if l >=2 and r >=2:
                    d1 = nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]
                    d2 = nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]
                    if d1==d2:
                        if nums[i-1] + d1==nums[i + 1] -d1:
                            ans = max(ans,l + r + 1)
                f = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]
                if f%2==0:
                    ans = max(ans,3)
            if i + 1 < n:
                r = gof(i + 1)
                ans = max(ans,r  + 1)
                if r>=2 and i-1>=0:
                    d = nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]
                    if nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1] == 2*d:
                        ans = max(ans,r + 2)
            if i - 1>=0:
                l = gob(i-1)
                ans = max(ans,l + 1)
                if l>=2 and i + 1 < n:
                    d = nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]
                    if nums[i + 1]-nums[i-1]==2*d:
                        ans = max(ans,l + 2)
        return ans
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        par = {}
        def find(i):
            if i not in par:
                par[i] = i
            if par[i]==i:
                return i
            par[i] = find(par[i])
            return par[i]
        def union(x,y):
            px,py = find(x),find(y)
            if px!=py:
                par[py] = px
        dx = defaultdict(list)
        dy = defaultdict(list)
        mx = 0
        st = set([tuple(x) for x in points])
        for i,(x,y) in enumerate(points):
            if dx[x]:
                union(i,dx[x][-1])
            dx[x].append(i)
            if dy[y]:
                union(i,dy[y][-1])
            dy[y].append(i)
        c = [0]*len(points)
        for i in range(len(points)):
            c[find(i)]+=1
        c.append(0)
        c.sort(reverse=True)
        return c[0] + c[1] + 1

### RANK 213 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 2) return n;

        int max_len = 2;
        vector<unordered_map<int, int>> dp(n);
        vector<unordered_map<int, int>> gap_dp(n);

        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            for (int j = i - 1; j >= max(0, i - 2); --j) {
                int diff = (nums[i] - nums[j]);
                int step = i - j;

                if (step == 1) {
                    
                    int current_diff = nums[i] - nums[i - 1];
                    dp[i][current_diff] = dp[i - 1].count(current_diff) ? dp[i - 1][current_diff] + 1 : 2;
                    
    
                    if (gap_dp[i - 1].count(current_diff)) {
                        gap_dp[i][current_diff] = max(gap_dp[i][current_diff], gap_dp[i - 1][current_diff] + 1);
                    }
                } else if (step == 2) {
                    
                    if (diff % 2 == 0) {
                        int d = diff / 2;
                        int prev_len = dp[i - 2].count(d) ? dp[i - 2][d] : 1;
                        gap_dp[i][d] = max(gap_dp[i][d], prev_len + 2);
                    }
                }
            }
            
            for (auto const& [d, len] : dp[i]) max_len = max(max_len, min(n, len + 1));
            for (auto const& [d, len] : gap_dp[i]) max_len = max(max_len, len);
        }

        return max_len;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    struct DSU {
        vector<int> parent;
        vector<int> size;
        DSU(int n) {
            parent.resize(n);
            iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0);
            size.assign(n, 1);
        }
        int find(int i) {
            if (parent[i] == i) return i;
            return parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
        }
        void unite(int i, int j) {
            int root_i = find(i);
            int root_j = find(j);
            if (root_i != root_j) {
                if (size[root_i] < size[root_j]) swap(root_i, root_j);
                parent[root_j] = root_i;
                size[root_i] += size[root_j];
            }
        }
    };
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        if (n == 0) return 1;

        DSU dsu(n);
        unordered_map<int, int> last_x, last_y;

        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            int x = points[i][0], y = points[i][1];
            if (last_x.count(x)) dsu.unite(i, last_x[x]);
            if (last_y.count(y)) dsu.unite(i, last_y[y]);
            last_x[x] = i;
            last_y[y] = i;
        }

        vector<int> comp_sizes;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            if (dsu.parent[i] == i) {
                comp_sizes.push_back(dsu.size[i]);
            }
        }

        sort(comp_sizes.rbegin(), comp_sizes.rend());

        if (comp_sizes.size() == 1) {
            return comp_sizes[0] + 1;
        }

        return comp_sizes[0] + comp_sizes[1] + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 214 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:

  def longestArithmetic(self, nums: list[int]) -> int:
    if len(nums) <= 2:
      return len(nums)
    D = [b - a for a, b in zip(nums, nums[1:])]
    m = len(D)
    L, R = [1] * m, [1] * m
    for i in range(1, m):
      if D[i] == D[i - 1]:
        L[i] = L[i - 1] + 1
    for i in range(m - 2, -1, -1):
      if D[i] == D[i + 1]:
        R[i] = R[i + 1] + 1
    ans = min(m, max(L) + 1)
    for i in range(m - 1):
      S = D[i] + D[i + 1]
      if S % 2 == 0:
        d = S // 2
        left = L[i - 1] if i > 0 and D[i - 1] == d else 0
        right = R[i + 2] if i + 2 < m and D[i + 2] == d else 0
        ans = max(ans, left + right + 2)
    return ans + 1
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:

  def maxActivated(self, points: List[List[int]]) -> int:
    if not points:
      return 1
    xs = defaultdict(list)
    ys = defaultdict(list)
    for i, (x, y) in enumerate(points):
      xs[x].append(i)
      ys[y].append(i)
    n = len(points)
    vis = [False] * n
    sizes = []
    for i in range(n):
      if vis[i]:
        continue
      vis[i] = True
      st = [i]
      sz = 0
      while st:
        p = st.pop()
        sz += 1
        x, y = points[p]
        while xs[x]:
          t = xs[x].pop()
          if not vis[t]:
            vis[t] = True
            st.append(t)
        while ys[y]:
          t = ys[y].pop()
          if not vis[t]:
            vis[t] = True
            st.append(t)
      sizes.append(sz)
    sizes.sort(reverse=True)
    if len(sizes) >= 2:
      return sizes[0] + sizes[1] + 1
    else:
      return sizes[0] + 1
[Q4_END]
##################

### RANK 215 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 2:
            return n

        def get_max_for_diffs(arr):
            # ans is at least 2 because any 2 numbers can form an arithmetic progression
            # With one replacement, any array of size 3 can be made arithmetic
            res = min(n, 3) 
            
            # 1. Precompute lengths of arithmetic sequences ending at i
            # left[i] = length of arithmetic sequence ending at i with diff nums[i]-nums[i-1]
            left = [1] * n
            for i in range(1, n):
                if i > 1 and nums[i] - nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]:
                    left[i] = left[i-1] + 1
                else:
                    left[i] = 2
            
            # 2. Precompute lengths of arithmetic sequences starting at i
            right = [1] * n
            for i in range(n - 2, -1, -1):
                if i < n - 2 and nums[i+1] - nums[i] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]:
                    right[i] = right[i+1] + 1
                else:
                    right[i] = 2

            # 3. Check every possible "pivot" point i to replace
            for i in range(n):
                # If we replace nums[i], can we connect nums[i-1] and nums[i+1]?
                
                # Option A: Just extend a left or right sequence by 1
                if i > 0: res = max(res, left[i-1] + 1)
                if i < n - 1: res = max(res, right[i+1] + 1)
                
                # Option B: Bridge two sequences
                if 0 < i < n - 1:
                    d1 = nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] if i > 1 else None
                    d2 = nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] if i < n - 2 else None
                    
                    # They must share the same difference d
                    # And the gap between them must be exactly 2*d
                    if (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) % 2 == 0:
                        target_d = (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) // 2
                        
                        l_len = 1
                        if i > 1 and nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == target_d:
                            l_len = left[i-1]
                        
                        r_len = 1
                        if i < n - 2 and nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == target_d:
                            r_len = right[i+1]
                        
                        res = max(res, l_len + 1 + r_len)
            
            return min(res, n)

        return get_max_for_diffs(nums)
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
from collections import defaultdict

class DSU:
    def __init__(self):
        self.parent = {}
        self.size = {}

    def find(self, i):
        if i not in self.parent:
            self.parent[i] = i
            self.size[i] = 1
        if self.parent[i] == i:
            return i
        self.parent[i] = self.find(self.parent[i])
        return self.parent[i]

    def union(self, i, j):
        root_i = self.find(i)
        root_j = self.find(j)
        if root_i != root_j:
            # Union by size
            if self.size[root_i] < self.size[root_j]:
                root_i, root_j = root_j, root_i
            self.parent[root_j] = root_i
            self.size[root_i] += self.size[root_j]


class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points):
        dsu = DSU()

        for x, y in points:
            dsu.union(('x', x), ('y', y))

        component_point_count = {}
        # Track which x and y coordinates belong to which component root
        root_to_x = {}
        root_to_y = {}
        
        for x, y in points:
            root = dsu.find(('x', x))
            component_point_count[root] = component_point_count.get(root, 0) + 1
        
        # x_map[val] = [list of component roots that contain this x]
        x_map = {}
        y_map = {}
        
        for x, y in points:
            root = dsu.find(('x', x))
            if x not in x_map: x_map[x] = root
            if y not in y_map: y_map[y] = root
    
        # We want to pick an X and a Y to maximize points.
        # Case 1: X and Y are from different components
        # Case 2: X and Y are from the same component
        
        # Calculate the total points for each unique X and unique Y
        # (Since all points in a component are activated if any part of it is)
        comp_roots = list(component_point_count.keys())
        if not comp_roots:
            return 1
            
        # Sort components by size to quickly find the two largest
        comp_roots.sort(key=lambda r: component_point_count[r], reverse=True)
        
        # Maximum points = Size of largest component + Size of 2nd largest (if exists) + 1 (the new point)
        max_activated = component_point_count[comp_roots[0]] + 1
        if len(comp_roots) > 1:
            max_activated += component_point_count[comp_roots[1]]
            
        return max_activated
[Q4_END]

### RANK 216 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 2:
            return n
        L = [1] * n
        L[1] = 2
        for i in range(2, n):
            if nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]:
                L[i] = L[i - 1] + 1
            else:
                L[i] = 2
        R = [1] * n
        R[n - 2] = 2
        for i in reversed(range(n - 2)):
            if nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]:
                R[i] = R[i + 1] + 1
            else:
                R[i] = 2
        ans = min(n, max(max(L), max(R)) + 1)
        for i in range(1, n - 1):
            if (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) % 2:
                ans = max(ans, L[i - 1] + 1, R[i + 1] + 1)
                continue
            d = (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) >> 1
            l = 1
            if i > 1 and nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == d:
                l = L[i - 1]
            r = 1
            if i < n - 2 and nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == d:
                r = R[i + 1]
            ans = max(ans, l + r + 1)
        return ans
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        rep, sz = [*range(n)], [1] * n
        def find(u):
            if u != rep[u]:
                rep[u] = find(rep[u])
            return rep[u]
        def merge(u, v):
            u, v = find(u), find(v)
            if u == v: return
            if sz[v] > sz[u]:
                u, v = v, u
            rep[v] = u
            sz[u] += sz[v]
        dx = {}
        dy = {}
        for i, (x, y) in enumerate(points):
            if x in dx:
                merge(i, dx[x])
            dx[x] = i
            if y in dy:
                merge(i, dy[y])
            dy[y] = i
        p = set()
        for i in range(n):
            p.add(find(i) )
        A = [sz[x] for x in p]
        if len(A) < 2: 
            A.append(0)
        A.sort(reverse = True)
        return A[0] + A[1] + 1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 217 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
  public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int> &nums) {
        int n = nums.size( );
        if (n <= 3) return n;

        auto go = [&](const vector<int> &v) -> int {
            int res = 2;
            int n = v.size( );

            for (int i = 0; i < n - 1;) {
                int d = v[i + 1] - v[i];
                int j = i;

                while (j + 1 < n && v[j + 1] - v[j] == d) {
                    j++;
                }

                int currLen = j - i + 1;
                // extend by 1
                res = max(res, min(n, currLen + 1));

                // v[j + 1] violates
                if (j + 2 < n && v[j + 2] - v[j] == 2 * d) {
                    int k = j + 2;
                    int nextLen = 1;
                    // continue for same diff
                    while (k + 1 < n && v[k + 1] - v[k] == d) {
                        k++;
                        nextLen++;
                    }
                    res = max(res, currLen + 1 + nextLen);
                }

                i = j;
            }

            return res;
        };

        int res = 2;
        res = max(res, go(nums));
        reverse(nums.begin( ), nums.end( ));
        res = max(res, go(nums));
        return res;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU {
  private:
    vector<int> Parent, Rank, Size;

  public:
    DSU(int n) {
        Parent.assign(n + 1, 1);
        Rank.assign(n + 1, 1);
        Size.assign(n + 1, 1);
        for (int i = 0; i <= n; i++) Parent[i] = i;
    }

    int Find(int x) {
        if (x != Parent[x]) Parent[x] = Find(Parent[x]);
        return Parent[x];
    }

    bool Union(int x, int y) {
        int xset = Find(x), yset = Find(y);
        if (xset != yset) {
            if (Rank[xset] < Rank[yset]) {
                Parent[xset] = yset;
                Size[yset] += Size[xset];
            } else {
                Parent[yset] = xset;
                Size[xset] += Size[yset];
                if (Rank[xset] == Rank[yset]) Rank[xset]++;
            }
            return true;
        }
        return false;
    }

    int getSize(int x) {
        return Size[Find(x)];
    }
};

class Solution {
  public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>> &points) {
        int n = points.size( );
        map<int, int> xmp, ymp;
        int id = 0; // node id

        for (auto it : points) {
            int x = it[0], y = it[1];
            if (!xmp.count(x)) xmp[x] = id++;
            if (!ymp.count(y)) ymp[y] = id++;
        }

        DSU dsu(id);
        for (auto it : points) {
            int x = it[0], y = it[1];
            dsu.Union(xmp[x], ymp[y]);
        }

        map<int, int> compSize;
        for (auto it : points) {
            int x = it[0];
            int node = xmp[x];
            int root = dsu.Find(node);
            compSize[root]++;
        }

        vector<int> comps;
        for (auto &[root, cnt] : compSize) comps.push_back(cnt);
        sort(comps.rbegin( ), comps.rend( ));

        if (comps.size( ) == 1) return comps[0] + 1;
        return comps[0] + comps[1] + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 218 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n=nums.size();
        vector<int> L(n,1),R(n,1);
        int i=1;
        while(i<n) {
            int j=i+1;
            while(j<n&&nums[j]-nums[j-1]==nums[i]-nums[i-1]) j++;
            int cnt=2;
            for(int k=i;k<j;k++) L[k]=cnt++;
            i=j;
        }
        i=n-2;
        while(i>=0) {
            int j=i-1;
            while(j>=0&&nums[j+1]-nums[j]==nums[i+1]-nums[i]) j--;
            int cnt=2;
            for(int k=i;k>j;k--) R[k]=cnt++;
            i=j;
        }
        // for(int i=0;i<n;i++) cout<<i<<" "<<L[i]<<" "<<R[i]<<endl;
        int ans=max(L[n-1],R[0]);
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) {
            if(i+1<n) {
                ans=max(ans,1+R[i+1]);
            }
            if(i) {
                ans=max(ans,1+L[i-1]);
            }
            if(i&&i+1<n&&(nums[i-1]+nums[i+1])%2==0) {
                int mid=(nums[i-1]+nums[i+1])/2;
                int left=(i>=2&&nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]==mid-nums[i-1]?L[i-1]:1);
                int right=(i+2<n&&nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]==nums[i+1]-mid?R[i+1]:1);
                ans=max(ans,1+left+right);
            }
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n=points.size();
        map<int,int> mp,mp2;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) {
            int x=points[i][0],y=points[i][1];
            mp[x]=1;
            mp2[y]=1;
        }
        int X=n;
        for(auto &it:mp) it.second=++X;
        int Y=X;
        for(auto &it:mp2) it.second=++Y;
        vector<int> fa(Y+1),sz(Y+1);
        for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) sz[i]=1;
        iota(fa.begin(),fa.end(),0);
        auto find=[&](auto &&find,int x)->int {
            return x==fa[x]?x:fa[x]=find(find,fa[x]);
        };
        auto merge=[&](int x,int y) {
            x=find(find,x),y=find(find,y);
            if(x!=y) {
                fa[y]=x;
                sz[x]+=sz[y];
            }
        };
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) {
            int x=points[i][0],y=points[i][1];
            merge(i+1,mp[x]);
            merge(i+1,mp2[y]);
        }
        vector<pair<int,int>> v;
        unordered_map<int,int> mp3;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) {
            int f=find(find,i+1);
            if(mp3.count(f)) continue;
            mp3[f]=1;
            v.push_back({sz[f],f});
        }
        if(v.size()==1) return n+1;
        else {
            ranges::sort(v);
            int m=v.size();
            int ans=v[m-1].first+v[m-2].first+1;
            return ans;
        }
        return 0;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

{

    bool first = true;
    for (const auto &kv : mp)
    {
        if (!first)
            os << ',';
        first = false;
        os << kv.first << ':' << kv.second;
    }
    return os << '}';
}

    {
        if (!first)
            os << ',';
        first = false;
        os << kv.first << ':' << kv.second;
    }
    return os << '}';
}

    ~__Timer()
    {

/*
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    Problem Statement:

    Observations:

    Claims:

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
*/

class Solution
{
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int> &nums)
    {
        lli ret = 0;
        lli n = nums.size();
        vector<lli> left(n), right(n);
        left[0] = 1;
        left[1] = 2;
        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++)
        {
            left[i] = 2;
            if ((i - 2 >= 0) && nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2])
                left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1;
        }
        right[n - 1] = 1;
        right[n-2] = 2;
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--)
        {
            right[i] = 2;
            if ((i + 2 < n) && nums[i+1] - nums[i ] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1])
                right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1;
        }

        ret = *max_element(left.begin(), left.end());
        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++){
            if(i) ret = max(ret, 1 + left[i - 1]);
            if(i + 1 < n) ret = max(ret, 1 + right[i + 1]);
        }
        for(int i = 1; i+1 < n; i++){
            lli diff = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1];
            
            if(diff & 1) continue;
            ret = max(ret, (lli)3);
            lli need = diff / 2;
            lli l = 1;
            if(i -2 >= 0 && nums[i - 1] - nums[i -2] == need) l = left[i-1];

            lli r = 1;
            if(i+ 2 < n && nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == need) r = right[i+1];
            ret = max(ret, l +1 + r);
        }

        return ret;
    }
};

/*

template <typename T>
struct Compressor
{
    vector<T> vals;
    void add(const T &x) { vals.pb(x); }
    void build()
    {
        sort(vals.begin(), vals.end());
        vals.erase(unique(vals.begin(), vals.end()), vals.end());
    }
    int get(const T &x) { return (int)(lower_bound(vals.begin(), vals.end(), x) - vals.begin()); }
    int idx_of(const T &x)
    {
        auto it = lower_bound(vals.begin(), vals.end(), x);
        return (it != vals.end() && *it == x) ? int(it - vals.begin()) : -1;
    }
    int size() const { return (int)vals.size(); }
};
class UnionFind {
public:
	int* rank;
	int* parent;
	int n;
	UnionFind(int n) {
		this->n = n;
		parent = new int[n];
		rank = new int[n];
		for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
			parent[i] = i;
			rank[i] = 1;
		}
	}
	int getParent(int x) {
		if (parent[x] == x) return x;
		return parent[x] = getParent(parent[x]);
	}
	bool unite(int a, int b) {
		int parA = getParent(a);
		int parB = getParent(b);
		if (parA == parB) return false;
		if (rank[parA] >= rank[parB]) {
			rank[parA] += rank[parB];
			parent[parB] = parA;
		} else {
			rank[parB] += rank[parA];
			parent[parA] = parB;
		}
		return true;
	}
};
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        lli ret = 0;
        Compressor<lli> compressor;
        map<lli, vector<lli>> by_x;
        map<lli, vector<lli>> by_y;
        int n = points.size();
        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++){
            by_x[points[i][0]].pb(i);
            by_y[points[i][1]].pb(i);
        }
        UnionFind uf = UnionFind(n + 5);

        for(auto& it: by_x){
            for(int i = 1; i < it.ss.size(); i++){
                uf.unite(it.ss[i-1], it.ss[i]);
            }
        }

         for(auto& it: by_y){
            for(int i = 1; i < it.ss.size(); i++){
                uf.unite(it.ss[i-1], it.ss[i]);
            }
        }

        vector<lli> components;
        map<lli, lli> c;

        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++) c[uf.getParent(i)] = uf.rank[uf.getParent(i)];
        for(auto& it : c){
            components.pb(it.ss);
        }
        sort(components.begin(), components.end(), greater<lli>());

        ret = 1;
        if(components.size() >= 1){
            ret += components[0];
        }

        if(components.size() >= 2){
            ret += components[1];
        }
    
        return ret;
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        vector<vector<unordered_map<int, int>>> dp(n+1, vector<unordered_map<int,int>>(2));
        
        int res = 2;
        for(int i=n-2;i>=0;i--) {
            int d1 = nums[i+1] - nums[i];
            dp[i][0][d1] = 2;
            
            if(dp[i+1][0].count(d1)) dp[i][0][d1] = max(dp[i][0][d1], dp[i+1][0][d1] + 1);

            
            if(i + 2 < n && (nums[i+2] - nums[i]) % 2 == 0) {
                int d2 = (nums[i+2]-nums[i])/2;
                dp[i][1][d2] = 3;
                if(dp[i+2][0].count(d2)) dp[i][1][d2] = max(dp[i][1][d2], dp[i+2][0][d2] + 2);
            }
            if(i + 2 < n) {
                dp[i][1][d1] = max(dp[i][1][d1], 3);
                int fdiff = nums[i+2] - nums[i+1];
                res = max(res, dp[i+1][0][fdiff] + 1);
            }

            if(dp[i+1][1].count(d1)) dp[i][1][d1] = max(dp[i][1][d1], dp[i+1][1][d1] + 1);
        }
        for(auto &t1 : dp) for(auto &t2 : t1) for(auto &p : t2) res = max(res, p.second);
        return res;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        unordered_map<int, int> xs, ys;
        int n = points.size();
        vector<int> parent(n), sz(n, 1);
        iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0);
        function<int(int)> get_set = [&](int u) {
            if(parent[u] != u) parent[u] = get_set(parent[u]);
            return parent[u];
        };

        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) {
            if(xs.count(points[i][0]) == 0) xs[points[i][0]] = i;
            if(ys.count(points[i][1]) == 0) ys[points[i][1]] = i;

            {
                int p1 = get_set(i);
                int p2 = get_set(xs[points[i][0]]);
                if(p1 != p2) parent[p1] = p2, sz[p2] += sz[p1], sz[p1] = 0;
            }
            {
                int p1 = get_set(i);
                int p2 = get_set(ys[points[i][1]]);
                if(p1 != p2) parent[p1] = p2, sz[p2] += sz[p1], sz[p1] = 0;
            }
        }
        sort(sz.begin(), sz.end());
        int res = sz.back() + 1;
        if(sz.size() > 1) res += sz[(int)sz.size() - 2];
        return res;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 222 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int ans=3, N=nums.size();
        vector<int>d(N-1,0);
        for(int i=1; i<N; i++) d[i-1]=nums[i]-nums[i-1];
        unordered_map<int,vector<tuple<int,int,int>>>mp;
        int i=0;
        while(i<N-1){
            int s=i;
            while(i<N-1 && d[i]==d[s]) i++;
            mp[d[s]].push_back({s,i-1,i-s});
        }
        for(auto&[x,y]:mp){
            for(int i=0; i<y.size(); i++){
                auto [l,r,L]=y[i];
                ans=max(ans,min(N,L+2));
                if(l>=2 && d[l-2]+d[l-1]==2*x) ans=max(ans, L+3);
                if(r<=N-4 && d[r+1]+d[r+2]==2*x) ans=max(ans, L+3);
                if(i+1<y.size()){
                    auto [nl,nr,nL]=y[i+1];
                    if(nl-r==3 && d[r+1]+d[r+2]==2*x) ans=max(ans, L+nL+3);
                }
            }
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int ans=0, N=points.size();
        unordered_map<int,int>mpx, mpy;
        vector<int>p(N), sz(N,1);
        iota(p.begin(), p.end(),0);
        auto find=[&](int i){
            int root=i;
            while(root!=p[root]) p[root]=p[p[root]], root=p[root];
            return root;
        };

        auto unite=[&](int i, int j){
            int ri=find(i), rj=find(j);
            if(ri!=rj){
                if(sz[ri]<sz[rj]) swap(ri,rj);
                p[rj]=ri;
                sz[ri]+=sz[rj];
            }
        };
        for(int i=0; i<N; i++){
            int x=points[i][0], y=points[i][1];
            if(mpx.count(x)) unite(i,mpx[x]);
            else mpx[x]=i;
            if(mpy.count(y)) unite(i,mpy[y]);
            else mpy[y]=i;
        }
        vector<int>c;
        for(int i=0; i<N; i++){
            if(p[i]==i) c.push_back(sz[i]);
        }
        sort(c.rbegin(), c.rend());
        if(c.size()==1) return c[0]+1;
        return c[0]+c[1]+1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 223 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:

        # diffs
        n = len(nums)
        diffs = [nums[i+1] - nums[i] for i in range(n-1)]

        def streak(L):
            n = len(L)
            right = [0] * n
            i = 0
            while i < n:
                j = i
                while j + 1 < n and L[j+1] == L[i]:
                    j += 1
                for k in range(i, j+1):
                    right[k] = 1 + j - k
                i = j + 1
            return right
        right = streak(diffs)
        left = streak(diffs[::-1])[::-1]

        ans = 0
        ans = max(right[1] + 2, ans)
        ans = max(left[-2] + 2, ans)
        for i in range(1, n-1):
            # change x_i alter diff i-1, diff i
            if i == 1:
                a, b, c = diffs[:3]
                if a + b == 2 * c:
                    ans = max(ans, right[2] + 3)
                else:
                    ans = max(ans, right[2] + 2)
            elif i == n-2:
                a, b, c = diffs[-3:]
                if b + c == 2 * a:
                    ans = max(ans, left[-3] + 3)
                else:
                    ans = max(ans, left[-3] + 2)
            else:
                a = diffs[i-2]
                b, c = diffs[i-1], diffs[i]
                d = diffs[i+1]
                if a == d and b + c == a + d:
                    ans = max(ans, left[i-2] + right[i+1] + 3)
                else:
                    cur = left[i-2] + 2
                    if b + c == 2 * a:
                        cur += 1
                    ans = max(ans, cur)
                    cur = right[i+1] + 2
                    if b + c == 2 * d:
                        cur += 1
                    ans = max(ans, cur)
        return ans
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        if n <= 2: return n + 1

        from collections import defaultdict
        xs = defaultdict(lambda: [])
        ys = defaultdict(lambda: [])

        for i, (x, y) in enumerate(points):
            xs[x].append(i)
            ys[y].append(i)


        vis = [False] * n
        color = 0
        ans = [0] * n
        visx = set()
        visy = set()
        def dfs(v):
            if vis[v]: return
            else: 
                vis[v] = True
                ans[color] += 1
                
            x, y = points[v]
            if x not in visx:
                visx.add(x)
                for u in xs[x]:
                    dfs(u)
            if y not in visy:
                visy.add(y)
                for u in ys[y]:
                    dfs(u)

        for i in range(n):
            if not vis[i]:
                dfs(i)
                color += 1

        ans = sorted(ans)
        return 1 + sum(ans[-2:])

        
        


        
                
        
            
[Q4_END]

### RANK 225 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        # [9,7,5,10,1]
        # left[i] [0,1,2,1,1]
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 2:
            return n
        left = [1] * n
        left[1] = 2
        for i in range(2, n):
            if nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]:
                left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1
            else:
                left[i] = 2
        right = [1] * n
        right[n - 2] = 2
        for i in range(n - 3, -1, -1):
            if nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]:
                right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1
            else:
                right[i] = 2   
        result = max(left)
        for i in range(n):
            if i > 0:
                result = max(result, left[i - 1] + 1)
            if i < n - 1:
                result = max(result, right[i + 1] + 1)
            if 0 < i < n - 1:
                s = nums[i - 1] + nums[i + 1]
                if s % 2 == 0:
                    d = (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) // 2

                    if i >= 2 and nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == d:
                        left_len = left[i - 1]
                    else:
                        left_len = 1

                    if i + 2 < n and nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == d:
                        right_len = right[i + 1]
                    else:
                        right_len = 1

                    result = max(result, left_len + 1 + right_len)

        return result
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        # (x, y) are edges
        # conenct are possible edges
        # New point can alawys onnect
        # Find two largest part
        n = len(points)
        xs = {}
        ys = {}
        # Give idx
        for x, y in points:
            if x not in xs:
                xs[x] = len(xs)
            if y not in ys:
                ys[y] = len(ys)
        nx = len(xs)
        ny = len(ys)
        total_nodes = nx + ny
        parent = list(range(total_nodes))
        rank = [0] * total_nodes
        # UF
        def find(x):
            while parent[x] != x:
                parent[x] = parent[parent[x]]
                x = parent[x]
            return x

        def union(a, b):
            ra, rb = find(a), find(b)
            if ra == rb:
                return
            if rank[ra] < rank[rb]:
                parent[ra] = rb
            elif rank[ra] > rank[rb]:
                parent[rb] = ra
            else:
                parent[rb] = ra
                rank[ra] += 1
        for x, y in points:
            xid = xs[x]
            yid = nx + ys[y]
            union(xid, yid)
        edges = defaultdict(int)
        for x, y in points:
            root = find(xs[x])
            edges[root] += 1
            
        sizes = sorted(edges.values(), reverse=True)

        largest = sizes[0] if sizes else 0
        second = sizes[1] if len(sizes) > 1 else 0

        return largest + second + 1
[Q4_END]

class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n=nums.size();
        vector<int> pref(n,0);
        pref[0]=1;
        pref[1]=2;
        for (int i=2;i<n;i++){
            if(nums[i]-nums[i-1]==nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]){
                pref[i]=pref[i-1]+1;
            }
            else pref[i]=2;
        }
        vector<int> suff(n,0);
        suff[n-1]=1;
        suff[n-2]=2;
        for (int i=n-3;i>=0;i--){
            if(nums[i]-nums[i+1]==nums[i+1]-nums[i+2]){
                suff[i]=suff[i+1]+1;
            }
            else suff[i]=2;
        }
        int ans=0;
        for (int i=0;i<n;i++){
            if(i==0){
                ans=max(ans,1+suff[1]);
            }
            else if(i==n-1){
                ans=max(ans,1+pref[n-2]);
            }
            else{
                ans=max(ans,1+pref[i-1]);
                ans=max(ans,1+suff[i+1]);

                int cur=(nums[i+1]+nums[i-1]);
                if(cur%2) continue;
                int d=(nums[i+1]-nums[i-1])/2;
                int left=1;
                if(i>=2 && nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]==d){
                    left=pref[i-1];
                }
                int right=1;
                if(i<=n-3 && nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]==d){
                    right=suff[i+1];
                }
                ans=max(ans,left+right+1);
                
            }
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    class DSU{
        vector<int> par;
        public:
            DSU(int n){
                par.resize(n+1);
                for (int i=0;i<=n;i++){
                    par[i]=i;
                }
            }
            int find(int x){
                if(par[x]==x) return x;
                return par[x]=find(par[x]);
            }
            void uni(int a,int b){
                a=find(a);
                b=find(b);
                if(a!=b) par[b]=a;
            }
    };
    static bool comp1(const vector<int>& a,const vector<int>& b){
        return a[0]<b[0];
    }
    static bool comp2(const vector<int>& a,const vector<int>& b){
        return a[1]<b[1];
    }
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n=points.size();
        
        sort(points.begin(),points.end(),comp1);
        map<int,int> x,y;
        int id=0;
        for (auto& p:points){
            if(x.count(p[0])) continue;
            x[p[0]]=id;
            id++;
        }
        sort(points.begin(),points.end(),comp2);
        id=0;
        for (auto& p:points){
            if(y.count(p[1])) continue;
            y[p[1]]=n+id;
            id++;
        }
        DSU ds(2*n+2);
        for(auto& p:points){
            ds.uni(x[p[0]],y[p[1]]);
        }
        map<int,int> mp;
        for (auto& p:points){
            mp[ds.find(x[p[0]])]++;
        }
        vector<int> comp;
        for (auto& z:mp){
            comp.push_back(z.second);
        }
        sort(comp.rbegin(),comp.rend());
        int ans=comp[0];
        if(comp.size()>1) ans+=comp[1];
        ans++;
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 229 ###

class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        int[] b = new int[n-1];

        for(int i = 0; i<n-1; i++) {
            b[i] = nums[i+1] - nums[i];
        }

        int c = n-1;
        int[] d = new int[c];
        d[0] = 1;

        for(int i=1; i<c; i++) {
            if(b[i] == b[i-1]) {
                d[i] = d[i-1] +1;
            }
             else {
                 d[i] = 1;
             }
        }

        int[] e = new int[c];
        e[c-1] = 1;
        for(int i=c-2; i>=0; i--) {
            if(b[i] == b[i+1]) {
                e[i] = e[i+1] +1;
            }
             else {
                 e[i] = 1;
             }
        }

        int f = Math.min(n,3);

        for(int i=0; i<c; i++) {
            if(d[i] == c) {
                f = Math.max(f, c+1);
            } else {
                f = Math.max(f, d[i] + 2);
            }
        }

        for(int i=0; i<c-1; i++) {
            long g = (long)b[i] + b[i+1];
            if(i>0) {
                if(g == 2L*b[i-1]) {
                    int j = d[i-1];
                    if(i+2 < c && b[i+2] == b[i-1]) {
                        j = j + e[i+2];
                    }
                    if(j + 3 > f) {
                        f = j+3;
                    }
                }
            }

            if(i+2 < c) {
                
                if(g == 2L*b[i+2]) {
                    int j = e[i+2];
                    if(i > 0 && b[i+2] == b[i-1]) {
                        j = j + d[i-1];
                    }
                    if(j + 3 > f) {
                        f = j+3;
                    }
                }               
            }
            if(g % 2 == 0) {
                int h = (int)g/2;
                int cur = 3;
                if(i>0 && b[i-1] == h) cur += d[i-1];
                if(i+2 < c && b[i+2] == h) cur += e[i+2];
                if(cur > f) f = cur;
            }
        }
        return Math.min(f,n);
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] a) {
        int b = a.length;
        int[] c = new int[b];
        int[] d = new int[b];
        for(int i=0; i<b; i++) {
            c[i]=i;
            d[i]=1;
        }

        Map<Integer, Integer> e = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Integer> f = new HashMap<>();

        for(int i=0; i<b; i++) {
            if(e.containsKey(a[i][0])) {
                g(i, e.get(a[i][0]), c, d);
            } else {
                e.put(a[i][0], i);
            }

            if(f.containsKey(a[i][1])) {
                g(i, f.get(a[i][1]), c, d);
            } 
            else {
                f.put(a[i][1], i);
            }
        }

        int h=0, j=0;
        for(int i=0; i<b; i++) {
            if(c[i] == i) {
                if(d[i] >= h) {
                    j=h;
                    h=d[i];
                } else if(d[i]>j) j=d[i];
            }
        }

        return h+j+1;                
    }

    void g(int i, int j, int[] c, int[] d) {
        int l = func(i, c);
        int m = func(j, c);
        if(l != m) {
            c[l] = m;
            d[m] = d[m] + d[l];
        }
    }

    int func(int i, int[] d) {
        while(i != d[i]) {
            d[i] = d[d[i]];
            i = d[i];
        }
        return i;
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 231 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n=nums.size();
        if(n<=3) return n;
        int x=n-1;
        vector<int>ans(x);
        for(int i=0;i<x;i++){
            ans[i]=nums[i+1]-nums[i];
        }
        vector<int>lt(x,1);
        for(int i=1;i<x;i++){
            if(ans[i]==ans[i-1]) lt[i]=lt[i-1]+1;
        }
        vector<int>rt(x,1);
        for(int i=x-2;i>=0;i--){
            if(ans[i]==ans[i+1]) rt[i]=rt[i+1]+1;
        }
        int mldr=0;
        for(int i=0;i<x;i++){
            int a=lt[i]+(i<x-1?1:0);
            int b=rt[i]+(i>0?1:0);
            mldr=max({mldr,a,b});
        }
        for(int i=1;i<x;i++){
            long long sum=(long long)ans[i-1]+ans[i];
            if(sum%2==0){
                long long de=sum/2;
                int len=2;
                if(i>=2 && ans[i-2]==de){
                    len+=lt[i-2];
                }
                if(i+1<x && ans[i+1]==de){
                    len+=rt[i+1];
                }
                mldr=max(len,mldr);
            }
            
        }
        return mldr+1;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    struct DSU{
        vector<int>parent;
        vector<int>nandu;
        DSU(int n){
            parent.resize(n);
            nandu.assign(n,1);
            for(int i=0;i<n;i++) parent[i]=i;
        }
        int find(int i){
            if(parent[i]==i) return i;
            return parent[i]=find(parent[i]);
        }
        void uno(int i,int j){
            int rti=find(i);
            int rtj=find(j);
            if(rti!=rtj){
                if(nandu[rti]<nandu[rtj]) swap(rti,rtj);
                parent[rtj]=rti;
                nandu[rti]+=nandu[rtj];
            }
            
        }
    };
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n=points.size();
        if(n==0) return 1;
        DSU dsu(n);
        unordered_map<int,int>mpex,mpey;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            int m=points[i][0];
            int n=points[i][1];
            if(mpex.count(m)){
                dsu.uno(i,mpex[m]);
            }
            else{
                mpex[m]=i;
            }
            if(mpey.count(n)){
                dsu.uno(i,mpey[n]);
            }
            else{
                mpey[n]=i;
            }
        }
        vector<int>ans;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            if(dsu.parent[i]==i){
                ans.push_back(dsu.nandu[i]);
            }
        }
        sort(ans.begin(),ans.end(),greater<int>());
        int resulter=1+ans[0];
        if(ans.size()>1){
            resulter+=ans[1];
        }
        return resulter;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 232 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
 public int longestArithmetic( int[ ] nums )  {
   int n=nums.length ;
  if( n <= 3 ) return n;
  
   int m = n- 1;
    long[] d = new long[m ];
     for (int i=0 ;i <m;i++ ) {
         
      d[i] = (long)nums[i+1 ]- nums[ i];
     }
     
   int[ ] left=new int [m ];
    left[0]= 1;
     for(int i= 1; i< m ; i++){
         
      if( d[i ]== d[ i- 1]) {
       left[i ]= left[ i- 1]+1 ;
      }else {
          left[i ]= 1;
      }
     }
     
   int[ ] right= new int[m] ;
    right[m- 1] =1 ;
     for(int i=m -2 ;i >=0 ; i--) {
         
      if( d[i] ==d[ i+ 1] ){
       right[ i]=right[i +1] + 1;
      } else{
       right[i]=1;
      }
     }
     
   int maxLen= 0;
   
    for (int i= 0;i <m; i++ ){
     int K= left[ i];
      int len= K+(K <m? 2: 1) ;
       if(len > maxLen) maxLen =len;
    }
    
     for(int i= 1; i<m; i++ ){
         
      long sum=d[i -1] +d [i ];
      
       if(i >= 2 ){
        long D=d[ i-2 ];
         if( sum== 2* D) {
             
          int len= left[ i- 2]+2 ;
           if( i<= m- 2 && d[ i+ 1]==D ) {
            len +=right[i +1 ];
           }
            if(len+1 >maxLen ) maxLen= len+ 1;
         }
       }
       
        if (i<=m -2 ){
            
         long D=d[i +1 ];
          if(sum== 2*D ){
              
           int len= right[i+ 1] + 2;
            if(len+ 1>maxLen ) maxLen= len+ 1;
          }
        }
     }
     
   return maxLen;
 }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
import java.util.*;

class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        
     int n = points.length;
      DSU dsu = new DSU(n);
      
       Map<Integer, Integer> xMap = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Integer> yMap = new HashMap<>();
        
      for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
          
       int x = points[i][0];
        int y = points[i][1];
        
         if (xMap.containsKey(x)) {
          dsu.union(i, xMap.get(x));
         } else {
             xMap.put(x, i);
         }
         
          if (yMap.containsKey(y)) {
           dsu.union(i, yMap.get(y));
          } else {
              yMap.put(y, i);
          }
      }
      
       List<Integer> compSizes = new ArrayList<>();
       
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            
         if (dsu.parent[i] == i) {
          compSizes.add(dsu.size[i]);
         }
        }
        
      compSizes.sort(Collections.reverseOrder());
      
       if (compSizes.size() >= 2) {
           
        return compSizes.get(0) + compSizes.get(1) + 1;
       } else {
        return compSizes.get(0) + 1;
       }
    }
    
    class DSU {
        
     int[] parent;
      int[] size;
      
       public DSU(int n) {
           
        parent = new int[n];
         size = new int[n];
         
          for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
              
           parent[i] = i;
            size[i] = 1;
          }
       }
       
      public int find(int i) {
          
       if (parent[i] == i) return i;
       
        return parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
      }
      
       public void union(int i, int j) {
           
        int rootI = find(i);
         int rootJ = find(j);
         
          if (rootI != rootJ) {
              
           parent[rootI] = rootJ;
            size[rootJ] += size[rootI];
          }
       }
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 234 ###
[Q3_START]
#define MAX(a,b) ((a)>(b)?(a):(b))
int longestArithmetic(int* nums, int numsSize) {
    if(numsSize<=2) return numsSize;
    int L[numsSize],R[numsSize];
    for(int i=0;i<numsSize;i++){
        L[i]=1;
        R[i]=1;
    }
    int maxLen=2;
    for(int i=1;i<numsSize;i++){
        if(i>1 && nums[i]-nums[i-1]==nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]){
            L[i]=L[i-1]+1;
        }else{
            L[i]=2;
        }
        maxLen=MAX(maxLen,L[i]);
    }
    for(int i=numsSize-2;i>=0;i--){
        if(i<numsSize-2 && nums[i+1]-nums[i]==nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]){
            R[i]=R[i+1]+1;
        }else{
            R[i]=2;
        }
    }
    for(int i=0;i<numsSize;i++){
        if(i>0)maxLen=MAX(maxLen,R[i]+1);
        if(i<numsSize-1) maxLen=MAX(maxLen,L[i]+1);
        if(i>0 && i<numsSize-1){
            if((nums[i+1]-nums[i-1])%2==0){
                int targetdiff=(nums[i+1]-nums[i-1])/2;
                int leftSide=1;
                int rightSide=1;
                if(i>1 && nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]==targetdiff){
                    leftSide=L[i-1];
                }
                if(i<numsSize-2 && nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]==targetdiff){
                    rightSide=R[i+1];
                }
            maxLen=MAX(maxLen,leftSide+rightSide+1);
            }
        }
    }
    return(maxLen>numsSize)?numsSize:maxLen;
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
#include<stdio.h>
#include<stdlib.h>
typedef struct{
    int x,y,id;
}Point;
int compareX(const void*a,const void*b){
    Point* p1=(Point*)a;
    Point* p2=(Point*)b;
    if(p1->x!=p2->x) return p1->x-p2->x;
    return p1->y-p2->y;
}
int compareY(const void*a,const void*b){
    Point*p1=(Point*)a;
    Point*p2=(Point*)b;
    if(p1->y!=p2->y) return p1->y-p2->y;
    return p1->x-p2->x;
}
int find(int * parent,int i){
    if(parent[i]==i) return i;
    return parent[i]=find(parent,parent[i]);
}
void unite(int *parent,int *size,int i,int j){
    int root_i=find(parent,i);
    int root_j=find(parent,j);
    if(root_i!=root_j){
        if(size[root_i]<size[root_j]){
            int temp=root_i;root_i=root_j;root_j=temp;
        }
        parent[root_j]=root_i;
        size[root_i]+=size[root_j];
    }
}
int maxActivated(int** points, int pointsSize, int* pointsColSize) {
    if(pointsSize==0) return 1;
    Point*pts=malloc(pointsSize*sizeof(Point));
    int* parent=malloc(pointsSize*sizeof(int));
    int* size=malloc(pointsSize*sizeof(int));
    for(int i=0;i<pointsSize;i++){
        pts[i].x=points[i][0];
        pts[i].y=points[i][1];
        pts[i].id=i;
        parent[i]=i;
        size[i]=1;
    }
    qsort(pts,pointsSize,sizeof(Point),compareX);
    for(int i=0;i<pointsSize-1;i++){
        if(pts[i].x==pts[i+1].x) unite(parent,size,pts[i].id,pts[i+1].id);
    }
    qsort(pts,pointsSize,sizeof(Point),compareY);
    for(int i=0;i<pointsSize-1;i++){
        if(pts[i].y==pts[i+1].y) unite(parent,size,pts[i].id,pts[i+1].id);
    }
    int *clusterSizes=calloc(pointsSize,sizeof(int));
    int clusterCount=0;
    for(int i=0;i<pointsSize;i++){
        if(parent[i]==i){
            clusterSizes[clusterCount++]=size[i];
        }
    }
    int max1=0,max2=0;
    for(int i=0;i<clusterCount;i++){
        if(clusterSizes[i]>max1){
            max2=max1;
            max1=clusterSizes[i];
        }else if(clusterSizes[i]>max2){
            max2=clusterSizes[i];
        }
    }
    free(pts);
    free(parent);
    free(size);free(clusterSizes);
    return max1+max2+1;
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 235 ###
[Q3_START]
from typing import List
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 2:
            return n

        left = [1] * n
        left[1] = 2
        for i in range(2, n):
            if nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]:
                left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1
            else:
                left[i] = 2
        right = [1] * n
        right[n - 2] = 2

        for i in range(n - 3, -1, -1):
            if nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]:
                right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1
            else:
                right[i] = 2
        ans = max(left)

        ans = max(ans, right[1] + 1)
        ans = max(ans, left[n - 2] + 1)

        for i in range(1, n - 1):
            if i >= 2:
                d = nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]
                candidate = left[i - 1] + 1

                changed_value = nums[i - 1] + d
                if nums[i + 1] - changed_value == d:
                    extra = 1
                    if i + 2 < n and nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == d:
                        extra = right[i + 1]
                    candidate = left[i - 1] + 1 + extra
                ans = max(ans, candidate)

            if i + 2 < n:
                d = nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]
                candidate = right[i + 1] + 1

                changed_value = nums[i + 1] - d
                if changed_value - nums[i - 1] == d:
                    extra = 1
                    if i - 2 >= 0 and nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == d:
                        extra = left[i - 1]
                    candidate = extra + 1 + right[i + 1]
                ans = max(ans, candidate)
        return min(ans, n)
                
        
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        xs = {}
        ys = {}

        x_id = 0
        y_id = 0

        for x, y in points:
            if x not in xs:
                xs[x] = x_id
                x_id += 1
            if y not in ys:
                ys[y] = y_id
                y_id += 1
        total_nodes = x_id + y_id
        parent = list(range(total_nodes))
        rank = [0] * total_nodes

        def find(a:int) -> int:
            while parent[a] != a:
                parent[a] = parent[parent[a]]
                a = parent[a]
            return a
        def union(a: int, b:int) -> None:
            ra = find(a)
            rb = find(b)

            if ra == rb:
                return
            if rank[ra] < rank[rb]:
                parent[ra] = rb
            elif rank[ra] > rank[rb]:
                parent[rb] = ra
            else:
                parent[rb] = ra
                rank[ra] += 1
        for x, y in points:
            left = xs[x]
            right = x_id + ys[y]
            union(left, right)
        comp_edges = {}

        for x, y in points:
            root = find(xs[x])
            comp_edges[root] = comp_edges.get(root, 0) + 1
        largest = 0
        second = 0

        for size in comp_edges.values():
            if size >= largest:
                second = largest
                largest = size
            elif size > second:
                second = size
        return largest + second + 1
        
        
[Q4_END]

### RANK 236 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        vector<int> ll(n, 0), rr(n, 0);

        ll[0] = 1;
        ll[1] = 2;
        for (int i = 2; i < n; ++i) {
            ll[i] = (nums[i]- nums[i-1]==nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]) ? ll[i-1]+1 : 2;
        }
        rr[n-1] = 1;
        rr[n-2] = 2;
        for (int i = n-3; i >= 0; --i) {
            rr[i] = (nums[i]- nums[i+1]==nums[i+1]-nums[i+2]) ? rr[i+1]+1 : 2;
        }

        int ans = 3;
        for (int i = 1; i <= n-2; ++i) {
            ans = max(max(ans, ll[i] + 1), rr[i] + 1);
            if (i > 1 && (nums[i] - nums[i-2]) % 2 == 0 && (nums[i] - nums[i-2])/2 == nums[i+1] - nums[i]) {
                ans = max(ans, rr[i]+2);
            }
            if (i < n-2 && (nums[i+2] - nums[i]) % 2 == 0 && (nums[i+2] - nums[i])/2 == nums[i] - nums[i-1]) {
                ans = max(ans, ll[i]+2);
            }
            if ((nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) % 2 ==0) {
                int v = (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) / 2;
                if ((i == 1 || nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == v) && (i == n-2 || nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == v)) {
                    ans = max(ans, ll[i-1] + rr[i+1] + 1);
                }
            }
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int get(vector<int> & f, int a) {
        int b = a;
        while (f[b] != b) b = f[b];
        int c = a, tmp;
        while (c != b) {
            tmp = f[c];
            f[c] = b;
            c = tmp;
        }
        return b;
    }
    
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) points[i].push_back(i);

        vector<int> f(n);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) f[i]=i;

        std::sort(points.begin(), points.end(), [](const vector<int>& a, const vector<int>& b) {
        return a[0] < b[0] || (a[0] == b[0] && a[1] < b[1]); // Returns true if 'a' should precede 'b' (for descending order)
    });
        for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
            if (points[i][0] == points[i-1][0]) {
                int a = get(f, points[i][2]);
                int b = get(f, points[i-1][2]);
                f[a] = b;
            }
        }

        std::sort(points.begin(), points.end(), [](const vector<int>& a, const vector<int>& b) {
        return a[1] < b[1] || (a[1] == b[1] && a[0] < b[0]); // Returns true if 'a' should precede 'b' (for descending order)
    });
        for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
            if (points[i][1] == points[i-1][1]) {
                int a = get(f, points[i][2]);
                int b = get(f, points[i-1][2]);
                f[a] = b;
            }
        }

        vector<int> cc(n, 0);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            int a = get(f, i);
            cc[a]++;
        }

        int max1 = 0, max2 = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            if (cc[i] > max1) {
                max2 = max1;
                max1 = cc[i];
            } else if (cc[i] > max2){
                max2 = cc[i];
            }
        }
        return max1 + max2 + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 237 ###
[Q3_START]
constexpr int MAX = 100010;
constexpr int INF = 0x3F3F3F3F;

int pre[MAX], nxt[MAX];

class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
      const auto& a = nums;
      int n = a.size();
      pre[0] = 1;
      for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
        pre[i] = 2;
        if (i > 1 && a[i] - a[i - 1] == a[i - 1] - a[i - 2]) {
          pre[i] = max(pre[i], pre[i - 1] + 1);
        }
      }
      nxt[n - 1] = 1;
      for (int i = n - 1; i > 0; --i) {
        nxt[i - 1] = 2;
        if (i < n - 1 && a[i] - a[i - 1] == a[i + 1] - a[i]) {
          nxt[i - 1] = max(nxt[i - 1], nxt[i] + 1);
        }
      }
      // for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
      //   printf("i = %d, pre = %d, nxt = %d\n", i, pre[i], nxt[i]);
      // }
      int ret = 1;
      if (n > 1) {
        ret = max(ret, nxt[1] + 1);
        ret = max(ret, pre[n - 2] + 1);
      }
      for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; ++i) {
        int cur = (a[i + 1] - a[i - 1]) % 2 == 0 ? 3 : 2;
        cur = max({cur, pre[i - 1] + 1, nxt[i + 1] + 1});
        int l = i > 1 ? a[i - 1] - a[i - 2] : -INF;
        int r = i < n - 2 ? a[i + 2] - a[i + 1] : INF;
        if (l == r && a[i + 1] - a[i - 1] == 2 * l) {
          cur = max(cur, pre[i - 1] + nxt[i + 1] + 1);
        }
        if (a[i + 1] - a[i - 1] == 2 * l) {
          cur = max(cur, pre[i - 1] + 2);
        }
        if (a[i + 1] - a[i - 1] == 2 * r) {
          cur = max(cur, nxt[i + 1] + 2);
        }
        ret = max(ret, cur);
      }
      return ret;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
constexpr int MAX = 100010;

struct Point {
  int x, y, id;
} p[MAX];

struct Dsu {
  int p[MAX];

  void Reset(int n) { fill(p, p + n, -1); }

  int Find(int x) { return p[x] < 0 ? x : p[x] = Find(p[x]); }

  bool Union(int a, int b) {
    a = Find(a);
    b = Find(b);
    if (a == b) {
      return false;
    }
    if (p[a] < p[b]) {
      swap(a, b);
    }
    p[b] += p[a];
    p[a] = b;
    return true;
  }

  int Size(int x) { return -p[Find(x)]; }
  
} dsu;

int cnt[MAX];

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
      int n = points.size();
      for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
        p[i] = {points[i][0], points[i][1], i};
      }
      dsu.Reset(n);

      sort(p, p + n, [](const Point& a, const Point& b) {
        return a.x < b.x;
      });
      for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
        if (p[i].x == p[i - 1].x) {
          dsu.Union(p[i].id, p[i - 1].id);
        }
      }
      sort(p, p + n, [](const Point& a, const Point& b) {
        return a.y < b.y;
      });
      for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
        if (p[i].y == p[i - 1].y) {
          dsu.Union(p[i].id, p[i - 1].id);
        }
      }
      for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
        if (dsu.Find(i) == i) {
          cnt[i] = dsu.Size(i);
        } else {
          cnt[i] = -1;
        }
      }
      sort(cnt, cnt + n, greater<int>());
      // printf("cnt0 = %d, cnt1 = %d\n", cnt[0], cnt[1]);
      if (n == 1 || cnt[1] == -1) {
        return n + 1;
      } else {
        return cnt[0] + cnt[1] + 1;
      }
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 238 ###
[Q3_START]
#pragma GCC optimize("O3,unroll-loops")
#pragma GCC target("avx2,bmi,bmi2,lzcnt,popcnt")
static const auto init = []() noexcept {
    ios::sync_with_stdio(false);
    cin.tie(nullptr);
    cout.tie(nullptr);
    return 'c';
}();

class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        const int n = nums.size();
        
        __builtin_assume(n >= 4 && n <= 100000);

        const int* __restrict__ p = nums.data();

        static int left_len[100005];
        static int right_len[100005];

        left_len[0] = 1;
        int max_single = 1;

        #pragma clang loop vectorize(enable) interleave(enable)
        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; ++i) {
            if (p[i + 1] - p[i] == p[i] - p[i - 1]) [[likely]] {
                left_len[i] = left_len[i - 1] + 1;
            } else [[unlikely]] {
                left_len[i] = 1;
            }
            if (left_len[i] > max_single) max_single = left_len[i];
        }

        right_len[n - 2] = 1;
        
        #pragma clang loop vectorize(enable) interleave(enable)
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; --i) {
            if (p[i + 1] - p[i] == p[i + 2] - p[i + 1]) [[likely]] {
                right_len[i] = right_len[i + 1] + 1;
            } else [[unlikely]] {
                right_len[i] = 1;
            }
        }

        int ans = max_single + 2; 

        #pragma clang loop unroll(enable)
        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; ++i) {
            int S = p[i + 1] - p[i - 1];
            
            if ((S & 1) == 0) [[likely]] {
                int D = S / 2;
                int l = 0, r = 0;
                
                if (i >= 2 && p[i - 1] - p[i - 2] == D) {
                    l = left_len[i - 2];
                }
                if (i <= n - 3 && p[i + 2] - p[i + 1] == D) {
                    r = right_len[i + 1];
                }
                
                int current_len = l + r + 3;
                if (current_len > ans) {
                    ans = current_len;
                }
            }
        }

        return ans > n ? n : ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
#pragma GCC optimize("O3,unroll-loops")
#pragma GCC target("avx2,bmi,bmi2,lzcnt,popcnt")

static const auto init = []() noexcept {
    ios::sync_with_stdio(false);
    cin.tie(nullptr);
    cout.tie(nullptr);
    return 'c';
}();

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        const int n = points.size();

        #if __cplusplus >= 202302L
        [[assume(n >= 1 && n <= 100000)]];
        #endif

        if (n == 1) return 2;

        vector<int> parent(n);
        vector<int> sz(n, 1);
        iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0);

        auto find = [&](int i) {
            while (i != parent[i]) {
                parent[i] = parent[parent[i]]; 
                i = parent[i];
            }
            return i;
        };

        auto unite = [&](int i, int j) {
            int root_i = find(i);
            int root_j = find(j);
            if (root_i != root_j) {
                if (sz[root_i] < sz[root_j]) swap(root_i, root_j);
                parent[root_j] = root_i;
                sz[root_i] += sz[root_j];
            }
        };

        vector<int> ids(n);
        iota(ids.begin(), ids.end(), 0);

        ranges::sort(ids, std::less{}, [&](int id) { return points[id][0]; });
        for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
            if (points[ids[i]][0] == points[ids[i - 1]][0]) {
                unite(ids[i], ids[i - 1]);
            }
        }

        ranges::sort(ids, std::less{}, [&](int id) { return points[id][1]; });
        for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
            if (points[ids[i]][1] == points[ids[i - 1]][1]) {
                unite(ids[i], ids[i - 1]);
            }
        }

        int max1 = 0, max2 = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            if (parent[i] == i) {
                if (sz[i] > max1) {
                    max2 = max1;
                    max1 = sz[i];
                } else if (sz[i] > max2) {
                    max2 = sz[i];
                }
            }
        }

        return max1 + max2 + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 239 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        #9,7,100,3,1
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 2:
            return n
        
        left = [1] * n
        left[1] = 2
        for i in range(2, n):
            left[i] = left[i-1] + 1 if nums[i] - nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] else 2
        
        right = [1] * n
        right[n-2] = 2
        for i in range(n-3, -1, -1):
            right[i] = right[i+1] + 1 if nums[i+1] - nums[i] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] else 2
        
        ans = max(left) + 1
        
        for i in range(1, n-1):
            # Change nums[i]
            
            # Use left difference, extend right
            if i >= 2:
                d = nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]
                if nums[i-1] + 2*d == nums[i+1]:
                    r = right[i+1] if i+2 < n and nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == d else 1
                    ans = max(ans, left[i-1] + 1 + r)
            
            # Use right difference, extend left
            if i <= n-3:
                d = nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]
                if nums[i-1] + 2*d == nums[i+1]:
                    l = left[i-1] if i >= 2 and nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == d else 1
                    ans = max(ans, l + 1 + right[i+1])
        
        return min(ans, n)
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
from collections import defaultdict
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
    
        x_coords = sorted(set(x for x, y in points))
        y_coords = sorted(set(y for x, y in points))
        
        x_to_id = {x: i for i, x in enumerate(x_coords)}
        y_to_id = {y: i + len(x_coords) for i, y in enumerate(y_coords)}
        
        n = len(x_coords) + len(y_coords)
        parent = list(range(n))
        
        def find(x):
            if parent[x] != x:
                parent[x] = find(parent[x])
            return parent[x]
        
        def union(a, b):
            ra, rb = find(a), find(b)
            if ra != rb:
                parent[rb] = ra
        
        for x, y in points:
            union(x_to_id[x], y_to_id[y])
        
        comp_points = defaultdict(int)
        for x, y in points:
            comp_points[find(x_to_id[x])] += 1
        
        sizes = sorted(comp_points.values(), reverse=True)
        
        if len(sizes) == 1:
            return sizes[0] + 1
        return sizes[0] + sizes[1] + 1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 240 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {

        int n = nums.size();
        if(n<=2) return n;

        vector<int> L(n,2), R(n,2);

        for(int i=2;i<n;i++){
            if(nums[i]-nums[i-1]==nums[i-1]-nums[i-2])
                L[i]=L[i-1]+1;
        }

        for(int i=n-3;i>=0;i--){
            if(nums[i+1]-nums[i]==nums[i+2]-nums[i+1])
                R[i]=R[i+1]+1;
        }

        int ans=2;

        for(int i=0;i<n;i++)
            ans=max(ans,L[i]);

        for(int i=1;i<n-1;i++){

            long long sum=(long long)nums[i-1]+nums[i+1];

            if(sum%2==0){

                long long d=(nums[i+1]-nums[i-1])/2;

                int left=1,right=1;

                if(i>=2 && nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]==d)
                    left=L[i-1];

                if(i+2<n && nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]==d)
                    right=R[i+1];

                ans=max(ans,left+right+1);
            }

            ans=max(ans,L[i-1]+1);
            ans=max(ans,R[i+1]+1);
        }

        ans=max(ans,L[n-2]+1);
        ans=max(ans,R[1]+1);

        return min(ans,n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
#include <bits/stdc++.h>
using namespace std;

class Solution {
public:
    struct DSU {
        vector<int> parent, sz;
        
        DSU(int n) {
            parent.resize(n);
            sz.resize(n,1);
            for(int i=0;i<n;i++) parent[i]=i;
        }
        
        int find(int x){
            if(parent[x]==x) return x;
            return parent[x]=find(parent[x]);
        }
        
        void unite(int a,int b){
            a=find(a);
            b=find(b);
            if(a==b) return;
            if(sz[a]<sz[b]) swap(a,b);
            parent[b]=a;
            sz[a]+=sz[b];
        }
    };
    
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        
        unordered_map<int,int> xmap, ymap;
        int id=0;
        
        for(auto &p:points){
            if(!xmap.count(p[0])) xmap[p[0]]=id++;
            if(!ymap.count(p[1])) ymap[p[1]]=id++;
        }
        
        DSU dsu(id);
        
        for(auto &p:points)
            dsu.unite(xmap[p[0]], ymap[p[1]]);
        
        unordered_map<int,int> comp;
        
        for(auto &p:points){
            int r = dsu.find(xmap[p[0]]);
            comp[r]++;
        }
        
        int ans = 1;
        
        vector<int> sizes;
        for(auto &c:comp) sizes.push_back(c.second);
        
        sort(sizes.begin(), sizes.end(), greater<int>());
        
        if(sizes.size()==1)
            ans = sizes[0] + 1;
        else
            ans = sizes[0] + sizes[1] + 1;
        
        return min(ans, n+1);
    }
};
[Q4_END]
