class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n=nums.size();
        if(n<=3) return n;
        vector<int>L(n), R(n);
        L[0]=1, L[1]=2;
        for(int i=2;i<n;i++){
            L[i]= (nums[i]-nums[i-1]== nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]) ? L[i-1] +1 :2;
            
        }
        R[n-1]=1;
        R[n-2]=2;
        for(int i=n-3;i>=0;i--){
            R[i]=(nums[i+1]-nums[i]== nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]) ? R[i+1]+1:2;
        }

        int ans =3;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++)ans = max(ans,L[i]);
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            if(i>0) ans = max(ans,L[i-1]+1);
            if(i<n-1) ans = max(ans,R[i+1]+1);
        }
        for(int i=1;i<n-1;i++){

            // if(i>0 && i<n-1){
                long long gap =(long long)nums[i+1]-nums[i-1];
                if(i>=2 && i+2<=n-1){
                    long long dL= nums[i-1]-nums[i-2];
                    long long dR = nums[i+2]-nums[i+1];
                    if(dL==dR && gap==2*dL){
                        ans = max(ans, L[i-1]+1+R[i+1]);
                    }else if(gap==2*dL){
                        ans =max(ans,L[i-1]+2);
                    }else if(gap==2*dR){
                        ans = max(ans,R[i+1]+2);
                    }
                }else if(L[i-1]>=2){
                        long long dL = nums[i-1]-nums[i-2];
                        if(gap==2*dL){
                            ans = max(ans,L[i-1]+2);
                            
                        }
                    
                }else if(R[i+1]>=2){
                    long long dR= nums[i+2]-nums[i+1];
                    if(gap == 2*dR){
                        ans = max(ans, R[i+1]+2);
                    }
                }
            // }
        }
        return ans;
        
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        vector<int> par(n),rnk(n,0), sz(n,1);
        iota(par.begin(),par.end(), 0);

        auto find = [&](int x){
            while(par[x]!=x) x =par[x]= par[par[x]];
            return x;
        };

        auto unite = [&](int a, int b){
            a = find(a);
            b= find(b);
            if(a==b) return;
            if(rnk[a]<rnk[b]) swap(a,b);
            par[b]=a;
            sz[a]+=sz[b];
            if(rnk[a]==rnk[b]) rnk[a]++;
            
        };

        unordered_map<int,int> firstX, firstY;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            int x=points[i][0], y= points[i][1];
            if(firstX.count(x)) unite(i, firstX[x]);
            else firstX[x]=i;
            if(firstY.count(y)) unite(i, firstY[y]);
            else firstY[y]=i;
        }

        int mx1=0,mx2=0;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            if(find(i)==i){
                if(sz[i]>=mx1){
                    mx2=mx1;
                    mx1=sz[i];
                }else if(sz[i]>mx2){
                    mx2=sz[i];
                }
                
            }
        }
        return 1+mx1+mx2;
        
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 243 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    static int longestArithmetic(std::vector<int> const& nums) {
        int n{ static_cast<int>(nums.size()) };

        std::vector<int> table_l;
        std::vector<int> table_r;

        table_l.resize(n);
        table_r.resize(n);

        table_l[0] = 1;
        table_l[1] = 2;

        table_r[n - 1] = 1;
        table_r[n - 2] = 2;

        for (int i{ 2 }; i < n; ++i) {
            int a{ nums[i - 2] };
            int b{ nums[i - 1] };
            int c{ nums[i] };

            table_l[i] = c - b == b - a ? table_l[i - 1] + 1 : 2;
        }

        for (int i{ n - 3 }; 0 <= i; --i) {
            int a{ nums[i] };
            int b{ nums[i + 1] };
            int c{ nums[i + 2] };

            table_r[i] = c - b == b - a ? table_r[i + 1] + 1 : 2;
        }

        int ret{ std::max(*std::max_element(table_l.begin(), table_l.end()),
                          *std::max_element(table_r.begin(), table_r.end())) };

        for (int i{ 2 }; i < n; ++i) {
            ret = std::max(ret, table_l[i - 1] + 1);
        }

        for (int i{ n - 3 }; 0 <= i; --i) {
            ret = std::max(ret, table_r[i + 1] + 1);
        }

        for (int i{ 1 }; i < n - 1; ++i) {
            int b{ nums[i - 1] };
            int d{ nums[i + 1] };

            if ((b + d) % 2 != 0) { continue; }

            int c{ (b + d) / 2 };

            int cur_ans{ 3 };

            if (0 <= i - 2 && nums[i - 2] == b - (c - b)) {
                cur_ans += table_l[i - 1] - 1;
            }

            if (i + 2 < n && nums[i + 2] == d + (d - c)) {
                cur_ans += table_r[i + 1] - 1;
            }

            ret = std::max(ret, cur_ans);
        }

        return ret;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
#include <algorithm>
#include <array>
#include <bitset>
#include <deque>
#include <iomanip>
#include <iostream>
#include <list>
#include <map>
#include <numeric>
#include <queue>
#include <set>
#include <sstream>
#include <string>
#include <unordered_map>
#include <unordered_set>
#include <vector>

#define PRINT_VAR(var) std::cout << #var << ": " << (var) << '\n'

template <typename First, typename Second>
struct std::hash<std::pair<First, Second>> {
    hash<First> first_hash;
    hash<Second> second_hash;

    auto operator()(const pair<First, Second>& p) const {
        return this->first_hash(p.first) * 23 + this->second_hash(p.second);
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    static int maxActivated(std::vector<std::vector<int>> const& points) {
        std::unordered_map<int, std::vector<int>> groups[2];

        for (auto const& point : points) {
            int x{ point[0] };
            int y{ point[1] };

            groups[0].insert({ x, {} }).first->second.push_back(y);
            groups[1].insert({ y, {} }).first->second.push_back(x);
        }

        std::unordered_set<std::pair<int, int>> visited;

        std::vector<std::pair<int, int>> q;

        int max_group_size[3]{ 0 };

        for (auto const& point_ : points) {
            std::pair<int, int> point{ point_[0], point_[1] };

            if (visited.count(point) != 0) { continue; }

            int cur_group_size{ 0 };

            q.push_back({ 0, point.first });
            q.push_back({ 1, point.second });

            while (!q.empty()) {
                auto [group_idx, key]{ q.back() };
                q.pop_back();

                for (int val : groups[group_idx][key]) {
                    std::pair<int, int> next_point{ group_idx == 0 ? key : val,
                                                    group_idx == 0 ? val
                                                                   : key };

                    if (visited.count(next_point) != 0) { continue; }

                    visited.insert(next_point);

                    ++cur_group_size;

                    if (group_idx == 0) {
                        q.push_back({ 1, next_point.second });
                    }

                    if (group_idx == 1) {
                        q.push_back({ 0, next_point.first });
                    }
                }
            }

            max_group_size[0] = cur_group_size;

            std::sort(max_group_size, max_group_size + 3);
        }

        return max_group_size[1] + max_group_size[2] + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n=nums.size();
        if(n<=2)return n;
        vector<int>arr(n-1);
        for(int i=0;i<n-1;i++){
            arr[i]=nums[i+1]-nums[i];
        }
        int m=n-1;
        vector<int>L(m,1),R(m,1);
        int mxl=1;
        for(int i=1;i<m;i++){
            if(arr[i]==arr[i-1]){
                L[i]=L[i-1]+1;
            }
            mxl=max(mxl,L[i]);
        }
        for(int i=m-2;i>=0;--i){
            if(arr[i]==arr[i+1]){
                R[i]=R[i+1]+1;
            }
        }
        int ans=min(n,mxl+2);
        for(int i=1;i<m;i++){
            int sum=arr[i-1]+arr[i];
            if(sum%2==0){
                int d=sum/2;
                int currA=2;
                if(i>=2&&arr[i-2]==d){
                    currA+=L[i-2];
                }
                if(i<=m-2 && arr[i+1]==d){
                    currA+=R[i+1];
                }
                ans=max(ans,currA+1);
            }
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n=points.size();
        vector<int>par(n);
        vector<int>sz(n,1);
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            par[i]=i;
        }
        auto fn=[&](auto& self,int i)->int{
            if(par[i]==i)return i;
            return par[i]=self(self,par[i]);
        };
        auto un=[&](int i,int j){
            int rti=fn(fn,i);
            int rtj=fn(fn,j);
            if(rti!=rtj){
                if(sz[rti]<sz[rtj])swap(rti,rtj);
                par[rtj]=rti;
                sz[rti]+=sz[rtj];
            }
        };
        vector<pair<int,int>>arr(n);
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            arr[i]={points[i][0],i};
        }
        sort(arr.begin(),arr.end());
        for(int i=1;i<n;i++){
            if(arr[i].first==arr[i-1].first){
                un(arr[i].second,arr[i-1].second);
            }
        }
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            arr[i]={points[i][1],i};
        }
        sort(arr.begin(),arr.end());
        for(int i=1;i<n;i++){
            if(arr[i].first==arr[i-1].first){
                un(arr[i].second,arr[i-1].second);
            }
        }
        vector<int>cms;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            if(par[i]==i){
                cms.push_back(sz[i]);
            }
        }
        sort(cms.rbegin(),cms.rend());
        if(cms.size()==1){
            return cms[0]+1;
        }
        return cms[0]+cms[1]+1;






        
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 246 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        const int n = nums.size();
        vector<int> L(n, 2), R(n, 2);

        for (int i = 2; i < n; ++i){
            if (nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]){
                L[i] = L[i - 1] + 1;
            }
        }
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; --i){
            if (nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]){
                R[i] = R[i + 1] + 1;
            }
        }

        int result = 0;

        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i){
            if (i > 0) result = max(result, L[i - 1] + 1);
            if (i < n - 1) result = max(result, R[i + 1] + 1);

            if (i > 0 && i < n - 1){
                int diff = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1];
                if (diff % 2 == 0){
                    int d = diff / 2;
                    int bridgeSize = 1;

                    if (i > 1 && (nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == d)){
                        bridgeSize += L[i - 1];
                    }
                    else bridgeSize += 1;

                    if (i < n - 2 && (nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == d)){
                        bridgeSize += R[i + 1];
                    }
                    else bridgeSize += 1;

                    result = max(result, bridgeSize);
                }
            }
        }
        return result;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU {
public:
    vector<int> parent;
    vector<int> size;

    DSU(int n) {
        parent.resize(n);
        size.assign(n, 1);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            parent[i] = i;
        }
    }

    int find(int i) {
        if (parent[i] == i)
            return i;
        return parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
    }

    void unite(int i, int j) {
        int root_i = find(i);
        int root_j = find(j);
        if (root_i != root_j) {
            if (size[root_i] < size[root_j])
                swap(root_i, root_j);
            parent[root_j] = root_i;
            size[root_i] += size[root_j];
        }
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        const int n = points.size();
        if (n <= 2) return n + 1;

        DSU dsu(n);
        unordered_map<int, int> x_map, y_map;

        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i){
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];

            if (x_map.count(x)){
                dsu.unite(i, x_map[x]);
            }
            else x_map[x] = i;

            if (y_map.count(y)){
                dsu.unite(i, y_map[y]);
            }
            else y_map[y] = i;
        }

        vector<int> components;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i){
            if (dsu.parent[i] == i){
                components.push_back(dsu.size[i]);
            }
        }

        sort(components.rbegin(), components.rend());

        if (components.size() == 1) return components[0] + 1;
        else return components[0] + components[1] + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        if(n<= 2) return n;
        int m = n-1;
        int [] D = new int[m];
        for(int i =0;i<m;i++){
            D[i]=nums[i+1]-nums[i];
        }
        int[] ll = new int[m];
        ll[0]=1;
        for(int i =1;i<m;i++){
            if(D[i]==D[i-1]){
                ll[i]= ll[i-1]+1;
            } else{
                ll[i]=1;
            }
        }
        int [] rl = new int[m];
        rl[m-1]=1;
        for(int i = m-2;i>=0;--i){
            if(D[i]== D[i+1]){
                rl[i]=rl[i+1]+1;
            } else{
                rl[i]=1;
            }
        }
        int ml=0;
        for(int i =0;i<m;++i){
            ml =Math.max(ml,ll[i]);
        }
        int mdl=Math.min(m,ml+1);
        for(int k =0;k<m-1;++k){
            int sum =D[k]+D[k+1];
            if(sum %2 ==0){
                int c=sum/2;
                int l_l=0;
                int r_l=0;
                if(k-1 >= 0 && D[k-1]==c){
                    l_l = ll[k-1];
                }
                if(k+2 <m && D[k+2]==c){

                    r_l =rl[k+2];
                }
                mdl =Math.max(mdl,l_l+2+r_l);
            }
        }
        return mdl+1;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n =points.length;
        int [] pr = new int [n];
        int [] sz = new int [n];
        for(int i =0;i<n;i++){
            pr[i]=i;
            sz[i]=1;
        }
        Map<Integer, Integer> mapx = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Integer> mapy = new HashMap<>();
        for( int i =0;i<n;i++){
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];
            if(mapx.containsKey(x)){
                union(i,mapx.get(x), pr,sz);
            } else{
                mapx.put(x,i);
            }
            if(mapy.containsKey(y)){
                union(i,mapy.get(y), pr,sz);
            } else{
                mapy.put(y,i);
            }
        }
        int m1=0;
        int m2=0;
        for(int i =0; i<n;i++){
            if(pr[i]==i){
                if(sz[i]>m1){
                    m2=m1;
                    m1=sz[i];
                } else if(sz[i] > m2){
                    m2 =sz[i];
                }
            }
        }
        if(m2 ==0){return m1+1;}
        return m1+m2+1;
    }
    private int find(int i ,int [] parent){
        if (parent[i] ==i){
            return i;
        }
        return parent[i]=find(parent[i],parent);
    }
    private void union(int i , int j , int[] parent, int []sz){
        int rooti =find(i,parent);
        int rootj = find(j,parent);
        if(rooti!= rootj){
            parent[rooti]=rootj;
            sz[rootj] += sz[rooti];
        }
    }
}
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int len = nums.length;
        int mlen = len-1;
        int[] dif = new int[mlen];
        int idx = 0;
        do{
            dif[idx] = nums[idx+1] - nums[idx];
            idx++;
        }
            while(idx<mlen);
        int[] lft = new int[mlen];
        int[] rgt = new int[mlen];
        fill(dif, lft, rgt, mlen);
        int ans=0;
        idx = 0;
        do{
            ans = lft[idx]+2 > ans?lft[idx]+2:ans;
            idx++;
        }
            while(idx < mlen);
        idx = 1;
        do{
            int sum = dif[idx-1] + dif[idx];
            int cur1 = (idx>=2 && sum == 2*dif[idx-2])?(lft[idx-2]+2+((idx+1<mlen && dif[idx+1] == dif[idx-2]) ? rgt[idx+1]:0)+1):0;
            ans = cur1>ans?cur1:ans;
            int cur2 = (idx + 1 < mlen && sum == 2 * dif[idx + 1]) ? 
                       (rgt[idx + 1] + 2 + ((idx >= 2 && dif[idx - 2] == dif[idx + 1]) ? lft[idx - 2] : 0) + 1) : 0;
            ans = cur2 > ans ? cur2 : ans;
            idx++;
        }
            while(idx<mlen);
        ans = ans>len?len:ans;
        return ans;
    }

    public void fill(int[] dif, int[] lft, int[] rgt, int mlen){
        lft[0] = 1;
        int idx = 1;
        do{
            lft[idx] = dif[idx] == dif[idx-1] ? lft[idx-1]+1 : 1;
            idx++;
        }
            while(idx<mlen);
        rgt[mlen-1] = 1;
        idx = mlen-2;
        do{
            rgt[idx] = dif[idx] == dif[idx+1]?rgt[idx+1]+1:1;
            idx--;
        }
            while(idx>=0);
    }
}

[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] pts) {
        int len = pts.length;
        Map<Integer, List<Integer>> mapX = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, List<Integer>> mapY = new HashMap<>();
        mkMap(pts, mapX, mapY, len);
        boolean[] visP = new boolean[len];
        Set<Integer> visX = new HashSet<>();
        Set<Integer> visY = new HashSet<>();
        int maxA = 0;
         int maxB = 0;
        int idx =0;
        do{
            int curP = visP[idx] ? 0 : doBfs(idx, pts, mapX, mapY, visP, visX, visY);
            maxB = curP > maxA ? maxA : (curP > maxB ? curP : maxB);
            maxA = curP > maxA ? curP : maxA;
            idx++;
        }
            while(idx < len);
        return maxA + maxB + 1;
    }
    public void mkMap(int[][] pts, Map<Integer, List<Integer>> mapX, Map<Integer, List<Integer>> mapY, int len) {
        int idx = 0;
        do {
            int ptX = pts[idx][0];
            int ptY = pts[idx][1];
            
            boolean nulX = mapX.putIfAbsent(ptX, new ArrayList<>()) == null;
            boolean nulY = mapY.putIfAbsent(ptY, new ArrayList<>()) == null;
            
            boolean addX = mapX.get(ptX).add(idx);
            boolean addY = mapY.get(ptY).add(idx);
            
            idx++;
        } while (idx < len);
    }

    public int doBfs(int src, int[][] pts, Map<Integer, List<Integer>> mapX, Map<Integer, List<Integer>> mapY, boolean[] visP, Set<Integer> visX, Set<Integer> visY) {
        Queue<Integer> que = new LinkedList<>();
        boolean push = que.add(src);
        visP[src] = true;
        int size = 0;

        do {
            boolean mtq = que.isEmpty();
            int curN = mtq ? 0 : que.poll();
            size += mtq ? 0 : 1;
            
            int curX = mtq ? 0 : pts[curN][0];
            int curY = mtq ? 0 : pts[curN][1];

            boolean adX = !mtq ? visX.add(curX) : false;
            int dumX = adX ? addQ(mapX.get(curX), que, visP) : 0;

            boolean adY = !mtq ? visY.add(curY) : false;
            int dumY = adY ? addQ(mapY.get(curY), que, visP) : 0;

        } while (!que.isEmpty());

        return size;
    }

    public int addQ(List<Integer> list, Queue<Integer> que, boolean[] visP) {
        int idx = 0;
        int lsZ = list != null ? list.size() : 0;
        
        if (lsZ > 0) {
            do {
                int nxtP = list.get(idx);
                boolean addQ = !visP[nxtP] ? que.add(nxtP) : false;
                visP[nxtP] = !visP[nxtP] ? true : visP[nxtP];
                idx++;
            } while (idx < lsZ);
        }
        return lsZ;
    }
}

[Q3_START]
import math
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n<=3:
            return n
        L = [1]*(n-1)
        diff = [nums[i+1]-nums[i] for i in range(n-1)]
        for i in range(1,n-1):
            if diff[i]==diff[i-1]:
                L[i] = L[i-1]+1
            else:
                L[i] = 1
                
        R = [1]*(n-1)
        for i in range(n-3,-1,-1):
            if diff[i]==diff[i+1]:
                R[i] = R[i+1]+1
            else:
                R[i] = 1

        ans = max(L)+1

        for i in range(n):
            if 0<i<n-1:
                if (nums[i+1]-nums[i-1])%2==0:
                    d = (nums[i+1]-nums[i-1])//2
                    curr = 3
                    if i>=2 and diff[i-2]==d:
                        curr += L[i-2]
                    if i<=n-3 and diff[i+1]==d:
                        curr += R[i+1]
                    ans = max(ans,curr)
                ans = max(ans,(L[i-1] if i>=1 else 0)+2)
                ans = max(ans,(R[i] if i<n-1 else 0)+2)

            if i==0:
                ans = max(ans,R[0]+1)
            if i==n-1:
                ans = max(ans,L[n-2]+1)

        return min(ans,n)







                    
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
import collections
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        p = list(range(n))
        def find(i):
            if p[i]!=i:
                p[i]=find(p[i])
            return p[i]

        def union(i,j):
            ri,rj = find(i),find(j)
            if ri != rj:
                p[ri] = rj

        xs,ys = collections.defaultdict(list),collections.defaultdict(list)
        for i, (x,y) in enumerate(points):
            xs[x].append(i)
            ys[y].append(i)

        for g in list(xs.values()) + list(ys.values()):
            for i in range(len(g)-1):
                union(g[i],g[i+1])

        c = collections.Counter(find(i) for i in range(n))
        s = sorted(c.values(),reverse=True)

        return sum(s[:2])+1
[Q4_END]

#include<bits/stdc++.h>
using namespace std ; 
using int64 = long long ; 
constexpr int64 INF = 1e18 ; 

auto __OI_INIT__ = []() {
    ios::sync_with_stdio(0), cin.tie(0) ; return 0 ; 
}();


class Solution {
public:
    vector<int> a ; 
    int n ; 
    int ans ; 

    vector<int> pre , aft ; 

    void init_pre() { 

        pre.assign( n , 0 ) ; 
        pre[0] = 1 ; 
        pre[1] = 2 ; 
        for( int i = 2 ; i < n ; i++ ) { 

            int D2 = a[i] - a[i-1] ; 
            int D1 = a[i-1] - a[i-2] ; 
            pre[i] = ( D1 == D2 ? pre[i-1] + 1 : 2 ) ; 

            // cout << " i: " << i << " " << pre[i] << "\n" ;
        }
    }
    void init_aft() { 
        aft.assign( n , 0 ) ; 
        aft[n-1] = 1 ; 
        aft[n-2] = 2 ; 
        for( int i = n - 3 ; i >= 0 ; i-- ) { 

            int D2 = a[i] - a[i+1] ; 
            int D1 = a[i+1] - a[i+2] ; 
            if( D2 == D1 ) { 
                aft[i] = aft[i+1] + 1 ; 
            } else {
                aft[i] = 2 ; 
            }
        }
    }
    void init() { 
        init_pre() ; 
        init_aft() ; 
    }

    int calc_pre( int i , int D ) { 
        if( i == 0 ) {
            return 1 ; 
        } 
        if( a[i] - a[i-1] == D ) {
            return pre[i]  ; 
        } else {
            return 1 ; 
        }
    }

    int calc_aft( int i , int D ) { 
        if( i == n - 1  ) {
            return 1 ; 
        } 
        if( a[i+1] - a[i] == D ) {
            return aft[i]  ; 
        } else {
            return 1 ; 
        }
    }

    int solve() { 
        init() ; 

        int ans0 = *max_element( pre.begin() , pre.end() ) ; 

        if( n == ans0 ) {
            return n ; 
        }

        ans = max( ans , ans0 + 1 ) ; 


        for( int i = 1 ; i <= n - 2 ; i++ ) { 

            int64 sum = ( a[i-1] + a[i+1] ) ; 
            if( sum % 2 == 1 ) {
                continue ; 
            }
            int64 avg = sum / 2 ; 

            int D = avg - a[i-1] ; 
            auto t1 = calc_pre( i - 1 , D ) ; 
            auto t2 = calc_aft( i + 1 , D ) ; 

            int t_ans = t1 + t2 + 1 ; 
            ans = max( ans , t_ans ) ; 
            // cout << " i: " << i << " t1: " << t1 << " t2: " << t2 << " " << t_ans << "\n" ; 
        }
        return ans ; 
    }

    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        a = nums ; 
        n = a.size() ; 

        ans = 3 ; 
        return solve() ; 

    }
}; 

int mai2n( )  { 
    Solution  t; 

    vector<int> a ;
    int n ; 

    a = { 9 , 7 , 5 , 10 , 1 } ; 
    a = { 1 , 2 , 6 , 7 } ; 

    auto ans = t.longestArithmetic ( a ) ; 
    cout << ans << "\n" ;

    return 0 ; 
}

[Q4_START]
#include<bits/stdc++.h>
using namespace std ; 
using int64 = long long ; 
constexpr int64 INF = 1e18 ; 

auto __OI_INIT__ = []() {
    ios::sync_with_stdio(0), cin.tie(0) ; return 0 ; 
}();


class DSU {
public:
    vector<int> parent , size ; 
    int group_cnt ;
public:
    void init(  int n ) { 
        parent.resize( n ) ; 
        iota( parent.begin() , parent.end( ) , 0 ) ; 
        size.assign( n , 1 ) ; 
        group_cnt = n ; 
    }
    int find( int p ) {
        return parent[p] == p ? p : ( parent[p] = find( parent[p] ) ) ; 
    }
    bool is_same( int i , int j  ) { 
        return find( i ) == find( j ) ; 
    }

    int get_size( int i ) { 
        int u = find( i ) ; 
        return size[ u ] ; 
    }

    void unite( int i , int j ) { 
        int p = find( i ) , q = find( j ) ; 
        if( p != q ) {
            if( size[ p ] < size[q] ) {
                swap( p , q ) ; 
            }
            parent[ q ] = p ; 
            size [ p ] += size[ q ] ; 
            group_cnt-- ; 
        }
    }
}; 


class Solution {
public:
    map< int , vector<int>> x_info , y_info ; 
    DSU dsu ; 

    int n ; 

    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        
        n = points.size() ; 

        for( int i = 0 ; i < n ; i++ ) { 
            auto &p = points[i] ;
            int x = p[0] , y = p[1] ; 

            x_info[x].emplace_back( i ) ; 
            y_info[y].emplace_back( i ) ; 
        }

        dsu.init( n ) ; 

        set<int> x_set , y_set ; 

        for( int i = 0 ; i < n ; i++ ) { 
            auto &p = points[i] ;
            int x = p[0] , y = p[1] ; 

            if( x_set.count( x ) == 0 ) {
                for( auto pos : x_info[x] ) { 
                    dsu.unite( pos , i ) ; 
                }
            } 
            if( y_set.count( y ) == 0 ) {
                for( auto pos : y_info[ y ] ) { 
                    dsu.unite( pos , i ) ; 
                }
            }

            x_set.emplace( x ) ; 
            y_set.emplace( y ) ; 
        }

        if( dsu.group_cnt == 1 ) { 
            return n + 1 ; 
        }
        
        vector<int> vis( n , 0 ) ; 
        vector<int> tmp ;
        for( int u = 0 ; u < n ; u++ ) { 
            int id = dsu.find( u ) ; 
            if( vis[id] ) {
                continue ; 
            }
            vis[id] = 1 ; 
            tmp.emplace_back( dsu.size[ id] ) ; 
        }
        sort( tmp.begin() , tmp.end() , greater<>() ) ; 

        assert( tmp.size() >=2 ) ; 
        int ans = tmp[0] + tmp[1] + 1 ; 
        return ans ; 
    }
};


int m2ain( )  { 
    Solution  t; 

    vector<int> a ;
    int n ; 

    a = {} ; 
    n = 14 ; 
    
    vector< vector<int>> points ; 

    points = {{1,1},{1,2},{2,2}} ; 

    points = {{2,2},{1,1},{3,3}} ; 

    points = {{2,3},{2,2},{1,1},{4,5}} ;

    auto ans = t.maxActivated ( points  ) ; 
    cout << ans << "\n" ;

    return 0 ; 
}

[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n,ans = len(nums),0
        diffs = []
        for i in range(1, n):
            d = nums[i] - nums[i-1]
            if diffs and diffs[-1][0] == d: diffs[-1][1] += 1
            else: diffs.append([d, 1])
        for i in range(len(diffs)):
            v, l = diffs[i]
            ans = max(ans, min(n, l + 2))
            if i + 2 < len(diffs) and diffs[i+1][1] == 1 and diffs[i+1][0] + diffs[i+2][0] == 2 * v:
                ans = max(ans, l + 3)
                if diffs[i+2][1] == 1 and i + 3 < len(diffs) and diffs[i+3][0] == v:
                    ans = max(ans, l + diffs[i+3][1] + 3)
            if i - 2 >= 0 and diffs[i-1][1] == 1 and diffs[i-1][0] + diffs[i-2][0] == 2 * v:
                ans = max(ans, l + 3)
        return ans
            
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class djunion:
    def __init__(self, n: int):
        self.parent = list(range(n))
        self.rank = [0] * n
        self.size = [1] * n

    def find(self, i: int) -> int:
        if self.parent[i] == i: return i
        self.parent[i] = self.find(self.parent[i])
        return self.parent[i]

    def union(self, i: int, j: int) -> bool:
        ri, rj = self.find(i), self.find(j)
        if ri != rj:
            if self.rank[ri] < self.rank[rj]:
                self.parent[ri] = rj
                self.size[rj] += self.size[ri]
            elif self.rank[ri] > self.rank[rj]:
                self.parent[rj] = ri
                self.size[ri] += self.size[rj]
            else:
                self.parent[rj] = ri
                self.size[ri] += self.size[rj]
                self.rank[ri] += 1
            return True
        return False
        
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        uf = djunion(n)
        xd,yd = {},{}
        for i,(x,y) in enumerate(points):
            if x in xd: uf.union(i,xd[x])
            else: xd[x] = i
            if y in yd: uf.union(i,yd[y])
            else: yd[y] = i
        lens = [uf.size[i] for i in range(n) if uf.parent[i] == i]
        lens.sort(reverse = True)
        if len(lens)>1: return lens[0] + lens[1] + 1
        return lens[0]+1
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
def dp(nums):
    n = len(nums)
    diff = [(nums[i+1]-nums[i]) for i in range(n-1)]
    data=[1]*(n-1) + [0]
    for i in range(len(diff)-2,-1,-1):
        if diff[i]==diff[i+1]: data[i]=1+data[i+1]
    # print(nums, diff, data)
    res = 3
    for i in range(n-3):
        j = i + data[i]
        d = diff[i]
        if j+2 < n and nums[j+2]-nums[j]==2*d:
            j = j+2 
            if j<len(diff) and diff[j]==d: j+=data[j]
        elif j+1 < n: j+=1
        # print(i,j)
        res=max(res, j-i+1)
    return res

class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        return max(dp(nums), dp(nums[::-1]))

[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        uf = list(range(n))
        def find(x):
            if uf[x]!=x: uf[x]=find(uf[x])
            return uf[x]
        def union(x,y):
            uf[find(y)]=find(x)
        mx,my = {}, {}
        for i,p in enumerate(points):
            x,y = p
            if x in mx: union(mx[x], i)
            if y in my: union(my[y], i)
            mx[x]=i
            my[y]=i
        c=Counter(find(i) for i in range(n))
        data = sorted(c.values())
        if len(data)==1: return data[-1] + 1
        return data[-2]+data[-1]+1

### RANK 253 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 2:
            return n

        diff = [nums[i+1] - nums[i] for i in range(n-1)]
        m = n - 1

        left = [1] * m
        for i in range(1, m):
            if diff[i] == diff[i-1]:
                left[i] = left[i-1] + 1

        right = [1] * m
        for i in range(m-2, -1, -1):
            if diff[i] == diff[i+1]:
                right[i] = right[i+1] +1

        # any 2 are arithmetic
        result = max(2, max(left) + 1)

        for i in range(n):
            # use left only
            if i >= 2:
                result = max(result, left[i-2] + 2)
            if i <= n - 3:
                result = max(result, right[i+1] + 2)

            if 1 <= i <= n - 2:
                gap = nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]
                if gap % 2 == 0:
                    d = gap // 2
                    left_len = 1
                    if i >= 2 and diff[i-2] == d:
                        left_len = left[i-2] + 1
                    right_len = 1
                    if i <= n - 3 and diff[i+1] == d:
                        right_len = right[i+1] + 1
                    result = max(result, left_len + 1 + right_len)

        return min(result, n)
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class UnionFind:
    def __init__(self):
        self.parents = dict()

    def add(self, x):
        if x not in self.parents:
            self.parents[x] = x

    def find(self, x):
        if self.parents[x] != x:
            self.parents[x] = self.find(self.parents[x])
        return self.parents[x]

    def union(self, a, b):
        pa, pb = self.find(a), self.find(b)
        if pa == pb:
            return
        self.parents[pa] = pb

class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        if not points:
            return 1

        uf = UnionFind()

        for x, y in points:
            uf.add(('x', x))
            uf.add(('y', y))
            uf.union(('x', x), ('y', y))

        edges = defaultdict(int)
        for x, y in points:
            root = uf.find(('x', x))
            edges[root] += 1

        sizes = sorted(edges.values(), reverse=True)
        if len(sizes) == 1:
            return sizes[0] + 1

        return sizes[0] + sizes[1] + 1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 255 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
  public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
    int n = nums.length;
    int ans = 0;
    if (n <= 2)
      return n;

    int[] l = new int[n];
    l[0] = 1;

    for (int i = 1; i < n; i++) {
      if (i >= 2 && (long) nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == (long) nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]) {
        l[i] = l[i - 1] + 1;
      } else {
        l[i] = 2;
      }
    }

    int[] r = new int[n];
    r[n - 1] = 1;

    for (int i = n - 2; i >= 0; i--) {
      if (i <= n - 3 && (long) nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == (long) nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]) {
        r[i] = r[i + 1] + 1;
      } else {
        r[i] = 2;
      }
    }

    int[] arr = nums;
    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
      ans = Math.max(ans, l[i]);
    }

    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
      if (i == 0) {
        ans = Math.max(ans, 1 + (n > 1 ? r[1] : 0));
      } else if (i == n-1) {
        ans = Math.max(ans, 1 + (n > 1 ? l[n-2] : 0));
      } else {
        ans = Math.max(ans, l[i-1] + 1);
        ans = Math.max(ans, r[i+1] + 1);

        long diff = (long) nums[i+1] - nums[i-1];
        if (diff % 2 == 0) {
          long d = diff/2;

          int left = 1;
          if (i - 1 >= 1 && (long) nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == d) {
            left = l[i-1];
          } 
          int right = 1;
          if (i+1 <= n-2 && (long) nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]==d) {
            right = r[i+1];
          }

          ans = Math.max(ans, left+1 + right);
        }
        
      }
    }

    return Math.min(ans, n);
  }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
  // union find
  static class DSU {
    int[] p, r;

    DSU(int n) {
      p = new int[n];
      r = new int[n];
      for (int i = 0; i < n; i ++)
        p[i] = i;
    }

    int find(int x) {
      if (p[x] != x) 
        p[x] = find(p[x]);
      return p[x];
    }

    void union(int a, int b) {
      a = find(a);
      b = find(b);
      if (a == b)
        return;
      if (r[a] < r[b])
        p[a] = b;
      else if (r[b] < r[a])
        p[b] = a;
      else {
        p[b] = a;
        r[a] ++;
      }
    }
  }
  public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
    int n = points.length;
    
    HashMap<Long, Integer> mapX = new HashMap<>();
    HashMap<Long, Integer> mapY = new HashMap<>();

    int xCnt = 0, yCnt = 0;

    for (int[] pt : points) {
      long x = pt[0], y = pt[1];

      if (!mapX.containsKey(x)) mapX.put(x, xCnt ++);
      if (!mapY.containsKey(y)) mapY.put(y, yCnt ++);
    }

    // store the input
    int[][] arr = points;
    
    int total = xCnt + yCnt;
    DSU dsu = new DSU(total);

    for (int[] pt : arr) {
      int xi = mapX.get((long) pt[0]);
      int yi = mapY.get((long) pt[1]) + xCnt;
      dsu.union(xi, yi);
    }

    int[] cnt = new int[total];
    for (int[] pt : arr) {
      int xi = mapX.get((long) pt[0]);
      int root = dsu.find(xi);
      cnt[root] ++;
    }

    int max1 = 0, max2 = 0;

    for (int v : cnt) {
      if (v <= 0)
        continue;
      if (v > max1) {
        max2 = max1;
        max1 = v;
      } else if (v > max2)
          max2 = v;
    }

    if (max1 == 0) return 1;
    int ans = Math.max(max1 + 1, max1 + max2+1);

    if (ans > n+1) ans = n+1;
    return ans;
    
  }
}

### RANK 257 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {

    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int left[] = new int[nums.length], right[] = new int[nums.length], max = 1;
        left[0] = right[nums.length - 1] = 1;
        left[1] = right[nums.length - 2] = 2;
        for (int i = 2; i < nums.length; i++) {
            left[i] = nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] ? left[i - 1] + 1 : 2;
        }
        for (int i = nums.length - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            right[i] = nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] ? right[i + 1] + 1 : 2;
        }
        for (int i : left) {
            max = Math.max(max, i);
        }
        for (int i = 1; i <= nums.length - 2; i++) {
            max = Math.max(max, Math.max(left[i - 1] + 1, right[i + 1] + 1));
            if ((nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) % 2 == 0) {
                max = Math.max(max, 1 + (i - 1 >= 1 && nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) / 2 ? left[i - 1] : 1) + (i + 1 <= nums.length - 2 && nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) / 2 ? right[i + 1] : 1));
            }
        }
        return Math.min(Math.max(max, Math.max(1 + right[1], left[nums.length - 2] + 1)), nums.length);
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {

    static class DSU {
        int[] parent;
        int[] size;

        DSU(int n) {
            parent = new int[n];
            size = new int[n];
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
                parent[i] = i;
                size[i] = 1;
            }
        }

        int find(int x) {
            if (parent[x] == x) return x;
            parent[x] = find(parent[x]);
            return parent[x];
        }

        boolean unite(int a, int b) {
            a = find(a);
            b = find(b);
            if (a == b) return false;
            if (size[a] < size[b]) {
                int tmp = a; a = b; b = tmp;
            }
            parent[b] = a;
            size[a] += size[b];
            return true;
        }
    }

    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        if (n == 0) return 1;
        DSU dsu = new DSU(n);
        HashMap<Long, Integer> mx = new HashMap<>(n * 2);
        HashMap<Long, Integer> my = new HashMap<>(n * 2);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            long x = points[i][0];
            long y = points[i][1];
            Integer ix = mx.get(x);
            if (ix != null) dsu.unite(i, ix);
            else mx.put(x, i);
            Integer iy = my.get(y);
            if (iy != null) dsu.unite(i, iy);
            else my.put(y, i);
        }
        HashMap<Integer, Integer> compCount = new HashMap<>(n * 2);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int r = dsu.find(i);
            compCount.put(r, compCount.getOrDefault(r, 0) + 1);
        }
        int s1 = 0, s2 = 0;
        for (int sz : compCount.values()) {
            if (sz > s1) {
                s2 = s1;
                s1 = sz;
            } else if (sz > s2) {
                s2 = sz;
            }
        }
        return 1 + s1 + s2;
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 258 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        int[] dp1 = new int[n], dp2 = new int[n];
        dp1[0] = 1;
        if(n > 1)
            dp1[1] = 2;
        int ans = 2;
        for(int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            if(nums[i] -  nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2])
                dp1[i] = dp1[i - 1] + 1;
            else
                dp1[i] = 2;
            ans = Math.max(ans, dp1[i]);
        }
        dp2[n - 1] = 1;
        if(n > 1)
            dp2[n - 2] = 2;
        for(int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if(nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]) 
                dp2[i] = dp2[i + 1] + 1;
            else
                dp2[i] = 2;
        }

        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if(i > 0)
                ans = Math.max(ans, dp1[i - 1] + 1);
            if(i < n - 1)
                ans = Math.max(ans, dp2[i + 1] + 1);


            if(i < 1 || i >= n - 1)
                continue;
            int offset = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1];
            // combine
            if(dp1[i - 1] >= 2 && dp2[i + 1] >= 2) {
                int left = nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2];
                int right = nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]; 
                if(left == right && left * 2 == offset) {
                    ans = Math.max(ans, dp1[i - 1] + dp2[i + 1] + 1);
                }
            }
            if(dp1[i - 1] >= 2) {
                int left = nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2];
                if(offset == left * 2) {
                    ans = Math.max(ans, dp1[i - 1] + 2);
                }
            }
            if(dp2[i + 1] >= 2) {
                int right = nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]; 
                if(offset == right * 2) {
                    ans = Math.max(ans, dp2[i + 1] + 2);
                }
            }
            // extend left array
            // extend right array
        }

        return ans;

    
        
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    int[] father, rank;
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        father = new int[n];
        rank = new int[n];
        Arrays.fill(rank, 1);
        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            father[i] = i;
        }
        Map<Integer, List<Integer>> xmap = new HashMap<>(), ymap = new HashMap<>();
        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0], y = points[i][1];
            xmap.computeIfAbsent(x, k -> new ArrayList<>()).add(i);
            ymap.computeIfAbsent(y, k -> new ArrayList<>()).add(i);
        }

        for(List<Integer> list : xmap.values()) {
            int f = list.get(0);
            for(int i = 1; i < list.size(); i++) {
                union(f, list.get(i));
            }
        }
        for(List<Integer> list : ymap.values()) {
            int f = list.get(0);
            for(int i = 1; i < list.size(); i++) {
                union(f, list.get(i));
            }
        }
        int s1 = 0, s2 = 0;
        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int f = find(i);
            if(f == i) {
                if(rank[i] > s1) {
                    s2 = s1;
                    s1 = rank[i];
                } else if(rank[i] > s2) {
                    s2 = rank[i];
                }
            }
        }

        return s1 + s2 + 1;

        
    }

    public int find(int x) {
        if(father[x] != x) {
            father[x] = find(father[x]);
        }
        return father[x];
    }

    public void union(int x, int y) {
        int fx = find(x), fy = find(y);
        if(fx == fy)
            return;
        if(rank[fx] >= rank[fy]){
            father[fy] = fx;
            rank[fx] += rank[fy];
        } else{
            father[fx] = fy;
            rank[fy] += rank[fx];
        }
       
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 259 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& arr) {

        int n = arr.size();
        int ans = 0;

        vector< pair<int,int> > f(n);
        vector< pair<int,int> > b(n);

        f[0] = { 1, INT_MAX};
        b[n-1] = { 1, INT_MAX};

        for( int i=1, count=1, diff=INT_MAX; i<n; i++) {
            int cd = (arr[i]-arr[i-1]);
            ans = max( ans, 1+count);
            if((cd==diff) || (diff==INT_MAX)) {
                diff = cd;
                count += 1;
            } else {
                diff = cd;
                count = 2;
            }
            f[i] = { count, diff};
        }

        for( int i=n-2, count=1, diff=INT_MAX; i>=0; i--) {
            int cd = (arr[i+1]-arr[i]);
            ans = max( ans, 1+count);
            if((cd==diff) || (diff==INT_MAX)) {
                diff = cd;
                count += 1;
            } else {
                diff = cd;
                count = 2;
            }
            b[i] = { count, diff};
        }



        for( int i=1; i+1<n; i++) {
            if((arr[i-1]+arr[i+1])%2==0) {
                int diff = (arr[i+1] - arr[i-1])/2;
                int l = 1;
                int r = 1;
                if(f[i-1].second==diff) {
                    l = f[i-1].first;
                }
                if(b[i+1].second==diff) {
                    r = b[i+1].first;
                }
                ans = max( ans, l+1+r);
            }
        }

        f.clear();
        b.clear();
        
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {

        int n = points.size();
        
        map< pair<int,int>, int> mp;

        multiset<int> ms;
        
        for( int i=0; i<n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];
            mp[{ x, y}] = i;
            if(mp.find({x, INT_MAX})==mp.end()) {
                points.push_back({ x, INT_MAX});
                mp[{ x, INT_MAX}] = points.size()-1;
            }
            if(mp.find({ INT_MAX, y})==mp.end()) {
                points.push_back({ INT_MAX, y});
                mp[{ INT_MAX, y}] = points.size()-1;
            }
        }

        int m = points.size();

        vector< vector<int> > adj( m, vector<int>());

        queue<int> q;
        vector<int> vst(m, false);
        
        auto addEdge = [&]( int u, int v)->void {
            adj[u].push_back(v);
            adj[v].push_back(u);
        };
        
        for( int i=0; i<n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];
            addEdge( mp[{ x, y}], mp[{ x, INT_MAX}]);
            addEdge( mp[{ x, y}], mp[{ INT_MAX, y}]);
        }

        for( int i=0; i<m; i++) {
            if(vst[i]) {
                continue;
            }
            int count = 0;
            q.push(i);
            vst[i] = true;
            while(!q.empty()) {
                int u = q.front();
                q.pop();
                count += (u<n);
                for( int v: adj[u]) {
                    if(!vst[v]) {
                        q.push(v);
                        vst[v] = true;
                    }
                }
            }
            ms.insert(count);
            if(ms.size()>2) {
                ms.erase(ms.begin());
            }
        }

        adj.clear();
        vst.clear();
        mp.clear();

        if(ms.size()<2) {
            return (*ms.begin()) + 1;
        } else {
            return (*ms.begin()) + 1 + (*ms.rbegin());
        }
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 260 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        int[] L = new int[n];
        int[] R = new int[n];
        int[] D = new int[n];
        for (int i = 1; i < n; i++) D[i] = nums[i] - nums[i - 1];
        L[0] = 1;
        if (n > 1) L[1] = 2;
        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            if (D[i] == D[i - 1]) L[i] = L[i - 1] + 1;
            else L[i] = 2;
        }
        R[n - 1] = 1;
        if (n > 1) R[n - 2] = 2;
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (D[i + 2] == D[i + 1]) R[i] = R[i + 1] + 1;
            else R[i] = 2;
        }
        int ans = 1;
        for (int x : L) if (x > ans) ans = x;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (i == 0) {
                if (n > 1) ans = Math.max(ans, 1 + R[1]);
            } else if (i == n - 1) {
                ans = Math.max(ans, 1 + L[n - 2]);
            } else {
                ans = Math.max(ans, 1 + L[i - 1]);
                ans = Math.max(ans, 1 + R[i + 1]);
                int sum = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1];
                if (sum % 2 == 0) {
                    int d = sum / 2;
                    int lc = 1;
                    if (i - 1 >= 1 && D[i - 1] == d) lc = L[i - 1];
                    int rc = 1;
                    if (i + 2 <= n - 1 && D[i + 2] == d) rc = R[i + 1];
                    ans = Math.max(ans, lc + 1 + rc);
                }
            }
        }
        if (ans > n) ans = n;
        return ans;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]


class Solution {
    static class DSU {
        int[] p;
        int[] s;
        DSU(int n) {
            p = new int[n];
            s = new int[n];
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
                p[i] = i;
                s[i] = 1;
            }
        }
        int find(int x) {
            while (p[x] != x) {
                p[x] = p[p[x]];
                x = p[x];
            }
            return x;
        }
        void union(int a, int b) {
            a = find(a);
            b = find(b);
            if (a == b) return;
            if (s[a] < s[b]) {
                int t = a;
                a = b;
                b = t;
            }
            p[b] = a;
            s[a] += s[b];
        }
    }

    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        HashMap<Integer,Integer> mapX = new HashMap<>();
        HashMap<Integer,Integer> mapY = new HashMap<>();
        int cx = 0;
        int cy = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];
            if (!mapX.containsKey(x)) mapX.put(x, cx++);
            if (!mapY.containsKey(y)) mapY.put(y, cy++);
        }
        int tot = cx + cy;
        DSU d = new DSU(tot);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = mapX.get(points[i][0]);
            int y = cx + mapY.get(points[i][1]);
            d.union(x, y);
        }
        int[] cnt = new int[tot];
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = mapX.get(points[i][0]);
            int root = d.find(x);
            cnt[root]++;
        }
        int best1 = 0;
        int best2 = 0;
        for (int v : cnt) {
            if (v > best1) {
                best2 = best1;
                best1 = v;
            } else if (v > best2) {
                best2 = v;
            }
        }
        return best1 + best2 + 1;
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 261 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:

        n = len(nums)
        res = 3

        dp = {}
        diff = nums[1] - nums[0]
        dp[(diff, nums[1], 0)] = 2

        for i in range(2, n):
            v = nums[i]
            tmp = {}
            pv = nums[i-1]
            tmp[(v - pv, v, 0)] = 2
            tmp[(v - pv, v, 1)] = 3

            ppv = nums[i-2]
            if (v - ppv) % 2 == 0:
                tmp[((v-ppv) // 2, v, 1)] = 3
            

            for (diff, pv, mod), val in dp.items():
                
                if mod == 1:
                    if v - pv == diff:
                        nk = (diff, v, mod)
                        if nk not in tmp or tmp[nk] < val + 1:
                            tmp[nk] = val + 1
                    else:
                        res = max(res, val)

                else:
                    if v - pv == diff:
                        nk = (diff, v, mod)
                        if nk not in tmp or tmp[nk] < val + 1:
                            tmp[nk] = val + 1
                    else:
                        nk = (diff, pv + diff, 1)
                        if nk not in tmp or tmp[nk] < val + 1:
                            tmp[nk] = val + 1

            dp = tmp

        for v in dp.values():
            res = max(res, v)

        return res
                        
                    
                
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:

        def find(x):
            if roots[x] != x:
                roots[x] = find(roots[x])
            return roots[x]

        def union(x, y):
            rx = find(x)
            ry = find(y)
            if rx != ry:
                roots[rx] = ry
                

        n = len(points)

        roots = list(range(n))
        cnt = [0] * n
        
        memx = defaultdict(int)
        memy = defaultdict(int)

        for i, (x,y) in enumerate(points):

            if x in memx:
                rx = memx[x]
                union(i, rx)
            else:
                memx[x] = i

            if y in memy:
                ry = memy[y]
                union(i, ry)
            else:
                memy[y] = i

        for i in range(n):
            ri = find(i)
            cnt[ri] += 1

        cnt.sort()

        return 1 + sum(cnt[-2:])

        
            

        
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        vector<int> L(n,2), R(n,2);

        for(int i=2;i<n;i++){
            if(nums[i]-nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]) L[i] = L[i-1] +1;
        }

        for(int i=n-3;i>=0;i--){
            if(nums[i+1] - nums[i] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1])R[i] = R[i+1] +1;
        }

        int ans = 0;

        for(int i =0; i<n;i++){
            ans = max({ans,L[i],R[i]});
        
            if(i>0) ans = max(ans, L[i-1]+1);
            if(i<n-1) ans = max(ans, R[i+1]+1);
            if(i>0 && i<n-1){
            if((nums[i+1]-nums[i-1])%2==0){
                int d = (nums[i+1]-nums[i-1])/2;
                int c=1;
                if(i>=2 && nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]==d) c += (L[i-1]-1);
                if(i<=n-3 && nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]==d) c += (R[i+1]-1);
                ans = max(ans, c+2);
            }
            }
        }
        return min(ans,n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU{
    public:
    unordered_map<long long , long long>p;
    unordered_map<long long, long long>s;

    long long find(long long x){
        if(p[x]==x)return x;
        return p[x] = find(p[x]);
    }
    void unite(long long a, long long b){
        a = find(a); b=find(b);
        if(a==b)return;
        if(s[a]<s[b])swap(a,b);
        p[b]=a;
        s[a] +=s[b];
    }
    void add(long long x){
        if(!p.count(x)){
            p[x]=x;
            s[x]=1;
        }
    }
};
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        DSU d;
        const long long m = 3e9;
        for(auto &p:points){
            long long x =p[0];
            long long y=p[1]+m;

            d.add(x); d.add(y); d.unite(x,y);
        }
        unordered_map<long long, int> cz;
        for(auto &p:points){
            long long r = d.find(p[0]);
            cz[r]++;
        }
        
        vector<int>si;
        for(auto const& [r,c]:cz) si.push_back(c);
        sort(si.rbegin(), si.rend());
        if(si.size()==1) return si[0]+1;

        return si[0]+si[1]+1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n=nums.size();
        vector<int>dp1(n),dp2(n);
        dp1[0]=dp2[n-1]=1;
        dp1[1]=dp2[n-2]=2;
        int ans=2;
        for(int i=2;i<n;++i){
            if(nums[i-2]+nums[i]==2*nums[i-1]){
                dp1[i]=1+dp1[i-1];
            }else{
                dp1[i]=2;
            }
        }
        for(int i=n-3;i>=0;--i){
            if(nums[i+2]+nums[i]==2*(nums[i+1])){
                dp2[i]=1+dp2[i+1];
            }else{
                dp2[i]=2;
            }
        }
        for(int i=0;i<n;++i){
            if(i-2>=0){
                ans=max(ans,1+dp1[i-1]);
            }
            if(i+2<n){
                ans=max(ans,1+dp2[i+1]);
            }if(i-1>=0 && i+1<n){
                int diff=nums[i-1]-nums[i+1];
                if(diff%2==0){
                    int left,right;
                    if(i-2>=0){
                        if(nums[i-2]-nums[i-1]==(diff/2)){
                            left=dp1[i-1];
                        }else{
                            left=1;
                        }
                    }else{
                        left=1;
                    }
                    if(i+2<n){
                        if(nums[i+1]-nums[i+2]==(diff/2)){
                            right=dp2[i+1];
                        }else right=1;
                    }else{
                        right=1;
                    }
                    ans=max(ans,left+right+1);
                    // cout<<left<<" "<<right<<" "<<nums[i]<<endl;
                }
            }
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU{
private:
    int n;vector<int>par,size;
public:
    DSU(int n){
        this->n=n;
        size=vector<int>(n,1);
        par=vector<int>(n);
        iota(begin(par),end(par),0);
    }
    int find(int a){
        if(par[a]==a)return a;
        return par[a]=find(par[a]);
    }
    void merge(int a,int b){
        a=find(a),b=find(b);
        if(a!=b){
            if(size[a]<size[b])swap(a,b);
            size[a]+=size[b];
            par[b]=a;
        }
    }
};
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n=points.size();
        if(n==1)return 2;
        map<int,vector<int>>X,Y;
        for(int i=0;i<n;++i){
            auto&it=points[i];
            if(X.find(it[0])==X.end())X[it[0]]={};
            X[it[0]].push_back(i);
            if(Y.find(it[1])==Y.end())Y[it[1]]={};
            Y[it[1]].push_back(i);
        }
        DSU dsu(n);
        for(auto&it:X){
            int u=it.second[0];
            for(int&v:it.second)dsu.merge(u,v);
        }
        for(auto&it:Y){
            int u=it.second[0];
            for(int&v:it.second)dsu.merge(u,v);
        }
        vector<int>count(n,0);
        for(int i=0;i<n;++i){
            int par=dsu.find(i);
            count[par]++;
        }
        sort(rbegin(count),rend(count));
        return count[0]+count[1]+1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 3) return n;
        
        vector<int> L(n, 1);
        for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
            if (i >= 2 && nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]) {
                L[i] = L[i - 1] + 1;
            } else {
                L[i] = 2; 
            }
        }
        vector<int> R(n, 1);
        for (int i = n - 2; i >= 0; --i) {
            if (i <= n - 3 && nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]) {
                R[i] = R[i + 1] + 1;
            } else {
                R[i] = 2;
            }
        }

        int maxLen = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (i > 0) maxLen = max(maxLen, L[i - 1] + 1);
            if (i < n - 1) maxLen = max(maxLen, R[i + 1] + 1);
            if (i > 0 && i < n - 1) {
                int diffLeft = (i >= 2) ? nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] : -2e9;
                int diffRight = (i <= n - 3) ? nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] : -2e9;
                if ((nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) % 2 == 0) {
                    int d = (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) / 2;
                    int currentBridge = 1;
                    if (i >= 2 && nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == d) currentBridge += L[i - 1];
                    else currentBridge += 1;
                    if (i <= n - 3 && nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == d) currentBridge += R[i + 1];
                    else currentBridge += 1;
                    
                    maxLen = max(maxLen, currentBridge);
                }
            }
        }
        return min(maxLen, n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
struct DSU {
    vector<int> parent;
    vector<int> sz;
    DSU(int n) {
        parent.resize(n);
        sz.assign(n, 1);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) parent[i] = i;
    }
    int find(int i) {
        if (parent[i] == i) return i;
        return parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
    }
    void unite(int i, int j) {
        int root_i = find(i);
        int root_j = find(j);
        if (root_i != root_j) {
            if (sz[root_i] < sz[root_j]) swap(root_i, root_j);
            parent[root_j] = root_i;
            sz[root_i] += sz[root_j];
        }
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        if (n == 0) return 1;
    
        DSU dsu(n);
        unordered_map<int, int> last_x, last_y;
    
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            if (last_x.count(points[i][0])) dsu.unite(i, last_x[points[i][0]]);
            if (last_y.count(points[i][1])) dsu.unite(i, last_y[points[i][1]]);
            last_x[points[i][0]] = i;
            last_y[points[i][1]] = i;
        }
    
        unordered_map<int, int> root_to_size;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int root = dsu.find(i);
            root_to_size[root] = dsu.sz[root];
        }
    
        vector<pair<int, int>> sorted_comps;
        for (auto const& [root, size] : root_to_size) {
            sorted_comps.push_back({size, root});
        }
        sort(sorted_comps.rbegin(), sorted_comps.rend());
    
        unordered_map<int, int> x_to_root, y_to_root;
        for (auto const& [x, idx] : last_x) x_to_root[x] = dsu.find(idx);
        for (auto const& [y, idx] : last_y) y_to_root[y] = dsu.find(idx);
    
        int max_points = 0;
    
        for (auto const& [x, root_x] : x_to_root) {
            int size_x = dsu.sz[root_x];
            max_points = max(max_points, size_x);
    
            for (int i = 0; i < min((int)sorted_comps.size(), 2); ++i) {
                int root_top = sorted_comps[i].second;
                int size_top = sorted_comps[i].first;
                
                if (root_x == root_top) {
                    max_points = max(max_points, size_x);
                } else {
                    max_points = max(max_points, size_x + size_top);
                }
            }
        }
    
        if (!sorted_comps.empty()) {
            max_points = max(max_points, sorted_comps[0].first);
        }
    
        return max_points + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        if(n<=2)return n;
        int []d = new int[n-1];
        for(int i = 0;i<n-1;i++){
            d[i] = nums[i+1]-nums[i];
        }
        int []l = new int[d.length];
        l[0] = 1;
        for(int i =1;i<d.length;i++){
            if(d[i]==d[i-1]){
                l[i]=l[i-1]+1;
            }else{
                l[i]=1;
            }
        }
        int r[] = new int[d.length];
        r[d.length-1]=1;
        for(int i = d.length-2;i>=0;i--){
            if(d[i]==d[i+1]){
                r[i]=r[i+1]+1;
            }else{
                r[i]=1;
            }
        }
        int max = 0;
        for(int len : l){
            if(len == d.length){
                return n;
            }
            max = Math.max(max,len+2);
        }
        for(int i = 0;i<d.length-1;i++){
            int total = d[i]+d[i+1];
            if(total%2==0){
                int x = total/2;
                int curr = 2;
                if(i>0 && d[i-1]==x){
                    curr += l[i-1];
                }
                if(i+2<d.length && d[i+2]==x){
                    curr += r[i+2];
                }
                max=Math.max(max,curr+1);
            }
        }
        return Math.min(max,n);
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    int parent[];
    int[] size;
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        parent = new int[n];
        size = new int[n];
        for(int i = 0;i<n;i++){
            parent[i]=i;
            size[i]=1;
        }
        Map<Integer,Integer>firstX = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer,Integer>firstY = new HashMap<>();
        for(int i = 0;i<n;i++){
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];
            if(firstX.containsKey(x)){
                union(i,firstX.get(x));
            }else{
                firstX.put(x,i);
            }
            if(firstY.containsKey(y)){
                union(i,firstY.get(y));
            }else{
                firstY.put(y,i);
            }
        }
        List<Integer> sizes = new ArrayList<>();
        for(int i = 0;i<n;i++){
            if(parent[i]==i){
                sizes.add(size[i]);
            }
        }
        sizes.sort(Collections.reverseOrder());
        if(sizes.size()>1){
            return sizes.get(0)+sizes.get(1)+1;
        }
        return sizes.get(0)+1;
    }
    private void union(int i,int j){
        int rootI = find(i);
        int rootJ = find(j);
        if(rootI!=rootJ){
            parent[rootI]=rootJ;
            size[rootJ]+=size[rootI];
        }
    }
    private int find (int i){
        int root = i;
        while(root!=parent[root]){
            root = parent[root];
        }
        int curr = i;
        while(curr!=root){
            int next = parent[curr];
            parent[curr]=root;
            curr=next;
        }
        return root;
    }
}
[Q4_END]

class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, N: List[int]) -> int:
        D = [b-a for a,b in zip(N, N[1:])]

        # 1,3,5,7,10,11
        #  2 2 2 3  1
        L = []
        dP = D[0];   cnt = 1
        for d in D[1:]:
            if d==dP:   cnt += 1
            else:
                L.append([dP, cnt])
                dP = d
                cnt = 1
        L.append([dP, cnt])
        # print (L)
        
        retV = max( l[1]+1+(len(L)>1) for l in L )
        for i,(d,c) in enumerate(L):
            if i+2<len(L) and L[i+1][1]==L[i+2][1]==1 and L[i+1][0]+L[i+2][0]==d<<1:
                if i+3<len(L) and L[i+3][0]==d:                retV = max(retV, c+1+2+L[i+3][1])
                else:                retV = max(retV, c+1+2)
        L = L[::-1]
        for i,(d,c) in enumerate(L):
            if i+2<len(L) and L[i+1][1]==L[i+2][1]==1 and L[i+1][0]+L[i+2][0]==d<<1:
                if i+3<len(L) and L[i+3][0]==d:                retV = max(retV, c+1+2+L[i+3][1])
                else:                retV = max(retV, c+1+2)
        return retV
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, P: list[list[int]]) -> int:

        X = {};  Y = {}
        nX = nY = 0
        for x,y in P:
            if x not in X:
                X[x] = nX;                nX += 1
            if y not in Y:
                Y[y] = nY;                nY += 1
        P = [[X[x],Y[y]] for x,y in P]
        print (P)
        
        UF = list(range(len(P)))
        def getG(n):
            if UF[n]==n:    return n
            UF[n] = getG(UF[n])
            return UF[n]
        def mergeG(a, b):
            UF[getG(a)] = UF[getG(b)]

        X = defaultdict(list);         Y = defaultdict(list); 
        for i,(x,y) in enumerate(P):
            X[x].append(i);   Y[y].append(i)

        for L in X.values():
            if len(L)>1:
                i = L[0]
                for j in L[1:]:    mergeG(i, j)
        for L in Y.values():
            if len(L)>1:
                i = L[0]
                for j in L[1:]:    mergeG(i, j)
        for n in range(len(P)):
            getG(n)

        cntr = Counter(UF)
        if len(cntr)<3:    return len(P) + 1
        L = list(-c for c in cntr.values())
        heapify(L)
        return -heappop(L)-heappop(L)+1
        
[Q4_END]

### RANK 269 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length, p = 1, ans = 0;
        int[][] left = new int[n][2], right = new int[n][2];
        while (p < n) {
            int diff = nums[p] - nums[p - 1], q = p + 1;
            while (q < n && nums[q] - nums[q - 1] == diff)
                q++;
            int from = p - 1, to = q - 1;
            ans = Math.max(ans, to - from + 2);
            for (int i = from + 1; i <= to; i++) {
                left[i][0] = i - from + 1;
                left[i][1] = diff;
            }
            for (int i = from; i < to; i++) {
                right[i][0] = to - i + 1;
                right[i][1] = diff;
            }
            p = q;
        }
        if (ans >= n)
            return n;
        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++) {
            int tmp = 2, skip = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1];
            if (left[i - 1][0] != 0) {
                if (left[i - 1][1] * 2 == skip)
                    tmp = Math.max(tmp, left[i - 1][0] + 2);
                else
                    tmp = Math.max(tmp, left[i - 1][0] + 1);
            }
            if (right[i + 1][0] != 0) {
                if (right[i + 1][1] * 2 == skip)
                    tmp = Math.max(tmp, right[i + 1][0] + 2);
                else
                    tmp = Math.max(tmp, right[i + 1][0] + 1);
            }
            if (left[i - 1][0] != 0 && right[i + 1][0] != 0 && left[i - 1][1] == right[i + 1][1] && skip == left[i - 1][1] * 2)
                tmp = Math.max(tmp, left[i - 1][0] + right[i + 1][0] + 1);
            ans = Math.max(ans, tmp);
        }
        return ans;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    class UF {
        int[] g, sz;
        UF(int n) {
            g = new int[n];
            sz = new int[n];
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
                g[i] = i;
                sz[i] = 1;
            }
        }
        int find(int x) {
            if (g[x] != x)
                g[x] = find(g[x]);
            return g[x];
        }
        int size(int x) {
            return sz[find(x)];
        }
        void union(int x, int y) {
            int rx = find(x), ry = find(y);
            if (rx != ry) {
                if (sz[rx] >= sz[ry]) {
                    g[ry] = rx;
                    sz[rx] += sz[ry];
                } else {
                    g[rx] = ry;
                    sz[ry] += sz[rx];
                }
            }
        }
    }
    public int maxActivated(int[][] ps) {
        int n = ps.length;
        UF uf = new UF(n);
        HashMap<Integer, Integer> lastX = new HashMap<>(), lastY = new HashMap<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = ps[i][0], y = ps[i][1];
            if (lastX.containsKey(x))
                uf.union(lastX.get(x), i);
            if (lastY.containsKey(y))
                uf.union(lastY.get(y), i);
            lastX.put(x, i);
            lastY.put(y, i);
        }
        HashMap<Integer, Integer> h = new HashMap<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int r = uf.find(i);
            if (!h.containsKey(r))
                h.put(r, uf.size(r));
        }
        ArrayList<Integer> a = new ArrayList<>();
        for (int k : h.keySet())
            a.add(h.get(k));
        Collections.sort(a, (x, y) -> Integer.compare(y, x));
        return a.size() == 1 ? a.get(0) + 1 : a.get(0) + a.get(1) + 1;
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 270 ###
[Q3_START]
from collections import defaultdict
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        diffs = defaultdict(list)
        n = len(nums)
        start = 0
        d = nums[1] - nums[0]
        for i in range(1, n):
            if nums[i] - nums[i-1] != d:
                diffs[d].append((start, i-1))
                start = i-1
                d = nums[i] - nums[i-1]
        diffs[d].append((start, n-1))

        res = 0
        for d, intervals in diffs.items():
            for i in range(len(intervals)):
                start, end = intervals[i]
                res = max(res, end - start + 1)
                if start!=0 or end!=n-1:
                    res = max(res, end - start + 2)
                if i > 0 and intervals[i-1][1] == start - 2 and nums[start] - nums[start-2] == 2 * d:
                    res = max(res, end - intervals[i-1][0] + 1)
                if start >= 2 and nums[start] - nums[start-2] == 2 * d:
                    res = max(res, end - start + 3)
                if end <= n-3 and nums[end+2] - nums[end] == 2 * d:
                    res = max(res, end - start + 3)
        return res

            
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
from collections import defaultdict, Counter
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        adj = defaultdict(list)
        for x, y in points:
            adj[('x', x)].append(('y', y))
            adj[('y', y)].append(('x', x))
        
        color = {}
        def dfs(node, c):
            color[node] = c
            for neighbor in adj[node]:
                if neighbor not in color:
                    dfs(neighbor, 1 - c)
        
        c = 0
        for node in adj:
            if node not in color:
                dfs(node, c)
                c += 1
        
        cnt = Counter()
        for x, y in points:
            cnt[color[('x', x)]] += 1
        
        sizes = list(sorted(cnt.values(), reverse=True))
        if len(sizes) == 1:
            return sizes[0] + 1
        return sizes[0] + sizes[1] + 1

        
[Q4_END]

### RANK 271 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
 public:
  int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
    const int N = nums.size();
    unordered_map<int, vector<pair<int, int>>> d_to_sections;
    for (int cur = 1, start = 0; cur < N; ++cur) {
      if (cur + 1 == N || nums[cur + 1] - nums[cur] != nums[cur] - nums[cur - 1]) {
        d_to_sections[nums[cur] - nums[cur - 1]].push_back({start, cur});
        start = cur; // start a new section
      }
    }
    int ans = 0;
    for (const auto& [d, sections] : d_to_sections) {
      for (const pair<int, int>& section : sections) {
        int L = section.second - section.first + 1;
        if (section.first - 2 >= 0 && nums[section.first - 2] + d * 2 == nums[section.first]) {
          ans = max(L + 2, ans);
        }
        if (section.second + 2 < N && nums[section.second] + d * 2 == nums[section.second + 2]) {
          ans = max(L + 2, ans);
        }
        if (L != N) {
          ans = max(L + 1, ans);
        }
        ans = max(L, ans);
      }
      for (int i = 1; i < sections.size(); ++i) {
        if (sections[i].first == sections[i - 1].second + 2 && nums[sections[i - 1].second] + d * 2 == nums[sections[i].first]) {
          ans = max(sections[i].second - sections[i - 1].first + 1, ans);
        }
      }
    }
    return ans;
  }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
  class DisjointSets {
   private:
	vector<int> parents;

   public:
    vector<int> sizes;
    
	DisjointSets(int size) : parents(size), sizes(size, 1) {
      for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) { parents[i] = i; }
	}

	/** @return the "representative" node in x's component */
	int find(int x) { return parents[x] == x ? x : (parents[x] = find(parents[x])); }

	/** @return whether the merge changed connectivity */
	bool unite(int x, int y) {
      int x_root = find(x);
      int y_root = find(y);
      if (x_root == y_root) { return false; }

      if (sizes[x_root] < sizes[y_root]) { swap(x_root, y_root); }
      sizes[x_root] += sizes[y_root];
      parents[y_root] = x_root;
      return true;
	}

	/** @return whether x and y are in the same connected component */
	bool connected(int x, int y) { return find(x) == find(y); }
  };
  
 public:
  int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
    const int N = points.size();
    map<int, vector<int>> x_to_indices, y_to_indices;
    for (int i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
      x_to_indices[points[i][0]].push_back(i);
      y_to_indices[points[i][1]].push_back(i);
    }

    DisjointSets S(N);
    for (const auto& [_, indices] : x_to_indices) {
      for (int i = 1; i < indices.size(); ++i) {
        S.unite(indices[i - 1], indices[i]);
      }
    }
    for (const auto& [_, indices] : y_to_indices) {
      for (int i = 1; i < indices.size(); ++i) {
        S.unite(indices[i - 1], indices[i]);
      }
    }

    vector<int> sizes;
    for (int i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
      if (S.find(i) == i) {
        sizes.push_back(S.sizes[i]);
      }
    }
    sort(sizes.begin(), sizes.end(), greater<int>());
    int ans = 1 + sizes[0];
    if (sizes.size() > 1) {
      ans += sizes[1];
    }
    return ans;
  }
};
[Q4_END]
