### RANK 274 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        vector<int> diff(n - 1, 0);
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) {
            diff[i] = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
        }
        int ans = 2, cur = 1, prev = diff[0];
        vector<int> a, b;
        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++) {
            if (diff[i] == prev) {
                cur++;
            } else {
                a.push_back(prev);
                b.push_back(cur);
                cur = 1;
                prev = diff[i];
            }
        }
        a.push_back(prev);
        b.push_back(cur);
        int m = a.size(), tmp;
        ans = max(ans, b[0]);
        for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) {
            if (i > 0) {
                tmp = b[i] + 1;
                if (b[i - 1] == 1 && i >= 2 &&
                    a[i - 2] + a[i - 1] == 2 * a[i]) {
                    tmp += 1;
                    if (b[i - 2] == 1 && i >= 3 && a[i - 3] == a[i])
                        tmp += b[i - 3];
                }
                ans = max(ans, tmp);
            }
            if (i < m - 1) {
                tmp = b[i] + 1;
                if (b[i + 1] == 1 && i < m - 2 &&
                    a[i + 2] + a[i + 1] == 2 * a[i]) {
                    tmp += 1;
                    if (b[i + 2] == 1 && i < m - 3 && a[i + 3] == a[i])
                        tmp += b[i + 3];
                }
                ans = max(ans, tmp);
            }
        }
        return ans + 1;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    class DSU {
    public:
        DSU(int n) {
            par = vector<int>(n, 0);
            sz = vector<int>(n, 1);
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
                par[i] = i;
            }
        }
        int find(int u) {
            if (par[u] != u) {
                par[u] = find(par[u]);
            }
            return par[u];
        }
        bool merge(int u, int v) {
            u = find(u);
            v = find(v);
            if (u == v)
                return false;
            if (sz[u] <= sz[v]) {
                par[u] = par[v];
                sz[v] += sz[u];
            } else {
                par[v] = par[u];
                sz[u] += sz[v];
            }
            return true;
        }
        int size(int u) { return sz[par[u]]; }

    private:
        vector<int> par, sz;
    };
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        map<int, int> mpx, mpy, mp;
        int n = points.size();
        DSU dsu(n);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (mpx.find(points[i][0]) == mpx.end()) {
                mpx[points[i][0]] = i;
            } else {
                dsu.merge(i, mpx[points[i][0]]);
            }
            if (mpy.find(points[i][1]) == mpy.end()) {
                mpy[points[i][1]] = i;
            } else {
                dsu.merge(i, mpy[points[i][1]]);
            }
        }
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            mp[dsu.find(i)] = dsu.size(i);
        }
        vector<pair<int, int>> v;
        for (auto p : mp) {
            v.push_back({p.second, p.first});
        }
        sort(v.begin(), v.end());
        int m = v.size();
        int ans = v[m - 1].first + 1;
        if (m >= 2) {
            ans += v[m - 2].first;
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 275 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:

        n = len(nums)
        
        ends = [1] + [2] * (n - 1)
        for i in range(2, n):
            if nums[i] - nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]:
                ends[i] = ends[i-1] + 1
            else:
                ends[i] = 2

        starts = [2] * (n - 1) + [1]
        for i in range(n-3, -1, -1):
            if nums[i+1] - nums[i] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]:
                starts[i] = starts[i+1] + 1
            else:
                starts[i] = 2

        # print(ends)
        # print(starts)

        res = max(min(n, max(starts) + 1), min(n, max(ends) + 1))
        for i in range(1, n-1):
            diff = nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]
            if diff % 2:
                continue

            div = diff // 2
            l = 1
            if i >= 2 and nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == div:
                l = ends[i-1]
            r = 1
            if i <= n - 3 and nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == div:
                r = starts[i+1]

            res = max(res, l + r + 1)
        return max(res, ends[n-2] + 1, starts[1] + 1)
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:

        n = len(points)
        parent = list(range(n))

        def find(a):
            if parent[a] != a:
                parent[a] = find(parent[a])
            return parent[a]

        xd, yd = {}, {}

        for i, co in enumerate(points):
            x, y = co
            
            if x in xd:
                j = xd[x]
                rootj = find(j)
                parent[i] = rootj
            else:
                xd[x] = i

            if y in yd:
                k = yd[y]
                rooti, rootk = find(i), find(k)
                parent[rooti] = rootk
            else:
                yd[y] = i
                
        graph = defaultdict(int)
        for i in range(n):
            rooti = find(i)
            graph[rooti] += 1

        l = sorted(graph.values())
        if len(l) == 1:
            return n + 1
        else:
            return l[-1] + l[-2] + 1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 276 ###
[Q3_START]
func longestArithmetic(a []int)int{
n:=len(a);if n<=3{return n}
m:=n-1;d:=make([]int,m)
for i:=0;i<m;i++{d[i]=a[i+1]-a[i]}
l:=make([]int,m);r:=make([]int,m)
l[0]=1
for i:=1;i<m;i++{if d[i]==d[i-1]{l[i]=l[i-1]+1}else{l[i]=1}}
r[m-1]=1
for i:=m-2;i>=0;i--{if d[i]==d[i+1]{r[i]=r[i+1]+1}else{r[i]=1}}
ans:=1
for i:=0;i<m;i++{
c:=l[i]
if c<m{c++}
if c>ans{ans=c}
}
for i:=0;i<m-1;i++{
s:=d[i]+d[i+1]
if s&1==1{continue}
x:=s/2;c:=2
if i-1>=0&&d[i-1]==x{c+=l[i-1]}
if i+2<m&&d[i+2]==x{c+=r[i+2]}
if c>ans{ans=c}
}
return ans+1
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
type D struct{p,e []int}
func nd(n int)*D{p:=make([]int,n);for i:=range p{p[i]=i};return &D{p,make([]int,n)}}
func (d *D)f(x int)int{if d.p[x]!=x{d.p[x]=d.f(d.p[x])};return d.p[x]}
func (d *D)u(a,b int){
a=d.f(a);b=d.f(b)
if a!=b{d.p[a]=b;d.e[b]+=d.e[a]+1}else{d.e[a]++}
}
func maxActivated(p [][]int)int{
xm,ym:=map[int]int{},map[int]int{};id:=0
for _,v:=range p{
if _,ok:=xm[v[0]];!ok{xm[v[0]]=id;id++}
if _,ok:=ym[v[1]];!ok{ym[v[1]]=id;id++}
}
d:=nd(id)
for _,v:=range p{d.u(xm[v[0]],ym[v[1]])}
m:=map[int]int{}
for i:=0;i<id;i++{if d.p[i]==i{m[i]=d.e[i]}}
a:=[]int{}
for _,v:=range m{if v>0{a=append(a,v)}}
sort.Slice(a,func(i,j int)bool{return a[i]>a[j]})
if len(a)==0{return 1}
if len(a)==1{return a[0]+1}
return a[0]+a[1]+1
}

### RANK 277 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n=nums.size();
        vector<long long>diff(n-1);
        for(int i=0; i<n-1; i++){
            diff[i]=(long long)(nums[i+1]-nums[i]);
        }
        unordered_map<long long,vector<pair<int,int>>>h;
        int start=0;
        for(int i=1; i<n-1; i++){
            if(diff[i]!=diff[i-1]){
                h[diff[start]].push_back({start,i-1});
                start=i;
            }
        }
        h[diff[start]].push_back({start,n-2});
        int ans=1;
        for(auto it:h){
            long long d=it.first;
            vector<pair<int,int>>v=it.second;
            for(int i=0; i<v.size(); i++){
                int l=v[i].first,r=v[i].second;
                int len=r-l+1;
                ans=max(ans,len);
                if(l>0 || r<n-2){
                    ans=max(ans,len+1);
                }
                if(l>=2 && diff[l-2]+diff[l-1]==2LL*d){
                    ans=max(ans,len+2);
                }
                if(r<=n-4 && diff[r+1]+diff[r+2]==2LL*d){
                    ans=max(ans,len+2);
                }
                if(i+1<v.size()){
                    int lnext=v[i+1].first;
                    int lennext=v[i+1].second-lnext+1;
                    if(lnext-r==3 && diff[r+1]+diff[r+2]==2LL*d){
                        ans=max(ans,len+2+lennext);
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        return ans+1;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DisjointSet{
    vector<int>parent,rank;
public:
    DisjointSet(int n){
        rank.resize(n+1,0);
        parent.resize(n+1);
        for(int i=0; i<=n; i++){
            parent[i]=i;
        }
    }
    int find(int node){
        if(node==parent[node])  
            return node;
        return parent[node]=find(parent[node]);
    }
    void unionByRank(int u,int v){
        int u_rep=find(u),v_rep=find(v);
        if(u_rep==v_rep) return;
        if(rank[u_rep]<rank[v_rep]){
            parent[u_rep]=v_rep;
        }
        else if(rank[u_rep]>rank[v_rep]){
            parent[v_rep]=u_rep;
        }
        else{
            parent[v_rep]=u_rep;
            rank[u_rep]++;
        }
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n=points.size();
        DisjointSet ds(n);
        unordered_map<int,int>xh,yh;
        for(int i=0; i<n; i++){
            int x=points[i][0],y=points[i][1];
            if(xh.count(x)) ds.unionByRank(i,xh[x]);
            else xh[x]=i;
            if(yh.count(y)) ds.unionByRank(i,yh[y]);
            else yh[y]=i;
        }
        unordered_map<int,int>comp;
        for(int i=0; i<n; i++){
            int root=ds.find(i);
            comp[root]++;
        }
        vector<int>v;
        for(auto it:comp) v.push_back(it.second);
        sort(v.rbegin(),v.rend());
        if(v.size()==1) return v[0]+1;
        return v[0]+v[1]+1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

#include <bits/stdc++.h>
using namespace std;
#define F first
#define S second
#define R cin>>
#define ll long long
#define ln cout<<'\n'
#define in(a) insert(a)
#define pb(a) push_back(a)
#define pd(a) printf("%.10f\n",a)
#define mem(a) memset(a,0,sizeof(a))
#define all(c) (c).begin(),(c).end()
#define iter(c) __typeof((c).begin())
#define rrep(i,n) for(ll i=(ll)(n)-1;i>=0;i--)
#define REP(i,m,n) for(ll i=(ll)(m);i<(ll)(n);i++)
#define rep(i,n) REP(i,0,n)
#define tr(it,c) for(iter(c) it=(c).begin();it!=(c).end();it++)
ll check(ll n,ll m,ll x,ll y){return x>=0&&x<n&&y>=0&&y<m;}void pr(){ln;}
template<class A,class...B>void pr(const A &a,const B&...b){cout<<a<<(sizeof...(b)?" ":"");pr(b...);}
template<class A>void PR(A a,ll n){rep(i,n){if(i)cout<<' ';cout<<a[i];}ln;}
const ll MAX=1e9+7,MAXL=1LL<<61,dx[8]={-1,0,1,0,-1,-1,1,1},dy[8]={0,1,0,-1,-1,1,1,-1};
typedef pair<ll,ll> P;
typedef pair<ll,P> PP;

class Solution {
public:
  int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& a) {
    ll n=a.size();
    vector<ll> b;
    rep(i,n-1) b.pb(a[i+1]-a[i]);
    vector<PP> p;
    ll l=0;
    REP(r,1,b.size()) {
      if(b[r]!=b[r-1]) {
        p.pb(PP(b[r-1],P(l,r)));
        l=r;
      }
    }
    p.pb(PP(b.back(),P(l,n-1)));
    ll ans=2;
    rep(i,p.size()) {
      ans=max(ans,p[i].S.S-p[i].S.F+1);
      if(i+1<p.size()) {
        ans=max(ans,p[i].S.S-p[i].S.F+2);
        if(p[i+1].S.S==p[i].S.S+2&&a[p[i].S.S]+p[i].F*2==a[p[i+1].S.S]) {
          ans=max(ans,p[i].S.S-p[i].S.F+3);
          if(i+2<p.size()&&p[i].F==p[i+2].F) ans=max(ans,p[i+2].S.S-p[i].S.F+1);
        }
        if(i+2<p.size()&&p[i+2].S.S==p[i].S.S+2&&a[p[i].S.S]+p[i].F*2==a[p[i+2].S.S]) {
          ans=max(ans,p[i].S.S-p[i].S.F+3);
          if(i+3<p.size()&&p[i].F==p[i+3].F) ans=max(ans,p[i+3].S.S-p[i].S.F+1);
        }
      }
      if(i-1>=0) {
        ans=max(ans,p[i].S.S-p[i].S.F+2);
        if(p[i].S.F==p[i-1].S.F+2&&a[p[i].S.F]-p[i].F*2==a[p[i-1].S.F]) {
          ans=max(ans,p[i].S.S-p[i].S.F+3);
          if(i-2>=0&&p[i].F==p[i-2].F) ans=max(ans,p[i].S.S-p[i-2].S.F+1);
        }
        if(i-2>=0&&p[i].S.F==p[i-2].S.F+2&&a[p[i].S.F]-p[i].F*2==a[p[i-2].S.F]) {
          ans=max(ans,p[i].S.S-p[i].S.F+3);
          if(i-3>=0&&p[i].F==p[i-3].F) ans=max(ans,p[i].S.S-p[i-3].S.F+1);
        }
      }
    }
    return ans;
  }
};
[Q3_END]

#include <bits/stdc++.h>
using namespace std;
#define F first
#define S second
#define R cin>>
#define ll long long
#define ln cout<<'\n'
#define in(a) insert(a)
#define pb(a) push_back(a)
#define pd(a) printf("%.10f\n",a)
#define mem(a) memset(a,0,sizeof(a))
#define all(c) (c).begin(),(c).end()
#define iter(c) __typeof((c).begin())
#define rrep(i,n) for(ll i=(ll)(n)-1;i>=0;i--)
#define REP(i,m,n) for(ll i=(ll)(m);i<(ll)(n);i++)
#define rep(i,n) REP(i,0,n)
#define tr(it,c) for(iter(c) it=(c).begin();it!=(c).end();it++)
ll check(ll n,ll m,ll x,ll y){return x>=0&&x<n&&y>=0&&y<m;}void pr(){ln;}
template<class A,class...B>void pr(const A &a,const B&...b){cout<<a<<(sizeof...(b)?" ":"");pr(b...);}
template<class A>void PR(A a,ll n){rep(i,n){if(i)cout<<' ';cout<<a[i];}ln;}
const ll MAX=1e9+7,MAXL=1LL<<61,dx[8]={-1,0,1,0,-1,-1,1,1},dy[8]={0,1,0,-1,-1,1,1,-1};
typedef pair<ll,ll> P;

ll p[500001],r[500001],c[500001];
void init(ll n){rep(i,n)p[i]=i,r[i]=0,c[i]=1;}
int find(int x){return (p[x]==x)?x:(p[x]=find(p[x]));}
void unite(int x,int y) {
  x=find(x),y=find(y);
  if(x==y)return;
  ll cx=c[x],cy=c[y];
  if(r[x]<r[y])p[x]=y;
  else{p[y]=x;if(r[x]==r[y])r[x]++;}
  c[find(x)]=cx+cy;
}
bool same(int x,int y){return find(x)==find(y);}

class Solution {
public:
  int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& p) {
    ll n=p.size();
    init(n);
    map<ll,ll> mx,my;
    rep(i,n) {
      if(mx.count(p[i][0])) unite(i,mx[p[i][0]]);
      if(my.count(p[i][1])) unite(i,my[p[i][1]]);
      mx[p[i][0]]=i;
      my[p[i][1]]=i;
    }
    vector<ll> b;
    rep(i,n) {
      if(find(i)==i) b.pb(c[i]);
    }
    sort(all(b),greater<ll>());
    ll ans=b[0]+1;
    if(b.size()>=2) ans=max(ans,b[0]+b[1]+1);
    return ans;
  }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 279 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        N = len(nums)
        diff = [nums[idx] - nums[idx - 1] for idx in range(1, N)]
        
        start = [1]
        end = [1]
        for idx in range(1, N - 1):
            if diff[idx] == diff[idx - 1]:
                end.append(end[-1] + 1)
            else:
                end.append(1)

        for idx in range(N - 3, -1, -1):
            if diff[idx] == diff[idx + 1]:
                start.append(start[-1] + 1)
            else:
                start.append(1)
        start = start[::-1]
        
        ans = min(N, max(start) + 2)
        for idx in range(1, N - 1):
            if (nums[idx - 1] + nums[idx + 1]) & 1 == 0:
                change = (nums[idx + 1] - nums[idx - 1]) // 2
                local = 2

                if idx >= 2 and diff[idx - 2] == change:
                    local += end[idx - 2]
                if idx <= N - 3 and diff[idx + 1] == change:
                    local += start[idx + 1]
                ans = max(ans, local + 1)
        return ans
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU:
    def __init__(self, n):
        self.parents = [i for i in range(n)]

    def find(self, x):
        x_root = self.parents[x]
        if x_root != x:
            self.parents[x] = x_root = self.find(x_root)
        return x_root

    def union(self, x, y):
        x_root = self.find(x)
        y_root = self.find(y)
        self.parents[y_root] = self.parents[x_root]

class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        N = len(points)
        UF = DSU(N)
        rows = defaultdict(list)
        cols = defaultdict(list)
        
        for idx in range(N):
            x, y = points[idx]
            rows[x].append(idx)
            cols[y].append(idx)

        for r in rows:
            pts = rows[r]
            L = len(pts)
            for i in range(1, L):
                UF.union(pts[0], pts[i])

        for c in cols:
            pts = cols[c]
            L = len(pts)
            for i in range(1, L):
                UF.union(pts[0], pts[i])
        
        comps = defaultdict(int)
        for idx in range(N):
            r = UF.find(idx)
            comps[r] += 1

        sizes = list(sorted(comps.values(), reverse = True))
        if len(sizes) < 2:
            return 1 + sizes[0]
        return 1 + sizes[0] + sizes[1]
[Q4_END]

### RANK 280 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
          int n = (int)nums.size();
        if (n <= 2) return n;

        vector<int> a = nums;

        vector<int> L(n), R(n);
        vector<long long> diffL(n), diffR(n);

        L[0] = 1;
        L[1] = 2;
        diffL[1] = 1LL * a[1] - a[0];
        for (int i = 2; i < n; ++i) {
            long long d = 1LL * a[i] - a[i - 1];
            if (d == diffL[i - 1]) {
                L[i] = L[i - 1] + 1;
            } else {
                L[i] = 2;
            }
            diffL[i] = d;
        }

        R[n - 1] = 1;
        R[n - 2] = 2;
        diffR[n - 2] = 1LL * a[n - 1] - a[n - 2];
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; --i) {
            long long d = 1LL * a[i + 1] - a[i];
            if (d == diffR[i + 1]) {
                R[i] = R[i + 1] + 1;
            } else {
                R[i] = 2;
            }
            diffR[i] = d;
        }

        int ans = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) ans = max(ans, L[i]);

        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            if (i > 0) ans = max(ans, L[i - 1] + 1);
            if (i + 1 < n) ans = max(ans, R[i + 1] + 1);

            if (i > 0 && i + 1 < n) {
                long long sum = 1LL * a[i - 1] + a[i + 1];
                if ((sum & 1) == 0) {
                    long long x = sum / 2;
                    long long d = x - a[i - 1];

                    int leftLen = 1;
                    if (i - 1 >= 1 && diffL[i - 1] == d)
                        leftLen = L[i - 1];

                    int rightLen = 1;
                    if (i + 1 <= n - 2 && diffR[i + 1] == d)
                        rightLen = R[i + 1];

                    ans = max(ans, leftLen + 1 + rightLen);
                }
            }
        }

        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    struct DSU {
        vector<int> parent;
        vector<int> size;

        DSU(int n) : parent(n), size(n, 1) {
            iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0);
        }

        int find(int x) {
            if (parent[x] == x) return x;
            return parent[x] = find(parent[x]);
        }

        void unite(int a, int b) {
            a = find(a);
            b = find(b);
            if (a == b) return;
            if (size[a] < size[b]) swap(a, b);
            parent[b] = a;
            size[a] += size[b];
        }
    };

    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = (int)points.size();
        if (n == 0) return 1;

        unordered_map<int,int> x_index, y_index;
        int x_count = 0, y_count = 0;
        for (auto &p : points) {
            int x = p[0];
            int y = p[1];
            if (!x_index.count(x)) x_index[x] = x_count++;
            if (!y_index.count(y)) y_index[y] = y_count++;
        }

        int total_nodes = x_count + y_count;
        DSU dsu(total_nodes);

        for (auto &p : points) {
            int x = p[0];
            int y = p[1];

            int xi = x_index[x];
            int yi = y_index[y] + x_count;

            dsu.unite(xi, yi);
        }

        vector<int> comp_points(total_nodes, 0);
        for (auto &p : points) {
            int x = p[0];
            int xi = x_index[x];
            int root = dsu.find(xi);
            comp_points[root]++;
        }

        vector<int> roots;
        roots.reserve(total_nodes);
        for (int v = 0; v < total_nodes; ++v) {
            if (dsu.find(v) == v && comp_points[v] > 0) {
                roots.push_back(v);
            }
        }

        int ans = 1;

        // case 1: put new point inside a single component
        for (int r : roots) {
            ans = max(ans, comp_points[r] + 1);
        }

        // case 2: bridge two different components
        int k = (int)roots.size();
        if (k >= 2) {
            int best1 = 0, best2 = 0;
            // get two largest comp_points among components
            for (int r : roots) {
                int c = comp_points[r];
                if (c > best1) {
                    best2 = best1;
                    best1 = c;
                } else if (c > best2) {
                    best2 = c;
                }
            }
            ans = max(ans, best1 + best2 + 1);
        }

        return ans;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 281 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        int ans = 0;
        vector<int> left(n, 1);
        for (int i=1; i<n; i++) {
            if (i-2>=0 && nums[i]-nums[i-1]==nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]) left[i] = left[i-1]+1;
            else left[i] = 2;
            ans = max(ans, left[i]);
        }
        vector<int> right(n, 1);
        for (int i=n-2; i>=0; i--) {
            if (i+2<n && nums[i+1]-nums[i]==nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]) right[i] = right[i+1]+1;
            else right[i] = 2;
            ans = max(ans, right[i]);
        }
        for (int i=0; i<n; i++) {
            //left end
            if (i+1<n) ans = max(ans, 1 + right[i+1]);
            //right end
            if (i-1>=0) ans = max(ans, 1 + left[i-1]);
            //mid
            if (i-1>=0 && i+1<n && (nums[i+1]-nums[i-1])%2==0) {
                int d = (nums[i+1]-nums[i-1])/2;
                int l = (i-2>=0 && nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]==d) ? left[i-1] : 1;
                int r = (i+2<n && nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]==d) ? right[i+1] : 1;
                ans = max(ans, l + 1 + r);
            }
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
struct UF {  
      vector<int> Parent;  
      vector<int> Size;  
      int Count;  
      void init(int n) {  
           Count = n;  
           Parent.resize(n);  
           Size.resize(n);  
           for (int i=0;i<n;i++) {  
                make_set(i);  
           }  
      }  
      void make_set(int v) {  
           Parent[v] = v;  
           Size[v] = 1;  
      }  
      int find_set(int v) {  
           if (v == Parent[v])  
                return v;  
           return Parent[v] = find_set(Parent[v]);  
      }  
      void union_sets(int a, int b) {  
           a = find_set(a);  
           b = find_set(b);  
           if (a != b) {  
                if (Size[a] < Size[b])  
                     swap(a, b);  
                Count--;  
                Parent[b] = a;  
                Size[a] += Size[b];  
           }  
      }  
 };  
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        UF uf;  
        uf.init(n);  
        map<int, vector<int>> mpx, mpy;
        for (int i=0; i<n; i++) {
            mpx[points[i][0]].push_back(i);
            mpy[points[i][1]].push_back(i);            
        }
        for (auto it : mpx) {
            auto v = it.second;
            for (int i=0;i<v.size()-1; i++) {
                uf.union_sets(v[i], v[i+1]);
            }
        }
        for (auto it : mpy) {
            auto v = it.second;
            for (int i=0;i<v.size()-1; i++) {
                uf.union_sets(v[i], v[i+1]);
            }
        }
        set<pair<int, int>> st;
        for (int i=0; i<n; i++) {
            int p = uf.find_set(i);
            st.insert(pair(uf.Size[p],p));
        }
        if (st.size()==1) return n+1;
        int ans = 1;
        auto it = st.rbegin();
        ans += (*it).first;
        it++;
        ans += (*it).first;
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        ans = 3
        def helper(nums):
            nonlocal ans
            l = len(nums)
            # cur_lens = [2, 0]
            # diffs = [nums[1] - nums[0], None]
            # prevs = [nums[1], nums[1]]
            seqs = [(2, nums[1] - nums[0], nums[1], 0)] # cur_len, diff, prev, used
            # print(seqs)
            for i in range(2, l):
                seqs2 = []
                for cur_len, diff, prev, used in seqs:
                    cur_diff = nums[i] - prev
                    if cur_diff == diff:
                        seqs2.append((cur_len + 1, diff, nums[i], used))
                    else:
                        if used:
                            if cur_len > ans:
                                ans = cur_len
                        else:
                            seqs2.append((cur_len + 1, diff, prev + diff, 1))
                            seqs2.append((2, cur_diff, nums[i], 0))
                seqs = seqs2
            for cur_len, diff, prev, used in seqs:
                if cur_len > ans:
                    ans = cur_len
                # diff0 = nums[i] - prevs[0]
                # diff1 = nums[i] - prevs[1]
                # if diff1 == diffs[1]:
                #     cur_lens[1] += 1
                # else:
                #     if cur_lens[1] > ans:
                #         ans = cur_lens[1]
                # if diff0 == diffs[0]:
                #     cur_lens[0] += 1
                # else:
                #     cur_lens[1] = cur_lens[0] + 1
                #     diffs[1] = diffs[0]
                #     prevs[1] = prevs[0] + diffs[0]
                #     cur_lens[0] = 2
                #     diffs[0] = diff0
                #     prevs[0] = nums[i]

        # l = len(nums)
        # for i in range(l - 2):
        #     if nums[i + 1] - nums[i] != nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]:
        #         break
        # else:
        #     return l
        helper(nums)
        helper(nums[::-1])
        return ans
            
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DisjointUnion:
    def __init__(self, size):
        self.parents = list(range(size))
        self.ranks = [0] * size
        self.count = size

    def union(self, a, b):
        root_a = self.find(a)
        root_b = self.find(b)
        if root_a == root_b:
            return
        if self.ranks[root_b] < self.ranks[root_a]:
            self.parents[root_b] = root_a
        elif self.ranks[root_a] < self.ranks[root_b]:
            self.parents[root_a] = root_b
        else:
            self.parents[root_b] = root_a
            self.ranks[root_a] += 1
        self.count -= 1

    def find(self, i):
        root = self.parents[i]
        if self.parents[root] != root:
            self.parents[i] = self.find(root)
            return self.parents[i]
        return root

    def disjoint_sets(self):
        return self.count

class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        x_dict = dict()
        y_dict = dict()
        l = len(points)
        du = DisjointUnion(l)
        for i in range(l):
            x, y = points[i]
            if x in x_dict:
                du.union(i, x_dict[x])
            else:
                x_dict[x] = i
            if y in y_dict:
                du.union(i, y_dict[y])
            else:
                y_dict[y] = i
        groups = Counter()
        for i in range(l):
            root = du.find(i)
            groups[root] += 1
        groups = sorted(list(groups.values()))
        if len(groups) == 1:
            return groups[0] + 1
        else:
            return groups[-1] + groups[-2] + 1
                
            
[Q4_END]

### RANK 283 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 2:
            return n
        d = [nums[i + 1] - nums[i] for i in range(n - 1)]
        m = n - 1
        left = [1] * m
        for i in range(1, m):
            if d[i] == d[i - 1]:
                left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1
        right = [1] * m
        for i in range(m - 2, -1, -1):
            if d[i] == d[i + 1]:
                right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1
        ans = max(left) + 1
        if n >= 3:
            ans = max(ans, 2 + right[1])
            ans = max(ans, 2 + left[m - 2])
        for i in range(1, n - 1):
            if i - 2 >= 0:
                ans = max(ans, left[i - 2] + 2)
            else:
                ans = max(ans, 2)
            if i + 1 < m:
                ans = max(ans, right[i + 1] + 2)
            else:
                ans = max(ans, 2)
            gap = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]
            if gap % 2 == 0:
                x = gap // 2
                l = 0
                r = 0
                if i - 2 >= 0 and d[i - 2] == x:
                    l = left[i - 2]
                if i + 1 < m and d[i + 1] == x:
                    r = right[i + 1]
                ans = max(ans, l + r + 3)
        return min(ans, n)
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        parent = {}
        size = {}
        def find(x):
            if parent[x] != x:
                parent[x] = find(parent[x])
            return parent[x]
        def union(a, b):
            ra = find(a)
            rb = find(b)
            if ra == rb:
                return
            if size[ra] < size[rb]:
                ra, rb = rb, ra
            parent[rb] = ra
            size[ra] += size[rb]
        for x, y in points:
            a = ("x", x)
            b = ("y", y)
            if a not in parent:
                parent[a] = a
                size[a] = 1
            if b not in parent:
                parent[b] = b
                size[b] = 1
            union(a, b)
        comp = {}
        for x, y in points:
            root = find(("x", x))
            comp[root] = comp.get(root, 0) + 1
        arr = sorted(comp.values(), reverse=True)
        if len(arr) == 0:
            return 1
        if len(arr) == 1:
            return arr[0] + 1
        return arr[0] + arr[1] + 1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 284 ###
[Q3_START]
#include <bits/stdc++.h>
using namespace std;

using ull = unsigned long long;
using ll = long long;
using vi = vector<int>;
using vl = vector<ll>;
using pii = pair<int, int>;
#define pb push_back
#define rep(i, a, b) for(int i = (a); i < (b); ++i)
#define all(x) begin(x), end(x)
#define sz(x) (int)(x).size()

const int MAX_N = 1e5 + 1;
const ll MOD = 1e9 + 7;
const ll INF = LLONG_MAX;

class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = sz(nums);
        vi l(n, 1);
        vi r(n, 1);

        rep(i, 1, n) {
            int d = nums[i] - nums[i - 1];
            int pd = (i == 1 ? d : nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]);
            if (d == pd) {
                l[i] = 1 + l[i - 1];
            } else {
                l[i] = 2;
            }
        }

        for (int i = n - 2; i >= 0; i--) {
            int d = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
            int pd = (i == n - 2 ? d : nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]);
            if (d == pd) {
                r[i] = 1 + r[i + 1];
            } else {
                r[i] = 2;
            }
        }

        int ans = 0;
        rep(i, 0, n) {
            ans = max(ans, l[i]);
            ans = max(ans, r[i]);
        }

        rep(i, 0, n) {
            if (i != 0) {
                ans = max(ans, 1 + l[i - 1]);
            }

            if (i != n - 1) {
                ans = max(ans, 1 + r[i + 1]);
            }

            if (i != 0 && i != n - 1) {
                int a = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1];
                if (a % 2 != 0) continue;
                a /= 2;

                int cand = 3;
                if (i + 1 != n - 1 && nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == a) {
                    cand--;
                    cand += r[i + 1];
                }

                if (i - 1 != 0 && nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == a) {
                    cand--;
                    cand += l[i - 1];
                }

                ans = max(ans, cand);
            }
        }

        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
#include <bits/stdc++.h>
using namespace std;

using ull = unsigned long long;
using ll = long long;
using vi = vector<int>;
using vl = vector<ll>;
using pii = pair<int, int>;
#define pb push_back
#define rep(i, a, b) for(int i = (a); i < (b); ++i)
#define all(x) begin(x), end(x)
#define sz(x) (int)(x).size()

const int MAX_N = 1e5 + 1;
const ll MOD = 1e9 + 7;
const ll INF = LLONG_MAX;

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = sz(points);
        vector<pii> x;
        vector<pii> y;

        vector<vi> adj(n);

        rep(i, 0, n) {
            int xx = points[i][0], yy = points[i][1];
            x.pb({xx, i});
            y.pb({yy, i});
        }

        sort(all(x));
        sort(all(y));

        rep(i, 1, n) {
            auto [xx, j] = x[i];
            if (xx == x[i - 1].first) {
                adj[j].pb(x[i - 1].second);
                adj[x[i - 1].second].pb(j);
            }
        }

        rep(i, 1, n) {
            auto [yy, j] = y[i];
            if (yy == y[i - 1].first) {
                adj[j].pb(y[i - 1].second);
                adj[y[i - 1].second].pb(j);
            }
        }

        vector<bool> visited(n, false);
        function<void(int, int&)> dfs;

        dfs = [&](int node, int &comp) {
            visited[node] = true;
            comp++;
            for (int nx : adj[node]) {
                if (!visited[nx]) dfs(nx, comp);
            }
        };

        vi szs;

        rep(i, 0, n) {
            if (!visited[i]) {
                int c = 0;
                dfs(i, c);
                szs.pb(c);
            }
        }

        sort(all(szs));
        reverse(all(szs));

        if (sz(szs) == 1) {
            return 1 + szs[0];
        }

        return 1 + szs[0] + szs[1];
    }
    
};
[Q4_END]
##################

### RANK 285 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 3:
            return n

        left = [0] * n
        left[0] , left[1] = 1 , 2
        for i in range(2, n):
            if nums[i] - nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]:
                left[i] = left[i-1] + 1
            else:
                left[i] = 2

        right = [0] * n
        right[n-1] , right[n-2] = 1 , 2
        for i in range(n-3, -1, -1):
            if nums[i+1] - nums[i] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]:
                right[i] = right[i+1] + 1
            else:
                right[i] = 2

        result = 0
        for i in range(n):
            if i < n - 1: result = max(result, right[i] + 1)
            if i > 0: result = max(result, left[i] + 1)

        for i in range(1, n-1):
           
            if (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) % 2 == 0:
                target = (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) // 2
                current_len = 1

                if i >= 1:
                    if i >= 2 and nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == target:
                        current_len += left[i-1]
                    else:
                        current_len += 1

                if i < n-1:
                    if i <= n-3 and nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == target:
                        current_len += right[i+1]                
                    else:
                        current_len += 1

                result = max(result, current_len)

            target = nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]
            current_len = 2
            if i >= 2 and nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == target:
                current_len += (left[i-1] - 1)
            if i <= n-3 and nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == target:
                current_len += (right[i+1] - 1)
            result = max(result, current_len)

        return min(result, n)
            
        
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
from collections import defaultdict

class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        parent = {}

        def find(i):
            if parent[i] == i:
                return i
            parent[i] = find(parent[i])
            return parent[i]

        def union(i,j):
            root_i = find(i)
            root_j = find(j)
            if root_i != root_j:
                parent[root_i] = root_j

        for x,y in points:
            x_node = f"x{x}"
            y_node = f"y{y}"
            if x_node not in parent: parent[x_node] = x_node
            if y_node not in parent: parent[y_node] = y_node
            union(x_node, y_node)

        comp_points = defaultdict(int)
        for x,y in points:
            root = find(f"x{x}")
            comp_points[root] += 1

        x_count = {}
        y_count = {}

        for x,_ in points:
            x_count[x] = comp_points[find(f"x{x}")]
        for _,y in points:
            y_count[x] = comp_points[find(f"y{y}")]

        max_total = 0

        unique_xs = list(x_count.keys())
        unique_ys = list(y_count.keys())

        comp_sizes = sorted(comp_points.values(), reverse=True)

        if not comp_sizes:
            return 1
        if len(comp_sizes) == 1:
            return comp_sizes[0] + 1

        return comp_sizes[0] + comp_sizes[1] + 1

[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        left = [1] * n
        left[1] = 2
        for i in range(1, n-1):
            if (nums[i+1] - nums[i]) == (nums[i] - nums[i-1]):
                left[i+1] = left[i] + 1
            else:
                left[i+1] = 2
                
        right = [1] * n
        right[-2] = 2
        for i in range(n-2, 0, -1):
            if (nums[i+1] - nums[i]) == (nums[i] - nums[i-1]):
                right[i-1] = right[i] + 1
            else:
                right[i-1] = 2

        ans = max(left)

        ans = max(ans, right[1] + 1, left[-2] + 1)

        for i in range(1, n-1):

            # change 1 num
            ans = max(ans, left[i-1] + 1)
            ans = max(ans, right[i-1] + 1)

            # bridge 2 block if possible
            if (nums[i-1] + nums[i+1]) % 2 == 0:
                d = (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) // 2
                
                l = r = 1
                if i >= 2 and nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == d:
                    l = left[i-1]
                if i+2 < n and nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == d:
                    r = right[i+1]

                ans = max(ans, l+r+1)

        return min(ans, n)

            
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU: 
    def __init__(self, n: int): 
        self.p = list(range(n))
        self.size = [1] * n

    def find(self, x: int) -> int:
        while x != self.p[x]:
            self.p[x] = self.p[self.p[x]]
            x = self.p[x]
        return x

    def union(self, x: int, y: int) -> bool:
        px = self.find(x)
        py = self.find(y)
        if px == py: return False
        if self.size[px] < self.size[py]:
            px, py = py, px
        self.p[py] = px
        self.size[px] += self.size[py]
        return True
        
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        
        x_idx, y_idx = dict(), dict()
        dsu = DSU(n)
        
        for i, (x, y) in enumerate(points):
            if x in x_idx:
                dsu.union(i, x_idx[x])
            else:
                x_idx[x] = i

            if y in y_idx:
                dsu.union(i, y_idx[y])
            else:
                y_idx[y] = i


        comps = dict()
        for i in range(n):
            pi = dsu.find(i)
            comps[pi] = dsu.size[pi]
        
        comp_sizes = list(sorted(comps.values(), reverse = True))
        if len(comp_sizes) == 1:
            return comp_sizes[0] + 1
        return comp_sizes[0] + comp_sizes[1] + 1

class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        t=nums
        p=len(nums)
        if p <= 3:
            return p
        arr=[nums[x+1]-nums[x] for x in range (p-1)]
        q=len(arr)
        rt={}
        nd={}
        result=3
        x=0
        while x < q:
            y=x
            while y < q and arr[y]==arr[x]:
                y+=1
            th=y-x
            E=arr[x]
            rt[x]=(E,th)
            nd[y-1]=(E,th)
            result=max(result,th +1)
            if x > 0:
                result=max(result,th+2)
            if y-1 < q -1:
                result=max(result,th +2)
            x=y
        for x in range(q-1):
            T=arr[x]+arr[x+1]
            if T % 2!=0:
                continue
            E=T //2
            l_en=0
            if x-1 >=0 and (x-1) in nd and nd[x-1][0]==E:
                l_en=nd[x-1][1]
            r_en=0
            if x+2 < q and(x+2) in rt and rt[x+2][0]==E:
                r_en=rt[x+2][1]
            result =max(result,l_en + r_en +3)
        return result

[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        t=points
        p=len(points)
        nt=list(range(p))
        ze=[1]*p
        def fun1(x):
            if nt[x]==x:
                return x
            nt[x]=fun1(nt[x])
            return nt[x]
        def fun2(x,y):
            ti=fun1(x)
            tj=fun1(y)
            if ti != tj:
                if ze[ti] < ze [tj]:
                    ti,tj=tj,ti
                nt[tj]=ti
                ze[ti]+=ze[tj]
        xp={}
        yp={}
        for x,(m,n) in enumerate(points):
            if m in xp:
                fun2(x,xp[m])
            else:
                xp[m]=x
            if n in yp:
                fun2(x,yp[n])
            else:
                yp[n]=x
        es=[]
        for x in range (p):
            if nt[x]==x:
                es.append(ze[x])
        es.sort(reverse=True)
        if len(es) >= 2:
            return es[0]+es[1]+1
        else:
            return es[0]+1

#include <vector>
#include <algorithm>

class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(std::vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 2) return n;

        int m = n - 1;
        std::vector<long long> diffs(m);
        for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) {
            diffs[i] = (long long)nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
        }

        
        std::vector<int> L(m);
        L[0] = 1;
        for (int i = 1; i < m; ++i) {
            L[i] = (diffs[i] == diffs[i - 1]) ? L[i - 1] + 1 : 1;
        }

        
        std::vector<int> R(m);
        R[m - 1] = 1;
        for (int i = m - 2; i >= 0; --i) {
            R[i] = (diffs[i] == diffs[i + 1]) ? R[i + 1] + 1 : 1;
        }

        int result = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) {
            result = std::max(result, L[i] + 2);
        }

        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; ++i) {
            long long combined = (long long)nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1];
            
            
            if (combined % 2 == 0) {
                long long target_d = combined / 2;
                int current_length = 3;
                
                                if (i - 2 >= 0 && diffs[i - 2] == target_d) {
                    current_length += L[i - 2];
                }
                
                                if (i + 1 < m && diffs[i + 1] == target_d) {
                    current_length += R[i + 1];
                }
                
                result = std::max(result, current_length);
            }
        }

        
        return std::min(result, n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using namespace std;

class Solution {
    struct GroupTracker {
        vector<int> link;
        vector<int> magnitude;
        
        GroupTracker(int n) {
            link.resize(n);
            magnitude.assign(n, 1);
            for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) link[i] = i;
        }
        
        int locate(int i) {
            if (link[i] == i) return i;
            return link[i] = locate(link[i]);
        }
        
        void merge(int i, int j) {
            int root_i = locate(i);
            int root_j = locate(j);
            if (root_i != root_j) {
                if (magnitude[root_i] < magnitude[root_j]) swap(root_i, root_j);
                link[root_j] = root_i;
                magnitude[root_i] += magnitude[root_j];
            }
        }
    };

public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        if (n == 0) return 1;

        GroupTracker tracker(n);
        unordered_map<int, int> x_history, y_history;

        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];

            if (x_history.count(x)) {
                tracker.merge(i, x_history[x]);
            } else {
                x_history[x] = i;
            }

            if (y_history.count(y)) {
                tracker.merge(i, y_history[y]);
            } else {
                y_history[y] = i;
            }
        }

        vector<int> cluster_sizes;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            if (tracker.link[i] == i) {
                cluster_sizes.push_back(tracker.magnitude[i]);
            }
        }

        sort(cluster_sizes.begin(), cluster_sizes.end(), greater<int>());

        int result = 1 + cluster_sizes[0];
        if (cluster_sizes.size() > 1) {
            result += cluster_sizes[1];
        }

        return result;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 2)
            return n;
        vector<long long> d;
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) {
            d.push_back((long long)nums[i + 1] - nums[i]);
        }

        int m = d.size();
        vector<int> l(m, 1);
        for (int i = 1; i < m; i++) {
            if (d[i] == d[i - 1])
                l[i] = l[i - 1] + 1;
        }

        vector<int> r(m, 1);
        for (int i = m - 2; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (d[i] == d[i + 1])
                r[i] = r[i + 1] + 1;
        }

        int ans = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) {
            ans = max(ans, min(n, l[i] + 2));
        }

        for (int i = 0; i < m - 1; i++) {
            if ((d[i] + d[i + 1]) % 2 == 0) {
                long long dif = (d[i] + d[i + 1]) / 2;
                int c = 2;

                if (i - 1 >= 0 && d[i - 1] == dif)
                    c += l[i - 1];

                if (i + 2 < m && d[i + 2] == dif)
                    c += r[i + 2];

                ans = max(ans, c + 1);
            }
        }

        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU {
public:
    vector<int> parent;
    vector<int> sz;
    DSU(int n) {
        parent.resize(n);
        iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0);
        sz.assign(n, 1);
    }
    int find(int x) {
        if (parent[x] == x)
            return x;
        return parent[x] = find(parent[x]);
    }
    void Union(int x, int y) {
        int parX = find(x);
        int parY = find(y);
        if (parX != parY) {
            if (sz[parX] < sz[parY])
                swap(parX, parY);
            parent[parY] = parX;
            sz[parX] += sz[parY];
        }
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        if (n == 0)
            return 1;

        DSU dsu(n);
        unordered_map<int, int> lx, ly;

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];

            if (lx.count(x))
                dsu.Union(i, lx[x]);
            if (ly.count(y))
                dsu.Union(i, ly[y]);

            lx[x] = i;
            ly[y] = i;
        }

        vector<int> sz;

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (dsu.parent[i] == i) {
                sz.push_back(dsu.sz[i]);
            }
        }

        sort(sz.begin(), sz.end(), greater<int>());

        int ans = sz[0] + 1;
        if (sz.size() > 1) {
            ans += sz[1];
        }

        return ans;
    }
};

[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        if (n <= 2) return n;

        int[] left = new int[n];
        int[] right = new int[n];

        left[0] = 1;
        left[1] = 2;

        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            if (nums[i] - nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2])
                left[i] = left[i-1] + 1;
            else
                left[i] = 2;
        }

        right[n-1] = 1;
        right[n-2] = 2;

        for (int i = n-3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (nums[i+1] - nums[i] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1])
                right[i] = right[i+1] + 1;
            else
                right[i] = 2;
        }

        int ans = 2;

        for (int i = 1; i < n-1; i++) {

            ans = Math.max(ans, left[i] + 1);
            ans = Math.max(ans, right[i] + 1);

            if ((nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) % 2 == 0) {
                int d = (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) / 2;

                int l = 1;
                if (i >= 2 && nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == d)
                    l = left[i-1];

                int r = 1;
                if (i + 2 < n && nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == d)
                    r = right[i+1];

                ans = Math.max(ans, l + r + 1);
            }
        }

        return ans;
    }
}

import java.util.*;

class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        Map<Integer, List<Integer>> adj = new HashMap<>();
        
        
        for (int[] p : points) {
            int x = p[0];
            int y = p[1];
            
        }

        
        DSU dsu = new DSU();
        Map<Integer, Integer> xToId = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Integer> yToId = new HashMap<>();
        
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];
            
            if (!xToId.containsKey(x)) xToId.put(x, xToId.size());
            if (!yToId.containsKey(y)) yToId.put(y, yToId.size() + 200005); 
            
            dsu.union(xToId.get(x), yToId.get(y), true);
        }

        Map<Integer, Integer> componentSize = new HashMap<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int root = dsu.find(xToId.get(points[i][0]));
            componentSize.put(root, componentSize.getOrDefault(root, 0) + 1);
        }

        List<Integer> sizes = new ArrayList<>(componentSize.values());
        Collections.sort(sizes, Collections.reverseOrder());

        if (sizes.size() == 1) {
            return sizes.get(0) + 1;
        }

        
        return sizes.get(0) + sizes.get(1) + 1;
    }

    class DSU {
        Map<Integer, Integer> parent = new HashMap<>();
        
        int find(int i) {
            if (!parent.containsKey(i)) parent.put(i, i);
            if (parent.get(i) == i) return i;
            parent.put(i, find(parent.get(i)));
            return parent.get(i);
        }

        void union(int i, int j, boolean isPoint) {
            int rootI = find(i);
            int rootJ = find(j);
            if (rootI != rootJ) {
                parent.put(rootI, rootJ);
            }
        }
    }
}

[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        if(n<=3) return n;
        int maxLen = 0;
        maxLen = Math.max(maxLen, meth(nums));
        rotate(nums);
        maxLen = Math.max(maxLen, meth(nums));
        return maxLen;
    }
    private int meth(int[] nums){
        int n = nums.length;
        int ans = Math.min(n,2);
        int i=0;
        while(i<n-1){
            int j=i+1;
            int diff = nums[j]-nums[i];
            while(j<n && nums[j]-nums[j-1] == diff) j++;
            int currLen = j-i;
            if(j<n){
                ans = Math.max(ans, currLen+1);
                if(j+1<n && nums[j+1]-nums[j-1]==2*diff){
                    int k=j+1;
                    while(k+1 < n&& nums[k+1]-nums[k]==diff) k++;
                    ans = Math.max(ans, k-i+1);
                }
            }else{
                ans=Math.max(ans, currLen);
            }
            i=j-1;
        }
        return ans;
    }
    private void rotate(int[] nums){
        int i=0;
        int j=nums.length-1;
        while(i<j){
            int temp = nums[i];
            nums[i] = nums[j];
            nums[j] = temp;
            i++;
            j--;
        }
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int totalPoints = points.length;
        if(totalPoints == 0) return 1;
        int[] gL = new int[totalPoints];
        int[] gS = new int[totalPoints];
        for(int i=0 ; i<totalPoints;i++){
            gL[i] = i;
            gS[i] = 1;
        }
        Map<Integer,Integer> xMap = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer,Integer> yMap = new HashMap<>();
        for(int i=0;i<totalPoints;i++){
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];
            if(xMap.containsKey(x)) combineGroups(i,xMap.get(x),gL,gS);
            else xMap.put(x,i);
            if(yMap.containsKey(y)) combineGroups(i,yMap.get(y),gL,gS);
            else yMap.put(y,i);
            
        }   
        List<Integer> list = new ArrayList<>();
            for(int i=0;i<totalPoints;i++){
                if(gL[i] == i){
                    list.add(gS[i]);
                }
            }
            list.sort(Collections.reverseOrder());
            if(list.size() == 1) return list.get(0)+1;
            return list.get(0)+list.get(1)+1;
    }
    private int find(int point, int[]gL){
            if(gL[point] == point) return point;
            return gL[point] = find(gL[point],gL);
        }

    private void combineGroups(int point1, int point2, int[]gL, int[] gS){
            int l1 = find(point1,gL);
            int l2 = find(point2,gL);
            if(l1 != l2){
                gL[l1] = l2;
                gS[l2] += gS[l1];
            }
        }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 294 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n=nums.size(),ans=0;
        vector<int>dp(n-1),l(n-1,1),r(n-1,1);
        for(int i=0;i<n-1;i++) dp[i]=nums[i+1]-nums[i];
        for(int i=1;i<n-1;i++) if(dp[i]==dp[i-1]) l[i]=l[i-1]+1;
        for(int i=n-3;i>=0;i--) if(dp[i]==dp[i+1]) r[i]=r[i+1]+1;
        for(int i=0;i<n-1;i++) ans=max(ans,l[i]+2);
        for(int k=1;k<n-1;k++){
            int sum=dp[k-1]+dp[k],len;
            if(k>=2 && sum==2*dp[k-2]){
                len=l[k-2]+2;
                if(k+1<n-1 && dp[k+1]==dp[k-2]) len+=r[k+1];
                ans=max(ans,len+1);
            }
            if(k+1<n-1 && sum==2*dp[k+1]){
                len=r[k+1]+2;
                if(k>=2 && dp[k-2]==dp[k+1]) len+=l[k-2];
                ans=max(ans,len+1);
            }
        }
        return min(ans,n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    vector<int> par,size;
    int find(int i){
        if(par[i]==i) return i;
        return par[i]=find(par[i]);
    }
    void comb(int i,int j){
        int ri=find(i),rj=find(j);
        if(ri!=rj){
            if(size[ri]<size[rj]) swap(ri,rj);
            par[rj]=ri;
            size[ri]+=size[rj];
        }
    }
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n=points.size();
        unordered_map<int,int> mpp1,mpp2;
        vector<int> csize;
        par.assign(n,0);
        size.assign(n,1);
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) par[i]=i;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            int x=points[i][0],y=points[i][1];
            if(mpp1.count(x)) comb(i,mpp1[x]);
            else mpp1[x]=i;
            if(mpp2.count(y)) comb(i,mpp2[y]);
            else mpp2[y]=i;
        }
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) if(par[i]==i) csize.push_back(size[i]);
        sort(csize.begin(),csize.end(),greater<int>());
        if(csize.size()>=2) return csize[0]+csize[1]+1;
        return csize[0]+1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 298 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if(n<=2) return n;

        vector<int> r(n), l(n);

        r[0] = 1; r[1]=2;
        for(int i=2; i<n; i++){
            r[i] = ((long long)nums[i] - nums[i-1] == (long long)nums[i-1]-nums[i-2])? r[i-1]+1:2;
        }

        l[n-1] = 1; l[n-2] = 2;
            for (int i = n-3; i >= 0; i--){
            l[i] = ((long long)nums[i+1]-nums[i] == (long long)nums[i+2]-nums[i+1])? l[i+1]+1:2;
            }

            int ans = 2;

            for (int i = 0; i+1 < n; i++) {
            long long d = (long long)nums[i+1] - nums[i];
            int L = (i >= 1 && (long long)nums[i]-nums[i-1] == d) ? r[i] : 1;
            int R = (i+2 < n && (long long)nums[i+2]-nums[i+1] == d) ? l[i+1] : 1;
            ans = max(ans, min(n, L + R + 1));
        }

            for (int i = 0; i+2 < n; i++) {
            long long gap = (long long)nums[i+2] - nums[i];
            if (gap % 2 != 0) continue;
            long long d = gap / 2;
            int L = (i >= 1 && (long long)nums[i]-nums[i-1] == d) ? r[i] : 1;
            int R = (i+3 < n && (long long)nums[i+3]-nums[i+2] == d) ? l[i+2] : 1;
            ans = max(ans, min(n, L + 1 + R));
        }

            return ans;
    
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        
        vector<int> parent(n), sz(n, 1);
        iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0);
        
        function<int(int)> find = [&](int x) {
            return parent[x] == x ? x : parent[x] = find(parent[x]);
        };
        auto unite = [&](int a, int b) {
            a = find(a); b = find(b);
            if (a == b) return;
            if (sz[a] < sz[b]) swap(a, b);
            parent[b] = a;
            sz[a] += sz[b];
        };
        
        map<int, vector<int>> byX, byY;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            byX[points[i][0]].push_back(i);
            byY[points[i][1]].push_back(i);
        }
        
        for (auto& [_, v] : byX)
            for (int i = 1; i < (int)v.size(); i++) unite(v[0], v[i]);
        for (auto& [_, v] : byY)
            for (int i = 1; i < (int)v.size(); i++) unite(v[0], v[i]);
        
        map<int, int> xComp, yComp;
        for (auto& [x, v] : byX) xComp[x] = find(v[0]);
        for (auto& [y, v] : byY) yComp[y] = find(v[0]);
        
        map<int, int> compSz;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) compSz[find(i)] = sz[find(i)];
        
        int ans = 1;
        
        for (auto& [x, r] : xComp) ans = max(ans, compSz[r] + 1);
        for (auto& [y, r] : yComp) ans = max(ans, compSz[r] + 1);
        
        vector<pair<int,int>> xList, yList; 
        for (auto& [x, r] : xComp) xList.push_back({r, compSz[r]});
        for (auto& [y, r] : yComp) yList.push_back({r, compSz[r]});
        
        auto getTop2 = [](vector<pair<int,int>>& v) {
            sort(v.begin(), v.end(), [](auto& a, auto& b){ return a.second > b.second; });
            vector<pair<int,int>> res;
            set<int> seen;
            for (auto& [r, s] : v) {
                if (!seen.count(r)) { seen.insert(r); res.push_back({r, s}); }
                if (res.size() == 2) break;
            }
            return res;
        };
        
        auto topX = getTop2(xList);
        auto topY = getTop2(yList);
        
        for (auto& [rx, sx] : topX) {
            for (auto& [ry, sy] : topY) {
                if (rx != ry)
                    ans = max(ans, sx + sy + 1);
                else
                    ans = max(ans, sx + 1);
            }
        }
        
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 299 ###
[Q3_START]
from typing import List

class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 2:
            return n

        diff = [nums[i + 1] - nums[i] for i in range(n - 1)]
        m = n - 1

        # left[i] = length of equal-diff run ending at i
        left = [1] * m
        for i in range(1, m):
            if diff[i] == diff[i - 1]:
                left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1

        # right[i] = length of equal-diff run starting at i
        right = [1] * m
        for i in range(m - 2, -1, -1):
            if diff[i] == diff[i + 1]:
                right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1

        ans = 2

        # Case 1: no change, or change one endpoint of the chosen subarray.
        # Scan runs of equal differences.
        i = 0
        while i < m:
            j = i
            while j + 1 < m and diff[j + 1] == diff[i]:
                j += 1

            run_len = j - i + 1          # number of diffs
            ans = max(ans, run_len + 1)  # already arithmetic

            # Can extend this run by one element from left or right
            # by changing one endpoint of the chosen subarray.
            if i > 0 or j < m - 1:
                ans = max(ans, run_len + 2)

            i = j + 1

        # Case 2: change an internal element nums[k].
        # Then both adjacent diffs must become:
        # t = (nums[k+1] - nums[k-1]) / 2
        for k in range(1, n - 1):
            gap = nums[k + 1] - nums[k - 1]
            if gap % 2 != 0:
                continue

            t = gap // 2

            left_len = 0
            if k - 2 >= 0 and diff[k - 2] == t:
                left_len = left[k - 2]

            right_len = 0
            if k + 1 < m and diff[k + 1] == t:
                right_len = right[k + 1]

            # left run + two fixed diffs around k + right run
            ans = max(ans, left_len + 2 + right_len + 1)

        return min(ans, n)
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
from typing import List

class DSU:
    def __init__(self, n: int):
        self.parent = list(range(n))
        self.size = [1] * n

    def find(self, x: int) -> int:
        while self.parent[x] != x:
            self.parent[x] = self.parent[self.parent[x]]
            x = self.parent[x]
        return x

    def union(self, a: int, b: int) -> None:
        ra = self.find(a)
        rb = self.find(b)
        if ra == rb:
            return
        if self.size[ra] < self.size[rb]:
            ra, rb = rb, ra
        self.parent[rb] = ra
        self.size[ra] += self.size[rb]


class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: List[List[int]]) -> int:
        x_id = {}
        y_id = {}

        # Give x-values and y-values separate namespaces.
        for x, y in points:
            if x not in x_id:
                x_id[x] = len(x_id)
            if y not in y_id:
                y_id[y] = len(y_id)

        nx = len(x_id)
        ny = len(y_id)
        dsu = DSU(nx + ny)

        # Union endpoints of every existing point.
        for x, y in points:
            dsu.union(x_id[x], nx + y_id[y])

        # Count how many original edges (points) belong to each component.
        edge_count = {}
        for x, y in points:
            root = dsu.find(x_id[x])   # same as root of nx + y_id[y]
            edge_count[root] = edge_count.get(root, 0) + 1

        best1 = 0
        best2 = 0
        for cnt in edge_count.values():
            if cnt > best1:
                best2 = best1
                best1 = cnt
            elif cnt > best2:
                best2 = cnt

        return best1 + best2 + 1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 300 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        sz = len(nums)
        rdp = [0]*sz
        ldp = [0]*sz
        ldp[0] = 1
        ldp[1] = 2
        rdp[sz-1] = 1
        rdp[sz-2] = 2
        res = 2
        for i in range(2, sz):
            if nums[i]-nums[i-1] == nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]:
                ldp[i] = ldp[i-1]+1
            else:
                ldp[i] = 2
            res = max(res, ldp[i])
        for i in range(sz-3, -1, -1):
            if nums[i+1]-nums[i] == nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]:
                rdp[i] = rdp[i+1]+1
            else:
                rdp[i] = 2
        for i in range(1, sz-1):
            res = max(res, ldp[i-1]+1)
            res = max(res, rdp[i+1]+1)
            if (nums[i+1]-nums[i-1])%2==0:
                diff = (nums[i+1]-nums[i-1])//2
                j = 1
                k = 1
                if i >= 2 and nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]==diff:
                    j = ldp[i-1]
                if i+2 < sz and nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]==diff:
                    k = rdp[i+1]
                res = max(res, j+k+1)
        res = max(res, rdp[1]+1)
        res = max(res, ldp[sz-2]+1)
        return res
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        sz = len(points)
        par = list(range(sz))
        rank = [1]*sz
        def find(n):
            if par[n]==n:
                return n
            par[n] = find(par[n])
            return par[n]
        def union(i, j):
            x = find(i)
            y = find(j)
            if x != y:
                if rank[x] < rank[y]:
                    x, y = y, x
                par[y] = x
                rank[x] += rank[y]
        d1 = {}
        d2 = {}
        for idx, (x, y) in enumerate(points):
            if x in d1:
                union(idx, d1[x])
            else:
                d1[x] = idx
            if y in d2:
                union(idx, d2[y])
            else:
                d2[y] = idx
        sizes = []
        for i in range(sz):
            if par[i] == i:
                sizes.append(rank[i])
        if len(sizes)==1:
            return 1+sizes[0]
        sizes.sort()
        return 1+sizes[-1]+sizes[-2]
[Q4_END]

### RANK 301 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& a) {
        int n = a.size();

        vector<int> diff(n - 1);
        vector<int> l(n, 1);
        vector<int> r(n, 1);
        for(int i = 0;i < n - 1;i++){
            diff[i] = a[i + 1] - a[i];
        }

        int maxi = 1;

        for(int i = 1;i < n - 1;i++){
            if(diff[i] == diff[i - 1]) l[i] = l[i - 1] + 1;
            maxi = max(maxi, l[i]);
        }
        for(int i = n - 3;i >= 0;i--){
            if(diff[i] == diff[i + 1]) r[i] = r[i + 1] + 1;
        }

        int ans = min(n, maxi + 2);

        for(int i = 1;i < n - 1;i++){
            int temp = a[i + 1] - a[i - 1];

            if(!(temp & 1)){
                temp >>= 1;
                int temp2 = 0;
                if(i > 1 && diff[i - 2] == temp) temp2 += l[i - 2];
                if(i < n - 2 && diff[i + 1] == temp) temp2 += r[i + 1];
                ans = max(ans, temp2 + 3);
            }
        }

        
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& a) {
        int n = a.size();
        map<int, vector<int>> x;
        map<int, vector<int>> y;

        for(int i = 0;i < n;i++){
            x[a[i][0]].push_back(i);
            y[a[i][1]].push_back(i);
        }

        vector<bool> vis(n, false);
        int maxi1 = 0;
        int maxi2 = 0;

        for(int i = 0;i < n;i++){
            if(!vis[i]){
                queue<int> q;
                int count = 0;

                q.push(i);
                vis[i] = true;

                while(!q.empty()){
                    int u = q.front();
                    q.pop();
                    count++;


                    if(x.count(a[u][0])){
                        for(int j:x[a[u][0]]){
                            if(!vis[j]){
                                q.push(j);
                                vis[j] = true;
                            }
                        }

                        x.erase(a[u][0]);
                        
                    }

                    if(y.count(a[u][1])){
                        for(int j:y[a[u][1]]){
                            if(!vis[j]){
                                q.push(j);
                                vis[j] = true;
                            }
                        }
                        y.erase(a[u][1]);
                    }
                }

                if(count > maxi1){
                    maxi2 = maxi1;
                    maxi1 = count;
                }else if(count > maxi2){
                    maxi2 = count;
                }
            }
        }


        return maxi1 + maxi2 + 1;
        
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 302 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {

  public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
    int n = nums.length;
    if (n == 2) {
      return 2;
    }
    int max = 2, len = 2;
    for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
      len = (nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]) ? len + 1 : 2;
      max = Math.max(max, len);
    }
    int[] rl = new int[n];
    int[] rr = new int[n];
    rl[0] = 1;
    rl[1] = 2;
    for (int i = 2; i < n; i++)
      rl[i] = (nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]) ? rl[i - 1] + 1 : 2;
    rr[n - 1] = 1;
    rr[n - 2] = 2;
    for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--)
      rr[i] = (nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]) ? rr[i + 1] + 1 : 2;
    for (int k = 1; k < n; k++)
      max = Math.max(max, rl[k - 1] + 1);
    for (int k = 0; k < n - 1; k++)
      max = Math.max(max, rr[k + 1] + 1);
    int m = n - 1;
    int[] df = new int[m], de = new int[m], ds = new int[m];
    for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) df[i] = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
    de[0] = 1;
    for (int i = 1; i < m; i++)
      de[i] = (df[i] == df[i - 1]) ? de[i - 1] + 1 : 1;
    ds[m - 1] = 1;
    for (int i = m - 2; i >= 0; i--)
      ds[i] = (df[i] == df[i + 1]) ? ds[i + 1] + 1 : 1;
    for (int k = 1; k < n - 1; k++) {
      int x = nums[k + 1] - nums[k - 1];
      if (x % 2 != 0) continue;
      int d = x / 2;
      int l = (k >= 2 && df[k - 2] == d) ? de[k - 2] : 0;
      int r = (k + 1 < m && df[k + 1] == d) ? ds[k + 1] : 0;
      max = Math.max(max, l + r + 3);
    }
    int d = nums[2] - nums[1], j = 2;
    while (j < n && nums[j] - nums[j - 1] == d){
      ++j;
    }
    max = Math.max(max, j);
    d = nums[n - 2] - nums[n - 3];
    j = n - 3;
    while (j > 0 && nums[j] - nums[j - 1] == d){
      --j;
    }
    max = Math.max(max, n - j);
    return max;
  }


}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {


  public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
    int n = points.length;
    if (n == 0) return 1;
    Map<Integer, Integer> xMap = new HashMap<>(), yMap = new HashMap<>();
    for (int[] p : points) {
      xMap.putIfAbsent(p[0], xMap.size());
      yMap.putIfAbsent(p[1], yMap.size());
    }
    int xn = xMap.size();
    int yn = yMap.size();
    int[] uf = new int[xn + yn];
    for (int i = 0; i < xn + yn; i++){
      uf[i] = i;
    }
    for (int[] p : points) {
      int a = xMap.get(p[0]);
      int b = xn + yMap.get(p[1]);
      int ra = f(uf, a), rb = f(uf, b);
      if (ra != rb){
        uf[ra] = rb;
      }
    }
    int[] sz = new int[xn + yn];
    for (int[] p : points){
      ++sz[f(uf, xMap.get(p[0]))];
    }
    int ma = 0;
    int mb = 0;
    for (int s : sz) {
      if (s > ma) { 
        mb = ma; ma = s; }
      else if (s > mb) {
        mb = s;
      }
    }
    return Math.max(ma + 1, ma + mb + 1);
  }

  private int f(int[] ar, int i) {
    int res = i;
    while (ar[res] != res) {
      res = ar[res];
    }
    while (ar[i] != i) {
      int j = ar[i];
      ar[i] = res;
      i = j;
    }
    return res;
  }


}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 303 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& ss_nums) {
        int ss_n = ss_nums.size();
        if(ss_n <= 3) return ss_n;

        int ss_maxLen = 3;

        // arithmetic length ending at i
        vector<int> ss_L(ss_n);
        ss_L[0] = 1;
        ss_L[1] = 2;

        for(int ss_i = 2; ss_i < ss_n; ss_i++){
            if(ss_nums[ss_i] - ss_nums[ss_i-1] == ss_nums[ss_i-1] - ss_nums[ss_i-2])
                ss_L[ss_i] = ss_L[ss_i-1] + 1;
            else
                ss_L[ss_i] = 2;

            ss_maxLen = max(ss_maxLen, min(ss_n, ss_L[ss_i] + 1));
        }

        // arithmetic length starting at i
        vector<int> ss_R(ss_n);
        ss_R[ss_n-1] = 1;
        ss_R[ss_n-2] = 2;

        for(int ss_i = ss_n-3; ss_i >= 0; ss_i--){
            if(ss_nums[ss_i+1] - ss_nums[ss_i] == ss_nums[ss_i+2] - ss_nums[ss_i+1])
                ss_R[ss_i] = ss_R[ss_i+1] + 1;
            else
                ss_R[ss_i] = 2;

            ss_maxLen = max(ss_maxLen, min(ss_n, ss_R[ss_i] + 1));
        }

        // try changing one element
        for(int ss_i = 1; ss_i < ss_n-1; ss_i++){

            if((ss_nums[ss_i+1] - ss_nums[ss_i-1]) % 2 == 0){

                int ss_targetD = (ss_nums[ss_i+1] - ss_nums[ss_i-1]) / 2;

                int ss_left = 1;
                if(ss_i >= 2 && ss_nums[ss_i-1] - ss_nums[ss_i-2] == ss_targetD)
                    ss_left = ss_L[ss_i-1];

                int ss_right = 1;
                if(ss_i <= ss_n-3 && ss_nums[ss_i+2] - ss_nums[ss_i+1] == ss_targetD)
                    ss_right = ss_R[ss_i+1];

                ss_maxLen = max(ss_maxLen, ss_left + ss_right + 1);
            }
        }

        return min(ss_maxLen, ss_n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
#include <vector>
#include <unordered_map>
#include <algorithm>

using namespace std;

class Solution {
private:
    struct sunita_UnionFind {
        unordered_map<long long, long long> sunita_nodes;

        long long sunita_locate(long long sunita_val) {
            if (sunita_nodes.find(sunita_val) == sunita_nodes.end()) {
                return sunita_nodes[sunita_val] = sunita_val;
            }
            if (sunita_nodes[sunita_val] == sunita_val) {
                return sunita_val;
            }
            return sunita_nodes[sunita_val] = sunita_locate(sunita_nodes[sunita_val]);
        }

        void sunita_combine(long long sunita_a, long long sunita_b) {
            long long sunita_ra = sunita_locate(sunita_a);
            long long sunita_rb = sunita_locate(sunita_b);
            if (sunita_ra != sunita_rb) {
                sunita_nodes[sunita_ra] = sunita_rb;
            }
        }
    };

public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        if (points.empty()) return 1;

        sunita_UnionFind sunita_dsu;
        const long long sunita_gap = 4000000000LL;

        for (const auto& sunita_item : points) {
            sunita_dsu.sunita_combine((long long)sunita_item[0], (long long)sunita_item[1] + sunita_gap);
        }

        unordered_map<long long, int> sunita_map;
        for (const auto& sunita_item : points) {
            long long sunita_root_node = sunita_dsu.sunita_locate((long long)sunita_item[0]);
            sunita_map[sunita_root_node]++;
        }

        vector<int> sunita_list;
        for (auto sunita_ptr = sunita_map.begin(); sunita_ptr != sunita_map.end(); ++sunita_ptr) {
            sunita_list.push_back(sunita_ptr->second);
        }

        sort(sunita_list.begin(), sunita_list.end(), greater<int>());

        if (sunita_list.size() >= 2) {
            return sunita_list[0] + sunita_list[1] + 1;
        } 
        
        return sunita_list[0] + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]
