### RANK 304 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int l = 0;
        int n = nums.length;
        int [] d = new int[n - 1];
        for(int i = 0;i < n - 1;i++) d[i] = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
        int [] p = new int[n - 1];
        int [] s = new int[n - 1];
        p[0] = 1;
        for(int i = 1;i < n - 1;i++) {
            if(d[i] == d[i - 1]) p[i] = p[i - 1] + 1;
            else p[i] = 1;
        }
        s[n - 2] = 1;
        for(int i = n - 3;i >= 0;i--) {
            if(d[i] == d[i + 1]) s[i] = s[i + 1] + 1;
            else s[i] = 1;
        }
        int ans = 0;
        for(int i = 0;i < n - 1;i++) {
            ans = Math.max(ans , p[i]);
            if(i < n - 2) ans = Math.max(ans , p[i] + 1);
            if(i - p[i] + 1 > 0) ans = Math.max(ans , p[i] + 1);
        }
        for(int i = 0;i < n - 2;i++) {
            int x = d[i] + d[i + 1];
            if((x & 1) == 0) {
                x /= 2;
                int curr = 2;
                if(i > 0 && d[i - 1] == x) curr += p[i - 1];
                if(i + 2 < n - 1 && d[i + 2] == x) curr += s[i + 2];
                // System.out.println(curr);
                ans = Math.max(ans , curr);

            }
        }
        return ans + 1;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    Map<Integer , Integer> mapX;
    Map<Integer , Integer> mapY;
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        mapX = new HashMap<>();
        mapY = new HashMap<>();
        int xInd = 0;int yInd = 0;
        HashSet<Integer> xset = new HashSet<>();
        HashSet<Integer> yset = new HashSet<>();
        for(int [] x : points) {
            if(mapX.containsKey(x[0]) == false)
            mapX.put(x[0] , xInd++);
            if(mapY.containsKey(x[1]) == false)
            mapY.put(x[1] , yInd++);
            xset.add(x[0]);
            yset.add(x[1]);
        }
        int xsize = xset.size();
        int ysize = yset.size();
        UnionFind uf = new UnionFind(xsize + ysize + 1);
        for(int [] x : points) {
            int a = mapX.get(x[0]);
            int b = mapY.get(x[1]) + xsize;
            uf.union(a , b);
        }
        List<Integer> list = new ArrayList<>();
        for(int i = 0;i < xsize + ysize;i++) {
            int parent = uf.find(i);
            if(i == parent) {
                list.add(uf.e[i]);
            }
        }
        Collections.sort(list);
        if(list.size() == 1) return list.get(list.size() - 1) + 1;
        return list.get(list.size() - 1) + list.get(list.size() - 2) + 1;
        // I need to find the optimal x and y that covers the most point
    }
    class UnionFind {
        int[] parent;
        int[] sz;
        int [] e;

        public UnionFind(int n) {
            parent = new int[n];
            e = new int[n];
            sz = new int[n];
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
                parent[i] = i;
                sz[i] = 1;
            }
        }

        public void clear() {
            for (int i = 0; i < parent.length; i++) {
                parent[i] = i;
                sz[i] = 1;
            }
        }

        public int find(int x) {
            if (parent[x] == x)
                return x;
            int px = x;
            while (px != parent[px])
                px = parent[px];
            while (x != px) {
                int next = parent[x];
                parent[x] = px;
                x = next;
            }
            return px;
        }

        public void union(int x, int y) {
            int px = find(x);
            int py = find(y);
            if (px == py){
                e[px]++;
                
            }
            else {
                parent[py] = px;
                e[px] += e[py] + 1;
            }
        }

        public int size(int x) {
            return sz[find(x)];
        }
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 305 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        if(n < 3) return n;
        
        int[] left = new int[n], right = new int[n];
        left[0] = right[n - 1] = 1;
        left[1] = right[n - 2] = 2;
        
        for(int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            if(nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]) left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1;
            else left[i] = 2;
        }
        for(int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if(nums[i] - nums[i + 1] == nums[i + 1] - nums[i + 2]) right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1;
            else right[i] = 2;
        }
        int ans = Math.min(Math.max(right[1] + 1, left[n - 2] + 1), n);
        for(int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++) {
            if((nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) % 2 == 0) {
                int diff = (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) / 2;
                int l = i >= 2 && nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == diff ? left[i - 1] : 1;
                int r = i < n - 2 && nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == diff ? right[i + 1] : 1;
                ans = Math.max(ans, l + r + 1);
            }
            ans = Math.max(ans, Math.max(left[i - 1] + 1, right[i + 1] + 1));
        }
        return ans;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        DSU dsu = new DSU(n);
        Map<Integer, Integer> prevX = new HashMap<>(), prevY = new HashMap<>();
        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0], y = points[i][1];
            
            if(prevX.containsKey(x)) dsu.union(i, prevX.get(x));
            else prevX.put(x, i);
            
            if(prevY.containsKey(y)) dsu.union(i, prevY.get(y));
            else prevY.put(y, i);
        }
        int max1 = 0, max2 = 0;
        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if(dsu.find(i) == i) {
                int size = dsu.getSize(i);
                if(size > max1) {
                    max2 = max1;
                    max1 = size;
                }else if(size > max2) max2 = size;
            }
        }
        return max1 + max2 + 1;
    }
}
class DSU {
    private final int[] root, rank;
    public DSU(int n) {
        this.root = new int[n];
        this.rank = new int[n];
        for(int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            this.root[i] = i;
            this.rank[i] = 1;
        }
    }
    public int find(int x) {
        if(root[x] == x) return x;
        return root[x] = find(root[x]);
    }
    public void union(int x, int y) {
        int rx = find(x), ry = find(y);
        if(rx == ry) return;
        if(rank[rx] > rank[ry]) {
            root[ry] = rx;
            rank[rx] += rank[ry];
        }else {
            root[rx] = ry;
            rank[ry] += rank[rx];
        }
    }
    public int getSize(int x) {
        return rank[x];
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 306 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        vector<int> left(n, 2), right(n, 2);
        left[0] = right.back() = 1;

        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            if (nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]) {
                left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1;
            }
        }

        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]) {
                right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1;
            }
        }

        int res = max(2, *max_element(left.begin(), left.end()));
        res = max(res, left[n - 2] + 1);
        res = max(res, right[1] + 1);
        
        for (int i = 1; i + 1 < n; i++) {
            res = max(res, left[i - 1] + 1);
            res = max(res, right[i + 1] + 1);

            long long gap = 1LL * nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1];
            if (gap % 2) continue;

            long long d = gap / 2;
            int l = 1, r = 1;
            if (i >= 2 && 1LL * nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == d) l = left[i - 1];
            if (i + 2 < n && 1LL * nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == d) r = right[i + 1];
            res = max(res, l + 1 + r);
        }
        return min(res, n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    struct DSU {
        vector<int> p;
        vector<int> sz;

        DSU(int n) : p(n), sz(n, 1) {
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) p[i] = i;
        }
    
        int find(int x) {
            if (p[x] == x) return x;
            p[x] = find(p[x]);
            return p[x];
        }
    
        void unite(int a, int b) {
            int x = find(a), y = find(b);
            if (x != y) {
                if (sz[y] < sz[x]) swap(x, y);
                p[x] = y;
                sz[b] += sz[a];
            }
        }
    };
    
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size(), cntx = 0, cnty = 0;
        unordered_map<int, int> xs, ys;
        for (auto& p : points) {
            int x = p[0], y = p[1];
            if (!xs.count(x)) xs[x] = cntx++;
            if (!ys.count(y)) ys[y] = cnty++;
        }

        DSU dsu(cntx + cnty);

        for (auto& p : points) {
            int x = p[0], y = p[1];
            dsu.unite(xs[x], cntx + ys[y]);
        }

        unordered_map<int, int> sizeCnt;
        for (auto& p : points) {
            int x = xs[p[0]];
            int pa = dsu.find(x);
            sizeCnt[pa]++;
        }

        vector<int> vs;
        for (auto& [_, v] : sizeCnt) vs.push_back(v);
        ranges::sort(vs, greater());
        if (vs.size() == 1) return n + 1;
        return vs[0] + vs[1] + 1;
        
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 307 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n=nums.size();
        vector<int> pre(n+1,0),suf(n+1,0);
        pre[1]=1,pre[2]=2;
        int ans=3;
        for(int i=3;i<=n;i++){
            int curDif=nums[i-1]-nums[i-2];
            int prevDif=nums[i-2]-nums[i-3];
            if(curDif==prevDif){
                pre[i]=pre[i-1]+1;
            }
            else{
                pre[i]=2;
            }
            ans=max(ans,pre[i]);
        }
        suf[n]=1,suf[n-1]=2;
        for(int i=n-2;i>=1;i--){
            int curDif=nums[i-1]-nums[i];
            int prevDif=nums[i]-nums[i+1];
            // cout<<i<<" "<<curDif<<" "<<prevDif<<"\n";
            if(curDif==prevDif){
                suf[i]=suf[i+1]+1;
            }
            else{
                suf[i]=2;
            }
            ans=max(ans,suf[i]);
        }
        for(int i=1;i<=n;i++){
            // cout<<pre[i]<<" "<<suf[i]<<"\n";
        }
        for(int i=3;i<n-1;i++){
            int prevDif=nums[i-2]-nums[i-3];
            int nextDif=-(nums[i]-nums[i+1]);
            if(prevDif==nextDif){
                if(nums[i]-nums[i-2]==2*prevDif){
                    ans=max(ans,pre[i-1]+suf[i+1]+1);
                }
            }
        }
        for(int i=3;i<n;i++){
            int prevDif=nums[i-2]-nums[i-3];
            // cout<<i<<" "<<prevDif<<"\n";
            if(nums[i]-nums[i-2]==2*prevDif){
                ans=max(ans,pre[i-1]+2);
            }
        }
        for(int i=n-2;i>1;i--){
            int nextDif=nums[i]-nums[i+1];
            if(nums[i-2]-nums[i]==2*nextDif){
                ans=max(ans,suf[i+1]+2);
            }
        }
        for(int i=1;i<=n;i++){
            if(i<n){
                ans=max(ans,pre[i]+1);
            }
            if(i>1){
                ans=max(ans,suf[i]+1);
            }
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
#define ll long long
#define vi vector<ll>

class DSU{
    ll n;
    vi a,s;
    public: 
        void init(ll N){
            n=N;
            a.resize(n+1),s.resize(n+1);
            for(ll i=1;i<=n;i++){
                a[i]=i;
                s[i]=1;
            }
        }
        ll root(ll i){
            return a[i]==i ? i : a[i]=root(a[i]);
        }
        void Union(ll i,ll j){
            ll roota=root(i),rootb=root(j);
            if(roota==rootb){
                return;
            }
            if(s[roota]<=s[rootb]){
                a[roota]=a[rootb];
                s[rootb]+=s[roota];
            }
            else{
                a[rootb]=a[roota];
                s[roota]+=s[rootb];
            }
       }
};
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n=points.size();
        map<int,vector<int>> x; // All index for a particular x
        map<int,vector<int>> y; // All index for a particular y
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            x[points[i][0]].push_back(i);
            y[points[i][1]].push_back(i);
        }
        map<ll,ll> visX,visY;
        DSU d;
        d.init(n);
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            int xc=points[i][0];
            int yc=points[i][1];
            if(visX[xc]==0){
                visX[xc]++;
                for(auto ind:x[xc]){
                    d.Union(i+1,ind+1);
                }
            }
            if(visY[yc]==0){
                visY[yc]++;
                for(auto ind:y[yc]){
                    d.Union(i+1,ind+1);
                }
            }
        }
        map<ll,ll> mp;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            mp[d.root(i+1)]++;
        }
        vector<int> ans;
        for(auto x:mp){
            ans.push_back(x.second);
        }
        sort(ans.rbegin(),ans.rend());
        if(ans.size()>1){
            ans[0]+=ans[1];
        }
        return ans[0]+1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 308 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n=nums.length;
        if(n<=3)
            return n;
        
        int m=n-1;
        long D[]=new long[m];
        for(int i=0;i<m;i++)
            D[i]=(long)nums[i+1]-nums[i];

        int left[]=new int[m];
        left[0]=1;
        int max=1;
        for(int i=1;i<m;i++)
        {
            if(D[i]==D[i-1])
                left[i]=left[i-1]+1;
            else
                left[i]=1;
            if(left[i]>max)
                max=left[i];
        }

        int right[]=new int[m];
        right[m-1]=1;
        for(int i=m-2;i>=0;i--)
        {
            if(D[i]==D[i+1])
                right[i]=right[i+1]+1;
            else
                right[i]=1;
        }

        int ans=Math.min(n,max+2);

        for(int i=0;i<m-1;i++)
        {
            long S=D[i]+D[i+1];
            if(S%2==0)
            {
                long d=S/2;
                int lLen=0;
                if(i-1>=0 && D[i-1]==d)
                    lLen=left[i-1];
                int rLen=0;
                if(i+2<m && D[i+2]==d)
                    rLen=right[i+2];
                int current=lLen+rLen+3;
                if(current>ans)
                    ans=current;
            }
        }
        return Math.min(n,ans);
        
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    int parent[];
    int size[];

    int find(int i)
    {
        if(parent[i]==i)
            return i;
        return parent[i]=find(parent[i]);
    }

    void union(int i,int j)
    {
        int rootI=find(i);
        int rootJ=find(j);
        if(rootI!=rootJ)
        {
            parent[rootI]=rootJ;
            size[rootJ]+=size[rootI];
        }
    }
    
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n=points.length;
        if(n==0)
            return 1;

        parent=new int[n];
        size=new int[n];
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++)
        {
            parent[i]=i;
            size[i]=1;
        }

        Map<Integer, Integer> xMap=new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Integer> yMap=new HashMap<>();

        for(int i=0;i<n;i++)
        {
            int x=points[i][0];
            int y=points[i][1];

            if(xMap.containsKey(x))
                union(i,xMap.get(x));
            else
                xMap.put(x,i);

            if(yMap.containsKey(y))
                union(i,yMap.get(y));
            else
                yMap.put(y,i);
        }

        int max1=0;
        int max2=0;

        for(int i=0;i<n;i++)
        {
            if(parent[i]==i)
            {
                int s=size[i];
                if(s>max1)
                {
                    max2=max1;
                    max1=s;
                }
                else if(s>max2)
                    max2=s;
            }
        }
        
        return max1+max2+1;
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 309 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 2:
            return n
        
        # L[i][d] is the number of ELEMENTS in an arithmetic 
        # sequence ending at i with difference d.
        L = [defaultdict(lambda: 1) for _ in range(n)]
        # R[i][d] is the number of ELEMENTS in an arithmetic 
        # sequence starting at i with difference d.
        R = [defaultdict(lambda: 1) for _ in range(n)]
        
        # We can always form a sequence of at least 2 by changing one element
        ans = 2
        
        # Build Prefix
        for i in range(1, n):
            d = nums[i] - nums[i-1]
            L[i][d] = L[i-1][d] + 1
            ans = max(ans, L[i][d])
            
        # Build Suffix
        for i in range(n - 2, -1, -1):
            d = nums[i+1] - nums[i]
            R[i][d] = R[i+1][d] + 1
            
        # Case 1: Extend an existing sequence by changing the neighbor
        for i in range(n):
            for d, length in L[i].items():
                # Change element at i+1 to extend the sequence ending at i
                if i + 1 < n:
                    ans = max(ans, length + 1)
            for d, length in R[i].items():
                # Change element at i-1 to extend the sequence starting at i
                if i - 1 >= 0:
                    ans = max(ans, length + 1)

        # Case 2: The Bridge (Change nums[i] to connect i-1 and i+1)
        for i in range(1, n - 1):
            diff_total = nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]
            if diff_total % 2 == 0:
                d = diff_total // 2
                # Bridge: Length at i-1 + the new i + Length at i+1
                left_len = L[i-1][d]
                right_len = R[i+1][d]
                ans = max(ans, left_len + 1 + right_len)
        
        return min(n, ans)
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU:
    def __init__(self):
        self.parent = {}
        self.size = {}

    def find(self, i):
        if i not in self.parent:
            self.parent[i] = i
            self.size[i] = 1
        if self.parent[i] == i:
            return i
        self.parent[i] = self.find(self.parent[i])
        return self.parent[i]

    def union(self, i, j):
        root_i = self.find(i)
        root_j = self.find(j)
        if root_i != root_j:
            if self.size[root_i] < self.size[root_j]:
                root_i, root_j = root_j, root_i
            self.parent[root_j] = root_i
            self.size[root_i] += self.size[root_j]

class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        if n == 0: return 1
        
        dsu = DSU()
        for x, y in points:
            # Distinguish X and Y namespaces to avoid overlap
            dsu.union(f"x{x}", f"y{y}")
            
        # Step 2: Calculate how many ACTUAL points are in each component
        # Note: DSU size counts coordinate nodes; we need point counts.
        comp_point_counts = {}
        x_to_root = {}
        y_to_root = {}
        
        for x, y in points:
            root = dsu.find(f"x{x}")
            comp_point_counts[root] = comp_point_counts.get(root, 0) + 1
            x_to_root[x] = root
            y_to_root[y] = root

        # Step 3: Optimization - Find top two largest components
        counts = sorted(comp_point_counts.values(), reverse=True)
        
        # Scenario A: The new point connects two DIFFERENT components.
        # This is always possible unless there's only 1 component.
        max_diff_comp = counts[0] + (counts[1] if len(counts) > 1 else 0) + 1
        
        # Scenario B: The new point connects to the SAME component via both x and y.
        # This is already covered by Scenario A since Scenario A is >= B.
        # However, we must ensure the "bridge" point is not already in the set.
        # The problem says we add a point "not already present," which is always possible.
        
        return max_diff_comp
[Q4_END]
##################

### RANK 310 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    # W493 @ 1h18m : 1m task + 0m idea + 18m code + 2m tests | TOTAL = 21 min
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)

        def calc(nums):
            next_dist = [None] * n
            for idx in range(n - 1):
                next_dist[idx] = nums[idx + 1] - nums[idx]
    
            dist = inf
            seq = [1] * n
            for idx in range(n - 1)[::-1]:
                if dist == next_dist[idx]:
                    seq[idx] = seq[idx + 1] + 1
                else:
                    dist = next_dist[idx]
                    seq[idx] = 2
    
            result = 0
            for idx in range(n):
                end = idx + seq[idx]
                max_len = end - idx
                if end == n:
                    # we're reaching the end
                    pass
                else:
                    # we have at least +1 more elements
                    max_len += 1
                    inc = next_dist[idx]
                    if end + 1 < n and nums[end - 1] + inc * 2 == nums[end + 1]:
                        # we have at least +2 sequence
                        # > +3 is possible if we have [? inc ? inc ?] inc2 ? inc3 [? inc ?]
                        max_len += 1 if inc != next_dist[end + 1] else seq[end + 1]
                result = max(max_len, result)
    
            return result
        
        return max(calc(nums), calc(nums[::-1]))
        

""" Ideas:
- example:
    9 7 5 10
    9 7 5 [3]
"""
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    # W493 @ 56m : 2m task + 0m idea + 5m code + 0m tests + 2m BUG | TOTAL = 9 min
    # Stats:        Xq in 1hXXm / X bugs / place XXX / XXk & ~XXX perf. points
    # Preliminary:  Xq in 1hXXm / X bugs / place XXX / XXk & ~XXX perf. points
    #      timing: Xm | Xm | Xm | Xm
    # Bans: clist total: xxx -> xxx (-xxx); AK: xxx -> xxx (-xxx); Q3/4: xxx -> xxx (-xxx)
    # 3q in 33 min / 1 bug / place 4347
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        
        uf = UnionFind(n)
        x_repr = {}
        y_repr = {}
        for idx, (x,y) in enumerate(points):
            if x in x_repr:
                uf.union(idx, uf.find(x_repr[x]))
            else:
                x_repr[x] = idx
                
            if y in y_repr:
                uf.union(idx, uf.find(y_repr[y]))
            else:
                y_repr[y] = idx

        clusters = []
        result = 0
        # for idx in range(x): # BUG-1: typo ...
        for idx in range(n):
            if idx == uf.find(idx):
                # we've got a new cluster
                clusters.append(uf.size[idx])

        return sum(nlargest(2, clusters)) + 1


""" Ideas:
- uf + group biggest 2 clusters
"""

class UnionFind:
    def __init__(self, size):
        self.parents = list(range(size))
        self.size = [1] * size

    def find(self, node):
        p = self.parents[node]
        if p != node:
            self.parents[node] = p = self.find(p)
        return p

    def union(self, a, b):
        if self.size[a] < self.size[b]:
            return self.union(b, a)
        # PA is the new parent
        pa, pb = self.find(a), self.find(b)
        if pa != pb:
            self.parents[pb] = pa
            self.size[pa] += self.size[pb]
            return True
        else:
            return False

[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n=nums.size();
        if(n<=3)return n;
        vector<int>l(n,1);
        for(int i=1;i<n;++i){
            if(i==1)l[i]=2;
            else if(nums[i]-nums[i-1]==nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]){
                l[i]=l[i-1]+1;
            }
            else{
                l[i]=2;
            }
        }
        vector<int>right(n,1);
        for(int i=n-2;i>=0;--i){
            if(i==n-2)right[i]=2;
            else if(nums[i+1]-nums[i]==nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]){
                right[i]=right[i+1]+1;
            }else{
                right[i]=2;
            }
        }
        int mx=INT_MIN;
        for(int i=0;i<n;++i){
            if(i>0)mx=max(mx,l[i-1]+1);
            if(i<n-1)mx=max(mx,right[i+1]+1);
            if(i>0&&i<n-1){
                int d=nums[i+1]-nums[i-1];
                if(d%2==0){
                    int dd=d/2;
                    int cb=1;
                    if(i>1&&nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]==dd)cb+=l[i-1];
                    else cb+=1;
                    if(i<n-2&&nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]==dd)cb+=right[i+1];
                    else cb+=1;
                    mx=max(mx,cb);
                }
            }
        }
        return min(mx,n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
using namespace std;
class DSU{
    public:
    vector<int>parent;
    vector<int>sz;
    DSU(int n){
        parent.resize(n);
        iota(parent.begin(),parent.end(),0);
        sz.assign(n,1);
    }
    int find(int i){
        if(parent[i]==i)return i;
        return parent[i]=find(parent[i]);
    }
    void unite(int i,int j){
        int ri=find(i);
        int rj=find(j);
        if(ri!=rj){
            if(sz[ri]<sz[rj])swap(ri,rj);
            parent[rj]=ri;
            sz[ri]+=sz[rj];
        }
    }
};
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n=points.size();
        if(n==0)return 1;
        DSU dsu(n);
        vector<int>ids(n);
        iota(ids.begin(),ids.end(),0);
        sort(ids.begin(),ids.end(),[&](int a,int b){
            if(points[a][0]!=points[b][0])return points[a][0]<points[b][0];
            return points[a][1]<points[b][1];
        });
        for(int i=1;i<n;++i){
            if(points[ids[i]][0]==points[ids[i-1]][0]){
                dsu.unite(ids[i],ids[i-1]);
            }
        }
        sort(ids.begin(),ids.end(),[&](int a,int b){
            if(points[a][1]!=points[b][1])return points[a][1]<points[b][1];
            return points[a][0]<points[b][0];
        });
        for(int i=1;i<n;++i){
            if(points[ids[i]][1]==points[ids[i-1]][1]){
                dsu.unite(ids[i],ids[i-1]);
            }
        }
        vector<int>cs;
        for(int i=0;i<n;++i){
            if(dsu.parent[i]==i){
                cs.push_back(dsu.sz[i]);
            }
        }
        sort(cs.rbegin(),cs.rend());
        int res=1;
        if(cs.size()>=1){
            res+=cs[0];
        }
        if(cs.size()>=2){
            res+=cs[1];
        }
        return res;
    }
};
    
[Q4_END]

### RANK 312 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 2:
            return n
        left = [0] * n
        left[0] = 1
        for i in range(1, n):
            if i >= 2 and nums[i] - nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]:
                left[i] = left[i-1] + 1
            else:
                left[i] = 2
        right = [0] * n
        right[n-1] = 1
        for i in range(n-2, -1, -1):
            if i <= n-3 and nums[i+1] - nums[i] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]:
                right[i] = right[i+1] + 1
            else:
                right[i] = 2
        ans = max(left)
        for i in range(1, n-1):
            diff = nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]
            if diff % 2 == 0: 
                d = diff // 2
                
                if (i-1 >= 0 and i+1 < n and left[i-1] >= 2 and right[i+1] >= 2 and
                    nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == d and nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == d):
                    ans = max(ans, left[i-1] + 1 + right[i+1])
                
                if i-1 >= 0 and left[i-1] >= 2 and nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == d:
                    if i+1 < n:
                        ans = max(ans, left[i-1] + 2)  
                if i+1 < n and right[i+1] >= 2 and nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == d:
                    if i-1 >= 0:
                        ans = max(ans, 2 + right[i+1])  
        
        if n >= 2:
            ans = max(ans, 1 + max(right[1:])) 
        if n >= 2:
            ans = max(ans, max(left[:n-1]) + 1)
    
        
        return ans
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU:
    def __init__(self,N):
        self.p  = list(range(N))
        self.rank = [1]*N
    
    def find(self,x):
        if self.p[x] != x:
            self.p[x] =self.find(self.p[x])
        return self.p[x]
    
    def union(self,x,y):
        xr = self.find(x)
        yr = self.find(y)
        if xr == yr:
            return False
        if self.rank[xr] <self.rank[yr]:
            xr,yr =yr,xr
        self.p[yr] = xr
        self.rank[xr] += self.rank[yr]
        return True

class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        if n<=2:
            return n+1
        dsu= DSU(n)
        dicx = defaultdict(list)
        dicy = defaultdict(list)
        for i,(x,y) in enumerate(points):
            dicx[x].append(i)
            dicy[y].append(i)
        for k,v in dicx.items():
            for i in range(1,len(v)):
                dsu.union(v[i],v[i-1])
        for k,v in dicy.items():
            for i in range(1,len(v)):
                dsu.union(v[i],v[i-1])
        tls = [0]*n 
        for i in range(n):
            tls[dsu.find(i)] += 1
        tls.sort(reverse=True)
        return tls[0] + tls[1] +1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 313 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    using ll = long long;
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n<=2) return n;
        vector<int> l(n),r(n);
        l[0] = 1;
        l[1] = 2;
        for (int i=2;i<n;i++) {
            ll d1 = 1LL * nums[i] - nums[i-1];
            ll d2 = 1LL * nums[i-1] - nums[i-2];
            if (d1==d2) l[i] = l[i-1] + 1;
            else l[i] = 2;
        }
        r[n-1] = 1;
        r[n-2] = 2;
        for (int i=n-3;i>=0;i--) {
            ll d1 = 1LL * nums[i+1] - nums[i];
            ll d2 = 1LL * nums[i+2] - nums[i+1];
            if (d1==d2) r[i] = r[i+1] + 1;
            else r[i] = 2;
        }
        int ans = 2;
        ans = max(ans,r[1]+1);
        ans = max(ans,l[n-2]+1);
        for (int i=1;i<=n-2;i++) {
            ans = max(ans,l[i-1]+1);
            ans = max(ans,r[i+1]+1);
            ll sum = 1LL * nums[i-1] + nums[i+1];
            if (sum % 2==0) {
                ll d = (1LL * nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) / 2;
                int llen = 1,rlen = 1;
                if (i>=2 && 1LL * nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == d) llen=l[i-1];
                if (i+2 < n && 1LL * nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == d) rlen=r[i+1];
                ans = max(ans,llen+rlen+1);
            }
        }
        return min(ans,n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU {
public:
    vector<int> parent,sz;
    DSU (int n) {
        parent.resize(n);
        sz.assign(n,1);
        iota(parent.begin(),parent.end(), 0);
    }
    int find(int x) {
        if (parent[x] == x) return x;
        return parent[x] = find(parent[x]);
    }
    void unite(int a, int b) {
        a = find(a);
        b = find(b) ;
        if(a == b) return;
        if (sz[a] < sz[b]) swap(a,b);
        parent[b] = a;
        sz[a] += sz[b];
    }
};
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        unordered_map<long long, int> xid,yid;
        int id = 0;
        for (auto &p : points) {
            long long x = p[0], y=p[1];
            if (!xid.count(x)) xid[x] = id++;
            if (!yid.count(y)) yid[y] = id++;
        }
        DSU dsu(id);
        for (auto &p : points) {
            int xi = xid[p[0]];
            int yi = yid[p[1]];
            dsu.unite(xi,yi);
        }
        unordered_map<int,int> edgeCount;
        for (auto &p : points) {
            int root = dsu.find(xid[p[0]]);
            edgeCount[root]++;
        }
        int mx1 = 0,mx2 = 0;
        for (auto &[root,cnt] : edgeCount) {
            if (cnt >= mx1) {
                mx2 = mx1;
                mx1 = cnt;
            } else if (cnt > mx2) {
                mx2 = cnt;
            }
        }
        return mx1 + mx2 + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 314 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        ans = 2
        prefix = [1] * n
        postfix = [1] * n
        
        prefix[1] = 2
        for i in range(2, n):
            if nums[i]-nums[i-1] == nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]:
                prefix[i] = prefix[i-1]+1
            else:
                prefix[i] = 2
        
        postfix[n-2] = 2
        for i in range(n-3, -1, -1):
            if nums[i+1]-nums[i] == nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]:
                postfix[i] = postfix[i+1]+1
            else:
                postfix[i] = 2

        # print(prefix)
        # print(postfix)
                
        for i in range(n):
            if i>0:
                ans = max(ans, prefix[i-1]+1)
            if i<n-1:
                ans = max(ans, postfix[i+1]+1)
            if 0<i<n-1:
                if (nums[i-1]+nums[i+1])%2 == 1:
                    continue
                val = (nums[i-1]+nums[i+1])//2
                d = val - nums[i-1]
                if i-2 >= 0 and d == nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]:
                    prefix_more = prefix[i-1]
                else:
                    prefix_more = 1
                if i+2<n and d == nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]:
                    postfix_more = postfix[i+1]
                else:
                    postfix_more = 1
                # print(prefix_more, i, postfix_more)
                ans = max(ans, prefix_more + 1 + postfix_more)
            
        return ans
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU:
    def __init__(self, n):
        self.n = n+2
        self.parents = list(range(n+2))
        self.ranks = [0] * (n+2)
        self.sizes = [1] * (n+2)

    def root(self, x):
        if self.parents[x] != x:
            self.parents[x] = self.root(self.parents[x])
        return self.parents[x]

    def join(self, x, y):
        x = self.root(x)
        y = self.root(y)
        if x == y:
            return
        if self.ranks[x] < self.ranks[y]:
            x,y = y,x
        self.parents[y] = x
        self.ranks[x] = max(self.ranks[x], self.ranks[y]+1)
        self.sizes[x] += self.sizes[y]

    def size(self, x):
        return self.sizes[x]

class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        dsu = DSU(n)
        seen_x = dict()
        seen_y = dict()
        for i,(x,y) in enumerate(points):
            if x in seen_x:
                dsu.join(seen_x[x], i)
            if y in seen_y:
                dsu.join(seen_y[y], i)
            seen_x[x] = i
            seen_y[y] = i

        sizes = []
        for i in range(n):
            if dsu.root(i) == i:
                sizes.append(dsu.size(i))
        sizes.sort()
        ans = sum(sizes[-2:])+1
        return ans
[Q4_END]
##################

### RANK 315 ###
[Q3_START]
#include <bits/stdc++.h>
#define rep(i, a, b) for (ll i = (ll)(a); i < (ll)(b); i++)
using namespace std;

typedef long long ll;

template <typename T>
ostream &operator<<(ostream &os, const vector<T> &v) {
    int n = v.size();
    rep(i, 0, n) { os << v[i] << " \n"[i == n - 1]; }
    return os;
}

struct UnionFind {
    vector<int> d;
    vector<pair<int, int>> hist;
    vector<int> snap, size_hist;
    int subsize;
    UnionFind(int n = 0) : d(n, -1) { subsize = n; }
    int find(int x) {
        if (d[x] < 0) return x;
        return find(d[x]);
    }
    bool merge(int x, int y) {
        x = find(x);
        y = find(y);
        if (x == y) return false;
        subsize--;
        if (d[x] > d[y]) swap(x, y);
        hist.emplace_back(x, d[x]);
        d[x] += d[y];
        hist.emplace_back(y, d[y]);
        d[y] = x;
        return true;
    }
    bool same(int x, int y) { return find(x) == find(y); }
    int size(int x) { return -d[find(x)]; }
};

int f(vector<int> a) {
    int n = a.size();
    vector<ll> delta(n - 1);
    rep(i, 0, n - 1) delta[i] = a[i + 1] - a[i];
    UnionFind uf(n - 1);
    rep(i, 0, n - 2) {
        if (delta[i] == delta[i + 1]) uf.merge(i, i + 1);
    }
    vector<int> cnt(n - 1);
    rep(i, 0, n - 1) cnt[i] = uf.size(i);
    // cout << delta;
    delta.push_back(1e9);
    delta.push_back(1e9);
    delta.push_back(1e9);
    int ret = *max_element(cnt.begin(), cnt.end());
    for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++) {
        ll sm = delta[i] + delta[i + 1];
        ll l = delta[i - 1];
        ll r = sm - l;
        if (delta[i] == l) continue;
        int pre = cnt[i - 1] + 1;
        if (l == r) pre++;
        if (l == r && r == delta[i + 2]) pre += cnt[i + 2];
        ret = max(ret, pre);
    }
    ret++;
    return ret;
}

class Solution {
   public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int> &nums) {
        int ans = f(nums);
        reverse(nums.begin(), nums.end());
        ans = max(ans, f(nums));
        ans = max(ans, 3);
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
#include <bits/stdc++.h>
#define rep(i, a, b) for (ll i = (ll)(a); i < (ll)(b); i++)
using namespace std;

typedef long long ll;

struct UnionFind {
    vector<int> d;
    vector<pair<int, int>> hist;
    vector<int> snap, size_hist;
    int subsize;
    UnionFind(int n = 0) : d(n, -1) { subsize = n; }
    int find(int x) {
        if (d[x] < 0) return x;
        return find(d[x]);
    }
    bool merge(int x, int y) {
        x = find(x);
        y = find(y);
        if (x == y) return false;
        subsize--;
        if (d[x] > d[y]) swap(x, y);
        hist.emplace_back(x, d[x]);
        d[x] += d[y];
        hist.emplace_back(y, d[y]);
        d[y] = x;
        return true;
    }
    bool same(int x, int y) { return find(x) == find(y); }
    int size(int x) { return -d[find(x)]; }
    vector<vector<int>> groups() {
        vector<vector<int>> res(d.size());
        for (int i = 0; i < d.size(); i++) {
            res[find(i)].push_back(i);
        }
        res.erase(remove_if(res.begin(), res.end(),
                            [](const vector<int>& v) { return v.empty(); }),
                  res.end());
        return res;
    }
};

class Solution {
   public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& p) {
        int n = p.size();
        vector<tuple<int, int, int>> ps;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            ps.emplace_back(p[i][0], p[i][1], i);
        }
        UnionFind uf(n);
        sort(ps.begin(), ps.end(), [](auto& a, auto& b) {
            if (get<0>(a) == get<0>(b)) return get<1>(a) < get<1>(b);
            return get<0>(a) < get<0>(b);
        });
        rep(i, 0, n - 1) {
            auto [x1, y1, idx1] = ps[i];
            auto [x2, y2, idx2] = ps[i + 1];
            if (x1 == x2 || y1 == y2) {
                uf.merge(idx1, idx2);
            }
        }
        sort(ps.begin(), ps.end(), [](auto& a, auto& b) {
            if (get<1>(a) == get<1>(b)) return get<0>(a) < get<0>(b);
            return get<1>(a) < get<1>(b);
        });
        rep(i, 0, n - 1) {
            auto [x1, y1, idx1] = ps[i];
            auto [x2, y2, idx2] = ps[i + 1];
            if (x1 == x2 || y1 == y2) {
                uf.merge(idx1, idx2);
            }
        }
        auto groups = uf.groups();
        vector<int> szs;
        for (auto& g : groups) {
            szs.push_back(g.size());
        }
        sort(szs.rbegin(), szs.rend());
        int ans = szs[0];
        if (szs.size() > 1) ans += szs[1];
        ans++;
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 316 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 2:
            return n

        diffs = [nums[i+1] - nums[i] for i in range(n - 1)]
        m = len(diffs)
        d2intervals = defaultdict(list)
        i = 0
        while i < m:
            j = i
            while i < m and diffs[i] == diffs[j]:
                i += 1
            d = diffs[j]
            d2intervals[d].append((j, i - 1))

        ans = 0
        for d, intervals in d2intervals.items():
            for i in range(len(intervals)):
                l, r = intervals[i]
                curr_l = r - l + 1
                curr = curr_l

                if r + 2 < m and diffs[r + 1] + diffs[r + 2] == 2 * d:
                    curr = max(curr, curr_l + 2)
                if l - 2 >= 0 and diffs[l - 2] + diffs[l - 1] == 2 * d:
                    curr = max(curr, curr_l + 2)
                curr = max(curr, min(curr_l + 1, m))
                if i > 0:
                    prev_l, prev_r = intervals[i-1]
                    if l - prev_r == 3 and diffs[prev_r + 1] + diffs[prev_r + 2] == 2 * d:
                        prev_len = prev_r - prev_l + 1
                        ans = max(ans, prev_len + 2 + curr_l)
                ans = max(ans, curr)

        return ans + 1
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class UnionFind:
    def __init__(self, n: int):
        self.parent = list(range(n))
        self.size = [1] * n
        self.n_comp = n

    def find(self, i: int) -> int:
        if self.parent[i] == i:
            return i
        self.parent[i] = self.find(self.parent[i])
        return self.parent[i]

    def union(self, i: int, j: int) -> bool:
        root_i = self.find(i)
        root_j = self.find(j)
        
        if root_i != root_j:
            if self.size[root_i] < self.size[root_j]:
                root_i, root_j = root_j, root_i
            self.parent[root_j] = root_i
            self.size[root_i] += self.size[root_j]
            self.n_comp -= 1
            return True
        return False

    def get_size(self, i: int) -> int:
        return self.size[self.find(i)]

class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        uf = UnionFind(n)

        x2idxs = defaultdict(list)
        y2idxs = defaultdict(list)
        for i, (x, y) in enumerate(points):
            x2idxs[x].append(i)
            y2idxs[y].append(i)

        for idxs in x2idxs.values():
            for i in range(1, len(idxs)):
                uf.union(idxs[0], idxs[i])
        for idxs in y2idxs.values():
            for i in range(1, len(idxs)):
                uf.union(idxs[0], idxs[i])

        if uf.n_comp <= 2:
            return n + 1
        else:
            comp_sz = []
            for i in range(n):
                if uf.find(i) == i:
                    comp_sz.append(uf.size[i])
            comp_sz.sort()
            return comp_sz[-1] + comp_sz[-2] + 1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 317 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n= nums.size();
        if(n<=2) return n;

        vector<long long>d(n-1);
        for(int i=0;i<n-1;i++){
            d[i] = 1LL*nums[i+1] - nums[i];
        }

        int m=n-1;
        vector<int>samel(m,1),samer(m,1);

        for(int i=1;i<m;i++){
            if(d[i]==d[i-1]) 
                samel[i] = samel[i-1] +1;
        }
        for(int i=m-2;i>=0;i--){
            if(d[i]==d[i+1])
                samer[i] = samer[i+1] +1;
        }
        int maxRun = 2;
        for(int i=0;i<m;i++){
            maxRun = max(maxRun , samel[i]+1);
        }
        int ans = min(n,maxRun+1);

        for(int k=1;k<=n-2;k++){
            long long gap = 1LL*nums[k+1]-nums[k-1];
            if(gap%2 !=0){
                continue;
            }
            long long x = gap/2;
            int left =1;
            if(k>=2 && d[k-2]==x){
                left = samel[k-2]+1;
            }
            int right=1;
            if(k+1<m && d[k+1]==x){
                right = samer[k+1] +1;
            }
            ans = max(ans,left+1+right);
        }
        return min(ans,n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    struct DSU {
        vector<int> p, z;
        int add() {
            int id = p.size();
            p.push_back(id);
            z.push_back(1);
            return id;
        }
        int find(int x) {
            if (p[x] == x)
                return x;
            return p[x] = find(p[x]);
        }
        void unite(int a, int b) {
            a = find(a);
            b = find(b);
            if (a == b)
                return;
            if (z[a] < z[b])
                swap(a, b);
            p[b] = a;
            z[a] += z[b];
        }
    };
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        DSU dsu;
        unordered_map<int, int> xid, yid;
        xid.reserve(points.size() * 2);
        yid.reserve(points.size() * 2);
        auto getX = [&](int x) -> int {
            auto it = xid.find(x);
            if (it != xid.end())
                return it->second;
            int id = dsu.add();
            xid[x] = id;
            return id;
        };
        auto getY = [&](int y) -> int {
            auto it = yid.find(y);
            if (it != yid.end())
                return it->second;
            int id = dsu.add();
            yid[y] = id;
            return id;
        };
        for (auto& p : points) {
            int xi = getX(p[0]);
            int yi = getY(p[1]);
            dsu.unite(xi, yi);
        }
        unordered_map<int, int> compPoints;
        compPoints.reserve(points.size() * 2);
        for (auto& p : points) {
            int root = dsu.find(xid[p[0]]);
            compPoints[root]++;
        }
        int best1 = 0, best2 = 0;
        for (auto& [root, cnt] : compPoints) {
            if (cnt >= best1) {
                best2 = best1;
                best1 = cnt;
            } else if (cnt > best2) {
                best2 = cnt;
            }
        }
        return best1 + best2 + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 318 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        ans = 0

        left = [1] * n
        right = [1] * n

        left[1] = 2
        for i in range(2, n):
            if nums[i] - nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]:
                left[i] = left[i-1] + 1
            else:
                left[i] = 2

        right[-2] = 2
        for i in range(n-3, -1, -1):
            if nums[i+1] - nums[i] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]:
                right[i] = right[i+1] + 1
            else:
                right[i] = 2

        ans = max(left)

        for i in range(n):
            if i > 0: ans = max(ans, left[i-1] + 1)

            if i + 1 < n: ans = max(ans, right[i+1] + 1)

            if 0 < i < n-1:
                diff = nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]
                if diff % 2 == 0:
                    l, r = 1, 1
                    if i >= 2 and nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == diff // 2:
                        l = left[i-1]
                    if i + 2 < n and nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == diff // 2:
                        r = right[i+1]
                    ans = max(ans, l + r + 1)
        return min(ans, n)
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)

        fa = []
        sz = []

        nodes = {}
        edges = []
        def new_node():
            idx = len(fa)
            fa.append(idx)
            sz.append(1)
            return idx

        def find(x):
            while fa[x] != x:
                fa[x] = fa[fa[x]]
                x = fa[x]
            return x

        def union(x, y):
            fx, fy = find(x), find(y)
            if fx == fy: return
            if sz[fx] < sz[fy]:
                fx, fy = fy, fx
            fa[fy] = fx
            sz[fx] += sz[fy]
        
        for x, y in points:
            kx, ky = (0, x), (1, y)

            if kx not in nodes:
                nodes[kx] = new_node()
            if ky not in nodes:
                nodes[ky] = new_node()

            union(nodes[kx], nodes[ky])
            edges.append((nodes[kx], nodes[ky]))

        cnt = {}
        for idx, _ in edges:
            fi = find(idx)
            cnt[fi] = cnt.get(fi, 0) + 1

        arr = list(cnt.values())
        arr.sort()
        if len(arr) > 1:
            return arr[-1] + arr[-2] + 1
        return arr[-1] + 1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 321 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if(n <= 3) return n;
        int cnt = 2;
        vector<int>suffix(n),prefix(n);
        suffix[n - 1] = 1;
        suffix[n - 2] = 2;

        int diff = nums[n - 1] - nums[n - 2];

        for(int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if(nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == diff) {
                suffix[i] = suffix[i + 1] + 1;
            }else suffix[i] = 2;
            diff = nums[i + 1] - nums[i]; 
        }

        prefix[0] = 1;
        prefix[1] = 2;

        diff = nums[1] - nums[0];

        for(int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            if(nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == diff) {
                prefix[i] = prefix[i - 1] + 1; 
            }else prefix[i] = 2;
            diff = nums[i] - nums[i - 1];
        }

        

        for(int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++) {
            if((nums[i - 1] + nums[i + 1]) % 2) continue;

            int d = (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) / 2;

            int left = 1,right = 1;

            if(i >= 2 && nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == d) left = prefix[i - 1];
            if(i + 2 < n && nums[i + 2]-nums[i+1]==d) right=suffix[i+1];
            cnt = max(cnt,left+right+1);
        }
        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            // cout << "i= " << i << " prefix " << prefix[i] << " suffix " << suffix[i] << endl;
            cnt = max(cnt, prefix[i]+1);
            cnt = max(cnt,suffix[i]+1);
        }
        return min(cnt,n);
        
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    class DSU{
        public:
            vector<int>p,sz;
            DSU(int n) {
                p.resize(n);
                sz.resize(n,1);
                for(int i =0 ; i < n; i++) p[i]=i;
            }

            int find(int x) {
                if(p[x]==x) return x;
                return p[x]=find(p[x]);
            }

            void unite(int a,int b){
                a=find(a);
                b=find(b);
                if(a==b) return;
                if(sz[a]<sz[b]) swap(a,b);
                p[b]=a;
                sz[a]+=sz[b];
            }

        
    };

    
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        DSU dsu(n);

        map<int,int>lastx,lasty;

        for(int i =0;i<n; i++){
            int x=points[i][0], y=points[i][1];
            if(lastx.count(x)) dsu.unite(i,lastx[x]);
            if(lasty.count(y)) dsu.unite(i,lasty[y]);
            lastx[x]=i;
            lasty[y]=i;
            
        }

        map<int,int>comp;

        for(int i =0;i<n; i++){
            comp[dsu.find(i)]++;
        }

        int mx1=0,mx2=0;

        for(auto&[r,s]:comp){
            if(s>mx1){
                mx2=mx1;
                mx1=s;
            }
        else if(s>mx2){
            mx2=s;
        }
        
        }
        return min(n+1,mx1+mx2+1);
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 322 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        if (n <= 3) return n;
        int[] d = new int[n - 1];
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) {
            d[i] = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
        }

        int m = n - 1;
        int[] l = new int[m], r = new int[m];
        l[0] = 1;
        for (int i = 1; i < m; i++) {
            l[i] = d[i] == d[i - 1] ? l[i - 1] + 1 : 1;
        }
        r[m - 1] = 1;
        for (int i = m - 2; i >= 0; i--) {
            r[i] = d[i] == d[i + 1] ? r[i + 1] + 1 : 1;
        }

        int res = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) res = Math.max(res, l[i] + 2);
        res = Math.max(res, r[1] + 2);
        res = Math.max(res, l[m - 2] + 2);
        for (int i = 0; i < m - 1; i++) {
            long s = d[i] + d[i + 1];
            if (s % 2 == 0) {
                long v = s / 2;
                int len = 2;
                if (i > 0 && d[i - 1] == v) len += l[i - 1];
                if (i + 2 < m && d[i + 2] == v) len += r[i + 2];
                res = Math.max(res, len + 1);
            }
        }
        return Math.min(res, n);
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        HashMap<Integer, Integer> xm = new HashMap<>();
        HashMap<Integer, Integer> ym = new HashMap<>();
        int n = 0;
        for (int[] p : points) {
            int x = p[0], y = p[1];
            if (!xm.containsKey(x)) xm.put(x, n++);
            if (!ym.containsKey(y)) ym.put(y, n++);
        }

        UnionFind uf = new UnionFind(n);
        for (int[] p : points) {
            int x = p[0], y = p[1];
            int u = xm.get(x), v = ym.get(y);
            uf.size[u]++;
            uf.merge(u, v);
        }

        HashMap<Integer, Integer> map = new HashMap<>();
        for (int[] p : points) {
            int x = p[0];
            int fa = uf.find(xm.get(x));
            map.put(fa, map.getOrDefault(fa, 0) + 1);
        }

        int mx1 = 0, mx2 = 0;
        for (int v : map.values()) {
            if (v > mx1) {
                mx2 = mx1;
                mx1 = v;
            } else if (v > mx2) mx2 = v;
        }
        return Math.max(mx1 + 1, mx1 + mx2 + 1);
    }

    // 模板来源 https://leetcode.cn/circle/discuss/mOr1u6/
    class UnionFind {
        private final int[] fa; // 代表元
        private final int[] size; // 集合大小
        public int cc; // 连通块个数
    
        UnionFind(int n) {
            // 一开始有 n 个集合 {0}, {1}, ..., {n-1}
            // 集合 i 的代表元是自己，大小为 1
            fa = new int[n];
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
                fa[i] = i;
            }
            size = new int[n];
            Arrays.fill(size, 1);
            cc = n;
        }
    
        // 返回 x 所在集合的代表元
        // 同时做路径压缩，也就是把 x 所在集合中的所有元素的 fa 都改成代表元
        public int find(int x) {
            // 如果 fa[x] == x，则表示 x 是代表元
            if (fa[x] != x) {
                fa[x] = find(fa[x]); // fa 改成代表元
            }
            return fa[x];
        }
    
        // 判断 x 和 y 是否在同一个集合
        public boolean isSame(int x, int y) {
            // 如果 x 的代表元和 y 的代表元相同，那么 x 和 y 就在同一个集合
            // 这就是代表元的作用：用来快速判断两个元素是否在同一个集合
            return find(x) == find(y);
        }
    
        // 把 from 所在集合合并到 to 所在集合中
        // 返回是否合并成功
        public boolean merge(int from, int to) {
            int x = find(from);
            int y = find(to);
            if (x == y) { // from 和 to 在同一个集合，不做合并
                return false;
            }
            fa[x] = y; // 合并集合。修改后就可以认为 from 和 to 在同一个集合了
            size[y] += size[x]; // 更新集合大小（注意集合大小保存在代表元上）
            // 无需更新 size[x]，因为我们不用 size[x] 而是用 size[find(x)] 获取集合大小，但 find(x) == y，我们不会再访问 size[x]
            cc--; // 成功合并，连通块个数减一
            return true;
        }
    
        // 返回 x 所在集合的大小
        public int getSize(int x) {
            return size[find(x)]; // 集合大小保存在代表元上
        }
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 323 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
            int n=nums.length;
            if(n<=3)return n;

        int m=n-1;
        int diff[]=new int[m];

        for(int x=0;x<m;x++){
            diff[x]=nums[x+1]-nums[x];
        }

        int L[]=new int[m];
        L[0]=1;
        int maxL=1;
        for(int x=1;x<m;x++){
            if(diff[x]==diff[x-1]){
                L[x]=L[x-1]+1;
            }
            else{
                L[x]=1;
            }
            
        maxL=Math.max(maxL,L[x]);
        }

         int R[]=new int[m];
        R[m-1]=1;
        for(int x=m-2;x>=0;x--){
            if(diff[x]==diff[x+1]){
                R[x]=R[x+1]+1;
            }
            else{
                R[x]=1;
            }
        }

        int maxdiff=Math.min(m,maxL+1);

        for(int x=0;x<m-1;x++){
            int sum=diff[x]+diff[x+1];
            if(sum%2==0){
                int d=sum/2;
                int leftlen=(x>0 && diff[x-1]==d)?L[x-1]:0;
                int rightlen=(x+2<m && diff[x+2]==d)?R[x+2]:0;

                maxdiff=Math.max(maxdiff,leftlen+2+rightlen);
            }
        }
        return maxdiff+1;
        
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {

    class DisjointSet {
            List<Integer> rank = new ArrayList<>();
            List<Integer> parent = new ArrayList<>();
            List<Integer> size = new ArrayList<>();

            public DisjointSet(int n) {
                for (int i = 0; i <= n; i++) {
                    rank.add(0);
                    parent.add(i);
                    size.add(1);
                }
            }

            public int findUPar(int node) {
                if (node == parent.get(node)) {
                    return node;
                }
                int ulp = findUPar(parent.get(node));
                parent.set(node, ulp);
                return parent.get(node);
            }

            public void unionByRank(int u, int v) {
                int ulp_u = findUPar(u);
                int ulp_v = findUPar(v);
                if (ulp_u == ulp_v) return;
                if (rank.get(ulp_u) < rank.get(ulp_v)) {
                    parent.set(ulp_u, ulp_v);
                } else if (rank.get(ulp_v) < rank.get(ulp_u)) {
                    parent.set(ulp_v, ulp_u);
                } else {
                    parent.set(ulp_v, ulp_u);
                    int rankU = rank.get(ulp_u);
                    rank.set(ulp_u, rankU + 1);
                }
            }

            public void unionBySize(int u, int v) {
                int ulp_u = findUPar(u);
                int ulp_v = findUPar(v);
                if (ulp_u == ulp_v) return;
                if (size.get(ulp_u) < size.get(ulp_v)) {
                    parent.set(ulp_u, ulp_v);
                    size.set(ulp_v, size.get(ulp_v) + size.get(ulp_u));
                } else {
                    parent.set(ulp_v, ulp_u);
                    size.set(ulp_u, size.get(ulp_u) + size.get(ulp_v));
                }
            }
        }

        public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
            int n = points.length;
            DisjointSet dsu = new DisjointSet(n);
            Map<Integer, List<Integer>> x1 = new HashMap<>();
            Map<Integer, List<Integer>> y1 = new HashMap<>();
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
                int x = points[i][0];
                int y = points[i][1];
                x1.computeIfAbsent(x, k -> new ArrayList<>()).add(i);
                y1.computeIfAbsent(y, k -> new ArrayList<>()).add(i);
            }
            for (List<Integer> list : x1.values()) {
                for (int i = 1; i < list.size(); i++) {
                    dsu.unionBySize(list.get(0), list.get(i));
                }
            }
            for (List<Integer> list : y1.values()) {
                for (int i = 1; i < list.size(); i++) {
                    dsu.unionBySize(list.get(0), list.get(i));
                }
            }
            List<Integer> componentSizes = new ArrayList<>();
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
                if (dsu.findUPar(i) == i) {
                    componentSizes.add(dsu.size.get(i));
                }
            }
            componentSizes.sort(Collections.reverseOrder());
            if (componentSizes.size() == 1) {
                return componentSizes.get(0) + 1;
            } else {
                return componentSizes.get(0) + componentSizes.get(1) + 1;
            }
        }
}


// n=4
//     m=5
//       0  1  2 3  4
//     0 0  1  2  3  4
//     1 4  5  6  7  8
//     2
//     3

//     1-6
//     1-5
//     0-4
//     3-8

//     2-6-5
//     1-4-8

//     2-
[Q4_END]

### RANK 324 ###
[Q3_START]
#include <vector>
#include <algorithm>

using namespace std;

class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        // Any array of size 3 or less can always be made entirely arithmetic
        if (n <= 3) return n;

        // Step 1: Create the difference array
        vector<int> diff(n - 1);
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; ++i) {
            diff[i] = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
        }

        int m = n - 1;
        // Step 2: Precompute the length of contiguous identical differences 
        // ending at index i (left) and starting at index i (right)
        vector<int> left(m, 1), right(m, 1);
        
        for (int i = 1; i < m; ++i) {
            if (diff[i] == diff[i - 1]) {
                left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1;
            }
        }
        for (int i = m - 2; i >= 0; --i) {
            if (diff[i] == diff[i + 1]) {
                right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1;
            }
        }

        int max_diff_len = 0;

        // Scenario 1: Extend an existing segment
        for (int i = 0; i < m; ) {
            int j = i;
            while (j < m && diff[j] == diff[i]) {
                j++;
            }
            int len = j - i;
            // We can add 1 extra difference by changing a boundary element 
            // (capped at the total size of the difference array)
            max_diff_len = max(max_diff_len, min(len + 1, m));
            i = j;
        }

        // Scenario 2: Merge two segments by replacing one element in `nums`
        for (int i = 0; i < m - 1; ++i) {
            long long sum = (long long)diff[i] + diff[i + 1];
            
            // The two gaps can only be unified if their sum is cleanly divisible by 2
            if (sum % 2 == 0) {
                long long d = sum / 2;
                int l_len = 0, r_len = 0;
                
                // Check if there is a matching segment on the left
                if (i > 0 && diff[i - 1] == d) {
                    l_len = left[i - 1];
                }
                // Check if there is a matching segment on the right
                if (i + 2 < m && diff[i + 2] == d) {
                    r_len = right[i + 2];
                }
                
                // The new merged length includes the left side, the right side, 
                // and the 2 modified differences in the middle.
                max_diff_len = max(max_diff_len, l_len + 2 + r_len);
            }
        }

        // The number of elements in the original array is always the number of differences + 1
        return max_diff_len + 1;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
#include <vector>
#include <unordered_map>
#include <algorithm>

using namespace std;

class Solution {
    vector<int> parent;
    vector<int> comp_size;

    // DSU Find with path compression
    int find(int i) {
        if (parent[i] == i)
            return i;
        return parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
    }

    // DSU Union by size
    void unite(int i, int j) {
        int rootI = find(i);
        int rootJ = find(j);
        if (rootI != rootJ) {
           
            if (comp_size[rootI] < comp_size[rootJ]) {
                swap(rootI, rootJ);
            }
            parent[rootJ] = rootI;
            comp_size[rootI] += comp_size[rootJ];
        }
    }

public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        if (n == 0) return 1; 

        parent.resize(n);
        comp_size.resize(n, 1);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            parent[i] = i;
        }

        
        unordered_map<int, int> x_map;
        unordered_map<int, int> y_map;

        
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];

            // If we've seen this X before, union current point with that previous point
            if (x_map.count(x)) {
                unite(i, x_map[x]);
            }
           
            if (y_map.count(y)) {
                unite(i, y_map[y]);
            }

            
            x_map[x] = i;
            y_map[y] = i;
        }

        
        int max1 = 0, max2 = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
          
            if (parent[i] == i) {
                int current_size = comp_size[i];
                if (current_size > max1) {
                    max2 = max1;
                    max1 = current_size;
                } else if (current_size > max2) {
                    max2 = current_size;
                }
            }
        }

       
        return max1 + max2 + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 325 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();

        int ans = 0;

        vector<map<int, int>> left(n);
        for (int i = 1; i < n; i++) {
            left[i][nums[i] - nums[i - 1]] = left[i - 1][nums[i] - nums[i - 1]] + 1;
            ans = max(ans, 1 + 1 + left[i][nums[i] - nums[i - 1]]);
        }

        vector<map<int, int>> right(n);
        for (int i = n - 2; i >= 0; i--) {
            right[i][nums[i + 1] - nums[i]] = right[i + 1][nums[i + 1] - nums[i]] + 1;
            ans = max(ans, 1 + 1 + right[i][nums[i + 1] - nums[i]]);
        }

        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++) {
            if ((nums[i - 1] + nums[i + 1]) % 2 == 0) {
                int d = (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) / 2;
                ans = max(ans, left[i - 1][d] + 1 + 1 + right[i + 1][d] + 1);
            }
        }

        return min(ans, n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
	class DisjointSets {
  private:
	vector<int> parents;

  public:
	vector<int> sizes;
	DisjointSets(int size) : parents(size), sizes(size, 1) {
		for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) { parents[i] = i; }
	}

	/** @return the "representative" node in x's component */
	int find(int x) { return parents[x] == x ? x : (parents[x] = find(parents[x])); }

	/** @return whether the merge changed connectivity */
	bool unite(int x, int y) {
		int x_root = find(x);
		int y_root = find(y);
		if (x_root == y_root) { return false; }

		if (sizes[x_root] < sizes[y_root]) { swap(x_root, y_root); }
		sizes[x_root] += sizes[y_root];
		parents[y_root] = x_root;
		return true;
	}

	/** @return whether x and y are in the same connected component */
	bool connected(int x, int y) { return find(x) == find(y); }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();

        DisjointSets dsu(n);
        
        map<int, int> in_comp;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (in_comp.find(points[i][0]) == in_comp.end()) {
                in_comp[points[i][0]] = i;
            } else {
                dsu.unite(in_comp[points[i][0]], i);
            }
        }

        in_comp.clear();
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (in_comp.find(points[i][1]) == in_comp.end()) {
                in_comp[points[i][1]] = i;
            } else {
                dsu.unite(in_comp[points[i][1]], i);
            }
        }

        vector<int> sizes;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (dsu.find(i) == i) {
                sizes.push_back(dsu.sizes[i]);
            }
        }

        sort(sizes.rbegin(), sizes.rend());

        if (sizes.size() == 1) {
            return sizes[0] + 1;
        }

        return sizes[0] + 1 + sizes[1];
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 326 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 2) return n;

        vector<int> rlen(n), llen(n);
        rlen[0] = 1; rlen[1] = 2;
        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++)
            rlen[i] = ((long long)nums[i]-nums[i-1] == (long long)nums[i-1]-nums[i-2])
                      ? rlen[i-1]+1 : 2;

        llen[n-1] = 1; llen[n-2] = 2;
        for (int i = n-3; i >= 0; i--)
            llen[i] = ((long long)nums[i+1]-nums[i] == (long long)nums[i+2]-nums[i+1])
                      ? llen[i+1]+1 : 2;

        int ans = 2;
        for (int i = 0; i+1 < n; i++) {
            long long d = (long long)nums[i+1] - nums[i];
            int L = (i >= 1 && (long long)nums[i]-nums[i-1] == d) ? rlen[i] : 1;
            int R = (i+2 < n && (long long)nums[i+2]-nums[i+1] == d) ? llen[i+1] : 1;
            ans = max(ans, min(n, L + R + 1));
        }

        for (int i = 0; i+2 < n; i++) {
            long long gap = (long long)nums[i+2] - nums[i];
            if (gap % 2 != 0) continue;
            long long d = gap / 2;
            int L = (i >= 1 && (long long)nums[i]-nums[i-1] == d) ? rlen[i] : 1;
            int R = (i+3 < n && (long long)nums[i+3]-nums[i+2] == d) ? llen[i+2] : 1;
            ans = max(ans, min(n, L + 1 + R));
        }

        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        
        vector<int> parent(n), sz(n, 1);
        iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0);
        
        function<int(int)> find = [&](int x) {
            return parent[x] == x ? x : parent[x] = find(parent[x]);
        };
        auto unite = [&](int a, int b) {
            a = find(a); b = find(b);
            if (a == b) return;
            if (sz[a] < sz[b]) swap(a, b);
            parent[b] = a;
            sz[a] += sz[b];
        };
        
        map<int, vector<int>> byX, byY;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            byX[points[i][0]].push_back(i);
            byY[points[i][1]].push_back(i);
        }
        
        for (auto& [_, v] : byX)
            for (int i = 1; i < (int)v.size(); i++) unite(v[0], v[i]);
        for (auto& [_, v] : byY)
            for (int i = 1; i < (int)v.size(); i++) unite(v[0], v[i]);
 
        map<int, int> xComp, yComp;
        for (auto& [x, v] : byX) xComp[x] = find(v[0]);
        for (auto& [y, v] : byY) yComp[y] = find(v[0]);
        

        map<int, int> compSz;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) compSz[find(i)] = sz[find(i)];
        
        int ans = 1;
        for (auto& [x, r] : xComp) ans = max(ans, compSz[r] + 1);
        for (auto& [y, r] : yComp) ans = max(ans, compSz[r] + 1);

        vector<pair<int,int>> xList, yList; // (root, size)
        for (auto& [x, r] : xComp) xList.push_back({r, compSz[r]});
        for (auto& [y, r] : yComp) yList.push_back({r, compSz[r]});
 
        auto getTop2 = [](vector<pair<int,int>>& v) {
            sort(v.begin(), v.end(), [](auto& a, auto& b){ return a.second > b.second; });
            vector<pair<int,int>> res;
            set<int> seen;
            for (auto& [r, s] : v) {
                if (!seen.count(r)) { seen.insert(r); res.push_back({r, s}); }
                if (res.size() == 2) break;
            }
            return res;
        };
        
        auto topX = getTop2(xList);
        auto topY = getTop2(yList);
        
        for (auto& [rx, sx] : topX) {
            for (auto& [ry, sy] : topY) {
                if (rx != ry)
                    ans = max(ans, sx + sy + 1);
                else
                    ans = max(ans, sx + 1);
            }
        }
        
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 327 ###
[Q3_START]
#include <algorithm>
#define lli long long int
#define ULTRA_INSTINCT ios_base::sync_with_stdio(false); cin.tie(NULL); cout.tie(NULL);
#define mp make_pair
#define fo(i,n) for(lli i=0;i<(n);i++)
#define FO(i,x,n) for(lli i=x;i<(n);i++)
#define pb push_back
#define vi vector<lli>
#define vii vector<vector<lli> >
#define pi pair<lli,lli>
#define vpi vector<pair<lli,lli> >
using namespace std;

class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& a) {
        lli n = a.size();
        if (n <= 2) return n;

        vi d(n - 1); 
        fo(i, n - 1) {
            d[i] = (lli)a[i + 1] - a[i];
        }

        lli m = d.size();
        vi ll(m, 1), rl(m, 1);
        
        for (lli i = m - 2; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (d[i] == d[i + 1]) rl[i] = rl[i + 1] + 1;
        }

        FO(i, 1, m) {
            if (d[i] == d[i - 1]) ll[i] = ll[i - 1] + 1;
        }

        lli ans = 0;
        fo(i, m) {
            ans = max(ans, min(n, ll[i] + 2));
        }

        FO(i, 1, m) {
            lli sum = d[i - 1] + d[i];
            if (sum % 2 == 0) {
                lli tgt = sum / 2;
                lli cur = 2;
                if (i - 2 >= 0 && d[i - 2] == tgt) cur += ll[i - 2];
                if (i + 1 < m && d[i + 1] == tgt) cur += rl[i + 1];
                ans = max(ans, cur + 1);
            }
        }

        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
#include <algorithm>
#define lli int
#define ULTRA_INSTINCT ios_base::sync_with_stdio(false); cin.tie(NULL); cout.tie(NULL);
#define mp make_pair
#define fo(i,n) for(lli i=0;i<(n);i++)
#define FO(i,x,n) for(lli i=x;i<(n);i++)
#define pb push_back
#define vi vector<lli>
#define vii vector<vector<lli> >
#define pi pair<lli,lli>
#define vpi vector<pair<lli,lli> >
using namespace std;


vi par, sz;

lli root(lli i){
    if(i == par[i]){
        return i;
    }
    return par[i] = root(par[i]);
}

void join(lli i, lli j){
    i = root(i);
    j = root(j);
    if(i==j){return;}
    if(sz[j] > sz[i]){swap(i,j);}
    par[j] = i;
    sz[i] += sz[j];
}



class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& pts) {
        map<lli,lli > r,c;
        int n = pts.size();
        par.resize(n), sz.resize(n);
        fo(i,n){
            par[i] = i;
            sz[i] = 1;
        }
        
        fo(i, n){
            if(r.find(pts[i][0]) != r.end()){
                join(r[pts[i][0]], i);    
            }else{
                r[pts[i][0]] = i;
            }

            if(c.count(pts[i][1])){
                join(c[pts[i][1]], i);    
            }else{
                c[pts[i][1]] = i;
            }
            
        }

        vi uniq;
        fo(i, n){
            if(par[i] == i){
                uniq.pb(sz[i]);
            }
        }

        sort(uniq.begin(), uniq.end(), greater<lli>());

        lli ans = uniq[0];
        if(uniq.size() > 1){
            ans += uniq[1];
        }
        return ans+1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 328 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n=len(nums)
        if n<=2:
            return n
        d=[nums[i+1]-nums[i] for i in range(n-1)]
        m=len(d)
        l=[1]*m
        for i in range(1,m):
            if d[i]==d[i-1]:
                l[i]=l[i-1]+1
        r=[1]*m
        for i in range(m-2,-1,-1):
            if d[i]==d[i+1]:
                r[i]=r[i+1]+1
        ans=0
        for i in range(m):
            ans=max(ans,min(n,l[i]+2))
        for i in range(m-1):
            if (d[i]+d[i+1])%2==0:
                dif=(d[i]+d[i+1])//2
                c=2
                if i-1>=0 and d[i-1]==dif:
                    c+=l[i-1]
                if  i+2<m and d[i+2]==dif:
                    c+=r[i+2]
                ans=max(ans,c+1)
        return ans
                    
                
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n=len(points)
        p=list(range(n))
        size=[1]*n
        def find(i):
            if p[i]==i:
                return i
            p[i]=find(p[i])
            return p[i]
        def union(i,j):
            r_i=find(i)
            r_j=find(j)
            if r_i!=r_j:
                if size[r_i]<size[r_j]:
                    r_i,r_j=r_j,r_i
                p[r_j]=r_i
                size[r_i]+=size[r_j]
        d1={}
        d2={}
        for i,(x,y) in enumerate(points):
            if x in d1:
                union(i,d1[x])
            else:
                d1[x]=i
            if y in d2:
                union(i,d2[y])
            else:
                d2[y]=i
        c=[]
        for i in range(n):
            if p[i]==i:
                c.append(size[i])
        if len(c)==1:
            return c[0]+1
        c.sort()
        return c[-1]+c[-2]+1
            
[Q4_END]
