### RANK 331 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int[] sd  =nums;
        int n = sd.length;
        if(n <= 3) return n;

        int[] pr = new int[n];
        int[] su = new int[n];
        for(int i = 0;i < n;i++){
            if(i < 2) pr[i] = i + 1;
            else if(sd[i] - sd[i - 1] == sd[i - 1] - sd[i - 2]) pr[i] = pr[i - 1] + 1;
            else pr[i] = 2;
        }
        for(int i = n - 1;i >= 0;i--){
            if(i >= n - 2) su[i] = n - i;
            else if(sd[i + 1] - sd[i] == sd[i + 2] - sd[i + 1]) su[i] = su[i + 1] + 1;
            else su[i] = 2;
        }
        int res = 2;
        for(int i =0;i < n;i++) {
            if(i > 0) res = Math.max(res,pr[i - 1] + 1);
            if(i < n - 1)res = Math.max(res,su[i + 1] + 1);
            if(i > 0 && i < n - 1 && (sd[i + 1] - sd[i - 1])% 2 == 0) {
                int d =  (sd[i + 1] - sd[i - 1]) / 2;
                int  l = (i > 1 && sd[i - 1] - sd[i - 2] == d)? pr[i - 1] : 1;
                int r = (i < n - 2 && sd[i + 2] - sd[i + 1] == d)? su[i + 1]: 1;
                res = Math.max(res,l + r + 1);
            }
        }
        return Math.min(res,n);
    }
}
    
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int[][] ns = points;
        int n = ns.length;
        Super su = new Super(n);
        Map<Integer,Integer> mx = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer,Integer> my = new HashMap<>();
        for(int i = 0;i < n;i++){
            int x = ns[i][0];
            int y = ns[i][1];
            if(mx.containsKey(x)) {
                su.union(i , mx.get(x));
            }
            mx.put(x , i);

            if(my.containsKey(y)) {
                su.union(i , my.get(y));
            }
            my.put(y,i);
        }
        Map<Integer,Integer> cs = new HashMap<>();
        for(int i = 0;i < n;i++){
            int rt = su.find(i);
            cs.put(rt,cs.getOrDefault(rt,0) + 1);
        }
        List<Integer> ss = new ArrayList<>(cs.values());
        Collections.sort(ss,Collections.reverseOrder());
        if(ss.size() == 1) {
            return ss.get(0) + 1;
        }
        return ss.get(0) + ss.get(1) + 1;
    }

    class Super {
        int[] pr;
        public Super(int n){
            pr = new int[n];
            for(int i = 0;i < n;i++) pr[i] = i;
        }
        public int find(int i) {
            if(pr[i] == i) return i;
            return pr[i] = find(pr[i]);
        }
        public void union(int i,int j){
            int rtI = find(i);
            int rtJ = find(j);
            if(rtI != rtJ) pr[rtI] = rtJ;
        }
    }
}
       
[Q4_END]

### RANK 332 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        vector<int> d(n, -1e9);
        for (int i = 0; i + 1 < n; i++) d[i] = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
        vector<int> r(n, 0);
        r[n - 2] = 1;
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (d[i] == d[i + 1]) {
                r[i] = r[i + 1] + 1;
            } else {
                r[i] = 1;
            }
        }
        int ans = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) ans = max(ans, r[i] + 2);
        ans = min(ans, n);
        for (int i = 0; i + 1 < n; ) {
            if (i + 2 < n) {
                if (i + 2 == n - 1) {
                    int del = nums[i + 2] - nums[i];
                    if (del % 2 == 0) {
                        ans = max(ans, 3);
                    }
                } else {
                    int del = d[i + 2];
                    if (del * 2 == nums[i + 2] - nums[i]) {
                        ans = max(ans, r[i + 2] + 1 + 2);
                    }
                }
            }
            int j = i;
            while (j + 1 < n && nums[j + 1] - nums[j] == nums[i + 1] - nums[i]) {
                j++;
            }
            if (j + 1 == n - 1) {
                ans = max(ans, j - i + 1 + 1);
                break;
            }
            if (j + 1 == n) {
                ans = max(ans, j - i + 1);
                break;
            }
            int del = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
            if (del * 2 == nums[j + 2] - nums[j]) {
                int sz = 1;
                if (d[j + 2] == del) {
                    sz = r[j + 2] + 1;
                }
                ans = max(ans, j - i + 1 + sz + 1);
            }
            i = j;
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
struct DisjointSetUnion {  /// Base 1th or Base 0th
    /// if u is root then p[u] < 0 and |p[u]| is size of the Set that u is root
    /// if u is not root then p[u] = x and x, u are belong the same Set
    int n;
    vector<int> p;
    DisjointSetUnion() {};
    DisjointSetUnion(int _n) {
        n = _n;
        p.assign(n + 7, -1);  /// p[i] = -1 for all i
    }

    int find_root(int u) {              /// find the root in the Set contain u
        if (p[u] < 0) return u;         /// u is root
        return p[u] = find_root(p[u]);  /// get the root and jump
    }

    void Union(int u, int v) {
        int x = find_root(u);
        int y = find_root(v);
        if (x == y) return;
        if (p[x] > p[y]) swap(x, y);  /// small Set point to big Set, p[x] > p[y] so |p[x]| < |p[y]|
        p[x] += p[y];
        p[y] = x;
    }

    bool sameSet(int u, int v) {
        return find_root(u) == find_root(v);
    }

    int numSet() {
        int res = 0;
        for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) res += p[i] < 0;
        return res;
    }
};
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        map<int, vector<int>> mx, my;
        int n = points.size();
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            mx[points[i][0]].push_back(i);
            my[points[i][1]].push_back(i);
        }
        DisjointSetUnion dsu(n);
        for (auto &it : mx) {
            auto &v = it.second;
            for (int i = 1; i < v.size(); i++) {
                dsu.Union(v[i - 1], v[i]);
            }
        }
        for (auto &it : my) {
            auto &v = it.second;
            for (int i = 1; i < v.size(); i++) {
                dsu.Union(v[i - 1], v[i]);
            }
        }
        vector<int> d{0};
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (dsu.p[i] < 0) {
                d.push_back(-dsu.p[i]);
            }
        }
        sort(d.begin(), d.end(), greater<int>());
        return d[0] + d[1] + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 333 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if(n <= 3) return n;
        vector<int> mppp(n-1);
        for(int i=0; i<n-1; i++){
            mppp[i] = nums[i+1] - nums[i];
        }
        struct Block{
            int val, start, end, len;
        };
        vector<Block> blocks;
        vector<int> blockLen(n-1,0);

        int i=0;
        while(i < n-1){
            int j=i;
            while(j < n-1 && mppp[j] == mppp[i]){
                j++;
            }
            blocks.push_back({mppp[i],i,j-1,j-i});
            for(int k=i; k<j; k++){
                blockLen[k] = j-i;
            }
            i=j;
        }
        int ans = 0;
        for(auto& b : blocks){
            int mx = b.len;
            if(b.start > 0 || b.end < n-2){
                mx = max(mx, b.len+1);
            }
            if(b.end + 2 < n-1){
                if(mppp[b.end+1] + mppp[b.end+2] == 2*b.val){
                    int cur = b.len+2;
                    if(b.end + 3 < n-1 && mppp[b.end + 3] == b.val){
                        cur += blockLen[b.end + 3];
                    }
                    mx = max(mx, cur);
                }
            }
            if(b.start-2 >= 0){
                if(mppp[b.start-2] + mppp[b.start-1] == 2*b.val){
                    int cur = b.len+2;
                    if(b.start - 3 >=0 && mppp[b.start - 3] == b.val){
                        cur += blockLen[b.start - 3];
                    }
                    mx = max(mx, cur);
                }
            }
            ans = max(ans, mx);
        }
        return ans+1;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        vector<int> mppp(n), size(n,1);
        for(int i=0; i<n; i++){
            mppp[i] = i;
        }
        auto find = [&](auto& self, int i) -> int{
            if(mppp[i] == i) return i;
            return mppp[i] = self(self, mppp[i]);
        };

        auto unite = [&](int i, int j){
            int root_i = find(find, i);
            int root_j = find(find, j);
            if(root_i != root_j){
                mppp[root_j] = root_i;
                size[root_i] += size[root_j];
            }
        };

        unordered_map<int, int> res_x;
        unordered_map<int, int> ress_y;
        for(int i=0; i<n; i++){
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];
            if(res_x.count(x)){
                unite(i, res_x[x]);
            }else{
                res_x[x] = i;
            }
            if(ress_y.count(y)){
                unite(i, ress_y[y]);
            }else{
                ress_y[y] = i;
            }
        }
        vector<int> comp_sizes;
        for(int i=0; i<n; i++){
            if(mppp[i] == i){
                comp_sizes.push_back(size[i]);
            }
        }
        sort(comp_sizes.rbegin(), comp_sizes.rend());

        if(comp_sizes.size() >= 2){
            return comp_sizes[0] + comp_sizes[1] + 1;
        }
        return comp_sizes[0] + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 334 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        vector<int> diff(n - 1);
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++)
            diff[i] = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];

        vector<int> left(n - 1, 1), right(n - 1, 1);
        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++)
            if (diff[i] == diff[i - 1])
                left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1;
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--)
            if (diff[i] == diff[i + 1])
                right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1;

        int ans = 0;
        //we can atleast increase the length by 1 via changing an element so try that first
        for(int i = 0; i < n-1; i++){
            int len = left[i];
            if(len < n-1)
                len++;
            ans = max(len, ans);
        }

        //tryin to merge
        for(int i = 0; i < n-2; i++){
            int sum = diff[i] + diff[i+1];

            if(sum % 2 == 0){
                int curr = 2;
                int t = sum/2;
    
                if(i > 0 && diff[i-1] == t)
                    curr += left[i-1];
                if(i + 2 < n-1 && diff[i+2] == t)
                    curr += right[i+2];
                
                ans = max(ans, curr);
            }
        }
        return ans + 1;
    }
};
// so i an forgive one out of trend element and find the longest subarray that
// follows the rule. using one diff array wont work as we cant extend boundaries
// or replacing boundary elements. hence we need to use left and right arrays
// which store the length of streak ending and starting at i respectively.
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DisjointSet {
    public:
        vector<int> rank, parent, size;
        DisjointSet(int n) {
            rank.resize(n + 1, 0);
            parent.resize(n + 1);
            size.resize(n + 1, 1);
            for (int i = 0; i <= n; i++)
                parent[i] = i;
        }

        int findUlPar(int n) {
            if (n == parent[n])
                return n;
            return parent[n] = findUlPar(parent[n]);
        }

        void unionBySize(int u, int v) {
            int ulp_u = findUlPar(u);
            int ulp_v = findUlPar(v);
            if (ulp_u == ulp_v)
                return;
            if (size[ulp_u] < size[ulp_v]) {
                parent[ulp_u] = ulp_v;
                size[ulp_v] += size[ulp_u];
            }
            else {
                parent[ulp_v] = ulp_u;
                size[ulp_u] += size[ulp_v];
            }
        }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        DisjointSet ds(n);
        unordered_map<int, int> cntx, cnty;
        for(int i = 0; i < points.size(); i++){
            auto it = points[i];
            int x = it[0], y = it[1];
            if(cntx.count(x))
                ds.unionBySize(i, cntx[x]);
            if(cnty.count(y))
                ds.unionBySize(i, cnty[y]);

            cntx[x] = i;
            cnty[y] = i;
        }

        vector<int> sizes;
        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++){
            if(ds.parent[i] == i)
                sizes.push_back(ds.size[i]);
        }

        sort(sizes.rbegin(), sizes.rend());
        if(sizes.size() >= 2)
            return sizes[0] + sizes[1] + 1;
        return sizes[0] + 1;
    }
};
//what we can do here is cluster all the connected points and the ans is size of the top2 + 1 for the new point

[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        if (n <= 3) 
        {
            return n;
        }
     int[] l_ani = new int[n];
        int[] r_ani = new int[n];

        l_ani[0] = 1;
        l_ani[1] = 2;

        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) 
        {
         if (nums[i] - nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2])
         {
            l_ani[i] = l_ani[i-1] + 1;
         }
        else
         {
               l_ani[i] = 2;
         }
        }
            r_ani[n-1] = 1;
        r_ani[n-2] = 2;

        for (int i = n-3; i >= 0; i--) 
      {
            if (nums[i+1] - nums[i] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1])
    {
      r_ani[i] = r_ani[i+1] + 1;
            }
            else
            {       
                r_ani[i] = 2;
            }
        }
       int anians = 2;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
            {
            anians = Math.max(anians, Math.max(l_ani[i], r_ani[i]) + 1);
            }
        for (int i = 1; i < n-1; i++)
            {
            int anidiff = nums[i+1] - nums[i-1];
            if (anidiff % 2 == 0)
            {
                int ani = anidiff / 2;
                int le = 1;
                if (i >= 2 && nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == ani)
                {
                    le = l_ani[i-1];
                }
    int ri = 1;
                if (i <= n-3 && nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == ani)
                {
                    ri = r_ani[i+1];
                }
                anians = Math.max(anians, le + ri + 1);
            }
        }
                 return Math.min(anians, n);
        
    }
}

[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    class ani_uni {
        HashMap<Long, Long> ani_nodes = new HashMap<>();
        long ani_locate(long ani_val) 
        {
            if (!ani_nodes.containsKey(ani_val)) 
            {
                ani_nodes.put(ani_val, ani_val);
                return ani_val;
            }
         if (ani_nodes.get(ani_val) == ani_val) 
         {
                return ani_val;
            }
            long parent = ani_locate(ani_nodes.get(ani_val));
       ani_nodes.put(ani_val, parent);
            return parent;
        }
        void ani_combine(long ani_a, long ani_b)
        {
          long ani_ra = ani_locate(ani_a);
            long ani_rb = ani_locate(ani_b);
            if (ani_ra != ani_rb) {
                ani_nodes.put(ani_ra, ani_rb);
            }
        }
    }
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        if (points.length == 0) 
        {
       return 1;
        }     
     ani_uni ani_dsu = new ani_uni();
     long ani_gap = 4000000000L;
        for (int[] ani_item : points)
            {
            ani_dsu.ani_combine((long) ani_item[0], (long) ani_item[1] + ani_gap);
        }
        HashMap<Long, Integer> ani_map = new HashMap<>();
        for (int[] ani_it : points)
            {
            long ani_ro = ani_dsu.ani_locate((long) ani_it[0]);      
         ani_map.put(ani_ro, ani_map.getOrDefault(ani_ro, 0) + 1);
        }
        List<Integer> ani_li = new ArrayList<>();
        for (Map.Entry<Long, Integer> ani_ptr : ani_map.entrySet())
            {
            ani_li.add(ani_ptr.getValue());
        }
      Collections.sort(ani_li, Collections.reverseOrder());
    if (ani_li.size() >= 2) {
            return ani_li.get(0) + ani_li.get(1) + 1;
        }
     return ani_li.get(0) + 1;
        
    }
}

### RANK 336 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        vector<int> diff;
        for(int i=0;i<nums.size()-1;i++){
            diff.push_back((nums[i+1]-nums[i]));
        }
        int n=nums.size();
        vector<int> l(n-1,1),r(n-1,1);
        for(int i=1;i<n-1;i++){
            if(diff[i]==diff[i-1])l[i]=l[i-1]+1;
        }
        for(int i=n-3;i>=0;i--){
            if(diff[i]==diff[i+1])r[i]=r[i+1]+1;
        }
        int ans=0;
        for(auto i:l)ans=max(ans,min(n,i+2));
        for(auto i:r)ans=max(ans,min(n,i+2));
        for(int i=0;i<=n-3;i++){
            int sum=diff[i]+diff[i+1];
            if(sum%2==0){
                int x=sum/2,le=2;
                if(i-1>=0 && diff[i-1]==x)le+=l[i-1];
                if(i+2<=n-2 && diff[i+2]==x)le+=r[i+2];
                ans=max(ans,le+1);
            }
        }      
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    vector<int> par,sze;
    int find(int i){
        if(par[i]==i)return i;
        return par[i]=find(par[i]);
    }
    void join(int i,int j){
        int pari=find(i);
        int parj=find(j);
        if(pari!=parj){
            par[pari]=parj;
            sze[parj]+=sze[pari];
        }
    }
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n=points.size();
        par.resize(n);
        sze.resize(n,1);
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++)par[i]=i;
        unordered_map<int,int> x_c,y_c;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            int x=points[i][0],y=points[i][1];
            if(x_c.count(x))join(i,x_c[x]);
            else x_c[x]=i;
            if(y_c.count(y))join(i,y_c[y]);
            else y_c[y]=i;
        }
        vector<int> c_sze;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){if(par[i]==i)c_sze.push_back(sze[i]);}
        sort(c_sze.rbegin(),c_sze.rend());
        if(c_sze.size()==1)return c_sze[0]+1;
        return c_sze[0]+c_sze[1]+1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 337 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length, ans = 0;
        if (n <= 3) return n;
        int[] diff = new int[n], p = new int[n], s = new int[n];
        for(int i = 0; i < n-1; i++) {
            diff[i] = nums[i+1] - nums[i];
        }
        p[0] = 1;
        for (int i = 1; i < n-1; i++) {
            p[i] = (diff[i] == diff[i-1]) ? p[i-1]+1 : 1;
        }
        s[n-2] = 1;
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            s[i] = (diff[i] == diff[i+1]) ? s[i+1]+1 : 1;
        }
        int i = 0;
        while (i < n-1) {
            int curr = s[i];
            if (curr == n-1) ans = n;
            else  ans = Math.max(ans, curr + 2);
            i += curr;
        }
        for (int j = 0; j < n - 2; j++) {
            long sum = (long) diff[j] + diff[j+1];
            if (sum % 2 == 0) {
                int d = (int) (sum / 2);
                int l = (j > 0 && diff[j-1] == d) ? p[j-1] : 0;
                int r = (j + 2 < n-1 && diff[j+2] == d) ? s[j+2] : 0;
                ans = Math.max(ans, l + r + 3);
            }
        }
        return ans;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        DSU dsu = new DSU(n);
        HashMap<Integer, Integer> x = new HashMap<>(), y = new HashMap<>();
        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++){
            int[] e = points[i];
            x.putIfAbsent(e[0], i);
            y.putIfAbsent(e[1], i);
            dsu.merge(i, x.get(e[0]));
            dsu.merge(i, y.get(e[1]));
        }
        Set<Integer> parents = new HashSet<>();
        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++) parents.add(dsu.find(i));
        int max = 0, second = 0;
        for(int e: parents){
            int size = dsu.size[e];
            if(dsu.size[e] >= max){
                second = max;
                max = size;
            } else if(size > second){
                second = size;
            }
        }
        return max + second + 1;
    }

    class DSU{
        int[] parent,rank, size;
        int trees;
        public DSU(int n){
            trees = n;
            parent = new int[n]; rank = new int[n];
            size = new int[n];
            for(int i = 0; i < n; i++) size[i] = 1;
            for(int i =0;i<n;i++) parent[i]=i;
        }
        public  int find(int i){
            if(i==parent[i] ) return i;
            return parent[i]=find(parent[i]);
        }
        public void merge(int i, int j){
            i = find(i); j = find(j);
            if(i == j) return;
            trees--;
            if(rank[i]==rank[j]){
                rank[i]++;
                parent[j]=i;
                size[i] += size[j];
            }
            else if(rank[i]>rank[j]){
                parent[j] = i;
                size[i] += size[j];
            } else {
                parent[i] = j;
                size[j] += size[i];
            }
        }
    }
}
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        @cache
        def dp(now,d,b):
            if now == len(l):
                return 0
            if l[now] == d:
                return 1+dp(now+1,d,b)
            if b and now < len(l)-1:
                if l[now]+l[now+1] == d<<1:
                    return 2+dp(now+2,d,False)
            if b:
                return 1
            return 0
        l = []
        for i in range(1,len(nums)):
            l.append(nums[i]-nums[i-1])
        ans = 0
        for i,x in enumerate(l):
            ans = max(ans,1+dp(i,x,True))
        for i in range(1,len(l)):
            if (l[i-1]+l[i])&1 == 0:
                ans = max(ans,3+dp(i+1,(l[i-1]+l[i])>>1,False))
            ans = max(ans,2+dp(i,l[i],False))
        dp.cache_clear()
        return ans
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        parent = list(range(len(points)))
        def find(x):
            if parent[x] != x:
                parent[x] = find(parent[x])
            return parent[x]
        d = {}
        for i,p in enumerate(points):
            if (0,p[0]) in d:
                x = find(d[(0,p[0])])
                parent[x] = i
            else:
                d[(0,p[0])] = i
            if (1,p[1]) in d:
                y = find(d[(1,p[1])])
                parent[y] = i
            else:
                d[(1,p[1])] = i
        d = {}
        for i,x in enumerate(parent):
            p = find(i)
            if p in d:
                d[p] += 1
            else:
                d[p] = 1
        l = list(d.values())
        if len(l) == 1:
            return 1+l[0]
        l.sort()
        return 1+l[-1]+l[-2]
[Q4_END]

### RANK 340 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        p = [0] * n
        p[1] = 1
        for i in range(2,n):
            if nums[i]-nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]:
                p[i] = p[i-1] + 1
            else: p[i] = 1
        q = [0] * n
        q[-2] = 1
        for i in range(n-3,-1,-1):
            if nums[i]-nums[i+1] == nums[i+1] - nums[i+2]:
                q[i] = q[i+1] + 1
            else: q[i] = 1

        ans = max(max(p), max(q))
        if ans >= n-2: return n
        ans0 = 1 + q[1] + 1
        ansN = 1 + p[-2] + 1
        ans = max(ans+2, ans0, ansN)
        #print(p,q)

        for i in range(1,n-1):
            x,y,z = nums[i-1], nums[i], nums[i+1]
            if y-x == z-y: continue
            if (z-x) % 2 > 0: continue
            # new y = (z + x) // 2
            y = (x + z) // 2
            ansx = 3
            if i > 1 and y-x == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]:
                ansx += p[i-1]
            if i < n-2 and y-z == nums[i+1] - nums[i+2]:
                ansx += q[i+1]
            ans = max(ans, ansx)
            #print(i,nums[i],y,ansx, ans)

        return ans
            
        
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, nums: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)

        hx = defaultdict(list)
        hy = defaultdict(list)
        q = defaultdict(int)
        for i,[x,y] in enumerate(nums):
            hx[x].append(y)
            hy[y].append(x)
            q[(x,y)] = i

        uf = list(range(n))
        def find(x):
            if uf[x]!=x: uf[x] = find(uf[x])
            return uf[x]
        def union(x,y):
            uf[find(y)] = find(x)

        for x in hx:
            arr = hx[x]
            y0 = arr[0]
            u = q[(x,y0)]
            fu = find(u)
            for i in range(1,len(arr)):
                v = q[(x,arr[i])]
                fv = find(v)
                if fu != fv:
                    union(u,v)
        for y in hy:
            arr = hy[y]
            x0 = arr[0]
            u = q[(x0,y)]
            fu = find(u)
            for i in range(1,len(arr)):
                v = q[(arr[i],y)]
                fv = find(v)
                if fu != fv:
                    union(u,v)

        h = [0] * n
        for i in range(n):
            fi = find(i)
            h[fi] += 1
        #print(h)

        hh = [x for x in h if x > 0]
        hh.sort(reverse=True)
        ans = hh[0] + 1
        if len(hh) > 1: ans += hh[1]
        return ans
                
            

        
[Q4_END]
##################

### RANK 341 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n=nums.size();
        if(n<=2) return n;
        vector<map<int,int>>L(n),R(n);
        int ml=2;
        for(int i=1;i<n;i++){
            int d=nums[i]-nums[i-1];
            L[i][d]=(L[i-1].count(d)?L[i-1][d]:1)+1;
            ml=max(ml,L[i][d]);
        }
        for(int i=n-2;i>=0;i--){
            int d=nums[i+1]-nums[i];
            R[i][d]=(R[i+1].count(d)?R[i+1][d]:1)+1;
        }
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            if(i>0 && i<n-1){
                if((nums[i+1]-nums[i-1])%2==0){
                    int d=(nums[i+1]-nums[i-1])/2;
                    int l=L[i-1].count(d)?L[i-1][d]:1;
                    int r=R[i+1].count(d)?R[i+1][d]:1;
                    ml=max(ml,l+r+1);
                }
            for(auto const&[d,len]:L[i-1] )ml=max(ml,len+1);
            for(auto const&[d,len]:R[i+1]) ml=max(ml,len+1);}
            else if(i==0){
                for(auto const&[d,len]:R[1]) ml=max(ml,len+1);
            }
            else if(i==n-1){
                for(auto const&[d,len]:L[n-2])ml=max(ml,len+1);
            }
        }
        return min(ml,n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
       map<vector<int>,int>m;
        unordered_map<int,vector<int>>x;
        unordered_map<int,vector<int>>y;
    int bfs(int x1 ,int y1){
        queue<pair<int,int>>q;
        q.push({x1,y1});
        m[{x1,y1}]=1;
        int c=0;
        while((!q.empty())){
        auto it=q.front();
            c++;
            q.pop();
            int l=it.first;
            int r=it.second;
        for(int i=0;i<x[l].size();i++){
            if(m.find({l,x[l][i]})==m.end()){
                m[{l,x[l][i]}]=1;
            q.push({l,x[l][i]});
            }
        }
            x[l].clear();
        for(int j=0;j<y[r].size();j++){
            if(m.find({y[r][j],r})==m.end()){
                m[{y[r][j],r}]=1;
            q.push({y[r][j],r});
            }

        }
            y[r].clear();
        }
        return c;}
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        for(auto it:points){
            x[it[0]].push_back(it[1]);
            y[it[1]].push_back(it[0]);
        }
        int max1=0;
        int max2=0;
        for(int i=0;i<points.size();i++){
            int l=points[i][0];
            int r=points[i][1];
            if(m.find({l,r})==m.end()){
            int c=bfs(l,r);
            if(c>max1){
                max2=max1;max1=c;
            }
                else if(c>max2) max2=c;
            }
        }
        return max1+max2+1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]
##################

### RANK 342 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        int[] diff = new int[n - 1];
        for(int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++){
            diff[i] = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
        }
        var hm = new HashMap<Integer, List<int[]>>();
        int cur = diff[0];
        int l = 0;
        for(int i = 1; i < n-1; i++){
            if(diff[i] != cur){
                hm.computeIfAbsent(cur, li -> new ArrayList<>()).add(new int[]{l, i});
                l = i;
                cur = diff[i];
            }
        }
        hm.computeIfAbsent(cur, li -> new ArrayList<>()).add(new int[]{l, n - 1});
        int res = 0;
        for(var e : hm.entrySet()){
            int curd = e.getKey();
            int[] last = new int[]{Integer.MIN_VALUE, Integer.MIN_VALUE};
            for(int[] i : e.getValue()){
                res = Math.max(res, i[1] - i[0] + 1);
                if(i[0] > 0 || i[1] < n - 1){
                    res = Math.max(res, i[1] - i[0] + 2);
                }
                // System.out.println(curd + "," + res + Arrays.toString(i));
                if(i[0] >= 2 && diff[i[0] - 1] + diff[i[0] - 2] == curd*2){
                    if(last[1] == i[0] - 2){
                        res = Math.max(i[1] - last[0] + 1, res);
                    }
                    else{
                        res = Math.max(i[1] - i[0] + 3, res);
                    }
                }
                if(i[1] < n - 2 && diff[i[1]] + diff[i[1] + 1] == curd*2){
                    res = Math.max(i[1] - i[0] + 3, res);
                }
                last = i;
                // System.out.println(curd + "," + res);
            }
        }
        return res;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        var dsu = new DSU(n);
        var hmx = new HashMap<Integer, Integer>();
        var hmy = new HashMap<Integer, Integer>();
        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++){
            if(hmx.containsKey(points[i][0])){
                dsu.union(i, hmx.get(points[i][0]));
            }
            else{
                hmx.put(points[i][0], i);
            }
            if(hmy.containsKey(points[i][1])){
                dsu.union(i, hmy.get(points[i][1]));
            }
            else{
                hmy.put(points[i][1], i);
            }
        }
        int max0 = 0, max1 = 0;
        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++){
            if(dsu.par[i] == i){
                int sz = dsu.size[i];
                if(sz > max0){
                    max1 = max0;
                    max0 = sz;
                }
                else if(sz > max1){
                    max1 = sz;
                }
            }
        }
        return 1 + max0 + max1;
    }

    public class DSU {
        int[] par;
        int[] size;
        public DSU(int n){
            par = new int[n];
            size = new int[n];
            for(int i = 0; i < n; i++){
                par[i] = i;
                size[i] = 1;
            }
        }
    
        int find(int x){
            return x == par[x] ? x : (par[x] = find(par[x]));
        }
    
        void union(int x, int y){
            int px = find(x);
            int py = find(y);
            if(px != py){
                if(size[px] < size[py]){
                    par[py] = px;
                    size[px] += size[py];
                }
                else{
                    par[px] = py;
                    size[py] += size[px];
                }
            }
        }
    }

}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 343 ###
[Q3_START]
#include <vector>
#include <unordered_map>
#include <algorithm>

using namespace std;

class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 2) return n;

        int ans = 2;

        // pref[i] = length of arithmetic subarray ending at i
        // suff[i] = length of arithmetic subarray starting at i
        // These only work for the "natural" difference at that spot.
        vector<int> pref(n, 1), suff(n, 1);
        
        pref[1] = 2;
        for (int i = 2; i < n; ++i) {
            if (nums[i] - nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2])
                pref[i] = pref[i-1] + 1;
            else
                pref[i] = 2;
        }
        
        suff[n-2] = 2;
        for (int i = n-3; i >= 0; --i) {
            if (nums[i+1] - nums[i] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1])
                suff[i] = suff[i+1] + 1;
            else
                suff[i] = 2;
        }

        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            // Case 1: Change nums[i] to bridge nums[i-1] and nums[i+1]
            if (i > 0 && i < n - 1) {
                if ((nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) % 2 == 0) {
                    int d = (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) / 2;
                    int total = 1; // the changed element
                    int left = 1, right = 1;
                    
                    if (i >= 2 && nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == d) left = pref[i-1];
                    if (i <= n - 3 && nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == d) right = suff[i+1];
                    
                    ans = max(ans, left + right + 1);
                }
            }

            // Case 2: Change nums[i] to match the difference of the left side
            if (i > 1) {
                ans = max(ans, pref[i-1] + 1);
            }
            // Case 3: Change nums[i] to match the difference of the right side
            if (i < n - 2) {
                ans = max(ans, suff[i+1] + 1);
            }
            
            // Case 4: Special bridge where i is the second or second-to-last element
            // This covers [1, 1, 2, 3] -> change nums[0] to 0
            if (i == 0) ans = max(ans, suff[1] + 1);
            if (i == n - 1) ans = max(ans, pref[n-2] + 1);
        }

        // Final check for the [1, 1, 2, 3] type cases: 
        // Any two adjacent elements can have their difference extended by 1
        for(int i = 0; i < n - 1; ++i) {
            ans = max(ans, 2 + (i + 2 < n ? 1 : 0)); // Extend right
            ans = max(ans, 2 + (i - 1 >= 0 ? 1 : 0)); // Extend left
        }

        return min(ans, n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
#include <vector>
#include <unordered_map>
#include <set>
#include <numeric>
#include <algorithm>

using namespace std;

class Solution {
    struct DSU {
        vector<int> parent;
        vector<int> sz;
        DSU(int n) {
            parent.resize(n);
            iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0);
            sz.assign(n, 1);
        }
        int find(int i) {
            if (parent[i] == i) return i;
            return parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
        }
        void unite(int i, int j) {
            int root_i = find(i);
            int root_j = find(j);
            if (root_i != root_j) {
                if (sz[root_i] < sz[root_j]) swap(root_i, root_j);
                parent[root_j] = root_i;
                sz[root_i] += sz[root_j];
            }
        }
    };

public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        if (n == 0) return 1;

        DSU dsu(n);
        unordered_map<int, int> last_x, last_y;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            if (last_x.count(points[i][0])) dsu.unite(last_x[points[i][0]], i);
            if (last_y.count(points[i][1])) dsu.unite(last_y[points[i][1]], i);
            last_x[points[i][0]] = i;
            last_y[points[i][1]] = i;
        }

        // Group component info: root -> {size, set of unique X, set of unique Y, count of points}
        struct CompInfo {
            int size = 0;
            set<int> ux, uy;
        };
        unordered_map<int, CompInfo> info;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            int r = dsu.find(i);
            info[r].size = dsu.sz[r];
            info[r].ux.insert(points[i][0]);
            info[r].uy.insert(points[i][1]);
        }

        vector<pair<int, int>> sorted_roots;
        for (auto const& [r, data] : info) {
            sorted_roots.push_back({data.size, r});
        }
        sort(sorted_roots.rbegin(), sorted_roots.rend());

        // Baseline: Single largest component + 1 new point
        int max_ans = sorted_roots[0].first + 1;

        // Check if we can merge the two largest components
        if (sorted_roots.size() >= 2) {
            int r1 = sorted_roots[0].second;
            int r2 = sorted_roots[1].second;
            
            // Logic: Can we find an (x, y) such that x is in Comp1 and y is in Comp2
            // OR x is in Comp2 and y is in Comp1, and (x, y) is empty?
            
            auto can_merge = [&](int a, int b) {
                // Check intersection: x from A, y from B
                // If |unique_x_A| * |unique_y_B| > points_that_bridge_them, an empty spot exists.
                // But simplified: as long as there's any x in A and y in B, we can 
                // almost always find an empty (x, y) unless the grid is fully packed.
                // In 10^9 space, the grid is NEVER fully packed.
                return true; 
            };

            if (can_merge(r1, r2)) {
                max_ans = max(max_ans, info[r1].size + info[r2].size + 1);
            }
        }

        return min(max_ans, n + 1);
    }
};
[Q4_END]

//HEADERS

#define dvv(vec,n,m) f(i,0,n) f(j,0,m) cin >> vec[i][j];
#define dv(vec,T,n) f(i,0,n){T x; cin >> x; vec.push_back(x);}
#define f(i,a,n) for(int i{a}; i < (int)n; ++i)
#define ff(i,n,a) for(int i{n}; i >= (int)a; --i)
#define py  cout << "YES" << endl
#define pn  cout << "NO" << endl

#define rall(p) p.rbegin(),p.rend()

template<typename T>
void pvec(vector<T>& vec)
{
    int x = vec.size();
    for(int i{}; i < x; ++i)
       cout << vec[i] << " ";
    
    cout << endl;
}

int modadd(int a, int b, int c) {return ((a%c)+(b%c))%c;}
int modsub(int a, int b, int c) {return ((a%c)-(b%c)+c)%c;}
ll modmul(ll a, ll b, ll c) {return ((a%c)*(b%c))%c;}

ll binexp(ll n, ll p, ll mod)
{
    ll ans{1}, a{n};
    while(p > 0)
    {
        if(p&1)
            ans = (ans*a) % mod;


        a = (a*a) % mod;
        p >>= 1;
    }
    return ans;
}

bool ibit(int num, int i)
{return (num & (1LL << i));}

void set_bit(int& num, int i)
{num = (num | (1LL << i));}

void unset_bit(int& num, int i)
{num = (num & ~(1LL << i));}

template <typename T>
using pq = priority_queue<T>;

template <typename T>
using spq = priority_queue<T, vector<T>, greater<T>>;

vector<int> dx = {0,0,-1,1,1,-1,-1,1};
vector<int> dy = {-1,1,0,0,1,-1,1,-1};

int gcd(int a, int b) 
{return b?gcd(b,a%b):a;}

int lcm(int a, int b)
{return (a/gcd(a,b))*b;}

bool in(int r, int c, int n, int m)
{return(r >= 0 && r < n && c >= 0 && c < m);}

mt19937_64 rng(chrono::steady_clock::now().time_since_epoch().count());

inline int random_num(int l, int r)
{
    return rng() % (r - l + 1) + l;
}

//CONSTANTS
constexpr ll mod7 = 1e9 + 7;
constexpr ll mod3 = 998244353;
constexpr ll inf = 1e18;

class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& vec) {
        int n = vec.size();

        if(n <= 2)
            return n;

        vi z(n - 1);
        for(int i{}; i < n - 1; ++i)
        {
            z[i] = vec[i + 1] - vec[i];
        }

        int ans{1};
        int c{1};
        vi pref(n - 1);
        pref[0] = 1;
        for(int i{1}; i < n - 1; ++i)
        {
            if(z[i] == z[i - 1])
                ++c;

            else
                c = 1;

            ans = max(ans, c);
            pref[i] = c;
        }

        vi suff(n - 1);
        suff[n - 2] = 1;
        c = 1;
        for(int i{n - 3}; i >= 0; --i)
        {
            if(z[i] == z[i + 1])
                ++c;

            else
                c = 1;

            suff[i] = c;
        }      

        for(int i{}; i < n - 1; ++i)
        {
            if(i - 2 >= 0)
                ans = max(ans, pref[i - 2] + 2);

            if(i + 1 < n - 1)
                ans = max(ans, suff[i + 1] + 2);
            
            if(i - 2 >= 0 && i + 1 < n - 1)
            {
                if(z[i - 2] == z[i + 1] && (z[i - 1] + z[i] == 2 * z[i - 2]))
                {
                    ans = max(ans, pref[i - 2] + suff[i + 1] + 3);
                }
            }

            if(i - 2 >= 0 && z[i - 1] + z[i] == 2 * z[i - 2])
            {
                ans = max(ans, pref[i - 2] + 3);
            }

            if(i + 1 < n - 1 && i - 1 >= 0 && z[i - 1] + z[i] == 2 * z[i + 1])
            {
                ans = max(ans, suff[i + 1] + 3);
            }
        }

        ans = max(ans, pref[n - 3] + 2);
        ans = min(ans, n);
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]

//CONSTANTS
constexpr ll mod7 = 1e9 + 7;
constexpr ll mod3 = 998244353;
constexpr ll inf = 1e18;

class dsu
{
    public:
    vector<int> parent;
    vector<int> size;
    
    dsu(int n)
    {
        parent.resize(n);
        size.resize(n,1);
        iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0);
    }

    int find(int child)
    {
        if(parent[child] == child)
            return child;

        return parent[child] = find(parent[child]);
    }

    int unite(int u, int v)
    {
        int pu{find(u)};
        int pv{find(v)};
        if(pu == pv)
            return pu;

        if(size[pu] > size[pv])
            swap(pu, pv);

        size[pv] += size[pu];
        parent[pu] = pv;
        return pv;
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        map<int,vi> rows;
        map<int,vi> cols;

        for(int i{}; i < n; ++i)
        {
            int x{points[i][0]}, y{points[i][1]};
            rows[x].push_back(i);
            cols[y].push_back(i);
        }

        dsu d(n);
        for(auto& [a,b]: rows)
        {
            for(int i{1}; i < (int)b.size(); ++i)
                d.unite(b[i], b[i - 1]);
        }

        for(auto& [a,b]: cols)
        {
            for(int i{1}; i < (int)b.size(); ++i)
                d.unite(b[i], b[i - 1]);
        }

        vi pars;
        for(int i{}; i < n; ++i)
            pars.pb(d.find(i));

        sort(all(pars));
        uniq(pars);
        vi z;
        for(auto& val: pars)
            z.pb(d.size[val]);

        sort(rall(z));
        if(z.size() == 1)
            return z[0] + 1;

        else
            return z[0] + z[1] + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 345 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        int ans = 0;
        int[] a = new int[n - 1];
        for(int i = 1; i < n; i++) {
            a[i - 1] = nums[i] - nums[i - 1];
        }
        int[] left = new int[n - 1];
        left[0] = 1;
        for(int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++) {
            if(a[i] == a[i - 1]) {
                left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1;
            } else {
                left[i] = 1;
            }
        }
        int[] right = new int[n - 1];
        right[n - 2] = 1;
        for(int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if(a[i] == a[i + 1]) {
                right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1;
            } else {
                right[i] = 1;
            }
        }
        for(int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) {
            ans = Math.max(ans, Math.min(n, left[i] + 2));
        }
        for(int i = 0; i < n - 2; i++) {
            int sum = a[i] + a[i + 1];
            if(sum % 2 == 0) {
                int d = sum / 2;
                int curr = 3;
                if(i - 1 >= 0 && a[i - 1] == d) {
                    curr += left[i - 1];
                }
                if(i + 2 < n - 1 && a[i + 2] == d) {
                    curr += right[i + 2];
                }
                ans = Math.max(ans, curr);
            }
        }
        return ans;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    int[] parent;
    int[] size;
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        parent = new int[n];
        size = new int[n];
        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            parent[i] = i;
            size[i] = 1;
        }
        Map<Integer, Integer> xm = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Integer> ym = new HashMap<>();
        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];
            if(xm.containsKey(x)) {
                union(i, xm.get(x));
            } else {
                xm.put(x, i);
            }
            if(ym.containsKey(y)) {
                union(i, ym.get(y));
            } else {
                ym.put(y, i);
            }
        }
        int max1 = 0;
        int max2 = 0;
        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if(parent[i] == i) {
                if(size[i] > max1) {
                    max2 = max1;
                    max1 = size[i];
                } else if(size[i] > max2) {
                    max2 = size[i];
                }
            }
        }
        return 1 + max1 + max2;
    }
    public int find(int i) {
        if(parent[i] == i) {
            return i;
        }
        return parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
    }
    public void union(int a, int b) {
        int r1 = find(a);
        int r2 = find(b);
        if(r1 != r2) {
            if(size[r1] < size[r2]) {
                parent[r1] = r2;
                size[r2] += size[r1];
            } else {
                parent[r2] = r1;
                size[r1] += size[r2];
            }
        }
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 346 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        diff = [nums[i + 1] - nums[i] for i in range(n - 1)]
        left, right = [1] * (n - 1), [1] * (n - 1)
        for i in range(1, n - 1):
            if diff[i] == diff[i - 1]:
                left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1
            else:
                left[i] = 1

        for i in reversed(range(0, n - 2)):
            if diff[i] == diff[i + 1]:
                right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1
            else:
                right[i] = 1

        l_left = [1] * n
        d_left = [0] * n
        for i in range(1, n):
            l_left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1
            d_left[i] = diff[i - 1]

        l_right = [1] * n
        d_right = [0] * n
        for i in range(n - 1):
            l_right[i] = right[i] + 1
            d_right[i] = diff[i]

        res = max(l_left)
        for i in range(n):
            if i > 0:
                res = max(res, l_left[i - 1] + 1)
            if i < n - 1:
                res = max(res, l_right[i + 1] + 1)
            
            if 0 < i < n - 1:
                L = d_left[i - 1] if l_left[i - 1] >= 2 else None
                R = d_right[i + 1] if l_right[i + 1] >= 2 else None
                if l_left[i - 1] >= 2 and l_right[i + 1] >= 2:
                    if L == R and nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1] == 2 * L:
                        res = max(res, l_left[i - 1] + l_right[i + 1] + 1)
                if l_left[i - 1] >= 2:
                    if nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1] == 2 * L :
                        res = max(res, l_left[i - 1] + 2)
                if l_right[i + 1] >= 2:
                    if nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1] == 2 * R :
                        res = max(res, l_right[i + 1] + 2)
                if (nums[i + 1] + nums[i - 1]) % 2 == 0:
                    res = max(res, 3)
        return res
                    
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        xs, ys = set(), set()
        for x, y in points:
            xs.add(x)
            ys.add(y)
        list_x, list_y = list(xs), list(ys)
        x_id = {x: i for i, x in enumerate(list_x)}
        y_id = {y: i + len(list_x) for i, y in enumerate(list_y)}
        n = len(list_x) + len(ys)

        parent = {}
        def find(i):
            if parent.get(i, i) != i:
                parent[i] = find(parent[i])
            return parent.get(i, i)
 
        def union(i, j):
            parent[find(i)] = find(j)
            
        for x, y in points:
            union(x_id[x], y_id[y])

        arr = [0] * n
        for x, y in points:
            arr[find(x_id[x])] += 1

        res = [a for a in arr if a > 0]
        if len(res) >= 2:
            res.sort()
            return res[-1] + res[-2] + 1
        else:
            return res[-1] + 1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 347 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        int[] left = new int[n],right = new int[n];
        for(int i = 0;i<n;i++)left[i]=right[i]=1;
        left[0] = 1;
        left[1] = 2;
        for(int i = 2;i<n;i++){
            if(nums[i] - nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2])left[i]=left[i-1]+1;
            else left[i] = 2;
        }
        right[n-1] = 1;
        right[n-2] = 2;
        for(int i = n-3;i>=0;i--){
            if(nums[i+1] - nums[i] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1])right[i] = right[i+1]+1;
            else right[i] = 2;
        }
        int res = 2;
        for(int i = 1;i<n-1;i++){
            res = Math.max(res,left[i-1]+1);
            res = Math.max(res,right[i+1]+1);
            if((nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) % 2 == 0){
                int d = (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1])/2;
                int l = 1,r = 1;
                if(i>=2 && nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == d)l = left[i-1];
                if(i+2<n && nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == d)r = right[i+1];
                res = Math.max(res,l + r + 1);
            }
        }
        res = Math.max(res,left[n-2] + 1);
        res = Math.max(res,right[1] + 1);
        return Math.min(res,n);
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        DSU dsu = new DSU(n);
        Map<Integer,Integer> xMap = new HashMap<>(),yMap = new HashMap<>();
        for(int i = 0;i<n;i++){
            int x = points[i][0],y = points[i][1];
            if(xMap.containsKey(x)){
                dsu.union(i,xMap.get(x));
            }
            else xMap.put(x,i);
            if(yMap.containsKey(y)){
                dsu.union(i,yMap.get(y));
            }
            else yMap.put(y,i);
        }
        List<Integer> list = new ArrayList<>();
        for(int i = 0;i<n;i++){
            if(dsu.parent[i]==i)list.add(dsu.size[i]);
        }
        Collections.sort(list,Collections.reverseOrder());
        if(list.size()==1)return list.get(0)+1;
        return list.get(0)+list.get(1)+1;
    }
}
class DSU {
    int[] parent;
    int[] size;
    DSU(int n){
        this.parent = new int[n];
        this.size = new int[n];
        for(int i = 0;i<n;i++){
            parent[i]=i;
            size[i]=1;
        }
    }
    int find(int x){
        if(parent[x] == x)return x;
        return parent[x] = find(parent[x]);
    }
    void union(int x,int y){
        int rX = parent[x],rY = parent[y];
        if(rX!=rY){
            if(size[rX]<size[rY]){
                parent[rX] = rY;
                size[rY]+=size[rX];
            }
            else{
                parent[rY] = rX;
                size[rX]+=size[rY];    
            }
        }
    }
}

### RANK 349 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        diff = [b-a for a,b in pairwise(nums)]
        runs = [(d,len(list(g))) for d,g in groupby(diff)]
        best = max(l for d,l in runs)+1
        if best == len(nums):
            return best
        best += 1
        for _ in range(2):
            for i in range(len(runs)-2):
                if runs[i+1][1] == runs[i+2][1] == 1 and runs[i+1][0]+runs[i+2][0] == 2*runs[i][0]:
                    if i+3 < len(runs) and runs[i+3][0] == runs[i][0]:
                        best = max(best,runs[i][1]+runs[i+3][1]+3)
                    else:
                        best = max(best,runs[i][1]+3)
            runs.reverse()
        return best
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DisjointSetsError(Exception):
    pass

class DisjointSetsNode:
    def __init__(self, x):
        self.value = x
        self.parent = self
        self.size = 1

    @staticmethod
    def find(x, splitting=False):
        if splitting:
            while x.parent is not x:
                x.parent, x = x.parent.parent, x.parent
            return x
        else:
            rep = x
            while rep.parent is not rep:
                rep = rep.parent
            while x is not rep:
                x.parent, x = rep, x.parent
            return rep

    @staticmethod
    def union(x, y):
        x = DisjointSetsNode.find(x)
        y = DisjointSetsNode.find(y)
        if x is y:
            return False
        if x.size < y.size:
            x, y = y, x
        y.parent = x
        x.size += y.size
        del y.size
        return True

class DisjointSets:
    def __init__(self):
        self.nodes = {}
        self.count = 0

    def make_set(self, x):
        if x in self.nodes:
            raise DisjointSetsError('Cannot add item that is already present')
        self.nodes[x] = DisjointSetsNode(x)
        self.count += 1

    def __contains__(self, x):
        return x in self.nodes

    def find(self, x, splitting=False):
        if x not in self.nodes:
            raise DisjointSetsError('Item must be present to perform find')
        return DisjointSetsNode.find(self.nodes[x], splitting).value

    def union(self, x, y):
        if x not in self.nodes or y not in self.nodes:
            raise DisjointSetsError('Both items must be present to perform union')
        merged = DisjointSetsNode.union(self.nodes[x], self.nodes[y])
        if merged:
            self.count -= 1
        return merged

    def __len__(self):
        return self.count

class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        ds = DisjointSets()
        for x in {x for x,y in points}:
            ds.make_set((x,0))
        for y in {y for x,y in points}:
            ds.make_set((y,1))
        for x,y in points:
            ds.union((x,0),(y,1))
        freq = Counter()
        for x,y in points:
            freq[ds.find((x,0))] += 1
        l = sorted(freq.values())
        if len(l) == 1:
            return l[0]+1
        return l[-2]+l[-1]+1

[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int[] a = nums;
        int n = nums.length;

        if (n <= 2)
            return n;

        int[] l = new int[n];
        int[] r = new int[n];
        
        l[0] = 1;
        l[1] = 2;
        
        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) 
        {
            if (nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2])
                l[i] = l[i - 1] + 1;
            else
                l[i] = 2;
        }
        r[n - 1] = 1;
        r[n - 2] = 2;
        
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) 
        {
            if (nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1])
                r[i] = r[i + 1] + 1;
            else
                r[i] = 2;
        }
        int ans = 2;
        
        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++) 
        {
            if ((nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) % 2 == 0) 
            {
                int d = (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) / 2;
                
                int x = 1;
                int y = 1;
                
                if (i >= 2 && nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == d)
                    x = l[i - 1];
                
                if (i + 2 < n && nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == d)
                    y = r[i + 1];
                
                ans = Math.max(ans, x + y + 1);
            }
            ans = Math.max(ans, l[i - 1] + 1);
            ans = Math.max(ans, r[i + 1] + 1);
        }
        ans = Math.max(ans, l[n - 2] + 1);
        ans = Math.max(ans, r[1] + 1);
        
        return Math.min(ans, n);
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int[][] a = points;
        int n = points.length;
        
        int[] x = new int[n];
        
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
            x[i] = i;
        
        Map<Integer, Integer> m1 = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Integer> m2 = new HashMap<>();
        
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) 
        {
            int p = points[i][0];
            int q = points[i][1];
            
            if (m1.containsKey(p))
                union(x, i, m1.get(p));
            
            if (m2.containsKey(q))
                union(x, i, m2.get(q));
            
            m1.put(p, i);
            m2.put(q, i);
        }
        
        Map<Integer, Integer> map = new HashMap<>();
        
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) 
        {
            int root = find(x, i);
            map.put(root, map.getOrDefault(root, 0) + 1);
        }
        
        if (map.size() == 1)
            return n + 1;
        
        List<Integer> lst = new ArrayList<>(map.values());
        Collections.sort(lst, Collections.reverseOrder());

        return lst.get(0) + lst.get(1) + 1;
    }

    public int find(int[] x, int i) {
        if (x[i] == i)
            return i;
        
        return x[i] = find(x, x[i]);
    }

    public void union(int[] x, int i, int j) {
        int ri = find(x, i);
        int rj = find(x, j);
        
        if (ri != rj)
            x[ri] = rj;
    }
}
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        vector<int>l(n,1),ld(n,INT_MAX) , r(n,1) , rd(n,INT_MAX);
        l[0] = 1;
        r[n-1] = 1;
        for(int i = 1; i<n; i++)
            {
                ld[i] = nums[i] - nums[i-1];
                if(i==1 || ld[i] != ld[i-1])l[i] = 2;
                else l[i] = l[i-1]+1;
            }

        for(int i = n-2; i>=0; i--)
            {
               rd[i] = nums[i+1] - nums[i];
                if(i==n-2 || rd[i] != rd[i+1])r[i] = 2;
                else r[i] = r[i+1]+1;
            }

        int ans = 0;
        for(int i =0; i<n; i++) ans = max({ans , l[i], r[i] });
        ans = max(ans , r[1]+1);
        ans = max(ans , l[n-2]+1);


        for(int i = 1; i<=n-2; i++)
            {
                ans = max(ans ,  l[i-1]+1);
                ans = max(ans , r[i+1]+1);
                
               int sum = nums[i+1] - nums[i-1];
                if(sum %2 ==0)
                {
                    int d = sum/2;
                    int lc = 1;
                    if(i-1 >=1 && ld[i-1] == d)lc = l[i-1];

                    int rc= 1;
                    if(i+1 <=n-2 &&rd[i+1] ==d)rc = r[i+1];

                    ans = max(ans , lc+rc+1);
                }
            }
        return min(ans , n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    vector<vector<int>>g;
    vector<int>vis;
    int dfs(int v)
    {
        vis[v] = 1;
        int cnt =0;
        for(int u: g[v])
            {
                cnt++;
                if(!vis[u])cnt += dfs(u);
            }
        return cnt;
    }
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n  = points.size();
        map<int , int>mx,my;
        int id = 0;

        for(auto&p: points)
            {
                if(!mx.count(p[0])) mx[p[0]] = id++;
                if(!my.count(p[1]))my[p[1]] = id++;
            }
        g.assign(id,{});
        vis.assign(id,0);

        for(auto&p: points)
            {
                int x = mx[p[0]];
                int y= my[p[1]];
                g[x].push_back(y);
                g[y].push_back(x);
            }

        vector<int>comp;

        for(int i =0; i<id ; i++)
            {
                if(!vis[i]){
                    int node = dfs(i);
                    comp.push_back(node/2);
                }
            }

        sort(comp.rbegin() , comp.rend());
        if(comp.size() == 1)return comp[0]+1;
        return comp[0]+comp[1] +1;
    }
    
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 352 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        if(n <= 3) return n;

        int[] a = new int[n];
        int[] b = new int[n];

        a[0] = 1;
        a[1] = 2;

        for(int i = 2; i<n; i++){
            long d1 = nums[i] - nums[i-1];
            long d2 = nums[i-1] - nums[i - 2];

            if(d1 == d2) a[i] = a[i-1] + 1;
            else a[i] = 2;
        }

        b[n-1] = 1;
        b[n-2] = 2;

        for(int i = n-3; i >= 0; i--){
            long d1 = nums[i+1] - nums[i];
            long d2 = nums[i+2] - nums[i+1];

            if(d1 == d2) b[i] = b[i+1] + 1;
            else b[i] = 2;
        }

        int ans = 2;
        for(int i = 0; i<n; i++) ans = Math.max(ans, a[i]);
        ans = Math.min(n, ans +1);
        for(int i = 1; i<n-1; i++){
            long gap = nums[i+1] - nums[i-1];
            if(gap % 2 != 0) continue;
            long d = gap/2;
            int cur = 3;
            if(i-2 >= 0 && nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == d){
                cur = cur + a[i-1] - 1;
            }
            if(i+2 < n && nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == d){
                cur = cur + b[i+1] - 1;
            }
            ans = Math.max(ans, cur);
        }
        return ans;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    class DSU{
        int[] p, s;

        DSU(int n){
            p = new int[n];
            s = new int[n];
            for(int i = 0; i<n; i++){
                p[i] = i;
                s[i] = 1;
            }
        }
        int f(int x){
            if(p[x] != x) p[x] = f(p[x]);
            return p[x];
        }
        void u(int a, int b){
            a = f(a);
            b = f(b);
            if(a == b) return;
            if(s[a] < s[b]){
                int t = a;
                a = b;
                b = t;
            }
            p[b] = a;
            s[a] = s[a] + s[b];
        }
    }
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        HashMap<Integer, Integer> mx = new HashMap<>();
        HashMap<Integer, Integer> my = new HashMap<>();

        int id = 0;
        for(int[] p : points){
            if(!mx.containsKey(p[0])) mx.put(p[0], id++);
            if(!my.containsKey(p[1])) my.put(p[1], id++);
        }
        DSU d = new DSU(id);
        for(int[] p : points){
            d.u(mx.get(p[0]), my.get(p[1]));
        }

        HashMap<Integer, Integer> cnt = new HashMap<>();
        for(int[] p : points){
            int r = d.f(mx.get(p[0]));
            cnt.put(r, cnt.getOrDefault(r, 0) + 1);
        }

        if(cnt.size() == 1) return n+1;

        int a = 0, b = 0;
        for(int v : cnt.values()){
            if(v>a){
                b = a;
                a = v;
            }else if(v > b){
                b = v;
            }
        }
        return a + b + 1;
        
    }
}
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& a) {
        int n=a.size();
        if(n<=3) return n;
        vector<int>b(n,2);
        b[0]=1;
        for(int i=2;i<n;i++){
            if(a[i]-a[i-1]==a[i-1]-a[i-2]){
                b[i]=b[i-1]+1;
            }
        }
        vector<int>c(n,2);
        c[n-1]=1;
        for(int i=n-3;i>=0;i--){
            if(a[i+1]-a[i]==a[i+2]-a[i+1]){
                c[i]=c[i+1]+1;
            }
        }
        int x=0;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            x=max(x,b[i]+1);
            x=max(x,c[i]+1);
        }
        x=min(x,n);
        for(int i=1;i<n-1;i++){
            long long d=(long long)a[i+1]-a[i-1];
            if(d%2==0){
                long long e=d/2;
                int l=1,r=1;
                if(i>=2&&(long long)a[i-1]-a[i-2]==e){
                    l=b[i-1];
                }
                if(i<=n-3&&(long long)a[i+2]-a[i+1]==e){
                    r=c[i+1];
                }
                x=max(x,l+r+1);
            }
        }
        return x;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
struct A{
    bool operator()(const int&a, const int&b)const{
        return a>b;
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& a) {
        int n=a.size();
        if(n<=1) return n+1;
        unordered_map<int,vector<int>>x,y;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            x[a[i][0]].push_back(i);
            y[a[i][1]].push_back(i);
        }
        vector<int>b(n,-1);
        unordered_map<int,int>c;
        int t=0;
        auto f=[&](auto&f,int u,int v)->void{
            b[u]=v;
            c[v]++;
            int p=a[u][0];
            int q=a[u][1];
            if(x.count(p)){
                auto g=x[p];
                x.erase(p);
                for(int z:g){
                    if(b[z]==-1){
                        f(f,z,v);
                    }
                }
            }
            if(y.count(q)){
                auto g=y[q];
                y.erase(q);
                for(int z:g){
                    if(b[z]==-1){
                        f(f,z,v);
                    }
                }
            }
        };
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            if(b[i]==-1){
                f(f,i,t);
                t++;
            }
        }
        multiset<int,A>s;
        for(auto &i:c){
            s.insert(i.second);
        }
        int ans=1;
        int k=0;
        for(auto i=s.begin();i!=s.end()&&k<2;i++){
            ans+=*i;
            k++;
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 354 ###
[Q3_START]
import java.util.*;

class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n=nums.length;
        if(n<=2)return n;
        int []d=new int [n-1];
        for(int i=0;i<n-1;i++)d[i] =nums[i+1]-nums[i];
        int [] left=new int[n-1];
        left[0]=1;
        int maxRun=1;
        for(int i=1;i<n-1;i++){
            left[i]= (d[i]==d[i-1]) ? left[i-1]+1:1;
            maxRun=Math.max(maxRun,left[i]);
        }
        int [] right=new int[n-1];
        right[n-2]=1;
        for(int i=n-3;i>=0;i--)right[i]=(d[i]==d[i+1])?right[i+1]+1:1;
        int maxlen=(maxRun==n-1)?n:maxRun+2;
        for(int i=0;i<n-2;i++){
            int sum=d[i]+d[i+1];
            if(i>0 && sum ==2*d[i-1]){
                int lendiff=left[i-1]+2;
                if(i+2<n-1 && d[i+2] ==d[i-1])lendiff+=right[i+2];
                maxlen=Math.max(maxlen,lendiff+1);
                
            }
            if(i+2<n-1 && sum==2 * d[i+2])maxlen=Math.max(maxlen,right[i+2]+3);
        }
        return maxlen;
        
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    int[] parent;
    int []size;
    
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n=points.length;
        if(n==0)return 1;
        parent =new int [n];
        size=new int [n];
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            parent[i]=i;
            size[i]=1;
        }
        long []px=new long[n];
        long []py=new long [n];

        long offset=1_000_000_000L;

        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            long x=points[i][0]+offset;
            long y=points[i][1]+offset;
            px[i]=(x<< 32)| i;
            py[i]=(y << 32)|i;
        }
        Arrays.sort(px);
        Arrays.sort(py);
        for(int i=1; i<n;i++){
            if((px[i]>>>32)==(px[i-1]>>>32))union((int) (px[i] & 0xFFFFFFFFL),(int)(px[i-1]&0xFFFFFFFFL));
            if((py[i]>>>32)==(py[i-1]>>>32))union((int) (py[i] & 0xFFFFFFFFL),(int)(py[i-1]&0xFFFFFFFFL));
            
        }
        int max1=0;
        int max2=0;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            if(parent[i]==i){
                int s=size[i];
                if(s>max1){
                    max2=max1;
                    max1=s;
                }else if (s>max2) max2=s;
            }
        }
        return max1+max2+1;
    }
    private int find(int i){
        int root=i;
        while(root!=parent[root])root =parent[root];
        int curr=i;
        while(curr!=root){
            int nxt=parent[curr];
            parent[curr]=root;
            curr=nxt;
        }
        return root;
    }
    private void union(int i, int j){
        int root1=find(i);
        int root2=find(j);
        if(root1!=root2){
            if (size[root1]>=size[root2]){
                parent[root2]=root1;
                size[root1]+=size[root2];
                
            }else{
                parent[root1]=root2;
                size[root2]+=size[root1];
            }
                
        }
            
    }
}
[Q4_END]

                        k-=1

                        ans=max(ans,dist+2)
            elif pp==j+1:
                if gap==gg and nums[pp]-nums[j]==2*gap:
                    ans=max(ans,dist+dd+1)
            """
        if ans<3 and n>=3:ans=3
        return ans

[Q4_START]
class UnionFind:
    def __init__(self,n):
        self._fa=list(range(n))
        self._size=[1]*n
        self.cc=n
    def find(self,x):
        fa=self._fa
        if fa[x]!=x:
            fa[x]=self.find(fa[x])
        return fa[x]
    def is_same(self,x,y):
        return self.find(x)-self.find(y)
    def merge(self,from_,to):
        x,y=self.find(from_),self.find(to)
        if x==y:return False
        self._fa[x]=y
        self._size[y]+=self._size[x]
        self.cc-=1
        return True
    def get_size(self,x):
        return self._size[self.find(x)]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n=len(points)
        dic=UnionFind(n)
        xs,ys={},{}
        for i,(x,y) in enumerate(points):
            if x in xs:
                dic.merge(i,xs[x])
            else:
                xs[x]=i
            if y in ys:
                dic.merge(i,ys[y])
            else:
                ys[y]=i
        res=[]
        for i in range(n):
            if dic._fa[i]==i:
                res.append(dic._size[i])
        if len(res)==1:
            return res[0]+1
        res.sort(reverse=True)
        return res[0]+res[1]+1
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        if (nums.size() < 3) return nums.size();
        int n = nums.size();
        vector<int> pre(n, 2);
        vector<int> post(n, 2);
        pre[0] = post[n-1] = 1;
        for(int i = 1; i < n; i++) {
            if (i - 2 >= 0 && nums[i-1]-nums[i-2] == nums[i] - nums[i-1]) {
                pre[i] = pre[i-1] + 1;
            }
        }
        
        for(int i = n - 2; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (i+ 2 < n && nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == nums[i+1] - nums[i]) {
                post[i] = 1 + post[i+1];
            }
        }

        int ret = 0;
        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int a = 0;
            int b = 0;
            int da = 0;
            int db = 0;
            if (i - 1 >= 0) {
                a = pre[i-1];
                if (i - 2 >= 0) da = nums[i-1] - nums[i-2];
            }
            if (i + 1 < n) {
                b = post[i+1];
                if (i + 2 < n) db = nums[i+2] - nums[i+1];
            }
            int t = 1 + max(a, b);
            if (a >= 2 && i + 1 < n && nums[i+1] - nums[i-1] == 2 * da) {
                t = max(t, a + 1 + 1);
                if (b >= 2 && da == db) {
                    t = max(t, a + 1 + b);
                }
            }
            if (b >= 2 && i - 1 >= 0 && nums[i+1] - nums[i-1] == 2 * db) {
                t = max(t, b + 1 + 1);
                if (a >= 2 && da == db) {
                    t = max(t, a + 1 + b);
                }
            }
            ret = max(ret, t);
        }
        return ret;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
struct Disjoint {
  Disjoint(int n) {
    p.assign(n + 1, -1);
  }
  vector<int> p;
  void join(int a, int b) {
    int ra = root(a);
    int rb = root(b);
    if (ra == rb) return;
    int sum = p[ra] + p[rb];
    if (p[ra] < p[rb]) {
      p[rb] = ra;
      p[ra] = sum;
    } else {
      p[ra] = rb;
      p[rb] = sum;
    }
  }
  int root(int x) {
    return p[x] < 0 ? x : (p[x] = root(p[x]));
  }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        map<int, vector<int>> xv;
        map<int, vector<int>> yv;
        for(int i = 0; i < points.size(); i++) {
            xv[points[i][0]].push_back(i);
            yv[points[i][1]].push_back(i);
        }
        int n = points.size();
        Disjoint djs(n);
        for(auto& p : xv) {
            const auto& v = (p.second);
            for(int i = 1; i < v.size(); i++) {
                djs.join(v[0], v[i]);
            }
        }
        for(auto& p : yv) {
            const auto& v = (p.second);
            for(int i = 1; i < v.size(); i++) {
                djs.join(v[0], v[i]);
            }
        }
        vector<int> g;
        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (djs.p[i] < 0) {
                g.push_back(djs.p[i]);
            }
        }
        sort(g.begin(), g.end());
        int ret = 1 + (-g[0]);
        if (g.size() > 1) ret += (-g[1]);
        return ret;
    }
};
[Q4_END]
