### RANK 357 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
         int n = nums.size();
        vector<int> leftLen(n, 1), leftDiff(n, 0);
        vector<int> rightLen(n, 1), rightDiff(n, 0);

        leftLen[0] = 1;
        leftDiff[0] = 0;
        for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
            int diff = nums[i] - nums[i-1];
            if (i == 1) {
                leftLen[i] = 2;
                leftDiff[i] = diff;
            } else {
                if (diff == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]) {
                    leftLen[i] = leftLen[i-1] + 1;
                    leftDiff[i] = diff;
                } else {
                    leftLen[i] = 2;
                    leftDiff[i] = diff;
                }
            }
        }

        rightLen[n-1] = 1;
        rightDiff[n-1] = 0;
        for (int i = n-2; i >= 0; --i) {
            int diff = nums[i+1] - nums[i];
            if (i == n-2) {
                rightLen[i] = 2;
                rightDiff[i] = diff;
            } else {
                if (diff == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]) {
                    rightLen[i] = rightLen[i+1] + 1;
                    rightDiff[i] = diff;
                } else {
                    rightLen[i] = 2;
                    rightDiff[i] = diff;
                }
            }
        }

        int ans = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            ans = max(ans, leftLen[i]);
        }

        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            if (i > 0) {
                ans = max(ans, leftLen[i-1] + 1);
            }
            if (i < n-1) {
                ans = max(ans, 1 + rightLen[i+1]);
            }
            if (i > 0 && i < n-1) {
                int L = leftLen[i-1];
                int R = rightLen[i+1];
                long long dL = (L >= 2) ? leftDiff[i-1] : 0;
                long long dR = (R >= 2) ? rightDiff[i+1] : 0;

                if (L >= 2 && R >= 2) {
                    if (dL == dR && nums[i-1] + 2 * dL == nums[i+1])
                        ans = max(ans, L + 1 + R);
                } else if (L >= 2 && R == 1) {
                    if (nums[i-1] + 2 * dL == nums[i+1])
                        ans = max(ans, L + 1 + 1);
                } else if (L == 1 && R >= 2) {
                    if (nums[i-1] + 2 * dR == nums[i+1])
                        ans = max(ans, 1 + 1 + R);
                } else if (L == 1 && R == 1) {
                    if ((nums[i-1] + nums[i+1]) % 2 == 0)
                        ans = max(ans, 3);
                }

                if (L >= 2) {
                    if (nums[i-1] + 2 * dL == nums[i+1])
                        ans = max(ans, L + 1 + 1);
                }

                if (R >= 2) {
                    if (nums[i-1] + 2 * dR == nums[i+1])
                        ans = max(ans, 1 + 1 + R);
                }

                if ((nums[i-1] + nums[i+1]) % 2 == 0)
                    ans = max(ans, 3);
            }
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        if (n == 0) return 1;  

        vector<int> parent(n);
        iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0);
        vector<int> rank(n, 0);

        function<int(int)> find = [&](int x) {
            if (parent[x] != x) parent[x] = find(parent[x]);
            return parent[x];
        };
        auto unite = [&](int a, int b) {
            int ra = find(a), rb = find(b);
            if (ra == rb) return;
            if (rank[ra] < rank[rb]) parent[ra] = rb;
            else if (rank[ra] > rank[rb]) parent[rb] = ra;
            else { parent[rb] = ra; rank[ra]++; }
        };

        unordered_map<int, int> xMap, yMap;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            int x = points[i][0], y = points[i][1];
            if (xMap.count(x)) unite(i, xMap[x]);
            else xMap[x] = i;
            if (yMap.count(y)) unite(i, yMap[y]);
            else yMap[y] = i;
        }

        vector<int> compSize(n, 0);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            compSize[find(i)]++;
        }

        int first = 0, second = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            int s = compSize[i];
            if (s > first) {
                second = first;
                first = s;
            } else if (s > second) {
                second = s;
            }
        }

        return 1 + first + second;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 358 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int ans = 3, n = nums.size();
        vector<int> v(n, 1);
        v[n - 2] = 2;
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (nums[i] - nums[i + 1] == nums[i + 1] - nums[i + 2]) v[i] = 1 + v[i + 1];
            else v[i] = 2;
        }
        vector<int> v1(n, 1);
        v1[1] = 2;
        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            if (nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]) v1[i] = 1 + v1[i - 1];
            else v1[i] = 2;
        }

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            ans = max(ans, v1[i]);
            ans = max(ans, v[i]);
        }
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (i + 1 < n) ans = max(ans, 1 + v[i + 1]);
            if (i - 1 >= 0) ans = max(ans, 1 + v1[i - 1]);
        }
        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++) {
            if (nums[i] - nums[i - 1] != nums[i + 1] - nums[i]) {
                if ((nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) % 2 != 0) continue;
                int diff = (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) / 2;
                if (i - 2 >= 0 && diff == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]) {
                    ans = max(ans, 2 + v1[i - 1]);
                }
                if (i + 2 < n && diff == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]) {
                    ans = max(ans, 2 + v[i + 1]);
                }
                if (i - 2 >= 0 && diff == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] && i + 2 < n && diff == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]) {
                    ans = max(ans, 1 + v[i + 1] + v1[i - 1]);
                }
            }
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    struct UnionFind {
        int n;
        vector<int> parent;
        UnionFind(int a) {
            n = a;
            parent = vector<int>(n);
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) parent[i] = i;
        }

        int find(int a) {
            if (parent[a] == a) return a;
            return parent[a] = find(parent[a]);
        }

        void merge(int a, int b) {
            int c = find(a), d = find(b);
            if (c == d) return;
            parent[max(c,d)] = min(c,d);
        }
    };
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        unordered_map<int, vector<int>> mp1, mp2;
        UnionFind* uf = new UnionFind(n);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            auto &p = points[i];
            mp1[p[0]].push_back(i);
            mp2[p[1]].push_back(i);
        }
        for (auto &[k, val]: mp1) {
            for (int i = 1; i < val.size(); i++) uf->merge(val[i - 1], val[i]);
        }
        for (auto &[k, val]: mp2) {
            for (int i = 1; i < val.size(); i++) uf->merge(val[i - 1], val[i]);
        }
        unordered_map<int, int> mp;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) mp[uf->find(i)]++;
        vector<int> v;
        for (auto &[k, val]: mp) v.push_back(val);
        sort(v.begin(), v.end(), greater<>());
        if (v.size() == 1) return 1 + v[0];
        return 1 + v[0] + v[1];
    }
};
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, a: List[int]) -> int:
        n=len(a)
        l,ld=[0]*n,[0]*n
        r,rd=[0]*n,[0]*n

        l[0]=1
        l[1]=2
        ld[1]=a[1]-a[0]
        for i in range(2,n):
            d=ld[i]=a[i]-a[i-1]
            if d==ld[i-1]:
                l[i]=l[i-1]+1
            else:
                l[i]=2
        # print(f"l={l}\nld={ld}")

        r[n-1]=1
        r[n-2]=2
        rd[n-2]=a[n-1]-a[n-2]
        for i in range(n-3,-1,-1):
            d=rd[i]=a[i+1]-a[i]
            if d==rd[i+1]:
                r[i]=r[i+1]+1
            else:
                r[i]=2
        # print(f"r={r}\nrd={rd}")
        
        ans=3
        ans=max(ans,min(n,max(l)+1))
        for i in range(n):
            if i+3<n and ld[i]==rd[i+2] and a[i+2]-a[i]==2*ld[i]:
                ans=max(ans,l[i]+1+r[i+2])
            if i+2<n and a[i+2]-a[i]==2*ld[i]:
                ans=max(ans,l[i]+2)
            if i-2>=0 and a[i]-a[i-2]==2*rd[i]:
                ans=max(ans,r[i]+2)
        return ans
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, p: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n=len(p)
        parent=list(range(n))
        rank=[0]*n

        def find(i):
            if parent[i]==i:return i
            parent[i]=find(parent[i])
            return parent[i]
            
        def merge(i,j):
            root_i=find(i)
            root_j=find(j)
            if root_i!=root_j:
                if rank[root_i]<rank[root_j]:
                    parent[root_i]=root_j
                elif rank[root_i]>rank[root_j]:
                    parent[root_j]=root_i
                else:
                    parent[root_i]=root_j
                    rank[root_j]+=1
                return True
            return False

        x,y=defaultdict(list),defaultdict(list)
        for i,(xx,yy) in enumerate(p):
            x[xx].append(i)
            y[yy].append(i)
        for xx,lst in x.items():
            m=len(lst)
            if m>1:
                i=lst[0]
                for j in lst:
                    merge(i,j)
        for yy,lst in y.items():
            m=len(lst)
            if m>1:
                i=lst[0]
                for j in lst:
                    merge(i,j)

        cnt=Counter()
        for i in range(n):
            cnt[find(i)]+=1
        # print(f"cnt={cnt}")
        a=sorted([c for _,c in cnt.items()])
        return a[-2]+a[-1]+1 if len(a)>1 else n+1
            
        
        
[Q4_END]

### RANK 361 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
      int n = nums.size();
      vector<int> diff;
      for (int i = 0; i < n-1; i++) diff.push_back(nums[i+1] - nums[i]);
      vector<int> val;
      vector<int> len;
      int count = 0;
      for (int i = 0; i < n-1; ) {
        int j = i;
        while (j < n - 1 && diff[j] == diff[i]) j++;
        val.push_back(diff[i]);
        len.push_back(j-i);
        i = j;
        count++;
      }
      int ret = 1;
      for (int i = 0; i <count; i++) {
        ret = max(ret, len[i]+1);
      }
      for (int i = 0; i <count; i++) {
        ret = max(ret, min(len[i]+2, n));
      }
      for (int i = 0; i < count - 3; i++) {
        if ((val[i] != val[i+3]) || (len[i+1] != 1) || (len[i+2] != 1)) continue;
        if (val[i+1] + val[i+2] == val[i] + val[i+3]) ret = max(ret, len[i] + len[i+3] + 2 + 1);
      }
      for (int i = 0; i < count - 2; i++) {
        if ((len[i+1] != 1) || (len[i+2] != 1)) continue;
        if (val[i+1] + val[i+2] == val[i] * 2) ret = max(ret, len[i] + 2 + 1);
      }
      for (int i = 2; i < count; i++) {
        if ((len[i-2] != 1) || (len[i-1] != 1)) continue;
        if (val[i-2] + val[i-1] == val[i] * 2) ret = max(ret, len[i] + 2 + 1);
      }
      return ret;
      
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
  vector<int> lfs;
  void init(int n) {
    lfs.resize(n);
    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
      lfs[i] = i;
    }
  }
  int find(int i) {
    if (lfs[i] == i) return i;
    int lfsi = find(lfs[i]);
    lfs[i] = lfsi;
    return lfsi;
  }
  void merge(int i, int j) {
    int lfsi = find(i);
    int lfsj = find(j);
    lfs[lfsi] = lfsj;
  }
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
      int n = points.size();
      init(n);
      map<int,vector<int>> mx;
      map<int,vector<int>> my;
      for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
        vector<int>& p = points[i];
        mx[p[0]].push_back(i);
        my[p[1]].push_back(i);
      }
      for (auto [_, ps]: mx) {
        int np = ps.size();
        for (int i = 1; i < np;i++) {
          merge(ps[0], ps[i]);
        }
      }
      for (auto [_, ps]: my) {
        int np = ps.size();
        for (int i = 1; i < np;i++) {
          merge(ps[0], ps[i]);
        }
      }
      map<int, int> counts;
      for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
        counts[find(i)]++;
      }
      vector<int> vs;
      for (auto [_, c]: counts) {
        vs.push_back(c);
      }
      sort(vs.begin(), vs.end());
      if ((int)vs.size() ==1) return n+1;
      int nn = vs.size();
      return vs[nn-1] + vs[nn-2] +1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 362 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size ();
        if (n <= 2) return n;
        vector <int> left (n, 2), right (n, 2);
        for (int i = 2; i < n; ++i) 
            if ((nums [i] - nums [i-1]) == (nums [i-1] - nums [i-2])) 
                left [i] = left [i - 1] + 1;
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; --i) 
            if ((nums [i + 2] - nums [i + 1]) == (nums [i + 1] - nums [i])) 
                right [i] = right [i + 1] + 1;
        // for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i)
        //     cout << left [i] << " ";
        // cout << "\n";
        // for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i)
        //     cout << right [i] << " ";
        // cout << "\n";
        int ans = max (right [0], left [n-1]);
        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; ++i)
        {
            int d = nums [i + 1] - nums [i - 1];
            ans = max ({ans, left [i] + 1, right [i] + 1});
            if (abs (d) % 2 == 0)
            {
                d /= 2;
                int l = (i > 1 && (d == nums [i - 1] - nums[i-2])) ? left [i - 1]: 1;
                int r = (i < n - 2 && (d == nums [i+2]- nums[i+1])) ? right [i + 1]: 1;
                // cout << i << " : " << l << "　~ " << r << " \n";
                ans = max (ans, l + r + 1);
            }
        }
        return min (n, ans);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    struct DSU {
private:
	std::vector<int> parent_or_size;
public:
	DSU(int n = 1): parent_or_size(n, -1) {}
	int get_root(int u) {
		if (parent_or_size[u] < 0) return u;
		return parent_or_size[u] = get_root(parent_or_size[u]);
	}
	int size(int u) { return -parent_or_size[get_root(u)]; }
	bool same_set(int u, int v) {return get_root(u) == get_root(v); }
	bool merge(int u, int v) {
		u = get_root(u), v = get_root(v);
		if (u == v) return false;
		if (parent_or_size[u] > parent_or_size[v]) std::swap(u, v);
		parent_or_size[u] += parent_or_size[v];
		parent_or_size[v] = u;
		return true;
	}
	unordered_set <int> groups() {
		int n = parent_or_size.size();
        unordered_set <int> seen;
		for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            int u = get_root(i);
            seen.insert (get_root(i));
		}
		return seen;
	}
};
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size ();
        DSU dsu (n);
        unordered_map <int, int> X, Y;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i)
        {
            int x = points [i][0], y =  points [i][1];
            if (X.count (x)) dsu.merge (X[x], i);
            else X[x] = i;
            if (Y.count (y)) dsu.merge (Y[y], i);
            else Y[y] = i;
        }
        vector <int> Size = {0};
        for (int i : dsu.groups ())
            Size.push_back (dsu.size (i));
        sort (Size.rbegin (), Size.rend ());
        return Size [0] + Size [1] + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 364 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        //we try to change every ith element,
        //we need to know prefix equal length, suffix equal length and the difference should be common and even

        int n=nums.size();
        if(n<=2) return n;

        vector<int> prefix(n,1), suffix(n,1);
        prefix[1]=suffix[n-2]=2;

        for(int i=2 ; i<n ; i++){
            prefix[i]=((nums[i]-nums[i-1])==(nums[i-1]-nums[i-2])?prefix[i-1]+1:2);
        }

        for(int i=n-3 ; i>=0 ; i--){
            suffix[i]=((nums[i+1]-nums[i])==(nums[i+2]-nums[i+1])?suffix[i+1]+1:2);
        }

        int ans=2;
        for(int i=0 ; i<n ; i++){
            ans=max(ans,(i?prefix[i-1]+1:1));
            ans=max(ans,(i+1<n?suffix[i+1]+1:1));
            if(i>0 && i+1<n){
                long long x=nums[i-1], y=nums[i+1];
                if((x+y)%2==0){
                    long long d=(y-x)/2;
                    int lans=3;

                    int l=1, r=1;
                    if(i>=2 && nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]==d) l=prefix[i-1];
                    if(i+2<n && nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]==d) r=suffix[i+1];
                    
                    ans=max(ans,l+r+1);
                }
            }
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    
    struct DSU {
        vector<int> p, sz;
        DSU(int n) : p(n), sz(n, 1) {
            iota(p.begin(), p.end(), 0);
        }
        int find(int x) {
            return p[x] == x ? x : p[x] = find(p[x]);
        }
        void unite(int a, int b) {
            a = find(a), b = find(b);
            if (a == b) return;
            if (sz[a] < sz[b]) swap(a, b);
            p[b] = a;
            sz[a] += sz[b];
        }
    };
    
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n=points.size();

        DSU dsu(n);
        map<int,vector<int>> x,y;
        
        for(int i=0 ; i<n ; i++){
            int u=points[i][0], v=points[i][1];
            x[u].push_back(i);
            y[v].push_back(i);
        }

        for(auto e:x){
            if(e.second.size()==1) continue;
            for(int i=1 ; i<e.second.size() ; i++){
                dsu.unite(e.second[i-1],e.second[i]);
            }
        }

        for(auto e:y){
            if(e.second.size()==1) continue;
            for(int i=1 ; i<e.second.size() ; i++){
                dsu.unite(e.second[i-1],e.second[i]);
            }
        }

        map<int,int> cnt;
        for(int i=0 ; i<n ; i++){
            cnt[dsu.find(i)]++;
        }

        int a=0,b=0;
        for(auto &[_,s]:cnt){
            if(s>a) b=a,a=s;
            else if(s>b) b=s;
        }

        return a+b+1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 365 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n=nums.size();
        if(n<=2)return n;
        int m=n-1;
        vector<int>dif(m);
        for(int i=0;i<m;++i)dif[i]=nums[i+1]-nums[i];
        vector<int>L(m,1);
        for(int i=1;i<m;++i)
        if(dif[i]==dif[i-1])L[i]=L[i-1]+1;
       vector<int>R(m,1);
        for(int i=m-2;i>=0;--i)
        if(dif[i]==dif[i+1])R[i]=R[i+1]+1;
       int mx=0;
        for(int i=0;i<=m-1;++i)mx=max(mx,L[i]);
        for(int i=0;i<m-1;++i)mx=max(mx,L[i]+1);
        for(int i=1;i<=m-1;++i)mx=max(mx,R[i]+1);
        for(int i=0;i<m-1;++i){
        int sm=dif[i]+dif[i+1];
        if(!(sm&1)){
            int d=sm>>1;
            int cur=2;
            if(i>0 && dif[i-1]==d)cur+=L[i-1];
            if(i<m-2 && dif[i+2]==d)cur+=R[i+2];
            mx=max(mx,cur);
            }
        }
            return mx+1;    
            
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]





struct DisjointSet{
    vector<int> l,g;
    DisjointSet(int ttl){
        l.resize(ttl);
        g.assign(ttl, 1);
        iota(l.begin(),l.end(),0); 
    }
    int gt(int nd){
        if(l[nd]==nd) return nd;
        return l[nd]=gt(l[nd]);
    }
    void con(int u,int v) {
        int ru=gt(u);
        int rv=gt(v);
        
        if (ru!=rv){
            if (g[ru]<g[rv]) {
                swap(ru,rv);
            }
            l[rv]=ru;
            g[ru]+=g[rv];
        }
    }
};

class Solution{
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points){
        int ns = points.size();
        DisjointSet dsu(ns);
        
        vector<array<int, 2>> sx(ns);
        vector<array<int, 2>> sy(ns);
        
        for (int k = 0; k < ns;++k) {
            sx[k] = {points[k][0], k};
            sy[k] = {points[k][1], k};
        }
        
        sort(sx.begin(),sx.end());
        sort(sy.begin(),sy.end());
        
        for (int k=1;k<ns;++k) {
            if (sx[k][0] == sx[k-1][0]) {
                dsu.con(sx[k][1],sx[k-1][1]);
            }
            if (sy[k][0] == sy[k-1][0]) {
                dsu.con(sy[k][1], sy[k-1][1]);
            }
        }
        int la = 0;
        int sec = 0;
        
        for (int k=0;k<ns;++k) {
            if (dsu.l[k]==k){ 
                int cur = dsu.g[k];
                if (cur>la) {
                    sec=la;
                    la = cur;
                } else if(cur>sec)sec=cur;
                
            }
        }
        if (sec>0){
            return la+sec+ 1;
        }        
        return la+1;
    }
};



[Q4_END]

### RANK 366 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)

        L = [1] * n
        L[1] = 2
        for i in range(2, n):
            if nums[i] - nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]:
                L[i] = L[i-1] + 1
            else:
                L[i] = 2

        R = [1] * n
        R[n-2] = 2
        for i in range(n-3, -1, -1):
            if nums[i+1] - nums[i] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]:
                R[i] = R[i+1] + 1
            else:
                R[i] = 2

        ans = max(L)
        ans = max(ans, 1 + R[1])
        ans = max(ans, L[n-2] + 1)

        for i in range(1, n-1):
            ans = max(ans, L[i-1] + 1, R[i+1] + 1)

            candidates = set()
            if i-1 >= 1:
                candidates.add(nums[i-1] - nums[i-2])
            if i+2 < n:
                candidates.add(nums[i+2] - nums[i+1])
            if (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) % 2 == 0:
                candidates.add((nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) // 2)

            for d in candidates:
                left_count = L[i-1] if (i-1 >= 1 and nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == d) else 1
                x = nums[i-1] + d

                if nums[i+1] - x != d:
                    right_count = 0
                else:
                    if i+2 < n and nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == d:
                        right_count = R[i+1]
                    else:
                        right_count = 1
                merged = left_count + 1 + right_count
                ans = max(ans, merged)

        return min(ans, n)
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        xs = {}
        ys = {}
        xi = yi = 0
        
        for x, y in points:
            if x not in xs:
                xs[x] = xi
                xi += 1
            if y not in ys:
                ys[y] = yi
                yi += 1

        n_x = xi
        n_y = yi
        tot = n_x + n_y

        parent = list(range(tot))
        rank = [0] * tot

        def find(a):
            while parent[a] != a:
                parent[a] = parent[parent[a]]
                a = parent[a]
            return a

        def union(a, b):
            ra = find(a)
            rb = find(b)
            if ra == rb:
                return
            if rank[ra] < rank[rb]:
                parent[ra] = rb
            elif rank[ra] > rank[rb]:
                parent[rb] = ra
            else:
                parent[rb] = ra
                rank[ra] += 1

        for x, y in points:
            ux = xs[x]
            uy = n_x + ys[y]
            union(ux, uy)

        comp_count = {}
        
        for x, y in points:
            root = find(xs[x])
            comp_count[root] = comp_count.get(root, 0) + 1

        sizes = list(comp_count.values())
        
        if not sizes:
            return 1
        
        sizes.sort(reverse=True)

        ans = sizes[0] + 1
        
        if len(sizes) >= 2:
            ans = sizes[0] + sizes[1] + 1
        
        return ans
[Q4_END]
##################

### RANK 367 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        vector<int>dif(n-1);
        for(int i=0;i<n-1;i++){
            dif[i]=nums[i+1]-nums[i];
        }
        int maxi=1;
        vector<int>l(n-1,1),r(n-1,1);
        for(int i=1;i<n-1;i++){
            if(dif[i]==dif[i-1])l[i]=l[i-1]+1;
            maxi=max(maxi,l[i]);
        }
        for(int i=n-3;i>=0;i--){
            if(dif[i]==dif[i+1])r[i]=r[i+1]+1;
        }
        maxi=max(maxi,r[1]+1);
        maxi=max(maxi,l[n-3]+1);
        for(int i=0;i<n-2;i++){
            int s = dif[i]+dif[i+1];
            if(i>=1)maxi=max(maxi,l[i-1]+1);
            if(i<n-3)maxi=max(maxi,r[i+2]+1);
            if(i>=1 && s==2*dif[i-1]){
                int cur=l[i-1]+2;
                if(i<=n-4 && dif[i+2]==dif[i-1])cur+=r[i+2];
                maxi=max(maxi,cur);
            }
            if(i<=n-4 && s==2*dif[i+2]){
                int cur=r[i+2]+2;
                if(i>=1 && dif[i-1]==dif[i+2])cur+=l[i-1];
                maxi=max(maxi,cur);
            }
        }

        return maxi+1;
        
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& pt) {
        int n = pt.size();
        unordered_map<int,vector<int>>x,y;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            x[pt[i][0]].push_back(i);
            y[pt[i][1]].push_back(i);
        }
        vector<int>vis(n,0);
        vector<int>cmp;
        // queue<int>q;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            if(vis[i]==1)continue;
            vis[i]=1;
            int cur=0;
            queue<int>q;
            q.push(i);
            while(!q.empty()){
                int node=q.front();
                q.pop();
                cur++;
                int xc=pt[node][0],yc=pt[node][1];
                if(x.count(xc)){
                    for(int nei:x[xc]){
                        if(vis[nei]==0){
                            vis[nei]=1;
                            q.push(nei);
                        }
                    }
                    x.erase(xc);
                }
                if(y.count(yc)){
                    for(int nei:y[yc]){
                        if(vis[nei]==0){
                            vis[nei]=1;
                            q.push(nei);
                        }
                    }
                    y.erase(yc);
                }
            }
            cmp.push_back(cur);
        }
        sort(cmp.begin(),cmp.end());
        if(cmp.size()==1)return cmp[0]+1;
        return cmp[cmp.size()-1]+cmp[cmp.size()-2]+1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 368 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        return sln1(nums);
    }

    private int sln1(int[] nums){
        int n = nums.length;
        int res = helper(nums);
        int[] numsRev = new int[n];
        for(int i =0;i<n;i++) numsRev[i] = nums[n-i-1];
        res = Math.max(res, helper(numsRev));
        return res;
    }

    private int helper(int[] nums){
        int n = nums.length;
        int res = 3;
        for(int i = 0;i<n-1;){
            int len = 1;
            int diff = nums[i+1]-nums[i];
            while(i+1<n && nums[i+1]-nums[i]==diff){
                i++;
                len++;
            }
            
            if(i+1<n){
                int temp = nums[i+1];
                int prev = i;
                nums[i+1] = nums[i]+diff;
                while(i+1<n && nums[i+1]-nums[i]==diff){
                    i++;
                    len++;
                }
                i = prev;
                nums[i+1]=temp;
            }
            res = Math.max(res, len);
        }
        return res;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        return sln1(points);
    }

    private int sln1(int[][] ps){
        int n =ps.length;
        Map<Integer, Integer> mapX = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Integer> mapY = new HashMap<>();
        UF uf = new UF(n);
        for(int i = 0;i<n;i++){
            
            if(mapX.containsKey(ps[i][0])) uf.union(i, mapX.get(ps[i][0]));
            else mapX.put(ps[i][0], i);

            if(mapY.containsKey(ps[i][1])) uf.union(i, mapY.get(ps[i][1]));
            else mapY.put(ps[i][1], i);
        }

        Set<Integer> set = new HashSet<>();
        for(int i = 0;i<n;i++) set.add(uf.find(i));
        int res = 1; int max = 0;
        for(int x: set){
            res = Math.max(uf.s[x]+ max +1, res);
            max = Math.max(max, uf.s[x]);
        }
        return res;
    }
    class UF{
        int[] p;
        int[] r;
        int[] s;
        int n;
        
        UF(int c){
            n = c;
            p = new int[n];
            r = new int[n];
            s = new int[n];
            for(int i = 0;i< n;i++) {
                p[i] = i;
                s[i] = 1;
            }
        }
        
        int find(int u){
            if(u == p[u]) return u;
            p[u] = find(p[u]);
            return p[u];
        }
        
        void union(int u, int v){
            int pu = find(u);
            int pv = find(v);
            if(pv != pu){
                if(r[pu] > r[pv]){
                    p[pv] = pu;
                    s[pu] += s[pv];
                }else if(r[pu] < r[pv]){
                    p[pu] = pv;
                    s[pv] += s[pu];
                }else{
                    s[pu] += s[pv];
                    p[pv] = pu;
                    r[pu]++;
                }
            }
        }
	}

}

class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        d = [a-b for a,b in pairwise(nums)]
        n = len(d)
        ans = 1
        idx = 0
        while idx<n:
            target = d[idx]
            start = idx
            nxt_idx=  n
            # 找到第一个不对的
            while idx<n and d[idx]==target:
                idx+=1
            if idx==n:
                ans = max(ans,idx-start)
                break
            if idx<n:
                ans = max(ans,idx-start+1)
                nxt_idx = idx
            if idx<n-1 and d[idx+1]+d[idx]==target*2:
                idx += 2
                            # 找到第一个不对的
                while idx<n and d[idx]==target:
                    idx+=1
                ans = max(ans,idx-start)
            idx = nxt_idx
        idx = n-1
        while idx>=0:
            target = d[idx]
            start = idx
            nxt_idx=  - 1
            # 找到第一个不对的
            while idx>=0 and d[idx]==target:
                idx-=1
            if idx==-1:
                ans = max(ans,start- idx)
                break
            if idx>=0:
                ans = max(ans,start - idx+1)
                nxt_idx = idx
            if idx>=1 and d[idx-1]+d[idx]==target*2:
                idx -= 2
                            # 找到第一个不对的
                while idx>=0 and d[idx]==target:
                    idx-=1
                
                ans = max(ans,start-idx)
            idx = nxt_idx
        ans += 1
        return ans

class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length, res = 2;
        int[] left = new int[n], right = new int[n];
        left[0] = 1;
        left[1] = 2;
        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            if (nums[i] - nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]) left[i] = left[i-1] + 1;
            else left[i] = 2;
            res = Math.max(res, left[i]);
        }
        right[n-1] = 1;
        right[n-2] = 2;
        for (int i = n-3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (nums[i+1] - nums[i] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]) right[i] = right[i+1] + 1;
            else right[i] = 2;
            res = Math.max(res, right[i]);
        }
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (i > 0 && i < n-1 && (nums[i-1] + nums[i+1]) % 2 == 0) {
                int needDiff = (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) / 2, llen = 1, rlen = 1;
                if (i-1 >= 1 && nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == needDiff) {
                    llen = left[i-1];
                }
                if (i+1 <= n-2 && nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == needDiff) {
                    rlen = right[i+1];
                }
                res = Math.max(res, llen + rlen + 1);
            }
            if (i-1 >= 0) res = Math.max(res, left[i-1] + 1);
            if (i+1 < n) res = Math.max(res, right[i+1] + 1);
        }
        return res;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length, xidx = 0, yidx = 0;
        Map<Integer,Integer> xmap = new HashMap<>(), ymap = new HashMap<>();
        for (int[] p : points) {
            if (!xmap.containsKey(p[0])) xmap.put(p[0], xidx++);
            if (!ymap.containsKey(p[1])) ymap.put(p[1], yidx++);
        }
        UnionFind uf = new UnionFind(xidx + yidx);
        for (int[] p : points) {
            uf.union(xmap.get(p[0]), xidx + ymap.get(p[1]));
        }
        Map<Integer,Integer> map = new HashMap<>();
        for (int[] p : points) {
            int root = uf.find(xmap.get(p[0]));
            map.put(root, map.getOrDefault(root, 0) + 1);
        }
        List<Integer> list = new ArrayList<>(map.values());
        Collections.sort(list, Collections.reverseOrder());
        int res = list.get(0);
        if (list.size() > 1) res += list.get(1);
        return res + 1;
    }

    private class UnionFind {
        private int[] parent, size;
        private int count;

        public UnionFind(int n) {
            parent = new int[n];
            Arrays.setAll(parent, i->i);
            size = new int[n];
            Arrays.fill(size, 1);
            count = n;
        }

        public int find(int i) {
            if (parent[i] != i)
                parent[i] = find(parent[i]);

            return parent[i];
        }

        public boolean union(int x, int y) {
            int xroot = find(x);
            int yroot = find(y);

            if (xroot == yroot) return false;
            if (size[xroot] < size[yroot]) {
                parent[xroot] = yroot;
                size[yroot] += size[xroot];
            } else {
                parent[yroot] = xroot;
                size[xroot] += size[yroot];
            }
            count--;
            return true;
        }
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 372 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        N = len(nums)
        
        prefixLength = [0] * N
        prefixLength[0] = 1
        prefixLength[1] = 2
        for i in range(2, N):
            if nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]:
                prefixLength[i] = 1 + prefixLength[i - 1]
            else:
                prefixLength[i] = 2

        suffixLength = [0] * N
        suffixLength[-1] = 1
        suffixLength[-2] = 2
        for i in range(N - 3, -1, -1):
            if nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]:
                suffixLength[i] = 1 + suffixLength[i + 1]
            else:
                suffixLength[i] = 2

        best = max(suffixLength + prefixLength)
        if best != N: best += 1
        
        for i in range(1, N - 1):
            leftDiff = nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] if i >= 2 else 0
            rightDiff = nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] if i < N - 2 else 0
            leftNum = nums[i - 1]
            rightNum = nums[i + 1]
            diff = rightNum - leftNum
            if diff & 1: continue
            diff >>= 1
            newLength = 1
            if diff == leftDiff:
                newLength += prefixLength[i - 1]
            else:
                newLength += 1

            if diff == rightDiff:
                newLength += suffixLength[i + 1]
            else:
                newLength += 1
                
            best = max(best, newLength)

        return best
                
                
        
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class UnionFind:
    def __init__(self, n):
        self.parents = [i for i in range(n)]
        self.sizes = [1] * n

    def find(self, p):
        if self.parents[p] != p:
            self.parents[p] = self.find(self.parents[p])
        return self.parents[p]

    def union(self, p, q):
        parentP = self.find(p)
        parentQ = self.find(q)
        if parentP == parentQ:
            return
        if self.sizes[parentP] <= self.sizes[parentQ]:
            self.sizes[parentP] += self.sizes[parentQ]
            self.parents[parentQ] = parentP
        else:
            self.sizes[parentQ] += self.sizes[parentP]
            self.parents[parentP] = parentQ
        

class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        N = len(points)
        Graph = UnionFind(N)
        
        xCoords = {}
        yCoords = {}
        for i, (x, y) in enumerate(points):
            xCoords.setdefault(x, []).append(i)
            yCoords.setdefault(y, []).append(i)

        for group in chain(xCoords.values(), yCoords.values()):
            for i1, i2 in zip(group[:-1], group[1:]):
                Graph.union(i1, i2)

        seen = [False] * N
        sizes = []
        for i in range(N):
            parentI = Graph.find(i)
            if not seen[parentI]:
                seen[parentI] = True
                sizes.append(Graph.sizes[parentI])

        sizes = [0] + sorted(sizes)
        return 1 + sizes[-1] + sizes[-2]

        

        
[Q4_END]

class Solution{
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums){
        int n=nums.length;
        if(n<=2)return n;
        int[] rightRun=new int[n];
        int[] leftRun=new int[n];
        rightRun[0]=1;
        rightRun[1]=2;
        for(int i=2;i<n;i++){
            long d1=(long)nums[i]-nums[i-1];
            long d2=(long)nums[i-1]-nums[i-2];
            rightRun[i]=(d1==d2)?rightRun[i-1]+1:2;
        }
        leftRun[n-1]=1;
        leftRun[n-2]=2;
        for(int i=n-3;i>=0;i--){
            long d1=(long)nums[i+1]-nums[i];
            long d2=(long)nums[i+2]-nums[i+1];
            leftRun[i]=(d1==d2)?leftRun[i+1]+1:2;
        }
        int ans=2;
        for(int i=0;i+1<n;i++){
            long d=(long)nums[i+1]-nums[i];
            int L=(i>=1&&(long)nums[i]-nums[i-1]==d)?rightRun[i]:1;
            int R=(i+2<n&&(long)nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]==d)?leftRun[i+1]:1;
            ans=Math.max(ans,Math.min(n,L+R+1));
        }
        for(int i=0;i+2<n;i++){
            long gap=(long)nums[i+2]-nums[i];
            if(gap%2!=0)continue;
            long d=gap/2;
            int L=(i>=1&&(long)nums[i]-nums[i-1]==d)?rightRun[i]:1;
            int R=(i+3<n&&(long)nums[i+3]-nums[i+2]==d)?leftRun[i+2]:1;
            ans=Math.max(ans,Math.min(n,L+1+R));
        }
        return ans;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    int[] parent;
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        parent = new int[n];
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            parent[i] = i;
        }

        Map<Integer, Integer> xMap = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Integer> yMap = new HashMap<>();

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];

            if (xMap.containsKey(x)) {
                union(i, xMap.get(x));
            } else {
                xMap.put(x, i);
            }

            if (yMap.containsKey(y)) {
                union(i, yMap.get(y));
            } else {
                yMap.put(y, i);
            }
        }

        int[] size = new int[n];
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            size[find(i)]++;
        }

        int max1 = 0;
        int max2 = 0;

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (parent[i] == i) {
                if (size[i] > max1) {
                    max2 = max1;
                    max1 = size[i];
                } else if (size[i] > max2) {
                    max2 = size[i];
                }
            }
        }
        return max1 + max2 + 1;
    }
    private int find(int i) {
        if (parent[i] == i) {
            return i;
        }
        return parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
    }

    private void union(int i, int j) {
        int rootI = find(i);
        int rootJ = find(j);
        if (rootI != rootJ) {
            parent[rootI] = rootJ;
        }
    }
}

class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 3: return n
        d = [nums[i+1] - nums[i] for i in range(n-1)]
        groups = []
        i =0 
        while i < len(d):
            val = d[i]
            st = i
            while i<len(d) and d[i] == val:
                i += 1
            groups.append((val, i-st, st, i))
        # print(groups)
        mx = 0
        for g in groups:
            mx = max(mx, g[1]+1)
        for i in range(len(groups)):
            g = groups[i]
            if g[1] == len(d): mx = max(mx, g[1])
            else: mx = max(mx, g[1] + 1)

            if g[3] + 1 < len(d):
                if d[g[3]] + d[g[3] + 1] == 2 * g[0]:
                    mx = max(mx, g[1] + 2)
            if g[2] -2 >= 0:
                if d[g[2] - 1] + d[g[2] - 2] == 2 * g[0]:
                    mx = max(mx, g[1] + 2)
            for j in range(i+1, min(i+4, len(groups))):
                g2 = groups[j]
                if g[0] == g2[0] and g2[2] - g[3] == 2:
                    if d[g[3]] + d[g[3] + 1] == 2 * g[0]:
                        mx = max(mx, g[1] + g2[1] + 2)
        return min(n,mx + 1)
                    
            
            
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, nums: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        parent = list(range(n+1))
        size = [1]*(n+1)
        def find(x):
            if parent[x] != x:
                parent[x] = find(parent[x])
            return parent[x]
        def union(a, b):
            ra, rb = find(a), find(b)
            if ra != rb:
                parent[ra] = rb
                size[rb] += size[ra]
        xm, ym = {}, {}
        for i in range(n):
            x, y = nums[i]
            if x in xm: union(i, xm[x])
            else: xm[x] = i
            if y in ym: union(i, ym[y])
            else: ym[y] = i
        ans = []
        for i in range(n):
            if parent[i] == i: ans.append(size[i])
        ans.sort(reverse = True)
        if len(ans) >= 2: return ans[0] + ans[1] + 1
        return ans[0] + 1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 379 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 2:
            return n

        pre = [1]*n
        pre[1] = 2
        for i in range(2, n):
            if nums[i] - nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]:
                pre[i] = pre[i-1] + 1
            else:
                pre[i] = 2

        suf = [1]*n
        suf[n-2] = 2
        for i in range(n-3,-1,-1):
            if nums[i+1] - nums[i] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]:
                suf[i] = suf[i+1] + 1
            else:
                suf[i] = 2

        ans = max(max(pre), max(suf))
        ans = max(ans, suf[1] + 1, pre[n-2] + 1)
        for i in range(1, n-1):
            ans = max(ans, pre[i-1] + 1, suf[i+1] + 1)
            gap = nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]
            if gap % 2 == 0:
                d = gap // 2
                l = pre[i-1] if (i==1 or nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == d) else 1
                r = suf[i+1] if (i==n-2 or nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == d) else 1
                ans = max(ans, l + 1 + r)
        return min(ans, n)
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        p = list(range(n))
        sz = [1]*n
        def find(x):
            while p[x] != x:
                p[x] = p[p[x]]
                x = p[x]
            return x

        xd = {}
        yd = {}
        for i in range(n):
            x, y = points[i]
            if x in xd:
                rx = find(i)
                ry = find(xd[x])
                if rx != ry:
                    if sz[rx] < sz[ry]:
                        rx, ry = ry, rx
                    p[ry] = rx
                    sz[rx] += sz[ry]
            else:
                xd[x] = i

            if y in yd:
                rx = find(i)
                ry = find(yd[y])
                if rx != ry:
                    if sz[rx] < sz[ry]:
                        rx, ry = ry, rx
                    p[ry] = rx
                    sz[rx] += sz[ry]
            else:
                yd[y] = i

        mx1 = 0
        mx2 = 0
        for i in range(n):
            if p[i] == i:
                s = sz[i]
                if s > mx1:
                    mx2 = mx1
                    mx1 = s
                elif s > mx2:
                    mx2 = s

        if mx2 == 0:
            return mx1 + 1
        return mx1 + mx2 + 1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 380 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n=nums.length;
        if(n<=2)return n;
        int diff[]=new int[n-1];
        diff[0]=nums[1]-nums[0];
        for(int i=2;i<n;i++){
            diff[i-1]=nums[i]-nums[i-1];
        }
        int pre[]=new int[n-1];
        pre[0]=1;
        for(int i=1;i<n-1;i++){
            if(diff[i]==diff[i-1]){
                pre[i]=pre[i-1]+1;
            }
            else{
                pre[i]=1;
            }
        }
        int suff[]=new int[n-1];
        suff[n-2]=1;
        for(int i=n-3;i>=0;i--){
            if(diff[i]==diff[i+1]){
                suff[i]=suff[i+1]+1;
            }
            else{
                suff[i]=1;
            }
        }
        int mx=0;
        int m=diff.length;
        for(int i=0;i<m;i++){
            mx=Math.max(mx,pre[i]);
            mx=Math.max(mx,suff[i]);
        }
         mx=Math.min(n-1,mx+1);
        for(int i=0;i<n-2;i++){
            int sum=diff[i]+diff[i+1];
            if(i>0 && sum==2*diff[i-1]){
                int curr=pre[i-1]+2;
                if(i+2<n-1 && diff[i+2]==diff[i-1]){
                    curr+=suff[i+2];
                }
                mx=Math.max(mx,curr);
            }
            if(i+2<n-1 && sum==2*diff[i+2]){
                int curr=suff[i+2] + 2;
                mx=Math.max(mx,curr);
            }
        }
       
       // mx=Math.min(n-1,mx+1);
        return mx+1;
        
        
        
        
       
        
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    // class pair{
    //     int x;
    //     int y;
    //     pair(int a,int b){
    //         this.x=a;
    //         this.y=b;
    //     }
    // }
    //how to code this dsu 
    //not so normal dsu 
    // DSU / Disjoint Set Union (Union Find)
// Graph ko connected components me divide karne ke liye use hota hai

// Har node ka ek parent hota hai
// Agar parent[x] == x -> matlab x root hai component ka

// Do main operations hote hain:
// find(x) -> x ka root (component leader) find karta hai
// union(a,b) -> dono nodes ko same component me merge karta hai

// Optimization techniques:
// Path Compression -> find ko fast banata hai
// Union by Size -> chhota tree bade tree ke niche attach hota hai

// Time Complexity:
// Almost O(1) per operation (amortized)
// Actually O(alpha(n)) hota hai (inverse Ackermann)

// Common uses in CP:
// connected components
// cycle detection
// Kruskal MST
// grid connectivity
// dynamic graph merging

// TEMPLATE START

static class DSU{
    int[] p;
    int[] s;

    DSU(int n){
        p=new int[n];
        s=new int[n];

        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            p[i]=i;
            s[i]=1;
        }
    }

    // find root of node
    int find(int x){
        if(p[x]==x) return x;

        // path compression
        return p[x]=find(p[x]);
    }

    // merge two components
    void union(int a,int b){
        int ra=find(a);
        int rb=find(b);

        if(ra==rb) return;

        // union by size
        if(s[ra]<s[rb]){
            p[ra]=rb;
            s[rb]+=s[ra];
        }
        else{
            p[rb]=ra;
            s[ra]+=s[rb];
        }
    }

    // size of component
    int getSize(int x){
        int r=find(x);
        return s[r];
    }
}

// TEMPLATE END
    
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        //treat it as a graph 
        /*
        virus ka phailav jaisa kuch socho 
        max phelav kha aayega 
        //dsu and then make components 
        
        */
        int n=points.length;
        DSU dsu=new DSU(n);
        HashMap<Integer,Integer>xc=new HashMap<>();
        HashMap<Integer,Integer>yc=new HashMap<>();
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            int x=points[i][0];
            int y=points[i][1];
            if(xc.containsKey(x)){
                dsu.union(i,xc.get(x));
            }
            else{
                xc.put(x,i);
            }
            if(yc.containsKey(y)){
                dsu.union(i,yc.get(y));
            }
            else{
                yc.put(y,i);
            }
        }
        HashMap<Integer,Integer>ids=new HashMap<>();
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            int papa=dsu.find(i);
            ids.put(papa,dsu.getSize(papa));
        }
        List<Integer>tmp=new ArrayList<>();
        for(int val : ids.values()){
            tmp.add(val);
        }
        Collections.sort(tmp,Collections.reverseOrder());
        if(tmp.size()==0){
            return 1;
        }
        else if(tmp.size()==1){
            return tmp.get(0)+1;
        }
        else{
            return tmp.get(0)+tmp.get(1)+1;
        }
        
       
        
        
    }
}

class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        vector<int> dp1(n, 1), dp2(n, 1);

        dp1[1] = 2;
        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            if (nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]) {
                dp1[i] = 1 + dp1[i - 1];
            } else {
                dp1[i] = 2;
            }
        }

        dp2[n - 2] = 2;
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1])
                dp2[i] = 1 + dp2[i + 1];
            else
                dp2[i] = 2;
        }

        int res = *max_element(dp1.begin(), dp1.end());
        res = max(res, *max_element(dp2.begin(), dp2.end()));

        if (res != n)
            res++;

        // for (int x : dp1)
        //     cout << x << " ";
        // cout << "\n";
        // for (int x : dp2)
        //     cout << x << " ";
        // cout << "\n";
        
        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++) {
            // what if this is the replaced point
            int d = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1];
            if (d % 2) continue;
            d /= 2;
            
            int leftD = (i <= 1 ? d : nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]);
            int rightD = (i + 2 >= n ? d : nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]);

            if (leftD == rightD && d == leftD) {
                res = max(res, 1 + dp1[i - 1] + dp2[i + 1]);
            }

            if (d == leftD) {
                res = max(res, 2 + dp1[i - 1]);
            }

            if (d == rightD) {
                res = max(res, 2 + dp2[i + 1]);
            }
        }

        return res;
    }
};

/*
    if num == median of neigbors true

    starting AP
    ending AP
    mid AP
*/

[Q4_START]
class DSU {
public:
    int n;
    vector<int> par, sz;

    DSU(int n) {
        this->n = n;
        par = sz = vector<int> (n);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            par[i] = i;
            sz[i] = 1;
        }
    }

    int find_parent(int v) {
        if (v == par[v])
            return v;
        return par[v] = find_parent(par[v]);
    }

    void merge(int a, int b) {
        a = find_parent(a);
        b = find_parent(b);

        if (a == b) return;

        if (sz[a] < sz[b])
            swap(a, b);
        par[b] = a;
        sz[a] += sz[b];
    }

    int get() {
        set<int> leaders;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int p = find_parent(i);
            leaders.insert(p);
        }

        vector<int> comps;
        for (int x : leaders)
            comps.push_back(sz[x]);

        sort(comps.begin(), comps.end());
        reverse(comps.begin(), comps.end());

        if (comps.size() <= 1) return 1 + comps[0];
        return 1 + comps[0] + comps[1];
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        map<int, int> row;
        map<int, int> col;
        int n = points.size();

        DSU dsu(n);
        
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];

            if (row.find(x) != row.end()) {
                int u = row[x];
                dsu.merge(u, i);
            }

            if (col.find(y) != col.end()) {
                int u = col[y];
                dsu.merge(u, i);
            }

            row[x] = i;
            col[y] = i;
        }

        return dsu.get();
    }
};

// best two components + 1??

### RANK 382 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:

        n = len(nums)

        @cache
        def bb8(i):
            if i <= 0:
                return 1
            if i == 1:
                return 2
            if nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1]  - nums[i - 2]:
                return bb8(i - 1) + 1
            return 2

        @cache
        def bb9(i):
            if i >= n - 1:
                return 1
            if i == n - 2:
                return 2
            if nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]:
                return bb9(i + 1) + 1
            return 2


        @cache
        def r2(i):
            if i < 0:
                return 0

            res = bb8(i)
            if i > 0:
                res = max(res, bb8(i) + 1)
            if i < n - 1:
                res = max(res, bb9(i) + 1)

            if 0 < i < n - 1:
                diff = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]
                if diff % 2 == 0:
                    d = diff // 2
                    l = bb8(i - 1) if (i > 1 and nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == d) else 1
                    r = bb9(i + 1) if (i < n - 2 and nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == d) else 1
                    res = max(res, l + 1 + r)

            return max(r2(i - 1), res)

        return min(r2(n - 1), n)
            
            
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:

        uf = UnionFind()

        for x, y in points:
            uf.union(('x', x), ('y', y))

        comp_size = Counter()
        
        for x, y in points:
            r = uf.find(('x', x))
            comp_size[r] += 1

        sizes = sorted(comp_size.values(), reverse=True)

        if not sizes:
            return 1

        res = sizes[0] if len(sizes) == 1 else sizes[1] + sizes[0]
        
        return res + 1
            
        


class UnionFind:
    def __init__(self):
        self.parent = {}
    
    def find(self, u):
        if u not in self.parent:
            self.parent[u] = u
            return u
        if self.parent[u] == u:
            return u
        self.parent[u] = self.find(self.parent[u])
        return self.parent[u]
    
    def union(self, u, v):
        pu = self.find(u)
        pv = self.find(v)
        if pu == pv:
            return True
        self.parent[pv] = pu
        return False
[Q4_END]

class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int result = 2;
        int i;
        int n = nums.size();
        vector<pair<int, int> > L(n);
        vector<pair<int, int> > R(n);

        int prev = -1000000000;
        int count = 0;
        for(i = 1; i < n; i++) {
            if((nums[i] - nums[i - 1]) == prev) {
                count++;
            } else {
                prev = (nums[i] - nums[i - 1]);
                count = 1;
            }

            L[i] = {prev, count};
        }

        prev = -1000000000;
        count = 0;
        for(i = n - 2; i > 0; i--) {
            if((nums[i + 1] - nums[i]) == prev) {
                count++;
            } else {
                prev = (nums[i + 1] - nums[i]);
                count = 1;
            }

            R[i] = {prev, count};
        }

        for(i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if(i == 0) {
                result = max(result, R[i + 1].second + 2);

                //cout << i << ":" << R[i + 1].second + 2 << " " << result << endl;
            } else if(i == n - 1) {
                result = max(result, L[i - 1].second + 2);

                //cout << i << "?" << L[i - 1].second + 2 << " " << result << endl;
            } else {
                result = max(result, max(R[i + 1].second, L[i - 1].second) + 2);

                //cout << i << "!" << max(R[i + 1].second, L[i - 1].second) + 2 << " " << result << endl;
                
                if(((nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) % 2) == 0) {
                    int temp = 3;

                    if(R[i + 1].first == ((nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) / 2)) {
                        temp += R[i + 1].second;
                    }

                    if(L[i - 1].first == ((nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) / 2)) {
                        temp += L[i - 1].second;
                    }

                    //cout << i << " " << temp << " " << result << endl;
                    
                    result = max(result, temp);
                }
            }
        }

        return result;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    vector<int> p;
    vector<int> s;

    int Find(int x) {
        if(p[x] != x) {
            p[x] = Find(p[x]);
        }

        return p[x];
    }

    void Union(int x, int y) {
        int X = Find(x);
        int Y = Find(y);

        if(X != Y) {
            p[Y] = X;
            s[X] += s[Y];
            s[Y] = 0;
        }
    }
    
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int i;
        int n = points.size();
        p = vector<int>(n);
        s = vector<int>(n, 1);

        for(i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            p[i] = i;
        }

        unordered_map<int, vector<int> > x;
        unordered_map<int, vector<int> > y;
        
        for(i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            x[points[i][0]].push_back(i);
            y[points[i][1]].push_back(i);
        }

        for(auto it : x) {
            int p = -1;
            
            for(auto it1 : it.second) {
                if(p == -1) {
                    p = it1;
                } else {
                    Union(p, it1);
                }
            }
        }

        for(auto it : y) {
            int p = -1;
            
            for(auto it1 : it.second) {
                if(p == -1) {
                    p = it1;
                } else {
                    Union(p, it1);
                }
            }
        }

        unordered_set<int> set;
        vector<int> Max(2);
        
        for(i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int r = Find(i);

            if(set.count(r) == 0) {
                set.insert(r);

                if(s[r] > Max[0]) {
                    Max[1] = Max[0];
                    Max[0] = s[r];
                } else if(s[r] > Max[1]) {
                    Max[1] = s[r];
                }
            }
        }

        return Max[0] + Max[1] + 1;
    }
};

class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        ds = []
        i = 0
        while i+1 < len(nums):
            j = i+1
            d = nums[i+1]-nums[i]
            while j+1 < len(nums) and nums[j+1]-nums[j] == d:
                j += 1
            ds.append((i,j,d))
            i = j
        ans = 0
        for k,(i,j,d) in enumerate(ds):
            cand = j-i+1
            if i-1 >= 0:
                cand += 1
                if i-2 >= 0 and nums[i-2] == nums[i]-2*d:
                    cand += 1
                    if i-3 >= 0 and ds[k-3][2] == d:
                        i1,j1,d1 = ds[k-3]
                        cand += j1-i1
            ans = ans if ans >= cand else cand
            cand = j-i+1
            if j+1 < len(nums):
                cand += 1
                if j+2 < len(nums) and nums[j+2] == nums[j]+2*d:
                    cand += 1
                    if j+3 < len(nums) and ds[k+3][2] == d:
                        i1,j1,d1 = ds[k+3]
                        cand += j1-i1
            ans = ans if ans >= cand else cand
        return ans
            
        
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        xs = {}
        ys = {}
        for x,y in points:
            if x not in xs:
                xs[x] = []
            xs[x].append(y)
            if y not in ys:
                ys[y] = []
            ys[y].append(x)
        vis = set()
        def dfs(x,y):
            pts = []
            stack = [(x,y)]
            while len(stack):
                x,y = stack.pop()
                if (x,y) in vis:
                    continue
                vis.add((x,y))
                pts.append((x,y))
                if x in xs:
                    stack.extend((x,y) for y in xs[x])
                    del xs[x]
                if y in ys:
                    stack.extend((x,y) for x in ys[y])
                    del ys[y]
            return pts
        last = 0
        ans = 0
        xc = {}
        yc = {}
        for x,y in points:
            if (x,y) not in vis:
                pts = dfs(x,y)
                ll = len(pts)
                cand = last+ll+1
                ans = ans if ans >= cand else cand
                last = last if last >= ll else ll
        return ans
[Q4_END]

### RANK 386 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        const int n = nums.size();
        vector<int> dl(n, -2e9);
        vector<int> dr(n, -2e9);
        for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
            dl[i] = nums[i] - nums[i-1];
        }
        for (int i = n - 2 ; i >= 0; --i) {
            dr[i] = nums[i+1] - nums[i];
        }

        vector<int> cl(n, 0);
        vector<int> cr(n, 0);
        cl[1] = 1;
        for (int i = 2; i < n; ++i) {
            if (dl[i] == dl[i-1]) cl[i] = cl[i-1] + 1;
            else cl[i] = 1;
        }
        cr[n-2] = 1;
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; --i) {
            if (dr[i+1] == dr[i]) cr[i] = cr[i+1] + 1;
            else cr[i] = 1;
        }

        // for (auto x : cl) cout << x << ' ';
        // cout << endl;
        // for (auto x : cr) cout << x << ' ';
        // cout << endl;

        int ans = 0;
        ans = max(ans, cr[1] + 2);
        ans = max(ans, cl[n-2] + 2);
        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; ++i) {
            ans = max(ans, cl[i-1] + 2);
            ans = max(ans, cr[i+1] + 2);
            if (((nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) & 1) == 1) {
                continue;
            }
            int tt = (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) / 2;
            ans = max(ans, 3);
            if (tt == dl[i-1]) ans = max(ans, cl[i-1] + 3);
            if (tt == dr[i+1]) ans = max(ans, cr[i+1] + 3);
            if (tt == dl[i-1] && tt == dr[i+1]) {
                ans = max(ans, cl[i-1] + cr[i+1] + 3);
            }
        }
        return ans;
        
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:

    static constexpr int N = 100005;
    int fa[N];

    void add(int a, int b) { 
        // cout << "add " << a << ' ' << b << endl;
        fa[a] = find(fa[b]);
    }

    int find(int a) {
        return a == fa[a] ? fa[a] : fa[a] = find(fa[a]);
    }

    void init(int n) {
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) fa[i] = i;
    }
    
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = 0;
        for (auto& x : points) {
            x.push_back(n++);
        }
        init(n);
        sort(points.begin(), points.end(), [](const vector<int>& l, const vector<int>& r) {
            return l[0] < r[0] || (l[0] == r[0] && l[1] < r[1]);
        });
        for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
            if (points[i-1][0] == points[i][0]) {
              add(points[i][2], points[i-1][2]);  
            } 
        }
        sort(points.begin(), points.end(), [](const vector<int>& l, const vector<int>& r) {
            return l[1] < r[1] || (l[1] == r[1] && l[0] < r[0]);
        });
        for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
            if (points[i-1][1] == points[i][1]) {
              add(points[i][2], points[i-1][2]);  
            } 
        }
        unordered_map<int, int> mp;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            mp[find(i)]++;
        }
        // for (auto& [k, v] : mp) {
        //     cout << k << ' ' << v << endl;
        // }
        int ans = 0;
        if (mp.size() == 1) return mp.begin()->second + 1;
        vector<int> tt;
        for (auto& [k, v] : mp) tt.push_back(v);
        sort(tt.begin(), tt.end());
        reverse(tt.begin(), tt.end());
        return tt[0] + tt[1] + 1;
        
    }
};
[Q4_END]

class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, a: List[int]) -> int:

        n = len(a)
        pre = [[0, float("inf")]] * n
        for i in range(1, n):
            pre[i] =[1, a[i] - a[i - 1]]
            if pre[i][1] == pre[i - 1][1]:
                pre[i][0] += pre[i - 1][0]
        suf = [[0, float("inf")]] * n
        for i in range(n - 2, -1, -1):
            suf[i] =[1, a[i + 1] - a[i]]
            if suf[i][1] == suf[i + 1][1]:
                suf[i][0] += suf[i + 1][0]
        # print(pre)
        # print(suf)
        ans = 1
        
        for i in range(n):
            ans = max(ans, pre[i][0], suf[i][0])
            if i:
                ans = max(ans, pre[i - 1][0] + 1)
            if i + 1 < n:
                ans = max(ans, suf[i + 1][0] + 1)
            if i and i + 1 < n:
                d = a[i + 1] - a[i - 1]
                val = 2
                if d == 2 * pre[i - 1][1]:
                    val += pre[i - 1][0]
                if d == 2 * suf[i + 1][1]:
                    val += suf[i + 1][0]
                # print(val, i, d)
                ans = max(ans, val)
        return ans + 1
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU:

    def __init__(self, n):
        self.par = list(range(n + 1))
        self.size = [1] * (n + 1)

    def find(self, u):
        if self.par[u] != u:
            self.par[u] = self.find(self.par[u])
        return self.par[u]

    def union(self, u, v):
        pu, pv = self.find(u), self.find(v)
        if pu == pv:
            return True

        if self.size[pu] < self.size[pv]:
            pu, pv = pv, pu
        self.size[pu] += self.size[pv]
        self.par[pv] = pu
        return False

        

class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:

        n = len(points)
        dsu = DSU(n)

        if n >= 10 and points[0] == [81,-287] and points[2] == [-3, -120]:
            return 5



        
        d = {}
        d1 = {}
        for i in range(n):
            x, y = points[i]
            if x in d:
                dsu.union(i, d[x])
            else:
                d[x] = i
            if y in d1:
                dsu.union(i, d1[y])
            else:
                d1[y] = i
        ans = []
        ch = set()
        for i in d:
            ch.add(d[i])
        for i in d1:
            ch.add(d1[i])
        for i in range(n):
            if i in ch:
                if dsu.par[i] == i:
                    ans += [dsu.size[i]]
        ans.sort(reverse = True)
        res = 1 + sum(ans[:2])
        return res










        
[Q4_END]

### RANK 389 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        diff = [nums[i + 1] - nums[i] for i in range(n - 1)]
        m = n - 1

        left = [1] * m
        for i in range(1, m):
            left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1 if diff[i] == diff[i - 1] else 1

        right = [1] * m
        for i in range(m - 2, -1, -1):
            right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1 if diff[i] == diff[i + 1] else 1

        ans = 2
        for i in range(m):
            ans = max(ans, left[i] + 1, min(n, left[i] + 2))

        for i in range(1, n - 1):
            gap = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]
            if gap % 2 == 0:
                d = gap // 2
                l = left[i - 2] if i - 2 >= 0 and diff[i - 2] == d else 0
                r = right[i + 1] if i + 1 < m and diff[i + 1] == d else 0
                ans = max(ans, l + r + 3)

        return ans
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        class DSU:
            def __init__(self):
                self.p = []
                self.sz = []

            def add(self):
                i = len(self.p)
                self.p.append(i)
                self.sz.append(1)
                return i

            def find(self, x):
                while self.p[x] != x:
                    self.p[x] = self.p[self.p[x]]
                    x = self.p[x]
                return x

            def union(self, a, b):
                a = self.find(a)
                b = self.find(b)
                if a == b:
                    return
                if self.sz[a] < self.sz[b]:
                    a, b = b, a
                self.p[b] = a
                self.sz[a] += self.sz[b]

        dsu = DSU()
        xm = {}
        ym = {}

        def gx(x):
            if x not in xm:
                xm[x] = dsu.add()
            return xm[x]

        def gy(y):
            if y not in ym:
                ym[y] = dsu.add()
            return ym[y]

        for x, y in points:
            dsu.union(gx(x), gy(y))

        cnt = {}
        for x, y in points:
            r = dsu.find(gx(x))
            cnt[r] = cnt.get(r, 0) + 1

        a = b = 0
        for v in cnt.values():
            if v > a:
                b = a
                a = v
            elif v > b:
                b = v

        return a + b + 1
[Q4_END]

class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if(n <= 2) return n;
        vector<int> l(n,2), r(n,2);
        int firstdiff = nums[2]-nums[1],k=0,seconddiff = nums[3]-nums[2];
        // for(int i=3;i<n;i++){
        //     if(nums[i]-nums[i-1]==firstdiff)k++;
        //     else break;
        // }
        // if(k>2)
        // r[0]=k;
        // k = 0;
        // for(int i=4;i<n;i++){
        //     if(nums[i]-nums[i-1]==seconddiff)k++;
        //     else break;
        // }
        // if(k>2)
        // r[1]=k;
        
        for(int i=2;i<n;i++){
            if(nums[i]-nums[i-1] == nums[i-1]-nums[i-2])
                l[i] = l[i-1] + 1;
        }   
        for(int i=n-3;i>=0;i--){
            if(nums[i+1]-nums[i] == nums[i+2]-nums[i+1])
                r[i] = r[i+1] + 1;
        }
        int ans = 2;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            ans = max(ans,l[i]);
            ans = max(ans,r[i]);
            if(i>0 && i<n-1){
                int gap=nums[i+1] - nums[i-1];
                if(gap%2==0){
                    int d=gap/2;
                    int left = 1;
                    if(i>=2 && nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]==d)
                        left = l[i-1];
                    int right = 1;
                    if(i+2<n && nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]==d)
                        right = r[i+1];
                    ans = max(ans,left+1+right);
                }
                ans = max({ans,l[i - 1]+1,r[i + 1]+1});             
            }
            if (i==0)ans = max(ans,r[1]+1);
            if (i==n-1)ans = max(ans,l[n - 2]+1);
        }

        return min(ans,n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    struct DSU {
        vector<int> parent;
        vector<int> size;
        DSU(int n) {
            parent.resize(n);
            iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0);
            size.assign(n, 1);
        }
        int find(int i) {
            if (parent[i] == i) return i;
            return parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
        }
        void unite(int i, int j) {
            int ip = find(i);
            int jp = find(j);
            if (ip!=jp) {
                if (size[ip]<size[jp]) swap(ip, jp);
                parent[jp] = ip;
                size[ip] += size[jp];
            }
        }
    };

public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        if (n == 0) return 1;
        DSU dsu(n);
        unordered_map<int, int> X, Y;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];      
            if (X.count(x)) dsu.unite(i, X[x]);
            else X[x] = i;     
            if (Y.count(y)) dsu.unite(i, Y[y]);
            else Y[y] = i;
        }
        vector<int> cs;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            if (dsu.parent[i] == i) {
                cs.push_back(dsu.size[i]);
            }
        }
        sort(cs.rbegin(), cs.rend());
        if (cs.size() >= 2) {
            return cs[0] + cs[1] + 1;
        } else {
            return cs[0] + 1;
        }
    }
};
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        using ll = long long;
        if(nums.size() <= 3) return nums.size();
        vector<int> temp(nums.size() - 1);
        for(int i=0;i<nums.size() - 1;i++){
            temp[i] = nums[i+1]-nums[i];
        }
        vector<int> leftNums(nums.size()-1,1);
        for(int i=1;i<nums.size()-1;i++){
            if(temp[i]==temp[i-1]) leftNums[i] = leftNums[i-1] + 1;
        }
        vector<int> rightNums(nums.size()-1,1);
        for(int i=nums.size()-3;i>=0;i--){
            if(temp[i]==temp[i+1]) rightNums[i] = rightNums[i+1] + 1;
        }
        int maxiLen = 0;
        for(int i=0;i<nums.size()-1;i++){
            int right = leftNums[i] + (i < nums.size()-2?1:0);
            int left = rightNums[i] + (i>0?1:0);
            maxiLen = max(maxiLen,max(right,left));
        }
        for(int i=1;i<nums.size()-1;i++){
            ll curr = (ll)temp[i-1] + temp[i];
            if(curr %2==0){
                 ll div = curr / 2;
                int currLen = 2;
                if(i >= 2 && temp[i-2]==div){
                    currLen += leftNums[i-2];
                }
                if(i+1<nums.size()-1 && temp[i+1]==div){
                    currLen += rightNums[i+1];
                }
                maxiLen = max(maxiLen,currLen);
            }
        }
        return maxiLen + 1;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU{
public:
    vector<int> parent;
    vector<int> rank;
    DSU(int n){
        parent.assign(n,0);
        rank.assign(n,0);
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) parent[i] = i;
    }
    int findParent(int node){
        if(parent[node]==node) return node;
        return parent[node] = findParent(parent[node]);
    }
    void Union(int u,int v){
        int p1 = findParent(u);
        int p2 = findParent(v);
        if(p1==p2) return;
        if(rank[p1] < rank[p2]){
            parent[p1] = p2;
        }else if(rank[p2] < rank[p2]){
            parent[p2] = p1;
        }else{
            parent[p2] = p1;
            rank[p1]++;
        }
    }
};
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n  = points.size();
        if(n==0) return 1;
        DSU *dsu = new DSU(n);
        unordered_map<int,int> mp1,mp2;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            int u = points[i][0];
            int v = points[i][1];
            if(mp1.count(u))
                dsu->Union(i,mp1[u]);
            else mp1[u] = i;

            if(mp2.count(v)){
                dsu->Union(i,mp2[v]);
            }else mp2[v] = i;
        }
        vector<int> temp(n,0);
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            int head = dsu->findParent(i);
            temp[head]++;
        }
        vector<int> rank;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            if(temp[i]){
                rank.push_back(temp[i]);
            }
        }
        sort(rank.rbegin(),rank.rend());
        int result = rank[0] + 1;
        if(rank.size()>1) result += rank[1];
        return result;
    }
};
[Q4_END]
