### RANK 392 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int solve(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        int diff = nums[0] - nums[1], cur = 2, ans = 2;
        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            if (nums[i-1] - nums[i] == diff) {
                cur++;
                ans = max(ans, cur);
            } else {
                int prev = nums[i];
                nums[i] = nums[i-1] - diff;
                int j = i;
                int cur2 = cur;
                while (j < n && nums[j-1] - nums[j] == diff) {
                    cur2++;
                    ans = max(ans, cur2);
                    j++;
                }
                nums[i] = prev;
                cur = 2;

                // i = max(i, j-2);

                diff = nums[i-1] - nums[i];
            }
        }
        return ans;
    }

    int longestArithmetic(vector<int> &nums) {
        int ans1 = solve(nums);
        reverse(nums.begin(), nums.end());
        int ans2 = solve(nums);
        return max(ans1, ans2);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    vector<int> islands;
    int vis[100005];
    vector<int> adj[100005];
    int dfs(int u) {
        if (vis[u]) return 0;
        vis[u] = 1;
        int res = 0;
        for (auto &x : adj[u]) {
            res += dfs(x);
        }
        return res+1;
    }
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        islands.clear();
        fill(vis, vis+n+1, 0);
        fill(adj, adj+n+1, vector<int>());
        unordered_map<int, int> rep_x, rep_y; // rep[u] = the index of the element that represents coord u
        for (int i = 0; i < points.size(); i++) {
            rep_x[points[i][0]] = i;
            rep_y[points[i][1]] = i;
        }
        for (int i = 0; i < points.size(); i++) {
            int x_repr = rep_x[points[i][0]];
            int y_repr = rep_y[points[i][1]];
            if (x_repr != i) {
                adj[i].push_back(x_repr);
                adj[x_repr].push_back(i);
            }
            if (y_repr != i) {
                adj[i].push_back(y_repr);
                adj[y_repr].push_back(i);
            }
        }
        
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (!vis[i]) islands.push_back(dfs(i));
        }
        sort(islands.rbegin(), islands.rend());
        if (islands.size() == 1) return islands[0] + 1;
        return islands[0] + islands[1] + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

#include <vector>
#include <algorithm>
using namespace std;

class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if(n <= 2) return n;

        vector<int> d(n-1);
        for(int i=0;i<n-1;i++)
            d[i] = nums[i+1] - nums[i];

        vector<int> l(n-1,1);
        for(int i=1;i<n-1;i++)
            if(d[i] == d[i-1])
                l[i] = l[i-1] + 1;

        vector<int> r(n-1,1);
        for(int i=n-3;i>=0;i--)
            if(d[i] == d[i+1])
                r[i] = r[i+1] + 1;

        int mx = 0;
        for(int i=0;i<n-1;i++)
            mx = max(mx,l[i]);

        int ans = min(n-1,mx+1);

        for(int i=1;i<n-1;i++){
            long long s = (long long)d[i-1] + d[i];

            if(s % 2 == 0){
                long long x = s/2;
                int cur = 2;

                if(i>=2 && d[i-2]==x)
                    cur += l[i-2];

                if(i<=n-3 && d[i+1]==x)
                    cur += r[i+1];

                ans = max(ans,cur);
            }
        }

        return ans + 1;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
#include <vector>
#include <unordered_map>
#include <algorithm>
using namespace std;

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();

        vector<int> p(n), sz(n,1);
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) p[i]=i;

        auto f = [&](auto& self,int i)->int{
            if(p[i]==i) return i;
            return p[i]=self(self,p[i]);
        };

        auto u = [&](int a,int b){
            int ra=f(f,a), rb=f(f,b);
            if(ra!=rb){
                if(sz[ra]<sz[rb]) swap(ra,rb);
                p[rb]=ra;
                sz[ra]+=sz[rb];
            }
        };

        unordered_map<int,int> mx,my;

        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            int x=points[i][0], y=points[i][1];

            if(mx.count(x)) u(i,mx[x]);
            mx[x]=i;

            if(my.count(y)) u(i,my[y]);
            my[y]=i;
        }

        int a=0,b=0,c=0;

        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            if(p[i]==i){
                c++;
                int s=sz[i];

                if(s>=a){
                    b=a;
                    a=s;
                }
                else if(s>b){
                    b=s;
                }
            }
        }

        if(c>=2) return a+b+1;
        return a+1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 395 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        int[] l = new int[n];
        int[] r = new int[n];
        l[0] = 1;
        l[1] = 2;

        r[n - 1] = 1;
        r[n - 2] = 2;
        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            if (nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]) {
                l[i] = l[i - 1] + 1;
            } else {
                l[i] = 2;
            }
        }
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]) {
                r[i] = r[i + 1] + 1;
            } else {
                r[i] = 2;
            }
        }
        int res = 0;
        for (int v : l) {
            res = Math.max(res, v);
        }
        res = Math.max(res, r[1] + 1);
        res = Math.max(res, l[n - 2] + 1);
        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++) {
            res = Math.max(res, r[i + 1] + 1);
            res = Math.max(res, l[i - 1] + 1);
            int d = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1];
            if (d % 2 == 0) {
                int p = d / 2;
                int lv = 1;
                int rv = 1;
                if (i >= 2 && nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == p) {
                    lv = l[i - 1];
                }
                if (i + 2 < n && nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == p) {
                    rv = r[i + 1];
                }
                res = Math.max(res, lv + 1 + rv);
            }
        }
        return res;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.Map;

class Solution {
    int[] p;

    public int find(int x) {
        if (p[x] != x) {
            p[x] = find(p[x]);
        }
        return p[x];
    }

    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {

        Map<Integer, Integer> xIds = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Integer> yIds = new HashMap<>();
        int id = 0;

        for (int[] point : points) {
            if (!xIds.containsKey(point[0])) {
                xIds.put(point[0], id++);
            }
        }
        for (int[] point : points) {
            if (!yIds.containsKey(point[1])) {
                yIds.put(point[1], id++);
            }
        }

        p = new int[id];
        for (int i = 0; i < id; i++) {
            p[i] = i;
        }
        
        for (int[] point : points) {
            int x = xIds.get(point[0]);
            int y = yIds.get(point[1]);
            int px = find(x);
            int py = find(y);
            if (px != py) {
                p[py] = px;
            }
        }
        
        Map<Integer, Integer> edgeCnt = new HashMap<>();
        for (int[] point : points) {
            int root = find(xIds.get(point[0]));
            edgeCnt.put(root, edgeCnt.getOrDefault(root, 0) + 1);
        }

        int a = 0, b = 0;
        for (int size : edgeCnt.values()) {
            if (size >= a) {
                b = a;
                a = size;
            } else if (size > b) {
                b = size;
            }
        }

        return a + b + 1;
    }

}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 396 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        vector<int>pre(n, 1), suf(n, 1);
        for(int i=1;i<n;i++) {
            pre[i] = 2;
            if(i > 1 and nums[i]-nums[i-1] == nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]) {
                pre[i] = pre[i-1]+1;
            }
        }

        for(int i=n-2;i>=0;i--) {
            suf[i] = 2;
            if(i<n-2 and nums[i+1]-nums[i] == nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]) {
                suf[i] = suf[i+1]+1;
            }
        }

        int ans = 2;

        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) {
            if(i == 0) {
                ans = max(ans, suf[i+1]+1);
            } else if(i == n-1) {
                ans = max(ans, pre[i-1]+1);
            } else if((nums[i+1]-nums[i-1])%2 == 0) {
                int d = (nums[i+1]-nums[i-1])/2;
                int cur = 1;
                if(i+2<n and d == nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]) cur += suf[i+1];
                else cur++;
                if(i-2>=0 and d == nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]) cur += pre[i-1];
                else cur++;
                ans = max(ans, cur);
                ans = max({ans, pre[i-1]+1, suf[i+1]+1});
            } else {
                ans = max({ans, pre[i-1]+1, suf[i+1]+1});
            }
        }

        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU {
    vector<int>p,s;
public:
    DSU(int n) {
        s.assign(n, 1);
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) p.push_back(i);
    }

    int find_set(int s) {
        if(p[s] == s) return s;
        return p[s] = find_set(p[s]);
    }

    void union_set(int u, int v) {
        u = find_set(u);
        v = find_set(v);

        if(u == v) return;
        if(s[u] < s[v]) swap(u, v);

        p[v] = p[u];
        s[u] += s[v];
    }

    int count(int u) {
        return s[find_set(u)];
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        DSU g(n);
        map<int, int>xm, ym;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) {
            int x = points[i][0], y = points[i][1];
            if(xm.find(x) != xm.end()) {
                g.union_set(i, xm[x]);
            }
            if(ym.find(y) != ym.end()) {
                g.union_set(i, ym[y]);
            }
            xm[x] = i;
            ym[y] = i;
        }

        set<pair<int,int>>st;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) {
            st.insert({g.count(i), g.find_set(i)});
        }

        if(st.size() == 1) return n+1;

        int ans = 1;
        auto it = st.end();
        it--;
        ans += (*it).first;
        it--;
        ans += (*it).first;

        return ans;
    }
};
[Q4_END]
##################

### RANK 397 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {

    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {

        int n = nums.length;

        int maxLen = 2;

        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; ) {
            int d = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
            int start = i;
            while (i < n - 1 && nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == d) {
                i++;
            }

            int currentStreak = i - start + 1;
            maxLen = Math.max(maxLen, Math.min(n, currentStreak + 1));

            if (i + 2 < n && nums[i + 2] - nums[i] == 2 * d) {
                int j = i + 2;
                int nextStreak = 1;
                while (j < n - 1 && nums[j + 1] - nums[j] == d) {
                    j++;
                    nextStreak++;
                }
                maxLen = Math.max(maxLen, currentStreak + 1 + nextStreak);
            }

            if (i + 1 < n && i - 1 >= 0 && (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) % 2 == 0) {
                int newD = (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) / 2;
                if (newD != d) {
                    int left = 1;
                    int k = i - 1;
                    while (k > 0 && nums[k] - nums[k - 1] == newD) {
                        k--;
                        left++;
                    }
                    int right = 1;
                    int m = i + 1;
                    while (m < n - 1 && nums[m + 1] - nums[m] == newD) {
                        m++;
                        right++;
                    }
                    maxLen = Math.max(maxLen, left + right + 1);
                }
            }

            if (i == start) {
                i++;
            }
        }

        for (int i = 0; i < n - 2; i++) {
            maxLen = Math.max(maxLen, 3);
        }

        return maxLen;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
import java.util.*;

class Solution {

    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        DSU  dsu =new DSU(n);
        var mx = new HashMap<Integer, List<Integer>>() ;
        var my= new HashMap<Integer, List<Integer>>();
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            int x= points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];
            mx.computeIfAbsent(x, a -> new ArrayList<>()).add(i);
            my.computeIfAbsent(y, a -> new ArrayList<>()).add(i);

        }

        for(var list : mx.values()){
            for(int i=1;i<list.size();i++){
                dsu.merge(list.getFirst(), list.get(i));
            }
        }
        
        for(var list : my.values()){
            for(int i=1;i<list.size();i++){
                dsu.merge(list.getFirst(), list.get(i));
            }
        }
        int max = 0;
        int second =0;
        var par = new HashMap<Integer, Integer>();
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            int p = dsu.find(i);
            par.merge(p, 1, Integer::sum);
        }
        
        for(var val : par.values()){
            if(val > max){
                second = max;
                max =val;
            }else if(val > second){
                second = val;
            }
        }
        
        return max + second + 1;
    }

    class DSU {

        int parent[];
        int[] size;

        public DSU(int n) {

            parent = new int[n];
            size = new int[n];
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
                parent[i] = i;
                size[i] = 1;
            }
        }

        public void merge(int x, int y){
            int p1 = find(x);
            int p2 = find(y);
            if(p1 == p2) return;

            if(size[p1] < size[p2]){
                parent[p1] = p2;
                size[p2] += size[p1];
            }else{
                parent[p2] = p1;
                size[p1] += size[p2];
            }
        }

        public int find(int par) {

            if (parent[par] == par) {
                return par;
            }
            return parent[par] = find(parent[par]);
        }


    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 398 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {

    // time complexity: O(n)
    // space complexity: O(n)
    
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int len = nums.length;
        if (len <= 3) {
            return len;
        }

        int[] left = new int[len];
        int[] right = new int[len];

        left[0] = 1;
        left[1] = 2;
        for (int i = 2; i < len; i++) {
            if (nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]) {
                left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1;
            } else {
                left[i] = 2;
            }
        }

        right[len - 1] = 1;
        right[len - 2] = 2;
        for (int i = len - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]) {
                right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1;
            } else {
                right[i] = 2;
            }
        }

        int maxLen = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < len; i++) {
            // Case 1: Change nums[i] to extend sequence from left
            if (i > 0) maxLen = Math.max(maxLen, left[i - 1] + 1);
            
            // Case 2: Change nums[i] to extend sequence from right
            if (i < len - 1) maxLen = Math.max(maxLen, right[i + 1] + 1);

            // Case 3: Bridge two sequences
            if (i > 0 && i < len - 1) {
                int diffLeft;
                if (i > 1) {
                    diffLeft = nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2];
                } else {
                    diffLeft = nums[i - 1] - 1000000;
                }

                int diffRight;
                if (i < len - 2) {
                    diffRight = nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1];
                } else {
                    diffRight = 1000000;
                }

                if ((nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) % 2 == 0) {
                    int targetD = (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) / 2;
                    
                    int currentBridge = 1;
                    if (i > 1 && nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == targetD) currentBridge += left[i - 1];
                    else currentBridge += 1;
                    
                    if (i < len - 2 && nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == targetD) currentBridge += right[i + 1];
                    else currentBridge += 1;
                    
                    maxLen = Math.max(maxLen, currentBridge);
                }
            }
        }

        return Math.min(maxLen, len);
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {

    // time complexity: O(n * a(n))
    // space complexity: O(n)
    
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        if (n == 0) return 0;
        
        Map<Integer, Integer> xMap = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Integer> yMap = new HashMap<>();
        
        DSU dsu = new DSU(n);

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];

            if (xMap.containsKey(x)) {
                dsu.union(i, xMap.get(x));
            } else {
                xMap.put(x, i);
            }

            if (yMap.containsKey(y)) {
                dsu.union(i, yMap.get(y));
            } else {
                yMap.put(y, i);
            }
        }

        Map<Integer, Integer> componentSizes = new HashMap<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int root = dsu.find(i);
            componentSizes.put(root, componentSizes.getOrDefault(root, 0) + 1);
        }

        List<Integer> sizes = new ArrayList<>(componentSizes.values());
        Collections.sort(sizes, Collections.reverseOrder());

        int result = 1 + sizes.get(0);
        if (sizes.size() > 1) {
            result += sizes.get(1);
        }

        return result;
    }

    class DSU {
        int[] parent;
        public DSU(int n) {
            parent = new int[n];
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) parent[i] = i;
        }
        public int find(int i) {
            if (parent[i] == i) return i;
            return parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
        }
        public void union(int i, int j) {
            int rootI = find(i);
            int rootJ = find(j);
            if (rootI != rootJ) parent[rootI] = rootJ;
        }
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 399 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        if (n <= 2)
            return n;

        int[] l = new int[n], r = new int[n];
        Arrays.fill(l, 2);
        Arrays.fill(r, 2);

        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            if (nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2])
                l[i] = l[i - 1] + 1;
        }

        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1])
                r[i] = r[i + 1] + 1;
        }

        int ans = 2;

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
            ans = Math.max(ans, l[i]);

        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++) {

            ans = Math.max(ans, l[i - 1] + 1);
            ans = Math.max(ans, r[i + 1] + 1);

            if ((nums[i - 1] + nums[i + 1]) % 2 == 0) {
                int d = (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) / 2;

                int left = 1, right = 1;

                if (i >= 2 && nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == d)
                    left = l[i - 1];

                if (i + 2 < n && nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == d)
                    right = r[i + 1];

                ans = Math.max(ans, left + 1 + right);
            }
        }

        ans = Math.max(ans, r[1] + 1);     
        ans = Math.max(ans, l[n - 2] + 1); 

        return ans;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    class DSU {
        Map<Long, Long> parent = new HashMap<>();

        long find(long x) {
            parent.putIfAbsent(x, x);
            if (parent.get(x) != x)
                parent.put(x, find(parent.get(x)));
            return parent.get(x);
        }

        void union(long a, long b) {
            long pa = find(a), pb = find(b);
            if (pa != pb)
                parent.put(pb, pa);
        }
    }

    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        DSU dsu = new DSU();
        long OFFSET = 1_000_000_001L;

        for (int[] p : points)
            dsu.union(p[0], p[1] + OFFSET);

        Map<Long, Integer> compSize = new HashMap<>();

        for (int[] p : points) {
            long r = dsu.find(p[0]);
            compSize.put(r, compSize.getOrDefault(r, 0) + 1);
        }

        Map<Integer, Long> xComp = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Long> yComp = new HashMap<>();

        for (int[] p : points) {
            long r = dsu.find(p[0]);
            xComp.put(p[0], r);
            yComp.put(p[1], r);
        }

        int ans = 1;

        for (long r : compSize.keySet())
            ans = Math.max(ans, compSize.get(r) + 1);

        List<Long> comps = new ArrayList<>(compSize.keySet());

        if (comps.size() >= 2) {
            Collections.sort(comps, (a, b) -> compSize.get(b) - compSize.get(a));
            ans = Math.max(ans, compSize.get(comps.get(0)) + compSize.get(comps.get(1)) + 1);
        }

        return ans;
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 400 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        int i = 0;
        // think like no updation
        int mx = 1;
        int last = -1; // for last correct 
        
        while(i<n-1){
            int j = i+1;
            int diff = nums[i+1]-nums[i];
            while(j<n && (nums[j]-nums[j-1]) == diff) j++;
            int len = j-i;
            int curr = len;
            if(i>0){
                curr++;
            }
            if(j<n){
                curr = max(curr,len+1);
                if(j+1<n && (nums[j+1]-nums[j-1])==2*diff){
                    int k = j+2;
                    while(k<n && (nums[k]-nums[k-1])==diff) k++;
                    curr = max(curr,len+1+(k-(j+1)));
                }
                
            }

            if(i>=2 && (nums[i]-nums[i-2])==2*diff) {
                curr = max(curr,len+2);
            }
            mx = max(mx,curr);
            i = j-1;
        }
        return mx;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
#define p pair<int, int>
    map<p, p> parent;
    map<p,int>size;
    unordered_map<int, vector<p>> x_axis, y_axis;
    p find_parent(p point) {
        if (parent[point] == point) {
            return point;
        }
        return parent[point] = find_parent(parent[point]);
    }
    void Union(p a, p b) {
        a = find_parent(a);
        b = find_parent(b);

        if (a == b)
            return;
        if(size[a] > size[b]){
            parent[b] = a;
            size[a]+=size[b];
        }
        else{
            parent[a] = b;
            size[b]+=size[a];
        }
    }
    
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        // dsu + connected components
        // point p-{x,y} <- {x} , {y}
        // dsu on x part
        // {x,y} -> parent
        // jin jin ka x
        
        for (auto pt : points) {
            int x = pt[0], y = pt[1];
            x_axis[x].push_back({x, y});
            y_axis[y].push_back({x, y});
            p point = {x,y};
            parent[point] = point;
            size[point] = 1;
        }

        for(auto& [x,vec] : x_axis){
            for(int i=1;i<vec.size();i++){
                Union(vec[0],vec[i]);
            }
        }

        vector<int>v;

        for(auto& [y,vec] : y_axis){
            for(int i=1;i<vec.size();i++){
                Union(vec[0],vec[i]);
            }
        }

        for (auto pt : points) {
            int x = pt[0], y = pt[1];
            p point = {x,y};
            if(parent[point]==point) v.push_back(size[point]);
        }

        sort(v.rbegin(),v.rend());

        return (v.size()>=2) ? (v[0]+v[1]+1) : v[0]+1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 401 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();

        vector<int> lefts(n), rights(n);

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i ++ ) {
            if (i <= 1) {
                lefts[i] = i + 1;
            } else {
                if (nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]) {
                    lefts[i] = lefts[i - 1] + 1;
                } else {
                    lefts[i] = 2;
                }
            }
        }


        for (int i = n - 1; i >= 0; i -- ) {
            if (i >= n - 2) {
                rights[i] = n - i;
            } else {
                if (nums[i] - nums[i + 1] == nums[i + 1] - nums[i + 2]) {
                    rights[i] = rights[i + 1] + 1;
                } else {
                    rights[i] = 2;
                }
            }
        }

        int ans = min(2, n);
        
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i ++ ) {
            
            
            int tans = 0;
            if (i == 0) {
                if (n > 1) {
                    tans = rights[1] + 1;
                } else {
                    tans = 1;
                }
            } else if (i == n - 1) {
                if (n > 1) {
                    tans = lefts[n - 2] + 1;
                } else {
                    tans = 1;
                }
            } else {
                if ((nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) % 2 == 0) {
                    ans = max(ans, 3);
                }
                if (lefts[i - 1] > 1 && rights[i + 1] > 1) {
                    int df = nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2];
                    if (df == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] && nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1] == df * 2) {
                        tans = lefts[i - 1] + rights[i + 1] + 1;
                    } else {
                        tans = max(lefts[i], rights[i]) + 1;
                    }
                } 

                if (lefts[i - 1] > 1) {
                    int df = nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2];
                    if (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1] == df * 2) {
                        tans = max(tans, lefts[i - 1] + 2);
                    } else {
                        tans = max(tans, lefts[i - 1] + 1);
                    }
                }

                if (rights[i + 1] > 1) {
                    int df = nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1];
                    if (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1] == df * 2) {
                        tans = max(tans, rights[i + 1] + 2);
                    } else {
                        tans = max(tans, rights[i - 1] + 1);
                    }
                }
            }
            ans = max(ans, tans);
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();

        const int MX = 1000000002;
        vector<int> fa(n), sz(n, 1);
        ranges::iota(fa, 0);


        auto find = [&](this auto&& find, int x) -> int {
            return x == fa[x] ? x : fa[x] = find(fa[x]);
        };

        auto merge = [&](int x, int y) {
            int fx = find(x), fy = find(y);
            if (fx != fy) {
                sz[fy] += sz[fx];
                fa[fx] = fy;
            }
        };

        map<int, vector<int>> xs, ys;

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i ++ ) {
            auto &point = points[i];
            int x = point[0], y = point[1];
            xs[x].push_back(i);
            ys[y].push_back(i);
        }

        for (auto &[k, ns]: xs) {
            for (int i = 0; i + 1 < ns.size(); i ++ ) {
                merge(ns[i], ns[i + 1]);
            }
        }

        for (auto &[k, ns]: ys) {
            for (int i = 0; i + 1 < ns.size(); i ++ ) {
                merge(ns[i], ns[i + 1]);
            }
        }


        vector<pair<int, int>> ts;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i ++ ) {
            if (i == fa[i]) {
                ts.push_back({sz[i], i});
            }
        }

        if (ts.size() == 1) {
            return ts[0].first + 1;
        }
        
        ranges::sort(ts, greater<>());

        return ts[0].first + ts[1].first + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 402 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) 
    {
        int n = nums.size();
        vector<int> l(n,1),r(n,1);

        for(int i = 1 ; i < n ; i++)
            if( i >= 2 && nums[i]-nums[i-1] == nums[i-1]-nums[i-2])
                l[i] = l[i-1]+1;
            else
                l[i]=2;
        for(int i = n-2 ; i >= 0 ; i--)
            if( i + 2 < n && nums[i+1]-nums[i] == nums[i+2]-nums[i+1])
                r[i] = r[i+1]+1;
            else
                r[i]=2;

        int ans = 2;
        for(int i = 0 ; i < n ; i++)
            ans = max(ans,l[i]+1);

        for(int i =1  ; i < n - 1 ; i++)
            {
                int t = nums[i-1] + nums[i+1];

                if(t%2 ==0)
                {
                    int d = (nums[i+1]-nums[i-1])/2;
                    int left = i>=2 && nums[i-1]-nums[i-2] == d ? l[i-1] : 1;
                    int right = i+2 < n && nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == d ? r[i+1] : 1;
                    ans = max(ans,left + right + 1);
                    
                }
            }
        return min(ans,n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU
{
  public:
    vector<int> parent,size;
    DSU(int n)
    {
        parent.resize(n);
        for(int i = 0 ; i < n ; i++)
            parent[i] = i;
        size.resize(n,1);
    }
    int find(int x)
    {
        if(parent[x] == x)
            return x;
        return parent[x] = find(parent[x]);
    }
    bool unite(int x, int y)
    {
        int a = find(x);
        int b = find(y);
        if(a==b)
            return false;
        if(size[a] < size[b])
            swap(a,b);
        parent[b]  = a;
        size[a] += size[b];
        return true;
    }
};
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        DSU dsu(n);
        map<int,int> xm,ym;
        for(int i = 0 ; i < n ; i++)
            {
                int x = points[i][0];
                int y = points[i][1];

                if(xm.count(x))
                    dsu.unite(i,xm[x]);
                else
                    xm[x]=i;

                if(ym.count(y))
                    dsu.unite(i,ym[y]);
                else
                    ym[y]=i;
            }

        map<int,int> compsize;
        for(int i = 0 ; i < n ; i++)
            compsize[dsu.find(i)]++;
        vector<int> sizes;
        for(auto p : compsize)
                sizes.push_back(p.second);
        sort(sizes.rbegin(),sizes.rend());
        if(sizes.size() == 1)
            return n + 1;
        return sizes[0] + sizes[1] + 1;

        
        
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 403 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 2) return n;

        vector<int> L(n), R(n);

        // L[i] = longest arithmetic subarray ending at i
        L[0] = 1;
        L[1] = 2;
        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            long long d1 = 1LL * nums[i] - nums[i - 1];
            long long d2 = 1LL * nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2];
            if (d1 == d2) L[i] = L[i - 1] + 1;
            else L[i] = 2;
        }

        // R[i] = longest arithmetic subarray starting at i
        R[n - 1] = 1;
        R[n - 2] = 2;
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            long long d1 = 1LL * nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
            long long d2 = 1LL * nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1];
            if (d1 == d2) R[i] = R[i + 1] + 1;
            else R[i] = 2;
        }

        int ans = 2;

        // no need to change anything
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            ans = max(ans, L[i]);
            ans = max(ans, R[i]);
        }

        // change first or last element
        ans = max(ans, R[1] + 1);
        ans = max(ans, L[n - 2] + 1);

        // change one middle element
        for (int i = 1; i <= n - 2; i++) {
            // only extend one side
            ans = max(ans, L[i - 1] + 1);
            ans = max(ans, R[i + 1] + 1);

            // try to merge both sides by changing nums[i]
            long long gap = 1LL * nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1];
            if (gap % 2 != 0) continue;

            long long d = gap / 2;

            int leftCount = 1;   // at least nums[i-1]
            if (i >= 2 && 1LL * nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == d) {
                leftCount = L[i - 1];
            }

            int rightCount = 1;  // at least nums[i+1]
            if (i + 2 < n && 1LL * nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == d) {
                rightCount = R[i + 1];
            }

            ans = max(ans, leftCount + 1 + rightCount);
        }

        return min(ans, n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU {
public:
    vector<int> p, sz;

    DSU(int n) {
        p.resize(n);
        sz.assign(n, 1);
        iota(p.begin(), p.end(), 0);
    }

    int find(int x) {
        if (p[x] == x) return x;
        return p[x] = find(p[x]);
    }

    void unite(int a, int b) {
        a = find(a);
        b = find(b);
        if (a == b) return;
        if (sz[a] < sz[b]) swap(a, b);
        p[b] = a;
        sz[a] += sz[b];
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = (int)points.size();
        DSU dsu(n);

        unordered_map<long long, int> mx, my;

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            long long x = points[i][0];
            long long y = points[i][1];

            if (mx.count(x)) dsu.unite(i, mx[x]);
            else mx[x] = i;

            if (my.count(y)) dsu.unite(i, my[y]);
            else my[y] = i;
        }

        unordered_map<int, int> compSize;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            compSize[dsu.find(i)]++;
        }

        int best1 = 0, best2 = 0;
        for (auto &it : compSize) {
            int s = it.second;
            if (s >= best1) {
                best2 = best1;
                best1 = s;
            } else if (s > best2) {
                best2 = s;
            }
        }

        return 1 + best1 + best2;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums):
        le = len(nums)
        ma = 0
        for i in range(le):
            q = nums[i]
            if i + 2 < le:
                d = nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]
                nums[i] = nums[i + 1] - d
                if nums[i] != q:
                    c = 1
                    l = i - 1
                    r = i + 1
                    while r < le and nums[r] - nums[r - 1] == d:
                        c += 1
                        r += 1
                    while l >= 0 and nums[l + 1] - nums[l] == d:
                        l -= 1
                        c += 1
                    ma = max(c, ma)
                    nums[i] = q
            if i >= 2:
                d = nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]
                nums[i] = nums[i - 1] + d
                if nums[i] != q:
                    c = 1
                    l = i - 1
                    r = i + 1
                    while r < le and nums[r] - nums[r - 1] == d:
                        c += 1
                        r += 1
                    while l >= 0 and nums[l + 1] - nums[l] == d:
                        l -= 1
                        c += 1
                    ma = max(c, ma)
                    nums[i] = q
            if i >= 1 and i + 1 < le:
                d = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]
                if d % 2:
                    continue
                d //= 2
                nums[i] = nums[i + 1] - d
                if nums[i] != q:
                    c = 1
                    l = i - 1
                    r = i + 1
                    while r < le and nums[r] - nums[r - 1] == d:
                        c += 1
                        r += 1
                    while l >= 0 and nums[l + 1] - nums[l] == d:
                        l -= 1
                        c += 1
                    ma = max(c, ma)
                    nums[i] = q
        cc = []
        for i in range(le - 1):
            cc.append(nums[i] - nums[i + 1])
        if min(cc) == max(cc): return le
        return ma
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
import sys
sys.setrecursionlimit(1000000)

class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points):
        dx = {}
        dy = {}
        for i in points:
            x, y = i
            if x in dx:
                dx[x].add(y)
            else:
                dx[x] = {y}
            if y in dy:
                dy[y].add(x)
            else:
                dy[y] = {x}
        l = []
        def search(dx, dy, x, y):
            s = 0
            while x in dx:
                y1 = dx[x].pop()
                dy[y1].remove(x)
                if len(dx[x]) == 0:
                    dx.pop(x)
                if len(dy[y1]) == 0:
                    dy.pop(y1)
                s += 1
                s += search(dx, dy, x, y1)
            while y in dy:
                x1 = dy[y].pop()
                dx[x1].remove(y)
                if len(dy[y]) == 0:
                    dy.pop(y)
                if len(dx[x1]) == 0:
                    dx.pop(x1)
                s += 1
                s += search(dx, dy, x1, y)
            return s
        
        while dx:
            x = next(iter(dx))
            y = dx[x].pop()
            dy[y].remove(x)
            if len(dx[x]) == 0:
                dx.pop(x)
            if len(dy[y]) == 0:
                dy.pop(y)
            l.append(search(dx, dy, x, y) + 1)
        
        if len(l) == 1:
            return l[0] + 1
        l.sort()
        return l[-1] + l[-2] + 1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 406 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)

        # build the difference array
        diff = [nums[i+1] - nums[i] for i in range(n - 1)]
        m = len(diff)

        # precompute the lenght of contiguous identical differences ending at index i
        left = [1] * m
        for i in range(1, m):
            if diff[i] == diff[i-1]:
                left[i] = left[i-1] + 1

        # precompute the length of contiguous identical differences starting at index i
        right = [1] * m
        for i in range(m - 2, -1, -1):
            if diff[i] == diff[i+1]:
                right[i] = right[i+1] + 1

        max_len = 0

        # case 1: extending an existing arithmetic subarry by modifying one boundary element
        for i in range(m):
            # left[i] is the length in diff. length in nums is left[i] + 1
            max_len = max(max_len, min(n, left[i] + 2))

        # case 2: bridging 2 arithmetic subarrays by modifying an element in the middle
        for i in range(1, n - 1):
            # check if the gap can be split evenly into 2 identical differences
            if (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) % 2 == 0:
                d = (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) // 2

                # check consecutive 'd's to the left
                c_left = 0
                if i >= 2 and diff[i-2] == d:
                    c_left = left[i-2]

                # check consecutive 'd's to the right
                c_right = 0
                if i <=n - 3 and diff[i+1] == d:
                    c_right = right[i+1]

                # +3 accounts for nums[i-1], nums[i], nums[i+1]
                max_len = max(max_len, c_left + c_right + 3)

        return max_len
        
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        parent = list(range(n))
        size = [1] * n

        def find(i):
            if parent [i] == i:
                return i

            parent[i] = find(parent[i])
            return parent[i]


        def union(i, j):
            root_i = find(i)
            root_j = find(j)
            if root_i != root_j:
                # union by size
                if size[root_i] < size[root_j]:
                    root_i, root_j = root_j, root_i
                parent[root_j] = root_i
                size[root_i] += size[root_j]

        # map to track the index of the first point at a given x or y
        x_map = {}
        y_map = {}

        for i, (x, y) in enumerate(points):
            if x in x_map:
                union(i, x_map[x])
            else:
                x_map[x] = i
                
            if y in y_map:
                union(i, y_map[y])
            else:
                y_map[y] = i
                
        # Aggregate the sizes of the unique root components
        component_sizes = []
        for i in range(n):
            if parent[i] == i:
                component_sizes.append(size[i])
                
        # Sort descending to easily grab the largest two
        component_sizes.sort(reverse=True)
        
        if len(component_sizes) > 1:
            return component_sizes[0] + component_sizes[1] + 1
        else:
            return component_sizes[0] + 1

            
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 2) return n;

        vector<int> pre(n, 2), suf(n, 2);

        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            if (nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]) {
                pre[i] = pre[i - 1] + 1;
            }
        }

        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == nums[i + 1] - nums[i]) {
                suf[i] = suf[i + 1] + 1;
            }
        }

        int maxLen = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (i > 0) maxLen = max(maxLen, pre[i - 1] + 1);
            if (i < n - 1) maxLen = max(maxLen, suf[i + 1] + 1);

            if (i > 0 && i < n - 1) {
                int d1 = nums[i] - nums[i - 1];
                int d2 = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
                
                if (i > 1 && nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1] == 2 * (nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2])) {
                    maxLen = max(maxLen, pre[i - 1] + 2);
                }
                
                if (i < n - 2 && nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1] == 2 * (nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1])) {
                    maxLen = max(maxLen, suf[i + 1] + 2);
                }

                if (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1] == 2 * d1) {
                }

                if ((nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) % 2 == 0) {
                    int targetD = (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) / 2;
                    int left = 1, right = 1;
                    if (i > 1 && nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == targetD) left = pre[i - 1];
                    if (i < n - 2 && nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == targetD) right = suf[i + 1];
                    maxLen = max(maxLen, left + right + 1);
                }
            }
        }

        return min(n, maxLen);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU {
public:
    unordered_map<int, int> parent;
    unordered_map<int, int> size;

    int find(int i) {
        if (parent.find(i) == parent.end()) {
            parent[i] = i;
            return i;
        }
        if (parent[i] == i)
            return i;
        return parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
    }

    void unite(int i, int j) {
        int root_i = find(i);
        int root_j = find(j);
        if (root_i != root_j) {
            parent[root_i] = root_j;
        }
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        if (n == 0)
            return 1;

        DSU dsu;
        int offset = 1000000001;

        for (auto p : points) {
            dsu.unite(p[0], p[1] + offset);
        }

        unordered_map<int, int> cc;
        for (auto p : points) {
            int root = dsu.find(p[0]);
            cc[root]++;
        }

        vector<int> sizes;
        for (auto [root, count] : cc) {
            sizes.push_back(count);
        }

        sort(sizes.rbegin(), sizes.rend());

        int result = sizes[0] + 1;
        if (sizes.size() > 1) {
            result += sizes[1];
        }

        return result;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
struct go{
    int v;
    int s;
    int e;
};
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if(n <= 3) return n;
        vector<int> diff(n-1);
        for(int i=0;i<n-1;i++){
            diff[i] = nums[i+1] - nums[i];
        }
        vector<go> r;
        int s = 0;
        for(int i=1;i<n-1;i++){
            if(diff[i] != diff[i-1]){
                r.push_back({diff[s],s,i-1});
                s = i;
            }
        }
        r.push_back({diff[s],s,n-2});

        sort(r.begin(),r.end(), [](const go& a, const go& b){
            if(a.v != b.v) return a.v < b.v;
            return a.s < b.s;
        });

        int mx = 0;
        for(int i=0;i<r.size();i++){
            int v = r[i].v,x = r[i].s,y = r[i].e,l = y - x + 1,c = l+1;
            if(x > 0) c = max(c,l+2);
            if(y < n-2) c = max(c,l+2);
            if(x > 1 and diff[x-2] + diff[x-1] == 2LL*v) c = max(c,l+3);
            if(y < n-3 and diff[y+1] + diff[y+2] == 2LL*v) c = max(c,l+3);
            mx = max(mx,c);
            if(i+1 < r.size() and r[i+1].v == v){
                int p = r[i+1].s;
                if(p - y == 3 and diff[y+1] + diff[y+2] == 2LL *v){
                    int q = r[i+1].e - p + 1;
                    mx = max(mx,l+q+3);
                }
            }
        }
        return mx;
        
 
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        vector<int> p(n),s(n,1);
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) p[i] = i;
        auto f = [&](auto &z, int i) -> int {
            if(p[i] == i) return i;
            return p[i] = z(z,p[i]);
        };
        auto u = [&](int i, int j){
            int r = f(f,i),q = f(f,j);
            if(r != q){
                if(s[r] < s[q]) swap(r,q);
                p[q] = r;
                s[r] += s[q];
            }
        };
        vector<pair<int,int>> x,y;
        x.reserve(n);
        y.reserve(n);
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            x.emplace_back(points[i][0],i);
            y.emplace_back(points[i][1],i);
        }
        sort(x.begin(),x.end());
        sort(y.begin(),y.end());
        for(int i=1;i<n;i++){
            if(x[i].first == x[i-1].first){
                u(x[i].second,x[i-1].second);
            }
            if(y[i].first == y[i-1].first){
                u(y[i].second,y[i-1].second);
            }
        }
        vector<int> cnt;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            if(p[i] == i) cnt.push_back(s[i]);
        }
        sort(cnt.rbegin(),cnt.rend());
        return cnt.size() >= 2 ? cnt[0] + cnt[1] + 1 : cnt[0] + 1;
        
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 410 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n=nums.size();
        vector<int>last(n+1,1);
        last[n-2]=2;
        int d=nums[n-1]-nums[n-2];
        int ans=3;
        for(int i=n-3;i>=0;i--){
            int diff=nums[i+1]-nums[i];
            if(d==diff)last[i]=last[i+1]+1;
            else{
                last[i]=2;
            }
            d=diff;
            ans=max(ans,last[i]);
        }
        for(int i=0;i<n-3;i++){
            ans=max(ans,1+last[i+1]);
            int nxt=nums[i+3]-nums[i+2];
            int b1=nums[i]+nxt, b2=nums[i+2]-nxt;
            if(b1==b2){
                ans=max(ans,2+last[i+2]);
            }
            if(last[i]>=2){
                int ln=last[i];
            if((i+ln)==n){
                break;
            }
            if((i+ln)==(n-1)){
                ans=max(ans,ln+1);
                break;
            }
            int idx=i+ln;
            if((idx+1)<(n-1)){
                int ori=nums[i+1]-nums[i];
                int diff=nums[idx+2]-nums[idx+1];
                int changed=nums[idx-1]+ori;
                ans=max(ans,ln+1);
                int d_=nums[idx+1]-changed;
                if(d_==ori){
                   if(diff==ori)ans=max(ans,ln+1+last[idx+1]);
                    else ans=max(ans,ln+2); 
                }
                
            }
            else{
               int ori=nums[i+1]-nums[i];
                int changed=nums[idx-1]+ori;
                ans=max(ans,ln+1);
                int d_=nums[idx+1]-changed;
                if(d_==ori){
                    ans=max(ans,ln+2); 
                } 
            }
            }
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& arr) {
        unordered_map<int,vector<int>>x;
        unordered_map<int,vector<int>>y;
        int n=arr.size();
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            x[arr[i][0]].push_back(i);
            y[arr[i][1]].push_back(i);
        }
        vector<bool>vis(n+1,false);
        int idx=0;
        vector<int>vec;
        while(idx<n){
            if(vis[idx]){
                ++idx;
                continue;
            }
            vis[idx]=1;
            unordered_set<int>hor;
            unordered_set<int>ver;
            queue<int>q1,q2;
            q1.push(arr[idx][0]);
            q2.push(arr[idx][1]);
            hor.insert(q1.front());
            ver.insert(q2.front());
            int sz=1;
            while(!q1.empty()||!q2.empty()){
                int ln=q1.size();
                while(ln){
                    ln--;
                    auto curr=q1.front();
                    q1.pop();
                    auto&item=x[curr];
                    for(auto ind:item){
                        if(vis[ind])continue;
                        vis[ind]=1;
                        ++sz;
                        if(!hor.count(arr[ind][0])){
                            q1.push(arr[ind][0]);
                            hor.insert(arr[ind][0]);
                        }
                        if(!ver.count(arr[ind][1])){
                            q2.push(arr[ind][1]);
                            ver.insert(arr[ind][1]);
                        }
                    }
                }
                ln=q2.size();
                while(ln){
                    ln--;
                    auto curr=q2.front();
                    q2.pop();
                    auto&item=y[curr];
                    for(auto ind:item){
                        if(vis[ind])continue;
                        vis[ind]=1;
                        ++sz;
                        if(!hor.count(arr[ind][0])){
                            q1.push(arr[ind][0]);
                            hor.insert(arr[ind][0]);
                        }
                        if(!ver.count(arr[ind][1])){
                            q2.push(arr[ind][1]);
                            ver.insert(arr[ind][1]);
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            vec.push_back(sz);
            idx++;
        }
        if(vec.size()==1)return 1+vec[0];
        sort(vec.begin(),vec.end(),greater<int>());
        return vec[0]+vec[1]+1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 411 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        if(n <= 3)
            return n;

        int m = n - 1;
        int[] diff = new int[m];
        for(int i = 0; i < m; i++)
            diff[i] = nums[i+1] - nums[i];

        int[] left = new int[m];
        int[] right = new int[m];

        left[0] = 1;
        int maxL = 1;

        for(int i = 1; i < m; i++){
            if(diff[i] == diff[i-1])
                left[i] = left[i-1] + 1;
            else
                left[i] = 1;
            maxL = Math.max(maxL, left[i]);
        }

        right[m-1] = 1;
        for(int i = m - 2; i >= 0; i--){
            if(diff[i] == diff[i+1])
                right[i] = right[i+1] + 1;
            else
                right[i] = 1;
        }

        int maxLen = Math.min(n, maxL + 2);

        for(int i = 0; i < m-1; i++){
            int sum = diff[i] + diff[i+1];
            if(sum%2 == 0){
                int d = sum/2;
                int currDlen = 2;

                if(i-1 >= 0 && diff[i-1] == d)
                    currDlen += left[i-1];

                if(i+2 < m && diff[i+2] == d)
                    currDlen += right[i+2];

                maxLen = Math.max(maxLen, currDlen + 1);
            }
        }

        return maxLen;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        UnionFind uf= new UnionFind(n);
        HashMap<Integer, Integer> uSeen = new HashMap<>();
        HashMap<Integer, Integer> vSeen = new HashMap<>();

        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++){
            int u = points[i][0];
            int v = points[i][1];

            if(uSeen.containsKey(u)){
                uf.union(i, uSeen.get(u));
            }else{
                uSeen.put(u, i);
            }

            if(vSeen.containsKey(v)){
                uf.union(i, vSeen.get(v));
            }else{
                vSeen.put(v, i);
            }
        }
        HashMap<Integer, Integer> compSize = new HashMap<>();
        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++){
            int root = uf.find(i);
            compSize.put(root, compSize.getOrDefault(root, 0) + 1);
        }

        List<Integer> sizes = new ArrayList<>(compSize.values());
        sizes.sort(Collections.reverseOrder());

        if(sizes.size() == 1)
            return sizes.get(0) + 1;

        return sizes.get(0) + sizes.get(1) + 1;
    }
    class UnionFind{
        int[] parent;
        public UnionFind(int n){
            parent = new int[n];
            for(int i = 0; i < n; i++){
                parent[i] = i;
            }
        }

        public int find(int i){
            if(parent[i] == i)
                return i;

            return parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
        }

        public void union(int i, int j){
            int rooti = find(i);
            int rootj = find(j);
            if(rooti != rootj)
                parent[rooti] = rootj;
        }
    }
}
[Q4_END]

class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n<=2: 
            return n 

        l = [2]*n

        
        for i in range(2, n): 
            if nums[i]  - nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]: 
                l[i] = l[i-1]+1

        r = [2]*n
        for i in range(n-3, -1, -1): 
            if nums[i+1] - nums[i] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]: 
                r[i] = r[i+1]+1

        ans = max(l)

        for i in range(1, n-1): 
            if (nums[i+1]-nums[i-1])%2==0: 
                d = (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1])//2

                left = 1 
                if i>=2 and nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]==d: 
                    left = l[i-1]

                right = 1
                if i+2<n and nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == d: 
                    right = r[i+1]


                ans = max(ans, left+right+1)

        ans = max(ans, r[1]+1)
        ans = max(ans, l[n-2]+1)

        for i in range(n): 
            ans = max(ans, l[i]+1)
            ans = max(ans, r[i]+1)

        return min(ans, n)
                
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
from collections import defaultdict

class DSU:
    def __init__(self):
        self.parent = {}
        self.sz = defaultdict(int)
    def find(self, x):
        if x not in self.parent:
            self.parent[x] = x
        if self.parent[x] != x:
            self.parent[x] = self.find(self.parent[x])
        return self.parent[x]
    def union(self, a, b):
        pa, pb = self.find(a), self.find(b)
        if pa == pb:
            return
        self.parent[pb] = pa
        self.sz[pa] += self.sz[pb]

class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points):
        dsu = DSU()
        for x, y in points:
            xn, yn = ("x", x), ("y", y)
            dsu.find(xn)
            dsu.find(yn)
            root = dsu.find(xn)
            dsu.sz[root] += 1
            dsu.union(xn, yn)

        comp_size = defaultdict(int)
        for x, y in points:
            comp_size[dsu.find(("x", x))] += 1

        best = max(comp_size.values()) + 1 if comp_size else 1

        y_to_comp = {}
        for _, y in points:
            y_to_comp[y] = dsu.find(("y", y))

        from collections import Counter
        y_comp_sizes = []
        seen = set()
        for r in y_to_comp.values():
            if r not in seen:
                seen.add(r)
                y_comp_sizes.append((comp_size[r], r))
        y_comp_sizes.sort(reverse=True)  
        seen_x_comps = set()
        for x, _ in points:
            rx = dsu.find(("x", x))
            if rx in seen_x_comps:
                continue
            seen_x_comps.add(rx)
            sx = comp_size[rx]
            for sy, ry in y_comp_sizes:
                if ry != rx:
                    best = max(best, sx + sy + 1)
                    break 

        return best
[Q4_END]

class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n=nums.size();
        vector<int> pfx(n,1);
        for(int i=1;i<n;i++){
            if(i==1) pfx[i]=2;
            else if(nums[i]-nums[i-1]==nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]){
                pfx[i]=pfx[i-1]+1;
            }
            else{
                pfx[i]=2;
            }
        }
        vector<int> sfx(n,1);
        for(int i=n-2;i>=0;i--){
            if(i==n-2) sfx[i]=2;
            else if(nums[i+1]-nums[i]==nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]){
                sfx[i]=sfx[i+1]+1;
            }
            else{
                sfx[i]=2;
            }
        }
        int ans=0;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            ans=max(ans,max(pfx[i],sfx[i]));
        }
        if(n>=2){
            ans=max(ans,sfx[1]+1);
            ans=max(ans,pfx[n-2]+1);
        }
        for(int i=1;i<n-1;i++){
            ans=max(ans,pfx[i-1]+1);
            ans=max(ans,sfx[i+1]+1);
            if(i>=2 && i<n-2){
                int d1=nums[i-1]-nums[i-2];
                int d2=nums[i+2]-nums[i+1];
                if(d1==d2 && nums[i+1]-nums[i-1]==2*d2){
                    ans=max(ans,pfx[i-1]+sfx[i+1]+1);
                }
            }
            if(i+2<n && sfx[i+1]>=2){
                int d3=nums[i+2]-nums[i+1];
                if(nums[i+1]-nums[i-1]==2*d3){
                    ans=max(ans,2+sfx[i+1]);
                }
            }
            if(i-2>=0 && pfx[i-1]>=2){
                int d4=nums[i-1]-nums[i-2];
                if(nums[i+1]-nums[i-1]==2*d4){
                    ans=max(ans,2+pfx[i-1]);
                }
            }

        }
        return min(ans,n);  
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    vector<int> parent,sz;
    int find(int x){
        if(parent[x]==x){
            return x;
        }
        return parent[x]=find(parent[x]);
    }
    void united(int a,int b){
        int pa=find(a);
        int pb=find(b);
        if(pa==pb){
            return;
        }
        if(sz[pa]<sz[pb]){
            swap(pa,pb);
        }
        parent[pb]=pa;
        if(sz[pa]==sz[pb]) sz[pa]++;
        return;
    }
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n=points.size();
        parent.resize(n);
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            parent[i]=i;
        }
        map<int,vector<int>> mp1,mp2;
        sz.assign(n,1);
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            mp1[points[i][0]].push_back(i);
            mp2[points[i][1]].push_back(i);
        }
        for(auto [k,v] : mp1){
            int val=k;
            for(int i=0;i<v.size();i++){
                united(v[0],v[i]);
            }
        }
        for(auto [k,v] : mp2){
            int val=k;
            for(int i=0;i<v.size();i++){
                united(v[0],v[i]);
            }
        }
        int maxi1=0;
        int maxi2=0;
        map<int,int> cmps;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            cmps[find(i)]++;
        }
        for(auto [e,w] : cmps){
            if(maxi1<=w){
                maxi2=maxi1;
                maxi1=w;
            }
            else if(maxi2<=w){
                maxi2=w;
            }
        }
        return maxi1+1+maxi2;
    }
};

### RANK 416 ###
[Q3_START]
func longestArithmetic(nums []int) int {
    n := len(nums)
    left:= make([][]int, n)
    right := make([][]int, n)
    left[0] = []int{-1, 1}
    right[n-1] = []int{-1, 1}
    if n > 1 {
        left[1] = []int{nums[1] - nums[0], 2}
        right[n-2] = []int{nums[n-1] - nums[n-2], 2}
    }
    for i := 2; i < n; i++ {
        delta := nums[i] - nums[i-1]
        if delta == left[i-1][0] {
            left[i] = []int{delta, left[i-1][1]+1}
        } else {
            left[i] = []int{delta, 2}
        }
    }
    for i := n-3; i >= 0; i-- {
        delta := nums[i+1] - nums[i]
        if delta == right[i+1][0] {
            right[i] = []int{delta, right[i+1][1]+1}
        } else {
            right[i] = []int{delta, 2}
        }
    }

    result := 1 
    for i := range n {
        if i > 0 {
            result = max(result, left[i-1][1]+1)
        }
        if i+1 < n {
            result = max(result, right[i+1][1]+1)
        }
        if i > 0 && i + 1 < n && (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1])%2 == 0 {
            l := 1
            r := 1
            delta := (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) /2 
            if delta == left[i-1][0] {
                l = left[i-1][1]
            }
            if delta == right[i+1][0] {
                r = right[i+1][1]
            }
            result = max(result, l+r+1)
        }
    } 
    return result
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
import "strconv"
type Point struct {
    x string 
    y string 
}

func NewPoint(x string, y string) *Point{
    return &Point{
        x:x, 
        y:y,
    }
}
func (p *Point) Key() string {
    return p.x + ";" + p.y 
}

func maxActivated(points [][]int) int {
    adj := map[string][]*Point{}
    ps := []*Point{}
    for _, point := range points {
        x_key := NewPoint(strconv.Itoa(point[0]), "y").Key()
        y_key := NewPoint("x", strconv.Itoa(point[1])).Key()
        p := NewPoint(strconv.Itoa(point[0]), strconv.Itoa(point[1]))
        //fmt.Println(point, p.x, p.y, p.Key())
        adj[x_key] = append(adj[x_key], p)
        adj[y_key] = append(adj[y_key], p)
        ps = append(ps, p)
    }

    seen := map[string]bool{}
    var rec func(point *Point) int 
    rec = func(point *Point) int {
        if seen[point.Key()] {
            return 0 
        }
        seen[point.Key()] = true 
        if point.x == "x" {
            val := 0 
            // check adj 
            for _, next := range adj[point.Key()] {
                if !seen[next.Key()] {
                    val += rec(next)
                }
            }
            return val 
            
        }  else if point.y == "y" {
            val := 0 
            // check adj 
            for _, next := range adj[point.Key()] {
                if !seen[next.Key()] {
                    val += rec(next)
                }
            }
            return val 
        }  else {
            // check x and y 
            val := 1 
            for _, next := range []*Point{NewPoint(point.x, "y"), NewPoint("x", point.y)} {
                if !seen[next.Key()] {
                    val += rec(next)
                }
            }
            return val
        }
    }
    
    first, second := 0, 0 
    for _, point := range ps {
        val := rec(point)
        //fmt.Println(point.x, point.y, point.Key(), val, first, second)
        if val > first {
            first, second = val, first 
        } else if val > second {
            second = val 
        }
        //fmt.Println(first, second)
    }
    return first + second + 1
}
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n=nums.length;
        if(n<=2)return n;
        int maxLen=2;
        maxLen=Math.max(maxLen,findMax(nums,n));
        for(int i=0;i<n/2;i++){
            int temp=nums[i];
            nums[i]=nums[n-1-i];
            nums[n-1-i]=temp;
        }
        maxLen=Math.max(maxLen,findMax(nums,n));
        return maxLen;
    }
    private int findMax(int[] nums,int n){
        int best=0;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            if(n-i<=best)break;
            for(int j=i+1;j<=i+2&&j<n;j++){
                long diff=(long)nums[j]-nums[i];
                int dist=j-i;
                if(diff%dist!=0)continue;
                long d=diff/dist;
                int currentCount=0;
                int replaced=0;
                for(int k=i;k<n;k++){
                    long expected=(long)nums[i]+(long)(k-i)*d;
                    if(nums[k]==expected){
                        currentCount++;
                    }
                    else if(replaced==0){
                        currentCount++;
                        replaced=1;
                    }
                    else{
                        break;
                    }
                }
                best=Math.max(best,currentCount);
            }
        }
        return best;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n=points.length;
        if(n==0)return 1;
        DSU dsu=new DSU(n);
        Map<Integer,Integer>lastX=new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer,Integer>lastY=new HashMap<>();
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            int x=points[i][0];
            int y=points[i][1];
            if(lastX.containsKey(x)){
                dsu.union(i,lastX.get(x));
            }
            lastX.put(x,i);
        
        if(lastY.containsKey(y)){
            dsu.union(i,lastY.get(y));
        }
        lastY.put(y,i);
        }
        Map<Integer,Integer>componentSizes=new HashMap<>();
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            int root= dsu.find(i);
            componentSizes.put(root,componentSizes.getOrDefault(root,0)+1);
        }
        List<Integer>sizes=new ArrayList<>(componentSizes.values());
        Collections.sort(sizes,Collections.reverseOrder());
        if(sizes.size()>=2){
            return sizes.get(0)+sizes.get(1)+1;
        }
        else{
            return sizes.get(0)+1;
        }
    }
    class DSU{
        int[]parent;
        public DSU(int n){
            parent =new int[n];
            for(int i=0;i<n;i++)parent[i]=i;
        }
        public int find(int i){
            if(parent[i]==i)return i;
            return parent[i]=find(parent[i]);
        }
        public void union(int i,int j){
            int rooti=find(i);
            int rootj=find(j);
            if(rooti!=rootj)parent[rooti]=rootj;
        }
    }
        
    
}

class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n=nums.size();

        vector<int>v1(n);
        vector<int>v2(n);

        v1[0]=1;
        v1[1]=2;
        for(int i=2;i<n;i++){
            if((nums[i]-nums[i-1])==(nums[i-1]-nums[i-2])) v1[i]=v1[i-1]+1;
            else v1[i]=2;
        }

        v2[n-1]=1;
        v2[n-2]=2;

        for(int i=n-3;i>=0;i--){
            if((nums[i]-nums[i+1])==(nums[i+1]-nums[i+2])) v2[i]=v2[i+1]+1;
            else v2[i]=2;
        }

        // for(int i=0;i<n;i++) cout<<v1[i]<<" ";cout<<endl;
        // for(int i=0;i<n;i++) cout<<v2[i]<<" ";cout<<endl;

        int ans=2;

        for(int i=2;i<=n-3;i++){
            int d1=nums[i-1]-nums[i-2];
            int d2=nums[i+2]-nums[i+1];
            int d3=nums[i+1]-nums[i-1];

            // cout<<i<<" "<<d1<<" "<<d2<<" "<<d3<<endl;

            if(d1==d2 && d3==d1*2) ans=max(ans,v1[i-1]+v2[i+1]+1);
        }

        for(int i=0;i<n-1;i++){
            ans=max(ans,v1[i]+1);
        }
        
        for(int i=1;i<n;i++) ans=max(ans,v2[i]+1);

        for(int i=1;i+2<n;i++){
            int d1=nums[i+2]-nums[i+1];
            int d2=nums[i+1]-nums[i-1];

            if(d2==d1*2) ans=max(ans,v2[i+1]+2);
        }

        for(int i=n-2;i-2>=0;i--){
        
            int d1=nums[i-1]-nums[i-2];
            int d2=nums[i+1]-nums[i-1];

            // cout<<i<<" "<<d1<<" "<<d2<<endl;

            if(d2==d1*2) ans=max(ans,v1[i-1]+2);
        }

        // if(d2==d1*2) ans=max(ans,v1[n-3]+2);

        return ans;

        // for(int i=1;i<n-1;i++){
        //     int d1=nums[i]-nums[i-1];
        //     int d2=nums[i+1]-nums[i];

        //     // if(d1==d2) ans=max(ans,v1[i])
        // }
    }
};

[Q4_START]
class dsu{
public:
    vector<int>par,sz;

    dsu(int n){
        par.resize(n+1);for(int i=0;i<=n;i++) par[i]=i;
        sz.resize(n+1,1);
    }

    int find_par(int u){
        if(par[u]==u) return u;
        return par[u]=find_par(par[u]);
    }

    void jn(int u,int v){
        int p1=find_par(u);
        int p2=find_par(v);

        if(p1==p2) return;

        if(sz[p1]<sz[p2]){
            sz[p2]+=sz[p1];
            par[p1]=p2;
        }else{
            sz[p1]+=sz[p2];
            par[p2]=p1;
        }
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n=points.size();

        dsu d(n);

        map<pair<int,int>,int>mp;

        for(int i=0;i<n;i++)mp[{points[i][0],points[i][1]}]=i;

        map<int,int>mp1,mp2;

        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            if(mp1.find(points[i][0])!=mp1.end()){
                int idx=mp1[points[i][0]];
                d.jn(i,idx);
            }
    
            if(mp2.find(points[i][1])!=mp2.end()){
                int idx=mp2[points[i][1]];
                d.jn(i,idx);
            }

            mp1[points[i][0]]=i;
            mp2[points[i][1]]=i;
        }

        vector<int>v1(n,0);
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            int u=d.find_par(i);
            v1[u]++;
        }

        int a1=0;int a2=0;
        for(auto&ii:v1){
            if(ii>=a1){ a2=a1; a1=ii;}
            else if(ii>=a2) a2=ii;
        }

        // cout<<n<<endl;
        // for(auto&ii:v1)cout<<ii<<" ";cout<<endl;

        // cout<<a1<<" "<<a2<<" "<<endl;

        int ans=a1+a2+1;
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 419 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:

        n = len(nums)
        left = [1] * n
        for i in range(1, n):
            if i >= 2 and nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]:
                left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1
            else:
                left[i] = 2

        right = [1] * n
        for i in range(n - 2, -1, -1):
            if i <= n - 3 and nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]:
                right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1
            else:
                right[i] = 2
        ans = max(left)
        for i in range(n):

            best_here = 1

            if i >= 1:
                best_here = max(best_here, 2)  
                if i >= 2:

                    best_here = max(best_here, left[i - 1] + 1)

            if i + 1 < n:
                best_here = max(best_here, 2)  
                if i + 2 < n:

                    best_here = max(best_here, right[i + 1] + 1)

            if 0 < i < n - 1:
                s = nums[i - 1] + nums[i + 1]
                if s % 2 == 0:
                    x = s // 2
                    d = x - nums[i - 1]

                    if i - 1 == 0:
                        left_len = 1
                    else:
                        left_diff = nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]
                        left_len = left[i - 1] if left_diff == d else 1

                    if i + 1 == n - 1:
                        right_len = 1
                    else:
                        right_diff = nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]
                        right_len = right[i + 1] if right_diff == d else 1
                    best_here = max(best_here, left_len + 1 + right_len)
            ans = max(ans, best_here)
        return min(ans, n)
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:

        n = len(points)
        xs = []
        ys = []
        for x, y in points:
            xs.append(x)
            ys.append(y)
        x_vals = list(set(xs))
        y_vals = list(set(ys))
        xid = {x: i for i, x in enumerate(x_vals)}
        yid = {y: i for i, y in enumerate(y_vals)}
        nx = len(x_vals)
        ny = len(y_vals)
        dsu = DSU(nx + ny)
        for x, y in points:
            dsu.union(xid[x], nx + yid[y])
        comp_points = defaultdict(int)
        for x, y in points:
            root = dsu.find(xid[x])
            comp_points[root] += 1
        comp_x_count = defaultdict(int)
        comp_y_count = defaultdict(int)
        for x in x_vals:
            root = dsu.find(xid[x])
            comp_x_count[root] += 1
        for y in y_vals:
            root = dsu.find(nx + yid[y])
            comp_y_count[root] += 1
        roots = list(comp_points.keys())
        if not roots:
            return 1
        best_single = max(comp_points[r] for r in roots)
        can_add_inside = False
        for r in roots:
            if comp_x_count[r] * comp_y_count[r] > comp_points[r]:
                can_add_inside = True
                break
        sizes = sorted((comp_points[r] for r in roots), reverse=True)
        best_merge = sizes[0]
        if len(sizes) >= 2:
            best_merge = max(best_merge, sizes[0] + sizes[1])
        best_existing = max(best_single if can_add_inside else 0, best_merge)
        return best_existing + 1
class DSU:
    def __init__(self, n: int):
        self.p = list(range(n))
        self.sz = [1] * n
    def find(self, x: int) -> int:
        while self.p[x] != x:
            self.p[x] = self.p[self.p[x]]
            x = self.p[x]
        return x
    def union(self, a: int, b: int) -> None:
        ra = self.find(a)
        rb = self.find(b)
        if ra == rb:
            return
        if self.sz[ra] < self.sz[rb]:
            ra, rb = rb, ra
        self.p[rb] = ra
        self.sz[ra] += self.sz[rb]
[Q4_END]
