### RANK 420 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();

        int ans = 3;

        vector<int> pref(n, 0), suff(n, 0);

        pref[0] = 1, pref[1] = 2;
        for(int i=2;i<n;i++) {
            if((nums[i] - nums[i -1]) == (nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2])) pref[i] = pref[i - 1] + 1;
            else pref[i] = 2;
        }

        suff[n - 1] = 1, suff[n - 2] = 2;
        for(int i=(n - 3);i>=0;i--) {
            if((nums[i] - nums[i + 1]) == (nums[i + 1] - nums[i + 2])) suff[i] = suff[i + 1] + 1;
            else suff[i] = 2;
        }

        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) {
            if(i > 0) ans = min(n, max(ans, pref[i - 1] + 1));
            if(i + 1 < n) ans = min(n, max(ans, suff[i + 1] + 1));

            if(i > 0 && i < (n - 1)) {
                int d = (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]);
                if((d & 1) == 0) {
                    d = d / 2;
                    int left = 1, right = 1;
                    if(i >= 2 && (nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]) == d) left = pref[i - 1];
                    if(i + 2 < n && (nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]) == d) right = suff[i + 1];

                    ans = min(n ,max(ans, left + right + 1));
                }
            }
        }

        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();

        map<int, vector<int>> xc, yc;
        for(int i=0; i < n;i++) {
            int x = points[i][0], y = points[i][1];
            xc[x].push_back(i);
            yc[y].push_back(i);
        }

        vector<int> vis(n + 1, 0);

        auto bfs = [&](int src) -> int {
            queue<int> q;
            q.push(src);
            vis[src] = 1;
            int cnt = 0;

            while(!q.empty()) {
                int node = q.front();
                q.pop();
                cnt++;

                int x = points[node][0], y = points[node][1];

                if(xc.count(x)) {
                    for(auto &next: xc[x]) {
                        if(!vis[next]) {
                            vis[next] = 1;
                            q.push(next);
                        }
                    }
                    xc.erase(x);
                }

                if(yc.count(y)) {
                    for(auto &next: yc[y]) {
                        if(!vis[next]) {
                            vis[next] = 1;
                            q.push(next);
                        }
                    }
                    yc.erase(y);
                }
            }

            return cnt;
        };

        vector<int> groups;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) {
            if(vis[i]) continue;
            groups.push_back(bfs(i));
        }

        if(groups.size() == 1) return (n + 1);
        
        sort(rbegin(groups), rend(groups));

        return groups[0] + groups[1] + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 421 ###
[Q3_START]
/**
 * @param {number[]} nums
 * @return {number}
 */
var longestArithmetic = function (nums) {
  let n = nums.length;
  if (n <= 3) return n;

  // 1. Build the differences array
  let D = new Array(n - 1);
  for (let i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) {
    D[i] = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
  }
  
  let m = D.length;

  // 2. Precompute the lengths of consecutive identical differences
  let L = new Array(m).fill(1);
  for (let i = 1; i < m; i++) {
    if (D[i] === D[i - 1]) {
      L[i] = L[i - 1] + 1;
    }
  }

  let R = new Array(m).fill(1);
  for (let i = m - 2; i >= 0; i--) {
    if (D[i] === D[i + 1]) {
      R[i] = R[i + 1] + 1;
    }
  }

  // 3. Base case: We can always extend the longest block by modifying an adjacent element
  let maxBlock = 0;
  for (let i = 0; i < m; i++) {
    maxBlock = Math.max(maxBlock, L[i]);
  }
  // The max answer is the longest block of differences + 2 (representing the elements in nums),
  // capped by the total array length.
  let ans = Math.min(maxBlock + 2, n);

  // 4. Try bridging two sequences by changing one element (which alters a pair of adjacent differences)
  for (let i = 0; i < m - 1; i++) {
    let sum = D[i] + D[i + 1];
    
    // They must be able to form an integer difference
    if (sum % 2 === 0) {
      let targetDiff = sum / 2;
      let currentLen = 2; // The bridged pair itself has length 2 in the diff array
      
      // Check if it seamlessly attaches to the left block
      if (i > 0 && D[i - 1] === targetDiff) {
        currentLen += L[i - 1];
      }
      
      // Check if it seamlessly attaches to the right block
      if (i + 2 < m && D[i + 2] === targetDiff) {
        currentLen += R[i + 2];
      }
      
      // Add 1 to convert from difference array length to nums array length
      ans = Math.max(ans, currentLen + 1);
    }
  }

  return ans;
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
/**
 * @param {number[][]} points
 * @return {number}
 */
var maxActivated = function(points) {
    const n = points.length;
    
    // Typed arrays for O(1) contiguous memory access
    const parent = new Int32Array(n);
    const size = new Int32Array(n);
    
    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
        parent[i] = i;
        size[i] = 1;
    }
    
    // Iterative path compression (avoids call stack overhead in deep trees)
    const find = (i) => {
        let root = i;
        while (root !== parent[root]) {
            root = parent[root];
        }
        let curr = i;
        while (curr !== root) {
            let nxt = parent[curr];
            parent[curr] = root;
            curr = nxt;
        }
        return root;
    };
    
    const union = (i, j) => {
        const rootI = find(i);
        const rootJ = find(j);
        
        if (rootI !== rootJ) {
            // Union by size to keep trees flat
            if (size[rootI] < size[rootJ]) {
                parent[rootI] = rootJ;
                size[rootJ] += size[rootI];
            } else {
                parent[rootJ] = rootI;
                size[rootI] += size[rootJ];
            }
        }
    };
    
    const xMap = new Map();
    const yMap = new Map();
    
    // Build the components
    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
        const x = points[i][0];
        const y = points[i][1];
        
        if (xMap.has(x)) union(i, xMap.get(x));
        else xMap.set(x, i);
        
        if (yMap.has(y)) union(i, yMap.get(y));
        else yMap.set(y, i);
    }
    
    // Linear scan for the two largest components (replaces O(N log N) sorting)
    let max1 = 0;
    let max2 = 0;
    
    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
        if (parent[i] === i) {
            const compSize = size[i];
            if (compSize > max1) {
                max2 = max1;
                max1 = compSize;
            } else if (compSize > max2) {
                max2 = compSize;
            }
        }
    }
    
    // Max activated is the sum of the two largest components + 1 (the new point bridging them)
    return max1 + max2 + 1;
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 422 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n=nums.size();
        if (n<=2) return n;

        vector<int>diff(n-1);
        for (int i=0;i<n-1; i++) {
            diff[i]=nums[i+1]-nums[i];
        }

        vector<int>l(n-1,1),r(n-1,1);

        for (int i=1;i<n-1;i++) {
            if (diff[i]==diff[i-1]) {
                l[i]=l[i-1]+1;
            }
        }

        for (int i=n-3;i>=0;i--){
            if (diff[i]==diff[i+1]){
                r[i]=r[i+1]+1;
            }
        }

        int ans=2;

        for(int i=0;i<n-1;i++){
            ans=max(ans,l[i]+1); 
            ans=max(ans,l[i]+2);
        }

        for(int k=1;k<=n-2;k++) {
            int s=nums[k+1]-nums[k-1];
            if (s%2!=0)continue;

            int d=s/2;
            int st=0,end=0;
            if(k-2>=0 && diff[k-2]==d) {
                st=l[k-2];
            }
            if (k+1<n-1 && diff[k+1]==d) {
                end=r[k+1];
            }

            ans=max(ans,st+end+3);
        }

        return min(ans,n);
    
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DisjointSet {
    vector<int>rank,parent;
public:
    DisjointSet(int n) {
        rank.resize(n+1,0);
        parent.resize(n+1);
        for (int i=0;i<=n;i++) {
            parent[i]=i;
        }
    }

    int findUPar(int node) {
        if (node==parent[node])
            return node;
        return parent[node]=findUPar(parent[node]);
    }

    void unionByRank(int u, int v) {
        int ulp_u=findUPar(u);
        int ulp_v=findUPar(v);
        if (ulp_u==ulp_v) return;
        if (rank[ulp_u]<rank[ulp_v]) {
            parent[ulp_u]=ulp_v;
        }
        else if (rank[ulp_v]<rank[ulp_u]) {
            parent[ulp_v]=ulp_u;
        }
        else {
            parent[ulp_v]=ulp_u;
            rank[ulp_u]++;
        }
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n=points.size();
        unordered_map<int,int>mpp1,mpp2;
        int t1=0,t2=0;

        for(auto it:points){
            if(!mpp1.count(it[0])) mpp1[it[0]]=t1++;
            if(!mpp2.count(it[1])) mpp2[it[1]]=t2++;
        }

        int t=t1+t2;
        DisjointSet dsu(t);

        for(auto it:points){
            int x=mpp1[it[0]];
            int y=mpp2[it[1]]+t1; 
            dsu.unionByRank(x,y);
        }

        unordered_map<int,int>comps;

        for(auto it:points){
            int par=dsu.findUPar(mpp1[it[0]]);
            comps[par]++;
        }

        int mx1=0,mx2=0;

        for(auto it:comps){
            int s=it.second;
        
            if(s>mx1){
                mx2=mx1;
                mx1=s;
            }
            else if(s>mx2){
                mx2=s;
            }
        }
        
        if(mx2==0) return mx1+1;
        
        return mx1+mx2+1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
import java.util.*;

class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums){
        int n = nums.length;
        if(n <= 2) return n;
        int[] l = new int[n];
        int[] r = new int[n];
        l[0] = 1;
        l[1] = 2;
        for(int i = 2; i < n; ++i){
            if(nums[i]-nums[i-1]==nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]) l[i]=l[i-1]+1;
            else l[i]=2;
        }
        r[n-1]=1;
        r[n-2]=2;
        for(int i=n-3;i>=0;--i){
            if(nums[i+1]-nums[i]==nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]) r[i]=r[i+1]+1;
            else r[i]=2;
        }
        int a=2;
        for(int i=0;i<n;++i) a=Math.max(a,l[i]);
        a=Math.max(a,r[1]+1);
        a=Math.max(a,l[n-2]+1);
        for(int i=1;i<=n-2;++i){
            a=Math.max(a,l[i-1]+1);
            a=Math.max(a,r[i+1]+1);
            int x=nums[i+1]-nums[i-1];
            if(x%2==0){
                int d=x/2;
                int left=1;
                if(i-1>=1 && nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]==d) left=l[i-1];
                int right=1;
                if(i+1<=n-2 && nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]==d) right=r[i+1];
                a=Math.max(a,left+1+right);
            }
        }
        return Math.min(a,n);
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
import java.util.*;

class Solution {
    int f(int[] p,int x){
        while(p[x]!=x){
            p[x]=p[p[x]];
            x=p[x];
        }
        return x;
    }

    void u(int[] p,int[] r,int a,int b){
        int ra=f(p,a),rb=f(p,b);
        if(ra==rb) return;
        if(r[ra]<r[rb]) p[ra]=rb;
        else if(r[ra]>r[rb]) p[rb]=ra;
        else{
            p[rb]=ra;
            r[ra]++;
        }
    }

    public int maxActivated(int[][] points){
        int n=points.length;
        int[] p=new int[n];
        int[] r=new int[n];

        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) p[i]=i;

        HashMap<Integer,Integer> xm=new HashMap<>();
        HashMap<Integer,Integer> ym=new HashMap<>();

        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            int x=points[i][0],y=points[i][1];

            if(xm.containsKey(x)) u(p,r,i,xm.get(x));
            else xm.put(x,i);

            if(ym.containsKey(y)) u(p,r,i,ym.get(y));
            else ym.put(y,i);
        }

        HashMap<Integer,Integer> m=new HashMap<>();

        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            int root=f(p,i);
            m.put(root,m.getOrDefault(root,0)+1);
        }

        int a=0,b=0;

        for(int v:m.values()){
            if(v>a){
                b=a;
                a=v;
            }else if(v>b){
                b=v;
            }
        }

        if(b==0) return a+1;
        return a+b+1;
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 425 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] n) {
        int len = n.length;
        if(len <= 3) return len;
        int[] D = new int[len - 1];
        for(int i = 0; i < len - 1; ++i) 
            D[i] = n[i + 1] - n[i];
        int[] l = new int[len - 1], r = new int[len - 1];
        l[0] = 1;
        for(int i = 1; i < len - 1; ++i) 
            l[i] = (D[i] == D[i - 1]) ? l[i - 1] + 1 : 1;
        r[len - 2] = 1;
        for(int i = len - 3; i >= 0; --i) 
            r[i] = (D[i] == D[i + 1]) ? r[i + 1] + 1 : 1;
        int ans = 0;
        for(int i = 0; i < len - 1; ++i) 
            ans = Math.max(ans, Math.min(len, l[i] + 2));
        for(int i = 0; i < len - 2; ++i) {
            long d = (long) n[i + 2] - n[i];
            if(d % 2 == 0) {
                int t = (int) (d / 2);
                int c = 2;
                if(i > 0 && D[i - 1] == t) 
                    c += l[i - 1];
                if(i + 2 < len - 1 && D[i + 2] == t) 
                    c += r[i + 2];
                ans = Math.max(ans, c + 1);
            }
        }
        return Math.min(ans, len);
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int len = points.length;
        if(len == 0) return 1;
        int[] p = new int[len];
        for(int i = 0; i < len; ++i) p[i] = i;
        Map<Integer, Integer> xm = new HashMap<>(), ym = new HashMap<>();
        for(int i = 0; i < len; ++i) {
            int x = points[i][0], y = points[i][1];
            if(xm.containsKey(x))
                union(i , xm.get(x), p);
            xm.put(x, i);
            if(ym.containsKey(y))
                union(i, ym.get(y), p);
            ym.put(y, i);
        }
        Map<Integer, Integer> c = new HashMap<>();
        for(int i = 0; i < len; ++i) {
            int r = find(i, p);
            c.put(r, c.getOrDefault(r, 0) +  1);
        }
        List<Integer> s = new ArrayList<>(c.values());
        Collections.sort(s, Collections.reverseOrder());
        if(s.size() == 1)
            return s.get(0) + 1;
        else return s.get(0) + s.get(1) + 1;
    }
    private void union(int i, int j, int[] p) {
        int ri = find(i, p);
        int rj = find(j, p);
        if(ri != rj) p[ri] = rj;
    }
    private int find(int i, int[] p) {
        if(p[i] == i) return i;
        return p[i] = find(p[i], p);
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 426 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n=nums.length;
        if(n<=3) return n;
        int[] D=new int[n-1];
        for(int i=0;i<n-1;i++){
            D[i]=nums[i+1]-nums[i];
        }
        int[] L=new int[n-1];
        L[0]=1;
        for(int i=1;i<n-1;i++){
            if(D[i]==D[i-1]){
                L[i]=L[i-1]+1;
            }else{
                L[i]=1;
            }
        }
        int R[]=new int[n-1];
        R[n-2]=1;
        for(int i=n-3;i>=0;i--){
            if(D[i]==D[i+1]){
                R[i]=R[i+1]+1;
            }else{
                R[i]=1;
            }
        }
        int maxDiffLen=0;
        for(int i=0;i<n-1;i++){
            if(L[i]>maxDiffLen){
                maxDiffLen=L[i];
            }
        }
        if(R[1]+1>maxDiffLen) maxDiffLen=R[1]+1;
        if(L[n-3]+1>maxDiffLen) maxDiffLen=L[n-3]+1;
        for(int k=1;k<n-1;k++){
            int sum=D[k-1]+D[k];
            if(k>=2&&L[k-2]+1>maxDiffLen){
                maxDiffLen=L[k-2]+1;
            }
            if(k<=n-3&&R[k+1]+1>maxDiffLen){
                maxDiffLen=R[k+1]+1;
            }
            if(k>=2&&sum==2*D[k-2]){
                int len=L[k-2]+2;
                if(k<=n-3&&D[k+1]==D[k-2]){
                    len+=R[k+1];
                }
                if(len>maxDiffLen){
                    maxDiffLen=len;
                }
            }
            if(k<=n-3&&sum==2*D[k+1]){
                int len=R[k+1]+2;
                if(k>=2&&D[k-2]==D[k+1]){
                    len+=L[k-2];
                }
                if(len>maxDiffLen){
                    maxDiffLen=len;
                }
            }
        }
        return maxDiffLen+1;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    int[] parent;
        int[] size;
        int find(int i){
            if(parent[i]==i) return i;
        return parent[i]=find(parent[i]);
        }
    void union(int i,int j){
        int rooti=find(i);
        int rootj=find(j);
        if(rooti!=rootj){
            parent[rooti]=rootj;
            size[rootj]+=size[rooti];
        }
    }
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
       int n=points.length;
        parent=new int[n];
        size=new int[n];
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            parent[i]=i;
            size[i]=1;
        }
        java.util.HashMap<Integer,Integer> xMap=new java.util.HashMap<>(n);
                java.util.HashMap<Integer,Integer> yMap=new java.util.HashMap<>(n);
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            int x=points[i][0];
            int y=points[i][1];
            if(xMap.containsKey(x)){
                union(i,xMap.get(x));
            }
            if(yMap.containsKey(y)){
                union(i,yMap.get(y));
            }
            xMap.put(x,i);
            yMap.put(y,i);
        }
    int cs[]=new int[n];
        int cc=0;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            if(parent[i]==i){
                cs[cc++]=size[i];
            }
        }
        java.util.Arrays.sort(cs,0,cc);
        if(cc>=2){
            return cs[cc-1]+cs[cc-2]+1;
        }else{
            return cs[cc-1]+1;
        }
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 427 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        const int len = nums.size();
        int l=0;
        vector<int>pre(len,1);
        vector<int>post(len,1);
        int las = 2;
        //pre[0]=1;post[len-1]=1;
        for(int i=1;i<len;++i){
            if(i==1 || nums[i]-nums[i-1]==nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]){
                pre[i]=1+pre[i-1];
            }
            else{pre[i]=2;}
        }
        for(int i=len-2;i>=0;--i){
            if(i==len-2 || nums[i+1]-nums[i]==nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]){
                post[i]=1+post[i+1];
            }
            else{
                post[i]=2;
            }
        }
        for(int i=0;i<len;++i){
            las = max(las,pre[i]);
        }
        for(int i=0;i<len;++i){
            las=max(las,pre[i]+1);
            las=max(las,post[i]+1);
        }
        for(int i=1;i<len-1;++i){
            int left = nums[i-1]-(i>=2?nums[i-2]:nums[i-1]);
            int right = (i+2<len?nums[i+2]:nums[i+1])-nums[i+1];

            if(pre[i-1]>=2 && post[i+1]>=2 && left==right && nums[i-1]+left+left==nums[i+1]){
                las = max(las,(pre[i-1]+1+post[i+1]));
            }

            if(pre[i-1]>=2){
                int d=nums[i-1]-nums[i-2];
                if(nums[i-1]+d+d==nums[i+1]){
                    las=max(las,(pre[i-1]+2));
                }
            }
            if(post[i+1]>=2){
                int d=nums[i+2]-nums[i+1];
                if(nums[i-1]+d+d==nums[i+1]){
                    las=max(las,(post[i+1]+2));
                }
            }
        }
        return min(las,len);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DisjointSet{
  private:
    vector<int>rank;
    vector<int>parent;

  public:
    DisjointSet(int n){
        parent.resize(n+1);
        rank.resize(n+1,0);
        for(int i=0;i<=n;++i){parent[i]=i;}
    }

    int findUParent(int node){
        if(parent[node]==node){return node;}
        return parent[node]=findUParent(parent[node]);
    }

    void findUnionByRank(int u, int v){
        int ulp_u = findUParent(u);
        int ulp_v = findUParent(v);
        if(ulp_u==ulp_v){return;}
        if(rank[ulp_u]<rank[ulp_v]){
            parent[ulp_u]=ulp_v;
        }
        else if(rank[ulp_v]<rank[ulp_u]){
            parent[ulp_v]=ulp_u;
        }
        else{
            parent[ulp_u]=ulp_v;
            rank[ulp_v]++;
        }
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        const int len = points.size();
        DisjointSet ds(len);

        unordered_map<int,int>mppx;
        unordered_map<int,int>mppy;
        unordered_map<int,int>components;
        int one=0; int two = 0;
        int i=0;
        for(const auto&it:points){
            int x = it[0];
            int y = it[1];

            if(mppx.find(x)!=mppx.end()){
                ds.findUnionByRank(mppx[x],i);
            }
            else{mppx[x]=i;}
            if(mppy.find(y)!=mppy.end()){
                ds.findUnionByRank(mppy[y],i);
            }
            else{mppy[y]=i;}
            ++i;
        }
        for(int i=0;i<len;++i){
            ++components[ds.findUParent(i)];
        }
        for(const auto&it:components){
            if(it.second>one){two=one;one=it.second;}
            else if(it.second>two){two=it.second;}
        }
        return one+two+1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 428 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 3) return n;

        int m = n - 1;
        vector<int> A(m);
        for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) {
            A[i] = nums[i+1] - nums[i];
        }

        // left_run[i] stores the length of identical differences ending at index i
        vector<int> left_run(m, 1);
        for (int i = 1; i < m; ++i) {
            if (A[i] == A[i-1]) {
                left_run[i] = left_run[i-1] + 1;
            }
        }

        // right_run[i] stores the length of identical differences starting at index i
        vector<int> right_run(m, 1);
        for (int i = m - 2; i >= 0; --i) {
            if (A[i] == A[i+1]) {
                right_run[i] = right_run[i+1] + 1;
            }
        }

        int max_len = 0;

        // Rule 1: Extend an existing run by changing one boundary element
        for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) {
            int L = left_run[i];
            int current_ans = L + 1; // Base length in nums without modification
            if (L < m) {
                current_ans = L + 2; // Extend by 1 difference
            }
            max_len = max(max_len, current_ans);
        }

        // Rule 2: Merge two runs by changing one internal element
        for (int i = 0; i < m - 1; ++i) {
            long long sum = (long long)A[i] + A[i+1];
            
            // We can only split the sum into two equal integer differences if it's even
            if (sum % 2 == 0) {
                long long d = sum / 2;
                int current_A_len = 2; // The two elements we just fixed into d, d
                
                // Add identical runs from the left and right if they match 'd'
                if (i > 0 && A[i-1] == d) {
                    current_A_len += left_run[i-1];
                }
                if (i + 2 < m && A[i+2] == d) {
                    current_A_len += right_run[i+2];
                }
                
                // Length in nums is the length of differences + 1
                max_len = max(max_len, current_A_len + 1);
            }
        }

        return max_len;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        vector<int> xs, ys;
        for (auto& p : points) { xs.push_back(p[0]); ys.push_back(p[1]); }
        sort(xs.begin(), xs.end()); xs.erase(unique(xs.begin(), xs.end()), xs.end());
        sort(ys.begin(), ys.end()); ys.erase(unique(ys.begin(), ys.end()), ys.end());
        int X = xs.size(), Y = ys.size();

        auto xi_of = [&](int v) { return (int)(lower_bound(xs.begin(), xs.end(), v) - xs.begin()); };
        auto yi_of = [&](int v) { return X + (int)(lower_bound(ys.begin(), ys.end(), v) - ys.begin()); };

        // Union-Find: x-nodes [0, X), y-nodes [X, X+Y)
        vector<int> par(X + Y);
        iota(par.begin(), par.end(), 0);
        function<int(int)> find = [&](int u) -> int {
            return par[u] == u ? u : par[u] = find(par[u]);
        };

        for (auto& p : points) {
            int u = find(xi_of(p[0])), v = find(yi_of(p[1]));
            if (u != v) par[u] = v;
        }
        for (int i = 0; i < X + Y; i++) find(i); // full path compression

        // Count points per component
        unordered_map<int, int> compPts;
        for (auto& p : points) compPts[find(xi_of(p[0]))]++;

        // x-node -> its y-neighbors
        vector<vector<int>> xToY(X);
        for (auto& p : points) xToY[xi_of(p[0])].push_back(yi_of(p[1]));

        // y-component root -> y-nodes it contains
        unordered_map<int, vector<int>> compToYnodes;
        for (int i = 0; i < Y; i++) compToYnodes[find(X + i)].push_back(X + i);

        // Sort components by size descending
        vector<pair<int,int>> compList; // (size, root)
        for (auto& [root, sz] : compPts) compList.push_back({sz, root});
        sort(compList.rbegin(), compList.rend());

        // Case 1/2: add point with one existing coordinate → gain best component + 1
        int ans = compList[0].first + 1;

        // Case 3: merge two components via (existing_x, existing_y) not in points
        for (int xi = 0; xi < X; xi++) {
            int compX = find(xi);
            int sizeX = compPts[compX];

            unordered_set<int> blockedY(xToY[xi].begin(), xToY[xi].end());
            unordered_set<int> partBlockedComps;
            for (int yn : xToY[xi]) partBlockedComps.insert(find(yn));

            for (auto& [sz, root] : compList) {
                if (root == compX) continue;

                if (partBlockedComps.count(root)) {
                    // Check if ALL y-nodes in this component are blocked
                    bool fullyBlocked = true;
                    for (int yn : compToYnodes[root]) {
                        if (!blockedY.count(yn)) { fullyBlocked = false; break; }
                    }
                    if (fullyBlocked) continue;
                }

                ans = max(ans, sizeX + sz + 1);
                break; // compList is sorted desc, this is optimal for xi
            }
        }

        return ans;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 429 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        if (n <= 2) return n;
        
        int m = n - 1;
        int[] D = new int[m];
        
        for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) {
            D[i] = nums[i+1] - nums[i];
        }
        
        int[] left = new int[m];
        left[0] = 1;
        int maxL = 1;
        for (int i = 1; i < m; i++) {
            if (D[i] == D[i-1]) {
                left[i] = left[i-1] + 1;
            } else {
                left[i] = 1;
            }
            maxL = Math.max(maxL, left[i]);
        }
        
        int[] right = new int[m];
        right[m-1] = 1;
        for (int i = m - 2; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (D[i] == D[i+1]) {
                right[i] = right[i+1] + 1;
            } else {
                right[i] = 1;
            }
        }
        
        int maxLenInD = Math.min(maxL + 1, m);
        
        for (int i = 1; i < m; i++) {
            int sum = D[i-1] + D[i];
            if (sum % 2 != 0) continue;
            
            int d = sum / 2;
            int lLen = 0;
            int rLen = 0;
            
            if (i - 2 >= 0 && D[i-2] == d) {
                lLen = left[i-2];
            }
            
            if (i + 1 < m && D[i+1] == d) {
                rLen = right[i+1];
            }
            int currentLen = lLen + 2 + rLen;
            maxLenInD = Math.max(maxLenInD, currentLen);
        }
        
        return maxLenInD + 1;
        
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    int[] parent;
    int[] size;

    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        parent = new int[n];
        size = new int[n];

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            parent[i] = i;
            size[i] = 1;
        }

        Map<Integer, Integer> xMap = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Integer> yMap = new HashMap<>();

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];

            if (xMap.containsKey(x)) {
                union(i, xMap.get(x));
            } else {
                xMap.put(x, i);
            }

            if (yMap.containsKey(y)) {
                union(i, yMap.get(y));
            } else {
                yMap.put(y, i);
            }
        }

        List<Integer> componentSizes = new ArrayList<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (parent[i] == i) { 
                componentSizes.add(size[i]);
            }
        }

        componentSizes.sort(Collections.reverseOrder());

        if (componentSizes.size() == 1) {
            return componentSizes.get(0) + 1;
        } 
        
        return componentSizes.get(0) + componentSizes.get(1) + 1;
    }

    private int find(int i) {
        if (parent[i] == i) {
            return i;
        }
        return parent[i] = find(parent[i]); 
    }

    private void union(int i, int j) {
        int rootI = find(i);
        int rootJ = find(j);

        if (rootI != rootJ) {
            if (size[rootI] < size[rootJ]) {
                parent[rootI] = rootJ;
                size[rootJ] += size[rootI];
            } else {
                parent[rootJ] = rootI;
                size[rootI] += size[rootJ];
            }
        }
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 431 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        vector<int> L(n,2),R(n,2);
        for(int i=2;i<n;i++){
            if((nums[i] - nums[i-1]) == (nums[i-1] - nums[i-2])){
                L[i] = 1 + L[i-1];
            }
        }

        for(int i=n-3;i>=0;i--){
            if((nums[i+1] - nums[i]) == (nums[i+2] - nums[i+1])){
                R[i] = 1 + R[i+1];
            }
        }

        int maxLen = 0;

        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            if(i>0) maxLen = max(maxLen,1+L[i-1]);
            if(i<(n-1)) maxLen = max(maxLen,1+R[i+1]);

            if(i>0 && i<(n-1)){
                if((nums[i+1]-nums[i-1]) % 2 ==0){
                    int d = (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) / 2 ;
                    int leftLen = 1,rightLen = 1;
                    if(i>=2 && (nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]) == d) leftLen = L[i-1];
                    if(i<=n-3 && (nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]) == d) rightLen = R[i+1];

                    maxLen = max(maxLen,1+leftLen+rightLen);
                }
            }
        }

        return min(maxLen,n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    vector<int> parent;
    int getParent(int u){
        if(u == parent[u]) return u;
        return parent[u] = getParent(parent[u]);
    }
    void unioned(int u,int v){
        u = getParent(u);
        v = getParent(v);
        parent[v] = u;
    }
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        unordered_map<int,vector<int>> Xaxis,Yaxis;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            Xaxis[points[i][0]].push_back(i);
            Yaxis[points[i][1]].push_back(i);
            parent.push_back(i);
        }
        for(auto it:Xaxis){
            vector<int> index = it.second;
            for(int i=1;i<index.size();i++){
                unioned(index[i],index[i-1]);
            }
        }
        for(auto it:Yaxis){
            vector<int> index = it.second;
            for(int i=1;i<index.size();i++){
                unioned(index[i],index[i-1]);
            }
        }
        unordered_map<int,int> componentSize;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            componentSize[getParent(i)]++;
        }
        vector<int> arr;
        for(auto it:componentSize){
            arr.push_back(it.second);
        }
        sort(arr.begin(),arr.end());
        if(arr.size()<2) return 1+n;
        int x = arr.size();
        int last = arr[x-1];
        int secondLast = arr[x-2];
        return 1 + last + secondLast;
    }
};
[Q4_END]
##################

### RANK 432 ###
[Q3_START]
func longestArithmetic(nums []int) int {
	l := len(nums)
	d0 := make([]map[int]int, l)
	d1 := make([]map[int]int, l)
	for i := range d0 {
		d0[i] = make(map[int]int)
		d1[i] = make(map[int]int)
	}
	ans := 2
	for i := 1; i < l; i++ {
		d := nums[i] - nums[i-1]
		prev0 := d0[i-1][d]
		if prev0 == 0 {
			prev0 = 1
		}
		d0[i][d] = prev0 + 1
		prevR := d1[i-1][d]
		if prevR == 0 {
			if i >= 2 {
				prevR = 2
			} else {
				prevR = 1
			}
		}
		d1[i][d] = prevR + 1
		if i >= 2 {
			for d2, v := range d0[i-2] {
				if nums[i-2]+2*d2 == nums[i] {
					if v+2 > d1[i][d2] {
						d1[i][d2] = v + 2
					}
				}
			}
			diff := nums[i] - nums[i-2]
			if diff%2 == 0 {
				d2 := diff / 2
				if 3 > d1[i][d2] {
					d1[i][d2] = 3
				}
			}
		}
		if d0[i][d] > ans {
			ans = d0[i][d]
		}
		for _, v := range d1[i] {
			if v > ans {
				ans = v
			}
		}
		for _, v := range d0[i-1] {
			if v+1 > ans {
				ans = v + 1
			}
		}
	}
	return ans
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
type point struct {
	id   int
	size int
}

func find(u []int, x int) int {
	if u[x] != x {
		u[x] = find(u, u[x])
	}
	return u[x]
}

func union(u, s []int, a, b int) {
	ra, rb := find(u, a), find(u, b)
	if ra == rb {
		return
	}
	if s[ra] < s[rb] {
		ra, rb = rb, ra
	}
	u[rb] = ra
	s[ra] += s[rb]
}

func maxActivated(points [][]int) int {
	l := len(points)
	u := make([]int, l)
	s := make([]int, l)

	for i := range u {
		u[i] = i
		s[i] = 1
	}

	fX := make(map[int][]int)
	fY := make(map[int][]int)

	for i, p := range points {
		fX[p[0]] = append(fX[p[0]], i)
		fY[p[1]] = append(fY[p[1]], i)
	}

	for _, i := range fX {
		for j := 1; j < len(i); j++ {
			union(u, s, i[0], i[j])
		}
	}

	for _, i := range fY {
		for j := 1; j < len(i); j++ {
			union(u, s, i[0], i[j])
		}
	}

	cS := make(map[int]int)

	for i := range points {
		cS[find(u, i)] = s[find(u, i)]
	}

	cXs := make(map[int]map[int]bool)
	cYs := make(map[int]map[int]bool)

	for i, p := range points {
		r := find(u, i)
		if cXs[r] == nil {
			cXs[r] = make(map[int]bool)
			cYs[r] = make(map[int]bool)
		}
		cXs[r][p[0]] = true
		cYs[r][p[1]] = true
	}

	ex := make(map[[2]int]bool)

	for _, p := range points {
		ex[[2]int{p[0], p[1]}] = true
	}

	ps := make([]point, 0, len(cS))

	for id, sz := range cS {
		ps = append(ps, point{id, sz})
	}

	sort.Slice(ps, func(i, j int) bool {
		return ps[i].size > ps[j].size
	})

	res := ps[0].size + 1

	for i := 0; i < len(ps); i++ {
		for j := i + 1; j < len(ps); j++ {
			ci, cj := ps[i], ps[j]
			canMerge := false
			for x := range cXs[ci.id] {
				for y := range cYs[cj.id] {
					if !ex[[2]int{x, y}] {
						canMerge = true
						break
					}
				}
				if canMerge {
					break
				}
			}
			if !canMerge {
				for x := range cXs[cj.id] {
					for y := range cYs[ci.id] {
						if !ex[[2]int{x, y}] {
							canMerge = true
							break
						}
					}
					if canMerge {
						break
					}
				}
			}
			if canMerge {
				if ci.size+cj.size+1 > res {
					res = ci.size + cj.size + 1
				}
				break
			}
		}
	}

	return res
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 433 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)

        if n <= 2:
            return n
        elif n == 3:
            return (nums[2] - nums[0]) % 2 == 0

        answer = 2
        
        lefts = [None] * n
        lefts[0] = 0
        left = 0
        for i in range(1, n):
            if nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[left + 1] - nums[left]:
                lefts[i] = left
                answer = max(answer, i - left + 1)
            else:
                left = i - 1
                lefts[i] = left

        rights = [None] * n
        rights[-1] = n - 1
        right = n - 1
        for i in range(n - 2, -1, -1):
            if nums[i] - nums[i + 1] == nums[right - 1] - nums[right]:
                rights[i] = right
                answer = max(answer, right - i + 1)
            else:
                right = i + 1
                rights[i] = right

        # put in middle for length 3
        for i in range(1, n - 1):
            if (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) % 2 == 0:
                answer = max(answer, 3)
        
        for i in range(n):
            left_diff = nums[lefts[i - 1] + 1] - nums[lefts[i - 1]] if i != 0 else None
            right_diff = nums[rights[i + 1]] - nums[rights[i + 1] - 1] if i != n - 1 else None
            straddle_diff = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1] if i not in (0, n - 1) else None

            if left_diff is not None:
                answer = max(answer, i - lefts[i - 1] + 1)
                if straddle_diff == 2 * left_diff:
                    answer = max(answer, (i + 1) - lefts[i - 1] + 1)
            if right_diff is not None:
                answer = max(answer, rights[i + 1] - i + 1)
                if straddle_diff == 2 * right_diff:
                    answer = max(answer, rights[i + 1] - (i - 1) + 1)
            if straddle_diff is not None and left_diff == right_diff and straddle_diff == 2 * left_diff:
                answer = max(answer, rights[i + 1] - lefts[i - 1] + 1)

        return answer
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU:
    def __init__(self, xy, coord):
        self.xy = xy
        self.coord = coord
        self.rank = 0
        self.parent = self


def find(self):
    if self.parent is self:
        return self
    root = find(self.parent)
    self.parent = root
    return root


def union(x, y):
    x = find(x)
    y = find(y)
    if x is y:
        return False
    if x.rank < y.rank:
        x, y = y, x
    y.parent = x
    if x.rank == y.rank:
        x.rank += 1
    return True

class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        xdsus = {}
        ydsus = {}
        xcounts = Counter()
        for x, y in points:
            union(xdsus.setdefault(x, DSU(0, x)), ydsus.setdefault(y, DSU(1, y)))
            xcounts[x] += 1
        setcounts = Counter()
        for x, xdsu in xdsus.items():
            setcounts[find(xdsu)] += xcounts[x]
        if len(setcounts) == 1:
            return 1 + setcounts.most_common(1)[0][1]
        mostcounts = setcounts.most_common(2)
        return mostcounts[0][1] + mostcounts[1][1] + 1
        
        
[Q4_END]

### RANK 434 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 3) return n;

        vector<int> pre(n, 1), suff(n, 1);

        pre[1] = 2;
        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            if (nums[i] - nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]) pre[i] = pre[i-1] + 1;
            else pre[i] = 2;
        }

        suff[n-2] = 2;
        for (int i = n-3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (nums[i+1] - nums[i] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]) suff[i] = suff[i+1] + 1;
            else suff[i] = 2;
        }

        int ans = 1  + max(pre[n-2], suff[1]);

        for (int i = 1; i + 1 < n; i++) {
            ans = max(ans, pre[i-1] + 1);
            ans = max(ans, suff[i+1] + 1);

            if ((nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) % 2 == 0) {
                int d = (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) / 2;

                bool left = (i >= 2 && nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == d);
                bool right = (i + 2 < n && nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == d);

                if (left && right)
                    ans = max(ans, pre[i-1] + suff[i+1] + 1);
                else if (left)
                    ans = max(ans, pre[i-1] + 2);
                else if (right)
                    ans = max(ans, suff[i+1] + 2);
                else
                    ans = max(ans, 3);
            }
        }

        return min(ans, n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    struct DSU{
        vector<int> pa,sz;
        DSU(int n){
            pa = sz = vector<int>(n);
            for(int i=0;i<n;++i){
                pa[i] = i;
                sz[i] = 1;
            }
        }
        int find(int i){
            if(pa[i] == i) return i;
            return pa[i] = find(pa[i]);
        }
        bool unite(int i,int j){
            if( (i=find(i))!=(j=find(j))){
                if(sz[i] < sz[j])swap(i,j);
                sz[i] += sz[j];
                pa[j] = i;
            }
            return i!=j;
        }
        int find_sz(int i){
            return sz[find(i)];
        }
    };
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        const int n = points.size();
        DSU dsu(n);
        map<int,int> mpx,mpy;
        for(int i=0;i<n;++i){
            int x = points[i][0], y = points[i][1];
            if(mpx.find(x) != mpx.end()) dsu.unite(i,mpx[x]);
            if(mpy.find(y) != mpy.end()) dsu.unite(i,mpy[y]);
            mpx[x] = mpy[y] = i;
        }
        
        vector<int> all;
        for(int i=0;i<n;++i) all.push_back(dsu.find(i));
        sort(begin(all), end(all));
        all.erase(unique(begin(all), end(all)), end(all));
        
        int ans = 0;
        if(all.size() == 1) ans = n + 1;
        else {
            vector<int> sz_all;
            for(int &x: all) sz_all.push_back(dsu.find_sz(x));
            sort(rbegin(sz_all), rend(sz_all));
            ans = 1 + sz_all[0] + sz_all[1];
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 435 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {

   public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        if (n == 1) return 1;
        if (n == 2) return 2;

        int[]  R = new int[n],  L = new int[n];
        long[] Rd = new long[n], Ld = new long[n];

        // R[i] = max arithmetic run length starting at i (no replacement)
        R[n-1] = 1;
        for (int i = n-2; i >= 0; i--) {
            Rd[i] = (long)nums[i+1] - nums[i];
            R[i] = (R[i+1] >= 2 && Rd[i+1] == Rd[i]) ? R[i+1] + 1 : 2;
        }

        // L[i] = max arithmetic run length ending at i (no replacement)
        L[0] = 1;
        for (int i = 1; i < n; i++) {
            Ld[i] = (long)nums[i] - nums[i-1];
            L[i] = (L[i-1] >= 2 && Ld[i-1] == Ld[i]) ? L[i-1] + 1 : 2;
        }

        // Case 0: No replacement
        int ans = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) ans = Math.max(ans, R[i]);

        // Case 1: Replace nums[0]
        ans = Math.max(ans, R[1] + 1);

        // Case 2: Replace nums[n-1]
        ans = Math.max(ans, L[n-2] + 1);

        // Case 3: Replace middle element nums[i]
        for (int i = 1; i <= n-2; i++) {
            Set<Long> cands = new LinkedHashSet<>();
            if (L[i-1] >= 2) cands.add(Ld[i-1]);        // left run's diff
            if (R[i+1] >= 2) cands.add(Rd[i+1]);        // right run's diff
            long gap = (long)nums[i+1] - nums[i-1];
            if (gap % 2 == 0) cands.add(gap / 2);       // bridging diff

            for (long d : cands) {
                // --- Anchor from LEFT: new_val = nums[i-1] + d ---
                // nums[i-1] always fits; extend left run if its diff matches
                int lL = (L[i-1] >= 2 && Ld[i-1] == d) ? L[i-1] : 1;
                // right side fits only if nums[i+1] == nums[i-1] + 2d
                int rL = 0;
                if ((long)nums[i-1] + 2*d == nums[i+1])
                    rL = (R[i+1] >= 2 && Rd[i+1] == d) ? R[i+1] : 1;
                ans = Math.max(ans, lL + 1 + rL);

                // --- Anchor from RIGHT: new_val = nums[i+1] - d ---
                // nums[i+1] always fits; extend right run if its diff matches
                int rR = (R[i+1] >= 2 && Rd[i+1] == d) ? R[i+1] : 1;
                // left side fits only if nums[i-1] == nums[i+1] - 2d
                int lR = 0;
                if ((long)nums[i+1] - 2*d == nums[i-1])
                    lR = (L[i-1] >= 2 && Ld[i-1] == d) ? L[i-1] : 1;
                ans = Math.max(ans, lR + 1 + rR);
            }
        }

        return ans;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    private int[] parent, rank, sz;

    private int find(int x) {
        return parent[x];
    }

    private void union(int a, int b) {
        a = find(a); b = find(b);
        if (a == b) return;
        if (rank[a] < rank[b]) { int t = a; a = b; b = t; }
        parent[b] = a;
        sz[a] += sz[b];
        if (rank[a] == rank[b]) rank[a]++;
    }

    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        parent = new int[n];
        rank   = new int[n];
        sz     = new int[n];

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { parent[i] = i; sz[i] = 1; }

        // Connect all points sharing the same x-coordinate
        Map<Integer, Integer> xFirst = new HashMap<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            if (xFirst.containsKey(x)) union(i, xFirst.get(x));
            else xFirst.put(x, i);
        }

        Map<Integer, Integer> yFirst = new HashMap<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int y = points[i][1];
            if (yFirst.containsKey(y)) union(i, yFirst.get(y));
            else yFirst.put(y, i);
        }

        int top1 = 0, top2 = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (find(i) == i) {          // i is a root
                int s = sz[i];
                if (s >= top1) { top2 = top1; top1 = s; }
                else if (s > top2) { top2 = s; }
            }
        }
        return top1 + top2 + 1;
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 436 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n=nums.size();
        vector<pair<int,int>>pre(n,{1,-1e9}),suff(n,{1,-1e9});//count,diff
        for(int i=1;i<n;i++){
            pre[i].second=nums[i]-nums[i-1];
            if(pre[i].second==pre[i-1].second)
                pre[i].first+=pre[i-1].first;}
        for(int i=n-2;i>=0;i--){
            suff[i].second=nums[i+1]-nums[i];
            if(suff[i].second==suff[i+1].second)
                  suff[i].first+=suff[i+1].first;}
        int ans=-1;
        for(int i=1;i<n-1;i++){
            if(pre[i-1].second==suff[i+1].second&&nums[i-1]+2*pre[i-1].second==nums[i+1])
                ans=max(ans,pre[i-1].first+suff[i+1].first+3);
            if(nums[i-1]+2*pre[i-1].second==nums[i+1])
                ans=max(ans,pre[i-1].first+3);
            if(nums[i+1]-2*suff[i+1].second==nums[i-1])
                ans=max(ans,suff[i+1].first+3);
                ans=max({ans,pre[i-1].first+2,suff[i+1].first+2});
        }
        ans=max({ans,pre[n-2].first+2,suff[1].first+2});
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    //Striver's code
    class DisjointSet {
    public:
    vector<int> rank, parent, size;
    DisjointSet(int n) {
        rank.resize(n + 1, 0);
        parent.resize(n + 1);
        size.resize(n + 1, 1);
        for (int i = 0; i <= n; i++) parent[i] = i;
    }

    int findUPar(int node) {
        if (node == parent[node]) return node;
        return parent[node] = findUPar(parent[node]);
    }

    void unionByRank(int u, int v) {
        int ulp_u = findUPar(u);
        int ulp_v = findUPar(v);
        if (ulp_u == ulp_v) return;
        if (rank[ulp_u] < rank[ulp_v]) {
            parent[ulp_u] = ulp_v;
        } else if (rank[ulp_v] < rank[ulp_u]) {
            parent[ulp_v] = ulp_u;
        } else {
            parent[ulp_v] = ulp_u;
            rank[ulp_u]++;
        }
    }

    void unionBySize(int u, int v) {
        int ulp_u = findUPar(u);
        int ulp_v = findUPar(v);
        if (ulp_u == ulp_v) return;
        if (size[ulp_u] < size[ulp_v]) {
            parent[ulp_u] = ulp_v;
            size[ulp_v] += size[ulp_u];
        } else {
            parent[ulp_v] = ulp_u;
            size[ulp_u] += size[ulp_v];
        }
    }
};
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n=points.size();  
        DisjointSet ds(n);
        map<int,int> mpx,mpy;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            int xc=points[i][0],yc=points[i][1];
            if(mpx.count(xc))
                ds.unionBySize(i,mpx[xc]);
            if(mpy.count(yc))
                ds.unionBySize(i,mpy[yc]);
            mpx[xc]=i;
            mpy[yc]=i;}
        vector<int>sz;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            if(ds.parent[i]==i)
                sz.push_back(ds.size[i]);}
        sort(sz.begin(),sz.end());
        int k=sz.size();
        if(k==1)
            return sz[0]+1;
        return sz[k-1]+sz[k-2]+1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 439 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        int ret = 2;
        
        vector<int>left(n, 2);
        left[0] = 1;
        for (int i=2; i<n; i++) {
            int cur = nums[i]-nums[i-1];
            int pre = nums[i-1]-nums[i-2];
            if (cur==pre)
                left[i] = left[i-1]+1;
            else
                left[i] = 2;
            ret = max(ret, left[i] + (i!=n-1));
        }

        vector<int>right(n, 2);
        right[n-1] = 1;
        for (int i=n-3; i>=0; i--) {
            int cur = nums[i+1]-nums[i];
            int pre = nums[i+2]-nums[i+1];
            if (cur==pre)
                right[i] = right[i+1]+1;
            else
                right[i] = 2;
            ret = max(ret, right[i] + (i!=0));
        }

        // for (int x: left) cout<<x<<" "; cout<<endl;
        // for (int x: right) cout<<x<<" "; cout<<endl;
        
        for (int i=1; i<n-1; i++) {
            int ans = 3;
            int cur = nums[i+1]-nums[i-1];
            if (i+2<n && (nums[i+2]-nums[i+1])*2==cur)
                ans += right[i+1] - 1;
            if (i-2>=0 && (nums[i-1]-nums[i-2])*2==cur)
                ans += left[i-1] - 1;
            ret = max(ret, ans);
        }

        ret = max(ret, left[n-2]+1);
        ret = max(ret, right[1]+1);
        
        return ret;
            
        
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
struct DSU {
    vector<int> p, r;
    DSU(int n): p(n,-1), r(n,0) {
        iota(p.begin(), p.end(), 0);
    }
    int find(int x) {
        return p[x]==x ? x : p[x]=find(p[x]);
    }
    bool unite(int a, int b) {
        a = find(a); b = find(b);
        if (a == b) return false;
        if (r[a] < r[b]) swap(a,b);
        p[b] = a;
        if (r[a]==r[b]) ++r[a];
        return true;
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        DSU dsu(n);
        unordered_map<int,vector<int>>MapX;
        unordered_map<int,vector<int>>MapY;
        for (int i=0; i<n; i++) {
            MapX[points[i][0]].push_back(i);
            MapY[points[i][1]].push_back(i);
        }

        for (auto [k,v]: MapX) {
            int j = v[0];
            for (int i=1; i<v.size(); i++)
                dsu.unite(j, v[i]);
        }

        for (auto [k,v]: MapY) {
            int j = v[0];
            for (int i=1; i<v.size(); i++)
                dsu.unite(j, v[i]);
        }

        unordered_map<int, int>leaders;
        for (int i=0; i<n; i++)
            leaders[dsu.find(i)]++;

        vector<int>temp;
        for (auto [k,v]: leaders)
            temp.push_back(v);

        sort(temp.rbegin(),temp.rend());
        if (temp.size()==1) return temp[0]+1;
        else return temp[0]+temp[1]+1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 441 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        if (nums.size() <= 2){
            return nums.size(); 
        }
        vector<int> dif(nums.size()-1); 
        for (int i = 0; i < nums.size()-1; i++){
            dif[i] = nums[i+1]-nums[i]; 
        }
        vector<int> p(dif.size()); 
        p[0] = 1; 

        int m = 0; 
        for (int i = 1; i < p.size(); i++){
            p[i] = (dif[i] == dif[i-1]) ? p[i-1]+1 : 1; 
            m = max(m, p[i]); 
        }
        vector<int> s(dif.size());
        s.back() = 1; 
        for (int i = dif.size()-2; i >= 0; i--){
            s[i] = (dif[i] == dif[i+1]) ? s[i+1]+1 : 1; 
            m = max(m, s[i]); 
        }
        if (m == dif.size()) return m+1; 

        // for (int i = 0; i < dif.size(); i++){
        //     cout << dif[i] << " " << p[i] << " " << s[i] << endl; 
        // }


        int ans = 3; 
        ans = max(m+2, ans);
        int curr = 3; 

        if (dif[0] + dif[1] == dif[2] * 2){
            curr += s[2]; 
        }
        ans = max(ans, curr); 
        curr = 3; 
        int j = dif.size()-2; 

        if (dif[j]+dif[j+1] == dif[j-1]*2){
            curr += p[j-1]; 
        }
        ans = max(ans, curr); 
        for (int i = 1; i < dif.size()-2; i++){
            int curr = 3; 
            if (dif[i] + dif[i+1] == dif[i+2] * 2){
                curr += s[i+2]; 
            }
            if (dif[i]+dif[i+1] == dif[i-1]*2){
                curr += p[i-1]; 
            }
            ans = max(curr, ans); 
        }
        return ans; 
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        unordered_map<int, int> xtog; 
        unordered_map<int, int> ytog; 
        unordered_map<int ,int> g; 
        int gnum = 0; 
        for (auto i : points){
            int x = i[0];
            int y = i[1]; 
            if (xtog.find(x) == xtog.end() && ytog.find(y) == ytog.end()){
                xtog[x] = gnum; 
                ytog[y] = gnum; 
                g[gnum]++; 
                gnum++; 
            }
            else if (xtog.find(x) != xtog.end() && ytog.find(y) == ytog.end()){
                int grp = xtog[x]; 
                g[grp]++; 
                ytog[y] = grp; 
            }
            else if (xtog.find(x) == xtog.end() && ytog.find(y) != ytog.end()){
                int grp = ytog[y]; 
                g[grp]++; 
                xtog[x] = grp; 
            }
            else {
                if (xtog[x] == ytog[y]){
                    int grp = xtog[x]; 
                    g[grp]++; 
                }
                else {
                    int grp1 = xtog[x]; 
                    int grp2 = ytog[y]; 
                    for (auto i : xtog){
                        if (xtog[i.first] == grp2){
                            xtog[i.first] = grp1; 
                        }
                    }
                    for (auto i : ytog){
                        if (ytog[i.first] == grp2){
                            ytog[i.first] = grp1; 
                        }
                    }
                    g[grp1] += 1 + g[grp2]; 
                    g.erase(grp2); 
                }
            }
        }
        vector<int> v; 
        for (auto i : g){
            v.push_back(i.second); 
        }
        if (v.size() == 1) {
            return v[0]+1; 
        }
        sort(v.begin(), v.end(), greater<>()); 
        return v[0] + v[1]+1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 442 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        left = [0] * n
        left[0] = 1
        left[1] = 2
        for i in range(2, n):
            if nums[i] - nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]:
                left[i] = left[i-1] + 1
            else:
                left[i] = 2
        right = [0] * n
        right[-1] = 1
        right[-2] = 2
        for i in range(n-3, -1, -1):
            if nums[i+1] - nums[i] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]:
                right[i] = right[i+1] + 1
            else:
                right[i] = 2
        ans = min(n, max(left)+1)
        for i in range(1, n-1):
            l, r = left[i-1], right[i+1]
            if l >= 2 and r >= 2:
                dl = nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]
                dr = nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]
                if dl == dr and nums[i+1] - nums[i-1] == 2*dl:
                    ans = max(ans, l + r + 1)
            if l >= 2:
                dl = nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]
                if nums[i+1] - nums[i-1] == 2 * dl:
                    ans = max(ans, l + 2)    
            if r >= 2:
                dr = nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]
                if nums[i+1] - nums[i-1] == 2 * dr:
                    ans = max(ans, r + 2)
        return ans
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        gx = defaultdict(list)
        gy = defaultdict(list)
        for i, (x, y) in enumerate(points):
            gx[x].append(i)
            gy[y].append(i)
        vis = [False] * n
        vis_x = set()
        vis_y = set()
        sizes = []
        for i in range(n):
            if vis[i]:
                continue
            cnt = 0
            q = deque([i])
            vis[i] = True
            while q:
                u = q.popleft()
                cnt += 1
                x, y = points[u]
                if x not in vis_x:
                    vis_x.add(x)
                    for j in gx[x]:
                        if not vis[j]:
                            vis[j] = True
                            q.append(j)
                if y not in vis_y:
                    vis_y.add(y)
                    for j in gy[y]:
                        if not vis[j]:
                            vis[j] = True
                            q.append(j)
            sizes.append(cnt)
        sizes.sort(reverse = True)
        if len(sizes) >= 2:
            return sizes[0] + sizes[1] + 1
        else:
            return sizes[0] + 1
[Q4_END]
##################

### RANK 443 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 2) return n;
        int m = n - 1;
        std::vector<long long> D(m, 0);
        for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) {
            D[i] = (long long) (nums[i+1] - nums[i]);
        }

        // Consecutive length from left
        std::vector<int> L(m, 1);
        for (int i = 1; i < m; i++) {
            if (D[i] == D[i-1]) L[i] = L[i-1]+1;
        }
        // Consecutive length from right
        std::vector<int> R(m, 1);
        for (int i = m-2; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (D[i] == D[i+1]) R[i] = R[i+1] + 1;
        }

        int res = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) {
            // Base: no changes made
            res = std::max(res, L[i]);
            // Change D[i] to match its right neighbour
            if (i+1 < m) res = std::max(res, R[i+1] + 1);
            // Change D[i] to match its left neighbour
            if (i-1 >= 0) res = std::max(res, L[i-1] + 1);
        }
        // Internal changes
        for (int i = 0; i < m-1; i++) {
            if ((D[i] + D[i+1]) % 2 == 0) {
                long long d = (D[i] + D[i+1]) / 2;
                int currLen = 2;
                // Try attaching to left segment
                if (i-1 >= 0 && D[i-1] == d) currLen += L[i-1];
                // Try attaching to right segment
                if (i+2 < m && D[i+2] == d) {
                    currLen += R[i+2];
                }
                res = std::max(res, currLen);
            }
        }
        return res+1;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        if (points.empty()) return 1;

        int n = points.size();
        std::unordered_map<int, std::vector<int>> xToPoints;
        std::unordered_map<int, std::vector<int>> yToPoints;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            xToPoints[points[i][0]].push_back(i);
            yToPoints[points[i][1]].push_back(i);
        }
        std::vector<bool> visited(n, false);

        std::unordered_set<int> xVisited;
        std::unordered_set<int> yVisited;
        std::vector<int> componentSizes;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (visited[i]) continue;

            int size = 0;
            std::queue<int> q;
            q.push(i);
            visited[i] = true;
            while (!q.empty()) {
                int curr = q.front();
                q.pop();
                size++;

                int currX = points[curr][0];
                int currY = points[curr][1];

                if (xVisited.count(currX) == 0) {
                    xVisited.insert(currX);
                    for (int neighbour : xToPoints[currX]) {
                        if (!visited[neighbour]) {
                            visited[neighbour] = true;
                            q.push(neighbour);
                        }
                    }
                }
                if (yVisited.count(currY) == 0) {
                    yVisited.insert(currY);
                    for (int neighbour : yToPoints[currY]) {
                        if (!visited[neighbour]) {
                            visited[neighbour] = true;
                            q.push(neighbour);
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            componentSizes.push_back(size);
        }
        std::sort(componentSizes.rbegin(), componentSizes.rend());
        if (componentSizes.size() >= 2) {
            return componentSizes[0] + componentSizes[1] + 1;
        }
        return componentSizes[0] + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 446 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n=nums.size();
        if (n <= 3) return n;
        int i=2,j=1e9,ans=0;
        vector<int>D(n-1,0),left(n,1),right(n,1);
        for(int i=0;i<n-1;i++){
            D[i]=nums[i+1]-nums[i];
        }
        for(int i=1;i<n-1;i++){
            if(D[i]==D[i-1]){
                left[i]=left[i-1]+1;
            }
        }
        for(int i=n-3;i>=0;i--){
            if(D[i]==D[i+1]){
                right[i]=right[i+1]+1;
            }
        }
        int m=n-1;
        for(int i=0;i<m;i++){
            if(left[i]==m){
                ans=max(ans,m+1);
            }
            else{
                ans=max(ans,left[i]+2);
            }
        }
        for(int i=0;i<m-1;i++){
            long long sum = (long long)D[i] + D[i+1];

            if (i > 0) {
                long long V = D[i-1];
                if (sum == 2 * V) {
                    int lenD = left[i-1] + 2;
                    if (i + 2 < m && D[i+2] == V) {
                        lenD += right[i+2];
                    }
                    ans = max(ans, lenD + 1);
                }
            }

            if (i + 2 < m) {
                long long V = D[i+2];
                if (sum == 2 * V) {
                    int lenD = right[i+2] + 2;
                    if (i > 0 && D[i-1] == V) {
                        lenD += left[i-1];
                    }
                    ans = max(ans, lenD + 1);
                }
            }
        }

        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int findUPar(int node,vector<int>&parent) {
        if (node == parent[node])
            return node;
        return parent[node] = findUPar(parent[node],parent);
    }

    void unionBySize(int u, int v,vector<int>&parent,vector<int>&size) {
        int ulp_u = findUPar(u,parent);
        int ulp_v = findUPar(v,parent);
        if (ulp_u == ulp_v) return;
        if (size[ulp_u] < size[ulp_v]) {
            parent[ulp_u] = ulp_v;
            size[ulp_v] += size[ulp_u];
        }
        else {
            parent[ulp_v] = ulp_u;
            size[ulp_u] += size[ulp_v];
        }
    }
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n=points.size();
        vector<int>parent(n+1),size(n+1,1);
        for(int i=0;i<=n;i++){
            parent[i]=i;
        }
        unordered_map<int,int>hsh1,hsh2;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            int x=points[i][0],y=points[i][1];
            if(hsh1.count(x)){
                unionBySize(i,hsh1[x],parent,size);
            }
            else{
                hsh1[x]=i;
            }
            if(hsh2.count(y)){
                unionBySize(i,hsh2[y],parent,size);
            }
            else{
                hsh2[y]=i;
            }
        }

        vector<int>temp;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            if(parent[i]==i){
                temp.push_back(size[i]);
            }
        }

        sort(temp.begin(),temp.end());
        int m=temp.size();
        if(m>=2){
            return temp[m-1]+temp[m-2]+1;
        }
        else{
            return temp[m-1]+1;
        }
        
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 447 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        int[] dRight = new int[n];
        int[] dLeft = new int[n];
        dLeft[0] = 1;
        dLeft[1] = 2;
        for(int i =2; i < n; i++){
            if(nums[i]- nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]){
                dLeft[i] = dLeft[i-1]+1;
            }else{
                dLeft[i] = 2;
            }
        }
        dRight[n-1]= 1;
        dRight[n-2] = 2;
        for(int i =n-3; i >= 0; i--){
            if(nums[i] - nums[i+1] == nums[i+1] - nums[i+2]){
                dRight[i] = dRight[i+1]+1;
            }else{
                dRight[i] = 2;
            }
        }
        int ans = 2;
        for(int i =0; i < n; i++){
            ans = Math.max(ans, dRight[i]);
            ans = Math.max(ans,dLeft[i]);
            if(i > 0){
                ans = Math.max(ans, dLeft[i-1]+1);
            }
            if(i < n-1){
                ans = Math.max(ans, dRight[i+1]+1);
            }
            // a_{i+1}, a_{i+2}
            // a_{i-2}, a_{i-1}
            if(i >0 && i < n-1){
                if( (nums[i+1]%2) != (nums[i-1]%2)  ){
                    continue;
                }
                int d = (nums[i+1] +nums[i-1])/2;
                boolean cond1 = false;
                boolean cond2 = false;
                if(i > 1){
                    
                    if(d-nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]){
                        cond1 = true;
                        ans = Math.max(ans, dLeft[i-1]+2);
                    }
                }
                if(i < n-2){
                    if(nums[i+1]- d == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]){
                        cond2 = true;
                        ans = Math.max(ans, dRight[i+1]+2);
                    }
                }
                if(cond1 && cond2){
                    ans = Math.max(ans, dLeft[i-1] + dRight[i+1]+1);
                }
                
                 //System.out.println(i + ":" +d +":"+ ans);
            }
           // System.out.println(i + ":" + ans);
        }
        return ans;

        
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        Map<Integer, Set<Integer>> visited = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Set<Integer>> xMap = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Set<Integer>> yMap = new HashMap<>();
        for(int[] p: points){
            int x = p[0];
            int y = p[1];
            xMap.putIfAbsent(x, new HashSet<>());
            yMap.putIfAbsent(y, new HashSet<>());
            xMap.get(x).add(y);
            yMap.get(y).add(x);
        }


        ArrayList<Integer> counts = new ArrayList<>();
        for(int[] p: points){
            int x = p[0];
            int y = p[1];
            if(visited.containsKey(x) && visited.get(x).contains(y)){
                continue;
            }
            LinkedList<int[]> q = new LinkedList<>();
            q.add(p);
            visited.putIfAbsent(x, new HashSet<>());
            visited.get(x).add(y);
            int k = 0;
            while(!q.isEmpty()){
                k++;
                int[] p1 = q.pollFirst();
                int x1 = p1[0];
                int y1 = p1[1];

                Set<Integer> ys = xMap.get(x1);
                Set<Integer> xs = yMap.get(y1);
                
                xMap.put(x1, new HashSet<>());
                yMap.put(y1, new HashSet<>());

                for(int y2: ys){
                    if(visited.containsKey(x1) && visited.get(x1).contains(y2)){
                        continue;
                    }
                    visited.putIfAbsent(x1, new HashSet<>());
                    visited.get(x1).add(y2);
                    q.add(new int[]{x1, y2});
                    
                }

                for(int x2: xs){
                     if(visited.containsKey(x2) && visited.get(x2).contains(y1)){
                        continue;
                    }
                    visited.putIfAbsent(x2, new HashSet<>());
                    visited.get(x2).add(y1);
                    q.add(new int[]{x2, y1});
                }
            }
            counts.add(k);
        }
        if(counts.size() == 1){
            return counts.get(0) + 1;
        }
        Collections.sort(counts);
        return counts.get(counts.size() -1 ) + counts.get(counts.size() -2) + 1;
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 448 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n=nums.size();
        if(n<=3) return n;
        vector<int>a(n-1);
        for(int i=0;i<n-1;i++){
            a[i]=nums[i+1]-nums[i];
            
        }
        
        int m=a.size();
        vector<int>left_streak(m,1);
        for(int i=1;i<m;i++){
            if(a[i]==a[i-1]){
                left_streak[i]=left_streak[i-1]+1;
            }
        }
        vector<int>right_streak(m,1);
        for(int i=m-2;i>=0;i--){
            if(a[i]==a[i+1]){
                right_streak[i]=right_streak[i+1]+1;
            }
        }

        int max_streak=0;
        for(int i=0;i<m;i++){
            max_streak=max(max_streak,left_streak[i]);
            
        }
        int ans=min(n,max_streak+2);

        for(int i=0;i<m-1;i++){
            long long X=a[i];
            long long Y=a[i+1];

            if((X+Y)%2==0){
                long long d=(X+Y)/2;
                int curr=2;
                if(i-1>=0 &&a[i-1]==d){
                    curr +=left_streak[i-1];
                    
                }
                if(i+2 <m &&a[i+2]==d){
                    curr +=right_streak[i+2];
                }
                ans=max(ans, curr+1);
            }
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:

    vector<int> parent;
    vector<int>size;
    int find (int i){
        if(parent[i]==i) return i;
        return parent[i]=find(parent[i]);
    }

    void unite(int i,int j){
        int px=find(i);
        int py=find(j);
        if(px!=py){
            if(size[px]<size[py]){
                swap(px,py);
            }
            parent[py]=px;
            size[px]+=size[py];
        }
    }
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n =points.size();
        parent.resize(n);

        size.resize(n,1);

        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            parent[i]=i;
            
        }

        unordered_map<int,int>x_map;
        unordered_map<int,int>y_map;

        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            int x=points[i][0];
            int y=points[i][1];

            if(x_map.count(x)){
                unite(i,x_map[x]);
            }
            else {
                x_map[x]=i;
            }
            if(y_map.count(y)){
                unite(i,y_map[y]);
            }
            else{
                y_map[y]=i;
            }
        }
        unordered_map<int,int>comp_size;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            if(parent[i]==i){
                comp_size[i]=size[i];
            }
        }
        int max1=0,max2=0;
        for(auto&pair:comp_size){
            int curr =pair.second;
            if(curr>max1){
                max2=max1;
                max1=curr;
            }
            else if(curr>max2){
                max2=curr;
            }
        }
        return 1+max1+max2;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 449 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
       int n=nums.size();
        if(n<=2)
            return n;
        vector<int> diff(n - 1);
    for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; ++i) {
        diff[i] = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
    }

    int sz = diff.size();
    vector<int> L(sz, 1), R(sz, 1);
    
    for (int i = 1; i < sz; ++i) {
        if (diff[i] == diff[i - 1]) {
            L[i] = L[i - 1] + 1;
        }
    }
    for (int i = sz - 2; i >= 0; --i) {
        if (diff[i] == diff[i + 1]) {
            R[i] = R[i + 1] + 1;
        }
    }

    int max_len = min(n, 3);

    for (int i = 0; i < sz; ++i) {
        int current_diff_len = L[i];
        if (current_diff_len < sz) {
            max_len = max(max_len, current_diff_len + 2); 
        } else {
            max_len = max(max_len, current_diff_len + 1);
        }
    }

    for (int i = 0; i < sz - 1; ++i) {
        long long sum = (long long)diff[i] + diff[i + 1];
        if (sum % 2 == 0) {
            int target_d = sum / 2;
            int left_len = (i > 0 && diff[i - 1] == target_d) ? L[i - 1] : 0;
            int right_len = (i + 2 < sz && diff[i + 2] == target_d) ? R[i + 2] : 0;
            max_len = max(max_len, left_len + right_len + 3);
        }
    }

    return max_len;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    vector<int> parent;
    vector<int> sz;

    int find(int i) {
        if (parent[i] == i)
            return i;
        return parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
    }

    void unite(int i, int j) {
        int rootI = find(i);
        int rootJ = find(j);
        if (rootI != rootJ) {
            if (sz[rootI] < sz[rootJ]) {
                parent[rootI] = rootJ;
                sz[rootJ] += sz[rootI];
            } else {
                parent[rootJ] = rootI;
                sz[rootI] += sz[rootJ];
            }
        }
    }
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        if (n == 0) return 1;

        parent.resize(n);
        sz.resize(n, 1);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            parent[i] = i;
        }

        unordered_map<int, int> x_map;
        unordered_map<int, int> y_map;

        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];

            if (x_map.count(x)) {
                unite(i, x_map[x]);
            } else {
                x_map[x] = i;
            }

            if (y_map.count(y)) {
                unite(i, y_map[y]);
            } else {
                y_map[y] = i;
            }
        }

        vector<int> comp_sizes;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            if (parent[i] == i) {
                comp_sizes.push_back(sz[i]);
            }
        }

        sort(comp_sizes.rbegin(), comp_sizes.rend());

        if (comp_sizes.size() >= 2) {
            return comp_sizes[0] + comp_sizes[1] + 1;
        } else {
            return comp_sizes[0] + 1;
        }
    }
};
[Q4_END]
