### RANK 450 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
  int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
    int n = (int)nums.size();
    if(n <= 2) return n;
    vector<int> pref(n, 0), suff(n, 0);
    pref[0] = 1;
    pref[1] = 2;
    suff[n - 1] = 1;
    suff[n - 2] = 2;
    for(int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
      if(nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]) {
        pref[i] = pref[i - 1] + 1;
      }else {
        pref[i] = 2;
      }
    }
    for(int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
      if(nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]) {
        suff[i] = suff[i + 1] + 1;
      }else {
        suff[i] = 2;
      }
    }
    int ans = *max_element(pref.begin(), pref.end());
    ans = max(ans, *max_element(suff.begin(), suff.end()));
    ans = max(ans, suff[1] + 1);
    ans = max(ans, pref[n - 2] + 1);
    for(int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++) {
      int left = pref[i - 1];
      int right = suff[i + 1];
      ans = max({ans, left + 1, right + 1});
      int d = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1];
      if(d % 2 == 0) {
        d = d / 2;
        bool lok = true, rok = true;
        if(i - 2 >= 0 && nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] != d) {
          lok = false;
        }
        if(i + 2 < n  && nums[i + 2]  - nums[i + 1] != d) {
          rok = false;
        }
        int curr = 1;
        if(lok) curr += left;
        else curr += 1;

        if(rok) curr += right;
        else curr += 1;

        ans = max(ans, curr);
      }
    }
    return ans;
  }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DisjointSet{
  vector<int> parent, rank, size;
  public:
  DisjointSet(int n) {
    parent.resize(n + 2);
    rank.resize(n + 2);
    size.resize(n + 2, 1);
    for(int i = 0; i <= n; i++) parent[i] = i;
  }
  int find(int i) {
    if(i == parent[i])  return i;
    return parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
  }
  void unite(int i, int j) {
    int uli = find(i);
    int ulj = find(j);
    if(uli == ulj) return;
    // if(rank[uli] < rank[ulj]) {
    //   parent[uli] = ulj;
    // }else if(rank[uli] > rank[ulj]) {
    //   parent[ulj] = uli;
    // }else {
    //   rank[ulj] = uli;
    //   rank[uli]++;
    // }
    if(size[uli] < size[ulj]) swap(uli, ulj);
    parent[ulj] = uli;
    size[uli] += size[ulj];
  }
  int compSize(int i) {
    return size[parent[i]];
  }
};
class Solution {
public:
  int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& arr) {
    int n = arr.size();
    DisjointSet dsu(n + 1);
    map<int, int> X, Y;
    for(int i = 0; i < n; i++)  {
      int x = arr[i][0];
      int y = arr[i][1];
      if(X.count(x)) dsu.unite(X[x], i);
      else X[x] = i;

      if(Y.count(y)) dsu.unite(Y[y], i);
      else Y[y] = i;
    }
    priority_queue<int> sz;
    for(int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
      if(i != dsu.find(i)) continue;
      sz.push(dsu.compSize(i));
    }
    int ans = sz.top() + 1;
    if(sz.size() >= 2) {
      sz.pop();
      ans += sz.top();
    }
    return ans;
  }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 451 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();

        // for(int i = 1; i < n; i++) {
        //     cout << nums[i] - nums[i - 1] << " ";
        // }
        // cout << "\n";
        vector<int> pre(n, 1), suf(n, 1);
        pre[1] = 2;
        for(int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            if(nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]) {
                pre[i] = pre[i - 1] + 1;
            } else {
                pre[i] = 2;
            }
        }

        suf[n - 2] = 2;
        for(int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if(nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]) {
                suf[i] = suf[i + 1] + 1;
            } else {
                suf[i] = 2;
            }
        }
        int ans = 3;
        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if(i > 0) ans = max(ans, suf[i] + 1);
            if(i < n - 1) ans = max(ans, pre[i] + 1);
        }
        for(int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++) {
            int l = 1, r = 1;
            if(i > 1 && (nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]) * 2 == (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1])) {
                l = max(l, pre[i - 1]);
            }

            if(i < n - 2 && (nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]) * 2 == nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) {
                r = max(r, suf[i + 1]);
            }
            ans = max(ans, l + r + 1);
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU {
    private: 
        vector<int> p, s;
        int n;
    public:
        DSU(int n) {
            this->n = n;
            p.resize(n);
            s.resize(n, 0);
            iota(p.begin(), p.end(), 0);
        }
    
        int find(int x) {
            if(p[x] == x) return x;
            return p[x] = find(p[x]);
        }

        void add(int a, int b) {
            int pa = find(a), pb = find(b);
            if(pa == pb) {
                s[pa]++;
                return;
            }

            if(s[pa] > s[pb]) {
                swap(pa, pb);
            }

            p[pa] = pb;
            s[pb] += s[pa] + 1;
            s[pa] = 0;
        }

        int maxsize() {
            sort(s.rbegin(), s.rend());
            return s[0] + s[1];
        }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        map<int, int> x, y;
        for(auto &p : points) {
            x[p[0]] = 0;
            y[p[1]] = 0;
        }
        int prev = 0;
        for(auto &[k, val] : x) {
            val += prev;
            prev++;
        }
        int xsize = prev;
        prev = 0;
        for(auto &[k, val] : y) {
            val += prev;
            prev++;
        }
        int ysize = prev;
        DSU dsu(xsize + ysize);
        for(auto &el : points) {
            dsu.add(x[el[0]], xsize + y[el[1]]);
        }
        return dsu.maxsize() + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 452 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        vector<int> d(n-1, 0);
        for (int i = 1; i < n; i++) d[i-1] = nums[i] - nums[i-1];
        int ans = 1;
        vector<int> ls(n-1, 0), rs(n-1, 0);
        ls[0] = 1; rs[n-2] = 1;
        for (int i = 1; i < n-1; i++) {
            if (d[i] == d[i-1]) ls[i] = ls[i-1] + 1;
            else ls[i] = 1;
        }
        for (int i = n-3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (d[i] == d[i+1]) rs[i] = rs[i+1] + 1;
            else rs[i] = 1;
        }
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (i == 0) ans = max(ans, rs[1] + 1);
            else if (i == n-1) ans = max(ans, ls[n-3] + 1);
            else {
                if (i >= 2) ans = max(ans, ls[i-2] + 1);
                if (i + 1 < n-1) ans = max(ans, rs[i+1] + 1);
                ans = max(ans, rs[i]);
                if ((nums[i-1] + nums[i+1]) % 2 == 1) continue;
                int diff = (nums[i-1] + nums[i+1]) / 2 - nums[i-1];
                int t = 2;
                if (i >= 2 && d[i-2] == diff) t += ls[i-2];
                if (i + 1 < n-1 && d[i+1] == diff) t += rs[i+1];
                ans = max(ans, t);
            }
        }
        return ans + 1;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    vector<int> v;
    vector<int> s;
    int find(int a) {
        int b = a;
        while (b != v[b]) b = v[b];
        v[a] = b;
        return b;
    }

    void u(int a, int b) {
        a = find(a); b = find(b);
        v[a] = b;
        s[b] += s[a];
    }
    
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        v = vector<int>(n);
        s = vector<int>(n, 1);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) v[i] = i;
        vector<pair<int,int>> xc(n), yc(n);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            xc[i] = { points[i][0], i};
            yc[i] = { points[i][1], i};
        }
        sort(xc.begin(), xc.end());
        sort(yc.begin(), yc.end());
        for (int i = 1; i < n; i++) {
            if (xc[i].first == xc[i-1].first) u(xc[i-1].second, xc[i].second);
            if (yc[i].first == yc[i-1].first) u(yc[i-1].second, yc[i].second);
        }
        vector<int> sz;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) if (v[i] == i) sz.push_back(s[i]);
        sort(sz.begin(), sz.end());
        reverse(sz.begin(), sz.end());
        if (sz.size() == 1) return sz[0] + 1;
        else return sz[0] + sz[1] + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        seg = []
        n = len(nums)
        # start, end, diff
        for i in range(1, n):
            diff = nums[i] - nums[i - 1]
            if seg and seg[-1][-1] == diff:
                seg[-1][1] = i
            else:
                seg.append([i - 1, i, diff])
        # print(seg)
        res = max([x[1] - x[0] + 1 for x in seg])
        # print(res)
        for i in range(len(seg)):
            first, last, diff = seg[i]
            # print(seg[i])
            if first > 0 or last < n - 1:
                res = max(res, last - first + 1 + 1)
            # print(res)
            if first > 1:
                if (nums[first] - nums[first - 2]) - 2 * diff == 0:
                    res = max(res, last - first + 1 + 2)
                    if i - 3 >= 0 and seg[i - 3][1] == first - 2:
                        if seg[i - 3][2] == diff:
                            res = max(res, last - first + 1 + 1 + seg[i - 3][1] - seg[i - 3][0] + 1)
            # print(res)
            if last <= n - 3:
                if (nums[last + 2] - nums[last]) - 2 * diff == 0:
                    res = max(res, last - first + 1 + 2)
                    if i + 3 < len(seg) and seg[i + 3][0] == last + 2:
                        if seg[i + 3][2] == diff:
                            res = max(
                                res,
                                last - first + 1 + 1 + seg[i + 3][1] - seg[i + 3][0] + 1
                            )
            # print(res)
        return res
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class UF:
    def __init__(self, n):
        self.p = [i for i in range(n)]

    def find(self, x):
        if self.p[x] == x:
            return x
        self.p[x] = self.find(self.p[x])
        return self.p[x]

    def union(self, x, y):
        px = self.find(x)
        py = self.find(y)
        if px != py:
            self.p[py] = px

class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        dic_x = defaultdict(list)
        dic_y = defaultdict(list)
        for i, (x, y) in enumerate(points):
            dic_x[x].append(i)
            dic_y[y].append(i)
        uf = UF(n)
        for lis in dic_x.values():
            for i in range(len(lis) - 1):
                uf.union(lis[i], lis[i + 1])
        for lis in dic_y.values():
            for i in range(len(lis) - 1):
                uf.union(lis[i], lis[i + 1])

        size = defaultdict(int)
        for i in range(n):
            p = uf.find(i)
            size[p] += 1

        if len(size) == 1:
            return n + 1

        size_lis = [v for v in size.values()]
        size_lis.sort(reverse=True)
        return size_lis[0] + size_lis[1] + 1
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        diffs = []
        for i in range(len(nums) - 1):
            diffs.append(nums[i + 1] - nums[i])
        # Longest length of consecutive things in diffs, then add 1 
        # Can pick a pair of adjacent terms and move amount from one to another 
        # left array. For each index i, take [0, i). Length of longest thing before that is equal, and what it equals
        l_arr = [(0, -1), (1, diffs[0])]
        for i in range(2, len(diffs)):
            if diffs[i - 1] == l_arr[-1][1]:
                l_arr.append((l_arr[-1][0] + 1, diffs[i - 1]))
            else:
                l_arr.append((1, diffs[i - 1]))
                
        diffs_r = diffs[::-1]
        r_arr = [(0, -1), (1, diffs_r[0])]
        for i in range(2, len(diffs_r)):
            if diffs_r[i - 1] == r_arr[-1][1]:
                r_arr.append((r_arr[-1][0] + 1, diffs_r[i - 1]))
            else:
                r_arr.append((1, diffs_r[i - 1]))
        r_arr = r_arr[::-1]

        # print(diffs, l_arr, r_arr)
        
        ans = 3
        for i in range(0, len(diffs) - 1):
            # set only one to be equal 
            ans = max(l_arr[i][0] + 1 + 1, ans)
            ans = max(r_arr[i + 1][0] + 1 + 1, ans)
            # set i and i + 1 to be equal
            if (diffs[i] + diffs[i + 1]) % 2 != 0:
                # make diffs[i] = stuff before
                # ans = max(l_arr[i][0] + 1 + 1, ans)
                # ans = max(r_arr[i + 1][0] + 1 + 1, ans)
                continue
            else:
                add = 2 + 1
                new_diff = (diffs[i] + diffs[i + 1]) // 2
                if new_diff == l_arr[i][1]:
                    add += l_arr[i][0]
                if new_diff == r_arr[i + 1][1]:
                    add += r_arr[i + 1][0]
                ans = max(add, ans)

        streak = 2
        term = diffs[1]
        for i in range(2, len(diffs)):
            if diffs[i] == term:
                streak += 1
            else:
                break 
        ans = max(ans, streak + 1)

        streak = 2
        term = diffs_r[1]
        for i in range(2, len(diffs_r)):
            if diffs_r[i] == term:
                streak += 1
            else:
                break 
        ans = max(ans, streak + 1)
        
        return ans 
                    
        
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        x_dict = {}
        y_dict = {}
        for L in points:
            x, y = L[0], L[1]
            if x in x_dict:
                x_dict[x].append(y)
            else:
                x_dict[x] = [y]
            if y in y_dict:
                y_dict[y].append(x)
            else:
                y_dict[y] = [x]

        # print(x_dict, y_dict)
        curr = -1

        visited_x = {}
        visited_y = {}
        
        def visit_x(x):
            if x not in visited_x:
                visited_x[x] = curr
                for y in x_dict[x]:
                    visit_y(y)

        def visit_y(y):
            if y not in visited_y:
                visited_y[y] = curr
                for x in y_dict[y]:
                    visit_x(x)
                
        for L in points: 
            x, y = L[0], L[1]
            if (x not in visited_x) and (y not in visited_y):
                curr += 1
                visit_x(x)
                visit_y(y)

        print(visited_x, visited_y)

        counts = [0] * (curr + 1)
        for x in visited_x:
            counts[visited_x[x]] += len(x_dict[x])
        for y in visited_y:
            counts[visited_y[y]] += len(y_dict[y])
        counts.sort()
        print(counts)
        if len(counts) > 1:
            return 1 + ((counts[-1] + counts[-2]) // 2)
        else:
            return len(points) + 1
            
            
            
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int ans = 0;
        vector<int> diff(nums.size()-1);

        for (int i = 0; i < nums.size()-1; i++) {
            diff[i] = nums[i+1] - nums[i];
            // cout << diff[i] << ' ';
        }
        // cout << endl;

        // <v, f>
        vector<pair<int,int>> groups;
        groups.push_back({diff[0], 1});

        for (int i = 1; i < diff.size(); i++) {
            if (groups.back().first == diff[i]) {
                groups[groups.size()-1].second++;
            }
            else {
                groups.push_back({diff[i], 1});
            }
        }

        if (groups.size() == 1) {
            return nums.size();
        }
        if (groups.size() == 2) {
            return max(groups[0].second, groups[1].second) + 2;
        }

        // for (auto p : groups) {
        //     cout << p.first << ' ' << p.second << endl;   
        // }

        for (int i = 0; i < groups.size(); i++) {
            ans = max(ans, groups[i].second + 2);
            if (i+3 < groups.size() && groups[i].first == groups[i+3].first) {
                if (groups[i+1].second == 1 && groups[i+2].second == 1 && groups[i+1].first + groups[i+2].first == 2*groups[i].first) {
                    ans = max(ans, groups[i].second + groups[i+3].second + 3);
                }
            }

            if (i+2 < groups.size()) {
                if (groups[i+1].second == 1 && groups[i+2].second == 1 && groups[i+1].first + groups[i+2].first == 2*groups[i].first) {
                    ans = max(ans, groups[i].second + 3);
                }
            }
        }

        reverse(groups.begin(), groups.end());

        for (int i = 0; i < groups.size(); i++) {
            ans = max(ans, groups[i].second + 2);
            if (i+3 < groups.size() && groups[i].first == groups[i+3].first) {
                if (groups[i+1].second == 1 && groups[i+2].second == 1 && groups[i+1].first + groups[i+2].first == 2*groups[i].first) {
                    ans = max(ans, groups[i].second + groups[i+3].second + 3);
                }
            }

            if (i+2 < groups.size()) {
                if (groups[i+1].second == 1 && groups[i+2].second == 1 && groups[i+1].first + groups[i+2].first == 2*groups[i].first) {
                    ans = max(ans, groups[i].second + 3);
                }
            }
        }

        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    unordered_map<int,vector<int>> xs, ys;
    set<pair<int,int>> seen;

    int search(int x, int y) {
        if (seen.count({x, y})) return 0;
        seen.insert({x,y});
        // cout << "  " << x << ' ' << y << endl;

        int act = 0;
        if (xs.count(x)) {
            vector<int> vec = xs[x];
            xs.erase(x);
            for (int go : vec) {
                act++;
                act += search(x, go);
            }
            act--;
        }

        if (ys.count(y)) {
            vector<int> vec = ys[y];
            ys.erase(y);
            for (int go : vec) {
                act++;
                act += search(go, y);
            }
            act--;
        }
        
        return act;
    }

    
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        for (auto &v : points) {
            xs[v[0]].push_back(v[1]);
            ys[v[1]].push_back(v[0]);
        }

        vector<int> sz;
        for (auto &v : points) {
            if (seen.count({v[0], v[1]})) continue;
            // cout << "searching " << v[0] << ' ' << v[1] << endl;
            int reach = search(v[0], v[1]) + 1;
            // cout << "ans: " << reach << endl;
            
            sz.push_back(reach);
        }

        sort(sz.begin(), sz.end());

        if (sz.size() == 1) {
            return points.size() + 1;
        }

        reverse(sz.begin(), sz.end());
        
        return sz[0] + sz[1] + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 456 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 2) return n;

        vector<int> L(n,2), R(n,2);

        for(int i=2;i<n;i++)
            if(nums[i]-nums[i-1] == nums[i-1]-nums[i-2])
                L[i] = L[i-1] + 1;
        

        for(int i=n-3;i>=0;i--){
            if(nums[i+1]-nums[i] == nums[i+2]-nums[i+1])
                R[i] = R[i+1] + 1;
        }

        int ans = 2;

        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){

            if(i>0)
                ans = max(ans, L[i-1] + 1);

            if(i<n-1)
                ans = max(ans, R[i+1] + 1);

            if(i>0 && i<n-1){
                int diff = nums[i+1] - nums[i-1];

                if(diff % 2 == 0){
                    int d = diff/2;

                    int left = 1, right = 1;

                    if(i>=2 && nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]==d)
                        left = L[i-1];

                    if(i+2<n && nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]==d)
                        right = R[i+1];

                    ans = max(ans, left + 1 + right);
                }
            }
        }

        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU {
public:
    vector<int> parent, size;
    DSU(int n){
        parent.resize(n);
        size.resize(n,1);
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) parent[i]=i;
    }
    int find(int x){
        if(parent[x]==x) return x;
        return parent[x]=find(parent[x]);
    }
    void unite(int a,int b){
        a=find(a); b=find(b);
        if(a==b) return;
        if(size[a]<size[b]) swap(a,b);
        parent[b]=a;
        size[a]+=size[b];
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        DSU dsu(n);
        unordered_map<long long,int> xmap, ymap;

        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            long long x = points[i][0];
            long long y = points[i][1];
            if(xmap.count(x)) dsu.unite(i, xmap[x]);
            else xmap[x] = i;
            if(ymap.count(y)) dsu.unite(i, ymap[y]);
            else ymap[y] = i;
        }

        unordered_map<int,int> compSize;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++)
            compSize[dsu.find(i)]++;

     
        unordered_map<int,int> xCompSize, yCompSize;
        for(auto& [x, xi] : xmap)
            xCompSize[dsu.find(xi)] = compSize[dsu.find(xi)];
        for(auto& [y, yi] : ymap)
            yCompSize[dsu.find(yi)] = compSize[dsu.find(yi)];

        vector<pair<int,int>> ySorted; // (size, root)
        for(auto& [root, sz] : yCompSize)
            ySorted.push_back({sz, root});
        sort(ySorted.rbegin(), ySorted.rend());

        int ans = 1;
        for(auto& [xRoot, xSz] : xCompSize){
            // Try best y-comp that differs from xRoot
            for(auto& [ySz, yRoot] : ySorted){
                if(yRoot != xRoot){
                    ans = max(ans, xSz + ySz + 1);
                    break;
                }
            }
            ans = max(ans, xSz + 1);
        }

   
        if(!ySorted.empty())
            ans = max(ans, ySorted[0].first + 1);

        return ans;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& a) {
        int n = (int)a.size();
        vector<int>pref(n,2),suff(n,2);
        pref[0] = 1, suff[n-1] = 1;
        for(int i=2; i<n; ++i){
            if(a[i]-a[i-1]==a[i-1]-a[i-2]) pref[i]=pref[i-1]+1;
        }
        for(int i=n-3; i>=0; --i){
            if(a[i]-a[i+1]==a[i+1]-a[i+2]) suff[i]=suff[i+1]+1;
        }

        int ans = max(suff[0], pref[n-1]);

        for(int i=1; i+1<n; ++i){
            ans = max(ans,pref[i]+1);
            ans = max(ans,suff[i]+1);

            int diff = a[i+1]+a[i-1];
            int val = (a[i+1]+a[i-1])/2;
            if(diff%2==0){
                int f = 0;
                if(i-2>=0 && i+2<n) f = (val-a[i-1]==a[i-1]-a[i-2]) && ( a[i+2]-a[i+1]==a[i+1]-val );
                else if(i-2>=0) f = (val-a[i-1]==a[i-1]-a[i-2]);
                else if(i+2<n) f = (a[i+2]-a[i+1]==a[i+1]-val);
                else f = 1;
                if(f) ans = max(ans,pref[i-1]+suff[i+1]+1);
                if(i-2>=0 && val-a[i-1]==a[i-1]-a[i-2]) ans = max(ans,pref[i-1]+2);
                if(i+2<n && a[i+2]-a[i+1]==a[i+1]-val) ans = max(ans,suff[i+1]+2);
            }
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& a) {
        int n = (int)a.size();
        int ans = 2;

        map<int,vector<int> >mp1,mp2;
        for(int i=0; i<n; ++i){
            mp1[a[i][0]].push_back(i);
            mp2[a[i][1]].push_back(i);
        }

        set<int>vis_x, vis_y;
        vector<int>vis(n);

        int cnt = 0;
        function<void(int)>travY;
        auto travX = [&](int x){
            for(int i:mp1[x]){
                cnt+=(!vis[i]);
                vis[i] = 1;
                int y = a[i][1];
                if(vis_y.count(y)) continue;
                vis_y.insert(y);
                travY(y);
            }
        };

        travY = [&](int y){
            for(int i:mp2[y]){
                cnt+=(!vis[i]);
                vis[i] = 1;
                int x = a[i][0];
                if(vis_x.count(x)) continue;
                vis_x.insert(x);
                travX(x);
            }
        };

        int mx1 = 0,mx2 = 0;
        for(int i=0; i<n; ++i){
            if(vis[i]) continue;
            vis_x.insert(a[i][0]);
            cnt = 0;
            travX(a[i][0]);

            if(cnt>=mx1) mx2 = mx1,mx1 = cnt;
            else if(cnt>mx2) mx2 = cnt;
        }

        return mx1+mx2+1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:

        @cache
        def dfs(i: int, last: int, d: int, used: bool) -> int:
            if i == n: return 0
            ans = 0
            if nums[i] == last + d:
                ans = max(ans, 1 + dfs(i + 1, nums[i], d, used))
            elif not used:
                ans = max(ans, 1 + dfs(i + 1, last + d, d, True))
            return ans

        res = 2
        n = len(nums)
        for i in range(n - 1):
            res = max(
                res, 
                dfs(i + 2, nums[i + 1], nums[i + 1] - nums[i], False) + 2)
            if i >= n - 2: continue
            d = nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]
            res = max(
                res,
                dfs(i + 2, nums[i + 1], d, True) + 2
            )
            d2 = nums[i + 2] - nums[i]
            if d2 % 2: continue
            d2 //= 2
            res = max(
                res,
                dfs(i + 2, nums[i] + d2, d2, True) + 2)
        dfs.cache_clear()
        return res
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU:
    def __init__(self):
        self.pa = {}
        self.rank = {}
        self.size = {}
        self.cc = 0

    def add(self, x):
        if x not in self.pa:
            self.pa[x] = x
            self.rank[x] = 0
            self.size[x] = 1
            self.cc += 1

    def find(self, x):
        if self.pa[x] != x:
            self.pa[x] = self.find(self.pa[x])
        return self.pa[x]

    def union(self, x, y):
        self.add(x)
        self.add(y)
        px, py = self.find(x), self.find(y)
        if px == py: return False
        if self.rank[px] < self.rank[py]:
            px, py = py, px

        self.pa[py] = px
        self.size[px] += self.size[py]
        
        if self.rank[px] == self.rank[py]:
            self.rank[px] += 1

        self.cc -= 1
        return True

class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        dsu = DSU()
        rows, cols = defaultdict(list), defaultdict(list)
        for p in points:
            p = tuple(p)
            dsu.add(p)
            rows[p[0]].append(p)
            cols[p[1]].append(p)

        for plist in rows.values():
            p0 = plist[0]
            for p in plist[1:]:
                dsu.union(p0, p)

        for plist in cols.values():
            p0 = plist[0]
            for p in plist[1:]:
                dsu.union(p0, p)

        if dsu.cc == 1: return len(points) + 1

        cc_rows = defaultdict(set)
        cc_cols = defaultdict(set)
        for x, y in points:
            r = dsu.find((x, y))
            cc_rows[r].add(x)
            cc_cols[r].add(y)
        
        r1, r2 = heapq.nlargest(2, cc_rows.keys(), key=lambda r: dsu.size[r])
        ans = dsu.size[r1] + dsu.size[r2] + 1
        return ans
        

        
            

        













        
[Q4_END]

class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        import bisect
        import heapq
        from collections import defaultdict, deque, Counter
        from functools import cache, lru_cache
        from math import sqrt, gcd, lcm, comb, factorial

        from itertools import accumulate, permutations, combinations
        from sortedcontainers import SortedList, SortedSet, SortedDict
        MOD = 10**9 + 7
        inf = float('inf')
        abcd = string.ascii_lowercase
        """

        a, a+d, a+2d, a+3d...
        op: change 1 elem

        a, b, c
        b = (a+c)/2

        n = 10^5
        """
        def sol1():
            n = len(nums)
            if n <= 3:
                return n
                
            L = [2] * n
            for i in range(2, n):
                if nums[i] - nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]:
                    L[i] = L[i-1] + 1
                    
            R = [2] * n
            for i in range(n-3, -1, -1):
                if nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == nums[i+1] - nums[i]:
                    R[i] = R[i+1] + 1
                    
            ans = 0
            for i in range(n):
                ans = max(ans, L[i])
                if i < n - 1:
                    ans = max(ans, L[i] + 1)
                if i > 0:
                    ans = max(ans, R[i] + 1)
                    
            for i in range(1, n-1):
                # replace nums[i]
                if (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) % 2 == 0:
                    d = (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) // 2
                    
                    lCnt = 1
                    if i >= 2 and nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == d:
                        lCnt = L[i-1]
                    
                    rCnt = 1
                    if i <= n-3 and nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == d:
                        rCnt = R[i+1]
                    
                    ans = max(ans, lCnt + 1 + rCnt)
                    
            return ans
        return sol1()
[Q3_END]

class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        import bisect
        import heapq
        from collections import defaultdict, deque, Counter
        from functools import cache, lru_cache
        from math import sqrt, gcd, lcm, comb, factorial

        from itertools import accumulate, permutations, combinations
        from sortedcontainers import SortedList, SortedSet, SortedDict
        MOD = 10**9 + 7
        inf = float('inf')
        abcd = string.ascii_lowercase
        """
        bomb man!
              ^
              |
        <---- x --->
              |
              v

        group1 merge group2 => join => DSU
        """
        def sol1():
            class UnionFind:
                def __init__(self, size):
                    self.pa = list(range(size))  # parent
            
                def find(self, i):
                    pa = self.pa
                    if pa[i] != i: 
                        pa[i] = self.find(pa[i])
                    return pa[i]
            
                def union(self, x, y):
                    rootX, rootY = self.find(x), self.find(y)
                    self.pa[rootX] = rootY
            
                def remove(self, i):
                    self.pa[i] = i
                        
            n = len(points)
            uf = UnionFind(n)

            xMap = {}
            yMap = {}
    
            for i, (x, y) in enumerate(points):
                if x in xMap:
                    uf.union(i, xMap[x])
                else:
                    xMap[x] = i
                
                if y in yMap:
                    uf.union(i, yMap[y])
                else:
                    yMap[y] = i


            compSz = Counter()
            for i in range(n):
                root = uf.find(i)
                compSz[root] += 1

            xComp = defaultdict(set)
            yComp = defaultdict(set)
            
            for i, (x, y) in enumerate(points):
                root = uf.find(i)
                xComp[x].add(root)
                yComp[y].add(root)
                
            xSum = {x: sum(compSz[c] for c in cs) for x, cs in xComp.items()}
            ySum = {y: sum(compSz[c] for c in cs) for y, cs in yComp.items()}
            ans = 1
    
            for x in xSum:
                ans = max(ans, xSum[x] + 1)
            for y in ySum:
                ans = max(ans, ySum[y] + 1)
                
            for x in xComp:
                for y in yComp:
                    seen = set()
                    s = 0
                    for c in xComp[x]:
                        seen.add(c)
                        s += compSz[c]
                    for c in yComp[y]:
                        if c not in seen:
                            s += compSz[c]
                    ans = max(ans, 1 + s)

            return ans
        #return sol1()  # TLE

        def sol1_2():
            class UnionFind:
                def __init__(self):
                    self.par = {}
                    self.sz = {}
                    
                def find(self, x):
                    if x not in self.par:
                        self.par[x] = x
                        self.sz[x] = 1
                    if self.par[x] != x:
                        self.par[x] = self.find(self.par[x])
                    return self.par[x]
                    
                def union(self, a, b):
                    ra, rb = self.find(a), self.find(b)
                    if ra == rb:
                        return
                    self.par[rb] = ra
                    self.sz[ra] += self.sz[rb]
                        
            n = len(points)
            uf = UnionFind()
            offset = 10 ** 10
            
            for x, y in points:
                uf.union(x, y + offset)

            compSz = Counter()
            for x, y in points:
                root = uf.find(x)
                compSz[root] += 1

            # biggest 2 compoments
            first = second = 0
            for sz in compSz.values():
                if sz > first:
                    second = first
                    first = sz
                elif sz > second:
                    second = sz
            if second > 0:
                return first + second + 1
            return first + 1
                    
        return sol1_2()
[Q4_END]

class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;

        if (n == 1) {
            return 1;
        }

        int left[] = new int[n];
        int right[] = new int[n];
        int max = 0;

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (i < 2) {
                left[i] = i + 1;
            } else if ((nums[i] - nums[i - 1]) == (nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2])) {
                left[i] = 1 + left[i - 1];
            } else {
                left[i] = 2;
            }

            max = Math.max(max, left[i]);
        }

        for (int i = n - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (i >= n - 2) {
                right[i] = n - i;
            } else if ((nums[i] - nums[i + 1]) == (nums[i + 1] - nums[i + 2])) {
                right[i] = 1 + right[i + 1];
            } else {
                right[i] = 2;
            }

            max = Math.max(max, right[i]);
        }

        // System.out.println(Arrays.toString(left));
        // System.out.println(Arrays.toString(right));

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (i == 0) {
                max = Math.max(max, 1 + right[i + 1]);
            } else if (i == n - 1) {
                 max = Math.max(max, 1 + left[i - 1]);
            } else if (i == 1) {
                if (nums[2] - nums[0] == 2*(nums[3] - nums[2])) {
                    max = Math.max(max, 1 + left[i - 1] + right[i + 1]);
                } else {
                     max = Math.max(max, 1 + right[i + 1]);
                     max = Math.max(max, 1 + left[i - 1]);
                }
            } else if (i == n - 2) {

                if (nums[n - 1] - nums[n - 3] == 2*(nums[n - 3] - nums[n - 4])) {
                    max = Math.max(max, 1 + left[i - 1] + right[i + 1]);
                } else {
                      max = Math.max(max, 1 + right[i + 1]);
                     max = Math.max(max, 1 + left[i - 1]);
                }
                
            } else {
                 max = Math.max(max, 1 + right[i + 1]);
                 max = Math.max(max, 1 + left[i - 1]);
                int leftDiff = nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2];
                int rightDiff = nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1];
                if (leftDiff == rightDiff && nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1] == 2*leftDiff) {
                    int diff = nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2];

                    if (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1] == 2*diff) {
                        max = Math.max(max, 1 + left[i - 1] + right[i + 1]);
                    } else {
                         max = Math.max(max, 1 + right[i + 1]);
                         max = Math.max(max, 1 + left[i - 1]);
                    }
                } 

                if (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1] == 2*leftDiff) {
                    max = Math.max(max, 2 + left[i - 1]);
                }

                if (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1] == 2*rightDiff) {
                    max = Math.max(max, 2 + right[i + 1]);
                }
            }
        }

        return max;
        
        
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class UnionFind {
    public int parent[];
    public int rank[];

    public UnionFind(int n) {
        parent = new int[n];
        rank = new int[n];

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            parent[i] = i;
            rank[i] = 0;
        }
    }

    public int find(int i) {
        if (parent[i] != i) {
            parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
        }

        return parent[i];
    }

    public void union(int i, int j) {
        i = find(i);
        j = find(j);

        if (i != j) {
            if (rank[i] <= rank[j]) {
                parent[i] = j;

                if (rank[i] == rank[j]) {
                    rank[j]++;
                }
            } else {
                parent[j] = i;
            }
        }
    }
}
class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        Map<Integer, Integer> xMap = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Integer> yMap = new HashMap<>();
        int n = points.length;
        UnionFind unionFind = new UnionFind(n);

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (!xMap.containsKey(points[i][0])) {
                xMap.put(points[i][0], i);
            } else {
                unionFind.union(i, xMap.get(points[i][0]));
            }


            if (!yMap.containsKey(points[i][1])) {
                yMap.put(points[i][1], i);
            } else {
                unionFind.union(i, yMap.get(points[i][1]));
            }
        }

        Map<Integer, Integer> parentFreqMap = new HashMap<>();

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int parent = unionFind.find(i);

            parentFreqMap.put(parent, parentFreqMap.getOrDefault(parent, 0) + 1);
            
        }

        PriorityQueue<Integer> pq = new PriorityQueue<>();

        for (int val : parentFreqMap.keySet()) {
            pq.add(parentFreqMap.get(val));

            if (pq.size() == 3) {
                pq.poll();
            }
        }

        int result = 0;

        while (!pq.isEmpty()) {
            result = result + pq.poll();
        }

        return result + 1;
        
    }
}

from typing import List
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 2:
            return n
        rlen = [0] * n
        llen = [0] * n
        rlen[0], rlen[1] = 1, 2
        for i in range(2, n):
            if nums[i] - nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]:
                rlen[i] = rlen[i-1] + 1
            else:
                rlen[i] = 2
        llen[n-1], llen[n-2] = 1, 2
        for i in range(n-3, -1, -1):
            if nums[i+1] - nums[i] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]:
                llen[i] = llen[i+1] + 1
            else:
                llen[i] = 2
        ans = 2
        for i in range(n-1):
            d = nums[i+1] - nums[i]
            L = rlen[i] if i >= 1 and nums[i] - nums[i-1] == d else 1
            R = llen[i+1] if i+2 < n and nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == d else 1
            ans = max(ans, min(n, L + R + 1))
        for i in range(n-2):
            gap = nums[i+2] - nums[i]
            if gap % 2 != 0:
                continue
            d = gap // 2
            L = rlen[i] if i >= 1 and nums[i] - nums[i-1] == d else 1
            R = llen[i+2] if i+3 < n and nums[i+3] - nums[i+2] == d else 1
            ans = max(ans, min(n, L + 1 + R))
        return ans
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
from typing import List
from collections import defaultdict
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: List[List[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        parent = list(range(n))
        sz = [1] * n
        def find(x):
            if parent[x] != x:
                parent[x] = find(parent[x])
            return parent[x]
        def unite(a, b):
            a, b = find(a), find(b)
            if a == b:
                return
            if sz[a] < sz[b]:
                a, b = b, a
            parent[b] = a
            sz[a] += sz[b]
        byX = defaultdict(list)
        byY = defaultdict(list)
        for i in range(n):
            byX[points[i][0]].append(i)
            byY[points[i][1]].append(i)
        for v in byX.values():
            for i in range(1, len(v)):
                unite(v[0], v[i])
        for v in byY.values():
            for i in range(1, len(v)):
                unite(v[0], v[i])
        xComp = {}
        yComp = {}
        for x, v in byX.items():
            xComp[x] = find(v[0])
        for y, v in byY.items():
            yComp[y] = find(v[0])
        compSz = {}
        for i in range(n):
            compSz[find(i)] = sz[find(i)]
        ans = 1
        for r in xComp.values():
            ans = max(ans, compSz[r] + 1)
        for r in yComp.values():
            ans = max(ans, compSz[r] + 1)
        xList = [(r, compSz[r]) for r in xComp.values()]
        yList = [(r, compSz[r]) for r in yComp.values()]
        def getTop2(v):
            v.sort(key=lambda x: -x[1])
            res = []
            seen = set()
            for r, s in v:
                if r not in seen:
                    seen.add(r)
                    res.append((r, s))
                if len(res) == 2:
                    break
            return res
        topX = getTop2(xList)
        topY = getTop2(yList)
        for rx, sx in topX:
            for ry, sy in topY:
                if rx != ry:
                    ans = max(ans, sx + sy + 1)
                else:
                    ans = max(ans, sx + 1)
        return ans
[Q4_END]

class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        int best{2};
        vector<int> bestLeft(n), bestRight(n);
        bestLeft[0] = 1;
        bestLeft[1] = 2;
        for (int i{2}; i < n; ++i) {
            if (nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]) {
                bestLeft[i] = bestLeft[i - 1] + 1;
            } else {
                bestLeft[i] = 2;
            }
            best = max(best, bestLeft[i]);
        }
        bestRight[n - 1] = 1;
        bestRight[n - 2] = 2;
        for (int i{n - 3}; i >= 0; --i) {
            if (nums[i] - nums[i + 1] == nums[i + 1] - nums[i + 2]) {
                bestRight[i] = bestRight[i + 1] + 1;
            } else {
                bestRight[i] = 2;
            }
        }
        for (int i{}; i < n; ++i) {
            if (i >= 2 && i < n - 2) {
                int dif{nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]};
                if (dif == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] && nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1] == 2 * dif) {
                    best = max(best, 1 + bestLeft[i - 1] + bestRight[i + 1]);
                }
            }
            if (i >= 1 && i < n - 2) {
                int dif{nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]};
                if (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1] == 2 * dif) {
                    best = max(best, 1 + 1 + bestRight[i + 1]);
                }
            }
            if (i >= 2 && i < n - 1) {
                int dif{nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]};
                if (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1] == 2 * dif) {
                    best = max(best, 1 + 1 + bestLeft[i - 1]);
                }
            }
            if (i >= 1 && i < n - 1) {
                if (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1] % 2 == 0) {
                    best = max(best, 1 + 1 + 1);
                }
            }
            if (i >= 1) {
                best = max(best, 1 + bestLeft[i - 1]);
            }
            if (i < n - 1) {
                best = max(best, 1 + bestRight[i + 1]);
            }
        }

        return best;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class UnionFind {
private:
    int m;
    vector<int> root;
    vector<int> size;
public:
    UnionFind(int xIdx, int yIdx, int n) : m(xIdx + yIdx + n), root(m), size(m, 0) {
        iota(root.begin(), root.end(), 0);
        fill(size.end() - n, size.end(), 1);
    }

    int find(int u) {
        return root[u] == u ? u : (root[u] = find(root[u]));
    }

    void join(int u, int v) {
        u = find(u);
        v = find(v);
        if (u == v) {
            return;
        }
        if (size[u] >= size[v]) {
            root[v] = u;
            size[u] += size[v];
        } else {
            root[u] = v;
            size[v] += size[u];
        }
    }

    int solve() {
        int i1{-1}, s1{0}, i2{-1}, s2{0};
        for (int k{}; k < m; ++k) {
            int i{find(k)};
            int s{size[i]};
            if (s > s1) {
                i2 = i1;
                s2 = s1;
                i1 = i;
                s1 = s;
            } else if (s > s2 && i != i1) {
                s2 = s;
                i2 = i;
            }
        }
        return s1 + s2 + 1;
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        unordered_map<int, int> xs, ys;
        int xIdx{-1}, yIdx{-1};
        for (auto& xy : points) {
            int x{xy[0]}, y{xy[1]};
            if (!xs.contains(x)) {
                xs[x] = ++xIdx;
            }
            if (!ys.contains(y)) {
                ys[y] = ++yIdx;
            }
        }
        UnionFind uf(++xIdx, ++yIdx, n);
        for (int i{}; i < n; ++i) {
            int x{points[i][0]}, y{points[i][1]};
            uf.join(xIdx + yIdx + i, xs[x]);
            uf.join(xIdx + yIdx + i, xIdx + ys[y]);
        }
        return uf.solve();
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 468 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if(n <= 3){
            return n;
        }
        int m = n-1;
        vector<int> diff(m);
        for(int i = 0;i < m;i++){
            diff[i] = nums[i+1] - nums[i];
        }
        vector<int> l(m),r(m);
        l[0] = 1;
        for(int i = 1;i < m;i++){
            l[i] = (diff[i] == diff[i-1]) ? l[i-1] + 1 : 1;
        }
        r[m-1] = 1;
        for(int i = m-2;i >= 0;i--){
            r[i] = (diff[i] == diff[i+1]) ? r[i+1] + 1 : 1;
        }
        int ans = 0;
        for(int i = 0;i < m;i++){
            ans = max(ans,l[i] + 1);
            ans = max(ans,min(n,l[i] + 2));
        }
        for(int i = 0;i < m-1;i++){
            long long gap = (long long)nums[i+2]-nums[i];
            if(gap % 2 == 0){
                int target = gap/2;
                int curr_len = 3;
                if(i > 0 && diff[i-1] == target){
                    curr_len += l[i-1];
                }
                if(i+2 < m && diff[i+2] == target){
                    curr_len += r[i+2];
                }
                ans = max(ans,curr_len);
            }
        }
        return ans;
        
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    struct DSU{
        vector<int> parent;
        vector<int> size;
        DSU(int n){
            parent.resize(n);
            size.assign(n,1);
            for(int i = 0;i < n;i++){
                parent[i]= i;
            }
        }
            int find(int i){
                if(parent[i] == i){
                    return i;
                }
                return parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
            }
            void unite(int i,int j){
                int root_i = find(i);
                int root_j = find(j);
                if(root_i != root_j){
                    if(size[root_i] < size[root_j]){
                        swap(root_i,root_j);
                    }
                    parent[root_j] = root_i;
                    size[root_i] += size[root_j];
                }
            }
        
    };
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        if(n == 0){
            return 1;
        }
        DSU dsu(n);
        unordered_map<int,int> lastx,lasty;
        for(int i = 0;i < n;i++){
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];
            if(lastx.count(x)){
                dsu.unite(i,lastx[x]);
            }
            if(lasty.count(y)){
                dsu.unite(i,lasty[y]);
            }
            lastx[x] = i;
            lasty[y] = i;
        }
        vector<int> components;
        for(int i = 0;i < n;i++){
            if(dsu.parent[i] == i){
                components.push_back(dsu.size[i]);
            }
        }
        sort(components.rbegin(),components.rend());
        int result = components[0] + 1;
        if(components.size() > 1){
            result += components[1];
        }
        return result;
        
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 469 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n=len(nums)
        if n<=2:
            return n

        diff=[0]*n
        for i in range(1,n):
            diff[i]=nums[i]-nums[i-1]

        l=[2]*n
        for i in range(2,n):
            if diff[i]==diff[i-1]:
                l[i]=l[i-1]+1
            else:
                l[i]=2

        r=[2]*n
        for i in range(n-3,-1,-1):
            if diff[i+2]==diff[i+1]:
                r[i]=r[i+1]+1
            else:
                r[i]=2

        ans=2

        for i in range(n):
            ans=max(ans,l[i-1]+1 if i>0 else 1)
            ans=max(ans,r[i+1]+1 if i<n-1 else 1)

        for i in range(1,n-1):
            if (nums[i+1]-nums[i-1])%2==0:
                d=(nums[i+1]-nums[i-1])//2
                l1=1
                r1=1

                if i>=2 and nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]==d:
                    l1=l[i-1]

                if i+2<n and nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]==d:
                    r1=r[i+1]

                ans=max(ans,l1+1+r1)

        return ans
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    vector<int> parent, sz;

    int find(int x){
        if(parent[x]==x) return x;
        return parent[x]=find(parent[x]);
    }

    void unite(int a,int b){
        a=find(a);
        b=find(b);
        if(a==b) return;

        if(sz[a]<sz[b]) swap(a,b);
        parent[b]=a;
        sz[a]+=sz[b];
    }

    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {

        int n = points.size();

        parent.resize(n);
        sz.assign(n,1);

        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) parent[i]=i;

        unordered_map<long long,int> xmap;
        unordered_map<long long,int> ymap;

        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            long long x=points[i][0];
            long long y=points[i][1];

            if(xmap.count(x)) unite(i,xmap[x]);
            else xmap[x]=i;

            if(ymap.count(y)) unite(i,ymap[y]);
            else ymap[y]=i;
        }

        unordered_map<int,int> comp;

        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            comp[find(i)]++;
        }

        vector<int> sizes;
        for(auto &p:comp) sizes.push_back(p.second);

        sort(sizes.begin(),sizes.end(),greater<int>());

        int ans = sizes[0] + 1;

        if(sizes.size()>=2)
            ans = max(ans, sizes[0] + sizes[1] + 1);

        return ans;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 470 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        map<int,map<int,int>> mp1,mp2;
        int n=nums.size();
        if(n<=2) return n;
        vector<int> left(n,1),right(n,1);
        left[1]=2;
        right[n-2]=2;
        for(int i=2;i<n;i++)
            {
                if((nums[i]-nums[i-1])==(nums[i-1]-nums[i-2])) left[i]=left[i-1]+1;
                else left[i]=2;
            }
        for(int i=n-3;i>=0;i--)
            {
                if((nums[i+1]-nums[i])==(nums[i+2]-nums[i+1])) right[i]=right[i+1]+1;
                else right[i]=2;
            }
        int ans=2;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++)
            {
                ans=max(ans,left[i]);
                ans=max(ans,right[i]);
                if(i+1<n) ans=max(ans,1+right[i+1]);
                if(i-1>=0) ans=max(ans,1+left[i-1]);
                if(i-1>=0 && i+1<n)
                {
                    if(abs(nums[i+1]-nums[i-1])%2==0)
                    {
                        int d=(nums[i+1]-nums[i-1])/2;
                        
                        int diff=d;
                        int x=1,y=1;
                        
                        if(i-2>=0 && (nums[i-1]-nums[i-2])==diff) x=left[i-1];
                        if(i+2<n && (nums[i+2]-nums[i+1])==diff) y=right[i+1];
                        //if(i==3) cout<<x<<" "<<y<<" ";
                        ans=max(ans,x+y+1);
                    }
                }
            }
        ans=min(ans,n);
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    class DSU {
public:
    vector<int> parent;
    vector<int> size;

    DSU(int n) {
        parent.resize(n);
        size.resize(n, 1);

        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            parent[i] = i;
        }
    }

    int find(int x) {
        if(parent[x] == x) return x;
        return parent[x] = find(parent[x]); // path compression
    }

    void unionBySize(int a, int b) {
        int pa = find(a);
        int pb = find(b);

        if(pa == pb) return;

        if(size[pa] < size[pb]) {
            parent[pa] = pb;
            size[pb] += size[pa];
        } else {
            parent[pb] = pa;
            size[pa] += size[pb];
        }
    }
};
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n=points.size();
        if(n<=2) return n+1;
        map<long long,long long> x,y;
        int t1=0,t2=0;
        for(auto j : points)
            {
                int a=j[0];
                
                int b=j[1];
                if(x.find(a)==x.end()) x[a]=t1++;
                if(y.find(b)==y.end()) y[b]=t2++;

                
            }
        int tot=t1+t2;
        DSU dsu(tot);
        for(auto j : points)
            {
                int a=x[j[0]];
                int b=y[j[1]]+t1;
                dsu.unionBySize(a,b);
                
            }
        map<long long,long long> mp2,mp3;
        for(auto j : points)
            {
                int xx=x[j[0]];
                mp2[dsu.find(xx)]++;
            }
        // for(auto j : points)
        //     {
        //         int yy=y[j[1]]+t1;
        //         mp3[dsu.find(yy)]++;
        //     }
        
        vector<int> v2,v3;
        for(auto j : mp2) v2.push_back(j.second);
        for(auto j : mp3) v3.push_back(j.second);
        int mx=0;
        sort(v2.begin(),v2.end());
        if(v2.size()==0) mx=max(mx,1);
        if(v2.size()==1) mx=max(mx,v2[v2.size()-1]+1);
        else
        mx=max(mx,v2[v2.size()-1]+1+v2[v2.size()-2]);
        // v2=v3;
        // if(v2.size()==0) mx=max(mx,1);
        // if(v2.size()==1) mx=max(mx,v2[v2.size()-1]+1);
        // else
        // mx=max(mx,v2[v2.size()-1]+1+v2[v2.size()-2]);
        return mx;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 471 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums):
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 2:
            return n
        rlen = [0] * n
        llen = [0] * n
        rlen[0] = 1
        rlen[1] = 2
        for i in range(2, n):
            if nums[i] - nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]:
                rlen[i] = rlen[i-1] + 1
            else:
                rlen[i] = 2
        llen[n-1] = 1
        llen[n-2] = 2
        for i in range(n-3, -1, -1):
            if nums[i+1] - nums[i] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]:
                llen[i] = llen[i+1] + 1
            else:
                llen[i] = 2
        ans = 2
        for i in range(n-1):
            d = nums[i+1] - nums[i]
            if i >= 1 and nums[i] - nums[i-1] == d:
                L = rlen[i]
            else:
                L = 1
            if i+2 < n and nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == d:
                R = llen[i+1]
            else:
                R = 1
            ans = max(ans, min(n, L + R + 1))
        for i in range(n-2):
            gap = nums[i+2] - nums[i]
            if gap % 2 != 0:
                continue
            d = gap // 2
            if i >= 1 and nums[i] - nums[i-1] == d:
                L = rlen[i]
            else:
                L = 1
            if i+3 < n and nums[i+3] - nums[i+2] == d:
                R = llen[i+2]
            else:
                R = 1
            ans = max(ans, min(n, L + 1 + R))
        return ans
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
from collections import defaultdict
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points):
        n = len(points)
        parent = list(range(n))
        sz = [1] * n
        def find(x):
            if parent[x] != x:
                parent[x] = find(parent[x])
            return parent[x]
        def unite(a, b):
            a, b = find(a), find(b)
            if a == b:
                return
            if sz[a] < sz[b]:
                a, b = b, a
            parent[b] = a
            sz[a] += sz[b]
        byX = defaultdict(list)
        byY = defaultdict(list)
        for i in range(n):
            x, y = points[i]
            byX[x].append(i)
            byY[y].append(i)
        for v in byX.values():
            for i in range(1, len(v)):
                unite(v[0], v[i])
        for v in byY.values():
            for i in range(1, len(v)):
                unite(v[0], v[i])
        xComp = {}
        yComp = {}
        for x, v in byX.items():
            xComp[x] = find(v[0])
        for y, v in byY.items():
            yComp[y] = find(v[0])
        compSz = {}
        for i in range(n):
            root = find(i)
            compSz[root] = sz[root]
        ans = 1
        for r in xComp.values():
            ans = max(ans, compSz[r] + 1)
        for r in yComp.values():
            ans = max(ans, compSz[r] + 1)
        xList = [(r, compSz[r]) for r in xComp.values()]
        yList = [(r, compSz[r]) for r in yComp.values()]
        def getTop2(v):
            v.sort(key=lambda x: -x[1])
            res = []
            seen = set()
            for r, s in v:
                if r not in seen:
                    seen.add(r)
                    res.append((r, s))
                if len(res) == 2:
                    break
            return res
        topX = getTop2(xList)
        topY = getTop2(yList)
        for rx, sx in topX:
            for ry, sy in topY:
                if rx != ry:
                    ans = max(ans, sx + sy + 1)
                else:
                    ans = max(ans, sx + 1)
        return ans
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& a) {
        int n=a.size(),ans=2;
        vector<int> l(n,2),r(n,2);
        for(int i=2;i<n;i++) l[i]=(a[i]-a[i-1]==a[i-1]-a[i-2]?l[i-1]+1:2);
        for(int i=n-3;i>=0;i--) r[i]=(a[i+1]-a[i]==a[i+2]-a[i+1]?r[i+1]+1:2);
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            if(i) ans=max(ans,l[i-1]+1);
            if(i+1<n) ans=max(ans,r[i+1]+1);
            if(i>0 && i+1<n && (a[i+1]-a[i-1])%2==0){
                long long d=(a[i+1]-a[i-1])/2;
                int x=(i>1 && a[i-1]-a[i-2]==d)?l[i-1]:1;
                int y=(i+2<n && a[i+2]-a[i+1]==d)?r[i+1]:1;
                ans=max(ans,x+1+y);
            }
        }
        return min(ans,n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    struct DSU{
        vector<int> p,sz;
        DSU(int n):p(n),sz(n,1){iota(p.begin(),p.end(),0);}
        int f(int x){return p[x]==x?x:p[x]=f(p[x]);}
        void u(int a,int b){
            a = f(a), b = f(b);
            if (a == b) return;
            if (sz[a] < sz[b]) swap(a, b);
            p[b] = a;
            sz[a] += sz[b];
        }
    };
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& a) {
        int n=a.size();
        DSU d(n);
        unordered_map<int,int> mx,my;

        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            long long x=a[i][0],y=a[i][1];
            if(mx.count(x)) d.u(i,mx[x]); else mx[x]=i;
            if(my.count(y)) d.u(i,my[y]); else my[y]=i;
        }
        unordered_map<int, int> mp;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) mp[d.f(i)]++;
        int m1 = 0, m2 = 0;
        for (auto &x : mp) {
            int v = x.second;
            if (v >= m1) m2 = m1, m1 = v;
            else if (v > m2) m2 = v;
        }
        return m1 + m2 + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 473 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if(n <= 3) return n;
        int m = n - 1;
        vector<int>diff(m);
        for(int i = 0; i < m; i++){
            diff[i] = nums[i+1] - nums[i];
        }

        vector<int>l(m,1),r(m,1);
        int mx = 1;
        for(int i = 1; i < m;  i++){
            if(diff[i] == diff[i-1]) l[i] = l[i-1] + 1;
            if(l[i] > mx) mx = l[i];
        }

        for(int i = m-2 ; i >= 0; i--){
            if(diff[i] == diff[i+1]) r[i] = r[i+1]+1;
        }

        int k = (mx == m) ? m : mx + 1;

        for(int j = 0; j < m - 1; j++){
            int s = diff[j] + diff[j + 1];
            if(s % 2 == 0){
                int d = s/2;
                int curr = 2;
                if(j > 0 && diff[j-1] == d) curr += l[j-1];
                if(j+2 < m && diff[j+2] == d) curr +=r[j+2];
                if(curr > k) k = curr;
            }
        }
        return k + 1;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    vector<int>p,s;
    int f (int i){
        return p[i] == i ? i : p[i] = f(p[i]);
    }

    void u(int i , int j){
        int x = f(i) , y = f(j);
        if(x != y){
            p[x] = y;
            s[y] += s[x];
        }
    }
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        p.resize(n);
        s.assign(n,1);

        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++){
            p[i] = i;
        }

        unordered_map<int,int>mx,my;

        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++){
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];
            if(mx.count(x)) u(i,mx[x]);
            if(my.count(y)) u(i , my[y]);
            mx[x] =i;
            my[y] = i;
        }

        vector<int>c;
        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++){
            if(p[i] == i){
                c.push_back(s[i]);
            }
        }

        sort(c.rbegin(),c.rend());
        if(c.empty()) return 1;
        if(c.size() == 1)  return c[0] + 1;
        return c[0] + c[1] + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 475 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 3) return n;

        int m = n - 1;
        vector<int> D(m);
        for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) {
            D[i] = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
        }

        vector<int> left_run(m, 1);
        for (int i = 1; i < m; ++i) {
            if (D[i] == D[i - 1]) {
                left_run[i] = left_run[i - 1] + 1;
            }
        }

        vector<int> right_run(m, 1);
        for (int i = m - 2; i >= 0; --i) {
            if (D[i] == D[i + 1]) {
                right_run[i] = right_run[i + 1] + 1;
            }
        }

        int max_len = 0;
        
        for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) {
            int K = left_run[i];
            max_len = max(max_len, min(n, K + 2));
        }

        for (int k = 1; k < m; ++k) {
            long long sum = (long long)D[k - 1] + D[k];
            
            if (sum % 2 == 0) {
                long long d = sum / 2;
                int L = 0, R = 0;
                
                if (k - 2 >= 0 && D[k - 2] == d) {
                    L = left_run[k - 2];
                }
                
                if (k + 1 < m && D[k + 1] == d) {
                    R = right_run[k + 1];
                }
                
                max_len = max(max_len, L + R + 3);
            }
        }

        return max_len;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    struct DSU {
        vector<int> parent;
        vector<int> size;
        
        DSU(int n) {
            parent.resize(n);
            size.resize(n, 1);
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
                parent[i] = i;
            }
        }
        
        int find(int i) {
            if (parent[i] == i) return i;
            return parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
        }
        
        void unite(int i, int j) {
            int root_i = find(i);
            int root_j = find(j);
            if (root_i != root_j) {
                if (size[root_i] < size[root_j]) {
                    swap(root_i, root_j);
                }
                parent[root_j] = root_i;
                size[root_i] += size[root_j];
            }
        }
    };

    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        if (n == 0) return 1;
        
        vector<pair<int, int>> px(n), py(n);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            px[i] = {points[i][0], i};
            py[i] = {points[i][1], i};
        }
        
        sort(px.begin(), px.end());
        sort(py.begin(), py.end());
        
        DSU dsu(n);
        
        for (int i = 1; i < n; i++) {
            if (px[i].first == px[i-1].first) {
                dsu.unite(px[i].second, px[i-1].second);
            }
            if (py[i].first == py[i-1].first) {
                dsu.unite(py[i].second, py[i-1].second);
            }
        }
        
        vector<int> comp_sizes;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (dsu.parent[i] == i) {
                comp_sizes.push_back(dsu.size[i]);
            }
        }
        
        sort(comp_sizes.rbegin(), comp_sizes.rend());
        
        if (comp_sizes.size() >= 2) {
            return comp_sizes[0] + comp_sizes[1] + 1;
        } else {
            return comp_sizes[0] + 1;
        }
    }
};
[Q4_END]
##################

### RANK 476 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>&a) {
        vector<int>df;
        int n=a.size();
        for(int i=1;i<a.size();i++) df.push_back(a[i]-a[i-1]);
        vector<int>pf(n,2),sf(n,2);
        int ans=0;
        for(int i=2;i<n;i++){
            if(df[i-2]==df[i-1]) pf[i]=pf[i-1]+1; 
            if(i==n-1) ans=max(ans,pf[i]);
            else ans=max(ans,pf[i]+1);
        }
        for(int i=n-3;i>=0;i--){
            if(df[i]==df[i+1]) sf[i]=sf[i+1]+1;
            if(i==0) ans=max(ans,sf[i]);
            else ans=max(ans,sf[i]+1);
        }
        for(int i=1;i<n-1;i++){
            int ps=a[i+1]-a[i-1];
            if(ps%2) continue;
            ps/=2;
            if(i>=2 && df[i-2]==ps && i<n-2 && df[i+1]==ps) ans=max(ans,pf[i-1]+sf[i+1]+1);
            else if(i>=2 && df[i-2]==ps) ans=max(ans,pf[i-1]+2);
            else if(i<n-2 && df[i+1]==ps) ans=max(ans,sf[i+1]+2);
            else ans=max(ans,3);
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    struct DSU{
        vector<int>sz,par;
        
        void make(int n){
            par.resize(n+1);
            sz.resize(n+1);
            for(int i=1;i<=n;i++){
                par[i]=i;
                sz[i]=1;
            }
        }

        int find(int v){
            if(par[v]==v) return v;
            return par[v]=find(par[v]);
        }

        int unite(int a,int b){
            a=find(a);b=find(b);
            if(a==b) return 0;
            if(sz[b]>sz[a]) swap(a,b);
            par[b]=a;
            sz[a]+=sz[b];
            return 1;
        }
    };
    
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>&a) {
        int n=a.size();
        DSU dsu;
        dsu.make(n);
        vector<pair<int,int>>p,q;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            p.push_back({a[i][0],i+1});
            q.push_back({a[i][1],i+1});
        }
        sort(p.begin(),p.end());
        sort(q.begin(),q.end());
        for(int i=1;i<n;i++){
            if(p[i].first==p[i-1].first) dsu.unite(p[i].second,p[i-1].second);
        }
        for(int i=1;i<n;i++){
            if(q[i].first==q[i-1].first) dsu.unite(q[i].second,q[i-1].second);
        }
        vector<int>csz;
        for(int i=1;i<=n;i++){
            if(dsu.par[i]==i) csz.push_back(dsu.sz[i]);
        }
        sort(csz.rbegin(),csz.rend());
        if(csz.size()==1) return csz[0]+1;
        return csz[0]+csz[1]+1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]
