### RANK 477 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        vector<int> L(n), R(n);
        int mx = 3;
        for(int i = 2;i<n;i++){
            if(nums[i] - nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]) {
                L[i] = L[i-1] + 1;
                mx = max(mx, L[i] + 2);
            }// x,x,x[1]
            int j = n - 1 - i;
            if(nums[j] - nums[j+1] == nums[j+1] - nums[j+2]) {
                R[j] = R[j+1]+1;
                mx = max(mx, R[j] + 2);
            }
        }

        // 1,x,4
        for(int i = 1;i+1<n;i++){
            int d = nums[i-1] - nums[i+1];
            mx = max(mx, L[i-1] + 3);
            mx = max(mx, R[i+1] + 3);
            if(d%2 != 0) continue;
            int k = d/2;
            int s = 3;
            if(i+2 < n && nums[i+1] - nums[i+2] == k) s += R[i+1] + 1;
            if(i-2 >= 0 && nums[i-2] - nums[i-1] == k) s += L[i-1] + 1;
            //cout << "s = " << s << endl;
            mx = max(mx, s);
        }

        mx = max(mx, R[1] + 3);
        mx = max(mx, L[n-2] + 3);
        return mx;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        unordered_map<int, vector<int>> mpX, mpY;
        for(int i = 0;i<n;i++){
            auto& p = points[i];
            mpX[p[0]].push_back(i);
            mpY[p[1]].push_back(i);
        }
        vector<int> dsu(n), cnt(n, 1);
        iota(dsu.begin(), dsu.end(), 0);
        function<int(int)> find = [&](int x){
            //cout << x << " " << dsu[x] << endl;
            return dsu[x] == x ? x : dsu[x] = find(dsu[x]);
        };
        for(auto& [p, vt] : mpX){
            for(int i = 0;i<vt.size();i++){
                int x = find(vt[0]), y = find(vt[i]);
                if(x != y){
                    if(cnt[x] > cnt[y]) swap(x,y);
                    cnt[y] += cnt[x];
                    dsu[x] = y;
                }
            }
        }
        for(auto& [p, vt] : mpY){
            for(int i = 0;i<vt.size();i++){
                int x = find(vt[0]), y = find(vt[i]);
                if(x != y){
                    if(cnt[x] > cnt[y]) swap(x,y);
                    cnt[y] += cnt[x];
                    dsu[x] = y;
                }
            }
        }
        vector<int> vt;
        for(int i = 0;i<n;i++){
            if(i == dsu[i]) {
                vt.push_back(cnt[i]);
                //cout << "i = " << i << ", cnt = " << cnt[i] << endl;
            }
        }
        sort(vt.rbegin(), vt.rend());
        int mx = 1 + vt[0];
        if(vt.size() > 1) mx += vt[1];
        return mx;
        
    }
};
[Q4_END]
##################

### RANK 478 ###
[Q3_START]

class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        # left_len[i]: 以 i 结尾的最长等差子数组长度
        left_len = [1] * n
        left_diff = [None] * n   # 当长度>=2时记录公差
        for i in range(1, n):
            if left_len[i-1] == 1:
                left_len[i] = 2
                left_diff[i] = nums[i] - nums[i-1]
            else:
                if nums[i] - nums[i-1] == left_diff[i-1]:
                    left_len[i] = left_len[i-1] + 1
                    left_diff[i] = left_diff[i-1]
                else:
                    left_len[i] = 2
                    left_diff[i] = nums[i] - nums[i-1]

        # right_len[i]: 以 i 开头的最长等差子数组长度
        right_len = [1] * n
        right_diff = [None] * n
        for i in range(n-2, -1, -1):
            if right_len[i+1] == 1:
                right_len[i] = 2
                right_diff[i] = nums[i+1] - nums[i]
            else:
                if nums[i+1] - nums[i] == right_diff[i+1]:
                    right_len[i] = right_len[i+1] + 1
                    right_diff[i] = right_diff[i+1]
                else:
                    right_len[i] = 2
                    right_diff[i] = nums[i+1] - nums[i]

        # 不修改时的答案
        ans = max(left_len)

        # 枚举修改位置 i
        for i in range(n):
            # 只利用左边
            if i > 0:
                ans = max(ans, left_len[i-1] + 1)
            # 只利用右边
            if i < n-1:
                ans = max(ans, right_len[i+1] + 1)

            # 同时利用左右
            if i > 0 and i < n-1:
                L = left_len[i-1]
                R = right_len[i+1]
                a_left = nums[i-1]
                a_right = nums[i+1]

                # 两边都只取一个元素
                if (a_left + a_right) % 2 == 0:
                    ans = max(ans, 3)

                # 左边取一个，右边取最长段
                if R >= 2:
                    d = right_diff[i+1]
                    if a_right - a_left == 2 * d:
                        ans = max(ans, R + 2)

                # 左边取最长段，右边取一个
                if L >= 2:
                    d = left_diff[i-1]
                    if a_right - a_left == 2 * d:
                        ans = max(ans, L + 2)

                # 两边都取最长段
                if L >= 2 and R >= 2:
                    if left_diff[i-1] == right_diff[i+1] and a_right - a_left == 2 * left_diff[i-1]:
                        ans = max(ans, L + 1 + R)

        return ans
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        parent = list(range(n))
        size = [1] * n

        def find(x: int) -> int:
            # path compression
            while parent[x] != x:
                parent[x] = parent[parent[x]]
                x = parent[x]
            return x

        def union(a: int, b: int) -> None:
            ra = find(a)
            rb = find(b)
            if ra == rb:
                return
            # union by size
            if size[ra] < size[rb]:
                ra, rb = rb, ra
            parent[rb] = ra
            size[ra] += size[rb]

        # maps from coordinate to one point index having that coordinate
        x_to_point = {}
        y_to_point = {}

        for i, (x, y) in enumerate(points):
            if x in x_to_point:
                union(i, x_to_point[x])
            else:
                x_to_point[x] = i

            if y in y_to_point:
                union(i, y_to_point[y])
            else:
                y_to_point[y] = i

        # collect sizes of all components
        comp_sizes = []
        seen_root = set()
        for i in range(n):
            r = find(i)
            if r not in seen_root:
                seen_root.add(r)
                comp_sizes.append(size[r])

        comp_sizes.sort(reverse=True)
        if len(comp_sizes) == 1:
            return 1 + comp_sizes[0]
        else:
            return 1 + comp_sizes[0] + comp_sizes[1]
[Q4_END]
##################

### RANK 479 ###
[Q3_START]
#include <bits/stdc++.h>
#include <ext/pb_ds/assoc_container.hpp>

using namespace std;
using namespace __gnu_pbds;

template <typename T>
using ordered_set = tree<T, null_type, less<T>, rb_tree_tag, tree_order_statistics_node_update>;
template <typename T, typename U>
using ordered_multiset = tree<pair<T, U>, null_type, less<pair<T, U>>, rb_tree_tag, tree_order_statistics_node_update>;

using ll = long long;

class Solution {
  public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int> &nums) {
        ll n = ll(nums.size());
        vector<ll> st(n);
        st[n - 1] = 1;
        st[n - 2] = 2;
        for (ll i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == nums[i + 1] - nums[i]) {
                st[i] = 1 + st[i + 1];
            } else {
                st[i] = 2;
            }
        }
        vector<ll> nd(n);
        nd[0] = 1;
        nd[1] = 2;
        for (ll i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            if (nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == nums[i] - nums[i - 1]) {
                nd[i] = nd[i - 1] + 1;
            } else {
                nd[i] = 2;
            }
        }
        ll ans = *max_element(nd.begin(), nd.end());
        for (ll i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (i > 0) {
                ans = max(ans, nd[i - 1] + 1);
            }
            if (i < n - 1) {
                ans = max(ans, 1 + st[i + 1]);
            }
            if (i > 0 && i < n - 1) {
                if ((nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) % 2 == 0) {
                    ans = max(ans, 3LL);
                }
            }
            if (i - 1 > 0 && i < n - 1) {
                ll d = nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2];
                if (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1] == 2 * d) {
                    ans = max(ans, nd[i - 1] + 2);
                }
            }
            if (i > 0 && i < n - 2) {
                ll d = nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1];
                if (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1] == 2 * d) {
                    ans = max(ans, 2 + st[i + 1]);
                }
            }
            if (i - 1 > 0 && i < n - 2) {
                ll dl = nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2];
                ll dr = nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1];
                if (dl == dr && nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1] == 2 * dl) {
                    ans = max(ans, nd[i - 1] + 1 + st[i + 1]);
                }
            }
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
#include <bits/stdc++.h>
#include <ext/pb_ds/assoc_container.hpp>

using namespace std;
using namespace __gnu_pbds;

template <typename T>
using ordered_set = tree<T, null_type, less<T>, rb_tree_tag, tree_order_statistics_node_update>;
template <typename T, typename U>
using ordered_multiset = tree<pair<T, U>, null_type, less<pair<T, U>>, rb_tree_tag, tree_order_statistics_node_update>;

using ll = long long;

// Disjoint Set Union

// we have a bunch of components that are represented as trees
// components are identified by their representative, who is the root of the tree
// we can find the component a node belongs to or combine two components together in O(1) time

// read source for path compression + union by size and union by depth optimizations

// sources:
// cp-algorithms.com (https://cp-algorithms.com/data_structures/disjoint_set_union.html)

class DSU {
    // components are stored as trees
    // trees should have least levels / depth as possible
    // best case 2 levels, worst case log(n) levels

  private:
    vector<ll> parent;
    vector<ll> sz;
    ll n_comps;

  public:
    DSU(ll n) {
        // n nodes
        // nodes are 1-based indexed by default

        parent.resize(n);
        sz.resize(n);

        // change this to n if you are using 0-based indexed nodes

        n_comps = n;

        iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0LL);
        fill(sz.begin(), sz.end(), 1LL);
    };

    // the representative / leader of a tree is the root of the tree
    // find the representative of the tree which the node belongs to
    // takes O(log(n)) time or almost O(1) time

    ll find_rep(ll node) {
        if (node == parent[node]) {
            return node;
        }

        return parent[node] = find_rep(parent[node]);
    }

    // union by depth
    // join the root of smaller depth tree to the root of larger depth tree
    // works in O(1) time

    void union_trees(ll node1, ll node2) {
        ll rep1 = find_rep(node1);
        ll rep2 = find_rep(node2);

        if (rep1 != rep2) {
            if (sz[rep1] < sz[rep2]) {
                swap(rep1, rep2);
            }

            parent[rep2] = rep1;
            sz[rep1] += sz[rep2];
            n_comps--;
        }
    }

    // whether node1 and node2 are in the same component or not

    bool same_component(ll node1, ll node2) { return find_rep(node1) == find_rep(node2); }

    // get the size of the component

    ll size(ll node) {
        ll rep = find_rep(node);
        return sz[rep];
    }

    // get the number of components

    ll no_of_comps() { return n_comps; }

    // get all the components

    vector<vector<ll>> comps() {
        ll n = (ll)parent.size();
        vector<ll> index(n);
        ll idx = 0;

        // change this to 0 if you are using 0-based indexed nodes

        for (ll i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (find_rep(i) == i) {
                index[i] = idx++;
            }
        }

        vector<vector<ll>> result(idx);

        // change this to 0 if you are using 0-based indexed nodes

        for (ll i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            ll rep = find_rep(i);
            result[index[rep]].push_back(i);
        }

        return result;
    }
};

class Solution {
  public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>> &points) {
        ll n = ll(points.size());
        map<ll, ll> mp_x, mp_y;
        DSU dsu(n);
        for (ll i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            auto &p = points[i];
            ll x = p[0], y = p[1];
            if (mp_x.contains(x)) {
                dsu.union_trees(mp_x[x], i);
            } 
            if (mp_y.contains(y)) {
                dsu.union_trees(mp_y[y], i);
            }
            mp_x[x] = mp_y[y] = i;
        }
        auto comps = dsu.comps();
        ll mx1 = 0, mx2 = 0;
        for (auto &comp: comps) {
            ll sz = ll(comp.size());
            if (sz > mx1) {
                mx2 = mx1;
                mx1 = sz;
            } else if (sz > mx2) {
                mx2 = sz;
            }
        }
        ll ans = 1 + mx1 + mx2;
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 480 ###
[Q3_START]

 * all copies or substantial portions of the Software.

 *   THE SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED "AS IS", WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR
 *   IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO THE WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY,
 *   FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE AND NONINFRINGEMENT. IN NO EVENT SHALL THE
 *   AUTHORS OR COPYRIGHT HOLDERS BE LIABLE FOR ANY CLAIM, DAMAGES OR OTHER
 *   LIABILITY, WHETHER IN AN ACTION OF CONTRACT, TORT OR OTHERWISE, ARISING
 * FROM, OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE SOFTWARE OR THE USE OR OTHER DEALINGS
 * IN THE SOFTWARE.

#include <algorithm>
#include <cstddef>
#include <cstdint>
#include <vector>

class Solution {
 public:
  auto longestArithmetic(std::vector<int>& nums) -> int {
    std::size_t arr_size = nums.size();
    if (arr_size <= 2) {
      return static_cast<int>(arr_size);
    }

    // left[i]: length of arithmetic subarray ending at i
    // with difference d = (nums[i] - nums[i-1])
    std::vector<int> left(arr_size, 1);
    for (std::size_t i = 1; i < arr_size; ++i) {
      if (i > 1 && nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]) {
        left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1;
      } else {
        left[i] = 2;
      }
    }

    // right[i]: length of arithmetic subarray starting at i
    // with difference d = (nums[i+1] - nums[i])
    std::vector<int> right(arr_size, 1);
    for (std::size_t i = arr_size - 2; i < arr_size; --i) {
      if (i < arr_size - 2 &&
          nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]) {
        right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1;
      } else {
        right[i] = 2;
      }
    }

    int ans = 0;
    for (std::size_t i = 0; i < arr_size; ++i) {
      // 1. Change nums[i] to extend sequence from the left
      if (i > 0) {
        ans = std::max(ans, left[i - 1] + 1);
      }

      // 2. Change nums[i] to extend sequence from the right
      if (i < arr_size - 1) {
        ans = std::max(ans, right[i + 1] + 1);
      }

      // 3. Bridge case: Change nums[i] to connect left and right parts
      if (i > 0 && i < arr_size - 1) {
        std::int64_t diffSum = static_cast<std::int64_t>(nums[i + 1]) -
                               static_cast<std::int64_t>(nums[i - 1]);
        if (diffSum % 2 == 0) {
          std::int64_t diff = diffSum / 2;
          int current = 1;  // The modified element at index i

          // Check if left part matches difference d
          if (i >= 2 && nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == diff) {
            current += left[i - 1];
          } else {
            current += 1;  // Only the element at nums[i-1]
          }

          // Check if right part matches difference d
          if (i <= arr_size - 3 && nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == diff) {
            current += right[i + 1];
          } else {
            current += 1;  // Only the element at nums[i+1]
          }
          ans = std::max(ans, current);
        }
      }
    }

    return ans;
  }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
/*
 *   MIT License
 *
 *   Copyright (c) 2026 CagesThrottleUs
 *
 *   Permission is hereby granted, free of charge, to any person obtaining a
 * copy of this software and associated documentation files (the "Software"), to
 * deal in the Software without restriction, including without limitation the
 * rights to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute, sublicense, and/or
 * sell copies of the Software, and to permit persons to whom the Software is
 *   furnished to do so, subject to the following conditions:

#include <algorithm>
#include <unordered_map>
#include <unordered_set>
#include <vector>

class Solution {
  std::vector<int> parent, rnk, sz;

  // NOLINTNEXTLINE(misc-no-recursion)
  auto find(int node) -> int {
    if (parent[static_cast<std::size_t>(node)] != node) {
      parent[static_cast<std::size_t>(node)] =
          find(parent[static_cast<std::size_t>(node)]);
    }
    return parent[static_cast<std::size_t>(node)];
  }

  void unite(int root_x, int root_y) {
    root_x = find(root_x);
    root_y = find(root_y);
    if (root_x == root_y) {
      return;
    }
    if (rnk[static_cast<std::size_t>(root_x)] <
        rnk[static_cast<std::size_t>(root_y)]) {
      std::swap(root_x, root_y);
    }
    parent[static_cast<std::size_t>(root_y)] = root_x;
    sz[static_cast<std::size_t>(root_x)] +=
        sz[static_cast<std::size_t>(root_y)];
    if (rnk[static_cast<std::size_t>(root_x)] ==
        rnk[static_cast<std::size_t>(root_y)]) {
      rnk[static_cast<std::size_t>(root_x)]++;
    }
  }

 public:
  auto maxActivated(std::vector<std::vector<int>>& points) -> int {
    auto total_points = points.size();
    parent.resize(total_points);
    rnk.assign(total_points, 0);
    sz.assign(total_points, 1);
    for (int i = 0; i < static_cast<int>(total_points); i++) {
      parent[static_cast<std::size_t>(i)] = i;
    }

    std::unordered_map<int, std::vector<int>> byX;
    std::unordered_map<int, std::vector<int>> byY;
    for (int i = 0; i < static_cast<int>(total_points); i++) {
      byX[points[static_cast<std::size_t>(i)][0]].push_back(i);
      byY[points[static_cast<std::size_t>(i)][1]].push_back(i);
    }

    // Union all points sharing x or y
    for (auto& [first, grp] : byX) {
      for (int i = 1; i < static_cast<int>(grp.size()); i++) {
        unite(grp[0], grp[static_cast<std::size_t>(i)]);
      }
    }
    for (auto& [first, grp] : byY) {
      for (int i = 1; i < static_cast<int>(grp.size()); i++) {
        unite(grp[0], grp[static_cast<std::size_t>(i)]);
      }
    }

    // After DSU: each x-value collapses to one root, same for y
    // rootOfX[x] = the single root for all points with that x
    std::unordered_map<int, int> rootOfX;
    std::unordered_map<int, int> rootOfY;
    for (auto& [coord_x, grp] : byX) {
      rootOfX[coord_x] = find(grp[0]);
    }
    for (auto& [coord_y, grp] : byY) {
      rootOfY[coord_y] = find(grp[0]);
    }

    // Case 2 & 3: new point aligns with only one existing axis
    // Best is just 1 + largest cluster size
    int maxCluster = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < static_cast<int>(total_points); i++) {
      maxCluster = std::max(maxCluster, sz[static_cast<std::size_t>(find(i))]);
    }
    int best = 1 + maxCluster;

    // Case 1: new point (existing x, existing y) bridges two clusters
    // For each x-root rx, we want the largest y-root ry where ry != rx
    // Precompute top-2 cluster sizes among all y-roots
    // (top-2 because if best y-root == rx, we fall back to second best)

    // Collect all y-roots and their sizes
    std::unordered_set<int> yRootSet;
    for (auto& [coord_y, root_y] : rootOfY) {
      yRootSet.insert(root_y);
    }

    // top2: (size, root) among y-roots
    std::pair<int, int> top1 = {-1, -1};
    std::pair<int, int> top2 = {-1, -1};
    for (int root_y : yRootSet) {
      if (sz[static_cast<std::size_t>(root_y)] > top1.first) {
        top2 = top1;
        top1 = {sz[static_cast<std::size_t>(root_y)], root_y};
      } else if (sz[static_cast<std::size_t>(root_y)] > top2.first) {
        top2 = {sz[static_cast<std::size_t>(root_y)], root_y};
      }
    }

    // For each existing x, try bridging with best available y-root
    for (auto& [coord_x, root_x] : rootOfX) {
      // Check if (x, y) already exists for some y —
      // we need a y that gives a root different from rx
      // and (x, y) must not already be in points
      // For now get best y-root != rx
      int yBestSize = (top1.second != root_x) ? top1.first : top2.first;
      if (yBestSize < 0) {
        continue;  // no valid y-root
      }

      // But we also need to verify the candidate (x, y) doesn't already exist.
      // Since any existing (x, ?) would have rootOfX[x] = rx already merged,
      // a y giving ry != rx means that y is NOT in byX[x] → (x,y) is safe.
      best =
          std::max(best, 1 + sz[static_cast<std::size_t>(root_x)] + yBestSize);
    }

    return best;
  }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 482 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        if(n<3) return n;
        int[] diff = new int[n-1];
        for(int i = 0; i<n-1; i++){
            diff[i] = nums[i+1]-nums[i];
        }
        int[] l = new int[n-1];
        int[] r = new int[n-1];
        l[0] = 1;
        for(int i = 1; i<n-1; i++){
            l[i] = (diff[i]==diff[i-1])?l[i-1]+1:1;
        }
        r[n-2] = 1;
        for(int i = n-3; i>=0; i--){
            r[i] = (diff[i]==diff[i+1])?r[i+1]+1:1;
        }
        int maxl = 0;
        for(int i = 0; i<n-1; i++){
            int x = l[i] ;
            if(x<n-1){
                x++;
            }
            maxl= Math.max(x,maxl);
            
        }
        for(int i = 0; i<n-2;i++){
            long sum = diff[i]+diff[i+1];
            if(sum%2 == 0){
                long d = sum/2;
                int curr = 2;
                if(i>0 && diff[i-1]==d){
                    curr+= l[i-1];
                }
                if(i+2 <n-1 && diff[i+2]==d){
                    curr+= r[i+2];
                }
                maxl = Math.max(maxl,curr);
            }
        }
        return maxl+1;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    public int[] parent ,size;
    public int find(int x){
        while(parent[x]!=x){
            parent[x] = parent[parent[x]];
            x = parent[x];
        }
        return x;
    }
    public void union(int a , int b){
        a = find(a); b= find(b);
        if(a==b) return ;
        if(size[a]<size[b]){
            int t = a;
            a= b;
            b=t;
        }
        parent[b] = a;
        size[a]+= size[b];
        
    }
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        parent = new int[n];
        size = new int[n];
        for(int i = 0; i<n;i++){
            parent[i] = i;
            size[i] = 1;
        }
        Map<Integer,List<Integer>> x = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer,List<Integer>> y = new HashMap<>();
        for(int i = 0; i<n; i++){
            x.computeIfAbsent(points[i][0],k-> new ArrayList<>()).add(i);
            y.computeIfAbsent(points[i][1],k->new ArrayList<>()).add(i);
        }
        for(List<Integer> idx : x.values()){
            for(int i = 1; i<idx.size(); i++){
            union(idx.get(0),idx.get(i));
            }
            
        }
        for(List<Integer> idx:y.values()){
            for(int i = 1; i<idx.size(); i++){
                union(idx.get(0),idx.get(i));
            }
        }
        Map<Integer,Integer> map = new HashMap<>();
        for(int i  = 0; i<n ; i++){
            int p = find(i);
            map.put(p,size[p]);
        }
        List<Integer> list = new ArrayList<>(map.values());
        list.sort(Collections.reverseOrder());
        if(list.size()==1) return 1+list.get(0);
        else{
            return 1+ list.get(0)+list.get(1);
        }
        
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 483 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int solve(vector <int> v) {
        int n = v.size();
        vector <int> d(n - 1);
        for (int i = 0; i + 1 < n; i++) {
            d[i] = v[i + 1] - v[i];
        }
        n--;
        vector <int> nxt(n);
        for (int i = 0; i < n;) {
            int j = i;
            while (j + 1 < n && d[j + 1] == d[i]) j++;
            while (i <= j) {
                nxt[i] = j;
                i++;
            }
        }
        int ans = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int j = nxt[i];
            int cs = j - i + 1;
            if (j >= n - 2) {
                ans = max(ans, cs + n - j - 1);
            }
            else {
                int cur = d[j + 1] + d[j + 2];
                cs++;
                int x = d[i];
                cur -= x;
                if (cur == x) {
                    cs++;
                    if (j + 3 < n && d[j + 3] == x) {
                        int ind = j + 3;
                        cs += nxt[ind] - ind + 1;
                    }
                }
                ans = max(ans, cs);
            }
        }
        return ans + 1;
    }
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& v) {
        int ans = solve(v);
        reverse(v.begin(), v.end());
        ans = max(ans, solve(v));
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]

struct DSU{
      vector<int> sz, p;
      int cnt;
      DSU(int n){
         p = vector<int> (n);
         sz = vector<int> (n);
         for(int i = 0; i < n; i++){
             sz[i] = 1;
             p[i] = i;
         }
         cnt = n;
      }

      int get(int x){
          return (x == p[x] ? x : p[x] = get(p[x]));
      }

      bool same(int x, int y){
         return get(x) == get(y);
      }

      int size(int x){
         return sz[get(x)];
      }

      void merge(int x, int y){
          x = get(x), y = get(y);
          if(x == y){
             return;
          }
          cnt--;
          if(sz[x] > sz[y]){
             swap(x, y);
          }
          sz[y] += sz[x];
          p[x] = y;
      }
};
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& v) {
        int n = v.size();
        DSU d(n);
        map <int, int> x, y;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int a = v[i][0], b = v[i][1];
            x[a] = i;
            y[b] = i;
        }
        vector <int> fr;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int j = x[v[i][0]];
            d.merge(i, j);
            j = y[v[i][1]];
            d.merge(i, j);
        }
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int j = d.get(i);
            if (j != i) continue;
            fr.push_back(d.sz[i]);
        }
        sort(fr.rbegin(), fr.rend());
        if (fr.size() == 1) {
            return fr[0] + 1;
        }
        return fr[0] + fr[1] + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 484 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        vector<int> l(n, 2), r(n, 2);
        l[0] = r[n - 1] = 1;

        for (int i = 2; i < n; ++i) {
            if (nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]) {
                l[i] = l[i - 1] + 1;
            }
        }

        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; --i) {
            if (nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]) {
                r[i] = r[i + 1] + 1;
            }
        }

        int res = *max_element(l.begin(), l.end());

        for (int p = 0; p < n; ++p) {
            if (p > 0) res = max(res, l[p - 1] + 1);
            if (p + 1 < n) res = max(res, r[p + 1] + 1);

            if (p > 0 && p + 1 < n) {
                int gap = nums[p + 1] - nums[p - 1];
                if (gap % 2 != 0) continue;
                int d = gap / 2;
                int a = (l[p - 1] >= 2 && nums[p - 1] - nums[p - 2] != d) ? 1 : l[p - 1];
                int b = (r[p + 1] >= 2 && nums[p + 2] - nums[p + 1] != d) ? 1 : r[p + 1];
                res = max(res, a + 1 + b);
            }
        }
        return min(res, n);        
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
typedef long long ll;

class Solution {
public:
    unordered_map<ll, ll> parent, rnk;

    ll find(ll u) {
        if (!parent.count(u)) {
            parent[u] = u;
            rnk[u] = 0;
        }
        return parent[u] == u ? u : parent[u] = find(parent[u]);
    }

    void unite(ll u, ll v) {
        u = find(u);
        v = find(v);
        if (u == v) return;
        if (rnk[u] < rnk[v]) swap(u, v);
        parent[v] = u;
        if (rnk[u] == rnk[v]) ++rnk[u];
    }

    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        for (auto& p: points) {
            unite((ll)p[0] << 1, (ll)p[1] << 1 | 1);
        }

        unordered_map<ll, int> cnt;
        for (auto& p: points) {
            ++cnt[find((ll)p[0] << 1)];
        }

        int t1 = 0, t2 = 0;
        for (auto& [_, sz]: cnt) {
            if (sz > t1) {
                t2 = t1;
                t1 = sz;
            } else if (sz > t2) {
                t2 = sz;
            }
        }
        return t1 + t2 + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
from collections import defaultdict
from typing import List
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        sa=nums
        n=len(sa)
        if n<=3:
            return n
        d=[sa[i+1]-sa[i] for i in range(n-1)]
        nd=len(d)
        bd=defaultdict(list)
        st=0
        for i in range(1,nd):
            if d[i]!=d[i-1]:
                bd[d[st]].append((st,i-1))
                st=i
        bd[d[st]].append((st,nd-1))
        max_l=0
        for di,blocks in bd.items():
            for i,(L,R) in enumerate(blocks):
                curr_len=R-L+1

                if L>0 or R< nd-1:
                    max_l=max(max_l,curr_len+1)
                else:
                    max_l=max(max_l,curr_len)

                if L>=2 and d[L-2]+d[L-1]==2*di:
                    max_l=max(max_l,curr_len+2)
                if R<=nd-3 and d[R+1]+d[R+2]==2*di:
                    max_l=max(max_l,curr_len+2)
                if i< len(blocks)-1:
                     next_l,next_r=blocks[i+1]
                     if next_l-R==3:
                         if d[R+1]+d[R+2]==2*di:
                             mer=curr_len+2+(next_r-next_l+1)
                             max_l=max(max_l,mer)
        return max(3,max_l+1)
                             
                             
                     
                
                
                
        
        
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n=len(points)
        r=points
        parent=list(range(n))
        size=[1]*n
        def find(i):
            if parent[i]==i:
                return i
            parent[i]=find(parent[i])
            return parent[i]
        def union(i,j):
            root_i=find(i)
            root_j=find(j)
            if root_i!=root_j:
                if size[root_i]<size[root_j]:
                    root_i,root_j=root_j,root_i
                parent[root_j]=root_i
                size[root_i]+=size[root_j]

        x_dic={}
        y_dic={}
        for i in range(n):
            x,y=r[i]
            if x in x_dic:
                union(i,x_dic[x])
            if y in y_dic:
                union(i,y_dic[y])
            x_dic[x]=i
            y_dic[y]=i

        roots=set(find(i) for i in range(n))
        cz=sorted([size[root] for root in roots],reverse=True)
        if len(cz)>=2:
            return cz[0]+cz[1]+1
        return cz[0]+1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 486 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
  def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
    n = len(nums)
    if n <= 3:
      return n
    
    m = n - 1
    diff = [nums[i + 1] - nums[i] for i in range(m)]
    
    left = [1] * m
    for i in range(1, m):
      if diff[i] == diff[i - 1]:
        left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1
    
    right = [1] * m
    for i in range(m - 2, -1, -1):
      if diff[i] == diff[i + 1]:
        right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1
    
    ans = max(left) + 1
    ans = max(ans, right[1] + 2)
    ans = max(ans, left[m - 2] + 2)
    
    for i in range(1, n - 1):
      if i >= 2:
        ans = max(ans, left[i - 2] + 2)
      else:
        ans = max(ans, 3)
      
      if i + 1 < m:
        ans = max(ans, right[i + 1] + 2)
      else:
        ans = max(ans, 3)
      
      gap = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]
      if gap % 2 == 0:
        d = gap // 2
        l = left[i - 2] if i >= 2 and diff[i - 2] == d else 0
        r = right[i + 1] if i + 1 < m and diff[i + 1] == d else 0
        ans = max(ans, l + r + 3)
    
    return min(ans, n)
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU:
  def __init__(self, n: int) -> None:
    self.parent = list(range(n))
    self.size = [1] * n
  
  def find(self, x: int) -> int:
    while self.parent[x] != x:
      self.parent[x] = self.parent[self.parent[x]]
      x = self.parent[x]
    return x
  
  def union(self, a: int, b: int) -> None:
    ra, rb = self.find(a), self.find(b)
    if ra == rb:
      return
    
    if self.size[ra] < self.size[rb]:
      ra, rb = rb, ra
      
    self.parent[rb] = ra
    self.size[ra] += self.size[rb]


class Solution:
  def maxActivated(self, points: List[List[int]]) -> int:
    n = len(points)
    if n == 0:
      return 1
    
    xs, ys = {}, {}
    for x, y in points:
      if x not in xs:
        xs[x] = len(xs)
      if y not in ys:
        ys[y] = len(ys)
    
    x_cnt, y_cnt = len(xs), len(ys)
    dsu = DSU(x_cnt + y_cnt)
    
    for x, y in points:
      dsu.union(xs[x], x_cnt + ys[y])
    
    comp_points = {}
    for x, _ in points:
      root = dsu.find(xs[x])
      comp_points[root] = comp_points.get(root, 0) + 1
    
    sizes = sorted(comp_points.values(), reverse=True)
    if len(sizes) == 1:
      return sizes[0] + 1
    
    return sizes[0] + sizes[1] + 1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 487 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& a) {
        int n = (int)a.size();

        vector<int>L(n,2);
        vector<int>R(n,2);

        for(int i = 2 ; i < n ; i++) {
            if(a[i] - a[i-1] == a[i-1] - a[i-2]) {
                L[i] = L[i-1] + 1;
            }
        }

        for(int i = n-3 ; i >= 0 ; i--) {
            if(a[i+1] - a[i] == a[i+2] - a[i+1]) {
                R[i] = R[i+1] + 1;
            }
        }

        int ans = min(n,2);

        for(int i = 0 ; i < n ; i++) {
            ans = max(ans, L[i]);
        }
        ans = max(ans,R[1] + 1);
        ans = max(ans,L[n-2] + 1);
        for(int i = 1 ; i < n - 1 ; i++) {
            ans = max(ans,L[i-1] + 1);
            ans = max(ans,R[i+1] + 1);

            if((a[i-1] + a[i+1]) % 2 == 0) {
                int diff = (a[i+1] - a[i-1]) / 2;

                int l = 1;
                int r = 1;
                if(i-1 >= 1 && a[i-1] - a[i-2] == diff) {
                    l = L[i-1];
                }
                if(i+2 < n && a[i+2] - a[i+1] == diff) {
                    r = R[i+1];
                }
                ans = max(ans,l + 1 + r);
            }
        }
        return min(ans,n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
struct DSU {
	vector<int> e; DSU(int N) { e = vector<int>(N,-1); }
	int get(int x) { return e[x] < 0 ? x : e[x] = get(e[x]); } 
	bool sameSet(int a, int b) { return get(a) == get(b); }
	int size(int x) { return -e[get(x)]; }
	bool unite(int x, int y) { // union by size
		x = get(x), y = get(y); if (x == y) return 0;
		if (e[x] > e[y]) swap(x,y);
		e[x] += e[y]; e[y] = x; return 1;
	}
};
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& a) {
        int n = (int)a.size();
        DSU d(n+2);
        unordered_map<int,int>mx;
        unordered_map<int,int>my;
        for(int i = 0 ; i < n ; i++) {
            if(mx.find(a[i][0]) == mx.end()) {
                mx[a[i][0]] = i;
            }
            if(my.find(a[i][1]) == my.end()) {
                my[a[i][1]] = i;
            }
        }
        for(int i = 0 ; i < n ; i++) {
            int x = mx[a[i][0]];
            int y = my[a[i][1]];
            d.unite(x,y);
            d.unite(x,i);
            d.unite(y,i);
        }
        unordered_set<int>s;
        vector<int>b;
        for(int i = 0 ; i < n ; i++) {
            int p = d.get(i);
            if(s.find(p) == s.end()) {
                b.push_back(d.size(p));
                s.insert(p);
            }
            // cout << d.size(p) << ' ' << p << '\n';
        }
        sort(b.rbegin(),b.rend());
        int ans = 1;
        for(int i = 0 ; i < min((int)b.size() , 2) ; i++) {
            ans += b[i];
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 488 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:

        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 2:
            return n

        # diff array
        diff = [nums[i + 1] - nums[i] for i in range(n - 1)]
        m = n - 1

        # L[i] = length of equal-diff run ending at i
        L = [1] * m
        for i in range(1, m):
            if diff[i] == diff[i - 1]:
                L[i] = L[i - 1] + 1

        # R[i] = length of equal-diff run starting at i
        R = [1] * m
        for i in range(m - 2, -1, -1):
            if diff[i] == diff[i + 1]:
                R[i] = R[i + 1] + 1

        max_run = max(L)

        # Case 1: just extend the best existing arithmetic run by one element
        ans = min(n, max_run + 2)

        # Case 2: change an interior element nums[i] and try to merge left + right
        for i in range(1, n - 1):
            total = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]
            if total % 2 != 0:
                continue

            d = total // 2

            left_cnt = 0
            if i - 2 >= 0 and diff[i - 2] == d:
                left_cnt = L[i - 2]

            right_cnt = 0
            if i + 1 < m and diff[i + 1] == d:
                right_cnt = R[i + 1]

            # left_cnt diffs + 2 affected diffs + right_cnt diffs
            ans = max(ans, left_cnt + right_cnt + 3)

        return min(ans, n)
        
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    '''
    
    '''
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        x_id = {}
        y_id = {}

        for x, y in points:
            if x not in x_id:
                x_id[x] = len(x_id)
            if y not in y_id:
                y_id[y] = len(y_id)

        X = len(x_id)
        Y = len(y_id)

        parent = list(range(X + Y))
        size = [1] * (X + Y)

        def find(x):
            while parent[x] != x:
                parent[x] = parent[parent[x]]
                x = parent[x]
            return x

        def union(a, b):
            ra, rb = find(a), find(b)
            if ra == rb:
                return
            if size[ra] < size[rb]:
                ra, rb = rb, ra
            parent[rb] = ra
            size[ra] += size[rb]

        for x, y in points:
            union(x_id[x], X + y_id[y])

        comp = defaultdict(int)
        for x, y in points:
            root = find(x_id[x])
            comp[root] += 1

        sizes = sorted(comp.values(), reverse=True)

        if len(sizes) == 1:
            return sizes[0] + 1

        return sizes[0] + sizes[1] + 1
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 3:
            return n

        d = [nums[i + 1] - nums[i] for i in range(n - 1)]
        l = len(d)

        le = [1] * l
        for i in range(1, l):
            if d[i] == d[i - 1]:
                le[i] = le[i - 1] + 1
        r = [1] * l
        for i in range(l - 2,-1, -1):
            if d[i] == d[i + 1]:
                r[i] = r[i + 1] + 1

        ml = 0
        for i in range(l):
            ml = max(ml, min(l , le[i]+ 1))
            

        for i in range(1, n - 1):
            td = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]

            if td % 2 == 0:
                e = td // 2
                cdl = 2

                if i - 2 >= 0 and d[i - 2] == e:
                    cdl += le[i - 2]

                if i + 1 < l and d[i + 1] == e:
                    cdl += r[i + 1]

                ml = max(ml, cdl)
        return ml + 1
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)

        pa = list(range(n))
        s = [1] * n

        def findd(i: int) -> int:
            if pa[i] == i:
                return i
            pa[i] = findd(pa[i])
            return pa[i]

        def unon(i: int , j: int):
            r_i = findd(i)
            r_j = findd(j)

            if r_i != r_j:

                if s[r_i] < s[r_j]:
                    r_i, r_j = r_j, r_i
                pa[r_j] =r_i
                s[r_i] += s[r_j]

        x_ma = {}
        y_ma = {}

        for i in range(n):
            x , y = points[i]
            if x in x_ma:
                 unon(i , x_ma[x])
            else:
                 x_ma[x] = i
            if y in y_ma:
                 unon(i , y_ma[y])
            else:
                 y_ma[y] = i
        cs =[]
        for i in range(n):
            if pa[i] == i:
              cs.append(s[i])
        
        cs.sort(reverse = True)

        if len(cs) == 1:
            return cs[0] + 1
        else:
            return cs[0] + cs[1] + 1

[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n=len(nums)
        lft=[defaultdict(lambda:1) for _ in range(n)]
        rgt=[defaultdict(lambda:1) for _ in range(n)]
        for i in range(1,n):
            d=nums[i]-nums[i-1]
            lft[i][d]=lft[i-1][d]+1
            j=n-1-i
            d=nums[j+1]-nums[j]
            rgt[j][d]=rgt[j+1][d]+1
        ans=0
        for i in range(n):
            diff=set(lft[i-1].keys()) | set(rgt[i+1].keys()) if 0<i<n-1 else set()
            if i==0:
                for d in rgt[i+1]: ans=max(ans,rgt[i+1][d]+1)
            elif i==n-1:
                for d in lft[i-1]: ans=max(ans,lft[i-1][d]+1)
            else:
                if (nums[i+1]-nums[i-1])%2==0:
                    d=(nums[i+1]-nums[i-1])//2
                    ans=max(ans,rgt[i+1][d]+lft[i-1][d]+1)
                for d in lft[i-1]: ans=max(ans,lft[i-1][d]+1)
                for d in rgt[i+1]: ans=max(ans,rgt[i+1][d]+1)
        return ans
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n=len(points)
        parent=list(range(n))
        def find(i):
            if parent[i]==i: return i
            parent[i]=find(parent[i])
            return parent[i]
        def union(i,j):
            root_i,root_j=find(i),find(j)
            if root_i!=root_j: parent[root_i]=root_j
        x_map,y_map={},{}
        for i,(x,y) in enumerate(points):
            if x in x_map: union(i,x_map[x])
            x_map[x]=i
            if y in y_map: union(i,y_map[y])
            y_map[y]=i

        sizes={}
        for i in range(n):
            root=find(i)
            sizes[root]=sizes.get(root,0)+1
        c=sorted(sizes.values(),reverse=True)
        if len(c)>=2:
            return c[0]+c[1]+1
        else:
            return c[0]+1

[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 2) return n;
    
        // L[i][d] 代表以 i 結尾，公差為 d 的左延伸長度
        // R[i][d] 代表以 i 開始，公差為 d 的右延伸長度
        vector<unordered_map<int, int>> L(n), R(n);
    
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            if (i > 0) {
                int d = nums[i] - nums[i-1];
                L[i][d] = L[i-1].count(d) ? L[i-1][d] + 1 : 2;
            }
        }
    
        for (int i = n - 1; i >= 0; --i) {
            if (i < n - 1) {
                int d = nums[i+1] - nums[i];
                R[i][d] = R[i+1].count(d) ? R[i+1][d] + 1 : 2;
            }
        }
    
        int ans = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            // 1. 不修改 nums[i]，取左右延伸的最大值
            for (auto const& [d, len] : L[i]) ans = max(ans, len);
            for (auto const& [d, len] : R[i]) ans = max(ans, len);
    
            // 2. 假設修改 nums[i]
            // 情況 A：接在左邊後面，長度為 L[i-1][d] + 1
            if (i > 0) {
                for (auto const& [d, len] : L[i-1]) ans = max(ans, len + 1);
            }
            // 情況 B：接在右邊前面，長度為 R[i+1][d] + 1
            if (i < n - 1) {
                for (auto const& [d, len] : R[i+1]) ans = max(ans, len + 1);
            }
            // 情況 C：關鍵！橋接左右。判斷 nums[i-1] 和 nums[i+1] 能否形成差為 d 的序列
            if (i > 0 && i < n - 1) {
                if ((nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) % 2 == 0) {
                    int d = (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) / 2;
                    int left_len = (L[i-1].count(d)) ? L[i-1][d] : 1;
                    int right_len = (R[i+1].count(d)) ? R[i+1][d] : 1;
                    ans = max(ans, left_len + 1 + right_len);
                }
            }
        }
        
        // 還有一個邊際情況：修改頭或尾，至少長度是左/右最長 + 1
        return ans;
    }
    
    // int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
    //     int n = nums.size();
    //     if (n<=3) return n;

    //     int ans = 0;
        
    //     vector<map<int, int>> dp(n);
    //     for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
    //         for (int j = 0; j < i; ++j) {
    //             int d = nums[i] - nums[j];
    //             dp[i][d] = max(dp[i][d], (dp[j].count(d) ? dp[j][d] : 1) + 1);
    //             ans = max(ans, dp[i][d]);
    //         }
    //     }
        
    //     return ans;
    // }
};

[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    // 這題我不會 DSU ，要再去學
class DSU {
public:
    vector<int> parent;
    vector<int> sz;
    DSU(int n) {
        parent.resize(n);
        iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0);
        sz.assign(n, 1);
    }
    int find(int i) {
        if (parent[i] == i) return i;
        return parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
    }
    void unite(int i, int j) {
        int root_i = find(i);
        int root_j = find(j);
        if (root_i != root_j) {
            if (sz[root_i] < sz[root_j]) swap(root_i, root_j);
            parent[root_j] = root_i;
            sz[root_i] += sz[root_j];
        }
    }
};
    
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        if (n == 0) return 1;

        DSU dsu(n);
        unordered_map<int, int> last_x, last_y;

        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];
            if (last_x.count(x)) dsu.unite(i, last_x[x]);
            if (last_y.count(y)) dsu.unite(i, last_y[y]);
            last_x[x] = i;
            last_y[y] = i;
        }

        vector<int> componentSizes;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            if (dsu.parent[i] == i) {
                componentSizes.push_back(dsu.sz[i]);
            }
        }

        sort(componentSizes.rbegin(), componentSizes.rend());

        // 如果只有一個連通分量，答案就是這個分量 + 1 (新點)
        if (componentSizes.size() == 1) {
            return componentSizes[0] + 1;
        } 
        
        // 如果有多個，則取最大的兩個合併，再加新點
        // 注意：這裡假設我們一定能找到一個 (x, y) 同時連結這兩個分量
        // 因為座標是無限的，我們一定可以選一個分量 A 的 x 和分量 B 的 y 組合出新點
        return componentSizes[0] + componentSizes[1] + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        return max(self.calc(nums), self.calc(nums[::-1]))
    def calc(self, nums:list[int]) -> int:
        # two loop
        # outer loop find the i
        # diff = nums[i+1]-nums[i]
        # while nums[j]-nums[i-1]==diff, j+=1
            # find first j, change we change j to make it longer

        # 
        
        # change jj=j
            # if jj+1 <n and nums[jj-1] - nums[jj+1] == 2*diff, then j= j+2
        # ans = max(ans, jj-i)
        #i=j
        n=len(nums)
        i=0
        ans = 1
        while i<n and i+1 < n:
            j=i+1
            diff = nums[j]-nums[i]
            # extend
            while j< n and nums[j]-nums[j-1]==diff:
                j+=1
            # now we got j
            # ans is latest (j-i+1) while j=min(j, n-1)
            ans = max(ans, min(j, n-1)-i+1)
            # now let's check if it can connect
            jj=j
            # can change jj able to connect jj+1
            if jj+1<n and  nums[jj+1]-nums[jj-1]==2*diff:
                jj+=2
            # print(jj,j,i, diff)
            while jj<n and nums[jj]-nums[jj-1]==diff:
                jj+=1
            ans = max(ans, jj-i)

            i=j-1
        return ans 
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        parent = [i for i in range(n)]
        def union(id1:int, id2:int)-> None:
            pid1, pid2 = find(id1), find(id2)
            if pid1==pid2: return 
            pid1,pid2 = min(pid1,pid2), max(pid1,pid2)
            parent[pid2]=pid1
            
        def find(id1:int)-> int:
            if id1!= parent[id1]:
                parent[id1] = find(parent[id1])
            return parent[id1]


        xPointMap , yPointMap = defaultdict(set),  defaultdict(set) # x, y maps to index
        for i, (x, y) in enumerate(points):
            xPointMap[x].add(i)
            yPointMap[y].add(i)

        # join 
        for arr in xPointMap.values():
            for a, b in pairwise(arr):
                union(a,b)

        for arr in yPointMap.values():
            for a, b in pairwise(arr):
                union(a,b)

        groups = sorted(Counter([find(i) for i in range(n)]).values())
        if len(groups)==1:
            return n+1
        return 1+sum(groups[-2:])
        
            
[Q4_END]

### RANK 493 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        int ans = 2;
        int[] pre = new int[n];
        int[] post = new int[n];

        pre[0] = 1;
        pre[1] = 2;

        for(int i=2; i<n; i++){
            if(nums[i]-nums[i-1] == nums[i-1]-nums[i-2])
                pre[i] = pre[i-1]+1;
            else
                pre[i] = 2;
        }

        post[n-1] = 1;
        post[n-2] = 2;

        for(int i=n-3; i>=0;i--){
            if(nums[i+1]-nums[i] == nums[i+2]-nums[i+1])
                post[i] = post[i+1]+1;
            else
                post[i] = 2;
        }
        
        ans = Math.max(pre[n-2], post[1]) + 1;

        for(int i=1; i+1<n; i++){
            if(i-1 == 0){
                int diff = nums[i+1]-nums[i+2];
                int maxSeq = post[i+1]+1;
                if(nums[i-1]-nums[i+1] == 2*diff)
                    maxSeq++;
                ans = Math.max(ans, maxSeq);
            }else if(i+1 == n-1){
                int diff = nums[i-2]-nums[i-1];
                int maxSeq = pre[i-1]+1;
                if(nums[i-1]-nums[i+1] == 2*diff)
                    maxSeq++;
                ans = Math.max(ans, maxSeq);
            }else{
                int lDiff = nums[i-2]-nums[i-1];
                int rDiff = nums[i+1]-nums[i+2];
                int maxSeq = 0;
                if(lDiff == rDiff && nums[i-1]-nums[i+1] == 2*lDiff)
                    maxSeq = pre[i-1] + post[i+1] + 1;
                else if(nums[i-1]-nums[i+1] == 2*lDiff)
                    maxSeq = pre[i-1] + 2;
                else if(nums[i-1]-nums[i+1] == 2*rDiff)
                    maxSeq = post[i+1] + 2;
                else
                    maxSeq = Math.max(pre[i-1], post[i+1]) + 1;
                ans = Math.max(ans, maxSeq);
            }
        }

        return ans;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        if(n == 1)
            return 2;
        Map<Integer, Integer> idxMap = new HashMap<>();

        AtomicInteger idx = new AtomicInteger(0);
        DSU dsu = new DSU(n);

        Map<Integer, Integer> xMap = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Integer> yMap = new HashMap<>();

        for(int i=0; i<n; i++){
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];
            
            if(xMap.containsKey(x)){
                dsu.union(i, xMap.get(x));
            }else{
                xMap.put(x, i);
            }
            
            if(yMap.containsKey(y)){
                dsu.union(i, yMap.get(y));
            }else{
                yMap.put(y, i);
            }
        }
        int[] freq = new int[n];

        for(int i=0; i<n; i++){
            freq[dsu.find(i)]++;
        }

        Arrays.sort(freq);

        return freq[n-1]+freq[n-2]+1;
    }

    class DSU{
        int[] parent;
        int[] rank;

        public DSU(int n){
            parent = new int[n];
            rank = new int[n];

            for(int i=0; i<n; i++)
                parent[i] = i;
            
        }

        public int find(int u){
            if(parent[u] != u)
                parent[u] = find(parent[u]);

            return parent[u];
        }

        public void union(int u, int v){
            int rootU = find(u);
            int rootV = find(v);

            if(rootU == rootV)
                return;

            if(rank[rootU] > rank[rootV]){
                parent[rootV] = rootU;
            }else if(rank[rootU] < rank[rootV]){
                parent[rootU] = rootV;
            }else{
                parent[rootV] = rootU;
                rank[rootU]++;
            }
        }
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 494 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 2:
            return n
        
        L = [1] * n
        L[1] = 2
        for i in range(2, n):
            if nums[i] - nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]:
                L[i] = L[i-1] + 1
            else:
                L[i] = 2
        
        R = [1] * n
        R[n-2] = 2
        for i in range(n-3, -1, -1):
            if nums[i+1] - nums[i] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]:
                R[i] = R[i+1] + 1
            else:
                R[i] = 2
                
        ans = 0
        for i in range(n):
            if L[i] > ans: ans = L[i]
            if R[i] > ans: ans = R[i]
            
        if ans < n:
            ans += 1
            
        for i in range(1, n-1):
            diff = nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]
            if diff % 2 == 0:
                step = diff // 2
                l = L[i-1] if (i >= 2 and nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == step) else 1
                r = R[i+1] if (i <= n-3 and nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == step) else 1
                if l + r + 1 > ans:
                    ans = l + r + 1
        
        return ans
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
from collections import defaultdict

class DSU:
    def __init__(self, n):
        self.parent = list(range(n))
        self.size = [1]*n

    def find(self,x):
        root = x
        while self.parent[root] != root:
            root = self.parent[root]
        
        while self.parent[x] != root:
            next_n = self.parent[x]
            self.parent[x] = root
            x = next_n
        return root

    def union(self,a,b):
        pa = self.find(a)
        pb = self.find(b)
    
        if pa == pb:
            return
    
        if pa != pb:
            if self.size[pa] < self.size[pb]:
                pa, pb = pb, pa
            self.parent[pb] = pa
            self.size[pa] += self.size[pb]


class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        dsu = DSU(n)

        xmap = {}
        ymap = {}

        for i,(x,y) in enumerate(points):

            if x in xmap:
                dsu.union(i,xmap[x])
            xmap[x] = i

            if y in ymap:
                dsu.union(i,ymap[y])
            ymap[y] = i

        size = [dsu.size[i] for i in range(n) if dsu.parent[i] == i]
        size.sort(reverse=True)

        ans = size[0]+1
        if len(size) > 1:
            ans += size[1]

        return ans
[Q4_END]

### RANK 495 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        res = 3
        
        if n<=3:
            return n
        dp = [nums[i+1]-nums[i] for i in range(n-1)]
        m = len(dp)

        l = [1]*m
        for i in range(1,m):
            if dp[i] == dp[i-1]:
                l[i] = l[i-1]+1

        r = [1]*m
        for i in range(m-2,-1,-1):
            if dp[i] == dp[i+1]:
                r[i] = r[i+1]+1

        for i in range(m):
            left = l[i]
            start = i-left+1
            end = i
            base = 1 if (start >0 or end <m-1) else 0
            res = max(res, left+1+base)

        for i in range(m-1):
            if (dp[i]+dp[i+1])%2 ==0:
                d = (dp[i]+dp[i+1])//2
                dis1 = l[i-1] if i >0 and dp[i-1] ==d else 0
                dis2 = r[i+2] if i+2<m and dp[i+2] ==d else 0
                res = max(res, dis1+dis2+3)
        return res
                
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        p = list(range(len(points)))
        size = [1]*(len(points))

        def find(i):
            while i != p[i]:
                p[i] = p[p[i]]
                i = p[i]
            return i

        def union(i,j):
            ri, rj = find(i), find(j)
            if ri == rj:
                return
            if size[ri] < size[rj]:
                ri, rj = rj ,ri
            p[rj] = ri
            size[ri] += size[rj]

        x_grp: dict[int, int] = {}
        y_grp: dict[int, int] = {}
        existing: set[tuple] = set(map(tuple, points))

        for idx in range(len(points)):
            x,y = points[idx]
            if x in x_grp:
                union(idx, x_grp[x])
            else:
                x_grp[x] = idx
            if y in y_grp:
                union(idx, y_grp[y])
            else:
                y_grp[y] = idx

        Y: dict[int, list[int]] = collections.defaultdict(list)
        for a, b in y_grp.items():
            Y[find(b)].append(a)

        top = sorted(((root, size[root]) for root in Y), key=lambda kv: -kv[1])[:2]

        res =1 

        for a in x_grp.values():
            res = max(res, 1+size[find(a)])
        for b in y_grp.values():
            res = max(res, 1+size[find(b)])

        for x_c,x_r in x_grp.items():
            x_root = find(x_r)
            x_size = size[x_root]

            for y_root,y_size in top:
                flag = any((x_c, y_c) not in existing for y_c in Y[y_root])
                if not flag:
                    continue
                if y_root!=x_root:
                    res = max(res, 1+x_size+y_size)
                else:
                    res = max(res, 1+x_size)
                break
        return res
    
        
                
[Q4_END]

class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int res = 0;
        int i = 0;
        while (i + 1 < nums.length) {
            int j = i + 1;
            int d = nums[i] - nums[j];
            while (j + 1 < nums.length && nums[j] - nums[j + 1] == d) {
                j++;
            }
            res = Math.max(res, j - i + 1);
            if (j + 1 < nums.length) {
                int pre = nums[j + 1];
                int preJ = j + 1;
                nums[j + 1] = nums[j] - d;
                while (j + 1 < nums.length && nums[j] - nums[j + 1] == d) {
                    j++;
                }
                res = Math.max(res, j - i + 1);
                nums[preJ] = pre;
                i = preJ - 1;
            } else {
                i = j;
            }
        }
        i = nums.length - 1;
        while (i > 0) {
            int j = i - 1;
            int d = nums[i] - nums[j];
            while (j - 1 >= 0 && nums[j] - nums[j - 1] == d) {
                j--;
            }
            res = Math.max(res, i - j + 1);
            if (j > 0) {
                int pre = nums[j - 1];
                int preJ = j - 1;
                nums[j - 1] = nums[j] - d;
                while (j - 1 >= 0 && nums[j] - nums[j - 1] == d) {
                    j--;
                }
                res = Math.max(res, i - j + 1);
                nums[preJ] = pre;
                i = preJ + 1;
            } else {
                i = j;
            }
        }
        return res;
    }
}

[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        // <coordinate, root>
        var m = new HashMap<Long, Long>();
        for (var p : points) {
            long r = (long) p[0];
            var rootR = getRoot(m, r);
            long c = (long) p[1] + 3_000_000_000L;
            var rootC = getRoot(m, c);
            if (rootR != null && rootC != null) {
                m.put(r, rootR);
                m.put(rootC, rootR);
            } else if (rootR != null) {
                m.put(c, rootR);
            } else if (rootC != null) {
                m.put(r, rootC);
            } else {
                m.put(r, r);
                m.put(c, r);
            }
        }
        var cm = new HashMap<Long, Integer>();
        for (var p : points) {
            cm.merge(getRoot(m, (long) p[0]), 1, Integer::sum);
            cm.merge(getRoot(m, (long) p[1] + 3_000_000_000L), 1, Integer::sum);
        }
        var a = new ArrayList<>(cm.values());
        Collections.sort(a);
        if (a.size() == 1) {
            return a.get(0) / 2 + 1;
        }
        return a.get(a.size() - 1) / 2 + a.get(a.size() - 2) / 2 + 1;
    }

    private Long getRoot(Map<Long, Long> m, long u) {
        if (m.get(u) == null) {
            return null;
        }
        var root = u; 
        while (root != m.get(root)) {
            root = m.get(root);
        }
        while (u != m.get(u)) {
            var t = m.get(u);
            m.put(u, root);
            u = t;
        }
        return root;
    }}
[Q4_END]

class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
                int m = n-1;

        
        int diff[] = new int[m];
        int prefix[] = new int[m];
        int suffix[] = new int[m];
        prefix[0] = 1;
        suffix[m-1] = 1;
        for(int i = 0;i<n-1;i++) diff[i] = nums[i+1]-nums[i];

        for(int i = 1;i<m;i++){
            if(diff[i]==diff[i-1]){
                prefix[i] = prefix[i-1]+1;
            }
            else prefix[i] = 1;
            
        }
        for(int i = m-2;i>=0;i--){
            if(diff[i]==diff[i+1]) suffix[i] = suffix[i+1]+1;
            else suffix[i] = 1;
            
        }
        int max= 0;

        for(int i = 0;i<m;i++){
            int l  = prefix[i];
            if(i==m-1 ||diff[i]!=diff[i+1]){
                max = Math.max(max,l);
                if(l<m) max = Math.max(max,l+1);
            }
        
        }
        for(int i = 0;i<m-1;i++){
            int sum = diff[i]+diff[i+1];
            int half = sum/2;
            if(sum%2!=0) continue;
            int l = 0;
            int r = 0;
            if(i>=1 && diff[i-1]==half) l=prefix[i-1];
            else l = 0;
            if(i<m-2 && diff[i+2]==half) r = suffix[i+2];
            else r= 0;
            max = Math.max(max,l+r+2);
            
        }
        return max+1;
        
        
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    int []p;
    int []rank;
    
    void dsu(int i,int j){
        int parenti = find(i);
        int parentj = find(j);

        if(parenti!=parentj){
            p[parenti] = parentj;
            rank[parentj]+=rank[parenti];
            
        }
    
    }
    int find(int a){
        if(p[a]==a) return a;
        return p[a] = find(p[a]);
    }
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        p = new int[n];
        rank = new int[n];

        for(int i =0;i<n;i++){
            p[i] = i;
            rank [i] = 1;
            
        }
        
        Map<Integer,Integer> xm = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer,Integer> ym = new HashMap<>();
        for(int i = 0;i<n;i++){
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];
            if(xm.containsKey(x)) dsu(i,xm.get(x));
            else xm.put(x,i);
            if(ym.containsKey(y)) dsu(i,ym.get(y));
            else ym.put(y,i);
            
        }
        List<Integer> res = new ArrayList<>();
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            if(p[i]==i) res.add(rank[i]);
        }
        Collections.sort(res);
        Collections.reverse(res);

        if(res.size()>=2) return res.get(0)+res.get(1)+1;
         return res.get(0)+1;
        

    }
}

[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        diff = []
        for i in range(n - 1):
            diff.append(nums[i + 1] - nums[i])
        # print(diff)

        i = ans = 0
        while i < n - 1:
            start = i
            # print(start)
            # 连续差值相同数组长度 + 至少能修改一个
            d = diff[i]
            while i < n - 1 and diff[i] == d:
                i += 1
            # print(i)
            ans = max(ans, i - start + 2)

            # 如果当前差值和后面都对不上，看看修改 nums[i] 能不能和后面续上
            if i - start == 1 and i < n - 2 and nums[i + 1] - nums[start] == diff[i + 1] * 2:
                tmp = i + 1
                d_ = diff[i + 1]
                while tmp < n - 1 and nums[tmp + 1] - nums[tmp] == d_:
                    tmp += 1
                # print("1", tmp)
                ans = max(ans, tmp - start + 1)

            # 看看修改 nums[i+1] 能不能和后面续上
            if i < n - 2 and nums[i + 2] - nums[i] == d * 2:
                tmp = i + 2
                while tmp < n - 1 and nums[tmp + 1] - nums[tmp] == d:
                    tmp += 1
                # print("2", tmp)
                ans = max(ans, tmp - start + 1)
            # print(ans)
            # print()

        return min(n, ans)
[Q3_END]

### RANK 499 ###
[Q3_START]
func longestArithmetic(nums []int) int {
    n := len(nums)
    l := make([]int, n)
    diffL := make([]int, n)
    l[0] = 1
    for i := 1; i < n; i++ {
        diffL[i] = nums[i] - nums[i-1]
        if i > 1 && diffL[i] == diffL[i-1] {
            l[i] = l[i-1] + 1
        } else {
            l[i] = 2
        }
    }
    r := make([]int, n)
    diffR := make([]int, n)
    r[n-1] = 1
    for i := n - 2; i >= 0; i-- {
        diffR[i] = nums[i+1] - nums[i]
        if i < n-2 && diffR[i] == diffR[i+1] {
            r[i] = r[i+1] + 1
        } else {
            r[i] = 2
        }
    }
    res := 0
    for i := 0; i < n; i++ {
        if l[i] > res {
            res = l[i]
        }
    }
    for i := 0; i < n; i++ {
        if i == 0 {
            if r[1]+1 > res {
                res = r[1] + 1
            }
        } else if i == n-1 {
            if l[n-2]+1 > res {
                res = l[n-2] + 1
            }
        } else {
            if l[i-1]+1 > res {
                res = l[i-1] + 1
            }
            if r[i+1]+1 > res {
                res = r[i+1] + 1
            }
            d2 := nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]
            if d2%2 == 0 {
                d := d2 / 2
                curr := 1
                if i > 1 && diffL[i-1] == d {
                    curr += l[i-1]
                } else {
                    curr += 1
                }
                if i < n-2 && diffR[i+1] == d {
                    curr += r[i+1]
                } else {
                    curr += 1
                }
                if curr > res {
                    res = curr
                }
            }
        }
    }
    return res
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
import "sort"

func maxActivated(points [][]int) int {
    n := len(points)
    par := make([]int, n)
    sz := make([]int, n)
    for i := 0; i < n; i++ {
        par[i] = i
        sz[i] = 1
    }
    xMap := make(map[int]int)
    yMap := make(map[int]int)
    for i, p := range points {
        x, y := p[0], p[1]
        if firstIdx, ok := xMap[x]; ok {
            rootI := firstIdx
            for par[rootI] != rootI {
                rootI = par[rootI]
            }
            currI := firstIdx
            for par[currI] != rootI {
                next := par[currI]
                par[currI] = rootI
                currI = next
            }
            rootJ := i
            for par[rootJ] != rootJ {
                rootJ = par[rootJ]
            }
            currJ := i
            for par[currJ] != rootJ {
                next := par[currJ]
                par[currJ] = rootJ
                currJ = next
            }
            if rootI != rootJ {
                if sz[rootI] < sz[rootJ] {
                    par[rootI] = rootJ
                    sz[rootJ] += sz[rootI]
                } else {
                    par[rootJ] = rootI
                    sz[rootI] += sz[rootJ]
                }
            }
        } else {
            xMap[x] = i
        }
        if firstIdx, ok := yMap[y]; ok {
            rootI := firstIdx
            for par[rootI] != rootI {
                rootI = par[rootI]
            }
            currI := firstIdx
            for par[currI] != rootI {
                next := par[currI]
                par[currI] = rootI
                currI = next
            }
            rootJ := i
            for par[rootJ] != rootJ {
                rootJ = par[rootJ]
            }
            currJ := i
            for par[currJ] != rootJ {
                next := par[currJ]
                par[currJ] = rootJ
                currJ = next
            }
            if rootI != rootJ {
                if sz[rootI] < sz[rootJ] {
                    par[rootI] = rootJ
                    sz[rootJ] += sz[rootI]
                } else {
                    par[rootJ] = rootI
                    sz[rootI] += sz[rootJ]
                }
            }
        } else {
            yMap[y] = i
        }
    }
    compSizes := make(map[int]int)
    for i := 0; i < n; i++ {
        root := i
        for par[root] != root {
            root = par[root]
        }
        curr := i
        for par[curr] != root {
            next := par[curr]
            par[curr] = root
            curr = next
        }
        compSizes[root]++
    }
    sizes := make([]int, 0, len(compSizes))
    for _, s := range compSizes {
        sizes = append(sizes, s)
    }
    sort.Sort(sort.Reverse(sort.IntSlice(sizes)))
    if len(sizes) >= 2 {
        return sizes[0] + sizes[1] + 1
    }
    return sizes[0] + 1
}

[Q3_START]
/**
 * @param {number[]} nums
 * @return {number}
 */
var longestArithmetic = function(nums) {
    const exec = () => {
        let p = 1, c = 0, ans = 0
        for (let i = 1; i < nums.length; i += 1) {
            let np = 0
            let nc = 0
            if (p === 1) {
                np = 2
            } else {
                const d = nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]
                if (nums[i - 1] + d === nums[i]) {
                    np = p + 1
                } else {
                    np = 2
                    nc = p + 1
                }
            }
            if (c) {
                const d = nums[i - c + 1] - nums[i - c]
                if (nums[i - c] + c * d === nums[i]) {
                    nc = Math.max(nc, c + 1)
                } else {
                    nc = Math.max(nc, 0)
                }
            }
            p = np
            c = nc
            // console.log(nums[i] - nums[i - 1], p, c)
            ans = Math.max(ans, p, c)
        }
        return ans
    }
    let ans = exec()
    nums.reverse()
    ans = Math.max(ans, exec())
    return ans
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class UnionFind {
    constructor(size) {
      this.f = new Array(size).fill(0).map((v, i) => i);
      this.sizes = new Array(size).fill(0);
    }
    find(x) {
      if (this.f[x] === x) return x;
      // compact path
      this.f[x] = this.find(this.f[x]);
      return this.f[x];
    }
    merge(x, y) {
      const fx = this.find(x),
        fy = this.find(y);
      if (fx !== fy) {
        if (this.sizes[fx] > this.sizes[fy]) {
          this.f[fy] = fx;
          this.sizes[fx] += this.sizes[fy];
        } else {
          this.f[fx] = fy;
          this.sizes[fy] += this.sizes[fx];
        }
      }
      return [fx, fy];
    }
    move(x, y) {
      const fx = this.find(x),
        fy = this.find(y);
      if (fx === fy) return;
      this.f[x] = fy;
      this.sizes[fx] -= 1;
      this.sizes[fy] += 1;
    }
    erase(x) {
      this.sizes[this.find(x)] -= 1;
      this.f[x] = x;
    }
  }

/**
 * @param {number[][]} points
 * @return {number}
 */
var maxActivated = function(points) {
    const uf = new UnionFind(points.length)
    const xm = {}, ym = {}
    points.forEach(([x, y], i) => {
        if (xm[x] !== undefined) {
            uf.merge(i, xm[x])
        } else {
            xm[x] = i
        }
        if (ym[y] !== undefined) {
            uf.merge(i, ym[y])
        } else {
            ym[y] = i
        }
    })
    const gs = {}
    for (let i = 0; i < points.length; i += 1) {
        const p = uf.find(i)
        if (!gs[p]) gs[p] = []
        gs[p].push(i)
    }
    let m1 = 0, m2 = 0
    Object.values(gs).forEach(arr => {
        if (arr.length >= m1) {
            [m1, m2] = [arr.length, m1]
            return
        }
        if (arr.length >= m2) {
            m2 = arr.length
        }
    })
    const ans = m1 + m2 + 1
    return ans
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 501 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        diff = [nums[i+1] - nums[i] for i in range(n-1)]
        m = len(diff)
        
        left_dp = [1] * m
        for i in range(1, m):
            left_dp[i] = left_dp[i-1] + 1 if diff[i] == diff[i-1] else 1
        
        right_dp = [1] * m
        for i in range(m-2, -1, -1):
            right_dp[i] = right_dp[i+1] + 1 if diff[i] == diff[i+1] else 1
        
        max_len = max(left_dp) + 1
        
        max_len = max(max_len, right_dp[1] + 2)
        max_len = max(max_len, left_dp[m-2] + 2)
        
        for k in range(1, n-1):
            if k + 1 < m:
                max_len = max(max_len, right_dp[k+1] + 2)
            
            if k - 2 >= 0:
                max_len = max(max_len, left_dp[k-2] + 2)
            
            sum_diff = nums[k+1] - nums[k-1]
            if sum_diff % 2 != 0:
                continue
            target_d = sum_diff // 2
            
            left_len = left_dp[k-2] if (k-2 >= 0 and diff[k-2] == target_d) else 0
            right_len = right_dp[k+1] if (k+1 < m and diff[k+1] == target_d) else 0
            
            current = (left_len + 2 + right_len) + 1
            max_len = max(max_len, current)
        
        return min(max_len, n)
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class UnionFind:
    def __init__(self):
        self.parent = dict()
    
    def find(self, x):
        if x not in self.parent:
            self.parent[x] = x
        if self.parent[x] != x:
            self.parent[x] = self.find(self.parent[x])
        return self.parent[x]
    
    def union(self, x, y):
        x_root = self.find(x)
        y_root = self.find(y)
        if x_root != y_root:
            self.parent[y_root] = x_root
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        OFFSET = 10**9 + 1
        uf = UnionFind()
        
        for x, y in points:
            uf.union(x, y + OFFSET)
        
        comp_size = dict()
        for x, y in points:
            root = uf.find(x)
            comp_size[root] = comp_size.get(root, 0) + 1
        
        sizes = sorted(comp_size.values(), reverse=True)
        
        if len(sizes) == 1:
            return sizes[0] + 1
        else:
            return sizes[0] + sizes[1] + 1
[Q4_END]
