### RANK 585 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 2) return n;
        
        vector<int> diff;
        for (int i = 1; i < n; i++) {
            diff.push_back(nums[i - 1] - nums[i]);
        }

        vector<int> left(n - 1, 1);
        vector<int> right(n - 1, 1);
        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++) {
            if (diff[i] == diff[i - 1]) {
                left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1;
            }
        }

        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (diff[i] == diff[i + 1]) {
                right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1;
            }
        }
        
        int ans = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) {
            ans = max(ans, min(n, left[i] + 2));
        }
        
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 2; i++) {
            int sum = diff[i] + diff[i + 1];
            if (sum % 2 == 0) {
                int target = sum / 2;
                int len = 2;
                if (i > 0 && diff[i - 1] == target) {
                    len += left[i - 1];
                }
                if (i + 2 < n - 1 && diff[i + 2] == target) {
                    len += right[i + 2];
                }
                ans = max(ans, len + 1);
            }
        }

        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        
        unordered_map<int, vector<int>> x_graph;
        unordered_map<int, vector<int>> y_graph;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            x_graph[points[i][0]].push_back(i);
            y_graph[points[i][1]].push_back(i);
        }

        vector<bool> visited(n, false);
        int max1 = 0;
        int max2 = 0;

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (!visited[i]) {
                int size = 0;
                queue<int> q;
                q.push(i);
                visited[i] = true;

                while (!q.empty()) {
                    int idx = q.front();
                    q.pop();
                    size++;

                    int x = points[idx][0];
                    int y = points[idx][1];
                    for (int neighborIdx : x_graph[x]) {
                        if (!visited[neighborIdx]) {
                            visited[neighborIdx] = true;
                            q.push(neighborIdx);
                        }
                    }
                    x_graph.erase(x);

                    for (int neighborIdx : y_graph[y]) {
                        if (!visited[neighborIdx]) {
                            visited[neighborIdx] = true;
                            q.push(neighborIdx);
                        }
                    }
                    y_graph.erase(y);
                }

                if (size > max1) {
                    max2 = max1;
                    max1 = size;
                } else if (size > max2) {
                    max2 = size;
                }
            }
        }

        return max1 + max2 + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int: 
        ahead=[0]*len(nums) 
        ahead[-1]=0 
        if (len(nums)>=2): 
            ahead[-2]=1 
        if (len(nums)>=3): 
            ahead[-3]=2
        for i in range(len(nums)-4, -1, -1): 
            if (nums[i+3]-nums[i+2]==nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]): 
                ahead[i]=1+ahead[i+1] 
            else: 
                ahead[i]=2 

        behind=[0]*len(nums)  
        behind[0]=0 
        if (len(nums)>=2): 
            behind[1]=1 
        if (len(nums)>=3): 
            behind[2]=2  

        for i in range(3, len(nums)): 
            if (nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]==nums[i-2]-nums[i-3]): 
                behind[i]=1+behind[i-1] 
            else: 
                behind[i]=2 

        ans=1 
        for i in range(len(nums)): 
            ans=max(ans, 1+ahead[i]) 
            ans=max(ans, 1+behind[i]) 
            if (i+2<len(nums) and i-2>=0): 
                d1=nums[i+2]-nums[i+1] 
                d2=nums[i-1]-nums[i-2] 
                d3=nums[i+1]-nums[i-1] 
                if (d1==d2 and 2*d1==d3): 
                    ans=max(ans, 1+ahead[i]+behind[i]) 

            if (i+1<len(nums) and i-1>=0): 
                ans=max(ans, 3) 

            if (i+1<len(nums) and i-2>=0): 
                if (2*(nums[i-1]-nums[i-2])==nums[i+1]-nums[i-1]): 
                    ans=max(ans, 2+behind[i]) 

            if (i-1>=0 and i+2<len(nums)): 
                if (2*(nums[i+2]-nums[i+1])==nums[i+1]-nums[i-1]): 
                    ans=max(ans, 2+ahead[i])

        # print(*ahead) 
        # print(*behind)
        return ans 
                
             
                
                
                
                
                
        
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU: 
    def __init__(self, n): 
        self.par=[i for i in range(n)] 
        self.comps=n 
        self.size=[1]*n 

    def findPar(self, u): 
        if (u==self.par[u]): 
            return u 

        self.par[u]=self.findPar(self.par[u]) 
        return self.par[u] 

    def union(self, u, v): 
        up, uv=self.findPar(u), self.findPar(v) 
        if (up==uv): 
            return  

        self.comps-=1 
        if (self.size[up]>=self.size[uv]): 
            self.size[up]+=self.size[uv] 
            self.par[uv]=up 
        else: 
            self.size[uv]+=self.size[up] 
            self.par[up]=uv 
            
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int: 
        'find the 2 largest connected comps' 
        'if 1 then add 1 to num points' 
        'else 1+maxi1 + maxi2'  
        n=len(points)
        points.sort(key=lambda x: x[0]) 
        dsu=DSU(len(points))
        num={} 
        denum={} 
        for i in range(len(points)): 
            if (points[i][0] in num): 
                j=num[points[i][0]] 
                dsu.union(i, j) 
            else: 
                num[points[i][0]]=i 

            if (points[i][1] in denum): 
                j=denum[points[i][1]] 
                dsu.union(i, j) 
            else: 
                denum[points[i][1]]=i  

        
        if (dsu.comps==1): 
            return n+1 

        dsu.size.sort(reverse=True) 
        return 1+dsu.size[0]+dsu.size[1]

import java.util.*;
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        if (n <= 2) return n;

        int[] rlen = new int[n];
        int[] llen = new int[n];

        rlen[0] = 1;
        rlen[1] = 2;

        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            if ((long) nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == (long) nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]) {
                rlen[i] = rlen[i - 1] + 1;
            } else {
                rlen[i] = 2;
            }
        }

        llen[n - 1] = 1;
        llen[n - 2] = 2;

        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if ((long) nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == (long) nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]) {
                llen[i] = llen[i + 1] + 1;
            } else {
                llen[i] = 2;
            }
        }

        int ans = 2;

        for (int i = 0; i + 1 < n; i++) {
            long d = (long) nums[i + 1] - nums[i];

            int l = (i >= 1 && (long) nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == d) ? rlen[i] : 1;
            int r = (i + 2 < n && (long) nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == d) ? llen[i + 1] : 1;

            ans = Math.max(ans, Math.min(n, l + r + 1));
        }

        for (int i = 0; i + 2 < n; i++) {
            long gap = (long) nums[i + 2] - nums[i];

            if (gap % 2 != 0) continue;

            long d = gap / 2;

            int l = (i >= 1 && (long) nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == d) ? rlen[i] : 1;
            int r = (i + 3 < n && (long) nums[i + 3] - nums[i + 2] == d) ? llen[i + 2] : 1;

            ans = Math.max(ans, Math.min(n, l + 1 + r));
        }

        return ans;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
     int[] parent;
    int[] size;

    public int find(int x) {
        if (parent[x] != x)
            parent[x] = find(parent[x]);
        return parent[x];
    }

    public void unite(int a, int b) {
        a = find(a);
        b = find(b);

        if (a == b) return;

        if (size[a] < size[b]) {
            int temp = a;
            a = b;
            b = temp;
        }

        parent[b] = a;
        size[a] += size[b];
    }
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;

        parent = new int[n];
        size = new int[n];

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            parent[i] = i;
            size[i] = 1;
        }

        Map<Integer, List<Integer>> byX = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, List<Integer>> byY = new HashMap<>();

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {

            byX.computeIfAbsent(points[i][0], k -> new ArrayList<>()).add(i);
            byY.computeIfAbsent(points[i][1], k -> new ArrayList<>()).add(i);
        }

        for (List<Integer> v : byX.values()) {
            for (int i = 1; i < v.size(); i++)
                unite(v.get(0), v.get(i));
        }

        for (List<Integer> v : byY.values()) {
            for (int i = 1; i < v.size(); i++)
                unite(v.get(0), v.get(i));
        }

        Map<Integer, Integer> xComp = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Integer> yComp = new HashMap<>();

        for (Map.Entry<Integer, List<Integer>> e : byX.entrySet())
            xComp.put(e.getKey(), find(e.getValue().get(0)));

        for (Map.Entry<Integer, List<Integer>> e : byY.entrySet())
            yComp.put(e.getKey(), find(e.getValue().get(0)));

        Map<Integer, Integer> compSize = new HashMap<>();

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
            compSize.put(find(i), size[find(i)]);

        int ans = 1;

        for (int r : xComp.values())
            ans = Math.max(ans, compSize.get(r) + 1);

        for (int r : yComp.values())
            ans = Math.max(ans, compSize.get(r) + 1);

        List<int[]> xList = new ArrayList<>();
        List<int[]> yList = new ArrayList<>();

        for (int r : xComp.values())
            xList.add(new int[]{r, compSize.get(r)});

        for (int r : yComp.values())
            yList.add(new int[]{r, compSize.get(r)});

        List<int[]> topX = getTop2(xList);
        List<int[]> topY = getTop2(yList);

        for (int[] x : topX) {
            for (int[] y : topY) {

                int rx = x[0], sx = x[1];
                int ry = y[0], sy = y[1];

                if (rx != ry)
                    ans = Math.max(ans, sx + sy + 1);
                else
                    ans = Math.max(ans, sx + 1);
            }
        }

        return ans;
    }

    private List<int[]> getTop2(List<int[]> list) {

        list.sort((a, b) -> b[1] - a[1]);

        List<int[]> res = new ArrayList<>();
        Set<Integer> seen = new HashSet<>();

        for (int[] p : list) {

            if (!seen.contains(p[0])) {
                seen.add(p[0]);
                res.add(p);
            }

            if (res.size() == 2) break;
        }

        return res;
    }
}

[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        int[] L = new int[n];
        int[] R = new int[n];

        L[0] = 1; L[1] = 2;

        for(int i = 2; i < n; i++) 
            L[i] = nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] ? L[i - 1] + 1 : 2;

        R[n - 1] = 1; R[n - 2] = 2;

        for(int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--)
            R[i] = nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] ? R[i + 1] + 1 : 2;

        int ans = 0;

        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++) ans = Math.max(ans, L[i]);

        for(int k = 0; k < n; k++) {
            if(k == 0) { ans = Math.max(ans, R[1] + 1); continue; }
            if(k == n - 1) { ans = Math.max(ans, L[n - 2] + 1); continue; }
            ans = Math.max(ans, Math.max(L[k - 1] + 1, R[k + 1] + 1));
            long gap = (long) nums[k + 1] - nums[k - 1];
            if(gap % 2 != 0) continue;
            long d = gap / 2;
            int l = L[k - 1] >= 2 && nums[k - 1] - nums[k - 2] == d ? L[k - 1] : 1;
            int r = R[k + 1] >= 2 && nums[k + 2] - nums[k + 1] == d ? R[k + 1] : 1;
            ans = Math.max(ans, l + 1 + r);
        }
        
        return ans;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    Map<Long, Long> p = new HashMap<>();
    Map<Long, Integer> r = new HashMap<>();

    public long find(long x){
        p.putIfAbsent(x, x);
        r.putIfAbsent(x, 0);

        if(p.get(x) != x) p.put(x, find(p.get(x)));

        return p.get(x);
    }

    public void union(long a, long b){
        long ra = find(a), rb = find(b);
        if(ra == rb) return;
        if(r.get(ra) < r.get(rb)) { long t = ra; ra = rb; rb = t; }
        p.put(rb, ra);
        if(r.get(ra).equals(r.get(rb))) r.merge(ra, 1, Integer::sum);
    }
    
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        for(int[] q : points) union(q[0], q[1] + 2_000_000_001L);
        Map<Long, Integer> sz = new HashMap<>();
        for(int[] q : points) sz.merge(find(q[0]), 1, Integer::sum);
        int m1 = 0, m2 = 0;
        for(int v : sz.values()) {
            if(v >= m1) { m2 = m1; m1 = v; }
            else if (v > m2) m2 = v;
        }
        return m1 + m2 + 1;
    }
}

[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        d = [x - y for x, y in pairwise(nums)]
        d2 = [nums[i] - nums[i + 2] for i in range(n - 2)]
        dpl = [1] * (n-1)
        dpr = [1] * (n-1)
        for i in range(1, n - 1):
            if d[i] == d[i - 1]:
                dpl[i] += dpl[i - 1]
        for i in range(n - 2)[::-1]:
            if d[i] == d[i+1]:
                dpr[i] += dpr[i+1]
                
        ans = max(dpl)+1
        ans = max(ans,dpr[1]+2)
        ans = max(ans,dpl[n-3]+2)
        
        for mid in range(1, n - 1):
            if mid-2>=0:
                ans=max(ans,dpl[mid-2]+2)
            if mid+1<=n-2:
                ans=max(ans,dpr[mid+1]+2)
            
            l2=d2[mid-1]
            if l2%2==1:
                continue
            diff=l2//2
            l=1
            r=1
            if mid-2>=0 and d[mid-2]==diff:
                l=dpl[mid-2]+1
            if mid+1<=n-2 and d[mid+1]==diff:
                r=dpr[mid+1]+1
            ans=max(ans,l+r+1)
        return min(n,ans)
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU:
    def __init__(self, n):
        self.parent = list(range(n))
        self.size = [1] * n
        self.num_sets = n

    def find(self, a):
        acopy = a
        while a != self.parent[a]:
            a = self.parent[a]
        while acopy != a:
            self.parent[acopy], acopy = a, self.parent[acopy]
        return a

    def union(self, a, b):
        a, b = self.find(a), self.find(b)
        if a != b:
            if self.size[a] < self.size[b]:
                a, b = b, a

            self.num_sets -= 1
            self.parent[b] = a
            self.size[a] += self.size[b]

    def set_size(self, a):
        return self.size[self.find(a)]

    def __len__(self):
        return self.num_sets


class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        dsu = DSU(n)
        g = defaultdict(list)
        for i, (x, y) in enumerate(points):
            g[1, x].append(i)
            g[2, y].append(i)
        for key, ar in g.items():
            for l, r in pairwise(ar):
                dsu.union(l, r)
        visited = set()
        ans=[]
        for i in range(n):
            par=dsu.find(i)
            if par not in visited:
                visited.add(par)
                ans.append(dsu.size[par])
        ans.sort()
        return sum(ans[-2:])+1
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        asc = [[None, -1] for i in range(len(nums))]
        desc = [[None, -1] for i in range(len(nums))]
        for i in range(1, len(nums)):
            diff = nums[i] - nums[i-1]
            if diff == asc[i-1][0]:
                asc[i] = [asc[i-1][0], asc[i-1][1]+1]
            else:
                asc[i] = [diff, 2]

        for i in range(len(nums)-2, -1, -1):
            diff = nums[i+1] - nums[i]
            if diff == desc[i+1][0]:
                desc[i] = [desc[i+1][0], desc[i+1][1]+1]
            else:
                desc[i] = [diff, 2]



        asc[0] = [asc[1][0], 1]
        desc[-1] = [desc[-2][0], 1]
        best = 0
        for i in range(len(nums)):
            if i+1 < len(nums) and i-1 >= 0:
                if asc[i-1][0] == desc[i+1][0]:
                    if (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) == 2*asc[i-1][0]:
                        best = max(best, asc[i-1][1] + desc[i+1][1] + 1)
                    else:
                        best = max(best, max(asc[i-1][1], desc[i+1][1]) + 1)
                else:
                    if (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) == 2*asc[i-1][0]:
                        best = max(best, asc[i-1][1] + 2)
                    elif (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) == 2*desc[i+1][0]:
                        best = max(best, desc[i+1][1] + 2)
                    else:
                        best = max(best, max(asc[i-1][1], desc[i+1][1]) + 1)
            elif i+1 < len(nums):
                best = max(best, desc[i+1][1] + 1)
            elif i-1 >= 0:
                best = max(best, asc[i-1][1] + 1)

        return best
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        x_cord = {}
        y_cord = {}
        clusters = {}
        marker = -1
        marker_count = []
        mapping = {}
        for i in range(len(points)):
            mapping[(points[i][0], points[i][1])] = i
            if points[i][0] not in x_cord:
                x_cord[points[i][0]] = set()
            
            x_cord[points[i][0]].add(points[i][1])
            if points[i][1] not in y_cord:
                y_cord[points[i][1]] = set()

            y_cord[points[i][1]].add(points[i][0])

        clustered_points = [-1 for i in range(len(points))]
        for i in range(len(points)):
            if clustered_points[i] != -1:
                continue
            else:
                marker += 1
                marker_count.append(1)
                clustered_points[i] = marker
                x_set = set([points[i][0]])
                y_set = set([points[i][1]])
                while len(x_set) > 0 or len(y_set) > 0:
                    if len(x_set) > 0:
                        for j in x_set:
                            for k in x_cord[j]:
                                ith = mapping[(j, k)]
                                if clustered_points[ith] == -1:
                                    clustered_points[ith] = marker
                                    marker_count[-1] += 1
                                    y_set.add(k)

                        x_set = set()

                    else:
                        for k in y_set:
                            for j in y_cord[k]:
                                ith = mapping[(j, k)]
                                if clustered_points[ith] == -1:
                                    clustered_points[ith] = marker
                                    marker_count[-1] += 1
                                    x_set.add(j)

                        y_set = set()


        marker_count.sort()
        if len(marker_count) >= 2:
            return marker_count[-1] + marker_count[-2] + 1
        else:
            return marker_count[-1] + 1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 591 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        int ans = 1;
        vector<int> diff1(n), diff2(n);
        vector<int> can1(n), can2(n);
        for(int i = 1;i < n;i++){
            diff1[i] = nums[i] - nums[i - 1];
            can1[i] = 2;
            if(i > 1 and  diff1[i] == diff1[i - 1]) can1[i] = can1[i - 1] + 1;
            ans = max(ans, can1[i]);
        }
        for(int i = n - 2;i >= 0;i--){
            diff2[i] = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
            can2[i] = 2;
            if(i < n - 2 and diff2[i] == diff2[i + 1]) can2[i] = can2[i + 1] + 1;
        }
        for(int i = 1;i < n - 1;i++){
            int tc = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1];
            if(tc % 2 == 0){
                int df = tc / 2;
                int L = (i >= 2 and diff1[i - 1] == df) ? can1[i - 1] : 1;
                int R = (i + 1 < n - 1 and diff2[i + 1] == df) ? can2[i + 1] : 1;
                ans = max(ans, L + R + 1);
            }
            if(i + 1 < n - 1) ans = max(ans, 1 + can2[i + 1]);
            if(i > 1) ans = max(ans, can1[i - 1] + 1);
         }
        if(n > 1){
            int ff = 2, ss = 2;
            if(n > 2) ff = 1 + can2[1], ss = 1 + can1[n - 2];
            ans = max({ans, ff, ss});
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int find_set(int v, vector<int> &parent) {
        if (v == parent[v]) return v;
        return parent[v] = find_set(parent[v], parent);
    }
    void make_set(int v, vector<int> &parent, vector<int> &rank) {
        parent[v] = v;
        rank[v] = 0;
    }
    void union_sets(int a, int b, vector<int> &parent, vector<int> &rank) {
        a = find_set(a, parent);
        b = find_set(b, parent);
        if (a != b) {
            if (rank[a] < rank[b]) swap(a, b);
            parent[b] = a;
            if (rank[a] == rank[b]) rank[a]++;
        }
    }
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        vector<int> parent(n), rank(n);
        for(int i = 0;i < n;i++) make_set(i, parent, rank);
        map<int, vector<int>> mp1, mp2;
        for(int i = 0;i < n;i++){
            int u = points[i][0], v = points[i][1];
            mp1[u].push_back(i);
            mp2[v].push_back(i);
        }
        for(auto it : mp1){
            vector<int> temp = it.second;
            int sz = temp.size();
            for(int i = 1;i < sz;i++) union_sets(temp[i], temp[i - 1], parent, rank);
        }
        for(auto it : mp2){
            vector<int> temp = it.second;
            int sz = temp.size();
            for(int i = 1;i < sz;i++) union_sets(temp[i], temp[i - 1], parent, rank);
        }
        vector<int> nor(n, 0), cp;
        for(int i = 0;i < n;i++) nor[find_set(i, parent)]++;
        for(int i = 0;i < n;i++){
            if(parent[i] == i) cp.push_back(nor[i]);
        }
        sort(cp.begin(), cp.end());
        reverse(cp.begin(), cp.end());
        int ans = cp[0];
        if((int)cp.size() > 1) ans = max(ans, cp[0] + cp[1]);
        return ans + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 592 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int best = 3;
        int n = nums.size(), l = 0, r = 1, startAgain = -1;
        while (r < n-1) {
            // cout << l << " " << r << endl;
            if (nums[l+1]-nums[l] == nums[r+1]-nums[r]) {
                r++;
                best = max(best, r-l+1);
                continue;
            }

            if (startAgain == -1) {
                // cout << "yes -1\n";
                // first mistake
                // assuming nums[r+1] = nums[r] + nums[l+1] - nums[l]
                startAgain = r;
                r++;
                // cout << "r, n: " << r << " " << n << endl;
                best = max(best, r-l+1);
                if (r+1 >= n) {
                    // cout << "leaving coz r+2" << endl;
                    break;
                }
                else if (nums[r+1]-nums[r-1] == 2*(nums[l+1]-nums[l])) {
                    // cout << "not r+1\n";
                    // cout << "got to r++" << endl;
                    r++;
                    best = max(best, r-l+1);
                }
                else {
                    l = startAgain;
                    r = startAgain+1;
                    startAgain = -1;
                }
            }
            else {
                l = startAgain;
                r = startAgain+1;
                startAgain = -1;
            }
        }
        reverse(nums.begin(), nums.end());
        l = 0, r = 1, startAgain = -1;
        while (r < n-1) {
            // cout << l << " " << r << endl;
            if (nums[l+1]-nums[l] == nums[r+1]-nums[r]) {
                r++;
                best = max(best, r-l+1);
                continue;
            }

            if (startAgain == -1) {
                // cout << "yes -1\n";
                // first mistake
                // assuming nums[r+1] = nums[r] + nums[l+1] - nums[l]
                startAgain = r;
                r++;
                // cout << "r, n: " << r << " " << n << endl;
                best = max(best, r-l+1);
                if (r+1 >= n) {
                    // cout << "leaving coz r+2" << endl;
                    break;
                }
                else if (nums[r+1]-nums[r-1] == 2*(nums[l+1]-nums[l])) {
                    // cout << "not r+1\n";
                    // cout << "got to r++" << endl;
                    r++;
                    best = max(best, r-l+1);
                }
                else {
                    l = startAgain;
                    r = startAgain+1;
                    startAgain = -1;
                }
            }
            else {
                l = startAgain;
                r = startAgain+1;
                startAgain = -1;
            }
        }
        return best;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU {
    vector<int> size, parent;
public:
    DSU(int n) {
        size.resize(n, 1);
        parent.resize(n);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            parent[i] = i;
        }
    }
    int findPar(int u) {
        return parent[u] = (u == parent[u] ? u : findPar(parent[u]));
    }
    void join(int u, int v) {
        int u_par = findPar(u);
        int v_par = findPar(v);

        if (u_par == v_par) return;

        if (size[u_par] >= size[v_par]) {
            parent[v_par] = u_par;
            size[u_par] += size[v_par];
        }
        else {
            parent[u_par] = v_par;
            size[v_par] += size[u_par];
        }
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        DSU dsu(n);
        vector<array<int, 3>> p(n);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            p[i][0] = points[i][0];
            p[i][1] = points[i][1];
            p[i][2] = i;
        }
        sort(p.begin(), p.end(), [](auto &p1, auto &p2) {
            return p1[0] < p2[0];
        });
        for (int i = 0; i < n-1; i++) {
            if (p[i][0] == p[i+1][0]) {
                dsu.join(p[i][2], p[i+1][2]);
            }
        }
        sort(p.begin(), p.end(), [](auto &p1, auto &p2) {
            return p1[1] < p2[1];
        });
        for (int i = 0; i < n-1; i++) {
            if (p[i][1] == p[i+1][1]) {
                dsu.join(p[i][2], p[i+1][2]);
            }
        }
        unordered_map<int, int> mp;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            mp[dsu.findPar(i)]++;
        }
        priority_queue<int, vector<int>, greater<>> pq;
        for (auto pr: mp) {
            pq.push(pr.second);
            if (pq.size() > 2) pq.pop();
        }
        int ans = 0;
        while (!pq.empty()) {
            ans += pq.top();
            pq.pop();
        }
        ans++;
        return ans;
        
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 593 ###
[Q3_START]
#define _  <<" "<<
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int as=0, bs=0, res=0, n = nums.size();
        if(n<=3) return n;
        vector<int>a(n, 0), b(n, 0);
        a[0]=1;
        a[1]=2;
        for(int i=2;i<n;i++){
            if(nums[i]-nums[i-1]==nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]) a[i]=a[i-1]+1;
            else a[i]=2;
        }
        b[n-1]=1;
        b[n-2]=2;
        for(int i=n-3;i>=0;i--){
            if(nums[i]-nums[i+1]==nums[i+1]-nums[i+2]) b[i]=b[i+1]+1;
            else b[i]=2;
        }
        res = max(b[1]+1, a[n-2]+1);
        res = max(res, b[2]+1+(nums[2]-nums[0]==2*(nums[3]-nums[2])));
        res = max(res, a[n-3]+1+(nums[n-1]-nums[n-3]==2*(nums[n-3]-nums[n-4])));
        // cout<<res<<endl;
        // for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
        //     cout<<a[i]<<" ";
        // }
        // cout<<endl;
        // for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
        //     cout<<b[i]<<" ";
        // }
        // cout<<endl;
        // cout<<b[2]+1+(nums[2]-nums[0]==2*(nums[3]-nums[2]))<<endl;
        for(int i=2;i<n-2;i++){
            as = a[i-1]+1;
            bs = b[i+1]+1;
            // cout<<as _ bs<<endl;
            if(nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]==nums[i+2]-nums[i+1] && nums[i+1]-nums[i-1]==2*(nums[i+2]-nums[i+1])){
                as +=bs -1;
            } else {
                if(nums[i+1]-nums[i-1]==2*(nums[i+2]-nums[i+1])) bs++;
                if(nums[i+1]-nums[i-1]==2*(nums[i-1]-nums[i-2])) as++;
            }
            res = max(res, max(as, bs));
            // cout<<i _ res _ as _ bs<<endl;
        }
        return res;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    vector<int>p;
    vector<int>sz;
    int getP(int x){
        if(x==p[x]) return x;
        int par = getP(p[x]);
        p[x]=par;
        return par;
    }
    void merge(int x, int y){
        int px = getP(x), py = getP(y);
        if(px==py) return;
        sz[px] += sz[py];
        p[py] = px;
        // cout<<"merge "<<px<<" "<<py<<" "<<sz[px]<<endl;
    }
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size(), t;
        p.clear();
        sz.clear();
        p.resize(n);
        sz.resize(n);
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            p[i]=i;
            sz[i]=1;
        }
        map<int, vector<int>>mpx, mpy;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            mpx[points[i][0]].push_back(i);
            mpy[points[i][1]].push_back(i);
        }
        for(auto it:mpx){
            t = it.second[0];
            for(int k : it.second){
                merge(t, k);
            }
        }
        for(auto it:mpy){
            t = it.second[0];
            for(int k : it.second){
                merge(t, k);
            }
        }
        int mx1=0, mx2=0, s;
        map<int, bool>mp;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            int par = getP(i);
            // cout<<i<<" "<<par<<" "<<sz[par]<<endl;
            if(mp[par]) continue;
            mp[par]=1;
            s=sz[par];
            if(s>mx2) mx2 = s;
            if(s>mx1){
                mx2 = mx1;
                mx1 = s;
            }
        }
        return mx1+mx2 +1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 594 ###
[Q3_START]
#include<bits/stdc++.h>
using namespace std;
#define ll long long
const int inf = 1e9;
#define a nums
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        int ans = 3;
       	if (n == 1 || n == 2) return n;
       	vector<int> f(n), f2(n);
       	vector<int> lk(n, inf), rk(n, inf);
       	f[0] = 1;
       	f[1] = 2;
       	lk[1] = a[0] - a[1];
       	for (int i = 2; i < n; ++i) {
       		if (a[i] - a[i - 1] == a[i - 1] - a[i - 2]) f[i] = f[i - 1] + 1, lk[i] = lk[i - 1];
       		else f[i] = 2, lk[i] = a[i - 1] - a[i];
       	}

       	f2[n - 1] = 1;
       	f2[n - 2] = 2;
       	rk[n - 2] = a[n - 2] - a[n - 1];
       	for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; --i) {
       		if (a[i] - a[i + 1] == a[i + 1] - a[i + 2]) f2[i] = f2[i + 1] + 1, rk[i] = rk[i + 1];
       		else f2[i] = 2, rk[i] = a[i] - a[i + 1];
       	}

       	for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; ++i) {
       		if (lk[i] == rk[i]) {
       			ans = max(ans, f[i] + f2[i] - 1);
       		}
       		else {
       			ans = max({ans, f[i] + 1, f2[i] + 1});
       		}
       	}
       	
       	for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; ++i) {
       		if (lk[i - 1] == rk[i + 1] && (a[i + 1] + a[i - 1]) % 2 == 0 && (a[i + 1] + a[i - 1]) / 2 - a[i + 1] == lk[i - 1]) ans = max(ans, f[i - 1] + f2[i + 1] + 1); 
       	}
       	
       	for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; ++i) {
       		if ((a[i + 1] + a[i - 1]) % 2 == 0 && (a[i + 1] + a[i - 1]) / 2 - a[i + 1] == lk[i - 1]) ans = max(ans, f[i - 1] + 2); 
       	}

       	for (int i = n - 2; i > 0; --i) {
       		if ((a[i + 1] + a[i - 1]) % 2 == 0 && (a[i + 1] + a[i - 1]) / 2 - a[i + 1] == rk[i + 1]) ans = max(ans, f2[i + 1] + 2);
       	}

       	return ans;

    }
};
[Q3_END]

### RANK 595 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    void print(vector<int> &a) {
        for(auto u: a) cout<<u<<" ";
        cout<<endl;
    }
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& a) {
        int n = a.size();
        vector<int> d;
        for(int i=1; i<n; i++) {
            d.push_back((a[i] - a[i-1]));
        }
        // print(d);
        vector<int> r(n, 1), l(n, 1);
        int md = 1;
        
        for(int i=1; i<d.size(); i++) {
            if(d[i] == d[i-1]) {
                l[i] = l[i-1] + 1;
            }
            md = max(md, l[i]);
        }

        for(int i=d.size()-2; i>=0; i--) {
            if(d[i] == d[i+1]) {
                r[i] = r[i+1] + 1;
            }
            md = max(md, r[i]);
        }

        // print(l);
        // print(r);
        
        int ans = md+1;

        // cout<<ans<<endl;
        
        if(ans < n) {
            ans++;
        }
        
        for(int i=1; i<n-1; i++) {
            int s = d[i] + d[i-1];

            if(s%2 == 0) {
                int nd = s/2;
                int nl = 2;
                if(i >= 2 && d[i-2] == nd) {
                    nl += l[i-2];
                }

                if(i < n-2 && d[i+1] == nd) {
                    nl += r[i+1];
                }

                // cout<<i<<" "<<nl<<endl;
                ans = max(ans, nl+1);
            }
        }
        
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    vector<int> p, h;
    int parent(int i) {
        if(p[i] == -1) return i;
        return p[i] = parent(p[i]);
    }
    void __union(int i, int j) {
        int pa = parent(i), pb = parent(j);
        if(pa != pb) {
            if(h[pa] < h[pb]) {
                h[pb] += h[pa];
                p[pa] = pb;
            }
            else if(h[pa] > h[pb]) {
                h[pa] += h[pb];
                p[pb] = pa;
            }
            else {
                h[pa] += h[pb];
                p[pb] = pa;
            }
        }
    }
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& a) {
        unordered_map<int, int> mpx, mpy;
        int n = a.size();
        p.assign(n, -1);
        h.assign(n, 1);

        for(int i=0; i<n; i++) {
            int x = a[i][0], y = a[i][1];

            if(mpx.find(x) == mpx.end()) {
                mpx[x] = i;
            }
            else {
                __union(i, mpx[x]);
            }

            if(mpy.find(y) == mpy.end()) {
                mpy[y] = i;
            }
            else {
                __union(i, mpy[y]);
            }
        }

        vector<int> cc;
        for(int i=0; i<n; i++) {
            if(p[i] == -1) {
                cc.push_back(h[i]);
            }
        }

        sort(cc.begin(), cc.end());

        if(cc.size() == 1) return cc.back()+1;
        int ccn = cc.size();
        return cc[ccn-1] + cc[ccn-2] + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 596 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n=nums.size(), ans=2;
        if(n<3) return n;
        vector<int> diff(n-1, 0), left(n-1, 0), right(n-1, 0);
        for(int i=0; i<n-1; i++){
            diff[i]=nums[i+1]-nums[i];
        }
        for(int i=0; i<n-1; i++){
            left[i]=(i>0&& diff[i]==diff[i-1])?left[i-1]+1:1;
        }
        for(int i=n-2; i>=0; i--){
            right[i]=(i<n-2&& diff[i]==diff[i+1])?right[i+1]+1:1;
        }
        for(int i=0; i<n-1; i++){
            ans=max(ans, left[i]+1);
            if(left[i]+1<n) ans=max(ans, left[i]+2);
        }
        for(int i=0; i<n-1; i++){
            if(right[i]+1<n) ans=max(ans, right[i]+2);
        }
        for(int i=1; i<n-1; i++){
            long long d=(long long)nums[i+1]-nums[i-1];
            if(d%2==0){
                int x=(int)(d/2), cur=3;
                if(i-2>=0&& diff[i-2]==x){
                    cur+=left[i-2];
                }
                if(i+1<n-1&& diff[i+1]==x){
                    cur+=right[i+1];
                }
                ans=max(ans, cur);
            }
        }
        return min(ans, n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
struct DSU{
    vector<int> parent, sz;
    DSU(int n){
        parent.resize(n);
        sz.resize(n, 1);
        for(int i=0; i<n; i++) parent[i]=i;
    }
    int find(int x){
        if(parent[x]!=x){
            parent[x]=find(parent[x]);
        }
        return parent[x];
    }
    void unite(int a, int b){
        int pa=find(a), pb=find(b);
        if(pa==pb) return;
        parent[pb]=pa;
        sz[pa]+=sz[pb];
    }
};
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n=points.size();
        if(!n) return 1;
        DSU dsu(n);
        unordered_map<int, int> xMap, yMap;
        for(int i=0; i<n; i++){
            int x=points[i][0], y=points[i][1];
            if(xMap.contains(x)) dsu.unite(i, xMap[x]);
            else xMap[x]=i;
            if(yMap.contains(y)) dsu.unite(i, yMap[y]);
            else yMap[y]=i;
        }
        vector<int> len;
        for(int i=0; i<n; i++){
            if(dsu.parent[i]==i){
                len.push_back(dsu.sz[i]);
            }
        }
        sort(len.rbegin(), len.rend());
        if(len.size()==1){
            return len[0]+1;
        }
        return len[0]+len[1]+1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

#include <bits/stdc++.h>

    tree<int, null_type, less<int>, rb_tree_tag, \
         tree_order_statistics_node_update>
using namespace std;
#define fastio()                      \
    ios_base::sync_with_stdio(false); \
    cin.tie(NULL);                    \
    cout.tie(NULL)
#define MOD 1000000007
#define MOD1 998244353
#define INF 1e18
#define pb push_back
#define ff first
#define ss second
#define PI 3.141592653589793238462

struct custom_hash
{
    template <class T1, class T2>
    size_t operator()(const pair<T1, T2> &p) const noexcept
    {
        auto h1 = hash<T1>{}(p.first);
        auto h2 = hash<T2>{}(p.second);
        return h1 ^ (h2 + 0x9e3779b97f4a7c15ULL + (h1 << 6) + (h1 >> 2));
    }
};

long long power(long long base, long long exp)
{
    long long result = 1;
    while (exp > 0)
    {
        if (exp % 2 == 1)
        {
            result = (result * base) % MOD;
        }
        base = (base * base) % MOD;
        exp /= 2;
    }
    return result;
}

bool is_even(int n) { return ((n & 1) == 0); }

bool is_prime(int x)
{
    if (x < 2)
        return false;
    for (int i = 2; i * i <= x; i++)
        if (x % i == 0)
            return false;
    return true;
}

void set_kth_bit(int &num, int k) { num |= (1LL << k); }

void unset_kth_bit(int &num, int k) { num &= ~(1LL << k); }

ll lcm(ll a, ll b) { return a / __gcd(a, b) * b; }

bool is_set(long long n, int k)
{
    if (k < 0)
        return false;
    return ((n >> k) & 1LL);
}

vi getFactors(int n)
{
    vi ans;
    for (int i = 1; i * i <= n; i++)
    {
        if (n % i == 0)
        {
            if (is_prime(i))
                ans.pb(i);
            if (n / i != i)
                if (is_prime(n / i))
                    ans.pb(n / i);
        }
    }
    return ans;
}

vi getInputArray(int n, int x, int a, int b, int c)
{
    vi arr(n);
    arr[0] = x;
    for (int i = 1; i < n; i++)
    {
        arr[i] = (a * arr[i - 1] + b) % c;
    }
    return arr;
}

void printBinary(const int x)
{
    if (x == 0)
    {
        cout << "0\n";
        return;
    }

    string s = bitset<64>(x).to_string();
    s = s.substr(s.find('1'));
    cout << s << '\n';
}

{
    struct Leetcode
    {
        static void _() { std::ofstream("display_runtime.txt") << 0 << '\n'; }
    };
    std::atexit(&Leetcode::_);
    return 0;
}();

vector<pair<int, int>> dirs = {{1, 0}, {0, 1}};
using P = pair<int, int>;
using T = tuple<int, int, ll>;

#include <vector>
#include <algorithm>

using namespace std;

class Solution
{
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int> &nums)
    {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 2)
            return n;

        vi l(n, 1), r(n, 1);
        l[1] = r[n - 2] = 2;

        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++)
            if (nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2])
                l[i] = l[i - 1] + 1;
            else
                l[i] = 2;

        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--)
            if (nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1])
                r[i] = r[i + 1] + 1;
            else
                r[i] = 2;

        int ans = 2;

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
        {
            if (i > 0)
                ans = max(ans, l[i - 1] + 1);

            if (i < n - 1)
                ans = max(ans, r[i + 1] + 1);

            if (i > 0 && i < n - 1)
            {
                if (is_even(nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]))
                {
                    int d = (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) / 2;
                    bool t1 = (i == 1) || (nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == d),
                    t2 = (i == n - 2) || (nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == d);

                    if (t1 && t2)
                    {
                        ans = max(ans, l[i - 1] + 1 + r[i + 1]);
                    }
                    else if (t1)
                    {
                        ans = max(ans, l[i - 1] + 2);
                    }
                    else if (t2)
                    {
                        ans = max(ans, r[i + 1] + 2);
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        ans = max(ans, 3);
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]

#include <bits/stdc++.h>
#include <ext/pb_ds/assoc_container.hpp>

    tree<int, null_type, less<int>, rb_tree_tag, \
         tree_order_statistics_node_update>
using namespace std;
#define fastio()                      \
    ios_base::sync_with_stdio(false); \
    cin.tie(NULL);                    \
    cout.tie(NULL)
#define MOD 1000000007
#define MOD1 998244353
#define INF 1e18
#define pb push_back
#define ff first
#define ss second
#define PI 3.141592653589793238462

#define all(x) (x).begin(), (x).end()

    for (auto &i : vec) \

#define dekho(vec)     \

struct custom_hash
{
    template <class T1, class T2>
    size_t operator()(const pair<T1, T2> &p) const noexcept
    {
        auto h1 = hash<T1>{}(p.first);
        auto h2 = hash<T2>{}(p.second);
        return h1 ^ (h2 + 0x9e3779b97f4a7c15ULL + (h1 << 6) + (h1 >> 2));
    }
};

long long power(long long base, long long exp)
{
    long long result = 1;
    while (exp > 0)
    {
        if (exp % 2 == 1)
        {
            result = (result * base) % MOD;
        }
        base = (base * base) % MOD;
        exp /= 2;
    }
    return result;
}

bool is_even(int n) { return ((n & 1) == 0); }

bool is_prime(int x)
{
    if (x < 2)
        return false;
    for (int i = 2; i * i <= x; i++)
        if (x % i == 0)
            return false;
    return true;
}

void set_kth_bit(int &num, int k) { num |= (1LL << k); }

void unset_kth_bit(int &num, int k) { num &= ~(1LL << k); }

ll lcm(ll a, ll b) { return a / __gcd(a, b) * b; }

bool is_set(long long n, int k)
{
    if (k < 0)
        return false;
    return ((n >> k) & 1LL);
}

vi getFactors(int n)
{
    vi ans;
    for (int i = 1; i * i <= n; i++)
    {
        if (n % i == 0)
        {
            if (is_prime(i))
                ans.pb(i);
            if (n / i != i)
                if (is_prime(n / i))
                    ans.pb(n / i);
        }
    }
    return ans;
}

vi getInputArray(int n, int x, int a, int b, int c)
{
    vi arr(n);
    arr[0] = x;
    for (int i = 1; i < n; i++)
    {
        arr[i] = (a * arr[i - 1] + b) % c;
    }
    return arr;
}

void printBinary(const int x)
{
    if (x == 0)
    {
        cout << "0\n";
        return;
    }

    string s = bitset<64>(x).to_string();
    s = s.substr(s.find('1'));
    cout << s << '\n';
}

class DisjointSetUnion {
public:
    vector<int> parent, size;

    DisjointSetUnion(int n) {
        parent.resize(n);
        size.resize(n, 1);
        iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0);
    }

    int find(int x) {
        if (parent[x] == x) return x;
        return parent[x] = find(parent[x]);
    }

    bool unite(int a, int b) {
        a = find(a);
        b = find(b);
        if (a == b) return false;
        if (size[a] < size[b]) swap(a, b);
        parent[b] = a;
        size[a] += size[b];
        return true;
    }
    
    bool same(int a, int b) {
        return find(a) == find(b);
    }

    int compSize(int x) {
        return size[find(x)];
    }
};


class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        DisjointSetUnion ds(n);

        umpp<int, int> xg, yg;
        
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];
            
            if (xg.count(x)) {
                ds.unite(i, xg[x]);
            } else {
                xg[x] = i;
            }
            
            if (yg.count(y)) {
                ds.unite(i, yg[y]);
            } else {
                yg[y] = i;
            }
        }

        vi comp;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (ds.find(i) == i) {
                comp.push_back(ds.compSize(i));
            }
        }

        sort(all(comp), gint);

        if (comp.size() == 1) {
            return comp[0] + 1;
        } 
        else {
            return comp[0] + comp[1] + 1;
        }
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 598 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n=len(nums)
        if n<=3:
            return n
        d=[nums[i+1]-nums[i] for i in range(n-1)]
        m=n-1
        left=[1]*m
        for i in range(1,m):
            if d[i]==d[i-1]:
                left[i]=left[i-1]+1
        r=[1]*m
        for i in range(m-2,-1,-1):
            if d[i]==d[i+1]:
                r[i]=r[i+1]+1
        ans=min(n,max(left)+2)
        for i in range(1,n-1):
            if(nums[i+1]-nums[i-1])%2==0:
                di=(nums[i+1]-nums[i-1])//2
                l=0
                if i-2>=0 and d[i-2]==di:
                    l=left[i-2]
                ri=0
                if i+1<m and d[i+1]==di:
                    ri=r[i+1]
                ans=max(ans,l+ri+3)
        return min(ans,n)
        
             
        
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU:
    def __init__(self):
        self.p={}
        self.sz={}
    def add(self,x):
        if x not in self.p:
            self.p[x]=x
            self.sz[x]=1
    def find(self,x):
        if self.p[x]!=x:
            self.p[x]=self.find(self.p[x])
        return self.p[x]
    def union(self,a,b):
        ra,rb=self.find(a),self.find(b)
        if ra==rb:
            return
        if self.sz[ra]<self.sz[rb]:
            ra,rb=rb,ra
        self.p[rb]=ra
        self.sz[ra]+=self.sz[rb]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        dsu=DSU()
        for x,y in points:
            xn=("x",x)
            yn=("y",y)
            dsu.add(xn)
            dsu.add(yn)
            dsu.union(xn,yn)
        comp={}
        for x,y in points:
            r=dsu.find(("x",x))
            comp[r]=comp.get(r,0)+1
        vals=sorted(comp.values(),reverse=True)
        if len(vals)==1:
            return vals[0]+1
        return vals[0]+vals[1]+1
        
[Q4_END]

### RANK 599 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n=nums.size();
        if(n<=2) return n;
        vector<int>left(n,0),diff(n,0),right(n,0);

        for(int i=1;i<n;i++)
            {
                diff[i]=nums[i]-nums[i-1];
            }
        int cnt=1;
        left[1]=1;
        for(int i=2;i<n;i++)
            {
                if(diff[i]==diff[i-1]) cnt++;
                else cnt=1;
                left[i]=cnt;
            }

        cnt=1;
        right[n-1]=1;
        for(int i=n-2;i>=1;i--)
            {
                if(diff[i]==diff[i+1]) cnt++;
                else cnt=1;
                right[i]=cnt;
            }

        int ans=0;

        for(int i=0;i<n;i++)
            {
                if(i==0)
                {
                    ans=max(ans,right[2]+2);
                }
                else if(i==n-1)
                {
                    ans=max(ans,left[i-1]+2);
                }
                else
                {
                    if(i>1)
                    {
                        ans=max(ans,left[i-1]+2);
                        if(diff[i]+diff[i+1]==2*diff[i-1])
                        {
                            ans=max(ans,left[i-1]+3);
                        }
                    }
                    if(i>1 && i<n-2 && diff[i-1]==diff[i+2] && diff[i]+diff[i+1]==2*diff[i-1])
                    {
                        ans=max(ans,left[i-1]+right[i+2]+3);
                    }
                    if(i+2<n)
                    {
                        ans=max(ans,right[i+2]+2);
                        if(diff[i]+diff[i+1]==2*diff[i+2])
                        {
                            ans=max(ans,right[i+2]+3);
                        }
                    }
                    
                }
            }
        ans=min(ans,n);
        return ans;
        
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
using ll =long long;
class DSU
{
    vector<int> parent, rank, size;

public:
    DSU(int n)
    {
        parent.resize(n + 1);
        rank.resize(n + 1, 0);
        size.resize(n + 1, 1);
        for (int i = 0; i <= n; i++)
            parent[i] = i;
    }

    int findUpar(int node)
    {
        if (parent[node] != node)
            parent[node] = findUpar(parent[node]);
        return parent[node];
    }

    void UnionBySize(int u, int v)
    {
        int ru = findUpar(u);
        int rv = findUpar(v);
        if (ru == rv) return;
        if (size[ru] >= size[rv]) {
            parent[rv] = ru;
            size[ru] += size[rv];
        } else {
            parent[ru] = rv;
            size[rv] += size[ru];
        }
    }

    bool sameUpar(int u, int v)
    {
        return findUpar(u) == findUpar(v);
    }

    vector<int>getSize()
    {
        vector<int>tmp(int(parent.size()-1),0);

        for(int i=0;i<tmp.size();i++)
            {
                if(findUpar(i)==i) tmp[i]=size[i];
            }
        return tmp;
    }
};
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n=points.size();
        if(n==1) return 2;
        DSU D(n);
        map<ll,ll>x,y;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++)
            {
                int xx=points[i][0];
                int yy=points[i][1];
                    if(x.find(xx)==x.end()) x[xx]=i;
                    else D.UnionBySize(i,x[xx]);
                    if(y.find(yy)==y.end()) y[yy]=i;
                    else D.UnionBySize(i,y[yy]);
                    
                
            }

        vector<int>ff=D.getSize();

        sort(ff.begin(),ff.end(),greater<int>());
        
        return (ff[0]+ff[1]+1);
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 676 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 2) return n;

        vector<int> rlen(n), llen(n);
        rlen[0] = 1; rlen[1] = 2;
        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++)
            rlen[i] = ((long long)nums[i]-nums[i-1] == (long long)nums[i-1]-nums[i-2])
                      ? rlen[i-1]+1 : 2;

        llen[n-1] = 1; llen[n-2] = 2;
        for (int i = n-3; i >= 0; i--)
            llen[i] = ((long long)nums[i+1]-nums[i] == (long long)nums[i+2]-nums[i+1])
                      ? llen[i+1]+1 : 2;

        int ans = 2;
        for (int i = 0; i+1 < n; i++) {
            long long d = (long long)nums[i+1] - nums[i];
            int L = (i >= 1 && (long long)nums[i]-nums[i-1] == d) ? rlen[i] : 1;
            int R = (i+2 < n && (long long)nums[i+2]-nums[i+1] == d) ? llen[i+1] : 1;
            ans = max(ans, min(n, L + R + 1));
        }

        for (int i = 0; i+2 < n; i++) {
            long long gap = (long long)nums[i+2] - nums[i];
            if (gap % 2 != 0) continue;
            long long d = gap / 2;
            int L = (i >= 1 && (long long)nums[i]-nums[i-1] == d) ? rlen[i] : 1;
            int R = (i+3 < n && (long long)nums[i+3]-nums[i+2] == d) ? llen[i+2] : 1;
            ans = max(ans, min(n, L + 1 + R));
        }

        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        
        vector<int> parent(n), sz(n, 1);
        iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0);
        
        function<int(int)> find = [&](int x) {
            return parent[x] == x ? x : parent[x] = find(parent[x]);
        };
        auto unite = [&](int a, int b) {
            a = find(a); b = find(b);
            if (a == b) return;
            if (sz[a] < sz[b]) swap(a, b);
            parent[b] = a;
            sz[a] += sz[b];
        };
        
        map<int, vector<int>> byX, byY;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            byX[points[i][0]].push_back(i);
            byY[points[i][1]].push_back(i);
        }
        
        for (auto& [_, v] : byX)
            for (int i = 1; i < (int)v.size(); i++) unite(v[0], v[i]);
        for (auto& [_, v] : byY)
            for (int i = 1; i < (int)v.size(); i++) unite(v[0], v[i]);
        
        map<int, int> xComp, yComp;
        for (auto& [x, v] : byX) xComp[x] = find(v[0]);
        for (auto& [y, v] : byY) yComp[y] = find(v[0]);

        map<int, int> compSz;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) compSz[find(i)] = sz[find(i)];
        
        int ans = 1;
        
        for (auto& [x, r] : xComp) ans = max(ans, compSz[r] + 1);
        for (auto& [y, r] : yComp) ans = max(ans, compSz[r] + 1);
       
        vector<pair<int,int>> xList, yList; 
        for (auto& [x, r] : xComp) xList.push_back({r, compSz[r]});
        for (auto& [y, r] : yComp) yList.push_back({r, compSz[r]});
        
        auto getTop2 = [](vector<pair<int,int>>& v) {
            sort(v.begin(), v.end(), [](auto& a, auto& b){ return a.second > b.second; });
            vector<pair<int,int>> res;
            set<int> seen;
            for (auto& [r, s] : v) {
                if (!seen.count(r)) { seen.insert(r); res.push_back({r, s}); }
                if (res.size() == 2) break;
            }
            return res;
        };
        
        auto topX = getTop2(xList);
        auto topY = getTop2(yList);
        
        // Try all combinations of top2 x and top2 y
        for (auto& [rx, sx] : topX) {
            for (auto& [ry, sy] : topY) {
                if (rx != ry)
                    ans = max(ans, sx + sy + 1);
                else
                    ans = max(ans, sx + 1);
            }
        }
        
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 677 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 3) return n;

        vector<int> D(n - 1);
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; ++i) {
            D[i] = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
        }

        vector<array<int, 3>> blocks;
        int i = 0;
        while (i < n - 1) {
            int j = i;
            while (j < n - 1 && D[j] == D[i]) {
                j++;
            }
            blocks.push_back({D[i], i, j - 1});
            i = j;
        }

        sort(blocks.begin(), blocks.end(), 
        [](const array<int, 3>& a, const array<int, 3>& b) {
            if (a[0] != b[0]) return a[0] < b[0];
            return a[1] < b[1];
        });

        int max_D_len = 0;
        int num_blocks = blocks.size();

        for (int k = 0; k < num_blocks; ++k) {
            long long d = blocks[k][0];
            int L = blocks[k][1];
            int R = blocks[k][2];
            int len = R - L + 1;

            max_D_len = max(max_D_len, len);

            if (L > 0) {
                max_D_len = max(max_D_len, len + 1);
            }
            if (R < (int)D.size() - 1) {
                max_D_len = max(max_D_len, len + 1);
            }
            if (L >= 2 && (long long)D[L-1] + D[L-2] == 2LL * d) {
                max_D_len = max(max_D_len, len + 2);
            }
            if (R <= (int)D.size() - 3 && (long long)D[R+1] + D[R+2] == 2LL * d) {
                max_D_len = max(max_D_len, len + 2);
                if (k + 1 < num_blocks && blocks[k+1][0] == (int)d && blocks[k+1][1] == R + 3) {
                    int next_len = blocks[k+1][2] - blocks[k+1][1] + 1;
                    max_D_len = max(max_D_len, len + 2 + next_len);
                }
            }
        }

        return max(3, max_D_len + 1);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU {
public:
    vector<int> parent, rank;

    DSU(int n) {
        rank.resize(n + 1);
        parent.resize(n + 1);
        for (int i = 0; i <= n; i++) {
            parent[i] = i;
        }
    }

    int findParent(int x) {
        if (x == parent[x]) {
            return x;
        }
        return parent[x] = findParent(parent[x]);
    }

    void unionByRank(int u, int v) {
        int ultp_u = findParent(u);
        int ultp_v = findParent(v);
        if (ultp_u == ultp_v) return;
        if (rank[u] < rank[v]) {
            parent[ultp_u] = ultp_v;
        }
        else if (rank[ultp_u] > rank[ultp_v]) {
            parent[ultp_v] = ultp_u;
        }
        else {
            parent[ultp_v] = ultp_u;
            rank[ultp_u]++;
        }
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        if (points.empty()) return 1;

        unordered_map<int, int> mapX, mapY;
        int nX = 0, nY = 0;
        for (auto& p : points) {
            if (mapX.find(p[0]) == mapX.end()) mapX[p[0]] = nX++;
            if (mapY.find(p[1]) == mapY.end()) mapY[p[1]] = nY++;
        }

        DSU dsu(nX + nY);
        for (auto& p : points) {
            dsu.unionByRank(mapX[p[0]], mapY[p[1]] + nX);
        }

        vector<int> counts(nX + nY, 0);
        for (auto& p : points) {
            counts[dsu.findParent(mapX[p[0]])]++;
        }

        vector<int> sizes;
        for (int i = 0; i < nX + nY; ++i) {
            if (counts[i] > 0) {
                sizes.push_back(counts[i]);
            }
        }
        
        sort(sizes.rbegin(), sizes.rend());
        if (sizes.size() == 1) {
            return sizes[0] + 1;
        }
        return sizes[0] + sizes[1] + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

#include <bits/stdc++.h>
using namespace std;

/* -------------------- PBDS -------------------- */
#include <ext/pb_ds/assoc_container.hpp>
#include <ext/pb_ds/tree_policy.hpp>
using namespace __gnu_pbds;

template<typename T>
using ordered_set = tree<
    T,
    null_type,
    less<T>,
    rb_tree_tag,
    tree_order_statistics_node_update>;

template<typename T>
using ordered_multiset = tree<
    pair<T,int>,
    null_type,
    less<pair<T,int>>,
    rb_tree_tag,
    tree_order_statistics_node_update>;


#define ll long long
#define vi vector<int>
#define vl vector<ll>
#define vll vector<vector<ll>>
#define vs vector<string>
#define vd vector<double>
#define vb vector<bool>
#define vc vector<char>
#define pll pair<ll,ll>
#define vpll vector<pll>

const ll MOD = 1000000007LL;
const ll INF = 1000000000000000000LL;

#define pb push_back
#define eb emplace_back
#define fi first
#define se second
#define yes "Yes"
#define no "No"

#define all(x) (x).begin(), (x).end()
#define rall(x) (x).rbegin(), (x).rend()
#define sz(x) (int)(x).size()

#define ssort(x) sort(all(x))
#define rsort(x) sort(rall(x))
#define vmax(x) *max_element(all(x))
#define vmin(x) *min_element(all(x))

#define each(a, x) for (auto &a : x)
#define c(i, x, n) for (ll i = x; i < n; i++)
#define cr(i, start, end) for (ll i = start; i >= end; i--)

int dx[4] = {1, 0, -1, 0};
int dy[4] = {0, 1, 0, -1};

int d_x[8] = {0, 1, 0, -1, 1, 1, -1, -1};
int d_y[8] = {1, 0, -1, 0, 1, -1, -1, 1};

#define setBits(x) __builtin_popcountll((ll)(x))
#define leadingZero(x) __builtin_clzll((ll)(x))
#define fstbit(x) (64 - leadingZero(x))
#define lstbit(x) (__builtin_ffsll(x))

ll gcdll(ll a, ll b) { return b ? gcdll(b, a % b) : a; }

ll lcmll(ll a, ll b) {
    return (a / gcdll(a,b)) * b;
}

ll ceil_div(ll a, ll b) {
    return (a + b - 1) / b;
}

struct custom_hash {
    static uint64_t splitmix64(uint64_t x) {
        x += 0x9e3779b97f4a7c15;
        x = (x ^ (x >> 30)) * 0xbf58476d1ce4e5b9;
        x = (x ^ (x >> 27)) * 0x94d049bb133111eb;
        return x ^ (x >> 31);
    }

    size_t operator()(uint64_t x) const {
        static const uint64_t FIXED_RANDOM =
            chrono::steady_clock::now().time_since_epoch().count();
        return splitmix64(x + FIXED_RANDOM);
    }
};

// unordered_map<ll,ll,custom_hash> mp;

#ifndef ONLINE_JUDGE
#define debug(x) cerr << #x << " = " << x << endl;
#else
#define debug(x)
#endif

mt19937 rng(chrono::steady_clock::now().time_since_epoch().count());
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if(n <= 2) return n;

        vector<int> diff(n-1);
        for(int i=0;i<n-1;i++)
            diff[i] = nums[i+1]-nums[i];

        vector<int> left(n-1,1), right(n-1,1);

        for(int i=1;i<n-1;i++)
            if(diff[i]==diff[i-1])
                left[i]=left[i-1]+1;

        for(int i=n-3;i>=0;i--)
            if(diff[i]==diff[i+1])
                right[i]=right[i+1]+1;

        int res = 2;

        for(int i=0;i<n-1;i++)
            res = max(res,left[i]+1);

        for(int i=1;i<n-1;i++){

            int gap = nums[i+1]-nums[i-1];
            if(gap%2==0){
                int d = gap/2;
                int l=0,r=0;

                if(i-2>=0 && diff[i-2]==d)
                    l = left[i-2];

                if(i+1<n-1 && diff[i+1]==d)
                    r = right[i+1];

                res = max(res,l+r+3);
            }

            if(i-2>=0)
                res = max(res,left[i-2]+2);

            if(i+1<n-1)
                res = max(res,right[i+1]+2);
        }

        
        res = max(res, right[1] + 2);    
        res = max(res, left[n-3] + 2);   

        return res;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU {
public:
    vector<int> parent, sz;

    DSU(int n) {
        parent.resize(n);
        sz.resize(n, 1);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
            parent[i] = i;
    }

    int find(int x) {
        if (parent[x] == x)
            return x;
        return parent[x] = find(parent[x]);
    }

    void unite(int a, int b) {
        a = find(a);
        b = find(b);
        if (a == b)
            return;

        if (sz[a] < sz[b])
            swap(a, b);
        parent[b] = a;
        sz[a] += sz[b];
    }
};
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();

        DSU dsu(n);

        unordered_map<int, int> xmap, ymap;

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];

            if (xmap.count(x))
                dsu.unite(i, xmap[x]);
            else
                xmap[x] = i;

            if (ymap.count(y))
                dsu.unite(i, ymap[y]);
            else
                ymap[y] = i;
        }

        vector<int> comp;

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (dsu.find(i) == i)
                comp.push_back(dsu.sz[i]);
        }

        sort(comp.rbegin(), comp.rend());

        int first = comp.size() > 0 ? comp[0] : 0;
        int second = comp.size() > 1 ? comp[1] : 0;
        return first + second + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 679 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        vector<unordered_map<int,int>> memoL(nums.size()),memoR(nums.size());
        int result=0;
        for(int i=1;i<nums.size();i++) {
            auto itL=memoL[i-1].find(nums[i]-nums[i-1]);
            result=max(memoL[i][nums[i]-nums[i-1]]+=(itL==memoL[i-1].end()?1:itL->second)+1,result);
        }
        for(int i=(int)nums.size()-2;i>=0;i--) {
            auto itR=memoR[i+1].find(nums[i+1]-nums[i]);
            result=max(result,memoR[i][nums[i+1]-nums[i]]+=(itR==memoR[i+1].end()?1:itR->second)+1);
        }
        for(int i=1;i+1<nums.size();i++) {
            int diff=nums[i+1]-nums[i-1];
            if(diff%2==0) {
                auto itL=memoL[i-1].find(diff/2);
                auto itR=memoR[i+1].find(diff/2);
                result=max(result,(itL==memoL[i-1].end()?1:itL->second)+1+((itR==memoR[i+1].end()?1:itR->second)));
            }
            auto itL=memoL[i].find(nums[i]-nums[i-1]);
            auto itR=memoR[i].find(nums[i+1]-nums[i]);
            result=max(result,1+(itR==memoR[i].end()?1:itR->second));
            result=max(result,1+(itL==memoL[i].end()?1:itL->second));
        }
        return result;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU {
    vector<int> Parent,Rank,ComponentSize;
    int maxComponentSize=1;
    public:
    DSU(int n) {
        Rank.resize(n,0);
        Parent.resize(n);
        ComponentSize.resize(n,0);
        for(int i=0;i<n/3;i++)
            ComponentSize[i]=1;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++)
            Parent[i]=i;
    }
    int Find(int x) {
        return Parent[x]==x?x:Parent[x]=Find(Parent[x]);
    }
    bool Union(int x,int y) {
        int xset=Find(x),yset=Find(y);
        if(xset!=yset) {
            ComponentSize[xset]+=ComponentSize[yset];
            maxComponentSize=max(maxComponentSize,ComponentSize[yset]=ComponentSize[xset]);
            Rank[xset]<Rank[yset]?Parent[xset]=yset:Parent[yset]=xset;
            if(Rank[xset]==Rank[yset])
                Rank[xset]++;
            return true;
        }
        return false;
    }
    int getMaxComponentSize() {
        return maxComponentSize;
    }
    int getComponentSize(int n) {
        return ComponentSize[Find(n)];
    }
};
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n=points.size();
        DSU dsu(n*3);
        unordered_map<int,int> compressedX,compressedY;
        int idX=0,idY=0;
        for(int i=0;i<points.size();i++) {
            int x=points[i][0],y=points[i][1];
            if(!compressedX.count(x))
                compressedX[x]=idX++;
            if(!compressedY.count(y))
                compressedY[y]=idY++;
            dsu.Union(i,compressedX[x]+n);
            dsu.Union(i,compressedY[y]+2*n);
        }
        int maxSize1=0,maxSize1Root=-1,maxSize2=0,maxSize2Root=-1;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) {
            if(dsu.getComponentSize(i)>=maxSize1&&dsu.Find(i)!=maxSize1Root)
                maxSize2=maxSize1,maxSize2Root=maxSize1Root,maxSize1=dsu.getComponentSize(i),maxSize1Root=dsu.Find(i);
            else if(dsu.getComponentSize(i)>maxSize2&&dsu.Find(i)!=maxSize2Root&&dsu.Find(i)!=maxSize1Root)
                maxSize2=dsu.getComponentSize(i),maxSize2Root=dsu.Find(i);
        }
        return maxSize1+maxSize2+1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]
##################

### RANK 680 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        dp = [1] * n
        dp[1] = 2
        diff = nums[1] - nums[0]
        mx = 1
        for i in range(2, n):
            if nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == diff:
                dp[i] = dp[i - 1] + 1
            else:
                diff = nums[i] - nums[i - 1]
                dp[i] = 2
            mx = max(dp[i], mx)

        rdp = [1] * n
        rdp[n - 2] = 2
        diff = nums[n - 1] - nums[n - 2]

        for i in range(n - 3, -1, -1):
            if nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == diff:
                rdp[i] = rdp[i + 1] + 1
            else:
                diff = nums[i + 1] - nums[i]
                rdp[i] = 2
            mx = max(mx, rdp[i])

        if mx == n:
            return n

        ans = 1
        for i in range(1, n - 1):
            if dp[i - 1] == 1 and rdp[i + 1] == 1:
                if (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) % 2 == 0:
                    ans = max(ans, 3)
            elif dp[i - 1] > 1 and rdp[i + 1] == 1:
                diff = nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]
                if nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1] == diff * 2:
                    ans = max(ans, dp[i - 1] + 2)
            elif dp[i - 1] == 1 and rdp[i + 1] > 1:
                diff = nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]
                if nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1] == 2 * diff:
                    ans = max(ans, rdp[i + 1] + 2)
            else:
                diff1 = nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]
                diff2 = nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]
                if diff1 == diff2 and nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1] == diff1 * 2:
                    ans = max(ans, dp[i - 1] + rdp[i + 1] + 1)
                elif nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1] == 2 * diff2:
                    ans = max(ans, 2 + rdp[i + 1])
                elif nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1] == 2 * diff1:
                    ans = max(ans, dp[i - 1] + 2)
                
        return max(ans, mx + 1)
            

        
                
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class UnionFind:
    def __init__(self, n: int):
        self._fa = list(range(n))
        self._size = [1] * n
        self.cc = n

    def find(self, x: int) -> int:
        if self._fa[x] != x:
            self._fa[x] = self.find(self._fa[x])
        return self._fa[x]

    def is_same(self, x: int, y: int) -> bool:
        return self.find(x) == self.find(y)

    def merge(self, from_: int, to: int) -> bool:
        x, y = self.find(from_), self.find(to)
        if x == y:
            return False
        self._fa[x] = y
        self._size[y] += self._size[x]
        self.cc -= 1
        return True

    def get_size(self, x: int) -> int:
        return self._size[self.find(x)]
    
    def init(self):
        self._fa = list(range(self.cc))
        self._size = [1] * self.cc

class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)

        hm1 = defaultdict(list)
        hm2 = defaultdict(list)

        uf = UnionFind(n)
        for i, (x, y) in enumerate(points):
            hm1[x].append(i)
            hm2[y].append(i)

        for lst in hm1.values():
            for i in range(1, len(lst)):
                uf.merge(lst[0], lst[i])

        for lst in hm2.values():
            for i in range(1, len(lst)):
                uf.merge(lst[0], lst[i])

        lst = []
        for i in range(n):
            if uf.find(i) == i:
                lst.append(uf.get_size(i))
        lst.sort()
        if len(lst) == 1:
            return lst[0] + 1
        return lst[-1] + lst[-2] + 1
                
                
                
                

        

        
[Q4_END]

### RANK 681 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:

bool func(const vector<int>& arr, int left, int right) {
    int n = right - left + 1;
    if (n <= 2) return true;
    
    // try all three pairs among first three indices
    for (int p = 0; p < 3; ++p) {
        int i1 = p; // first index of pair
        for (int q = p+1; q < 3; ++q) {
            int i2 = q;
            
            long long a1 = arr[left + i1];
            long long a2 = arr[left + i2];
            long long diffIndex = i2 - i1;
            long long diffValue = a2 - a1;
            
            int mismatches = 0;
            for (int j = 0; j < n; ++j) {
                long long expected_left = (arr[left + j] - a1) * diffIndex;
                long long expected_right = diffValue * (j - i1);
                if (expected_left != expected_right) {
                    mismatches++;
                    if (mismatches > 1) break;
                }
            }
            if (mismatches <= 1) return true;
        }
    }
    return false;
}
    bool check(vector<int>& nums, int mid) {
        for(int i=0;i<nums.size();++i) {
            int left = i, right = i + mid - 1;
            if(right < nums.size()) {
                bool ret = func(nums, left, right);
                if(ret) return true;
            }
            else break;
        }
        return false;
    }
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int low = 1, high = nums.size(), ans = 1;
        while(high >= low) {
            int mid = low + (high - low) / 2;
            if(check(nums, mid)) {
                ans = mid;
                low = mid + 1;
            }
            else high = mid - 1;
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    vector<int> parent;
    int find(int x) {
        if(parent[x] != x) return parent[x] = find(parent[x]);
        return x;
    }
    void Unite(int x, int y) {
        x = find(x);
        y = find(y);
        parent[y] = x;
    }
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        parent.clear();
        parent.resize(n);
        iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0);

        map<int, vector<int>> xmp, ymp;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            xmp[points[i][0]].push_back(i);
            ymp[points[i][1]].push_back(i);
        }
        for (auto& p : xmp) {
            vector<int>& v = p.second;
            for (long long i = 1; i < v.size(); i++) Unite(v[0], v[i]);
        }
        for (auto& p : ymp) {
            vector<int>& v = p.second;
            for (long long i = 1; i < v.size(); i++) Unite(v[0], v[i]);
        }

        vector<int> sze(n, 0);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            sze[find(i)]++;
        }
        sort(sze.rbegin(), sze.rend());
        int largest = sze[0];
        int second = (n > 1) ? sze[1] : 0;
        return largest + second + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 682 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        
        n=len(nums)
        if n<=2:
            return n
        l=[1]*n
        l[1]=2
        for i in range(2,n):
            if nums[i]-nums[i-1]==nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]:
                l[i]=l[i-1]+1
            else:
                l[i]=2
        r=[1]*n
        r[n-2]=2
        for i in range(n-3,-1,-1):
            if nums[i+1]-nums[i]==nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]:
                r[i]=r[i+1]+1
            else:
                r[i]=2
        a=max(l)
        for i in range(n):
            if i>0:
                a=max(a,l[i-1]+1)
            if i+1<n:
                a=max(a,r[i+1]+1)
            if 0<i<n-1:
                s=nums[i+1]-nums[i-1]
                if s%2==0:
                    d=s//2
                    le=1
                    ri=1
                    if i>=2 and nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]==d:
                        le=l[i-1]
                    if i+2<n and nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]==d:
                        ri=r[i+1]
                    a=max(a,le+1+ri)
        return min(a,n)
                
            
      
    
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n=len(points)
        p=list(range(n))
        s=[1]*n
        def f(x):
            while p[x]!=x:
                p[x]=p[p[x]]
                x=p[x]
            return x
        def u(a,b):
            ra,rb=f(a),f(b)
            if ra==rb:
                return 
            if s[ra]<s[rb]:
                ra,rb=rb,ra
            p[rb]=ra
            s[ra]+=s[rb]
        xm={}
        ym={}
        for i,(x,y) in enumerate(points):
            if x in xm:
                u(i,xm[x])
            else:
                xm[x]=i
            if y in ym:
                u(i,ym[y])
            else:
                ym[y]=i
        cs={}
        for i in range(n):
            r=f(i)
            cs[r]=cs.get(r,0)+1
        l=0
        sl=0
        for v in cs.values():
            if v>=l:
                sl=l
                l=v
            elif v>sl:
                sl=v
        return l+sl+1
       
[Q4_END]
