### RANK 683 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int ans = 3;
        int n = nums.length;
        int[] len = new int[n];
        Arrays.fill(len, 2);
        len[0] = 1;
        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            int d = nums[i] - nums[i - 1];
            if (nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == d) {
                len[i] = len[i - 1] + 1;
            }
            ans = Math.max(ans, len[i]);
            if (len[i] == 2) {
                ans = Math.max(ans, len[i - 1] + 1);
                if (i >= 3 && nums[i] - nums[i - 2] == (nums[i - 2] - nums[i - 3]) * 2) {
                    ans = Math.max(ans, len[i - 2] + 2);
                }
            }
            int j = i - len[i];
            if (j < 0) {
                continue;
            }
            ans = Math.max(ans, len[i] + 1);
            if (j == 0) {
                continue;
            }
            if (nums[j + 1] - nums[j - 1] == d * 2) {
                ans = Math.max(ans, len[i] + 2);
                if (j > 1 && nums[j - 1] - nums[j - 2] == d) {
                    ans = Math.max(ans, len[i] + len[j - 1] + 1);
                }
            }
        }
        return ans;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        if (n == 1) {
            return 2;
        }
        UnionFind unionFind = new UnionFind(n);
        Map<Integer, Integer> map1 = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Integer> map2 = new HashMap<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < points.length; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];
            Integer x0 = map1.get(x);
            if (x0 != null) {
                unionFind.union(i, x0);
            }
            Integer y0 = map2.get(y);
            if (y0 != null) {
                unionFind.union(i, y0);
            }
            map1.put(x, i);
            map2.put(y, i);
        }
        int[] size = unionFind.size;
        Arrays.sort(size);
        return size[n - 1] + size[n - 2] + 1;
    }
}

class UnionFind {
    int[] roots;
    int[] size;

    public UnionFind(int n) {
        roots = new int[n];
        size = new int[n];
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            roots[i] = i;
            size[i] = 1;
        }
    }

    public int find(int i) {
        if (i == roots[i]) {
            return i;
        }
        int p = find(roots[i]);
        roots[i] = p;
        size[p] += size[i];
        size[i] = 0;
        return p;
    }

    public void union(int p, int q) {
        int pRoot = find(p);
        int qRoot = find(q);
        if (pRoot != qRoot) {
            roots[pRoot] = qRoot;
            size[qRoot] += size[pRoot];
            size[pRoot] = 0;
        }
    }

    public boolean isUnion(int p, int q) {
        return find(p) == find(q);
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 685 ###
[Q3_START]
int longestArithmetic(int* nums, int numsSize) {
    int l = 0, d = nums[1] - nums[0], mlen = 0;
    for (int r = 2; r < numsSize; r++) {
        if (nums[r] - nums[r - 1] == d) {
            mlen = (mlen > r - l + 1) ? mlen : r - l + 1;
        }
        else {
            int temp = nums[r];
            nums[r] = nums[r - 1] + d;
            int m = r;
            while (m + 1 < numsSize && nums[m + 1] - nums[m] == d) {m++;}
            mlen = (mlen > m - l + 1) ? mlen : m - l + 1;
            nums[r] = temp;
            l = r - 1;
            d = nums[r] - nums[r - 1];
        }
    }
    int r = numsSize - 1;
    d = nums[numsSize - 2] - nums[numsSize - 1];
    for (l = numsSize - 3; l >= 0; l--) {
        if (nums[l] - nums[l + 1] == d) {
            mlen = (mlen > r - l + 1) ? mlen : r - l + 1;
        }
        else {
            int temp = nums[l];
            nums[l] = nums[l + 1] + d;
            int m = l;
            while (m - 1 >= 0 && nums[m - 1] - nums[m] == d) {m--;}
            mlen = (mlen > r - m + 1) ? mlen : r - m + 1;
            nums[l] = temp;
            r = l + 1;
            d = nums[l] - nums[l + 1];
        }
    }
    return mlen;
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    void dfs(int start,
             vector<vector<int>>& points,
             unordered_map<long long, vector<int>>& mapX,
             unordered_map<long long, vector<int>>& mapY,
             vector<int>& vis,
             int& sz)
    {
        stack<int> st;
        st.push(start);

        while (!st.empty()) {
            int u = st.top();
            st.pop();

            if (vis[u]) continue;

            vis[u] = 1;
            sz++;

            long long x = points[u][0];
            long long y = points[u][1];

            auto &vx = mapX[x];
            for (int v : vx) {
                if (!vis[v]) st.push(v);
            }
            vx.clear();

            auto &vy = mapY[y];
            for (int v : vy) {
                if (!vis[v]) st.push(v);
            }
            vy.clear();
        }
    }

    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();

        unordered_map<long long, vector<int>> mapX;
        unordered_map<long long, vector<int>> mapY;

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            mapX[points[i][0]].push_back(i);
            mapY[points[i][1]].push_back(i);
        }

        vector<int> vis(n, 0);
        vector<int> comp;

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (!vis[i]) {
                int sz = 0;
                dfs(i, points, mapX, mapY, vis, sz);
                comp.push_back(sz);
            }
        }

        if (comp.size() == 1) return comp[0] + 1;

        sort(comp.begin(), comp.end(), greater<int>());
        return comp[0] + comp[1] + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 686 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        vector<vector<int>> arr;
        int cnt=1,n=nums.size();
        for(int i=2;i<n;i++){
            if((nums[i]-nums[i-1])!=(nums[i-1]-nums[i-2])){
                arr.push_back({i-1-cnt,i-1});
                cnt=1;
            }else cnt++;
        }
        arr.push_back({n-1-cnt,n-1});
        // for(auto &i:arr){
        //     cout<<i[0]<<" "<<i[1]<<endl;
        // }
        int ans=0,sz=arr.size();
        for(int i=0;i<sz;i++){
            ans = max(ans,arr[i][1]-arr[i][0]+1);
            if(arr[i][0]>0){
                ans = max(ans,arr[i][1]-arr[i][0]+2);
                int x = nums[arr[i][0]]-(nums[arr[i][1]]-nums[arr[i][1]-1]);
                // if(i==3)cout<<x<<endl;
                int idx = arr[i][0]-2;
                // if(i==3)cout<<idx<<endl;
                if(idx >= 0 and x-nums[idx] == (nums[arr[i][1]]-nums[arr[i][1]-1])){
                    ans = max(ans,arr[i][1]-arr[i][0]+3);
                    if((i-3) >= 0 and arr[i-3][1]==(arr[i][0]-2)){
                        // cout<<i<<endl;
                        if(nums[arr[i-3][0]+1]-nums[arr[i-3][0]] == (nums[arr[i][1]]-nums[arr[i][1]-1])){
                            ans = max(ans,arr[i][1]-arr[i][0]+3+arr[i-3][1]-arr[i-3][0]);
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            if(arr[i][1]<(n-1)){
                ans = max(ans,arr[i][1]-arr[i][0]+2);
                int x = nums[arr[i][1]]+(nums[arr[i][1]]-nums[arr[i][1]-1]);
                int idx = arr[i][1]+2;
                if(idx < n and nums[idx]-x == (nums[arr[i][1]]-nums[arr[i][1]-1])){
                    ans = max(ans,arr[i][1]-arr[i][0]+3);
                    if((i+3) < sz and arr[i+3][0]==(arr[i][1]+2)){
                        if(nums[arr[i+3][0]+1]-nums[arr[i+3][0]] == (nums[arr[i][1]]-nums[arr[i][1]-1])){
                            ans = max(ans,arr[i][1]-arr[i][0]+3+arr[i+3][1]-arr[i+3][0]);
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& edges) {
        int n=edges.size(),idx=0;
        map<int,int> x,y;
        for(auto &i:edges){
            if(!x.count(i[0]))x[i[0]] = idx++;
            if(!y.count(i[1]))y[i[1]] = idx++;
        }
        vector<int> par(idx),cnt(idx);
        for(int i=0;i<idx;i++)par[i] = i;
        auto find = [&](int x){
            int nd = x;
            while(nd != par[nd]){
                par[nd] = par[par[nd]];
                nd = par[nd];
            }
            return nd;
        };
        auto uni = [&](int x, int y){
            int nd1 = find(x);
            int nd2 = find(y);
            if(nd1!=nd2){
                par[nd1] = nd2;
                cnt[nd2] += cnt[nd1];
            }
            cnt[nd2]++;
        };
        for(auto &i:edges){
            uni(x[i[0]],y[i[1]]);
        }
        vector<int> arr;
        for(int i=0;i<idx;i++){
            if(par[i]==i)arr.push_back(cnt[i]);
        }
        sort(arr.rbegin(),arr.rend());
        if(arr.size()>1)return arr[0]+arr[1]+1;
        if(arr.size()==1)return arr[0]+1;
        return 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 687 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if(n <= 2)return n;

        vector<int>a = nums;
        vector<int>suff(n),diff(n);

        int d = 0;
        int len = 1;

        for(int i=n-2;i>=0;--i){
            int cd = a[i+1]-a[i];
            if(i == n-2 || cd == d){
                len++;
            }
            else{
                len = 2;
            }
            d = cd;
            suff[i] = len;
            diff[i] = d;
        }

        int ans = 0;
        int pl = 1;
        int pd = 0;

        for(int i=0;i<n;++i){
            if(i < n-1){
                ans = max(ans,1+suff[i+1]);
            }

            if(i > 0){
                ans = max(ans,1+pl);
            }

            if(i > 0 && i < n-1){
                int td = a[i+1]-a[i-1];
                if(td%2 == 0){
                    int bd = td/2;
                    int cur = 1;

                    cur += (i>=2 && (a[i-1]-a[i-2] == bd)) ? pl : 1;
                    cur += (i<n-2 && (a[i+2]-a[i+1] == bd)) ? suff[i+1] : 1;

                    ans = max(ans,cur);
                }
            }

            if(i > 0){
                int cd = a[i]-a[i-1];
                if(i == 1 || cd == pd){
                    pl++;
                }
                else{
                    pl = 2;
                }
                pd = cd;
            }

            ans = max(ans,pl);
        }

        return min(ans,n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int find(int node,vector<int>&par){
        if(node == par[node])return node;
        return par[node] = find(par[node],par);
    }
    void doUnion(int x,int y,vector<int>&par,vector<int>&sz){
        int parx=find(x,par);
        int pary = find(y,par);
        if(parx == pary)return;
        if(sz[parx] < sz[pary]){
            par[parx] = pary;
            sz[pary] += sz[parx]-1;
        }
        else{
            par[pary] = parx;
            sz[parx] += sz[pary]-1;
            
        }
        
    }
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int ans = 0;
        map<int,int>row,col;
        
        
        int n = points.size();
         
        int c = 0;
        for(int i=0;i<n;++i){
            if(row.find(points[i][0]) == row.end())row[points[i][0]] = ++c;
        }
        for(int i=0;i<n;++i){
            if(col.find(points[i][1]) == col.end())col[points[i][1]] = ++c;
        }

        vector<int>par(c+1),sz(c+1);
        for(int i=0;i<n;++i){
            par[row[points[i][0]]] = row[points[i][0]];
            par[col[points[i][1]]] = col[points[i][1]];
            sz[row[points[i][0]]]++;
            sz[col[points[i][1]]]++;
        }

        for(int i=0;i<n;++i){
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];
            doUnion(row[x],col[y],par,sz);
            
        }

        //we have merged
        vector<int>score;
        vector<bool>used(c+1,false);
        for(int i=1;i<=c;++i){
            int root = find(i,par);
            //cout<<root<<" "<<sz[root]<<endl;
            if(used[root])continue;
            used[root] = true;
            score.push_back(sz[root]);
        }
        sort(score.begin(),score.end());
        if(score.size() == 1)return score[0]+1;
        int m = score.size();
        ans = 1 + score[m-1] + score[m-2];

        
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 688 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        const int n = nums.size();
        vector<int> pre(n);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (i - 2 >= 0) {
                if (nums[i] - nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2])
                    pre[i] = 1 + pre[i-1];
                else
                    pre[i] = 2;
            } else {
                pre[i] = i + 1;
            }
        }

        for (int i = 0 ; i + 1 < n ; i ++) cout << nums[i+1] - nums[i] << ' ';

        vector<int> suf(n);
        for (int i = n - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (i + 2 < n) {
                if (nums[i+1] - nums[i] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1])
                    suf[i] = 1 + suf[i+1];
                else suf[i] = 2;
            } else suf[i] = n - i;
        }

        int res = *max_element(pre.begin(), pre.end());
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (i - 1 >= 0) {
                res = max(res, pre[i-1] + 1);
            }
            if (i + 1 < n) {
                res = max(res, suf[i+1] + 1);
            }
            if (i - 1 >= 0 && i + 1 < n) {
                int d = nums[i+1] - nums[i-1];
                if (d % 2 == 0) res = max(res, 3);
                else continue;

                d /= 2;
                int tmp = 1;
                if (i - 2 >= 0 && nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == d)
                    tmp += pre[i-1];
                else tmp++;
                if (i + 2 < n && nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == d)
                    tmp += suf[i+1];
                else tmp++;
                res = max(res, tmp);
            }
        }
        return res;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class dsu {
    private:
        vector<int> par;
    public:
        explicit dsu(int n) : par(n, -1) {}
        int find(int a) {
            if (par[a] < 0) return a;
            par[a] = find(par[a]);
            return par[a];
        }
        bool merge(int a, int b) {
            a = find(a);
            b = find(b);
            if (a == b) return false;
            if (-par[a] < -par[b]) swap(a, b);
            par[a] += par[b];
            par[b] = a;
            return true;
        }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        const int n = points.size();
        dsu uf(n);

        map<int, vector<int>> xs, ys;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0], y = points[i][1];
            xs[x].push_back(i);
            ys[y].push_back(i);
        }

        for (auto& [x, vec] : xs) {
            for (size_t i = 1; i < vec.size(); i++) {
                uf.merge(vec[0], vec[i]);
            }
        }
        for (auto& [y, vec] : ys) {
            for (size_t i = 1; i < vec.size(); i++) {
                uf.merge(vec[0], vec[i]);
            }
        }

        vector<int> sizes(n);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            sizes[uf.find(i)]++;
        }

        array<int, 2> max2 = {};
        for (int s : sizes) {
            if (s > max2[0]) max2 = {s, max2[0]};
            else if (s > max2[1]) max2[1] = s;
        }
        return 1 + max2[0] + max2[1];
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 689 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        def f(nums):
            n = len(nums)
            if n == 1:
                return 1
            if n == 2:
                return 2
            ans = 0
            dp = [1] * n
            for i in range(1, n):
                if i == 1 or nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]:
                    dp[i] = dp[i - 1] + 1
                else:
                    dp[i] = 2
                ans = max(ans, dp[i] + 1 if i < n - 1 else dp[i])
            dp1 = [1] * n
            for i in range(n - 2, -1, -1):
                if i == n - 2 or nums[i] - nums[i + 1] == nums[i + 1] - nums[i + 2]:
                    dp1[i] = dp1[i + 1] + 1
                else:
                    dp1[i] = 2
                ans = max(ans, dp1[i] + 1 if i > 0 else dp1[i])
            ans = max(ans, dp[n - 2] + 1, dp1[1] + 1)
            for i in range(1, n - 1):
                if (nums[i - 1] + nums[i + 1]) & 1:
                    continue
                a, b, c = nums[i], dp[i], dp1[i]
                nums[i] = (nums[i - 1] + nums[i + 1]) // 2
                if i == 1 or nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]:
                    dp[i] = dp[i - 1] + 1
                else:
                    dp[i] = 2
                if i == n - 2 or nums[i] - nums[i + 1] == nums[i + 1] - nums[i + 2]:
                    dp1[i] = dp1[i + 1] + 1
                else:
                    dp1[i] = 2
                ans = max(ans, dp[i] + dp1[i] - 1)
                nums[i], dp[i], dp1[i] = a, b, c
            return ans
        return f(nums)
[Q3_END]

### RANK 690 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        # left, right: ending/starting i, longest diff array
        left = [1] * n
        for i in range(1, n):
            if i == 1:
                left[i] = 2
            else:
                if nums[i] - nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]:
                    left[i] = left[i-1] + 1
                else:
                    left[i] = 2
        right = [1] * n
        for i in range(n-2, -1, -1):
            if i == n-2:
                right[i] = 2
            else:
                if nums[i+1] - nums[i] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]:
                    right[i] = right[i+1] + 1
                else:
                    right[i] = 2

        res = max(left)
        
        # change nums[i]
        for i in range(n):
            if i > 0:
                res = max(res, left[i-1] + 1)
            if i < n-1:
                res = max(res, right[i+1] + 1)

            if i > 0 and i < n-1:
                tar = (nums[i-1] + nums[i+1]) / 2
                if tar == int(tar):
                    tar = int(tar)
                    left_len = 1
                    if i > 1:
                        if nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == tar - nums[i-1]:
                            left_len = left[i-1]
                        else:
                            if i > 2 and nums[i-2] - nums[i-3] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]:
                                if nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == tar - nums[i-1]:
                                    left_len = left[i-2] + 1

                    right_len = 1
                    if i < n-2:
                        if nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == nums[i+1] - tar:
                            right_len = right[i+1]
                        else:
                            if i < n-3 and nums[i+3] - nums[i+2] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]:
                                if nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == nums[i+1] - tar:
                                    right_len = right[i+2] + 1

                    tmp = left_len + 1 + right_len
                    res = max(res, tmp)

        return res
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class UF:
    def __init__(self, n):
        self.p = list(range(n))
        self.size = [1] * n

    def find(self, x):
        while self.p[x] != x:
            self.p[x] = self.p[self.p[x]]
            x = self.p[x]
        return x

    def union(self, x, y):
        rx, ry = self.find(x), self.find(y)
        if rx == ry:
            return
        # by rank
        if self.size[rx] < self.size[ry]:
            rx, ry = ry, rx
        self.p[ry] = rx
        self.size[rx] += self.size[ry]

class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        # map
        x2id = {}
        y2id = {}
        for x, y in points:
            if x not in x2id:
                x2id[x] = len(x2id)
            if y not in y2id:
                y2id[y] = len(y2id)

        nx, ny = len(x2id), len(y2id)
        uf = UF(nx + ny)

        for x, y in points:
            xid = x2id[x]
            yid = nx + y2id[y]
            uf.union(xid, yid)

        cc_size = {}
        for x, y in points:
            xid = x2id[x]
            r = uf.find(xid)
            cc_size[r] = cc_size.get(r, 0) + 1 

        s = list(cc_size.values())
        s.sort(reverse=True)

        if len(s) >= 2:
            return s[0] + 1 + s[1]
        elif len(s) == 1:
            return s[0] + 1
        else:
            return 1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 691 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if(n <= 2) return n ;
        vector<int>diff(n-1);
        for(int i = 0 ; i < n -1 ; i++) {
            diff[i] = nums[i+1] - nums[i];
        }

        vector<int> L(n-1,1);
for(int i = 1 ; i < n-1 ; i++) {
    if(diff[i] == diff[i-1]) {
        L[i] = L[i-1] + 1;
     }
}
vector<int>R(n-1,1);
        for(int i = n-3 ; i >= 0 ; i--) {
            if(diff[i] == diff[i+1]) R[i] = R[i+1] +1 ;
        }
int ans = 0;
        for(int i = 0 ; i < n-1 ; i++) {
            ans = max(ans,L[i] + 2);
            
        }
        ans = min(ans,n);
        for(int i = 1 ; i < n-1  ; i++) {
            long long total = (long long) diff[i-1] + diff[i];
            if(total %2 == 0) {
                int targetD = total/2;
                int leftLen = 0;
                if(i-2 >= 0 && diff[i-2] == targetD) leftLen = L[i-2];
                int rightLen = 0;
                if(i+1 < n-1 && diff[i+1] == targetD)rightLen = R[i+1];
                ans = max(ans,leftLen + rightLen + 3);
            }
        }
      return min(ans,n);  
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
       int n = points.size();
        if(n == 0) return 1;
        vector<int> parent(n);
        vector<int>size(n,1);
        for(int i = 0 ; i < n ; i++) parent[i] = i;

       auto find = [&](auto & self,int i )  -> int {
           if(parent[i] == i) return i;
           return parent[i] = self(self,parent[i]);
       };
        auto unite = [&](int i ,int j ) {
            int rooti = find(find,i);
            int rootj = find(find,j);
            if(rooti != rootj) {
                parent[rooti] = rootj;
                size[rootj] += size[rooti];
            }
        };

        unordered_map<int,int>x_map;

    for(int i = 0 ; i < n ; i++) {
        int x = points[i][0];
        if(x_map.count(x)) unite(i,x_map[x]);
        else x_map[x] = i;
    }

   unordered_map<int,int>y_map;

        for(int i = 0 ; i < n ; i++) {
            int y = points[i][1];
            if(y_map.count(y)) unite(i,y_map[y]);
            else y_map[y] = i;
        }



        vector<int>cSizes;
        for(int i = 0 ; i < n ; i++) {
            if(parent[i] == i) {
                cSizes.push_back(size[i]);
            }
        }
sort(cSizes.rbegin(),cSizes.rend());

if(cSizes.size() == 1) return cSizes[0] + 1;
        
return cSizes[0] + cSizes[1] + 1;

        
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 692 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
       int n = nums.length;
        if (n <= 2) return n;

        int[] left = new int[n];
        int[] right = new int[n];

        left[0] = 1;
        left[1] = 2;
        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            if (nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]) {
                left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1;
            } else {
                left[i] = 2;
            }
        }

        right[n - 1] = 1;
        right[n - 2] = 2;
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]) {
                right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1;
            } else {
                right[i] = 2;
            }
        }

        int ans = 2;

        for (int x : left) ans = Math.max(ans, x);

        ans = Math.max(ans, 1 + right[1]);
        ans = Math.max(ans, 1 + left[n - 2]);

        for (int i = 1; i <= n - 2; i++) {
            ans = Math.max(ans, left[i - 1] + 1);

            ans = Math.max(ans, right[i + 1] + 1);

            int gap = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1];
            if (gap % 2 == 0) {
                int d = gap / 2;

                int leftLen = 1;   
                if (i >= 2 && nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == d) {
                    leftLen = left[i - 1];
                }

                int rightLen = 1;  
                if (i + 2 < n && nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == d) {
                    rightLen = right[i + 1];
                }

                ans = Math.max(ans, leftLen + 1 + rightLen);
            }
        }

        return Math.min(ans, n); 
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    static class DSU {
        int[] parent, rank;

        DSU(int n) {
            parent = new int[n];
            rank = new int[n];
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) parent[i] = i;
        }

        int find(int x) {
            if (parent[x] != x) parent[x] = find(parent[x]);
            return parent[x];
        }

        void union(int a, int b) {
            int pa = find(a), pb = find(b);
            if (pa == pb) return;

            if (rank[pa] < rank[pb]) {
                parent[pa] = pb;
            } else if (rank[pa] > rank[pb]) {
                parent[pb] = pa;
            } else {
                parent[pb] = pa;
                rank[pa]++;
            }
        }
    }
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        if (n == 0) return 1;

        Map<Integer, Integer> xMap = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Integer> yMap = new HashMap<>();

        int id = 0;

        // Compress x coordinates
        for (int[] p : points) {
            if (!xMap.containsKey(p[0])) {
                xMap.put(p[0], id++);
            }
        }

        for (int[] p : points) {
            if (!yMap.containsKey(p[1])) {
                yMap.put(p[1], id++);
            }
        }

        DSU dsu = new DSU(id);

        for (int[] p : points) {
            int xId = xMap.get(p[0]);
            int yId = yMap.get(p[1]);
            dsu.union(xId, yId);
        }

        Map<Integer, Integer> compSize = new HashMap<>();
        for (int[] p : points) {
            int root = dsu.find(xMap.get(p[0])); // same as y root
            compSize.put(root, compSize.getOrDefault(root, 0) + 1);
        }

        int max1 = 0, max2 = 0;
        for (int sz : compSize.values()) {
            if (sz > max1) {
                max2 = max1;
                max1 = sz;
            } else if (sz > max2) {
                max2 = sz;
            }
        }

        return 1 + max1 + max2;
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 693 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        p = [[10 ** 9, 1] for _ in range(n)]
        for i in range(1, n):
            p[i][0] = nums[i] - nums[i - 1]
            if p[i][0] == p[i - 1][0]:
                p[i][1] = p[i - 1][1] + 1
            else:
                p[i][1] = 2

        s = [[10 ** 9, 1] for _ in range(n)]
        for i in range(n - 2, -1, -1):
            s[i][0] = nums[i + 1] - nums[i]
            if s[i][0] == s[i + 1][0]:
                s[i][1] = s[i + 1][1] + 1
            else:
                s[i][1] = 2

        ans = 0
        for i in range(1, n - 1):
            ans = max(ans, p[i][1] + 1, s[i][1] + 1)
            if (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) % 2 == 0:
                d = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]
                d2 = d // 2
                if d2 == p[i - 1][0]:
                    ans = max(ans, p[i - 1][1] + 2)
                if d2 == s[i + 1][0]:
                    ans = max(ans, s[i + 1][1] + 2)
                if d2 == p[i - 1][0] == s[i + 1][0]:
                    ans = max(ans, p[i - 1][1] + 1 + s[i + 1][1])

        ans = max(ans, s[0][1], p[-1][1])

        return ans

        
        
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU:
    def __init__(self, n):
        self.p = [i for i in range(n)]
        self.sz = [1] * n

    def root(self, a):
        while a != self.p[a]:
            self.p[a] = self.p[self.p[a]]
            a = self.p[a]
        return a

    def unite(self, a, b):
        a = self.root(a)
        b = self.root(b)
        if a == b:
            return
        if self.sz[a] < self.sz[b]:
            a, b = b, a

        self.p[b] = a
        self.sz[a] += self.sz[b]

class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        dsu = DSU(n)
        rx = {}
        ry = {}
        for i, (x, y) in enumerate(points):
            if x in rx:
                dsu.unite(rx[x], i)
            else:
                rx[x] = dsu.root(i)
            if y in ry:
                dsu.unite(ry[y], i)
            else:
                ry[y] = dsu.root(i)

        if dsu.sz[dsu.root(0)] == n:
            return n + 1
        else:
            r1 = 0
            r2 = 0
            for i in range(n):
                di = dsu.root(i)
                if di == r1:
                    continue
                if dsu.sz[di] > dsu.sz[r1]:
                    r2 = r1
                    r1 = di
                elif r1 == r2 or dsu.sz[di] > dsu.sz[r2]:
                    r2 = di
            if r1 == r2:
                return dsu.sz[r1] + 1
            return dsu.sz[r1] + dsu.sz[r2] + 1
[Q4_END]
##################

### RANK 694 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 2) {
            return n;
        }

        vector<int> start(n, 2);
        vector<int> end(n, 2);

        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            if (nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]) {
                start[i] = start[i - 1] + 1;
            }
        }
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (nums[i+1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]) {
                end[i] = end[i + 1] + 1;
            }
        }

        int res = 2;

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (i > 0) {
                res = max(res, start[i - 1] + 1);
            }
            if (i < n - 1) {
                res = max(res, end[i + 1] + 1);
            }

            if (i > 0 && i < n - 1) {
                int diff = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1];
                if (diff % 2 == 0) {
                    int d = diff / 2;
                    int left = 1;
                    int right = 1;
                    if (i >= 2 && nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == d) {
                        left = start[i - 1];
                    }
                    if (i <= n - 3 && nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == d) {
                        right = end[i + 1];
                    }
                    res = max(res, left + 1 + right);
                }
            }
        }
        return min(res, n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    struct UnionFind {
        vector<int> parents;
        vector<int> ranks;

        UnionFind(int n) {
            parents.resize(n);
            ranks.resize(n);
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
                parents[i] = i;
            }
        }

        int find(int x) {
            if (parents[x] != x) {
                parents[x] = find(parents[x]);
            }
            return parents[x];
        }

        bool __union(int a, int b) {
            int pa = find(a);
            int pb = find(b);
            if (pa == pb) {
                return false;
            }
            if (ranks[pa] < ranks[pb]) {
                parents[pa] = parents[pb];
            } else if (ranks[pb] < ranks[pa]){
                parents[pb] = parents[pa];
            } else {
                parents[pb] = pa;
                ranks[pa]++;
            }
            return true;
        }
    };
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        UnionFind uf((int)points.size());
        int n = points.size();
        unordered_map<int, int> xVisited;
        unordered_map<int, int> yVisited;

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];

            if (xVisited.count(x)) {
                uf.__union(i, xVisited[x]);
            } else {
                xVisited[x] = i;
            }
            if (yVisited.count(y)) {
                uf.__union(i, yVisited[y]);
            } else {
                yVisited[y] = i;
            }
        }
        int res = 0;
        unordered_map<int, int> sets;
        int highest = 0;
        int secondHighest = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            sets[uf.find(i)]++;
        }
        for (auto a : sets) {
            if (a.second > highest) {
                secondHighest = highest;
                highest = a.second;
            } else if (a.second > secondHighest) {
                secondHighest = a.second;
            }
        }
        return highest + secondHighest + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
#include <bits/stdc++.h>
using namespace std;
#define all(a) a.begin(), a.end()
#define rall(a) a.rbegin(), a.rend()
#define pb push_back
#define sz(a) (int)(a).size()
#define up(a) iota(all(a),0);
using ll = long long;using ull = unsigned long long;using ld = long double;using i128 = __int128;using u128 = unsigned __int128;
using vi = vector<int>;using vl = vector<ll>;using vvi = vector<vi>;using vvl = vector<vl>;using vvvi = vector<vvi>;using vvvl = vector<vvl>;
using vd = vector<double>;using vs = vector<string>;using pii = pair<int, int>;using vpii = vector<pii>;
using si = set<int>;using msi = multiset<int>;using mii = map<int, int>;
const ll mod = 1000000007;//const ll mod = 998244353;
const double pai = acos(-1.0), eps = 1e-9;
template<class T> void debug(const T& x) { cout << x; }
template<class T> void debug(const vector<T>& v) { cout << "[";for (int i = 0, n = v.size();i < n;i++)cout << v[i] << ",]"[i + 1 == n]; }
template<class T> void debug(const vector<vector<T>>& v) { cout << endl;for (const auto& i : v) { debug(i);cout << endl; } }
template<class T> void debug(const set<T>& st) { debug(vector<T>(all(st))); }
template<class T> void debug(const multiset<T>& st) { debug(vector<T>(all(st))); }
template<class T> void debug(stack<T> stk) { vector<T> v;while (stk.size()) v.pb(stk.top()), stk.pop(); debug(v); }
template<class T> void debug(queue<T> q) { vector<T> v;while (q.size()) v.pb(q.front()), q.pop(); debug(v); }
template<class T> void debug(const deque<T>& d) { debug(vector<T>(all(d))); }
template<class T, class C, class Comp> void debug(const priority_queue<T, C, Comp>& p) { auto q = p; vector<T> v; while (!q.empty()) v.pb(q.top()), q.pop(); debug(v); }
template<class K, class V> void debug(const vector<pair<K, V>>& vp) { vs a;for (auto& [k, v] : vp) a.pb("[" + to_string(k) + "," + to_string(v) + "]"); debug(a); }
template<class K, class V> void debug(const map<K, V>& m) { vs a;for (auto& [k, v] : m) a.pb("[" + to_string(k) + "->" + to_string(v) + "]"); debug(a); }
template<class T> void debug(const char* name, const T& x) { cout << "debug: " << name << " = "; debug(x); cout << endl; }
#define db(x) debug(#x, x)
string to2(ll x) { string s;while (x) { s += x % 2 + '0';x >>= 1; }reverse(all(s));return s; }


class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& a) {
        int ans = 2;
        int n = sz(a);
        vi b,c;
        for (int i = 0;i < n - 1;i++) {
            b.pb(a[i + 1] - a[i]);
        }
        // for (int i = 0;i < n - 2;i++) {
        //     c.pb(a[i + 2] - a[i]);
        // }
        // db(b);
        // db(c);
        int pre = 1e9;
        int cnt = 1;
        for (int i : b) {
            if (pre == i) {
                cnt++;
            }
            else {
                cnt = 1;
            }
            ans = max(ans, cnt + 2);
            pre = i;
        }

        vi l(n-1, 1);
        for (int i = 1; i < n-2; i++) {
            if (b[i] == b[i - 1]) {
                l[i] = l[i - 1] + 1;
            }
            else {
                l[i] = 1;
            }
        }
        vi r(n-1, 1);
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (b[i] == b[i + 1]) {
                r[i] = r[i + 1] + 1;
            }
            else {
                r[i] = 1;
            }
        }
        // db(b);
        // db(l);
        // db(r);
        // // for (int i = 1;i < n - 2;i++) {
        // //     db(b[i]);
        // // }
        // db(n);
        for (int i = 0;i < n - 2;i++) {
            int d = b[i + 1] + b[i];
            //db(d);
            if (abs(d) % 2 == 1) {
                continue;
            }
            d /= 2;
            int cnt = 2;
            if (i - 1 >= 0 && b[i - 1] == d) {
                cnt += l[i - 1];
            }
            if (i + 2 < n - 1 && b[i + 2] == d) {
                cnt += r[i + 2];
            }
            //db(cnt);
            ans = max(ans, cnt+1);
        }
        return min(ans,n);
    }
};

### RANK 696 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 3) return n;

        int m = n - 1;
        vector<long long> difference_array(m);
        for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) {
            difference_array[i] = (long long)nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
        }

        vector<int> lftLnght(m, 1);
        for (int i = 1; i < m; ++i) {
            if (difference_array[i] == difference_array[i - 1]) {
                lftLnght[i] = lftLnght[i - 1] + 1;
            } else {
                lftLnght[i] = 1;
            }
        }

        vector<int> rgtLngth(m, 1);
        for (int i = m - 2; i >= 0; --i) {
            if (difference_array[i] == difference_array[i + 1]) {
                rgtLngth[i] = rgtLngth[i + 1] + 1;
            } else {
                rgtLngth[i] = 1;
            }
        }

        int max_len = 3; 

        for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) {
            if (i == 0 || difference_array[i] != difference_array[i - 1]) {
                int L = rgtLngth[i];
                if (L == m) {
                    max_len = max(max_len, L + 1); 
                } else {
                    max_len = max(max_len, L + 2);
                }
            }
        }

        for (int i = 0; i < m - 1; ++i) {
            long long S = difference_array[i] + difference_array[i + 1];
            
            if (S % 2 == 0) {
                long long dval = S / 2;
                int current_difference_array_len = 2; 
                
                if (i > 0 && difference_array[i - 1] == dval) {
                    current_difference_array_len += lftLnght[i - 1];
                }
                
              
                if (i + 2 < m && difference_array[i + 2] == dval) {
                    current_difference_array_len += rgtLngth[i + 2];
                }
                
               
                max_len = max(max_len, current_difference_array_len + 1);
            }
        }

        return max_len;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
         int n = points.size();
         if(n==0) return 1;

        vector<int>parentNodes(n);
        iota(parentNodes.begin(),parentNodes.end(),0);

        auto find = [&](auto& self,int i)->int {
            if(parentNodes[i]==i)return i;
            return parentNodes[i]=self(self,parentNodes[i]);
        };

        auto unionFn = [&](int i,int j){
            int rooti=find(find,i);
            int rootj=find(find,j);

            if(rooti!=rootj)parentNodes[rooti]=rootj;
        };
        
         unordered_map<int,vector<int>> rows,cols;

        for (int i=0;i<n;i++){
            rows[points[i][0]].push_back(i);
            cols[points[i][1]].push_back(i);
        }

       for (auto& [x, indices] : rows) {
            for (int i = 1; i < indices.size(); ++i) {
                unionFn(indices[0], indices[i]);
            }
        }

         for (auto& [y, indices] : cols) {
            for (int i = 1; i < indices.size(); ++i) {
                unionFn(indices[0], indices[i]);
            }
        }

        unordered_map<int,int>cmp_sz;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            cmp_sz[find(find,i)]++;
        }

        vector<int>ans;

        for(auto& [root,sz]: cmp_sz){
            ans.push_back(sz);
        }
        sort(ans.rbegin(), ans.rend());

        return (ans.size()>=2)?ans[0]+ans[1]+1:(ans.size()==1)?ans[0]+1:1;
        
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 697 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 2) return n; 
        
        vector<int> A(n - 1);
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; ++i) {
            A[i] = nums[i+1] - nums[i];
        }
        
        vector<int> L(n - 1, 1), R(n - 1, 1);
        int max_d = 1;
        
        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; ++i) {
            if (A[i] == A[i-1]) L[i] = L[i-1] + 1;
            max_d = max(max_d, L[i]);
        }
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; --i) {
            if (A[i] == A[i+1]) R[i] = R[i+1] + 1;
        }
        
        int max_diff_len = (max_d == n - 1) ? max_d : max_d + 1;
        
        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; ++i) {
            long long sum = (long long)A[i-1] + A[i];
            
            if (sum % 2 == 0) {
                long long d = sum / 2;
                int current_len = 2; 
                
                if (i >= 2 && A[i-2] == d) current_len += L[i-2];
                if (i <= n - 3 && A[i+1] == d) current_len += R[i+1];
                
                max_diff_len = max(max_diff_len, current_len);
            }
        }
        
        return max_diff_len + 1;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        if (n == 0) return 1;

        vector<int> parent(n);
        vector<int> size(n, 1);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) parent[i] = i;

        function<int(int)> find = [&](int i) {
            if (parent[i] == i) return i;
            return parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
        };

        auto unite = [&](int i, int j) {
            int root_i = find(i);
            int root_j = find(j);
            if (root_i != root_j) {
                if (size[root_i] < size[root_j]) swap(root_i, root_j);
                parent[root_j] = root_i;
                size[root_i] += size[root_j];
            }
        };

        unordered_map<int, int> x_to_point;
        unordered_map<int, int> y_to_point;

        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];

            if (x_to_point.count(x)) {
                unite(i, x_to_point[x]);
            } else {
                x_to_point[x] = i;
            }

            if (y_to_point.count(y)) {
                unite(i, y_to_point[y]);
            } else {
                y_to_point[y] = i;
            }
        }

        vector<int> component_sizes;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            if (parent[i] == i) {
                component_sizes.push_back(size[i]);
            }
        }

        if (component_sizes.size() == 1) {
            return component_sizes[0] + 1;
        }

        sort(component_sizes.rbegin(), component_sizes.rend());
        
        return component_sizes[0] + component_sizes[1] + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 699 ###
[Q3_START]
from typing import List

class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 3:
            return n
        diffs = [nums[i] - nums[i-1] for i in range(1, n)]
        m = len(diffs)
        L_arr = [1] * m
        for i in range(1, m):
            if diffs[i] == diffs[i-1]:
                L_arr[i] = L_arr[i-1] + 1
        R_arr = [1] * m
        for i in range(m - 2, -1, -1):
            if diffs[i] == diffs[i+1]:
                R_arr[i] = R_arr[i+1] + 1
                
        max_len = 3 
        
        for i in range(m):
            if L_arr[i] == m:
                max_len = max(max_len, m + 1)
            else:
                max_len = max(max_len, L_arr[i] + 2)
                
        for i in range(m - 1):
            total_sum = diffs[i] + diffs[i+1]
            
            if total_sum % 2 == 0:
                d = total_sum // 2
                
                left_streak = 0
                if i > 0 and diffs[i-1] == d:
                    left_streak = L_arr[i-1]
                    
                right_streak = 0
                if i + 2 < m and diffs[i+2] == d:
                    right_streak = R_arr[i+2]
                    
                max_len = max(max_len, left_streak + right_streak + 3)
                
        return max_len
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
from typing import List

class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: List[List[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        parent = list(range(n))
        def find(i):
            while i != parent[i]:
                parent[i] = parent[parent[i]]
                i = parent[i]
            return i
            
        def union(i, j):
            root_i = find(i)
            root_j = find(j)
            if root_i != root_j:
                parent[root_i] = root_j
                
        x_to_idx = {}
        y_to_idx = {}
        
        for i, (x, y) in enumerate(points):
            if x in x_to_idx:
                union(i, x_to_idx[x])
            else:
                x_to_idx[x] = i
                
            if y in y_to_idx:
                union(i, y_to_idx[y])
            else:
                y_to_idx[y] = i
                
        sizes = {}
        for i in range(n):
            root = find(i)
            sizes[root] = sizes.get(root, 0) + 1
            
        sorted_sizes = sorted(sizes.values(), reverse=True)
        
        if len(sorted_sizes) >= 2:
            return sorted_sizes[0] + sorted_sizes[1] + 1
        return sorted_sizes[0] + 1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 700 ###
[Q3_START]
#include<iostream>
#include<vector>
#include<string>
#include<map>
#include<cmath>
#include<set>
#include<queue>
#include<algorithm>
using namespace std;

#define ll long long

class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) 
    {
        int n = nums.size();

        vector<int> arithmeticToLeft(n);
        vector<int> arithmeticToRight(n);

        arithmeticToLeft[0] = 1;
        arithmeticToLeft[1] = 2;
        arithmeticToRight[n-1] = 1;
        arithmeticToRight[n-2] = 2;

        ll i, currDiff;

        currDiff = nums[1] - nums[0];
        i = 2;
        while(i<n) {
            if((nums[i] - nums[i-1]) == currDiff) {
                arithmeticToLeft[i] = arithmeticToLeft[i-1] + 1;
            }
            else {
                arithmeticToLeft[i] = 2;
                currDiff = (nums[i] - nums[i-1]);
            }
            i++;
        }
        

        currDiff = nums[n-1] - nums[n-2];
        i = n-3;
        while(i>=0) {
            if((nums[i+1] - nums[i]) == currDiff) {
                arithmeticToRight[i] = arithmeticToRight[i+1] + 1;
            }
            else {
                arithmeticToRight[i] = 2;
                currDiff = (nums[i+1] - nums[i]);
            }
            i--;
        }

        int ans = 2;

        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            ans = max(ans, arithmeticToLeft[i]);
            ans = max(ans, arithmeticToRight[i]);

            if (i > 0) ans = max(ans, arithmeticToLeft[i-1] + 1);
            if (i < n - 1) ans = max(ans, arithmeticToRight[i+1] + 1);

            if (i > 0 && i < n - 1) {
                int diff = nums[i+1] - nums[i-1];

                if (diff % 2 == 0) {
                    ans = max(ans, 3);

                    int d = diff / 2;
                    int len = 1;

                    if (i > 0 && (i == 1 || nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == d)) {
                        len += arithmeticToLeft[i-1];
                    }
                    else {
                        len += 1;
                    }

                    if (i < n-1 && (i == n-2 || nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == d)) {
                        len += arithmeticToRight[i+1];
                    }
                    else {
                        len += 1;
                    }

                    ans = max(ans, len);
                }
            }
        }


        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
#include <iostream>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <unordered_map>
#include <cmath>
#include <set>
#include <queue>
#include <algorithm>

using namespace std;

#define ll long long
#define vll vector<long long>

bool xCmp(vector<int>&p1, vector<int>&p2) {
    return p1[0] < p2[0];
}

bool yCmp(vector<int>&p1, vector<int>&p2) {
    return p1[1] < p2[1];
}

ll find(vll& parent, ll x) {
    if (x == parent[x]) { return x; }
    parent[x] = find(parent, parent[x]);
    return parent[x];
}

void unionDSU(vll& parent, vll& rank, vll& sz, ll x, ll y) {
    ll x_rep = find(parent, x);
    ll y_rep = find(parent, y);

    if (x_rep == y_rep) { return; }

    if (rank[x_rep] > rank[y_rep]) {
        parent[y_rep] = x_rep;
        sz[x_rep] += sz[y_rep]; 
    }
    else if (rank[x_rep] < rank[y_rep]) {
        parent[x_rep] = y_rep;
        sz[y_rep] += sz[x_rep]; 
    }
    else {
        parent[y_rep] = x_rep;
        rank[x_rep]++;
        sz[x_rep] += sz[y_rep]; 
    }
}

bool sameSet(vll& parent, ll x, ll y) {
    return find(parent, x) == find(parent, y);
}

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        if (n == 0) return 1;

        vll parent(n);
        vll rank(n, 0);
        vll sz(n, 1); 

        for (ll i = 0; i < n; i++) { parent[i] = i; }

        unordered_map<int, int> lastX, lastY;

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];

            if (lastX.count(x)) {
                unionDSU(parent, rank, sz, i, lastX[x]);
            }
            lastX[x] = i;

            if (lastY.count(y)) {
                unionDSU(parent, rank, sz, i, lastY[y]);
            }
            lastY[y] = i;
        }

        vector<int> compSizes;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (parent[i] == i) {
                compSizes.push_back((int)sz[i]);
            }
        }

        sort(compSizes.rbegin(), compSizes.rend());

        if (compSizes.size() == 1) {
            return compSizes[0] + 1;
        }
        
        return compSizes[0] + compSizes[1] + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 751 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if(n <= 2) return n;

        vector<int> left(n, 1);
        vector<int> right(n, 1);

        left[1] = 2;
        for(int i=2; i<n; i++){
            if(nums[i-1]-nums[i-2] == nums[i]-nums[i-1]){
                left[i] = left[i-1]+1;
            }
            else left[i] = 2;
        }

        right[n-2] = 2;
        for(int i=n-3; i>=0; i--){
            if(nums[i+1]-nums[i] == nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]){
                right[i] = right[i+1]+1;
            }
            else right[i] = 2;
        }

        int maxlen = 2;
        for(int i=0; i<n; i++){
            if(i>0) maxlen = max(maxlen, left[i-1]+1);
            if(i<n-1) maxlen = max(maxlen, right[i+1]+1);

            if(i>0 && i<n-1){
                int cd2 = nums[i+1] - nums[i-1];

                if(cd2%2 == 0){
                    int cd = cd2/2;

                    int len = 3;

                    if(i > 1 && nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == cd){
                        len += (left[i-1]-1);
                    }
                    if(i<n-2 && nums[i+2]-nums[i+1] == cd){
                        len += (right[i+1]-1);
                    }

                    maxlen = max(maxlen, len);
                }

                maxlen = max(maxlen, 3);
            }
        }

        return min(maxlen, n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DisjointSet{
    public:
    vector<int> parent, size;
    DisjointSet(int n){
        parent.resize(n+1);
        size.resize(n+1, 1);
        for(int i=0; i<=n; i++){
            parent[i] = i;
        }
    }

    int findUPar(int node){
        if(node == parent[node]) return node;
        return parent[node] = findUPar(parent[node]);
    }

    void unionx(int u, int v){
        int pu = findUPar(u);
        int pv = findUPar(v);

        if(pu == pv) return;
        
        if(size[pu] < size[pv]){
            parent[pu] = pv;
            size[pv] += size[pu];
        }
        else{
            parent[pv] = pu;
            size[pu] += size[pv];
        }
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        DisjointSet ds(n);
        
        map<int, int> lastx, lasty;

        for(int i=0; i<n; i++){
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];

            if(lastx.count(x)){
                ds.unionx(i, lastx[x]);
            }
            else lastx[x] = i;
            if(lasty.count(y)){
                ds.unionx(i, lasty[y]);
            }
            else lasty[y] = i;
        }

        int max1 = 0, max2 = 0;

        for(int i=0; i<n; i++){
            if(ds.findUPar(i) == i){
                if(ds.size[i] > max1){
                    max2 = max1;
                    max1 = ds.size[i];
                }
                else if(ds.size[i] > max2){
                    max2 = ds.size[i];
                }
            }
        }

        if(max2 == 0) return max1+1;

        return max1+max2+1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 753 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        if(n<=2)
            return n;
        int[] pre = new int[n];
        int[] suf = new int[n];
        pre[0] = 1;
        pre[1] = 2;
        for(int i=2;i<n;i++){
            if(nums[i]-nums[i-1] == nums[i-1]-nums[i-2])
                pre[i] = pre[i-1]+1;
            else
                pre[i] = 2;
        }
        suf[n-1] = 1;
        suf[n-2] = 2;
        for(int i=n-3;i>=0;i--){
            if(nums[i+1]-nums[i] == nums[i+2]-nums[i+1])
                suf[i] = suf[i+1]+1;
            else
                suf[i] = 2;
        }
        int ans = 2;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++)
            ans = Math.max(ans,pre[i]);
        for(int i=1;i<n-1;i++){
            int d = nums[i+1]-nums[i-1];
            if(d%2==0){
                int diff = d/2;
                int l=1,r=1;
                if(i-2>=0 && nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == diff)
                    l = pre[i-1];
                if(i+2<n && nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == diff)
                    r = suf[i+1];
                ans = Math.max(ans,l+r+1);
            }
        }
        for(int i=1;i<n;i++)
            ans = Math.max(ans,pre[i-1]+1);
        for(int i=n-2;i>=0;i--)
            ans = Math.max(ans,suf[i+1]+1);
        return Math.min(ans,n);
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    class DSU {
        int[] p, sz;

        DSU(int n) {
            p = new int[n];
            sz = new int[n];
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
                p[i] = i;
                sz[i] = 1;
            }
        }

        int f(int x) {
            if (p[x] != x)
                p[x] = f(p[x]);
            return p[x];
        }

        void u(int a, int b) {
            a = f(a);
            b = f(b);
            if (a != b) {
                if (sz[a] < sz[b]) {
                    int t = a;
                    a = b;
                    b = t;
                }
                p[b] = a;
                sz[a] += sz[b];
            }
        }
    }

    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        HashMap<Integer, Integer> xm = new HashMap<>();
        HashMap<Integer, Integer> ym = new HashMap<>();
        DSU d = new DSU(n);
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];
            if(!xm.containsKey(x))
                xm.put(x,i);
            else
                d.u(i,xm.get(x));
            if(!ym.containsKey(y))
                ym.put(y,i);
            else
                d.u(i,ym.get(y));
            
        }
        Map<Integer,Integer> comp = new HashMap<>();
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            int root = d.f(i);
            if(i==root)
                comp.put(root,d.sz[root]);
        }
        List<Integer> sizes = new ArrayList<>(comp.values());
        Collections.sort(sizes,Collections.reverseOrder());
        if(sizes.size() >=2)
            return sizes.get(0) + sizes.get(1)+1;
        else
            return sizes.get(0)+1;
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 755 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:

int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
    int n = nums.size();
    vector<array<int, 3>> vv;
    bool first = true;
    int diff = 0;
    int start = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < n - 1;) {
        if (first) {
            diff = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
            first = false;
            i++;
        }
        else {
            if (nums[i + 1] - nums[i] != diff) {
                first = true;
                vv.push_back({ start,i,diff });
                start = i;
            }
            else {
                i++;
            }
        }
    }
    vv.push_back({ start,n - 1,diff });

    if (vv.size() == 1) return n;
    int res = 0;
    for (auto [a, b, c] : vv) {
        res = max(b - a + 1 + 1, res);
    }

    vector<pair<int, int>> vpos(n,{-1,-1});
    for (auto [a, b, c] : vv) {
        for (int i = b; i >= a; i--)
        {
            int len = b - i + 1;
            if (len > vpos[i].first)
                vpos[i].first = len, vpos[i].second = c;
        }
    }

    for (int i = 0; i < vv.size(); i++) {
        if (vv[i][1] + 2 < n) {
            if (nums[vv[i][1]] + 2 * vv[i][2] == nums[vv[i][1]+2])
            {
                res = max(res, vv[i][1] - vv[i][0] + 1 + 2);
                if (vv[i][2] == vpos[vv[i][1] + 2].second)
                    res = max(res, vv[i][1] - vv[i][0] + 1 + vpos[vv[i][1] + 2].first+1);
            }
        }
    }
        for (int i = 0; i < vv.size(); i++) {
        if (vv[i][0]-2>=0) {
            if (nums[vv[i][0]]-2 * vv[i][2] == nums[vv[i][0]-2])
            {
                res = max(res, vv[i][1] - vv[i][0] + 1 + 2);
            }
        }
    }
    return res;
}

};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
struct dsu {
public:
    dsu() : _n(0) {}
    explicit dsu(int n) : _n(n), parent_or_size(n, -1) {}

    int merge(int a, int b) {
        assert(0 <= a && a < _n);
        assert(0 <= b && b < _n);
        int x = leader(a), y = leader(b);
        if (x == y) return x;
        if (-parent_or_size[x] < -parent_or_size[y]) std::swap(x, y);
        parent_or_size[x] += parent_or_size[y];
        parent_or_size[y] = x;
        return x;
    }

    bool same(int a, int b) {
        assert(0 <= a && a < _n);
        assert(0 <= b && b < _n);
        return leader(a) == leader(b);
    }

    int leader(int a) {
        assert(0 <= a && a < _n);
        if (parent_or_size[a] < 0) return a;
        return parent_or_size[a] = leader(parent_or_size[a]);
    }

    int size(int a) {
        assert(0 <= a && a < _n);
        return -parent_or_size[leader(a)];
    }

    void reset(int a) {
        parent_or_size[a] = -1;
    }

    std::vector<std::vector<int>> groups() {
        std::vector<int> leader_buf(_n), group_size(_n);
        for (int i = 0; i < _n; i++) {
            leader_buf[i] = leader(i);
            group_size[leader_buf[i]]++;
        }
        std::vector<std::vector<int>> result(_n);
        for (int i = 0; i < _n; i++) {
            result[i].reserve(group_size[i]);
        }
        for (int i = 0; i < _n; i++) {
            result[leader_buf[i]].push_back(i);
        }
        result.erase(
            std::remove_if(result.begin(), result.end(),
                [&](const std::vector<int>& v) { return v.empty(); }),
            result.end());
        return result;
    }

private:
    int _n;
    // root node: -1 * component size
    // otherwise: parent
    std::vector<int> parent_or_size;
};


class Solution {
public:
 
int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
    int n = points.size();
    dsu uni(n);
    unordered_map<int, vector<int>> um1, um2;
    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
        int x = points[i][0], y = points[i][1];
        um1[x].push_back(i);
        um2[y].push_back(i);
    }
    for (auto& iter : um1)
    {
        auto& vv = iter.second;
        for (int i = 0; i < vv.size() - 1; i++)
            uni.merge(vv[i], vv[i + 1]);
    }

    for (auto& iter : um2)
    {
        auto& vv = iter.second;
        for (int i = 0; i < vv.size() - 1; i++)
            uni.merge(vv[i], vv[i + 1]);
    }

    auto p = uni.groups();
    vector<int> vp;
    for (auto& v : p)
        vp.push_back(v.size());

    if (vp.size() == 1) return n+1;
    sort(vp.begin(), vp.end());
    return vp[vp.size() - 1] + vp[vp.size() - 2]+1;
}
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 756 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        left = [[1, -10000000000]]
        right = [[1, -10000000000]]

        prev = 0
        diff = -sys.maxsize
        for i in range(1, len(nums)):
            if nums[i] - nums[i-1] != diff: # start a new 
                diff = nums[i] - nums[i-1]
                prev = 2
            else:
                prev += 1
            left.append([prev, diff])

        prev = 0
        diff = -sys.maxsize
        for i in reversed(range(len(nums)-1)):
            if nums[i] - nums[i+1] != diff:
                diff = nums[i] - nums[i+1]
                prev = 2
            else:
                prev += 1
            right.append([prev, diff])
        right = right[::-1]

        #print(left, right)

        res = 0
        for i in range(len(nums)):
            #print('Hey ', i)
            L, diff_L, R, diff_R = 0, -sys.maxsize, 0, -sys.maxsize
            if i > 0:
                L, diff_L = left[i-1]
            if i < len(nums) - 1:
                R, diff_R = right[i+1]
            #print(L, diff_L, R, diff_R)
            if i > 0 and i < len(nums) - 1 and diff_L == -diff_R and (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) == 2 * diff_L:                
                res = max(res, L + R + 1)
                #print('case0 ', res)
            else: 
                if L and i < len(nums) - 1 and (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) == 2 * diff_L:
                    res = max(res, L + 2)
                    #print('case1 ', res)
                if R and i > 0 and (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) == -2 * diff_R:
                    res = max(res, R + 2)
                    #print('case2 ', res)
                res = max(res, max(L, R) + 1) # only i can be appended
                #print('case3 ', res)
            #print(res)
        return res
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        X_map = collections.defaultdict(list)
        Y_map = collections.defaultdict(list)

        for i, (x, y) in enumerate(points):
            X_map[x].append(i)
            Y_map[y].append(i)
        
        seen = [0] * len(points)

        block = 0
        def dfs(node):
            if seen[node]:
                return
            seen[node] = block
            x, y = points[node]
            for nxt in X_map.pop(x, []):
                if not seen[nxt]:
                    dfs(nxt)
            for nxt in Y_map.pop(y, []):
                if not seen[nxt]:
                    dfs(nxt)
            return

        for i in range(len(seen)):
            if not seen[i]: # start a new block
                block += 1
                dfs(i)

        cnt = collections.Counter(seen)
        sizes = sorted(cnt.values())
        return sizes[-1] + (sizes[-2] if len(sizes) > 1 else 0) + 1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 757 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    using ll = long long;
    vector<ll> diff;
    int n;
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        n = nums.size();
        diff.resize(n - 1);
        for (int i = 1; i < n; i++) {
            diff[i - 1] = nums[i] - nums[i - 1];
        }

        ll maxLen = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) {
            ll ele = diff[i];
            ll cnt = 0;
            while (i < n - 1 && diff[i] == ele) {
                cnt++;
                i++;
            }
            
            if(cnt < n - 1) {
                cnt++;
            }
            maxLen = max(maxLen, cnt);
            i--;
        }

        for(int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) {
            ll ele = diff[i];
            ll cnt = 0;
            int currIdx = i;
            while(i < n-1 && diff[i] == ele) {
                cnt++;
                i++;
            }
            ll back = cnt;
            ll forward = cnt;
            if(i + 2 < n) {
                if(diff[i] + diff[i+1] == 2LL * ele) {
                    ll cnt2 = 0, j = i + 2;
                    while(j < n-1 && diff[j] == ele) {
                        cnt2++;
                        j++;
                    }
                    forward = cnt + 2 + cnt2;
                }
            }

            if(currIdx >= 2) {
                if(diff[currIdx- 1] + diff[currIdx - 2] == 2LL * ele) {
                    back = cnt + 2;
                }
            }
            maxLen = max(maxLen, max(forward, back));
            i--;
        }
        return maxLen + 1;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    using ll = long long;
    ll n;
    vector<ll> parent;
    vector<ll> rank;
    vector<ll> sz;

    ll find(ll i) {
        if (parent[i] == i) {
            return i;
        }
        return parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
    }

    void Union(ll a, ll b) {
        ll parent_a = find(a);
        ll parent_b = find(b);
        if (parent_a == parent_b)
            return;

        if (rank[parent_a] > rank[parent_b]) {
            parent[parent_b] = parent_a;
            sz[parent_a] += sz[parent_b];
        } else if (rank[parent_b] > rank[parent_a]) {
            parent[parent_a] = parent_b;
            sz[parent_b] += sz[parent_a];
        } else {
            parent[parent_b] = parent_a;
            sz[parent_a] += sz[parent_b];
            rank[parent_a]++;
        }
    }
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        n = points.size();
        parent.resize(n + 1);
        rank.resize(n + 1, 1);
        sz.resize(n + 1, 1);
        for (int i = 0; i <= n; i++) {
            parent[i] = i;
        }

        unordered_map<int, int> stX, stY;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int X = points[i][0];
            int Y = points[i][1];

            if (stX.find(X) == stX.end()) {
                stX[X] = i;
            } else {
                Union(i, stX[X]);
            }

            if (stY.find(Y) == stY.end()) {
                stY[Y] = i;
            } else {
                Union(i, stY[Y]);
            }
        }

        ll max1 = 0, max2 = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (parent[i] == i) {
                if (sz[i] > max1) {
                    max2 = max1;
                    max1 = sz[i];
                } else if (sz[i] > max2) {
                    max2 = sz[i];
                }
            }
        }
        max2++;
        return max1 + max2;
    }
};
[Q4_END]
##################

### RANK 758 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 2) return n;

        // pref[i] = length of arithmetic subarray ending at i
        vector<int> pref(n, 1);
        for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
            if (i > 1 && nums[i] - nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2])
                pref[i] = pref[i-1] + 1;
            else
                pref[i] = 2;
        }

        // suff[i] = length of arithmetic subarray starting at i
        vector<int> suff(n, 1);
        for (int i = n - 2; i >= 0; --i) {
            if (i < n - 2 && nums[i+1] - nums[i] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1])
                suff[i] = suff[i+1] + 1;
            else
                suff[i] = 2;
        }

        int ans = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            // Case 1: Extend an existing prefix or suffix by changing one neighbor
            if (i > 0) ans = max(ans, pref[i-1] + 1);
            if (i < n - 1) ans = max(ans, suff[i+1] + 1);

            // Case 2: Bridge two subarrays by changing nums[i]
            if (i > 0 && i < n - 1) {
                int total_diff = nums[i+1] - nums[i-1];
                if (total_diff % 2 == 0) {
                    int d = total_diff / 2;
                    int left_len = 1, right_len = 1;
                    
                    // If the diff to the left matches our bridge diff
                    if (i > 1 && nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == d) left_len = pref[i-1];
                    // If the diff to the right matches our bridge diff
                    if (i < n - 2 && nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == d) right_len = suff[i+1];
                    
                    ans = max(ans, left_len + right_len + 1);
                }
            }
        }

        return min(n, ans);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    struct DSU {
        vector<int> p;
        vector<int> sz;
        DSU(int n) {
            p.resize(n);
            sz.resize(n, 1);
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) p[i] = i;
        }
        int find(int x) {
            if (p[x] == x) return x;
            return p[x] = find(p[x]);
        }
        void unite(int a, int b) {
            a = find(a);
            b = find(b);
            if (a != b) {
                if (sz[a] < sz[b]) swap(a, b);
                p[b] = a;
                sz[a] += sz[b];
            }
        }
    };

    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        if (n == 0) return 1;
        DSU dsu(n);

        // Map X and Y coordinates to the first point index that uses them
        unordered_map<int, int> lastX, lastY;

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];
            
            if (lastX.count(x)) dsu.unite(i, lastX[x]);
            lastX[x] = i;
            
            if (lastY.count(y)) dsu.unite(i, lastY[y]);
            lastY[y] = i;
        }

        // Count size of each connected component
        unordered_map<int, int> counts;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            counts[dsu.find(i)]++;
        }

        // Get all component sizes
        vector<int> sizes;
        for (auto const& [root, size] : counts) {
            sizes.push_back(size);
        }
        sort(sizes.rbegin(), sizes.rend());

        // Logic: 
        // 1. If multiple components, join the two largest: Size1 + Size2 + 1
        // 2. If only one component, just add the new point: Size1 + 1
        if (sizes.size() >= 2) {
            return sizes[0] + sizes[1] + 1;
        } else {
            return sizes[0] + 1;
        }
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 759 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    vector<vector<unordered_map<int, int>>> mp;
    
    int get(int i, int j, int d) {
        if(0 == mp[i][j].count(d)) { return 1; }
        else { return mp[i][j][d]; }
    }
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& v) {
        int n = v.size();
        int ans = 3;
        int a1 = 2;
        
        mp = vector<vector<unordered_map<int, int>>>(n, vector<unordered_map<int, int>>(2));
        mp[1][1][v[1]-v[0]] = 2;
        // 1 means still one left
        if(v[2]-v[1] == v[1]-v[0]) {
            mp[2][1][v[2]-v[1]] = 3;
            a1 = 3;
        }
        else {
            mp[2][1][v[2]-v[1]] = 2;
            if((v[0]-v[2] ) % 2 == 0) { mp[2][0][(v[2]-v[0])/2] = 3; }
            mp[2][0][v[2]-v[1]] = 3;
        }

        for(int i = 3; i < n; ++i) {
            int d = v[i]-v[i-1];
            int d1 = v[i-1]-v[i-2];
            int d2 = v[i]-v[i-2];
            
            mp[i][1][d] = max(mp[i][1][d], get(i-1, 1, d)+1);
            mp[i][0][d] = max(mp[i][0][d], get(i-1, 0, d)+1);
            // if(d1 != d) {
            //     mp[i][0][d1] = max(mp[i][0][d1], get(i-1, 1, d1) + 1);
            //     ans = max(ans, mp[i][0][d1]);
            // }
            if(d2 % 2 == 0 && d != d2-d) {
                mp[i][0][d2/2] = max(mp[i][0][d2/2], get(i-2, 1, d2/2) + 2);
                ans = max({ans, mp[i][0][d2/2]});
            }
            ans = max({ans, mp[i][0][d], mp[i][1][d]});
            a1 = max(a1, mp[i][1][d]);
        }
        // for(int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
        //     // int d = v[i-1]-v[i-2];
        //     // int d1 = v[i]-v[i-1];
        //     // ans = max(ans, get(i-1, 1, d) + 1);
        //     int d = v[i]-v[i-1];
        //     a1 = max(a1, mp[i][1][d]);
        // }
        if(a1 < n) { ++a1; }
        return max(a1, ans);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    vector<int> par;
    void init(int n) {
        par = vector<int>(n);
        for(int i = 0; i < n; ++i) { par[i] = i; }
    }

    int get(int x) { return x == par[x] ? x : par[x] = get(par[x]); }
    void merge(int x, int y) {
        // cout << "m: " << x << ", " << y << endl;
        x = get(x);
        y = get(y);
        if(x > y) { par[x] = y; }
        else { par[y] = x; }
        // par[get(x)] = get(y);
    }
    
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& ps) {
        int n = ps.size();
        init(n);
        unordered_map<int, int> xs, ys;
        
        for(int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            int x = ps[i][0], y = ps[i][1];
            if(0 != xs.count(x)) {
                merge(xs[x], i);
            }
            else { xs[x] = i; }
            
            if(0 != ys.count(y)) {
                merge(ys[y], i);
            }
            else { ys[y] = i; }
        }

        unordered_map<int, int> cnt;
        for(int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            // cout << i << ": " << get(i) << endl;
            ++cnt[get(i)];
        }
        if(cnt.size() == 1) { return cnt.begin() -> second + 1; }
        else {
            int a = 0, b = 0;
            for(auto &p : cnt) {
                if(p.second > b) { b = p.second; }
                if(b > a) { swap(a, b); }
            }
            return a + b + 1;
        }
    }
};
[Q4_END]
