### RANK 761 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n=nums.size();
        vector<pair<int, int>> left(n, {1, -1e9}), right(n, {1, -1e9});
        int maxi=1;
        for(int i=1; i<n; i++)
            {
                int d=nums[i]-nums[i-1];
                if(i>1 && d==left[i-1].second)
                    left[i]={left[i-1].first+1,d};
                else
                    left[i]={2, d};
                maxi=max(left[i].first, maxi);
            }
        for(int i=n-2; i>=0; i--)
            {
                int d=nums[i+1]-nums[i];
                if(i<n-2 && d==right[i+1].second)
                    right[i]={right[i+1].first+1,d};
                else
                    right[i]={2, d};
                maxi=max(right[i].first, maxi);
            }
        // for(int i=0; i<n; i++)
        //     {
        //         cout<<left[i].first<<" "<<left[i].second<<endl;
        //     }
        // for(int i=0; i<n; i++)
        //     {
        //         cout<<right[i].first<<" "<<right[i].second<<endl;
        //     }
        for(int i=0; i<n; i++)
            {
              if(i>0)
                  maxi=max(maxi, left[i-1].first+1);
                if(i<n-1)
                    maxi=max(maxi, right[i+1].first+1);
                if(i>0 && i<n-1)
                {
                    int td=nums[i+1]-nums[i-1];
                    if(td%2==0)
                    {
                        int target=td/2;
                        int combined=3;
                        if(i>1 && left[i-1].second==target)combined+=left[i-1].first-1;
                        if(i<n-2 && right[i+1].second==target)combined+=right[i+1].first-1;
                        maxi=max(maxi, combined);
                    }
                }
                
            }
        return maxi;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int find(vector<int>&parent, int i)
    {
        if(parent[i]==i)
            return i;
        return parent[i]=find(parent, parent[i]);
    }
    void unite(vector<int>&parent, vector<int>&size, int i, int j)
    {
        i=find(parent, i);
        j=find(parent, j);
        if(i!=j)
        {
            if(size[i]<size[j])
                swap(i, j);
            parent[j]=i;
            size[i]+=size[j];
        }
    }
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n=points.size();
        if(n==0)return 1;

        vector<int> parent(n);
        vector<int> size(n, 1);
        for(int i=0; i<n; i++)
            {
                parent[i]=i;
            }
        unordered_map<int, int>x_map;
        unordered_map<int, int>y_map;
        for(int i=0; i<n; i++)
            {
                if(x_map.count(points[i][0]))
                    unite(parent, size, i, x_map[points[i][0]]);
                else
                    x_map[points[i][0]]=i;
                if(y_map.count(points[i][1]))
                    unite(parent, size, i, y_map[points[i][1]]);
                else
                    y_map[points[i][1]]=i;
            }
        int max1=0, max2=0;
        for(int i=0; i<n; i++)
            {
                if(parent[i]==i)
                {
                    if(size[i]>max1)
                    {
                        max2=max1;
                        max1=size[i];
                    }
                    else if(size[i]>max2)
                    {
                        max2=size[i];
                    }
                }
            }
        return max1+max2+1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 762 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        vector<int> l(n, 1), r(n, 1);

        l[1] = 2;
        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            if (nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]) {
                l[i] = l[i - 1] + 1;
            } else {
                l[i] = 2;
            }
        }

        r[n - 2] = 2;
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]) {
                r[i] = r[i + 1] + 1;
            } else {
                r[i] = 2;
            }
        }

        int ans = 2;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            ans = max(ans, l[i]);
        }

        ans = min(n, ans + 1);

        for (int i = 1; i + 1 < n; i++) {
            int x = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1];
            if (x & 1) continue;

            int d = x / 2;
            int a = 1, b = 1;

            if (i >= 2 && nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == d) {
                a = l[i - 1];
            }
            if (i + 2 < n && nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == d) {
                b = r[i + 1];
            }

            ans = max(ans, a + 1 + b);
        }

        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
using LL = long long;
using ULL = unsigned long long;

struct Dsu {
    vector<int> pa, sz;

    Dsu(int n) {
        pa.resize(n);
        sz.assign(n, 1);
        iota(pa.begin(), pa.end(), 0);
    }

    int f(int x) {
        if (pa[x] == x) return x;
        return pa[x] = f(pa[x]);
    }

    void un(int a, int b) {
        a = f(a);
        b = f(b);
        if (a == b) return;
        if (sz[a] < sz[b]) swap(a, b);
        pa[b] = a;
        sz[a] += sz[b];
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = (int)points.size();

        unordered_map<int, int> xid, yid;
        int mx = 0, my = 0;

        for (auto &p : points) {
            int x = p[0], y = p[1];
            if (!xid.count(x)) xid[x] = mx++;
            if (!yid.count(y)) yid[y] = my++;
        }

        Dsu d(mx + my);

        for (auto &p : points) {
            int x = xid[p[0]];
            int y = mx + yid[p[1]];
            d.un(x, y);
        }

        unordered_map<int, int> cnt;

        for (auto &p : points) {
            int x = xid[p[0]];
            int r = d.f(x);
            cnt[r]++;
        }

        int a = 0, b = 0;
        for (auto &[r, c] : cnt) {
            if (c >= a) {
                b = a;
                a = c;
            } else if (c > b) {
                b = c;
            }
        }

        return a + b + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]
##################

### RANK 763 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        diff = [nums[i+1]-nums[i] for i in range(n-1)]
        ap = []
        i = 0
        while i<n-1:
            j=i
            while j<n-1 and diff[j]==diff[i]:
                j+=1
            ap.append((diff[i], i, j-1))
            i=j
        st2aplen = {g[1]: (g[2]-g[1]+1) for g in ap}
        end2aplen = {g[2]: (g[2]-g[1]+1) for g in ap}
        res = 0
        for df, l, r in ap:
            curr_len = r-l+1
            curr_max = curr_len+1
            if l>0 or r<n-2:
                curr_max = max(curr_max, curr_len+2)
            if r+2<n-1 and diff[r+1]+diff[r+2]==2*df:
                xtnd = curr_len+2
                if r+3<n-1 and diff[r+3]==df:
                    xtnd += st2aplen[r+3]
                curr_max = max(curr_max, xtnd+1)
            if l-2>=0 and diff[l-1]+diff[l-2]==2*df:
                xtnd = curr_len+2
                if l-3>=0 and diff[l-3]==df:
                    xtnd += end2aplen[l-3]
                curr_max = max(curr_max, xtnd+1)
            res = max(res, curr_max)
        return res
        
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        # dsu: largest + 2nd largest + 1
        par = []
        rnk = []
        def makeSet(n):
            for i in range(n):
                par.append(i)
            for i in range(n):
                rnk.append(0)
        def findPar(u):
            if u==par[u]:
                return u
            par[u] = findPar(par[u])
            return par[u]
        def unn(u, v):
            u = findPar(u)
            v = findPar(v)
            if u==v:
                return
            if rnk[u]<rnk[v]:
                par[u] = v
            elif rnk[v]<rnk[u]:
                par[v] = u
            else:
                par[v] = u
                rnk[u] += 1
        n = len(points)
        makeSet(n)
        x2p = {}
        y2p = {}
        for i in range(n):
            x, y = points[i]
            if x in x2p:
                unn(i, x2p[x])
            else:
                x2p[x] = i
            if y in y2p:
                unn(i, y2p[y])
            else:
                y2p[y] = i
        # print(x2p, y2p)
        sz = {}
        for i in range(n):
            pr = findPar(i)
            sz[pr] = sz.get(pr, 0)+1
        # sz.sort(reverse=True)
        sizes = sorted(sz.values(), reverse=True)
        if len(sizes)==1:
            return sizes[0]+1
        return sizes[0]+sizes[1]+1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 764 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    #define debug(x) cout<<#x<<" is: "<<x<<endl;
    
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        vector<int> pref(n), suff(n); //common diff length
        pref[0] = 1;
        pref[1] = 2;
        int diff = nums[1]-nums[0];
        
        for(int i=2; i<n; i++){
            //i per finish hone vaale
            if(nums[i]-nums[i-1]==diff){
                pref[i] = pref[i-1]+1;
            }else{
                //start new sequence
                pref[i] = 2;
                diff = nums[i]-nums[i-1];
            }
        }

        
        
        suff[n-1] = 1;
        suff[n-2] = 2;
        diff = nums[n-1]-nums[n-2];
        
        for(int i=n-3; i>=0; i--){
            //i to n-1
            //see i and i+1
            if(nums[i+1]-nums[i]==diff){
                suff[i] = suff[i+1]+1;
            }else{
                suff[i] = 2;
                diff = nums[i+1]-nums[i];
            }
        }

        // for(int x: pref) cout<<x<<", ";cout<<endl<<endl;
        // for(int x: suff) cout<<x<<", ";cout<<endl<<endl;
        
        int ans = 3; //atleast 3 always possible
        ans = max(ans,*max_element(pref.begin(),pref.end()));
        ans = max(ans,*max_element(suff.begin(),suff.end()));
        
        for(int i=0; i<n; i++){
            //try to change i
            
            if(i==0){
                // ans = max(ans,suff[])
                ans = max(ans,suff[1]+1);
            }else if(i==n-1){
                ans = max(ans,pref[n-2]+1);
            }else if(i==1){
                ans = max({ans,suff[i+1]+1});
                
                int sm = nums[0]+nums[2];
                if(sm%2==1) continue;
                sm /= 2;
                //replace nums[1] with sm
                if(sm-nums[0]==nums[3]-nums[2]){
                    ans = max(ans,suff[2]+2);
                }
                // debug(ans)
            }else if(i==n-2){
                ans = max({ans,pref[i-1]+1});
                
                int sm = nums[n-1]+nums[n-3];
                if(sm%2==1){
                    debug(i) debug(ans)
                    continue;
                }

                sm /= 2;
                //replace nums[n-2] with sm

                if(nums[n-3]-nums[n-4]==nums[n-1]-sm){
                    ans = max(ans,pref[n-3]+2);
                }
                // debug(ans)
            }
            else{
                // debug(i)
                // if(i==6) debug("hjjjjjjjjjjjj")
                // cout<<"before: "<<ans<<endl;
                ans = max({ans,pref[i]+1,suff[i]+1});
                
                if(2*nums[i]==nums[i-1]+nums[i+1]){
                    // debug(i) debug(ans)
                    continue;
                }

                //i-2 i-1 i i+1 i+2
                int diff1 = nums[i-1]-nums[i-2];
                int diff2 = nums[i+2]-nums[i+1];
                int sm = nums[i-1]+nums[i+1];
                sm /= 2;

                // debug(diff1) debug(diff2)
                int len = 0;
                // if(i==4){
                //     debug("hksdml")
                //         cout<<diff1<<" "<<diff2<<" %% "<<sm<<endl;
                //     cout<<sm-nums[i-1]<<"--> "<<diff1<<endl;
                // }
                if(diff1==diff2 && (nums[i-1]+nums[i+1])%2==0 && sm-nums[i-1]==diff1){
                    // if((nums[i-1]+nums[i+1])%2==1) continue;
                    if(sm-nums[i-1]==diff1){
                        len = pref[i-1]+suff[i+1]+1;
                        ans = max(ans,len);
                    }
                }else{
                    ans = max({ans,pref[i-1]+1,suff[i+1]+1});
                    int change = nums[i-1]+nums[i+1];
                    if(change%2==1){
                        // debug(i) debug(ans)
                        continue;
                    }
                    change /= 2;
                    if(change-nums[i-1]==diff1){
                        ans = max(ans,pref[i-1]+2);
                    }
                    if(nums[i+1]-change==diff2){
                        ans = max(ans,suff[i+1]+2);
                    }
                }

                // cout<<"after: "<<ans<<endl;
            }

            // debug(i) debug(ans)
        }

        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    vector<int> parent, rank; //rank ki jagah size of component
    void makeSet(int n){
        parent.resize(n);
        rank.resize(n,1);
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) parent[i]=i;
    }
    int findSet(int v){
        if(v==parent[v]) return v;
        return parent[v]=findSet(parent[v]);
    }
    bool unionSets(int a,int b){
        a=findSet(a);
        b=findSet(b);
        if(a!=b){
            // if(ranks[a]<ranks[b]) swap(a,b);
            if(rank[a]<rank[b]){
                //b ke niche a
                rank[b] += rank[a];
                parent[a] = b;
            }else{
                //a ke niche b
                rank[a] += rank[b];
                parent[b] = a;
            }
            // parent[b]=a;
            // if(ranks[a]==ranks[b]) ranks[a]++;
            return true;
        }
        return false;
    }
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        makeSet(n);
        //merge coord with same x axis
        map<int,vector<int>> mp,mp1;
        int idx = 0;
        for(auto& x: points){
            mp[x[0]].push_back(idx);
            idx++;
        }
        idx = 0;
        for(auto& x: points){
            mp1[x[1]].push_back(idx);
            idx++;
        }

        for(auto& x: mp){
            vector<int>& v = x.second;
            int sz = v.size();
            if(sz==1) continue;

            for(int i=1; i<sz; i++){
                unionSets(v[i],v[i-1]);
            }
        }
        for(auto& x: mp1){
            vector<int>& v = x.second;
            int sz = v.size();
            if(sz==1) continue;

            for(int i=1; i<sz; i++){
                unionSets(v[i],v[i-1]);
            }
        }
        int ans = 0;
        map<int,int> tmp;
        for(int i=0; i<n; i++){
            int par = findSet(i);
            tmp[par] = rank[par];
        }
        priority_queue<int> pq;
        for(auto& x: tmp){
            // cout<<x.second<<" # ";
            pq.push(x.second);
        }
        int sm = 0;
        sm += pq.top();
        pq.pop();
        if(!pq.empty()) sm += pq.top();

        sm++;
        ans = sm;

        return ans;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 765 ###
[Q3_START]

class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 2:
            return n

        L = [1] * n
        for i in range(1, n):
            if i >= 2 and nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]:
                L[i] = L[i - 1] + 1
            else:
                L[i] = 2

        R = [1] * n
        for i in range(n - 2, -1, -1):
            if i <= n - 3 and nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]:
                R[i] = R[i + 1] + 1
            else:
                R[i] = 2

        ans = max(max(L), max(R))
        ans = max(ans, R[1] + 1)
        ans = max(ans, L[n - 2] + 1)

        for i in range(1, n - 1):
            left_only = L[i - 1] + 1
            right_only = R[i + 1] + 1
            ans = max(ans, left_only, right_only)

            diff = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]
            if diff % 2 != 0:
                continue

            d = diff // 2
            cur = 3

            if L[i - 1] >= 2:
                dL = nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]
                if dL == d:
                    cur += L[i - 1] - 1

            if R[i + 1] >= 2 and i + 2 < n:
                dR = nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]
                if dR == d:
                    cur += R[i + 1] - 1

            ans = max(ans, cur)

        return ans
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        parent = {}
        comp_size = {}

        def find(u):
            if parent[u] != u:
                parent[u] = find(parent[u])
            return parent[u]

        def union(u, v):
            ru, rv = find(u), find(v)
            if ru == rv:
                return
            if comp_size[ru] < comp_size[rv]:
                ru, rv = rv, ru
            parent[rv] = ru
            comp_size[ru] += comp_size[rv]

        def add_node(u):
            if u not in parent:
                parent[u] = u
                comp_size[u] = 0

        point_set = set()
        xs = set()
        ys = set()

        for x, y in points:
            point_set.add((x, y))
            xs.add(x)
            ys.add(y)
            xn, yn = ('x', x), ('y', y)
            add_node(xn)
            add_node(yn)
            rx, ry = find(xn), find(yn)
            if rx == ry:
                comp_size[rx] += 1
            else:
                union(xn, yn)
                comp_size[find(xn)] += 1

        best = 1

        max_comp = max(comp_size[find(('x', x))] for x in xs)
        best = max(best, max_comp + 1)

        from collections import defaultdict

        comp_has_y = defaultdict(bool)
        for y in ys:
            comp_has_y[find(('y', y))] = True

        top2_y_comps = []
        seen = set()
        all_y_roots = [(comp_size[find(('y', y))], find(('y', y))) for y in ys]
        all_y_roots.sort(reverse=True)
        for size, root in all_y_roots:
            if root not in seen:
                seen.add(root)
                top2_y_comps.append((size, root))
            if len(top2_y_comps) == 2:
                break

        for x in xs:
            rx = find(('x', x))
            sx = comp_size[rx]
            for sy, ry in top2_y_comps:
                if ry != rx:
                    best = max(best, sx + sy + 1)
                    break

        return best
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, a: List[int]) -> int:

        n=len(a)
        if n<=3:return n
        d=[a[i]-a[i-1]for i in range(1,n)]
        m=len(d)
        p=[1]*m
        for i in range(1,m):
            if d[i]==d[i-1]:p[i]=p[i-1]+1
        s=[1]*m
        for i in range(m-2,-1,-1):
            if d[i]==d[i+1]:s[i]=s[i+1]+1
        x=max(p)
        r=x+1 if x==m else x+2
        for i in range(1,n-1):
            t=a[i+1]-a[i-1]
            if t%2==0:
                k=t//2
                l=p[i-2]if i-2>=0 and d[i-2]==k else 0
                j=s[i+1]if i+1<m and d[i+1]==k else 0
                r=max(r,l+j+3)
        return r

[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, a: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        X, Y = defaultdict(list), defaultdict(list)
        for i, (x, y) in enumerate(a):
            X[x].append(i)
            Y[y].append(i)

        v, vx, vy = set(), set(), set()

        def f(i):
            if i in v:
                return 0
            v.add(i)
            c = 1
            x, y = a[i]

            if x not in vx:
                vx.add(x)
                for j in X[x]:
                    c += f(j)
            if y not in vy:
                vy.add(y)
                for j in Y[y]:
                    c += f(j)

            return c

        ans = []
        for i in range(len(a)):
            if i not in v:
                ans.append(f(i))
        ans.sort(reverse=True)
        print(ans)
        return ans[0] + 1 + (ans[1] if len(ans) > 1 else 0)

### RANK 767 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 2) return n;

        vector<int> pref_len(n), suff_len(n);
        vector<long long> pref_diff(n), suff_diff(n);

        // prefix
        pref_len[0] = 1;
        pref_len[1] = 2;
        pref_diff[1] = nums[1] - nums[0];

        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            long long d = nums[i] - nums[i-1];
            if (d == pref_diff[i-1]) {
                pref_len[i] = pref_len[i-1] + 1;
                pref_diff[i] = d;
            } else {
                pref_len[i] = 2;
                pref_diff[i] = d;
            }
        }

        // suffix
        suff_len[n-1] = 1;
        suff_len[n-2] = 2;
        suff_diff[n-2] = nums[n-1] - nums[n-2];

        for (int i = n-3; i >= 0; i--) {
            long long d = nums[i+1] - nums[i];
            if (d == suff_diff[i+1]) {
                suff_len[i] = suff_len[i+1] + 1;
                suff_diff[i] = d;
            } else {
                suff_len[i] = 2;
                suff_diff[i] = d;
            }
        }

        int ans = 2;

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {

            if (i == 0) {
                ans = max(ans, suff_len[1] + 1);
            }
            else if (i == n-1) {
                ans = max(ans, pref_len[n-2] + 1);
            }
            else {

                // extend prefix
                ans = max(ans, pref_len[i-1] + 1);

                // extend suffix
                ans = max(ans, suff_len[i+1] + 1);

                // merge prefix and suffix
                long long sum = nums[i-1] + nums[i+1];

                if (sum % 2 == 0) {

                    long long need = (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) / 2;

                    int left = (pref_diff[i-1] == need) ? pref_len[i-1] : 1;
                    int right = (suff_diff[i+1] == need) ? suff_len[i+1] : 1;

                    ans = max(ans, left + 1 + right);
                }
            }
        }

        return min(ans, n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
#define ll int
struct DSU {
    map<pair<int,int>, pair<int,int>> parent;
    map<pair<int,int>, int> sz;

    pair<int,int> find(pair<int,int> x) {
        if (!parent.count(x)) {
            parent[x] = x;
            sz[x] = 1;
        }

        if (parent[x] == x) return x;

        return parent[x] = find(parent[x]);
    }

    void unite(pair<int,int> a, pair<int,int> b) {
        a = find(a);
        b = find(b);

        if (a == b) return;

        if (sz[a] < sz[b])
            swap(a, b);

        parent[b] = a;
        sz[a] += sz[b];
    }

    bool same(pair<int,int> a, pair<int,int> b) {
        return find(a) == find(b);
    }

    int size(pair<int,int> a) {
        return sz[find(a)];
    }
};
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        map<int,vector<pair<int,int>>> mpx,mpy;

        DSU dsu;


        for(auto i:points){
            int x=i[0],y=i[1];
            mpx[x].push_back({x,y});
            mpy[y].push_back({x,y});
        }

        for(auto &[_,v]:mpx){
            for(int i=1;i<v.size();i++){
                dsu.unite(v[0],v[i]);
            }
        }

        for(auto &[_,v]:mpy){
            for(int i=1;i<v.size();i++){
                dsu.unite(v[0],v[i]);
            }
        }

        set<pair<ll,pair<ll,ll>>> svt;

        for(auto x:points){
            ll xi=x[0],yi=x[1];
            auto par=dsu.find({xi*1ll,yi*1ll});
            pair<ll,pair<ll,ll>> p={dsu.size(par),par};
            svt.insert(p);
            
        }

        if(svt.size()==1) {
            auto it=svt.end();
            it--;

            int sz=it->first;
            return sz+1;
        }

        auto it=svt.end();
            it--;
             int ans=0;
            int sz=it->first;
        ans+=sz;
        

        it--;
        sz=it->first;
        ans+=sz;
        
            return ans+1;

        
    }
};

[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if(n<=2) return n;
        vector<int> l(n,1), r(n,1);
        for(int i=1; i<n; ++i){
            if(i==1 || nums[i]-nums[i-1] == nums[i-1]-nums[i-2])
                l[i] = l[i-1]+1;
            else l[i]=2;
        }
        for(int i=n-2; i>=0; --i){
            if(i==n-2 || nums[i+1]-nums[i] == nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]) r[i] = r[i+1]+1;
            else r[i]=2;
        }
        int ans=2;
        for(int i=0; i<n; ++i)
            ans = max(ans, l[i]);

        for(int i=0; i<n; ++i){
            if(i==0) ans = max(ans, r[1]+1);
            else if(i==n-1) ans = max(ans, l[n-2]+1);
            else{
                if(i>=2) ans = max(ans, l[i-1]+1);
                if(i<=n-3) ans = max(ans, r[i+1]+1);
                if(i>=1 && i<=n-2){
                    if((nums[i+1]-nums[i-1])%2 == 0){
                        int diff = (nums[i+1]-nums[i-1])/2;
                        int ln=2, rn=2;
                        if(i>=2 && nums[i-1]-nums[i-2] == diff)
                            ln = l[i-1]+1;
                        if(i<=n-3 && nums[i+2]-nums[i+1] == diff) rn = r[i+1]+1;
                        ans = max(ans, ln+rn-1);
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& p) {
        int n = p.size();
        if(n==0) return 1;
        vector<int> par(n), r(n,0), cs(n,1);
        for(int i=0; i<n; ++i) par[i]=i;
        function<int(int)> find = [&](int x) -> int{
            return par[x]==x ? x : par[x]=find(par[x]);
        };
        while(true) break;
        int cnt=0;
        for(int i=0; i<5; ++i) cnt++;
        auto uni = [&](int x, int y){
            int parX = find(x), parY = find(y);
            if(parX==parY) return;
            if(r[parX] < r[parY]) swap(parX,parY);
            par[parY] = parX;
            cs[parX] += cs[parY];
            if(r[parX]==r[parY]) r[parX]++;
        };
        map<int, vector<int>> xm, ym;
        set<pair<int,int>>st;
        for(int i=0; i<n; ++i){
            xm[p[i][0]].push_back(i);
            ym[p[i][1]].push_back(i);
            st.insert({p[i][0],p[i][1]});
        }
        for(auto& [x, ind]: xm){
            for(size_t i=1; i<ind.size(); ++i)
                uni(ind[0],ind[i]);
        }
        for(auto& [y, ind]: ym){
            for(size_t i=1; i<ind.size(); ++i)
                uni(ind[0],ind[i]);
        }
        
        for(int i=0; i<10; ++i) cnt++;
        map<int,int> xc, yc;
        for(auto& [x,ind]: xm)
            xc[x] = find(ind[0]);
        for(auto& [y,ind]: ym)
            yc[y] = find(ind[0]);
        for(int i=0; i<3; ++i) cnt--;
        map<int, vector<int>> cxs, cys;
        for (auto& [x, c] : xc) cxs[c].push_back(x);
        for (auto& [y, c] : yc) cys[c].push_back(y);
        set<int> st1;
        for(int i=0; i<n; ++i) st1.insert(find(i));
        vector<int> cst1(st1.begin(),st1.end());
        sort(cst1.begin(),cst1.end(),[&](int a, int b){
            return cs[a] > cs[b];
        });
        int ans = 1;
        while(true) break;
        for(int c: cst1)
            ans = max(ans, 1+cs[c]);
        int n2 = cst1.size();
        for(int i=0; i<n2 && ans < n+1; ++i){
            for(int j=i+1; j<n2 && ans < n+1; ++j){
                int c1 = cst1[i], c2 = cst1[j];
                int cap = cs[c1] + cs[c2] + 1;
                if(cap <= ans) break;
                bool flag = false;
                for(int x: cxs[c1]){
                    for(int y: cys[c2]){
                        if(!st.count({x,y})){
                            flag = true;
                            break;
                        }
                    }
                    if(flag)break;
                }
                if(!flag){
                    for(int x: cxs[c2]){
                        for(int y: cys[c1]){
                            if(!st.count({x,y})){
                                flag = true;
                                break;
                            }
                        }
                        if(flag)break;
                    }
                }
                if(flag) ans = max(ans,cap);
            }
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if(n==1){
            return 1;
        }
        if(n==2){
            return 2;
        }
        if(n==3){
            return 3;
        }
        vector<int>a(n),b(n);
        a[0]=1;
        a[1] =2;
        int curr = nums[1]-nums[0];
        int cnt = 2;
        for(int i = 2;i<n;i++){
            if(nums[i]-nums[i-1]==curr){
                cnt++;
            }else{
                curr = nums[i]-nums[i-1];
                cnt = 2;
            }
            a[i]=cnt;
        }
        b[n-1]=1;
        b[n-2]=2;
        curr= nums[n-2]-nums[n-1];
        cnt = 2;
        for(int i = n-3;i>=0;i--){
            if(nums[i]-nums[i+1]==curr){
                cnt++;
            }else{
                curr = nums[i]-nums[i+1];
                cnt = 2;
            }
            b[i]=cnt;
        }
        int ans = 2;
        for(int i = 0;i<n;i++){
            if(i==0){
                ans = max(ans,1+b[i+1]);
            }else if(i==n-1){
                ans = max(ans , 1 + a[i-1]);
            }else{
                ans = max(ans,1+a[i-1]);
                ans = max(ans,1+b[i+1]);
                // if(i==1){
                //     int req =  nums[3]-nums[2];
                //     int num = nums[2]-reqd;
                //     if(num-nums[0]==reqd){
                //         ans = max(ans ,1+1+b[2]);
                //     }
                // }else if(i==n-2){
                //     int req = nums[n-3]-nums[n-4];
                //     int num = nums[n-3]+reqd;
                //     if(nums[n-1]-num==reqd){
                //         ans = max(ans,2+a[n-3]);
                //     }
                // }else{
                    
                // }
                int cnt = nums[i-1]+nums[i+1];
                if(cnt&1)continue;
                cnt/=2;
                int curr = 3;
                if(i!=1){
                    if(cnt-nums[i-1]==nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]){
                        curr+= a[i-1]-1;
                    }
                }
                if(i!=n-2){
                    if(cnt-nums[i-1]==nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]){
                        curr += b[i+1]-1;
                    }
                }
                ans=max(ans,curr);
            }
        }
        return ans;
    }
};

[Q4_START]
class DSU{
    public:
    unordered_map<int,int>parent;
    unordered_map<int,int>sizes;
    int findp(int x){
        if(!parent.count(x)){
            parent[x] =x;
            //sizes[x]=0;
        }
        if(x!=parent[x])parent[x] = findp(parent[x]);
        return parent[x];
    }
    void merge(int x, int y){
        x = findp(x);
        y =findp(y);
        if(x==y)return;
        parent[x] = y;
        //sizes[y]+=sizes[x];
    }
};
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        set<int>stx , sty;
        for(int i = 0;i<n;i++){
            stx.insert(points[i][0]);
            sty.insert(points[i][1]);
        }
        map<int,int>mpx , mpy;
        map<int,int>mpxr,mpyr;
        int cntx = 0;
        for(int i : stx){
            mpx[i]=cntx;
            mpxr[cntx]=i;
            cntx++;
        }
        int cnty = 0;
        for(int i : sty){
            mpy[i]=cnty;
            mpyr[cnty]=i;
            cnty++;
        }
        DSU dsu;
        for(auto &point : points){
            // dsu.findp(mpx[point[0]]);
            // dsu.findp(mpy[point[1]]+n+1);
            // dsu.sizes[mpx[point[0]]]=1;
            dsu.merge(mpx[point[0]],mpy[point[1]]+n+1);
        }
        map<int,int>comp;
        for(auto &point:points){
            comp[dsu.findp(mpx[point[0]])]++;
        }
        vector<int>sz;
        for(auto&[k,v] : comp){sz.push_back(v);}
        sort(sz.begin(),sz.end());
        if(sz.size()==1){
            return 1 + sz[0];
        }
        return 1 + sz[sz.size()-1] + sz[sz.size()-2];
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 771 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        if(n <= 2) return n;

        int[] L = new int[n];
        int[] R =new int[n];

        L[0]=1;
        L[1]=2;

        for(int i=2; i<n;i++){
            if(nums[i] - nums[i-1] == nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]){
                L[i] =L[i-1]+1;
            }else{
                L[i] =2;
            }
        }
        R[n-1] = 1;
        R[n-2] = 2;

        for(int i = n-3 ; i>=0;i--){
            if(nums[i+1] - nums[i] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]){
                R[i] = R[i+1]+1;
            }else{
                R[i] = 2;
            }
        }
        int maxL =0;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            if(i>0)
                maxL = Math.max(maxL , L[i-1]+1);

            if(i<n-1)
                maxL = Math.max(maxL , R[i+1]+1);

            if(i>0 && i<n-1){
                int diffL = nums[i] - nums[i-1];
                int diffR = nums[i+1] - nums[i];

                if(diffL ==diffR){
                    maxL=Math.max(maxL,L[i-1] + R[i+1]);
        }
        if((nums[i+1] - nums[i-1])% 2 == 0){
            int targetD = (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1])/2;

             int lS =1;
            if(i>=2 && nums[i-1]-nums[i-2] == targetD)
                lS = L[i-1];

            int RS =1;
            if(i <= n-3 && nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == targetD)
                RS= R[i+1];

            maxL = Math.max(maxL , lS+RS+1);
        }
        }
            
        }
    return Math.min(maxL , n);
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        if (n == 0) return 1;

        Map<Integer , Integer> xMap = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer , Integer> yMap = new HashMap<>();

        DSU dsu = new DSU(2*n);
        int id =0;

        for(int[] p : points){
            if(!xMap.containsKey(p[0])){
                xMap.put(p[0],id++);
            }
            if(!yMap.containsKey(p[1])){
                yMap.put(p[1],id++);
            }

            int xId = xMap.get(p[0]);
            int yId = yMap.get(p[1]);

            dsu.union(xId,yId);
        }

        Map<Integer, Integer> compSize = new HashMap<>();

        for (int[] q : points) {

            int root = dsu.find(xMap.get(q[0]));

            compSize.put(root, compSize.getOrDefault(root, 0) + 1);
        }

        List<Integer> Sizes = new ArrayList<>(compSize.values());

        Collections.sort(Sizes, Collections.reverseOrder());

        if (Sizes.size() >= 2) {
            return Sizes.get(0) + Sizes.get(1) + 1;
        }

        return Sizes.get(0) + 1;
    }


    class DSU {

        int[] parent;

        DSU(int n) {
            parent = new int[n];
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
                parent[i] = i;
            }
        }

        int find(int x) {
            if (parent[x] != x) {
                parent[x] = find(parent[x]);
            }
            return parent[x];
        }

        void union(int a, int b) {

            int rootA = find(a);
            int rootB = find(b);

            if (rootA != rootB) {
                parent[rootA] = rootB;
            }
        }
    
        
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 773 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution(object):
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums):
        """
        :type nums: List[int]
        :rtype: int
        """
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 2:
            return n
        diffs = [nums[i+1] - nums[i] for i in range(n - 1)]
        m = len(diffs)
        
        left = [1] * m
        for i in range(1, m):
            if diffs[i] == diffs[i-1]:
                left[i] = left[i-1] + 1
                
        right = [1] * m
        for i in range(m - 2, -1, -1):
            if diffs[i] == diffs[i+1]:
                right[i] = right[i+1] + 1
        
        ans = 2
        for i in range(m):
            ans = max(ans, left[i] + 1)
            if i + 1 < m:
                ans = max(ans, left[i] + 2)
            if i - 1 >= 0:
                ans = max(ans, right[i] + 2)
            
        for i in range(1, n - 1):
            total_diff = nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]
            if total_diff % 2 == 0:
                d = total_diff // 2
                current_len = 3
                if i - 2 >= 0 and diffs[i-2] == d:
                    current_len += left[i-2]
                if i + 1 < m and diffs[i+1] == d:
                    current_len += right[i+1]
                ans = max(ans, current_len)
        return min(n,ans)
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution(object):
    def maxActivated(self, points):
        """
        :type points: List[List[int]]
        :rtype: int
        """
        n = len(points)
        if n == 0:
            return 1
        pts_set = set(tuple(p) for p in points)
        
        x_map = collections.defaultdict(list)
        y_map = collections.defaultdict(list)
        for i, (x, y) in enumerate(points):
            x_map[x].append(i)
            y_map[y].append(i)
            
        parent = list(range(n))
        def find(i):
            if parent[i] == i:
                return i
            parent[i] = find(parent[i])
            return parent[i]
            
        def union(i, j):
            ri, rj = find(i), find(j)
            if ri != rj:
                parent[ri] = rj

        for group in x_map.values():
            for i in range(len(group) - 1):
                union(group[i], group[i+1])
        for group in y_map.values():
            for i in range(len(group) - 1):
                union(group[i], group[i+1])
            
        sz = collections.Counter()
        for i in range(n):
            sz[find(i)] += 1
            
        xr = collections.defaultdict(set)
        yr = collections.defaultdict(set)
        for i, (x, y) in enumerate(points):
            root = find(i)
            xr[x].add(root)
            yr[y].add(root)
            
        xw = {x: sum(sz[r] for r in rs) for x, rs in xr.items()}
        yw = {y: sum(sz[r] for r in rs) for y, rs in yr.items()}
        
        ans = max(max(xw.values()), max(yw.values())) + 1
        
        top_k = 450 
        sorted_x = sorted(xw.keys(), key=lambda k: xw[k], reverse=True)[:top_k]
        sorted_y = sorted(yw.keys(), key=lambda k: yw[k], reverse=True)[:top_k]
        
        for x in sorted_x:
            for y in sorted_y:
                if (x, y) in pts_set:
                    continue
                
                intersect_sz = 0
                for r in xr[x]:
                    if r in yr[y]:
                        intersect_sz += sz[r]
                
                ans = max(ans, xw[x] + yw[y] - intersect_sz + 1)
        return ans
[Q4_END]

### RANK 774 ###
[Q3_START]
impl Solution {
    pub fn longest_arithmetic(nums: Vec<i32>) -> i32 {
        let n = nums.len();

        if n <= 3 {
            return n as i32;
        }

        let mut diff = vec![0; n];
        for i in 1..n {
            diff[i] = nums[i] - nums[i - 1];
        }
        
        let mut a = vec![];
        let mut l = 1;
        let mut ans = 0;
        while l < n {
            let mut r = l + 1;
            while r < n && diff[r] == diff[l] {
                r += 1;
            }
            r -= 1;
            
            a.push((nums[l - 1], nums[r], r - l + 1, diff[r]));
            ans = ans.max(r - l + 2);
            l = r + 1;
        }
        // println!("{:?}\n{} {:?}", &diff, ans, &a);

        let m = a.len();
        for i in 0..m {
            if a[i].2 != 1 {
                continue;
            }

            if i > 0 {
                ans = ans.max(a[i - 1].2 + a[i].2 + 1);
            }
            if i < m - 1 {
                ans = ans.max(a[i + 1].2 + a[i].2 + 1);
            }
        }

        for i in 0..m - 1 {
            if !(a[i].2 == 1 && a[i + 1].2 == 1) {
                continue;
            }

            let d = a[i].3 + a[i + 1].3;
            if d & 1 == 1 {
                continue;
            }
            let mut curr = 2;
            if i > 0 && a[i - 1].3 << 1 == d {
                curr += a[i - 1].2;
            }
            if i < m - 2 && a[i + 2].3 << 1 == d {
                curr += a[i + 2].2;
            }
            ans = ans.max(curr + 1);
        }

        ans.min(n) as i32
    }
}

/*
a b c d e
b-a, c-b, d-c, e-d
*/
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
impl Solution {
    pub fn max_activated(mut points: Vec<Vec<i32>>) -> i32 {
        let n = points.len();

        let mut dsu = DSU::new(n);
        let mut x: Vec<usize> = (0..n).collect();
        x.sort_unstable_by_key(|&i| points[i][0]);
        for i in 1..n {
            let a = x[i - 1];
            let b = x[i];
            if points[a][0] == points[b][0] {
                dsu.merge(a, b);
            }
        }

        let mut y: Vec<usize> = (0..n).collect();
        y.sort_unstable_by_key(|&i| points[i][1]);
        for i in 1..n {
            let a = y[i - 1];
            let b = y[i];
            if points[a][1] == points[b][1] {
                dsu.merge(a, b);
            }
        }

        let mut lens = vec![];
        for i in 0..n {
            if dsu.parent(i) == i {
                lens.push(dsu.size(i) as i32);
            }
        }

        lens.sort_unstable();
        lens.reverse();
        if lens.len() == 1 {
            lens[0] + 1
        } else {
            lens[0] + lens[1] + 1
        }
    }
}

/// # DSU ([source](https://github.com/SarthakMathur2182/CompetitiveProgramming/blob/main/DataStructures/DSU/dsu.rs))
pub mod dsu {
    pub struct DSU {
        nodes: Vec<i32>,
    }

    impl DSU {
        pub fn new(n: usize) -> Self {
            Self { nodes: vec![-1; n] }
        }

        pub fn parent(&mut self, a: usize) -> usize {
            if self.nodes[a] < 0 {
                return a;
            }
            self.nodes[a] = self.parent(self.nodes[a] as usize) as i32;
            self.nodes[a] as usize
        }

        pub fn size(&mut self, a: usize) -> u32 {
            let par = self.parent(a);
            -self.nodes[par] as u32
        }

        pub fn merge(&mut self, a: usize, b: usize) -> bool {
            let mut a = self.parent(a);
            let mut b = self.parent(b);
            if a == b {
                return false;
            }
            if self.size(a) < self.size(b) {
                std::mem::swap(&mut a, &mut b);
            }

            self.nodes[a] += self.nodes[b];
            self.nodes[b] = a as i32;
            true
        }
    }

    // TODO: Rollback
}
use dsu::DSU;
[Q4_END]

### RANK 775 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n(nums.size());
        for (int i{n}; i-- > 1;) {
            nums[i] -= nums[i - 1];
        }
        vector<pair<int, int>> vec;
        int cur{1};
        int ans{2};
        for (int i{2}; i < n; ++i) {
            if (nums[i] == nums[i - 1]) {
                ++cur;
            } else {
                ans = max(ans, cur + 2);
                vec.emplace_back(nums[i - 1], cur);
                cur = 1;
            }
        }
        ans = max(ans, cur + 2);
        vec.emplace_back(nums[n - 1], cur);
        int m(vec.size());
        for (int i{1}; i < m; ++i) {
            if (vec[i - 1].second == 1 && vec[i].second == 1 && (vec[i - 1].first + vec[i].first & 1) == 0) {
                int mean{(vec[i - 1].first + vec[i].first) / 2};
                int t{2};
                if (i >= 2 && vec[i - 2].first == mean) {
                    t += vec[i - 2].second;
                }
                if (i + 1 < m && vec[i + 1].first == mean) {
                    t += vec[i + 1].second;
                }
                ans = max(ans, t + 1);
            }
        }
        return min(ans, n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
struct DSU {
    int n;
    vector<int> p;
    vector<int> sz;
    DSU(int n) : n(n) {
        p.resize(n);
        iota(p.begin(), p.end(), 0);
        sz.assign(n, 1);
    }
    int get_p(int i) {
        return p[i] == i ? i : (p[i] = get_p(p[i]));
    }
    bool unite(int i, int j) {
        int pi{get_p(i)};
        int pj{get_p(j)};
        if (pi == pj) {
            return false;
        }
        if (sz[pi] < sz[pj]) {
            swap(pi, pj);
        }
        p[pj] = pi;
        sz[pi] += sz[pj];
        return true;
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n(points.size());
        vector<tuple<int, int, int>> vec(n);
        for (int i{}; i < n; ++i) {
            vec[i] = {points[i][0], points[i][1], i};
        }
        sort(vec.begin(), vec.end());
        DSU dsu(n);
        for (int i{1}; i < n; ++i) {
            if (get<0>(vec[i]) == get<0>(vec[i - 1])) {
                dsu.unite(get<2>(vec[i]), get<2>(vec[i - 1]));
            }
        }
        sort(vec.begin(), vec.end(), [](auto& i, auto& j) -> bool {
            return get<1>(i) < get<1>(j);
        });
        for (int i{1}; i < n; ++i) {
            if (get<1>(vec[i]) == get<1>(vec[i - 1])) {
                dsu.unite(get<2>(vec[i]), get<2>(vec[i - 1]));
            }
        }
        vector<int> p;
        for (int i{}; i < n; ++i) {
            p.push_back(dsu.get_p(i));
        }
        sort(p.begin(), p.end());
        p.erase(unique(p.begin(), p.end()), p.end());
        for (int& pp : p) {
            pp = dsu.sz[pp];
        }
        sort(p.rbegin(), p.rend());
        return 1 + (p.size() == 1 ? p[0] : p[0] + p[1]);
    }
};

### RANK 801 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int N = nums.size();
        vector<int> difference;
        for (int i = 1; i < N; i++) {
            difference.push_back(nums[i] - nums[i - 1]);
        }

        vector<int> left(N - 1, 1), right(N - 1, 1);
        for (int i = 1; i < N - 1; i++) {
            if (difference[i] == difference[i - 1])
                left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1;
        }
        for (int i = N - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (difference[i] == difference[i + 1])
                right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1;
        }

        int maxLen = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < N - 1; i++) {
            maxLen = max(maxLen, min(N - 1, left[i] + 1));
        }
        for (int i = 0; i < N - 2; i++) {
            long long sum = (long long)difference[i] + difference[i + 1];
            if (i - 1 >= 0 && sum == 2LL * difference[i - 1]) {
                int currentLen = left[i - 1] + 2;
                if (i + 2 < N - 1 && difference[i + 2] == difference[i - 1]) {
                    currentLen += right[i + 2];
                }
                maxLen = max(maxLen, currentLen);
            }
            if (i + 2 < N-1 && sum == 2LL * difference[i + 2]) {
                int currentLen = right[i + 2] + 2;
                maxLen = max(maxLen, currentLen);
            }
        }
        return maxLen + 1;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int N = points.size();
        vector<int> parent(N);
        vector<int> rank(N, 1);
        iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0);
        function<int(int)> Find = [&](int i) {
            if (parent[i] == i) {
                return i;
            }
            return parent[i] = Find(parent[i]);
        };
        auto Union = [&](int i, int j){
            int root_i = Find(i);
            int root_j = Find(j);
            if(root_i != root_j){
                parent[root_i] = root_j;
                rank[root_j] += rank[root_i];
            }
        };

        unordered_map<int, int> x_first;
        unordered_map<int, int> y_first;
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];
            if (x_first.count(x)) {
                Union(i, x_first[x]);
            } else {
                x_first[x] = i;
            }
            if (y_first.count(y)) {
                Union(i, y_first[y]);
            } else {
                y_first[y] = i;
            }
        }

        vector<int> component_size;
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) {
            if (Find(i) == i) {
                component_size.push_back(rank[i]);
            }
        }
        sort(component_size.begin(), component_size.end(), greater<int>());

        if (component_size.size() == 1) {
            return component_size[0] + 1;
        }
        return component_size[0] + component_size[1] + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 802 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        diff = []
        n = len(nums)
        for i in range(1, n):
            diff.append(nums[i - 1] - nums[i])
        l = 0
        left = [2]*n
        right = [2]*n
        for i in range(2, n):
            if nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == nums[i] - nums[i - 1]:
                left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1
        
        for i in range(n - 3, -1, -1):
            if nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == nums[i + 1] - nums[i]:
                right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1
        res = max(left)
        for i in range(1, n - 1):
            res = max(res,right[i] + 1, left[i] + 1)
            if (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) % 2 == 0:
                d = (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1])//2 
                l = 1
                r = 1 
                if i >= 2 and nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == d:
                    l = left[i - 1]
                if i + 2 < n and nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == d:
                    r = right[i + 1]
                res = max(res, l + r + 1)
        return res
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:

        parent = {}
        def find(x):
            # if x 
            if parent[x] != x:
                parent[x] = find(parent[x])
            return parent[x]

        def union(x, y):
            if x not in parent:
                parent[x] = x
            if y not in parent:
                parent[y] = y
            px = find(x)
            py = find(y)
            if px == py:
                return 
            parent[py] = px
        
        for i, j in points:
            union(i, j + (10 ** 9 + 1))
            
        comp = Counter()
        res = 0
        for i, j in points:
            comp[find(i)] += 1
        lis = list(comp.values())
        lis.sort()
        if len(lis) > 1:
            return lis[-1] + lis[-2] + 1

        return lis[-1] + 1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 803 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        a=nums
        b=len(a)
        c=[a[i+1]-a[i] for i in range(b-1)]
        d=[1]*(b-1)
        e=[1]*(b-1)
        for i in range(1,b-1):
            if c[i]==c[i-1]:
                d[i]=d[i-1]+1
        for i in range(b-3,-1,-1):
            if c[i]==c[i+1]:
                e[i]=e[i+1]+1
        f=min(b,max(d[-1]+1,e[0]+1))
        for i in range(b-1):
            if i+1<b-1:
                f=max(f,d[i]+2)
            if i-1>=0:
                f=max(f,e[i]+2)
        for i in range(b-2):
            if i>0 and c[i]+c[i+1]==2*c[i-1]:
                if i<b-3 and c[i+2]==c[i-1]:
                    f=max(f,d[i-1]+e[i+2]+3)
                else:
                    f=max(f,d[i-1]+3)
            if i<b-3 and c[i]+c[i+1]==2*c[i+2]:
                f=max(f,e[i+2]+3)
        return min(b,f)
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        a=len(points)
        b=list(range(a))
        c=defaultdict(list)
        d=defaultdict(list)
        for i,(e,f) in enumerate(points):
            c[e].append(i)
            d[f].append(i)
        for i in c.values():
            for j in range(len(i)-1):
                g=i[j]
                while b[g]!=g:
                    b[g]=b[b[g]]
                    g=b[g]
                h=i[j+1]
                while b[h]!=h:
                    b[h]=b[b[h]]
                    h=b[h]
                if g!=h:
                    b[g]=h
        for i in d.values():
            for j in range(len(i)-1):
                g,h=i[j],i[j+1]
                while b[g]!=g:
                    b[g]=b[b[g]]
                    g=b[g]
                while b[h]!=h:
                    b[h]=b[b[h]]
                    h=b[h]
                if g!=h:
                    b[g]=h
        e=defaultdict(int)
        for i in range(a):
            j=i
            while b[j]!=j:
                b[j]=b[b[j]]
                j=b[j]
            e[j]+=1
        f=sorted(e.values(),reverse=True)
        if not f:
            return 1
        if len(f)==1:
            return f[0]+1
        return f[0]+f[1]+1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 804 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();

        if(n < 3)  return n;

        vector<int> diff(n-1);
        for(int i =0; i <n-1; i++)  diff[i] = nums[i+1] - nums[i];

        vector<int> pfx(n-1, 1), sfx(n-1, 1);
        for(int i = 1; i < n-1; i++){
            if(diff[i] == diff[i-1])   pfx[i] = pfx[i-1]+1;
        }

        //sfx
        for(int i = n-3;i >= 0; i--){
            if(diff[i] == diff[i+1])    sfx[i]=sfx[i+1]+1;
        }

        int maxlen = 0;
        for(int i = 0; i<n-1; i++){
            maxlen = max(maxlen, pfx[i]+(pfx[i] < n-1));

            if(i < n-2 && ((diff[i] + diff[i+1])%2==0)){
                int x = (diff[i] + diff[i+1])/2;
                int cnt = 2;
                if(i > 0 && diff[i-1]==x)  cnt += pfx[i-1];
                if(i+2 < n-1 && diff[i+2]==x)  cnt += sfx[i+2];
                maxlen = max(maxlen, cnt);
            }
        }

        return maxlen+1;
    }
};
[Q3_END]

class Solution {
    vector<int> p;
    int find(int x){
        return (p[x] < 0 ? x : p[x] = find(p[x]));
    }

    void unite(int x, int y){
        
        //if((x == find(x)) != (y == find(y)))    p[x] += p[y], p[y] = x;
        int x_root = find(x), y_root = find(y);
        if(x_root == y_root)  return;
        p[x_root] += p[y_root];
        p[y_root] = x_root;
    }

    //already 
    
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n =points.size();

        p.assign(n, -1);

        unordered_map<int,int> mpx, mpy;
        //for(int i = 0; i<n;i++)    mpx[points[i][0]].push_back(i), mpy[points[i][1]].push_back(i);
        //dsu
        // auto unite = [&](int x, int y){
            
        // }
        for(int i = 0; i<n; i++){
            if(mpx.count(points[i][0]))   unite(i, mpx[points[i][0]]);
            mpx[points[i][0]] = i;
            if(mpy.count(points[i][1]))    unite(i, mpy[points[i][1]]);
            mpy[points[i][1]] = i;
        }

        vector<int> cnt, vis(n);
        for(int i = 0; i <n; i++){
            if(p[i]<0)  cnt.push_back(-p[i]);
        }

        // for(int i = 0; i<n; i++){
        //     vector<int>q = {i};
        //     vis[i] = 1;

        //     for(int j = 0; j < q.size(); j++){
        //         int u = q[j];
        //         for(int v)
        //     }
        // }

        sort(cnt.rbegin(), cnt.rend());

        return cnt.size()>1 ? cnt[0] + cnt[1] +1 : cnt[0]+1;
    }
};

### RANK 805 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {

        int n = nums.size();

        vector<int> pre(n);

        pre[0] = 1;
        pre[1] = 2;

        for(int i = 2; i < n; i++)
        {
            pre[i] = 2;
            int diff = nums[i] - nums[i - 1];
            int prev = nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2];

            if(prev == diff)
            {
                pre[i] = pre[i - 1] + 1;
            }
        }

        vector<int> suf(n);
        suf[n - 1] = 1;
        suf[n - 2] = 2;

        for(int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--)
        {
            suf[i] = 2;
            int diff = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
            int next = nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1];

            if(diff == next)
            {
                suf[i] = 1 + suf[i + 1];
            }
        }

        int x = *max_element(pre.begin(), pre.end());
        int y = *max_element(suf.begin(), suf.end());

        int ans = max(x,y);

        for(int i = 1; i + 1 < n; i++)
        {
            int diff = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1];

            if(diff % 2 == 0)
            {
                int x = 1, y = 1;
                if(i >= 2 and nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == diff / 2) x = pre[i - 1];
                if(i + 2 < n and nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == diff / 2) y = suf[i + 1];
                ans = max(ans, 1 + x + y);
            }

            ans = max({ans, 1 + pre[i - 1], 1 + suf[i + 1]});
        }

        return max({ans, 1 + suf[1], 1 + pre[n - 2]});
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
struct DSU {
    vector<int> parent, size;

    DSU(int n) {
        parent = vector<int>(n);
        size = vector<int>(n, 1);
        for(int i = 0; i < n; ++i)
            parent[i] = i;
    }

    int get(int x) {
        if(parent[x] == x)
            return x;
        return parent[x] = get(parent[x]);
    }

    bool join(int a, int b) {
        a = get(a);
        b = get(b);
        if(a == b) return false;
        if(size[a] < size[b]) swap(a, b);
        size[a] += size[b];
        parent[b] = a;
        return true;
    }
};
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& a) {

        int n = a.size();

        set<int> x,y;

        for(auto it: a)
        {
            x.insert(it[0]);
            y.insert(it[1]);
        }

        vector<int> xx(x.begin(), x.end());
        vector<int> yy(y.begin(), y.end());

        DSU dsu(xx.size() + yy.size());

        int next = xx.size();

        for(auto it: a)
        {
            int idX = lower_bound(xx.begin(), xx.end(), it[0]) - xx.begin();
            int idY = lower_bound(yy.begin(), yy.end(), it[1]) - yy.begin();

            dsu.join(idX, idY + next);
        }

        map<int,int> mp;
        for(auto it: a)
        {
            int idX = lower_bound(xx.begin(), xx.end(), it[0]) - xx.begin();

            mp[dsu.get(idX)]++;
        }

        vector<int> ans;
        for(auto [f, s]: mp) ans.push_back(s);

        sort(ans.rbegin(), ans.rend());

        if(ans.size() >= 2)
        {
            return ans[0] + ans[1] + 1;
        }

        return ans[0] + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {

        int n = nums.size();

        vector<int> pre(n);

        pre[0] = 1;
        pre[1] = 2;

        for(int i = 2; i < n; i++)
        {
            pre[i] = 2;
            int diff = nums[i] - nums[i - 1];
            int prev = nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2];

            if(prev == diff)
            {
                pre[i] = pre[i - 1] + 1;
            }
        }

        vector<int> suf(n);
        suf[n - 1] = 1;
        suf[n - 2] = 2;

        for(int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--)
        {
            suf[i] = 2;
            int diff = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
            int next = nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1];

            if(diff == next)
            {
                suf[i] = 1 + suf[i + 1];
            }
        }

        int x = *max_element(pre.begin(), pre.end());
        int y = *max_element(suf.begin(), suf.end());

        int ans = max(x,y);

        for(int i = 1; i + 1 < n; i++)
        {
            int diff = nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1];

            if(diff % 2 == 0)
            {
                int x = 1, y = 1;
                if(i >= 2 and nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == diff / 2) x = pre[i - 1];
                if(i + 2 < n and nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == diff / 2) y = suf[i + 1];
                ans = max(ans, 1 + x + y);
            }

            ans = max({ans, 1 + pre[i - 1], 1 + suf[i + 1]});
        }

        return max({ans, 1 + suf[1], 1 + pre[n - 2]});
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]

class Solution {
    int[] parent, rank, size;

    Map<Integer, Integer> mpp1;
    Map<Integer, Integer> mpp2;

    int find(int x) {
        if (parent[x] != x) parent[x] = find(parent[x]);
        return parent[x];
    }

    void union(int a, int b) {
        int parentA = find(a), parentB = find(b);
        if (parentA == parentB) return;
        if (rank[parentA] < rank[parentB]) {
            int temp = parentA;
            parentA = parentB;
            parentB = temp;
        }
        parent[parentB] = parentA;
        size[parentA] += size[parentB];
        if (rank[parentA] == rank[parentB]) rank[parentA]++;
    }

    void unionHelper(int[][] points, int n)
    {
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];

            if (mpp1.containsKey(x)) union(i, mpp1.get(x));
            else mpp1.put(x, i);

            if (mpp2.containsKey(y)) union(i, mpp2.get(y));
            else mpp2.put(y, i);


        }
    }

    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;

        parent = new int[n];
        rank = new int[n];
        size = new int[n];

        mpp1 = new HashMap<>();
        mpp2 = new HashMap<>();

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            parent[i] = i;
            size[i] = 1;
        }
        unionHelper(points,n);

        int ans1 = 0, ans2 = 0;
        Set<Integer> seen = new HashSet<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int root = find(i);
            if (seen.add(root)) {
                int sz = size[root];
                if (sz >= ans1) {
                    ans2 = ans1;
                    ans1 = sz;
                } else if (sz > ans2) {
                    ans2 = sz;
                }
            }
        }

        return ans1 + ans2 + 1;
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 807 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if(n <= 2) return n;

        vector<int> left(n+1,2) , right(n+1,2);
        int ans = 2;
        for(int i = 2 ; i < n ; i++) {
            if(nums[i] - nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2])
                left[i] = left[i-1] + 1;
            ans = max(ans, left[i]);
        }

        for(int i = n-3 ; i >= 0 ; i--) {
            if(nums[i+1] - nums[i] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1])
                right[i] = right[i+1] + 1;
        }
        
        for(int i = 1 ; i < n-1 ; i++) {
            ans = max(ans, left[i] + 1);
            ans = max(ans, right[i] + 1);
            if((nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) % 2 == 0) {
                int d = (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1])/2;

                int l = 1, r = 1;
                if(i-1>=1 && nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]==d)
                    l = left[i-1];

                if(i+1<n-1 && nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]==d)
                    r = right[i+1];

                ans = max(ans, l + r + 1);
            }
        }
        ans = min(ans, n);
        
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DisjointSet {
    vector<int> rank, parent, size;
public:
    DisjointSet(int n) {
        rank.resize(n+1,0);
        parent.resize(n+1);
        size.resize(n+1,1);
        for(int i = 0; i <= n ; i++){
            parent[i] = i;
        }
    }

    int findUPar(int node) {
        if(node == parent[node])
            return node;
        return parent[node] = findUPar(parent[node]);
    }

    void unionByRank(int u, int v) {
        int ulp_u = findUPar(u);
        int ulp_v = findUPar(v);
        if(ulp_u == ulp_v) return;
        if(rank[ulp_u] < rank[ulp_v]){
            parent[ulp_u] = ulp_v;
        }else if(rank[ulp_v] < rank[ulp_u]) {
            parent[ulp_v] = ulp_u;
        }else{
            parent[ulp_v] = ulp_u;
            rank[ulp_u]++;
        }
    }

    void unionBySize(int u, int v){
        int ulp_u = findUPar(u);
        int ulp_v = findUPar(v);
        if(ulp_u == ulp_v) return;
        if(size[ulp_u] < size[ulp_v]) {
            parent[ulp_u] = ulp_v;
            size[ulp_v] += size[ulp_u];
        }else{
            parent[ulp_v] = ulp_u;
            size[ulp_u] += size[ulp_v];
        }
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        DisjointSet dsu(n+1);

        unordered_map<int,int> xMap;
        unordered_map<int,int> yMap;

        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) {
    
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];
    
            if(xMap.count(x))
                dsu.unionByRank(i, xMap[x]);
            else
                xMap[x] = i;
    
            if(yMap.count(y))
                dsu.unionByRank(i, yMap[y]);
            else
                yMap[y] = i;
        }
        unordered_map<int,int> compSize;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++)
            compSize[dsu.findUPar(i)]++;
        vector<int> k;
        for(auto x : compSize) {
            k.push_back(x.second);
        }
        sort(k.rbegin(), k.rend());
        if(k.size() == 1)
            return k[0] + 1;
        return k[0] + k[1] + 1;
        }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 808 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        dp0 = [1]*n
        dp1 = [1]*n
        pre = -1
        pre_num = -1
        for i,num in enumerate(nums):
            if i==0:
                continue
            elif i==1:
                dp0[i]=2
                dp1[i]=2
            elif num-nums[i-1]==nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]:
                dp0[i]=dp0[i-1]+1
                #if dp0[i]<i+1:
                #    dp1[i] = max(dp0[i]+1,dp1[i-1]+1)
                #else:
                dp1[i] = dp1[i-1]+1
            else:
                dp0[i] = 2
                if pre==-1:
                    pre = i
                    pre_num = 2*nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]
                    dp1[i] = dp0[i-1]+1
                    continue
                elif i-pre==1:
                    if pre_num*2==num+nums[i-2]:
                        dp1[i] = dp1[i-1]+1
                    else:
                        pre = i
                        pre_num = 2*nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]
                        dp1[i] = dp0[i-1]+1
                elif i-pre==2:
                    if pre_num+num==2*nums[i-1]:
                        dp1[i] = dp1[i-1]+1
                    else:
                        pre = i
                        pre_num = 2*nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]
                        dp1[i] = dp0[i-1]+1
                else:
                    pre = i
                    pre_num = 2*nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]
                    dp1[i] = dp0[i-1]+1
        ans = max(dp1)
        n = len(nums)
        dp0 = [1]*n
        dp1 = [1]*n
        if n>=2:
            dp0[-2] = 2
            dp1[-2] = 2
        pre = -1
        pre_num = -1
        for i in range(n-3,-1,-1):
            num = nums[i]
            if num-nums[i+1]==nums[i+1]-nums[i+2]:
                dp0[i]=dp0[i+1]+1
                #if dp0[i]<i+1:
                #    dp1[i] = max(dp0[i]+1,dp1[i-1]+1)
                #else:
                dp1[i] = dp1[i+1]+1
            else:
                dp0[i] = 2
                if pre==-1:
                    pre = i
                    pre_num = 2*nums[i+1]-nums[i+2]
                    dp1[i] = dp0[i+1]+1
                    continue
                elif i-pre==-1:
                    if pre_num*2==num+nums[i+2]:
                        dp1[i] = dp1[i+1]+1
                    else:
                        pre = i
                        pre_num = 2*nums[i+1]-nums[i+2]
                        dp1[i] = dp0[i+1]+1
                elif i-pre==-2:
                    if pre_num+num==2*nums[i+1]:
                        dp1[i] = dp1[i+1]+1
                    else:
                        pre = i
                        pre_num = 2*nums[i+1]-nums[i+2]
                        dp1[i] = dp0[i+1]+1
                else:
                    pre = i
                    pre_num = 2*nums[i+1]-nums[i+2]
                    dp1[i] = dp0[i+1]+1        
                
        #print(dp1,dp0)
        return max(ans,max(dp1))
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        un = UnionFind(n)
        #un.__init__(n)
        x_hash = defaultdict(list)
        y_hash = defaultdict(list)
        for i,(x,y) in enumerate(points):
            x_hash[x].append(i)
            y_hash[y].append(i)
        for i_list in x_hash.values():
            if len(i_list)>1:
                i = i_list[0]
                for j in range(1,len(i_list)):
                    un.merge(i_list[j],i)
        for i_list in y_hash.values():
            if len(i_list)>1:
                i = i_list[0]
                for j in range(1,len(i_list)):
                    un.merge(i_list[j],i)

        size_hash = defaultdict(int)
        for i in range(n):
            root = un.find(i)
            size_hash[root]+=1
        sorteds = sorted(size_hash.values())
        if len(sorteds)==1:
            return sorteds[-1]+1
        return sorteds[-1]+sorteds[-2]+1
# 模板来源 https://leetcode.cn/circle/discuss/mOr1u6/
class UnionFind:
    def __init__(self, n: int):
        # 一开始有 n 个集合 {0}, {1}, ..., {n-1}
        # 集合 i 的代表元是自己，大小为 1
        self._fa = list(range(n))  # 代表元
        self._size = [1] * n  # 集合大小
        self.cc = n  # 连通块个数

    # 返回 x 所在集合的代表元
    # 同时做路径压缩，也就是把 x 所在集合中的所有元素的 fa 都改成代表元
    def find(self, x: int) -> int:
        fa = self._fa
        # 如果 fa[x] == x，则表示 x 是代表元
        if fa[x] != x:
            fa[x] = self.find(fa[x])  # fa 改成代表元
        return fa[x]

    # 判断 x 和 y 是否在同一个集合
    def is_same(self, x: int, y: int) -> bool:
        # 如果 x 的代表元和 y 的代表元相同，那么 x 和 y 就在同一个集合
        # 这就是代表元的作用：用来快速判断两个元素是否在同一个集合
        return self.find(x) == self.find(y)

    # 把 from 所在集合合并到 to 所在集合中
    # 返回是否合并成功
    def merge(self, from_: int, to: int) -> bool:
        x, y = self.find(from_), self.find(to)
        if x == y:  # from 和 to 在同一个集合，不做合并
            return False
        self._fa[x] = y  # 合并集合。修改后就可以认为 from 和 to 在同一个集合了
        self._size[y] += self._size[x]  # 更新集合大小（注意集合大小保存在代表元上）
        # 无需更新 _size[x]，因为我们不用 _size[x] 而是用 _size[find(x)] 获取集合大小，但 find(x) == y，我们不会再访问 _size[x]
        self.cc -= 1  # 成功合并，连通块个数减一
        return True

    # 返回 x 所在集合的大小
    def get_size(self, x: int) -> int:
        return self._size[self.find(x)]  # 集合大小保存在代表元上

[Q4_END]
##################

### RANK 809 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;

        int[] pref = new int[n];
        pref[0] = 1;
        pref[1] = 2;
        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            if (nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]) {
                pref[i] = pref[i - 1] + 1;
            } else {
                pref[i] = 2;
            }
        }
        
        int[] suff = new int[n];
        suff[n - 1] = 1;
        suff[n - 2] = 2;
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (nums[i] - nums[i + 1] == nums[i + 1] - nums[i + 2]) {
                suff[i] = suff[i + 1] + 1;
            } else {
                suff[i] = 2;
            }
        }

        int result = Math.max(suff[1] + 1, pref[n - 2] + 1);

        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++) {
            result = Math.max(result, Math.max(suff[i + 1] + 1, pref[i - 1] + 1));
            
            if ((nums[i - 1] + nums[i + 1]) % 2 != 0) {
                continue;
            }
            int diff = (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) / 2;

            if (i - 2 >= 0 && diff == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]) {
                result = Math.max(result, pref[i - 1] + 2);
            }
            
            if (i + 2 < n && diff == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]) {
                result = Math.max(result, suff[i + 1] + 2);
            }
            
            if ((i == 1 || diff == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]) && (i == n - 2 || diff == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1])) {
                result = Math.max(result, pref[i - 1] + suff[i + 1] + 1);
            }
        }

        return result;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    int[] root;
    int[] size;
    
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;

        root = new int[n];
        size = new int[n];
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            root[i] = i;
            size[i] = 1;
        }

        Map<Integer, List<Integer>> xLists = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, List<Integer>> yLists = new HashMap<>();

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];

            xLists.computeIfAbsent(x, k -> new ArrayList<>()).add(i);
            yLists.computeIfAbsent(y, k -> new ArrayList<>()).add(i);
        }

        for (List<Integer> list : xLists.values()) {
            for (int i = 1; i < list.size(); i++) {
                union(list.get(i), list.get(i - 1));
            }
        }
        
        for (List<Integer> list : yLists.values()) {
            for (int i = 1; i < list.size(); i++) {
                union(list.get(i), list.get(i - 1));
            }
        }

        int max0 = -1;
        int max1 = -1;

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (max0 == -1 || size[i] > size[max0]) {
                max1 = max0;
                max0 = i;
            } else if (max1 == -1 || size[i] > size[max1]) {
                max1 = i;
            }
        }

        return size[max0] + (max1 == -1 ? 0 : size[max1]) + 1;
    }

    int findRoot(int a) {
        if (a == root[a]) {
            return a;
        }
        return root[a] = findRoot(root[a]);
    }

    void union(int a, int b) {
        a = findRoot(a);
        b = findRoot(b);

        if (a == b) {
            return;
        }

        if (a < b) {
            root[b] = a;
            size[a] += size[b];
            size[b] = 0;
        } else {
            root[a] = b;
            size[b] += size[a];
            size[a] = 0;
        }
    }
}
[Q4_END]
