### RANK 810 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        
        n = len(nums)
        suf = [(1, float('inf'))] * n
        res = 2
        for i in range(n-2, -1, -1):
            curDiff = nums[i+1] - nums[i]
            if suf[i+1][1] == curDiff:
                suf[i] = (suf[i+1][0]+1, curDiff)
            else:
                suf[i] = (2, curDiff)
            res = max(res, suf[i][0])

        if res != n:
            res += 1

        curCount = 1
        curDiff = float('inf')
        for i in range(1, n-1):
            if nums[i-1] + (curDiff * 2) == nums[i+1]:
                res = max(res, curCount + 2)

            if nums[i-1] + (suf[i+1][1] * 2) == nums[i+1]:
                res = max(res, suf[i+1][0] + 2)

            if (nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]) % 2 == 0:
                res = max(res, 3)
                
            if nums[i-1] + (curDiff * 2) == nums[i+1] and curDiff == suf[i+1][1]:
                res = max(res, curCount + 1 + suf[i+1][0])

            if nums[i] - nums[i-1] == curDiff:
                curCount += 1
            else:
                curCount = 2
                curDiff = nums[i] - nums[i-1]

        return res
                
            
            
            
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        arr = set()
        for a,b in points:
            arr.add(("x", a))
            arr.add(("y", b))

        arr = list(arr)
        rank = defaultdict(int)
        for i in arr:
            rank[i] = 0

        par = defaultdict(tuple)
        for i in arr:
            par[i] = i
            
        def find(x):
            while par[x] != x:
                par[x] = par[par[x]]
                x = par[x]
            return x

        def union(a, b):
            para, parb = find(a), find(b)
            if para != parb:
                par[parb] = para
                rank[para] += rank[parb] + 1
                rank[parb] = 0
            else:
                rank[para] += 1

        for a,b in points:
            union(("x", a),("y", b))

        res = []
        for a,b in rank.items():
            if b != 0:
                res.append(b)

        res.sort(reverse=True)
        if len(res) == 1:
            return res[0] + 1

        return res[0] + res[1] + 1
        
        
        
[Q4_END]

### RANK 811 ###
[Q3_START]
func longestArithmetic(nums []int) int {
	if len(nums) <= 3 {
		return 3
	}
	right := make([]int, len(nums))
	right[len(nums)-1] = 1
	for i := len(nums) - 2; i >= 0; i-- {
		right[i] = 2
		gap := nums[i] - nums[i+1]
		if i+2 < len(nums) && nums[i+1]-nums[i+2] == gap {
			right[i] = right[i+1] + 1
		}
	}
	left := make([]int, len(nums))
	left[0] = 1
	for i := 1; i < len(nums); i++ {
		left[i] = 2
		gap := nums[i-1] - nums[i]
		if i-2 >= 0 && nums[i-2]-nums[i-1] == gap {
			left[i] = left[i-1] + 1
		}
	}
	var ret int
	for i := 0; i < len(nums); i++ {
		if i == 0 {
			ret = max(ret, right[i+1]+1)
			continue
		}
		if i == len(nums)-1 {
			ret = max(ret, left[i-1]+1)
			continue
		}
		ret = max(ret, left[i-1]+1)
		ret = max(ret, right[i+1]+1)
		lval, rval := nums[i-1], nums[i+1]
		gap := lval - rval
		if gap%2 != 0 {
			continue
		}
		gap /= 2
		tmp := 1
		l, r := 1, 1
		if i-2 >= 0 && nums[i-2]-nums[i-1] == gap {
			l = left[i-1]
		}
		if i+2 < len(nums) && nums[i+1]-nums[i+2] == gap {
			r = right[i+1]
		}
		ret = max(ret, tmp+l+r)
	}
	return ret
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
func maxActivated(points [][]int) int {
	parent := make([]int, len(points))
	for i := range parent {
		parent[i] = i
	}
	var find func(x int) int
	find = func(x int) int {
		if parent[x] != x {
			parent[x] = find(parent[x])
		}
		return parent[x]
	}
	union := func(a, b int) {
		pa, pb := find(a), find(b)
		if pa > pb {
			pa, pb = pb, pa
		}
		parent[pb] = pa
	}
	xlines, ylines := map[int][]int{}, map[int][]int{}
	for i, p := range points {
		x, y := p[0], p[1]
		xlines[x] = append(xlines[x], i)
		ylines[y] = append(ylines[y], i)
	}
	for _, lines := range xlines {
		for i := 1; i < len(lines); i++ {
			union(lines[i-1], lines[i])
		}
	}
	for _, lines := range ylines {
		for i := 1; i < len(lines); i++ {
			union(lines[i-1], lines[i])
		}
	}
	group := map[int]int{}
	for i := range parent {
		group[find(i)] += 1
	}
	var groupCnt []int
	for _, v := range group {
		groupCnt = append(groupCnt, v)
	}
	sort.Ints(groupCnt)
	if len(groupCnt) == 1 {
		return groupCnt[0] + 1
	}
	return groupCnt[len(groupCnt)-1] + groupCnt[len(groupCnt)-2] + 1
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 812 ###
[Q3_START]
#include <vector>
#include <unordered_map>
#include <algorithm>

using namespace std;

class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 2) return n;

        // pref[i][d] = length of arithmetic subarray ending at i with diff d
        // suff[i][d] = length of arithmetic subarray starting at i with diff d
        vector<unordered_map<int, int>> pref(n), suff(n);

        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            if (i > 0) {
                int d = nums[i] - nums[i-1];
                pref[i][d] = pref[i-1].count(d) ? pref[i-1][d] + 1 : 2;
            }
        }

        for (int i = n - 1; i >= 0; --i) {
            if (i < n - 1) {
                int d = nums[i+1] - nums[i];
                suff[i][d] = suff[i+1].count(d) ? suff[i+1][d] + 1 : 2;
            }
        }

        int maxLen = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            // Case 1: Max length without changing nums[i]
            for (auto& it : pref[i]) maxLen = max(maxLen, it.second);
            
            // Case 2: Change nums[i] to bridge i-1 and i+1
            if (i > 0 && i < n - 1) {
                int diffSum = nums[i+1] - nums[i-1];
                if (diffSum % 2 == 0) {
                    int d = diffSum / 2;
                    int left = pref[i-1].count(d) ? pref[i-1][d] : 1;
                    int right = suff[i+1].count(d) ? suff[i+1][d] : 1;
                    maxLen = max(maxLen, left + right + 1);
                }
            }
            
            // Case 3: Change nums[i] to extend sequence from left or right
            if (i > 0) {
                for (auto& it : pref[i-1]) maxLen = max(maxLen, it.second + 1);
            }
            if (i < n - 1) {
                for (auto& it : suff[i+1]) maxLen = max(maxLen, it.second + 1);
            }
        }

        return maxLen;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
#include <vector>
#include <unordered_map>
#include <numeric>
#include <algorithm>

using namespace std;

struct DSU {
    vector<int> parent, size;
    DSU(int n) {
        parent.resize(n);
        iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0);
        size.assign(n, 1);
    }
    int find(int i) {
        if (parent[i] == i) return i;
        return parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
    }
    void unite(int i, int j) {
        int root_i = find(i);
        int root_j = find(j);
        if (root_i != root_j) {
            if (size[root_i] < size[root_j]) swap(root_i, root_j);
            parent[root_j] = root_i;
            size[root_i] += size[root_j];
        }
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        unordered_map<int, int> x_map, y_map;
        DSU dsu(n);

        // Group points by X and Y coordinates
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            int x = points[i][0], y = points[i][1];
            if (x_map.count(x)) dsu.unite(i, x_map[x]);
            if (y_map.count(y)) dsu.unite(i, y_map[y]);
            x_map[x] = i;
            y_map[y] = i;
        }

        // Identify which component each X and Y belongs to
        unordered_map<int, int> x_to_root, y_to_root;
        for (auto const& [x, idx] : x_map) x_to_root[x] = dsu.find(idx);
        for (auto const& [y, idx] : y_map) y_to_root[y] = dsu.find(idx);

        // Find the two largest distinct components
        vector<int> componentSizes;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            if (dsu.parent[i] == i) componentSizes.push_back(dsu.size[i]);
        }
        sort(componentSizes.rbegin(), componentSizes.rend());

        // Max points = Largest + Second Largest + 1 newly added point
        int result = componentSizes[0] + 1;
        if (componentSizes.size() > 1) {
            result += componentSizes[1];
        }

        return result;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 813 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        int res = 0;
        Map<Pair<Integer, Integer>, Integer> prefix = new HashMap<>();
        for(int i = 1; i < n; i++) {
            int d = nums[i] - nums[i - 1];
            var curr = new Pair<>(i, d);
            prefix.put(curr, 2);
            var left = new Pair<>(i - 1, d);
            if(prefix.containsKey(left)) {
                prefix.put(curr, prefix.get(left) + 1);
            }
            res = Math.max(res, prefix.get(curr));
        }
        Map<Pair<Integer, Integer>, Integer> suffix = new HashMap<>();
        for(int i = n - 2; i >= 0; i--) {
            int d = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];
            var curr = new Pair<>(i, d);
            suffix.put(curr, 2);
            var right = new Pair<>(i + 1, d);
            if(suffix.containsKey(right)) {
                suffix.put(curr, suffix.get(right) + 1);
            }
            res = Math.max(res, suffix.get(curr));
        }
        if(res == n) {
            return res;
        }
        res++;
        res = Math.max(res, 3);
        for(int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++) {
            if(((nums[i - 1] + nums[i + 1])) % 2 == 0) {
                int cand = (nums[i - 1] + nums[i + 1]) / 2;
                int d = cand - nums[i - 1];
                res = Math.max(res, prefix.getOrDefault(new Pair<>(i - 1, d), 1) + suffix.getOrDefault(new Pair<>(i + 1, d), 1) + 1);
            }
        }
        return res;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    int[] roots;
    int[] sizes;
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        roots = new int[n];
        sizes = new int[n];
        Arrays.fill(roots, -1);
        Arrays.fill(sizes, 1);
        Map<Integer, Integer> xs = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Integer> ys = new HashMap<>();
        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];
            if(xs.containsKey(x)) {
                union(xs.get(x), i);
            }
            if(ys.containsKey(y)) {
                union(ys.get(y), i);
            }
            xs.put(x, i);
            ys.put(y, i);
        }
        int a = -1;
        int b = -1;
        Set<Integer> seen = new HashSet<>();
        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int r = find(i);
            if(!seen.contains(r)) {
                int sz = sizes[r];
                if(sz > a) {
                    b = a;
                    a = sz;
                } else if(sz > b) {
                    b = sz;
                }
                seen.add(r);
            }
        }
        if(b == -1) {
            return a + 1;
        }
        return a + b + 1;
    }

    void union(int a, int b) {
        a = find(a);
        b = find(b);
        if(a == b) {
            return;
        }
        roots[a] = b;
        sizes[b] += sizes[a];
    }

    int find(int a) {
        if(roots[a] == -1) {
            return a;
        }
        return roots[a] = find(roots[a]);
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 814 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        
        int n=nums.size();
        vector<int> l(n,2),r(n,2);
        for(int i=2;i<n;i++){
            if(nums[i]-nums[i-1]==nums[i-1]-nums[i-2])l[i]=l[i-1]+1;
        }
        for(int i=n-3;i>=0;i--){
            if(nums[i+1]-nums[i]==nums[i+2]-nums[i+1])r[i]=r[i+1]+1;
        }
        int ans=2;
        for(auto& i:l)ans=max(ans,i);
        for(int i=1;i<n-1;i++){
            if((nums[i+1]-nums[i-1])%2==0){
                int x=(nums[i+1]-nums[i-1])/2;
                int ll=1,rr=1;
                if(i>=2 && nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]==x)ll=l[i-1];
                if(i+2<n && nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]==x)rr=r[i+1];
                ans=max(ans,ll+rr+1);
            }
            ans=max(ans,l[i-1]+1);
            ans=max(ans,r[i+1]+1);
        }
        ans=max({ans,l[n-2]+1,r[1]+1});
        return min(ans,n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DisjointSet{
    vector<int> rank,parent,size;
    public:
     DisjointSet(int n){
        rank.resize(n+1,0);
        parent.resize(n+1);
        size.resize(n+1,1);
        for(int i=0;i<=n;i++){
            parent[i]=i;
        }
     }
     int findU(int node){
        if(node==parent[node])return node;
        return parent[node]=findU(parent[node]);
     }
     void unionByRank(int u,int v){
        int uu=findU(u);
        int uv=findU(v);
        if(uu==uv)return;
        if(rank[uu]<rank[uv]){
            parent[uu]=uv;
        }
        else{
            parent[uv]=uu;
            if(rank[uu]==rank[uv])rank[uu]++;
        }
     }

     void unionBySize(int u, int v) {
     int uu=findU(u);
        int uv=findU(v);
        if(uu==uv)return;
        if(size[uu]<size[uv]){
            parent[uu]=uv;
            size[uv]+=size[uu];
        }
        else{
            parent[uv]=uu;
            size[uu]+=size[uv];
        }
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n=points.size();
        unordered_map<int,int> xmp,ymp;
        int newidx=0;
        for(auto& i:points){
            if(xmp.count(i[0])==0){
                xmp[i[0]]=newidx;
                newidx++;
            }
            if(ymp.count(i[1])==0){
                ymp[i[1]]=newidx;
                newidx++;
            }
            
        }
        DisjointSet ds(newidx+20);
        for(auto& i:points){
            int x=xmp[i[0]];
            int y=ymp[i[1]];
            ds.unionBySize(x,y);
        }
        unordered_map<int,int> mp;
        for(auto& i:points){
            int par=ds.findU(xmp[i[0]]);
            mp[par]++;
        }
        vector<int> v;
        for(auto& i:mp){
            v.push_back(i.second);
        }
        sort(v.begin(),v.end());
        if(v.size()==1)return v.back()+1;
        return v.back()+v[v.size()-2]+1;
        
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 815 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        prev_index = -1
        ans = 2
        start = 0
        diff = nums[1] - nums[0]
        diffs = []
        for i in range(2, len(nums)):
            if nums[i] - nums[i-1] != diff:
                diffs.append((start, i-1, diff))
                diff = nums[i] - nums[i-1]
                start = i-1
        diffs.append((start, len(nums) - 1, diff))
        if len(diffs) == 1:
            return len(nums)
        maxi = 3
        for i in range(len(diffs)):
            s = diffs[i][0]
            e = diffs[i][1]
            l = e - s + 1
            maxi = max(maxi, l)
            if i != 0:
                ti = s - 1
                val = 2 * nums[s] - nums[s+1]
                ll = l + 1
                j = s - 2
                while j >= 0 and val - nums[j] == nums[s+1] - nums[s]:
                    ll += 1
                    val = nums[j]
                    j -= 1
                    
                maxi = max(maxi, ll)
            if i != len(diffs) - 1:
                ti = e + 1
                val = 2 * nums[e] - nums[e-1]
                ll = l + 1
                j = e + 2
                while j < len(nums) and nums[j] - val == nums[e] - nums[e-1]:
                    ll += 1
                    val = nums[j]
                    j += 1
                maxi = max(maxi, ll)
        return maxi
                
                    
                
            
            
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        p = {}
        r = {}
        c = {}
        vx = set()
        vy = set()
        def find(a):
            if p[a] != a:
                p[a] = find(p[a])
            return p[a]
        def merge(a, b):
            pa = find(a)
            pb = find(b)
            if pa == pb:
                return
            if r[pa] < r[pb]:
                p[pa] = pb
                c[pb] += c[pa]
                return
            if r[pb] < r[pa]:
                p[pb] = pa
                c[pa] += c[pb]
                return
            p[pb] = pa
            c[pa] += c[pb]
            r[pa] += 1
        for point in points:
            if point[0] not in vx:
                vx.add(point[0])
                p[(point[0], int(1e10))] = (point[0], int(1e10))
                r[(point[0], int(1e10))] = 0
                c[(point[0], int(1e10))] = 0
            if point[1] not in vy:
                vy.add(point[1])
                p[(int(1e10), point[1])] = (int(1e10), point[1])
                r[(int(1e10), point[1])] = 0
                c[(int(1e10), point[1])] = 0
            p[(point[0], point[1])] = (point[0], point[1])
            r[(point[0], point[1])] = 0
            c[(point[0], point[1])] = 1
            merge((point[0], int(1e10)), (int(1e10), point[1]))
            merge((point[0], int(1e10)), (point[0], point[1]))
        parents = set()
        for point in points:
            pp = find((point[0], point[1]))
            if pp not in parents:
                parents.add(pp)
        if len(parents) == 1:
            return len(points) + 1
        sizes = [0]
        for pp in parents:
            sizes.append(c[pp])
        sizes.sort()
        return sizes[-1] + sizes[-2] + 1
            
                
                
[Q4_END]

### RANK 816 ###
[Q3_START]
typedef vector<int> vi;

class Solution {
public:
    int f(vector<int>& a) {
        int n = a.size();
        int dp0[100001], dp1[100001], dp2[100001], dpn[100001];
        int ret = 0;
        dp0[0] = 1;
        dp0[1] = 2;
        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            if (a[i] - a[i-1] == a[i-1] - a[i-2]) {
                dp0[i] = dp0[i-1] + 1;
            } else {
                dp0[i] = 2;
            }
        }
        dp1[0] = 1;
        dp1[1] = 2;
        dp1[2] = 3;
        for (int i = 3; i < n; i++) {
            dp1[i] = dp0[i-1] + 1;
        }
        dp2[0] = 1;
        dp2[1] = 2;
        dp2[2] = 3;
        for (int i = 3; i < n; i++) {
            int d = a[i] - a[i-2];
            dp2[i] = 3;
            if (d % 2 == 0) {
                d /= 2;
                if (a[i-2] - a[i-3] == d) {
                    dp2[i] = dp0[i-2] + 2;
                }
            }
        }
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            ret = max(ret, dp0[i]);
            ret = max(ret, dp1[i]);
            ret = max(ret, dp2[i]);
        }
        return ret;
    }
    void f2(vector<int>& a, vi &dp0) {
        int n = a.size();
        dp0.resize(n);
        dp0[0] = 1;
        dp0[1] = 2;
        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            if (a[i] - a[i-1] == a[i-1] - a[i-2]) {
                dp0[i] = dp0[i-1] + 1;
            } else {
                dp0[i] = 2;
            }
        }
    }
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& a) {
        vi lef, rig;
        int n = a.size();
        f2(a, lef);
        reverse(a.begin(), a.end());
        f2(a, rig);
        reverse(a.begin(), a.end());
        reverse(rig.begin(), rig.end());
        int ret = 3;

        for (int i = 0; i+1 < n; i++) {
            ret = max(ret, lef[i] + 1);
        }
        for (int i = 1; i < n; i++) {
            ret = max(ret, 1 + rig[i]);
        }
        
        for (int i = 1; i+1 < n; i++) {
            int m = a[i-1] + a[i+1];
            if (m & 1) continue;
            m /= 2;
            int d = m - a[i-1];
            int r1 = 1;
            if (i >= 2 && a[i-2] == a[i-1] - d) {
                r1 = lef[i-1];
            }
            int r2 = 1;
            if (i+2 < n && a[i+2] == a[i+1] + d) {
                r2 = rig[i+1];
            }
            ret = max(ret, r1+1+r2);
        }
        return ret;

        /*
        int r1 = f(a);
        reverse(a.begin(), a.end());
        int r2 = f(a);
        return max(r1, r2);
        */
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
typedef vector<int> vi;

int p[100001];
class Solution {
public:
    int find(int x) {
        if (p[p[x]] != p[x]) {
            p[x] = find(p[p[x]]);
        }
        return p[x];
    }
    void join(int x, int y) {
        int px = find(x);
        int py = find(y);
        p[px] = py; 
    }
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        unordered_map<int,int> xp, yp;
        int n = points.size();
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) p[i] = i;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];
            auto it = xp.find(x);
            if (it != xp.end()) {
                join(i, it->second);
            } else {
                xp[x] = i;
            }

            it = yp.find(y);
            if (it != yp.end()) {
                join(i, it->second);
            } else {
                yp[y] = i;
            }
        }

        unordered_map<int,int> m; // m[root] = count;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            m[find(i)]++;
        }
        vi a;
        for (auto it = m.begin(); it != m.end(); it++) {
            a.push_back(it->second);
        }
        sort(a.begin(), a.end());
        reverse(a.begin(), a.end());
        int ret = 1 + a[0];
        if (a.size() > 1) ret += a[1];
        return ret;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 817 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    #define ll long long
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        ll n=nums.size();
        vector<ll>diff(n+1,0);
        for(int i=0;i<n-1;i++){
            diff[i]=(ll)(nums[i+1]-nums[i]);
           // cout<<diff[i]<<" ";
        }
        //cout<<endl;
        vector<ll>pre(n,1),post(n,1);
        for(int i=1;i<n-1;i++){
            if(diff[i]==diff[i-1])pre[i]=pre[i-1]+1;
          //  cout<<pre[i]<<" ";
        }
        // cout<<endl;
        for(int i=n-3;i>=0;i--){
            if(diff[i]==diff[i+1])post[i]=post[i+1]+1;
           //  cout<<post[i]<<" ";
        }
        ll ans=0;
        for(int i=0;i<n-1;i++){
            ans=max(ans,pre[i]+1);
            if(i){
                ll s=(diff[i-1]+diff[i]);
                if(s%2==0){
                ll  newdiff=s/2;
                  ll x=2;
                 if(i>=2 && diff[i-2]==newdiff)x+=pre[i-2];
                 if(i<(n-2) && diff[i+1]==newdiff)x+=post[i+1];
                    ans=max(ans,x);
                }
                
            }
        }
        return min(ans+1,n);
        
        
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    #define ll long long
    
    class DSU{
     public: 
    unordered_map<ll,ll>par;
    ll findpar(ll u){
        if(par.find(u)==par.end())par[u]=u;
        if(par[u]==u)return u;
        return par[u]=findpar(par[u]);
    }

   void unite(ll u,ll v){
        ll pu=findpar(u);
        ll pv=findpar(v);
        if(pu==pv)return;
         par[pu]=pv;
    }
   
  };
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
          DSU *dsu= new DSU;
        ll offset=4e9,negOffset=1e9;
        for(auto i:points){
            dsu->unite(i[0]+negOffset,i[1]+offset+negOffset);
        }
        map<ll,ll>mp;
        for(auto i:points){
            mp[dsu->findpar(i[0]+negOffset)]++;
        }
        int ans=0,smax=0;ll mx=-1;
        // for(auto &i:points){
        //     int x=dsu->findpar(i[0]+negOffset);
        //     int y=dsu->findpar(i[1]+negOffset+offset);
        //     cout<<x<<" "<<y<<endl;
        //     if(x==y){
                
        //     }
        //     else{
        //         ans=max((ll)ans,mp[x]+mp[y]+1);
        //     }
        // }
        for(auto [x,y]:mp){
            if(y>ans){
                ans=y;
                mx=x;
            }
        }
        for(auto [x,y]:mp){
            if(x!=mx){
                smax=max((ll)smax,y);
            }
        }
        ans+=smax;
        return ans+1;
        
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 819 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        if n <= 2:
            return n

        left_arr = [1] * n
        right_arr = [1] * n
        left_diff = [None] * n
        right_diff = [None] * n

        # len of arr end with index i
        left_arr[1] = 2
        left_diff[1] = nums[1] - nums[0]

        for i in range(2, n):
            d1 = nums[i] - nums[i-1]
            d2 = nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]
            if d1 == d2:
                left_arr[i] = left_arr[i-1] + 1
            else:
                left_arr[i] = 2
            left_diff[i] = d1


        right_arr[n-2] = 2
        right_diff[n-2] = nums[-1] - nums[n-2]

        for i in range(n-3, -1, -1):
            d1 = nums[i+1] - nums[i]
            d2 = nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]
            if d1 == d2:
                right_arr[i] = right_arr[i+1] + 1
            else:
                right_arr[i] = 2
            right_diff[i] = d1

        anw = 2

        # print(left_arr, right_arr, left_diff, right_diff)
        for i in range(n):
            anw = max(anw, left_arr[i])

        # modify only one ele
        for i in range(n-1):
            anw = max(anw, min(n, left_arr[i] + 1))

        for i in range(1, n):
            anw = max(anw, min(n, right_arr[i] + 1))

        # modify middle
        for i in range(1, n-1):
            tmp_diff = nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]
            if tmp_diff % 2:
                continue

            target = tmp_diff // 2

            # min len = 1
            left_con = 1
            if i - 1 > 0 and left_diff[i-1] == target:
                left_con = left_arr[i-1]

            right_con = 1
            if i + 1 < n - 1 and right_diff[i+1] == target:
                right_con = right_arr[i+1]

            anw = max(anw, left_con + right_con + 1)
            
        return min(anw, n)
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class UF:
    def __init__(self, n):
        self.parent = list(range(n))
        self.rank = [0] * n

    def find(self, x):
        while self.parent[x] != x:
            self.parent[x] = self.parent[self.parent[x]]
            x = self.parent[x]
        return x

    def union(self, x, y):
        px = self.find(x)
        py = self.find(y)
        if px == py:
            return

        if self.rank[px] < self.rank[py]:
            self.parent[px] = py
        elif self.rank[px] > self.rank[py]:
            self.parent[py] = px
        else:
            self.parent[py] = px
            self.rank[px] += 1

class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        xv = {}
        yv = {}
        next = 0
        for x, y in points:
            if x not in xv:
                xv[x] = next
                next += 1
        for x, y in points:
            if y not in yv:
                yv[y] = next
                next += 1

        uf = UF(next)
        for x, y in points:
            uf.union(xv[x], yv[y])

        edges = collections.defaultdict(int)
        for x, y in points:
            xx_root = uf.find(xv[x])
            edges[xx_root] += 1

        conn = sorted(list(edges.values()), reverse = True)
        # print(conn)
        if not conn:
            return 1

        if len(conn) == 1:
            return conn[0] + 1

        return conn[0] + conn[1] + 1         
[Q4_END]

std::ostream& operator << (std::ostream &os, const C &c) {bool f = true; os << "[";

std::cout<< s.substr(0, i) << " = " << x << " | ";debug(s.substr(s.find_first_not_of(' ', i + 1)), args...); break;}}}




const int inf = 1e9;
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        vector<int> rev = nums;
        reverse(rev.begin(), rev.end());
        return max(longestArithmetic_core(nums), longestArithmetic_core(rev));
    }
    int longestArithmetic_core(vector<int>& nums) {
        nums.push_back(inf);
        int n = nums.size();
        vector<pair<int, int>> mx(n), mx_r(n);
        vector<int> mx_r_last(n);
        // the subarray must end at i
        // mx[i] [0...i] no replaced
        // mx_r[i] [0...i] replace allowed. May/maynot be done. Cannot be done further.
        // must have been done on [0..i-1] 
        // must not be done on [i] 

        // save max length and diff
        
        //mx[0] = mx_r[0] = {-1,-1};
        mx[1] = mx_r[1] = {2, nums[1] - nums[0]};
        mx_r_last[1] = nums[1];
        int ans = 2;

        for(int i=2; i<n; i++){
            int cd = nums[i] - nums[i-1];
            int lastd = mx[i-1].second;
            // mx[i]
            if(cd == lastd) {
                mx[i] = {mx[i-1].first + 1, cd};
            } else {
                mx[i] = {2, cd};
            }
            
            // mx_r[i]
            int crd = nums[i] - mx_r_last[i-1];
            if(crd == mx_r[i-1].second) {
                mx_r[i] = {mx_r[i-1].first+1, crd};
            } else {
                mx_r[i] = {2, crd};
            }
            mx_r_last[i] = nums[i];

            if(mx_r[i].first < mx[i].first) {
                mx_r[i] = mx[i];
                mx_r_last[i] = nums[i];
            }


            // choose to replace i if needed 
            // i-1 i
            
            if(cd != lastd && mx[i-1].first+1 > mx_r[i].first) {
                mx_r[i] = {mx[i-1].first+1, lastd};
                mx_r_last[i] = nums[i-1] + lastd;
            }

                        
            //assert(mx_r[i] >= mx[i]);
            
            ans = max(ans, max(mx[i].first, mx_r[i].first));
        }
        DEBUG(nums, mx, mx_r);
        if(ans==n) ans--;
        return ans;
        
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]

template<typename T, typename S> std::ostream& operator << (std::ostream &os, const std::pair<T, S> &p) {return os << "(" << p.first << ", " << p.second << ")";}
template<typename C, typename T = std::decay<decltype(*std::begin(std::declval<C>()))>, typename std::enable_if<!std::is_same<C, std::string>::value>::type* = nullptr>
std::ostream& operator << (std::ostream &os, const C &c) {bool f = true; os << "["; 
for (const auto &x : c) {if (!f) os << ", "; f = false; os << x;}return os << "]";}
template<typename T> void debug(std::string s, T x) {std::cout << "" << s << " = " << x << "\n";}
template<typename T, typename... Args> void debug(std::string s, T x, Args... args) 
{for (int i=0, b=0; i<(int)s.size(); i++) {if (s[i] == '(' || s[i] == '{') b++; else if (s[i] == ')' || s[i] == '}') b--; else if (s[i] == ',' && b == 0) {
std::cout<< s.substr(0, i) << " = " << x << " | ";debug(s.substr(s.find_first_not_of(' ', i + 1)), args...); break;}}}




class DSU{
public:
    vector<int> parent;
    // parent[i] is the immediate parent of node i

    vector<int> size;
    // size[i] is the size of the tree rooted at i 
    // if i is not a root, i.e, parent[i]!=i, then size[i] has no meaning

    int num_set;
    int n;
    bool strict = true;

    
    int get_num_set(){
        return this->num_set;
    }
    
    void init(int n){
        // initially no one is in any set
        parent = vector<int>(n+1, -1);
        size = vector<int>(n+1, -1);
        num_set = 0;
        this->n = n;
    }

    void make_set(int v){
        // create a set 
        // it should not be part of any set earlier
        if(strict){
            assert(parent[v]==-1);
            assert(v>=0 && v<=n);
        }
        parent[v] = v;
        size[v] = 1;
        num_set ++;
    }

    void merge(int v1, int v2){

        if(strict){
            assert(parent[v1]!=-1);
            assert(parent[v2]!=-1);
        }

        // smaller guy will become child of bigger one
        int p1 = get_leader(v1);
        int p2 = get_leader(v2);

        // if same parent, then no need to do anything
        if(p1!=p2){
            // make p1 bigger
            if(size[p2]>size[p1]){
                swap(p1, p2);
            }
            // p2 will be child of p1
            parent[p2] = p1;

            size[p1] += size[p2];
            size[p2] = -1; // p2 is not a leader, no meaning of size for him
            num_set--;

        }

    }

    int get_leader(int v){
        
        if(strict){
            assert(v>=0 && v<=n);
            assert(parent[v]!=-1);
        }

        if(parent[v]!=v){
            // do path compresstion
            parent[v] = get_leader(parent[v]);
        }
        return parent[v];
    }

    bool is_in_set(int v){
        return parent[v] != -1;
    }

    bool is_connected(int v1, int v2){
        return get_leader(v1)==get_leader(v2);
    }

    int get_set_size(int v){
        
        if(strict){

            assert( is_in_set(v));

        }


        // Mistake : not calling get_leader, just using parent[v]
        return size[ get_leader(v) ];

    }

};


class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& p) {
        int n = p.size();
        
        DSU dsu;
        dsu.init(n);
        
        map<int, int> xcidx, ycidx;

        for(int i=0; i<n; i++){
            int x = p[i][0], y = p[i][1];
            dsu.make_set(i);
            
            auto xitr = xcidx.find(x);
            auto yitr = ycidx.find(y);
            if(xitr == xcidx.end() && yitr == ycidx.end()) {
                // new set
                xcidx[x] = i;
                ycidx[y] = i;
            } else if(xitr != xcidx.end() && yitr != ycidx.end()) {
                // ensure merged two sets
                int s1 = xitr->second, s2 = yitr->second;
                dsu.merge(s1, s2);
                dsu.merge(s1, i);
            } else if(xitr != xcidx.end()) {
                dsu.merge(xitr->second, i);
                ycidx[y] = i;
            } else {
                assert(yitr != ycidx.end());
                dsu.merge(yitr->second, i);
                xcidx[x] = i;
            }
        }
        

        // max 2 sets + 1
        multiset<int> roots;
        roots.insert(0);
        for(int i=0; i<n; i++) {
            if(dsu.parent[i] == i) {
                // root
                roots.insert(dsu.size[i]);
            }
        }
        DEBUG(roots);
        assert(roots.size()>=2);
        
        return 1 + *prev(roots.end()) + *prev(prev(roots.end()));
        
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 821 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n<=3) return n;
        vector<int> dif(n-1);
        for (int i=0; i<n-1;i++) {
            dif[i] = nums[i+1]-nums[i];
        }
        unordered_map<int, vector<pair<int,int>>> mp;
        int s = 0;
        for (int i=1; i<dif.size();i++) {
            if (dif[i]!=dif[i-1]) {
                mp[dif[s]].push_back({s, i-1});
                s = i;
            }
        }
        mp[dif[s]].push_back({s, (int)dif.size()-1});
        int res = 2;
        for (auto& [cd, bl] : mp) {
            for (int i=0; i<bl.size();i++) {
                int st = bl[i].first;
                int en = bl[i].second;
                int L = en-st+1;
                int ans = L;
                if (st>0) ans = max(ans, L+1);
                if (en<(int)dif.size()-1) ans = max(ans, L+1);
                if (st>=2 && dif[st-2]+dif[st-1]==2*cd)
                    ans = max(ans, L+2);
                if (en<=(int)dif.size()-3 && dif[en+1]+dif[en+2]==2*cd) {
                    if (i+1<bl.size() && bl[i+1].first==en+3) {
                        int nL = bl[i+1].second-bl[i+1].first+1;
                        ans = max(ans, L+2+nL);
                    } else {
                        ans = max(ans, L+2);
                    }
                }
                res = max(res, ans);
            }
        }
        return min(n, res+1);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:

    void bfs(int start, int curr, unordered_map<int, vector<pair<int, int>>>& xmap, unordered_map<int, vector<pair<int, int>>>& ymap, vector<int>& hash, vector<vector<int>>& points){
    queue<int> q;
    q.push(curr);
    hash[curr] = start;
    
    while(!q.empty()){
        int node = q.front(); q.pop();
        int x = points[node][0], y = points[node][1];
        
        auto xneighbors = move(xmap[x]);
        xmap.erase(x);
        for(auto& it : xneighbors){
            if(hash[it.second] != -1) continue;
            hash[it.second] = start;
            q.push(it.second);
        }
        
        auto yneighbors = move(ymap[y]);
        ymap.erase(y);
        for(auto& it : yneighbors){
            if(hash[it.second] != -1) continue;
            hash[it.second] = start;
            q.push(it.second);
        }
    }
}
    
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        unordered_map<int, vector<pair<int, int>>> xmap, ymap;
        int n = points.size();
        for(int i = 0; i<n; i++){
            auto it= points[i];
            int x = it[0], y = it[1];
            xmap[x].push_back({y, i});
            ymap[y].push_back({x, i});
        }
        vector<int> hash(n, -1);
        for(int i = 0; i<n; i++){
            if(hash[i] != -1) continue;
            bfs(i, i, xmap, ymap, hash, points);
        }
        unordered_map<int, int> cnt;
        for(auto it: hash){
            cnt[it]++;
        }
        vector<int> ans;
        for(auto it: cnt){
            ans.push_back(it.second);
        }
        sort(ans.rbegin(), ans.rend());
        return 1 + ans[0] + (ans.size() > 1 ? ans[1] : 0);
    }
};
[Q4_END]
##################

### RANK 822 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        vector<int> ld(n, 1), rd(n, 1);

        for (int i = 1; i < n; ) {
            int st = i - 1, d = nums[i] - nums[i - 1];
            for ( ; i < n && nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == d; i++) {
                ld[i] = i - st + 1;
            }
        }

        for (int i = n - 2; i >= 0; ) {
            int st = i + 1, d = nums[i+1] - nums[i];
            for ( ; i >= 0 && nums[i+1] - nums[i] == d; i--) {
                rd[i] = st - i + 1;
            }
        }

        int res = max(1 + rd[1], 1 + ld[n - 2]);

        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++) {
            int link = 0;
            if (nums[i-1] + nums[i+1] & 1) {
                link = 1;
            }
            else {
                int mid = (nums[i - 1] + nums[i + 1]) / 2;
                int llen = 1, rlen = 1;
                if (i != 1 && nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == mid - nums[i - 1]) {
                    llen = ld[i - 1];
                } 
                if (i != n - 2 && nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == nums[i + 1] - mid) {
                    rlen = rd[i + 1];
                }
                link = llen + rlen + 1;
            }

            res = max({res, 1 + ld[i - 1], 1 + rd[i + 1], link});
        }


        return res;
    }
};
[Q3_END]

### RANK 824 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        def solve(arr):
            cache = [[{} for _ in range(n)] for _ in range(2)]
            def recur(idx, diff, skip):
                if idx == n-1:
                    return 0
                if diff in cache[skip][idx]:
                    return cache[skip][idx][diff]
                best = 0
                if arr[idx+1] != arr[idx]+diff:
                    if skip != 1 and idx+2<n and arr[idx+2]==arr[idx]+2*diff:
                        best = max(best, 2+recur(idx+2, diff, 1))
                    if skip != 1 and idx+1 < n:
                        best = max(best, 1)
                else:
                    best = max(best, 1+recur(idx+1,diff,skip))
                cache[skip][idx][diff] = best
                return best

            best=3
            for i in range(n-1):
                best = max(best,2+recur(i+1, arr[i+1] - arr[i],0) )
            return best
        return max(solve(nums), solve(nums[::-1]))
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DisjointSet:
    def __init__(self, n):
        self.parent = list(range(n))
        self.size = [0] * n
    def find(self,val):
        if self.parent[val] != val:
            self.parent[val] = self.find(self.parent[val])
        return self.parent[val]
    def union(self,a,b):
        ra = self.find(a)
        rb = self.find(b)
        if ra ==rb:
            return
        if self.size[ra] < self.size[rb]:
            ra,rb=rb,ra
        self.parent[rb] = ra
        self.size[ra] += self.size[rb]

class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(points)
        rp = sorted(set([i for i,j in points]))
        cp = sorted(set([j for i,j in points]))
        rmp = {rp[i]:i for i in range(len(rp))}
        cmp = {cp[i]:i for i in range(len(cp))}
        for i in range(n):
            points[i][0] = rmp[points[i][0]]
            points[i][1] = cmp[points[i][1]]
        # end coordinate compress
        print(points)
        ds = DisjointSet(2*n+2)
        for r,c in points:
            ds.size[r]+=1
            ds.size[c+n]+=1
        
        for r,c in points:
            ds.union(r,c+n)
        
        big_r = [0,0]
        for r in range(n):
            if ds.find(r) == r:
                big_r.append(ds.size[r])
        for c in range(n,2*n):
            if ds.find(c)==c:
                big_r.append(ds.size[c])
        big_r.sort()
        return (big_r[-1]+big_r[-2])//2+1
        
[Q4_END]

### RANK 825 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();

        vector<int> fwd(n), fd(n), bwd(n), bd(n);
        
        // fwd[i]: longest arithmetic subarray ending at i (no replacement)
        fwd[0] = 1; fwd[1] = 2; fd[1] = nums[1] - nums[0];
        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            int d = nums[i] - nums[i-1];
            fwd[i] = (d == fd[i-1]) ? fwd[i-1] + 1 : 2;
            fd[i] = d;
        }

        // bwd[i]: longest arithmetic subarray starting at i (no replacement)
        bwd[n-1] = 1; bwd[n-2] = 2; bd[n-2] = nums[n-1] - nums[n-2];
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            int d = nums[i+1] - nums[i];
            bwd[i] = (d == bd[i+1]) ? bwd[i+1] + 1 : 2;
            bd[i] = d;
        }

        int ans = *max_element(fwd.begin(), fwd.end());
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (i > 0 && fwd[i-1] >= 2)
                ans = max(ans, fwd[i-1] + 1);
            if (i < n - 1 && bwd[i+1] >= 2)
                ans = max(ans, bwd[i+1] + 1);
            if (i > 0 && i < n-1) {
                int L = fwd[i-1], R = bwd[i+1];
                long long gap = (long long)nums[i+1] - nums[i-1];
                if (L >= 2 && R >= 2 && fd[i-1] == bd[i+1] && gap == 2LL * fd[i-1])
                    ans = max(ans, L + 1 + R);
                if (L >= 2 && gap == 2LL * fd[i-1])
                    ans = max(ans, L + 2);
                if (R >= 2  && gap == 2LL * bd[i+1])
                    ans = max(ans, R + 2);
                if (gap % 2 == 0)
                    ans = max(ans, 3);
            }
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    vector<int> parents, sz;
    int find(int x) {
        return parents[x] == x ? x : parents[x] = find(parents[x]);
    }
    void unite(int a, int b) {
        a = find(a), b = find(b);
        if (a == b) return;
        if (sz[a] < sz[b]) swap(a, b);
        parents[b] = a, sz[a] += sz[b];
    }
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        parents.resize(n);
        iota(parents.begin(), parents.end(), 0);
        sz.assign(n, 1);

        unordered_map<int, vector<int>> byX, byY;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            byX[points[i][0]].push_back(i);
            byY[points[i][1]].push_back(i);
        }

        for (auto& [x, ids] : byX) {
            for (int i = 1; i < ids.size(); i++) {
                unite(ids[0], ids[i]);
            }
        }

        for (auto& [y, ids] : byY) {
            for (int i = 1; i < ids.size(); i++) {
                unite(ids[0], ids[i]);
            }
        }

        unordered_set<int> roots;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
             roots.insert(find(i));   
        }

        int best1 = 0, best2 = 0;
        for (int r : roots) {
            if (sz[r] >= best1) { 
                best2 = best1; 
                best1 = sz[r]; 
            }
            else if (sz[r] > best2) { 
                best2 = sz[r]; 
            }
        }

        return (roots.size() >= 2) ? best1 + best2 + 1 : best1 + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 926 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    using ll = long long ; 
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size(); 

        vector<pair<ll, pair<int,int>>> v;

        int i = 0; 
        while (i < n - 1) {
            ll diff = (ll)nums[i+1] - nums[i]; 
            int j = i; 
            
            while (j + 1 < n && (ll)nums[j+1] - nums[j] == diff) {
                j++; 
            }
            v.push_back({diff, {i, j}}); 
            i = j; 
        }

        map<int, pair<int, ll>> mp; 
        for (auto p : v) {
            mp[p.second.first] = {p.second.second, p.first}; 
        }

        int mx = 2; 
        for (auto p : v) {
            ll d = p.first;
            int st = p.second.first;
            int en = p.second.second; 
            int len = en - st + 1;
            
            mx = max(mx, len);
            
            if (st > 0 || en < n - 1) {
                mx = max(mx, len + 1);
            }

            if (en + 2 < n) {
                if ((ll)nums[en + 2] - nums[en] == 2LL * d) {
                    int current_len = len + 2; 
                    
                    if (mp.count(en + 2) && mp[en + 2].second == d) {
                        int next_en = mp[en + 2].first;
                        int next_len = next_en - (en + 2) + 1;
                        current_len = len + 1 + next_len; 
                    }
                    mx = max(mx, current_len);
                }
            }

            if (st - 2 >= 0) {
                if ((ll)nums[st] - nums[st - 2] == 2LL * d) {
                    mx = max(mx, len + 2);
                }
            }
        }

        return mx;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DisjointSet {
public: 
    vector<int> parent, size; 
    DisjointSet(int n){
        parent.resize(n+1); 
        size.resize(n+1); 
        for(int i=0; i<=n; i++){
            parent[i] = i; 
            size[i] = 1; 
        }
    }
    int findUPar(int node){
        if(node == parent[node]) return node; 
        return parent[node] = findUPar(parent[node]); 
    }

    bool unionBySize(int u, int v){
        int ulp_u = findUPar(u); 
        int ulp_v = findUPar(v); 
        if(ulp_u == ulp_v) return false; 
        if(size[ulp_u] < size[ulp_v]){
            parent[ulp_u] = ulp_v; 
            size[ulp_v] += size[ulp_u]; 
        }
        else{
            parent[ulp_v] = ulp_u; 
            size[ulp_u] += size[ulp_v]; 
        }
        return true;
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size(); 
        
        map<int, vector<int>> st, en; 
        for(int i=0; i<n; i++){
            st[points[i][0]].push_back(i); 
            en[points[i][1]].push_back(i); 
        }

        DisjointSet dsu(n); 

        for(auto& p : st){
            auto& v = p.second; 
            for(int i = 1; i < v.size(); i++){
                dsu.unionBySize(v[0], v[i]); 
            }
        }
        
        for(auto& p : en){
            auto& v = p.second; 
            for(int i = 1; i < v.size(); i++){
                dsu.unionBySize(v[0], v[i]); 
            }
        }

        vector<int> vv; 
        for(int i=0; i<n; i++){
            if(dsu.parent[i] == i){
                vv.push_back(dsu.size[i]);
            }
        }

        sort(vv.begin(), vv.end()); 
        int ans = 0; 
        
        if(vv.size() >= 2){
            ans += vv.back();
            ans += vv[vv.size() - 2]; 
        }
        else if(vv.size() == 1){
            ans += vv.back(); 
        }
        
        return ans + 1; 
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 927 ###
[Q3_START]
/**
 * @param {number[]} nums
 * @return {number}
 */
var longestArithmetic = function(nums) {
    const n = nums.length
    if(n <= 2) return n

    const left_len = new Array(n).fill(1)
    const left_diff = new Array(n).fill(0)
    left_len[0] = 1

    for(let i = 1; i < n; i++) {
        const d = nums[i] - nums[i - 1]
        left_diff[i] = d
        if(i === 1 || left_diff[i - 1] !== d) left_len[i] = 2
        else left_len[i] = left_len[i - 1] + 1
    }

    const right_len = Array(n).fill(1)
    const right_diff = Array(n).fill(0)
    right_len[n - 1] = 1

    for(let i = n - 2; i >= 0; i--) {
        const d = nums[i + 1] - nums[i]
        right_diff[i] = d
        if(i === n - 2 || right_diff[i + 1] !== d) right_len[i] = 2
        else right_len[i] = right_len[i + 1] + 1
    }

    let res = 0
    for(let i = 0; i < n; i++) res = Math.max(res, left_len[i])
    res = Math.max(res, 1 + right_len[1])
    res = Math.max(res, left_len[n - 2] + 1)

    const big = BigInt, {max} = Math
    for(let i = 1; i <= n - 2; i++) {
        res = Math.max(res, left_len[i - 1] + 1)
        res = Math.max(res, right_len[i + 1] + 1)
        const span = big(nums[i + 1]) - big(nums[i - 1])
        if(span % 2n === 0n) {
            const d = Number(span / 2n)
            let left_count = 1
            if(i - 1 >= 1 && left_diff[i - 1] === d) left_count = left_len[i - 1]
            let right_count = 1
            if(i + 1 <= n - 2 && right_diff[i + 1] === d) right_count = right_len[i + 1]
            res = max(res, left_count + 1 + right_count)
        }
    }


    return res
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
/**
 * @param {number[][]} points
 * @return {number}
 */
var maxActivated = function(points) {
    const n = points.length, {max} = Math
    if(n === 0) return 1
    const dsu = new UF(n)
    const mx = new Map(), my = new Map()
    for(let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
        const [x, y] = points[i]
        if(mx.has(x)) dsu.union(i, mx.get(x))
        else mx.set(x, i)

        if(my.has(y)) dsu.union(i, my.get(y))
        else my.set(y, i)
    }

    const compSize = new Map()
    for(let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
        const root = dsu.find(i)
        compSize.set(root,  (compSize.get(root) || 0) + 1)
    }
    const sizes = Array.from(compSize.values()).sort((a, b) => b - a)

    let res = 1

    if(sizes.length > 0) res = max(res, sizes[0] + 1)
    if(sizes.length >= 2) res = max(res, sizes[0] + sizes[1] + 1)

    return res
};

class UF {
  constructor(n) {
    this.root = Array(n).fill(null).map((_, i) => i)
  }
  find(x) {
    if (this.root[x] !== x) {
      this.root[x] = this.find(this.root[x])
    }
    return this.root[x]
  }
  union(x, y) {
    const xr = this.find(x)
    const yr = this.find(y)
    this.root[yr] = xr
  }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 928 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 3) return n;

        int best = 3;

        int prev_diff = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i+1 < n;) {
            int diff = nums[i+1] - nums[i];
            if (i > 0 && diff == prev_diff) continue;
            prev_diff = diff;
            int j = i + 1;
            while (j+1 < n && nums[j+1] - nums[j] == diff) j++;
            best = max(best, abs(j-i)+1);
            i = j;
        }

        for (int w = 0; w < n; w++) {
            for (int mode = 0; mode < 3; mode++) {
                int diff;
               // printf("w=%d mode=%d\n", w, mode);
                if (mode == 0 && w+2 < n)
                    diff = nums[w+2] - nums[w+1];
                else if (mode == 1 && w-2 >= 0)
                    diff = nums[w-1] - nums[w-2];
                else if (mode == 2 && w-1 >= 0 && w+1 < n && (nums[w+1] - nums[w-1]) % 2 == 0)
                    diff = (nums[w+1] - nums[w-1]) / 2;
                else
                    continue;

                int numsw_orig = nums[w];
                int numsw = (w == 0 ? nums[w+1] - diff : nums[w-1] + diff);
                if (nums[w] == numsw) continue;
                nums[w] = numsw;

               // printf("numsw=%d\n", numsw);

                int i = w, j = w;
                while (i-1 >= 0 && nums[i-1] == nums[i] - diff) i--;
                while (j+1 < n  && nums[j+1] == nums[j] + diff) j++;
                best = max(best, abs(j-i)+1);

                //printf("i=%d j=%d\n", i,j);
                
                nums[w] = numsw_orig;
            }
        }

        for (int dir = -1; dir <= 1; dir += 2) {
            int st = dir == 1 ? 0 : n-1;
            int fin = dir == 1 ? n-1 : 0;
            int prev_diff = 0;
            for (int i = st; i != fin;) {
                int diff = nums[i + dir] - nums[i];
                if (i != st && diff == prev_diff) { i += dir; continue; }
                prev_diff = diff;

                int j = i + dir, wild = 0, numsj = nums[j];
                while (j != fin) {
                    int d = nums[j + dir] - numsj;
                    if (d == diff) {
                        j += dir;
                        numsj = nums[j];
                    } else if (wild == 0) {
                        numsj = numsj + diff;
                        j += dir;
                        wild++;
                    } else {
                        break;
                    }
                }

                if (abs(diff)==9)
                printf("i=%d dir=%d diff=%d => j=%d [%d] wild=%d\n", i, dir, diff, j, j-i, wild);

                best = max(best, abs(j-i)+1);
                if (abs(j-i) < 10) {
                    i += dir;
                } else {
                    i = j;
                    i -= dir;
                    i -= dir;
                    i -= dir;
                }
            }
        }


        return best;
    }
};

[Q4_START]
using LL = long long;

struct UnionFind {
    map<LL, LL> parent, size;

    LL find(LL x) {
        if (parent.count(x) == 0 || parent[x] == x) return x;
        return parent[x] = find(parent[x]);
    }

    LL join(LL a, LL b) {
        a = find(a); b = find(b);
        if (a == b) return a;
        parent[a] = b;
        size[b] += size[a];
        return b;
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        UnionFind uf;
        int n = points.size();

        vector<vector<LL>> P(n);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            P[i].resize(2);
            P[i][0] = points[i][0] + 10000000000LL;
            P[i][1] = points[i][1] - 10000000000LL;
            LL z = uf.join(P[i][0], P[i][1]);
            uf.size[z] += 1;
        }

        vector<pair<LL, LL>> xs, ys;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            LL x = uf.find(P[i][0]);
            xs.emplace_back(uf.size[x], x);
            LL y = uf.find(P[i][1]);
            ys.emplace_back(uf.size[y], y);
        }

        sort(xs.begin(), xs.end());
        xs.erase(unique(xs.begin(), xs.end()), xs.end());
        reverse(xs.begin(), xs.end());

        sort(ys.begin(), ys.end());
        ys.erase(unique(ys.begin(), ys.end()), ys.end());
        reverse(ys.begin(), ys.end());

        int best = 1;
        for (int i = 0; i < 3 && i < xs.size(); i++) {
            for (int j = 0; j < 3 && j < ys.size(); j++) {
                int sz = 1 + xs[i].first + (ys[j].second == xs[i].second ? 0 : ys[j].first);
                best = max(best, sz);
            }
        }
        return best;          
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 929 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 2) return n;

        vector<int> pref(n, 1), suff(n, 1);

        for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
            if (i >= 2 && nums[i] - nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2])
                pref[i] = pref[i-1] + 1;
            else
                pref[i] = 2;
        }

        for (int i = n - 2; i >= 0; --i) {
            if (i + 2 < n && nums[i+1] - nums[i] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1])
                suff[i] = suff[i+1] + 1;
            else
                suff[i] = 2;
        }

        int ans = 2;

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            ans = max(ans, pref[i]);
            ans = max(ans, suff[i]);
        }

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (i > 0)
                ans = max(ans, pref[i-1] + 1);

            if (i + 1 < n)
                ans = max(ans, suff[i+1] + 1);

            if (i > 0 && i + 1 < n) {
                long long diff = nums[i+1] - nums[i-1];

                if (diff % 2 == 0) {
                    diff /= 2;

                    int cand = 1;

                    if (i >= 2 && nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == diff)
                        cand += pref[i-1];
                    else
                        cand += 1;

                    if (i + 2 < n && nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == diff)
                        cand += suff[i+1];
                    else
                        cand += 1;

                    ans = max(ans, cand);
                }
            }
        }

        return min(ans, n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        unordered_map<int,int> xid, yid;
        int idx = 0, idy = n;
        for (auto& p : points) {
            if (!xid.count(p[0])) xid[p[0]] = idx++;
            if (!yid.count(p[1])) yid[p[1]] = idy++;
        }

        vector<int> par(2*n), rnk(2*n, 0), sz(2*n, 1);
        iota(par.begin(), par.end(), 0);
        function<int(int)> find = [&](int x) {
            return par[x] == x ? x : par[x] = find(par[x]);
        };
        auto unite = [&](int a, int b) {
            a = find(a); b = find(b);
            if (a == b) return;
            if (rnk[a] < rnk[b]) swap(a, b);
            par[b] = a;
            sz[a] += sz[b];
            if (rnk[a] == rnk[b]) rnk[a]++;
        };

        for (auto& p : points)
            unite(xid[p[0]], yid[p[1]]);
        
        unordered_map<int,int> compPoints;
        for (auto& p : points)
            compPoints[find(xid[p[0]])]++;

        vector<int> compSizes;
        for (auto& [root, cnt] : compPoints)
            compSizes.push_back(cnt);
        sort(compSizes.rbegin(), compSizes.rend());
      
        int best = 1;
        if (compSizes.size() >= 2)
            best = compSizes[0] + compSizes[1] + 1;
        else if (compSizes.size() == 1)
            best = compSizes[0] + 1; 
        
        return best;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 930 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        if (n <= 3) return n;

        int[] left = new int[n];
        int[] right = new int[n];
        left[0] = 1; left[1] = 2;
        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            if ((long) nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == (long) nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2])
                left[i] = left[i - 1] + 1;
            else
                left[i] = 2;
        }
        right[n - 1] = 1; right[n - 2] = 2;
        for (int i = n - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if ((long) nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == (long) nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1])
                right[i] = right[i + 1] + 1;
            else
                right[i] = 2;
        }

        int best = 3;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
            best = Math.max(best, left[i]);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
            best = Math.max(best, right[i]);

        best = Math.max(best, Math.min(right[1] + 1, n));
        best = Math.max(best, Math.min(left[n - 2] + 1, n));

        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++) {
            int L = left[i - 1];
            int R = right[i + 1];
            long dL = (L >= 2) ? (long) nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] : Long.MIN_VALUE;
            long dR = (R >= 2) ? (long) nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] : Long.MIN_VALUE;
            long gap = (long) nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1];

            best = Math.max(best, L + 1);
            best = Math.max(best, R + 1);

            if (L >= 2 && R >= 2 && dL == dR && gap == 2 * dL)
                best = Math.max(best, L + R + 1);

            if (L >= 2 && gap == 2 * dL)
                best = Math.max(best, L + 2);

            if (R >= 2 && gap == 2 * dR)
                best = Math.max(best, R + 2);
        }

        return best;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    class UnionFind {
        int[] parent, size;
        UnionFind(int n) {
            parent = new int[n]; size = new int[n];
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { parent[i] = i; size[i] = 1; }
        }
        int find(int a) {
            if (parent[a] != a) parent[a] = find(parent[a]);
            return parent[a];
        }
        void union(int a, int b) {
            int pa = find(a), pb = find(b);
            if (pa == pb) return;
            if (size[pa] >= size[pb]) { parent[pb] = pa; size[pa] += size[pb]; }
            else { parent[pa] = pb; size[pb] += size[pa]; }
        }
    }

    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n = points.length;
        Map<Integer, List<Integer>> xMap = new HashMap<>(), yMap = new HashMap<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            xMap.computeIfAbsent(points[i][0], k -> new ArrayList<>()).add(i);
            yMap.computeIfAbsent(points[i][1], k -> new ArrayList<>()).add(i);
        }
        UnionFind uf = new UnionFind(n);
        for (List<Integer> g : xMap.values())
            for (int j = 1; j < g.size(); j++) uf.union(g.get(0), g.get(j));
        for (List<Integer> g : yMap.values())
            for (int j = 1; j < g.size(); j++) uf.union(g.get(0), g.get(j));

        Set<Integer> xRoots = new HashSet<>(), yRoots = new HashSet<>();
        for (List<Integer> g : xMap.values()) xRoots.add(uf.find(g.get(0)));
        for (List<Integer> g : yMap.values()) yRoots.add(uf.find(g.get(0)));

        int[] topY = {-1, -1};
        for (int r : yRoots) {
            if (topY[0] == -1 || uf.size[r] > uf.size[topY[0]]) {
                topY[1] = topY[0]; topY[0] = r;
            } else if (topY[1] == -1 || uf.size[r] > uf.size[topY[1]]) {
                topY[1] = r;
            }
        }

        int best = 1;
        for (int r : xRoots) best = Math.max(best, uf.size[r] + 1);
        for (int r : yRoots) best = Math.max(best, uf.size[r] + 1);

        for (int xr : xRoots) {
            if (topY[0] != -1 && topY[0] != xr)
                best = Math.max(best, uf.size[xr] + uf.size[topY[0]] + 1);
            else if (topY[1] != -1)
                best = Math.max(best, uf.size[xr] + uf.size[topY[1]] + 1);
        }

        return best;
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 931 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        left = [defaultdict(lambda: 1) for _ in range(n)]
        for i in range(1, n):
            d = nums[i] - nums[i-1]
            left[i][d] = left[i-1][d] + 1
            
        right = [defaultdict(lambda: 1) for _ in range(n)]
        for i in range(n - 2, -1, -1):
            d = nums[i+1] - nums[i]
            right[i][d] = right[i+1][d] + 1
            
        res = 0
        for i in range(n):
            for d in left[i]:
                res = max(res, left[i][d] + (1 if i < n-1 else 0))
            for d in right[i]:
                res = max(res, right[i][d] + (1 if i > 0 else 0))
        
        for i in range(1, n - 1):
            total_diff = nums[i+1] - nums[i-1]
            if total_diff % 2 == 0:
                d = total_diff // 2
                res = max(res, left[i-1][d] + right[i+1][d] + 1)
            
            d_left = nums[i] - nums[i-1]
            res = max(res, left[i][d_left] + 1)
            
            d_right = nums[i+1] - nums[i]
            res = max(res, right[i][d_right] + 1)

        return min(res, n)
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        # sounds like union set, I need to find several set of points. In each union, all points can activate each others. And The answer should 1 + size(1st largest union) + size(2nd largest union); if only one union exist, The answer should be 1 + size(points)
        parent = {}
        def find(i):
            if parent[i] == i:
                return i
            parent[i] = find(parent[i])
            return parent[i]
        def union(i, j):
            root_i, root_j = find(i), find(j)
            if root_i != root_j:
                parent[root_j] = root_i

        for x, y in points:
            x_key = ('x', x)
            y_key = ('y', y)
            parent[x_key] = parent.get(x_key, x_key)
            parent[y_key] = parent.get(y_key, y_key)
            union(x_key, y_key)

        mp = {}
        for x, y in points:
            root = find(('x', x))
            mp[root] = mp.get(root, 0) + 1
        sizes = sorted(mp.values(), reverse=True)
        if len(sizes) >= 2:
            return sizes[0] + sizes[1] + 1
        elif len(sizes) == 1:
            return sizes[0] + 1
[Q4_END]

### RANK 936 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        vector<int> c(nums.size(), 0);
        int n = nums.size(), k = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) {
            nums[i] -= nums[i + 1];
        }
        int ans = 1;
        n--;
        vector<int> pref(n, 1), suff(n, 1);
        for (int i = 1; i < n; i++) {
            if (nums[i] == nums[i - 1])
                pref[i] += pref[i - 1];
        }
        for (int i = n - 2; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (nums[i] == nums[i + 1]) {
                suff[i] += suff[i + 1];
            }
        }
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            ans = max(ans, pref[i] + 1);
            ans = max(ans, suff[i] + 1);
        }
        for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) {
            if (i - 1 >= 0 && nums[i] + nums[i + 1] == 2 * nums[i - 1]) {
                int cnt = pref[i - 1] + 2;
                if (i + 2 < n && nums[i + 2] == nums[i - 1]) {
                    cnt += suff[i + 2];
                }
                ans = max(ans, cnt);
            }
            if (i + 2 < n && nums[i] + nums[i + 1] == 2 * nums[i + 2]) {
                int cnt = suff[i + 2] + 2;
                if (i - 1 >= 0 && nums[i + 2] == nums[i - 1]) {
                    cnt += pref[i - 1];
                }
                ans = max(ans, cnt);
            }
        }
        return min(ans + 1, n + 1); 
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& p) {
        int n = p.size();
        if (n == 0)
            return 1;
        unordered_map<int, vector<int>> mx, my;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            mx[p[i][0]].push_back(i);
            my[p[i][1]].push_back(i);
        }
        vector<vector<int>> g(n);
        for (auto& pair : mx) {
            auto& ids = pair.second;
            for (int i = 0; i < (int)ids.size() - 1; i++) {
                g[ids[i]].push_back(ids[i + 1]);
                g[ids[i + 1]].push_back(ids[i]);
            }
        }
        for (auto& pair : my) {
            auto& ids = pair.second;
            for (int i = 0; i < (int)ids.size() - 1; i++) {
                g[ids[i]].push_back(ids[i + 1]);
                g[ids[i + 1]].push_back(ids[i]);
            }
        }

        vector<int> vis(n, 0);
        vector<int> c;

        auto dfs = [&](auto&& self, int i, int& cnt) -> void {
            vis[i] = 1;
            cnt++;
            for (int u : g[i]) {
                if (!vis[u]) {
                    self(self, u, cnt);
                }
            }
        };

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (!vis[i]) {
                int cnt = 0;
                dfs(dfs, i, cnt);
                c.push_back(cnt);
            }
        }
        sort(c.rbegin(), c.rend());

        if (c.size() >= 2) {
            return c[0] + c[1] + 1;
        }
        return c[0] + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 938 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        diff = []
        pre = None
        for n in nums:
            if pre is not None:
                diff.append(n - pre)
            pre = n

        diff.append('0')
        compressed = []
        pre = None
        n = 0
        for d in diff:
            if pre is None:
                pre = d
                n = 1
                continue

            if pre == d:
                n += 1
            else:
                compressed.append((pre, n))
                n = 1
                pre = d

        if len(compressed) == 1:
            return len(nums)

        max_len = 0
        for d, n in compressed:
            max_len = max(max_len, n+1)

        pre = None
        for i, (d, n) in enumerate(compressed):
            if pre is None:
                pre = (d, n)
                continue

            if pre[1] == 1 and n == 1:
                if (pre[0] + d) % 2 == 0:
                    l = 2
                    nd = (pre[0] + d) // 2
                    if i-2 >= 0 and compressed[i-2][0] == nd:
                        l += compressed[i-2][1]
                    if i+1 < len(compressed) and compressed[i+1][0] == nd:
                        l += compressed[i+1][1]
                    max_len = max(max_len, l)
            pre = (d, n)

        return max_len + 1
            
            
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
import heapq
from collections import deque

class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        chains = {}
        for x, y in points:
            x = str(x)
            if x in chains:
                chains[x].append(y)
            else:
                chains[x] = [y]

            if y in chains:
                chains[y].append(x)
            else:
                chains[y] = [x]

        visited = set()
        size = []
        
        for node in chains:
            n = 0
            de = deque()
            de.append(node)
            
            while de:
                curr = de.popleft()
                for other in chains[curr]:
                    line = (curr, other)
                    if line in visited:
                        continue
                    visited.add(line)
                    visited.add((other, curr))

                    de.append(other)
                    n += 1

            size.append(n)

        return sum(heapq.nlargest(2, size))+1
            
[Q4_END]

class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
        int n=nums.length;
        if(n<=2)return n;
        int[] left=new int[n],right=new int[n];
        Arrays.fill(left,2);
        Arrays.fill(right,2);
        left[0]=1;
        right[n-1]=1;
        for(int i=2;i<n;i++){
            if((long)nums[i]-nums[i-1]==(long)nums[i-1]-nums[i-2])left[i]=left[i-1]+1;
            else left[i]=2;
        }
        for(int i=n-3;i>=0;i--){
            if((long)nums[i+1]-nums[i]==(long)nums[i+2]-nums[i+1])right[i]=right[i+1]+1;
            else right[i]=2;
        }
        int maxlen=Math.min(2,n);
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++)maxlen=Math.max(maxlen,left[i]);
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            if(i>=2)maxlen=Math.max(maxlen,left[i-1]+1);
            if(i<=n-3)maxlen=Math.max(maxlen,1+right[i+1]);
            if(i>0&&i<n-1){
                long tot=(long)nums[i+1]-nums[i-1];
                if(tot%2==0){
                    long d=tot/2;;
                    int currlen=1;
                    if(i>=2&&(long)nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]==d)currlen+=left[i-1];
                    else currlen+=1;
                    if(i<=n-3&&(long)nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]==d)currlen+=right[i+1];
                    else currlen+=1;
                    maxlen=Math.max(maxlen,currlen);
                }
                // maxlen=Math.max(maxlen,left[i-1]+1);
                // maxlen=Math.max(maxlen,1+right[i+1]);
            }
            if(i==1&&n>2){
                long expect=(long)nums[2]-nums[0];
                if(expect%2==0)maxlen=Math.max(maxlen,3);
            }
            if(i==n-2&&n>2){
                long expect=(long)nums[n-1]-nums[n-3];
                if(expect%2==0)maxlen=Math.max(maxlen,3);
            }
            
        }return maxlen;
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    class dsu{
        int[] par,size;
        public  int find(int i){
            if(par[i]==i)return i;
            return par[i]=find(par[i]);
        }
        public  void union(int i,int j){
            int sa=find(i),sb=find(j);
            if(sa!=sb){
                if(size[sa]<size[sb]){
                    par[sa]=sb;
                size[sb]+=size[sa];
                }else{
                    par[sb]=sa;
                size[sa]+=size[sb];
                }
            }
        }
        public dsu(int n){
            par=new int[n];
            size=new int[n];
            for(int i=0;i<n;i++)par[i]=i;
            for(int i=0;i<n;i++)size[i]=1;
        }
    }
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        int n=points.length;
        if(n==0)return 0;
        dsu ds=new dsu(n);
        Integer[] idx=new Integer[n];
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++)idx[i]=i;
        Arrays.sort(idx,(a,b)->Integer.compare(points[a][0],points[b][0]));
        for(int i=1;i<n;i++)if(points[idx[i]][0]==points[idx[i-1]][0])ds.union(idx[i],idx[i-1]);
        Arrays.sort(idx,(a,b)->Integer.compare(points[a][1],points[b][1]));
        for(int i=1;i<n;i++)if(points[idx[i]][1]==points[idx[i-1]][1])ds.union(idx[i],idx[i-1]);
        List<Integer> sz=new ArrayList<>();
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++)if(ds.find(i)==i)sz.add(ds.size[i]);
        Collections.sort(sz,Collections.reverseOrder());
        if(sz.size()==1)return sz.get(0)+1;
        return sz.get(0)+sz.get(1)+1;
        
    }
}
