#include <stdlib.h>

int longestArithmetic(int* nums, int numsSize) {
    int useless1 = 10;
    int useless2 = 20;
    if (useless1 < useless2) {
        useless1 += 5;
    }

    if (numsSize <= 2) {
        return numsSize;
    }

    int useless3 = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
        useless3 += i;
    }

    int M = numsSize - 1;
    int* D = (int*)malloc(M * sizeof(int));
    for (int i = 0; i < M; i++) {
        D[i] = nums[i+1] - nums[i];
    }

    int useless4 = useless1 + useless2 + useless3;
    while (useless4 > 100) {
        useless4--;
    }

    int* L = (int*)malloc(M * sizeof(int));
    int* R = (int*)malloc(M * sizeof(int));

    L[0] = 1;
    for (int i = 1; i < M; i++) {
        if (D[i] == D[i-1]) L[i] = L[i-1] + 1;
        else L[i] = 1;
    }

    int useless5 = 42;
    if (useless5 == 42) {
        useless5 = 0;
    }

    R[M-1] = 1;
    for (int i = M - 2; i >= 0; i--) {
        if (D[i] == D[i+1]) R[i] = R[i+1] + 1;
        else R[i] = 1;
    }

    int useless6 = 1;
    switch (useless6) {
        case 1: useless6 = 2; break;
        default: useless6 = 0; break;
    }

    int ans = (numsSize < 3) ? numsSize : 3;
    int max_block = 0;

    for (int i = 0; i < M; i++) {
        if (L[i] > max_block) max_block = L[i];
    }

    int useless7 = useless6 * 3;
    do {
        useless7--;
    } while (useless7 > 0);

    if (max_block == M) {
        ans = numsSize;
    } else {
        if (max_block + 2 > ans) {
            ans = max_block + 2; 
        }
    }

    int useless8 = 99;
    for(int k = 0; k < 3; k++) {
        useless8++;
    }

    for (int i = 0; i < M - 1; i++) {
        long long sum = (long long)D[i] + D[i+1];
        
        if (sum % 2 == 0) {
            long long d = sum / 2;
            int left_len = 0;
            if (i > 0 && D[i-1] == d) {
                left_len = L[i-1];
            }
            
            int right_len = 0;
            if (i + 2 < M && D[i+2] == d) {
                right_len = R[i+2];
            }
            
            int total_elements = left_len + right_len + 3;
            if (total_elements > ans) {
                ans = total_elements;
            }
        }
    }

    int useless9 = ans;
    if (useless9 < 0) {
        useless9 = 0;
    }

    free(D);
    free(L);
    free(R);

    return ans;
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
#include <stdlib.h>

typedef struct {
    int id;
    int x;
    int y;
} P_t;

int cmpX(const void* a, const void* b) {
    int val1 = ((P_t*)a)->x;
    int val2 = ((P_t*)b)->x;
    int useless_cmp1 = 1;
    if (useless_cmp1) {
        return val1 < val2 ? -1 : (val1 > val2 ? 1 : 0);
    }
    return 0;
}

int cmpY(const void* a, const void* b) {
    int val1 = ((P_t*)a)->y;
    int val2 = ((P_t*)b)->y;
    int useless_cmp2 = 1;
    if (useless_cmp2) {
        return val1 < val2 ? -1 : (val1 > val2 ? 1 : 0);
    }
    return 0;
}

int find_root(int* p, int i) {
    int u1 = 0;
    while(u1 < 2) { u1++; }
    if (p[i] == i) return i;
    p[i] = find_root(p, p[i]);
    return p[i];
}

int maxActivated(int** points, int pointsSize, int* pointsColSize) {
    int useless1 = 10;
    int useless2 = 20;
    if (useless1 < useless2) {
        useless1 += 5;
    }

    if (pointsSize == 0) return 1;

    P_t* arr = (P_t*)malloc(pointsSize * sizeof(P_t));
    int* parent = (int*)malloc(pointsSize * sizeof(int));
    int* sz = (int*)malloc(pointsSize * sizeof(int));

    int useless3 = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < pointsSize; i++) {
        arr[i].id = i;
        arr[i].x = points[i][0];
        arr[i].y = points[i][1];
        parent[i] = i;
        sz[i] = 1;
        useless3++;
    }

    int useless4 = useless1 + useless2 + useless3;
    while (useless4 > 100) {
        useless4--;
    }

    qsort(arr, pointsSize, sizeof(P_t), cmpX);

    int useless5 = 42;
    if (useless5 == 42) {
        useless5 = 0;
    }

    for (int i = 1; i < pointsSize; i++) {
        if (arr[i].x == arr[i-1].x) {
            int rootI = find_root(parent, arr[i].id);
            int rootJ = find_root(parent, arr[i-1].id);
            if (rootI != rootJ) {
                parent[rootI] = rootJ;
                sz[rootJ] += sz[rootI];
            }
        }
    }

    int useless6 = 1;
    switch (useless6) {
        case 1: useless6 = 2; break;
        default: useless6 = 0; break;
    }

    qsort(arr, pointsSize, sizeof(P_t), cmpY);

    int useless7 = useless6 * 3;
    do {
        useless7--;
    } while (useless7 > 0);

    for (int i = 1; i < pointsSize; i++) {
        if (arr[i].y == arr[i-1].y) {
            int rootI = find_root(parent, arr[i].id);
            int rootJ = find_root(parent, arr[i-1].id);
            if (rootI != rootJ) {
                parent[rootI] = rootJ;
                sz[rootJ] += sz[rootI];
            }
        }
    }

    int useless8 = 99;
    for(int k = 0; k < 3; k++) {
        useless8++;
    }

    int max1 = 0;
    int max2 = 0;

    for (int i = 0; i < pointsSize; i++) {
        if (parent[i] == i) {
            if (sz[i] > max1) {
                max2 = max1;
                max1 = sz[i];
            } else if (sz[i] > max2) {
                max2 = sz[i];
            }
        }
    }

    int useless9 = max1 + max2;
    if (useless9 < 0) {
        useless9 = 0;
    }

    free(arr);
    free(parent);
    free(sz);

    if (max2 == 0) {
        return max1 + 1;
    }
    
    return max1 + max2 + 1;
}

class Solution {
public:
    int get(vector<int>& nums){
        int n = nums.size();
        int ans=2;
        for(int i=1;i<n;i++){
            int d = nums[i]-nums[i-1];
            int j = i-1;
            while(i<n and nums[i]-nums[i-1] == d){
                i++;
            }
            int k = i;
            if(i==n){
                ans = max(ans, i-j);
                break;
            }
            int temp = nums[i];
            nums[i] = nums[i-1]+d;
            while(i<n and nums[i]-nums[i-1] == d){
                i++;
            }
            // cout<<i<<","<<k<<","<<j<<" | ";
            ans = max(ans, i-j);
            i = k-1;
            nums[k] = temp;
        }
        return ans;
    }
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int res = get(nums);
        reverse(nums.begin(), nums.end());
        cout<<endl;
        return max(res, get(nums));
        
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    static bool comp(vector<int> &a, vector<int> &b){
        if(a.size()!=b.size()) 
                return a.size() > b.size();
        return false;
    }
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        map<int, vector<int>> mpx, mpy;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            int x = points[i][0];
            int y = points[i][1];
            mpx[x].push_back(i);
            mpy[y].push_back(i);
        }
        map<int,bool> vst;
        vector<vector<int>> groups;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            if(vst[i]) continue;
            queue<int> q;
            vector<int> grp;
            for(auto it: mpy[points[i][1]]){
                vst[it] = true;   
                q.push(it), grp.push_back(it);
            }
            bool isx=false;
            map<int,bool> vstx, vsty;
            vsty[points[i][1]] = true;
            while(!q.empty()){
                int sz = q.size();
                while(sz--){
                    int cur = q.front(); q.pop();
                    if(!isx and !vstx[points[cur][0]]){
                        for(auto it: mpx[points[cur][0]]){
                            if(vst[it]) continue;
                            vst[it] = true;
                            q.push(it), grp.push_back(it);
                        }
                        vstx[points[cur][0]] = true;
                    } 
                    else if(isx and !vsty[points[cur][1]]){
                        for(auto it: mpy[points[cur][1]]){
                            if(vst[it]) continue;
                            vst[it] = true;
                            q.push(it), grp.push_back(it);
                        }
                        vsty[points[cur][1]] = true;
                    }
                }
                isx=!isx;
            }
            groups.push_back(grp);
        }
        if(groups.size()==1)
            return n+1;
        sort(groups.begin(), groups.end(), comp);
        return groups[0].size() + groups[1].size() + 1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 948 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 2) return n;

        vector<long long> diff(n);
        for (int i = 1; i < n; i++)
            diff[i] = (long long)nums[i] - nums[i-1];

        vector<int> left(n, 2), right(n, 2);

        left[0] = 1;
        for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) {
            if (diff[i] == diff[i-1])
                left[i] = left[i-1] + 1;
            //cout<<i<<" "<<left[i]<<endl;
        }
        
        //cout<<"----"<<endl;

        right[n - 1] = 1;
        right[n - 2] = 2;
        for (int i = n-3; i >= 1; i--) {
            if (diff[i + 1] == diff[i+2])
                right[i] = right[i+1] + 1;
            //cout<<i<<" "<<right[i]<<endl;
        }

        int ans = 2;
        ans = max({ans, right[0], left[n - 1], right[1] + 1, left[n - 2] + 1});
        for (int i = 1; i < n-1; i++) {
            ans = max(ans, left[i - 1] + 1);
            ans = max(ans, right[i + 1] + 1);
                
            long long total = (long long)nums[i+1] - nums[i-1];
            if (total % 2 == 0) {
                long long d = total / 2;

                int l = 1, r = 1;

                if (i-1 >= 1 && diff[i-1] == d)
                    l = left[i-1];

                
                if ((i+1 < n - 1 && diff[i+2] == d) || i == n- 2)
                    r = right[i+1];

                //cout <<i <<" "<<l<<" "<<r<<" "<<d<<endl;
                ans = max(ans, l + r + 1);
            }
        }

        return min(ans, n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        vector<int> xs, ys;
        for (auto& p : points) { 
            xs.push_back(p[0]); ys.push_back(p[1]); 
        }
        sort(xs.begin(), xs.end()); xs.erase(unique(xs.begin(), xs.end()), xs.end());
        sort(ys.begin(), ys.end()); ys.erase(unique(ys.begin(), ys.end()), ys.end());
        
        int X = xs.size(), Y = ys.size();
        vector<int> par(X + Y); 
        iota(par.begin(), par.end(), 0);
        vector<int> sz(X + Y, 0);
        
        for (auto& p : points) {
            int xi = lower_bound(xs.begin(), xs.end(), p[0]) - xs.begin();
            sz[xi]++;
        }
        
        function<int(int)> find = [&](int a) -> int {
            return par[a] == a ? a : par[a] = find(par[a]);
        };
        auto unite = [&](int a, int b) {
            a = find(a); b = find(b);
            if (a == b) return;
            if (sz[a] < sz[b]) swap(a, b);
            par[b] = a; sz[a] += sz[b];
        };
        
        for (auto& p : points) {
            int xi = lower_bound(xs.begin(), xs.end(), p[0]) - xs.begin();
            int yi = (int)(lower_bound(ys.begin(), ys.end(), p[1]) - ys.begin()) + X;
            unite(xi, yi);
        }
        
        unordered_map<int, int> xCompSize, yCompSize;
        unordered_map<int, long long> xCompXCount, xCompYCount;
        unordered_map<int, int> xCompPointCount;
        
        for (int i = 0; i < X; i++) {
            int r = find(i);
            xCompSize[r] = sz[r];
            xCompXCount[r]++;
        }
        for (int j = 0; j < Y; j++) {
            int r = find(X + j);
            yCompSize[r] = sz[r];
            xCompYCount[r]++;
        }
        
        int ans = 1;
        
        for (auto& [r, xc] : xCompXCount) {
            long long yc = xCompYCount.count(r) ? xCompYCount[r] : 0;
            int pts = sz[r];
            if (xc * yc > pts) {
                ans = max(ans, 1 + pts);
            }
            ans = max(ans, 1 + pts);
        }
        for (auto& [r, yc] : xCompYCount) {
            ans = max(ans, 1 + sz[r]);
        }
        
        vector<pair<int,int>> xComps, yComps;
        for (auto& [r, s] : xCompSize) xComps.push_back({s, r});
        for (auto& [r, s] : yCompSize) yComps.push_back({s, r});
        sort(xComps.rbegin(), xComps.rend());
        sort(yComps.rbegin(), yComps.rend());
        
        int xi2 = min((int)xComps.size(), 2);
        int yj2 = min((int)yComps.size(), 2);
        for (int i = 0; i < xi2; i++) {
            for (int j = 0; j < yj2; j++) {
                if (xComps[i].second != yComps[j].second) {
                    ans = max(ans, 1 + xComps[i].first + yComps[j].first);
                }
            }
        }
        
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 949 ###

class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int len = nums.size();
        if(len<=2)return len;
        vector<int> dp(len, -1);
        dp[len-1] = 1;
        dp[len-2] = 2;
        int ans = 2;
        for(int i=len-3; i>=0; i--){
            int d = nums[i+1]-nums[i];
            int cur_ans = (nums[i+2]-nums[i+1] == d)? dp[i+1]+1: 2;
            dp[i] = cur_ans;
            if(i+cur_ans<len){
                cur_ans++;
                if(i+cur_ans<len && (nums[i+cur_ans]==nums[i]+d*cur_ans)){
                    cur_ans++;
                    if(i+cur_ans<len && nums[i+cur_ans-1]-nums[i+cur_ans]==d)cur_ans+=dp[i+cur_ans-1]-1;
                }
            }
            // cout<<cur_ans<<endl;
            ans = max(ans, cur_ans);
        }
        // cout<<"**********"<<endl;
        //reverse
        dp[0] = 1;
        dp[1] = 2;
        for(int i=2; i<len; i++){
            int d = nums[i-1]-nums[i];
            int cur_ans = (nums[i-2]-nums[i-1] == d)? dp[i-1]+1: 2;
            dp[i] = cur_ans;
            if(i-cur_ans>=0){
                cur_ans++;
                if(i-cur_ans>=0 && (nums[i-cur_ans]==nums[i]+d*cur_ans)){
                    cur_ans++;
                    if(i-cur_ans>=0 && nums[i-cur_ans]-nums[i-cur_ans+1]==d)cur_ans+=dp[i-cur_ans+1]-1;
                }
            }
            
            // cout<<cur_ans<<endl;
            ans = max(ans, cur_ans);
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        unordered_map<int,unordered_set<int>> xmap, ymap;
        for(int i=0; i<n; i++){
            int x = points[i][0], y = points[i][1];
            xmap[x].insert(i);
            ymap[y].insert(i);
        }
        vector<int> ans;
        vector<int> vis(n, 0);
        for(int i=0; i<n; i++){
            if(vis[i])continue;
            int cur_ans = 1;
            queue<int> q;
            q.push(i);
            vis[i] = 1;
            while(q.size()){
                int cur = q.front();
                q.pop();
                int x = points[cur][0], y = points[cur][1];
                if(xmap.find(x)!=xmap.end()){
                    for(int nbr: xmap[x]){
                        if(nbr==cur)continue;
                        cur_ans++;
                        q.push(nbr);
                        vis[nbr] = 1;
                    }
                    xmap.erase(x);
                }
                if(ymap.find(y)!=ymap.end()){
                    for(int nbr: ymap[y]){
                        if(nbr==cur)continue;
                        cur_ans++;
                        q.push(nbr);
                        vis[nbr] = 1;
                    }
                    ymap.erase(y);
                }
            }
            ans.push_back(cur_ans);
        }
        sort(ans.begin(), ans.end(), greater<>());
        if(ans.size()==1)return ans[0]+1;
        return ans[0]+ans[1]+1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

class Solution(object):
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums):
        """
        :type nums: List[int]
        :rtype: int
        """
        arithmetic_ranges = dict()
        prev_diff = nums[1] - nums[0]
        range_start = 0
        for i in range(1, len(nums)):
            diff = nums[i] - nums[i - 1]
            if diff == prev_diff:
                continue
            else:
                if prev_diff not in arithmetic_ranges:
                    arithmetic_ranges[prev_diff] = []
                arithmetic_ranges[prev_diff].append((range_start, i - 1))
                range_start = i - 1
                prev_diff = diff

        if prev_diff not in arithmetic_ranges:
            arithmetic_ranges[prev_diff] = []
        arithmetic_ranges[prev_diff].append((range_start, len(nums) - 1))

        def max_single_range(start, end, arith_diff):
            max_single = 0
            range_len = end - start + 1
            if start > 1 and nums[start] - nums[start - 2] == 2 * arith_diff:
                return end - start + 3

            if end < len(nums) - 2 and nums[end + 2] - nums[end] == 2 * arith_diff:
                return end - start + 3

            if start > 0:
                return end - start + 2

            if end < len(nums) - 1:
                return end - start + 2

            return end - start + 1

        max_possible = 0
        for diff, diff_ranges in arithmetic_ranges.items():
            for i in range(len(diff_ranges)):
                max_possible = max(max_possible, max_single_range(diff_ranges[i][0], diff_ranges[i][1], diff))
                if i > 0:
                    prev_end = diff_ranges[i - 1][1]
                    current_start = diff_ranges[i][0]
                    if current_start - prev_end == 2 and nums[current_start] - nums[prev_end] == 2 * diff:
                        max_possible = max(max_possible, diff_ranges[i][1] - diff_ranges[i - 1][0] + 1)

        return max_possible
                        
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class UnionFind:
    def __init__(self, n):
        self.parents = [i for i in range(n)]
        self.sizes = [1 for _ in range(n)]
        
    def get_parent(self, idx):
        current_idx = idx
        while self.parents[current_idx] != current_idx:
            current_idx = self.parents[current_idx]
        self.parents[idx] = current_idx
        return current_idx

    def union(self, idx1, idx2):
        parent1 = self.get_parent(idx1)
        parent2 = self.get_parent(idx2)
        self.parents[parent1] = parent2
        self.sizes[parent2] += self.sizes[parent1]

class Solution(object):

    
    def maxActivated(self, points):
        """
        :type points: List[List[int]]
        :rtype: int
        """
        if len(points) == 1:
            return 2
            
        uf = UnionFind(len(points))
        group_by_x = dict()
        group_by_y = dict()

        for i in range(len(points)):
            if points[i][0] not in group_by_x:
                group_by_x[points[i][0]] = []
            group_by_x[points[i][0]].append(i)

            if points[i][1] not in group_by_y:
                group_by_y[points[i][1]] = []
            group_by_y[points[i][1]].append(i)
        
        from collections import deque
        visited = set()
        visited_x = set()
        visited_y = set()

        frontier = deque()
        for i in range(len(points)):
            if i not in visited:
                frontier.append(i)
                visited.add(i)
            while frontier:
                point_idx = frontier.popleft()
                point = points[point_idx]
                
                if point[0] not in visited_x:
                    visited_x.add(point[0])
                    for neighbour_idx in group_by_x[point[0]]:
                        if neighbour_idx not in visited:
                            visited.add(neighbour_idx)
                            frontier.append(neighbour_idx)
                            uf.union(point_idx, neighbour_idx)

                if point[1] not in visited_y:
                    visited_y.add(point[1])
                    for neighbour_idx in group_by_y[point[1]]:
                        if neighbour_idx not in visited:
                            visited.add(neighbour_idx)
                            frontier.append(neighbour_idx)
                            uf.union(point_idx, neighbour_idx)
        segment_sizes = []
        for i in range(len(points)):
            if uf.parents[i] == i:
                segment_sizes.append(uf.sizes[i])

        if len(segment_sizes) == 1:
            return segment_sizes[0] + 1

        segment_sizes.sort()
        return segment_sizes[-1] + segment_sizes[-2] + 1
                
                            
        
        
[Q4_END]

### RANK 991 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        vector<int> lmax(n, 1), rmax(n, 1);
        
        for(int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
            if(i >= 2 && nums[i] - nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]) {
                lmax[i] = lmax[i-1] + 1;
            } else {
                lmax[i] = 2;
            }
        }

        // for(auto x:lmax) cout<<x<<" ";
        // cout<<endl;
        
        for(int i = n - 2; i >= 0; --i) {
            if(i <= n - 3 && nums[i+1] - nums[i] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]) {
                rmax[i] = rmax[i+1] + 1;
            } else {
                rmax[i] = 2;
            }
        }

        // for(auto x:rmax) cout<<x<<" ";
        // cout<<endl;
        
        int ans = 0; 
        
        for(int i=0; i<n; i++) {
            ans = max({ans, lmax[i], rmax[i]});
        }

        for(int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            if(i > 0) ans = max(ans, lmax[i-1] + 1);
            if(i + 1 < n) ans = max(ans, rmax[i+1] + 1);
            
            if(i > 0 && i < n - 1) {
                int d = nums[i+1] - nums[i-1];
                if(d % 2 == 0) {
                    d /= 2;
                    int leftLen = 1;
                    int rightLen = 1;

                    if (i >= 2 && nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == d) leftLen = lmax[i-1];
                    if (i <= n - 3 && nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == d) rightLen = rmax[i+1];
                
                    ans = max(ans, leftLen + rightLen + 1);
                }
            }
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
struct DSU {
    vector<int> p, sz;
    DSU(int n) {
        p.resize(n);
        sz.assign(n,0);
        iota(p.begin(),p.end(),0);
    }

    int find(int x){
        if(p[x]==x) return x;
        return p[x]=find(p[x]);
    }

    void unite(int a,int b){
        a=find(a), b=find(b);
        if(a==b) return;
        p[b]=a;
        sz[a]+=sz[b];
    }
};

class Solution {
    using ll = long long;
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& pt) {
        int n = pt.size();
        unordered_map<ll,int> mpx, mpy;
        int xid = 0, yid = 0;

        for(auto& p:pt) {
            if(!mpx.count(p[0])) mpx[p[0]] = xid++;
            if(!mpy.count(p[1])) mpy[p[1]] = yid++;
        }

        int nn = xid + yid;

        DSU dsu(nn);

        for(auto& p:pt) {
            int x = mpx[p[0]];
            int y = mpy[p[1]] + xid;
            dsu.unite(x,y);
        }

        vector<int> component(nn,0);

        for(auto& p:pt) {
            int x = mpx[p[0]];
            int r = dsu.find(x);
            component[r]++;
        }

        vector<int> sz;
        for(int i=0; i<nn; ++i) {
            if(dsu.find(i) == i && component[i] > 0) {
                sz.push_back(component[i]);
            }
        }
        sort(rbegin(sz), rend(sz));
        int ans = 1;
        if(sz.size() >= 1) ans = max(ans, sz[0] + 1);
        if(sz.size() >= 2) ans = max(ans, sz[0] + sz[1] + 1);
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 992 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    bool isOk(int mid, vector<int>& nums){
        for(int i=0; i<=nums.size()-mid; i++) {
            int diff = nums[i+1] - nums[i];
            int c = 0;
            int ind = -1;
            for(int j=i+2; j<i+mid; j++) {
                if(ind == j-1) {
                    int d = (nums[j] - nums[j-2]);
                    if(d%2 != 0) {
                        c++;
                        break;
                    }
                    else if(d/2 != diff) {
                        c++;
                        break;
                    }
                }
                else {
                    int d = nums[j] - nums[j-1];
                    if(d != diff) {
                        c++;
                        ind = j;
                    }
                    if(c > 1) break;
                }
            }
            if(c <= 1) return true;
        }
        for(int i=nums.size()-1; i>=mid-1; i--) {
            int diff = nums[i] - nums[i-1];
            int c = 0;
            int ind = -1;
            for(int j=i-2; j>=i-mid+1; j--) {
                if(ind == j+1) {
                    int d = (nums[j+2] - nums[j]);
                    if(d%2 != 0) {
                        c++;
                        break;
                    }
                    else if(d/2 != diff) {
                        c++;
                        break;
                    }
                }
                else {
                    int d = nums[j+1] - nums[j];
                    if(d != diff) {
                        c++;
                        ind = j;
                    }
                    if(c > 1) break;
                }
            }
            if(c <= 1) return true;
        }
        return false;
    }
    
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        int ans = 2;
        int l=2, h=n;
        while(l <= h) {
            int mid = l + (h-l)/2;
            if(isOk(mid, nums)) {
                ans = mid;
                l = mid+1;
            }
            else h = mid-1;
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class DSU {
    vector<int> parent, size;
public:
    DSU(int n) {
        parent.resize(n);
        for(int i=0; i<n; i++) parent[i] = i;
        size.resize(n, 1);
    }

    int findPar(int node) {
        if(parent[node] == node) return node;
        return parent[node] = findPar(parent[node]);
    }

    bool unionBySize(int u, int v) {
        int pu = findPar(u), pv = findPar(v);
        if(pu == pv) return false;
        if(size[pu] < size[pv]) {
            parent[pu] = pv;
            size[pv] += size[pu];
        }
        else {
            parent[pv] = pu;
            size[pu] += size[pv];
        }
        return true;
    }

    vector<int> groupSizes() {
        vector<int> ans;
        for(int i=0; i<parent.size(); i++) {
            if(findPar(i) == i) ans.push_back(size[i]);
        }
        return ans;
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        unordered_map<int, vector<int>> x, y;
        for(int i=0; i<n; i++) {
            x[points[i][0]].push_back(i);
            y[points[i][1]].push_back(i);
        }

        DSU dsu(n);
        for(auto it: x) {
            vector<int> temp = it.second;
            int u = temp[0];
            for(int i=1; i<temp.size(); i++) {
                int v = temp[i];
                dsu.unionBySize(u, v);
            }
        }

        for(auto it: y) {
            vector<int> temp = it.second;
            int u = temp[0];
            for(int i=1; i<temp.size(); i++) {
                int v = temp[i];
                dsu.unionBySize(u, v);
            }
        }

        vector<int> v = dsu.groupSizes();
        if(v.size() == 1) return v[0] + 1;
        sort(v.begin(), v.end(), greater<int>());
        return v[0] + v[1] + 1;
    }

    
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 993 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution{
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums){
        int n=nums.length;
        if(n<=2)return n;
        int[] pre=new int[n],suf=new int[n];
        pre[0]=1;pre[1]=2;
        for(int i=2;i<n;i++)pre[i]=(nums[i]-nums[i-1]==nums[i-1]-nums[i-2])?pre[i-1]+1:2;
        suf[n-1]=1;suf[n-2]=2;
        for(int i=n-3;i>=0;i--)suf[i]=(nums[i+1]-nums[i]==nums[i+2]-nums[i+1])?suf[i+1]+1:2;
        int ans=2;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            if(i+1<n)ans=Math.max(ans,suf[i+1]+1);
            if(i-1>=0)ans=Math.max(ans,pre[i-1]+1);
            if(i>0&&i<n-1){
                if((nums[i+1]-nums[i-1])%2==0){
                    int d=(nums[i+1]-nums[i-1])/2;
                    int L=(i>=2&&nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]==d)?pre[i-1]:1;
                    int R=(i<=n-3&&nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]==d)?suf[i+1]:1;
                    ans=Math.max(ans,L+R+1);
                }
                if(i>=2&&i<=n-3&&nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]==nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]){
                    if(nums[i+1]-nums[i-1]==2*(nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]))
                        ans=Math.max(ans,pre[i-1]+suf[i+1]+1);
                }
            }
        }
        return Math.min(ans,n);
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    HashMap<Long,Long> hm=new HashMap<>();

    long findpar(long x){
        if(hm.get(x)==x)return x;
        long a=findpar(hm.get(x));
        hm.put(x,a);
        return a;
    }

    void union(long x,long y){
        long px=findpar(x);
        long py=findpar(y);
        if(px!=py) hm.put(py,px);
    }

    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
        long OFFSET=1000000001L;
        for(int[] i:points){
            long x=i[0];
            long y=i[1]+OFFSET;
            if(!hm.containsKey(x)) hm.put(x,x);
            if(!hm.containsKey(y)) hm.put(y,y);

            union(x,y);
        }
        HashMap<Long,Integer> comp=new HashMap<>();
        for(int[] p:points){
            long root=findpar(p[0]);
            comp.put(root,comp.getOrDefault(root,0)+1);
        }
        int m1=0,m2=0;
        for(int v:comp.values()){
            if(v>m1){
                m2=m1;
                m1=v;
            }
            else if(v>m2){
                m2=v;
            }
        }

        return m1+m2+1;
    }
}

[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        left = [1, 2]
        for i in range(2, n):
            if (nums[i]-nums[i-1]) == (nums[i-1]-nums[i-2]): left.append(left[-1]+1)
            else: left.append(2)
        print(left)
        right = [1, 2]
        for i in reversed(range(n-2)):
            if (nums[i+1]-nums[i]) == (nums[i+2]-nums[i+1]): right.append(right[-1]+1)
            else: right.append(2)
        right.reverse()
        print(right)
        res = max(max(left), max(right))
        for i in range(1, n-1):
            res = max(res, left[i]+1)
            res = max(res, right[i]+1)
            tmp = nums[i+1]-nums[i-1]
            if tmp%2 == 0: 
                d = tmp//2 
                L = 1 
                if i >= 2 and nums[i-1]-nums[i-2] == d: 
                    L = left[i-1]
                R = 1 
                if i < n-2 and nums[i+2]-nums[i+1] == d:
                    R = right[i+1]
                res = max(res, L+R+1)
        return min(n, res)

[Q4_START]
class Solution:
    def maxActivated(self, points: list[list[int]]) -> int:
        mx = 10**6
        n = len(points)
        p = {}
        def find(x):
            while x != p[x]:
                p[x] = p[p[x]]
                x = p[x]
            return x 
        
        for x, y in points: 
            if (0, x) not in p: 
                p[(0, x)] = (0, x)
            if (1, y) not in p: 
                p[(1, y)] = (1, y)
            rx, ry = find((0, x)), find((1, y))
            if rx != ry: 
                p[rx] = ry 

        cnt = Counter()
        for x, y in points:
            cnt[find((0, x))] += 1 
            
        v = sorted(cnt.values(), reverse=True)
        if len(v) > 1: 
            return v[0]+v[1]+1
        return v[0]+1 if v else 1 
        return min(n+1, res)

### RANK 995 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
    public int longestArithmetic(int[] nums) {
         int len = nums.length;
        if (len <= 2) return len;

        int[] leftCnt = new int[len];
        int[] rightCnt = new int[len];

        leftCnt[0] = 1;
        leftCnt[1] = 2;

        for (int i = 2; i < len; i++) {
            if (nums[i] - nums[i - 1] == nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2]) {
                leftCnt[i] = leftCnt[i - 1] + 1;
            } else {
                leftCnt[i] = 2;
            }
        }

        rightCnt[len - 1] = 1;
        rightCnt[len - 2] = 2;

        for (int i = len - 3; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (nums[i + 1] - nums[i] == nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1]) {
                rightCnt[i] = rightCnt[i + 1] + 1;
            } else {
                rightCnt[i] = 2;
            }
        }

        int best = 0;

        for (int i = 0; i < len; i++) {

            if (i > 0)
                best = Math.max(best, leftCnt[i - 1] + 1);

            if (i < len - 1)
                best = Math.max(best, rightCnt[i + 1] + 1);

            if (i > 0 && i < len - 1) {

                int leftDiff = nums[i] - nums[i - 1];
                int rightDiff = nums[i + 1] - nums[i];

                if (leftDiff == rightDiff) {
                    best = Math.max(best, leftCnt[i - 1] + rightCnt[i + 1]);
                }

                if ((nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) % 2 == 0) {

                    int newDiff = (nums[i + 1] - nums[i - 1]) / 2;

                    int leftPart = 1;
                    if (i >= 2 && nums[i - 1] - nums[i - 2] == newDiff)
                        leftPart = leftCnt[i - 1];

                    int rightPart = 1;
                    if (i <= len - 3 && nums[i + 2] - nums[i + 1] == newDiff)
                        rightPart = rightCnt[i + 1];

                    best = Math.max(best, leftPart + rightPart + 1);
                }
            }
        }

        return Math.min(best, len);
    }
}
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    public int maxActivated(int[][] points) {
         int n = points.length;
        if (n == 0) return 1;

        Map<Integer, Integer> xStore = new HashMap<>();
        Map<Integer, Integer> yStore = new HashMap<>();

        UnionFind uF = new UnionFind(2 * n);
        int index = 0;

        for (int[] t : points) {

            if (!xStore.containsKey(t[0])) {
                xStore.put(t[0], index++);
            }

            if (!yStore.containsKey(t[1])) {
                yStore.put(t[1], index++);
            }

            int Idx = xStore.get(t[0]);
            int Idy = yStore.get(t[1]);

            uF.merge(Idx, Idy);
        }

        Map<Integer, Integer> groupSize = new HashMap<>();

        for (int[] s : points) {

            int root = uF.findRoot(xStore.get(s[0]));

            groupSize.put(root, groupSize.getOrDefault(root, 0) + 1);
        }

        List<Integer> values = new ArrayList<>(groupSize.values());

        Collections.sort(values, Collections.reverseOrder());

        if (values.size() >= 2) {
            return values.get(0) + values.get(1) + 1;
        }

        return values.get(0) + 1;
    }


    class UnionFind {

        int[] parentArr;

        UnionFind(int size) {
            parentArr = new int[size];
            for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) {
                parentArr[i] = i;
            }
        }

        int findRoot(int node) {
            if (parentArr[node] != node) {
                parentArr[node] = findRoot(parentArr[node]);
            }
            return parentArr[node];
        }

        void merge(int p, int q) {

            int rA = findRoot(p);
            int rB = findRoot(q);

            if (rA != rB) {
                parentArr[rA] = rB;
            }
        }
        
    }
}
[Q4_END]

### RANK 996 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& a) {
        int n=a.size();
        if(n<=2) return n;
        vector<int> l(n,1);
        vector<int> r(n,1);
        for(int i=1;i<n;i++){
            if(i==1) l[i]=2;
            else if(a[i]-a[i-1]==a[i-1]-a[i-2]) l[i]=l[i-1]+1;
            else l[i]=2;
        }
        for(int i=n-2;i>=0;i--){
            if(i==n-2) r[i]=2;
            else if(a[i+1]-a[i]==a[i+2]-a[i+1]) r[i]=r[i+1]+1;
            else r[i]=2;
        }
        int res=0;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            if(i>0) res=max(res,l[i-1]+1);
            if(i<n-1) res=max(res,r[i+1]+1);
            if(i>0&&i<n-1){
                int d1=a[i]-a[i-1];
                int d2=a[i+1]-a[i];
                if(d1==d2) res=max(res,l[i-1]+1+r[i+1]-1);
                if((a[i+1]-a[i-1])%2==0){
                    int t=(a[i+1]-a[i-1])/2;
                    int ls=(i>=2 && a[i-1]-a[i-2]==t)?l[i-1]:1;
                    int rs=(i<=n-3 && a[i+2]-a[i+1]==t)?r[i+1]:1;
                    res=max(res,ls+rs+1);
                }
            }
        }
        return min(res,n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n=points.size();
        if(n==0) return 1;
        unordered_map<int,vector<int>> x,y;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            x[points[i][0]].push_back(i);
            y[points[i][1]].push_back(i);
        }
        vector<bool> visit(n,false);
        vector<int> sizes;
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
            if(!visit[i]){
                int s=0;
                queue<int> q;
                q.push(i);
                visit[i]=true;
                while(!q.empty()){
                    int c=q.front();
                    q.pop();
                    s++;
                    int a=points[c][0];
                    int b=points[c][1];
                    if(x.count(a)){
                        for(int n1:x[a]){
                            if(!visit[n1]){
                                visit[n1]=true;
                                q.push(n1);
                            }
                        }
                        x.erase(a);
                    }
                    if(y.count(b)){
                        for(int n1:y[b]){
                            if(!visit[n1]){
                                visit[n1]=true;
                                q.push(n1);
                            }
                        }
                        y.erase(b);
                    }
                }
                sizes.push_back(s);
            }
        }
        sort(sizes.rbegin(),sizes.rend());
        if(sizes.size()>=2){
            return sizes[0]+sizes[1]+1;
        }
        return sizes[0]+1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 997 ###
[Q3_START]
#include <vector>
#include <unordered_map>
#include <algorithm>

using namespace std;

class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if (n <= 2) return n;

        // pref[i][d] = length of arithmetic subarray ending at i with diff d
        // suff[i][d] = length of arithmetic subarray starting at i with diff d
        vector<unordered_map<int, int>> pref(n), suff(n);

        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            if (i > 0) {
                int d = nums[i] - nums[i-1];
                pref[i][d] = pref[i-1].count(d) ? pref[i-1][d] + 1 : 2;
            }
        }

        for (int i = n - 1; i >= 0; --i) {
            if (i < n - 1) {
                int d = nums[i+1] - nums[i];
                suff[i][d] = suff[i+1].count(d) ? suff[i+1][d] + 1 : 2;
            }
        }

        int maxLen = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            // Case 1: Max length without changing nums[i]
            for (auto& it : pref[i]) maxLen = max(maxLen, it.second);
            
            // Case 2: Change nums[i] to bridge i-1 and i+1
            if (i > 0 && i < n - 1) {
                int diffSum = nums[i+1] - nums[i-1];
                if (diffSum % 2 == 0) {
                    int d = diffSum / 2;
                    int left = pref[i-1].count(d) ? pref[i-1][d] : 1;
                    int right = suff[i+1].count(d) ? suff[i+1][d] : 1;
                    maxLen = max(maxLen, left + right + 1);
                }
            }
            
            // Case 3: Change nums[i] to extend sequence from left or right
            if (i > 0) {
                for (auto& it : pref[i-1]) maxLen = max(maxLen, it.second + 1);
            }
            if (i < n - 1) {
                for (auto& it : suff[i+1]) maxLen = max(maxLen, it.second + 1);
            }
        }

        return maxLen;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
#include <vector>
#include <unordered_map>
#include <numeric>
#include <algorithm>

using namespace std;

struct DSU {
    vector<int> parent, size;
    DSU(int n) {
        parent.resize(n);
        iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0);
        size.assign(n, 1);
    }
    int find(int i) {
        if (parent[i] == i) return i;
        return parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
    }
    void unite(int i, int j) {
        int root_i = find(i);
        int root_j = find(j);
        if (root_i != root_j) {
            if (size[root_i] < size[root_j]) swap(root_i, root_j);
            parent[root_j] = root_i;
            size[root_i] += size[root_j];
        }
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        unordered_map<int, int> x_map, y_map;
        DSU dsu(n);

        // Group points by X and Y coordinates
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            int x = points[i][0], y = points[i][1];
            if (x_map.count(x)) dsu.unite(i, x_map[x]);
            if (y_map.count(y)) dsu.unite(i, y_map[y]);
            x_map[x] = i;
            y_map[y] = i;
        }

        // Identify which component each X and Y belongs to
        unordered_map<int, int> x_to_root, y_to_root;
        for (auto const& [x, idx] : x_map) x_to_root[x] = dsu.find(idx);
        for (auto const& [y, idx] : y_map) y_to_root[y] = dsu.find(idx);

        // Find the two largest distinct components
        vector<int> componentSizes;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            if (dsu.parent[i] == i) componentSizes.push_back(dsu.size[i]);
        }
        sort(componentSizes.rbegin(), componentSizes.rend());

        // Max points = Largest + Second Largest + 1 newly added point
        int result = componentSizes[0] + 1;
        if (componentSizes.size() > 1) {
            result += componentSizes[1];
        }

        return result;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        vector<pair<int, int>> diffCount;
        int n=nums.size();
        for(int i=0; i<n-1; i++){
            if(!diffCount.empty() && diffCount.back().first == (nums[i+1]-nums[i])){
                diffCount.back().second++;
            }else{
                diffCount.push_back({nums[i+1]-nums[i], 1});
            }
        }
        int ans =diffCount[0].second+1 , sz=diffCount.size();
        for(int i=0; i<sz-1; i++){
            ans = max({ans, diffCount[i].second+2, diffCount[i+1].second+2});
            if(diffCount[i].second==1 && i>0 && (diffCount[i].first+diffCount[i+1].first) == 2*diffCount[i-1].first){
                ans = max(ans, diffCount[i-1].second+3);
            }
            if(diffCount[i+1].second==1 && i<sz-2 && (diffCount[i].first+diffCount[i+1].first) == 2*diffCount[i+2].first){
                ans = max(ans, diffCount[i+2].second+3);
            }
            if(i>0 && i<sz-2 && diffCount[i].second==1 && diffCount[i+1].second==1 && diffCount[i-1].first==diffCount[i+2].first && (diffCount[i].first+diffCount[i+1].first) == 2*diffCount[i-1].first){
                ans = max(ans, diffCount[i-1].second+diffCount[i+2].second+3);
            }
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
    int dfs(vector<vector<int>>& adj, vector<bool>& vis, int node, int parent){
        if(vis[node])return 0;
        int cnt=1;
        vis[node]=true;
        for(int child: adj[node]){
            if(child!=parent)cnt += dfs(adj, vis, child, node);
        }
        return cnt;
    }
public:
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n=points.size();
        map<vector<int>, int> mp;
        for(int i=0; i<n; i++){
            mp[points[i]]=i;
        }
        vector<vector<int>> adj(n);
        sort(points.begin(), points.end());
        for(int i=0; i<n-1; i++){
            if(points[i][0]==points[i+1][0]){
                adj[mp[points[i]]].push_back(mp[points[i+1]]);
                adj[mp[points[i+1]]].push_back(mp[points[i]]);
            }
        }
        sort(points.begin(), points.end(), [](auto& a, auto& b){
            if(a[1]==b[1])return a[0]<b[0];
            else return a[1]<b[1];
        });
        for(int i=0; i<n-1; i++){
            if(points[i][1]==points[i+1][1]){
                adj[mp[points[i]]].push_back(mp[points[i+1]]);
                adj[mp[points[i+1]]].push_back(mp[points[i]]);
            }
        }
        vector<bool> vis(n, false);
        vector<int> areaCnt;
        for(int i=0; i<n; i++){
            int area = dfs(adj, vis, i, -1);
            if(area>0)areaCnt.push_back(area);
        }
        sort(areaCnt.begin(), areaCnt.end(), greater<int>());
        if(areaCnt.size()>1)return areaCnt[0]+areaCnt[1]+1;
        else return areaCnt[0]+1;
    }
};
[Q4_END]

### RANK 999 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution {
public:
    int longestArithmetic(vector<int>& nums) {
        int n = nums.size();
        if(n <= 2) return n;
        vector<int> L(n, 2), R(n, 2);
        int ans = 2;

        for(int i=2; i<n; i++) {
            if(nums[i] - nums[i-1] == nums[i-1] - nums[i-2]) {
                L[i] = L[i-1] + 1;
            }else {
                L[i] = 2;
            }
            ans = max(ans, L[i]);
        }
        for(int i=n-3; i>=0; i--) {
            if(nums[i+1] - nums[i] == nums[i+2] - nums[i+1]) {
                R[i] = R[i+1] + 1;
            }else {
                R[i] = 2;
            }
        }
        for(int i =1; i<n-1; i++) {
            int diff = nums[i+1] - nums[i-1];
            if(diff%2 == 0) {
                int d = diff/2;
                int left = 1, right = 1;

                if(i>=2 && nums[i-1] - nums[i-2] == d) left = L[i-1];
                if(i+2 < n && nums[i+2] - nums[i+1] == d) right = R[i+1];

                ans = max(ans, left+right+1);
            }
            ans = max(ans, L[i-1] +1);
            ans = max(ans, R[i+1] +1);
            
        }
        ans = max(ans, R[1] +1);
        ans = max(ans, L[n-2] +1);
        return min(ans, n);
    }
};
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
class Solution {
public:
    vector<int> parent, sz;

    int find(int x) {
        return parent[x] == x ? x : parent[x] = find(parent[x]);
    }

    void unite(int a, int b) {
        a = find(a); b = find(b);
        if (a == b) return;
        if (sz[a] < sz[b]) swap(a, b);
        parent[b] = a;
        sz[a] += sz[b];
    }
    int maxActivated(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        int n = points.size();
        parent.resize(n); sz.assign(n, 1);
        iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0);

        // Group indices by x and y coordinates
        unordered_map<int, int> firstByX, firstByY;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            auto [x, y] = make_pair(points[i][0], points[i][1]);

            if (firstByX.count(x)) unite(i, firstByX[x]);
            else firstByX[x] = i;

            if (firstByY.count(y)) unite(i, firstByY[y]);
            else firstByY[y] = i;
        }

        // Collect distinct component sizes (top-2)
        unordered_map<int, int> compSize;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
            compSize[find(i)] = sz[find(i)];

        int top1Size = 0, top2Size = 0, top1Root = -1;
        for (auto& [root, size] : compSize) {
            if (size > top1Size) {
                top2Size = top1Size;
                top1Size = size; top1Root = root;
            } else if (size > top2Size) {
                top2Size = size;
            }
        }

        int ans = 1 + top1Size; // new point shares x or y with largest component

        // For each existing component: pair it with the best other component
        for (auto& [root, size] : compSize) {
            int bestOther = (root == top1Root) ? top2Size : top1Size;
            ans = max(ans, 1 + size + bestOther);
        }

        return ans;
        
    }
};
[Q4_END]
##################

### RANK 1000 ###
[Q3_START]
class Solution:
    def longestArithmetic(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        groups = []
        start = 0
        longest = 3
        for i in range(1, len(nums)):
            diff_pre = nums[i] - nums[i-1]
            diff_post = None if i+1 >= len(nums) else nums[i+1] - nums[i]
            if diff_pre != diff_post:
                groups.append((start, i))
                start = i
        for i in range(len(groups)):
            first, last = groups[i]
            length = last - first + 1
            diff1 = nums[first+1] - nums[first]
            longest = max(longest, length)
            if first > 0 or last < len(nums) - 1:
                longest = max(longest, length + 1)
            if first-2 >= 0 and nums[first-2] + 2 * diff1 == nums[first]:
                longest = max(longest, length + 2)
            if last+2 < len(nums) and nums[last+2] == nums[last] + 2 * diff1:
                longest = max(longest, length + 2)
            if i+3 < len(groups):
                first2, last2 = groups[i+3]
                if last + 2 == first2:
                    diff2 = nums[first2+1] - nums[first2]
                    if diff1 == diff2 and nums[last] + 2 * diff1 == nums[first2]:
                        length2 = last2 - first2 + 1
                        longest = max(longest, length + 1 + length2)
        return longest
[Q3_END]
[Q4_START]
use std::collections::*;

struct UnionFind {
    data: Vec<usize>
}

impl UnionFind {
    fn new(size: usize) -> Self {
        Self {
            data: (0..size).collect()
        }
    }

    fn root_for(&self, mut i: usize) -> usize {
        while self.data[i] != i {
            i = self.data[i];
        }
        i
    }

    fn merge(&mut self, i: usize, j: usize) {
        let i_root = self.root_for(i);
        let j_root = self.root_for(j);
        self.data[i_root] = j_root;
        self.data[i] = j_root;
        self.data[j] = j_root;
    }
}

impl Solution {
    pub fn max_activated(points: Vec<Vec<i32>>) -> i32 {
        let n = points.len();
        let mut uf = UnionFind::new(n);
        let mut x_to_group = HashMap::new();
        let mut y_to_group = HashMap::new();
        for (i, pt) in points.iter().enumerate() {
            let x = pt[0];
            let y = pt[1];
            if let Some(x_group) = x_to_group.get(&x) {
                uf.merge(i, *x_group);
            } else {
                x_to_group.insert(x, i);
            }
            if let Some(y_group) = y_to_group.get(&y) {
                uf.merge(i, *y_group);
            } else {
                y_to_group.insert(y, i);
            }
        }
        let mut groupsizes = HashMap::new();
        for i in 0..n {
            let root = uf.root_for(i);
            groupsizes.entry(root).and_modify(|v| *v += 1).or_insert(1);
        }
        let mut sizes: Vec<i32> = groupsizes.into_values().collect();
        sizes.sort_unstable();
        sizes.reverse();
        if sizes.len() > 1 {
            1 + sizes[0] + sizes[1]
        } else {
            1 + sizes[0]
        }
    }
}
[Q4_END]
